title: A General Recipe for Likelihood-free Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 无似然贝叶斯优化的通用方法
comment: ICML 2022. This version fixes a typo in eq 33
comments: ICML 2022. This version fixes a typo in eq 33
abstract: The acquisition function, a critical component in Bayesian optimization (BO), can often be written as the expectation of a utility function under a surrogate model. However, to ensure that acquisition functions are tractable to optimize, restrictions must be placed on the surrogate model and utility function. To extend BO to a broader class of models and utilities, we propose likelihood-free BO (LFBO), an approach based on likelihood-free inference. LFBO directly models the acquisition function without having to separately perform inference with a probabilistic surrogate model. We show that computing the acquisition function in LFBO can be reduced to optimizing a weighted classification problem, where the weights correspond to the utility being chosen. By choosing the utility function for expected improvement (EI), LFBO outperforms various state-of-the-art black-box optimization methods on several real-world optimization problems. LFBO can also effectively leverage composite structures of the objective function, which further improves its regret by several orders of magnitude.
summary: The acquisition function, a critical component in Bayesian optimization (BO), can often be written as the expectation of a utility function under a surrogate model. However, to ensure that acquisition functions are tractable to optimize, restrictions must be placed on the surrogate model and utility function. To extend BO to a broader class of models and utilities, we propose likelihood-free BO (LFBO), an approach based on likelihood-free inference. LFBO directly models the acquisition function without having to separately perform inference with a probabilistic surrogate model. We show that computing the acquisition function in LFBO can be reduced to optimizing a weighted classification problem, where the weights correspond to the utility being chosen. By choosing the utility function for expected improvement (EI), LFBO outperforms various state-of-the-art black-box optimization methods on several real-world optimization problems. LFBO can also effectively leverage composite structures of the objective function, which further improves its regret by several orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 获取函数是贝叶斯优化 (BO) 中的关键组成部分，通常可以写为代理模型下效用函数的期望。然而，为了确保获取函数易于优化，必须对代理模型和效用函数施加限制。为了将 BO 扩展到更广泛的模型和实用程序类别，我们提出了无似然 BO (LFBO)，这是一种基于无似然推理的方法。 LFBO 直接对采集函数进行建模，而无需使用概率代理模型单独执行推理。我们表明，计算 LFBO 中的获取函数可以简化为优化加权分类问题，其中权重对应于所选择的效用。通过选择预期改进 (EI) 的效用函数，LFBO 在几个现实世界的优化问题上优于各种最先进的黑盒优化方法。 LFBO还可以有效地利用目标函数的复合结构，这进一步将其遗憾度提高了几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需概率代理模型的似然自由贝叶斯优化方法（LFBO），通过直接建模获取函数来扩展贝叶斯优化的适用范围。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯优化对代理模型和效用函数有严格限制，难以处理更广泛的模型和目标函数，需突破这些限制以提升优化能力。
AI.method: 基于似然自由推断，直接建模获取函数并将其转化为加权分类问题，权重由所选效用函数（如预期改进）确定。
AI.result: LFBO在多个现实优化问题中优于现有黑盒优化方法，并通过利用目标函数的复合结构显著降低遗憾值。
AI.conclusion: LFBO通过消除代理模型依赖并有效利用目标函数结构，为贝叶斯优化提供了更通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Mohammed Adnan,Yani Ioannou,Chuan-Yung Tsai,Angus Galloway,H. R. Tizhoosh,Graham W. Taylor
title: Monitoring Shortcut Learning using Mutual Information
title_zh: 使用互信息监控捷径学习
comment: Accepted at ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
comments: Accepted at ICML 2022 Workshop on Spurious Correlations, Invariance, and Stability
abstract: The failure of deep neural networks to generalize to out-of-distribution data is a well-known problem and raises concerns about the deployment of trained networks in safety-critical domains such as healthcare, finance and autonomous vehicles. We study a particular kind of distribution shift $\unicode{x2013}$ shortcuts or spurious correlations in the training data. Shortcut learning is often only exposed when models are evaluated on real-world data that does not contain the same spurious correlations, posing a serious dilemma for AI practitioners to properly assess the effectiveness of a trained model for real-world applications. In this work, we propose to use the mutual information (MI) between the learned representation and the input as a metric to find where in training, the network latches onto shortcuts. Experiments demonstrate that MI can be used as a domain-agnostic metric for monitoring shortcut learning.
summary: The failure of deep neural networks to generalize to out-of-distribution data is a well-known problem and raises concerns about the deployment of trained networks in safety-critical domains such as healthcare, finance and autonomous vehicles. We study a particular kind of distribution shift $\unicode{x2013}$ shortcuts or spurious correlations in the training data. Shortcut learning is often only exposed when models are evaluated on real-world data that does not contain the same spurious correlations, posing a serious dilemma for AI practitioners to properly assess the effectiveness of a trained model for real-world applications. In this work, we propose to use the mutual information (MI) between the learned representation and the input as a metric to find where in training, the network latches onto shortcuts. Experiments demonstrate that MI can be used as a domain-agnostic metric for monitoring shortcut learning.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络无法推广到分布外的数据是一个众所周知的问题，并引发了人们对在医疗保健、金融和自动驾驶汽车等安全关键领域部署经过训练的网络的担忧。我们研究训练数据中一种特殊的分布变化 $\unicode{x2013}$ 捷径或虚假相关性。通常只有当模型在不包含相同虚假相关性的真实世界数据上进行评估时，捷径学习才会暴露出来，这给人工智能从业者正确评估经过训练的模型在现实世界应用中的有效性带来了严重的困境。在这项工作中，我们建议使用学习到的表示和输入之间的互信息（MI）作为度量来查找训练中网络在何处锁定捷径。实验表明，MI 可以用作监控捷径学习的与领域无关的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用互信息作为指标，监控深度神经网络在训练过程中对输入数据中快捷方式或虚假相关性的依赖。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在分布外数据上的泛化能力不足，尤其在医疗、金融等安全关键领域存在风险，而模型对训练数据中虚假相关性的依赖（快捷学习）是导致这一问题的主要原因之一。
AI.method: 通过计算学习表示与输入数据之间的互信息（Mutual Information, MI），量化网络在训练过程中是否过度依赖输入特征中的虚假相关性。
AI.result: 实验验证了互信息指标能够作为领域无关的度量标准，有效监测模型在训练阶段对快捷学习的依赖程度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为评估模型在实际应用中的鲁棒性提供了新工具，有助于改进模型对分布外数据的适应能力。

authors_text: T. Bacek,M. Sun,H. Liu,Z. Chen,D. Kulic,D. Oetomo,Y. Tan
title: Varying Joint Patterns and Compensatory Strategies Can Lead to the Same Functional Gait Outcomes: A Case Study
title_zh: 不同的关节模式和补偿策略可以导致相同的功能性步态结果：案例研究
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, accepted to the ICORR 2022 conference
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, accepted to the ICORR 2022 conference
abstract: This paper analyses joint-space walking mechanisms and redundancies in delivering functional gait outcomes. Multiple biomechanical measures are analysed for two healthy male adults who participated in a multi-factorial study and walked during three sessions. Both participants employed varying intra- and inter-personal compensatory strategies (e.g., vaulting, hip hiking) across walking conditions and exhibited notable gait pattern alterations while keeping task-space (functional) gait parameters invariant. They also preferred various levels of asymmetric step length but kept their symmetric step time consistent and cadence-invariant during free walking. The results demonstrate the importance of an individualised approach and the need for a paradigm shift from functional (task-space) to joint-space gait analysis in attending to (a)typical gaits and delivering human-centred human-robot interaction.
summary: This paper analyses joint-space walking mechanisms and redundancies in delivering functional gait outcomes. Multiple biomechanical measures are analysed for two healthy male adults who participated in a multi-factorial study and walked during three sessions. Both participants employed varying intra- and inter-personal compensatory strategies (e.g., vaulting, hip hiking) across walking conditions and exhibited notable gait pattern alterations while keeping task-space (functional) gait parameters invariant. They also preferred various levels of asymmetric step length but kept their symmetric step time consistent and cadence-invariant during free walking. The results demonstrate the importance of an individualised approach and the need for a paradigm shift from functional (task-space) to joint-space gait analysis in attending to (a)typical gaits and delivering human-centred human-robot interaction.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了关节空间行走机制和提供功能性步态结果的冗余。对参与多因素研究并在三个疗程中行走的两名健康男性成年人的多种生物力学测量结果进行了分析。两名参与者在步行条件下都采用了不同的人内和人际补偿策略（例如跳马、髋部远足），并表现出显着的步态模式改变，同时保持任务空间（功能）步态参数不变。他们还喜欢不同程度的不对称步长，但在自由行走期间保持对称步时间一致且步频不变。结果证明了个性化方法的重要性以及从功能（任务空间）步态分析到关节空间步态分析的范式转变的必要性，以关注（a）典型步态并提供以人为中心的人机交互。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究分析了不同关节空间步态机制和补偿策略如何导致相同的功能性步态结果。
AI.motivation: 传统功能性步态分析可能忽略个体差异，需转向关节空间分析以更精准理解典型及非典型步态。
AI.method: 对两名健康男性在三次步行实验中的生物力学数据进行分析，比较其关节间补偿策略与任务空间参数的关联性。
AI.result: 参与者采用不同补偿策略（如跨步、骨盆抬高）保持功能参数不变，且步长不对称性与步频对称性存在分离现象。
AI.conclusion: 应重视个体化分析，将步态研究从任务空间范式转向关节空间范式以优化人机交互设计。

motivation: 传统功能性步态分析可能忽略个体差异，需转向关节空间分析以更精准理解典型及非典型步态。
method: 对两名健康男性在三次步行实验中的生物力学数据进行分析，比较其关节间补偿策略与任务空间参数的关联性。
result: 参与者采用不同补偿策略（如跨步、骨盆抬高）保持功能参数不变，且步长不对称性与步频对称性存在分离现象。
conclusion: 应重视个体化分析，将步态研究从任务空间范式转向关节空间范式以优化人机交互设计。
search_text: Varying Joint Patterns and Compensatory Strategies Can Lead to the Same Functional Gait Outcomes: A Case Study 不同的关节模式和补偿策略可以导致相同的功能性步态结果：案例研究 This paper analyses joint-space walking mechanisms and redundancies in delivering functional gait outcomes. Multiple biomechanical measures are analysed for two healthy male adults who participated in a multi-factorial study and walked during three sessions. Both participants employed varying intra- and inter-personal compensatory strategies (e.g., vaulting, hip hiking) across walking conditions and exhibited notable gait pattern alterations while keeping task-space (functional) gait parameters invariant. They also preferred various levels of asymmetric step length but kept their symmetric step time consistent and cadence-invariant during free walking. The results demonstrate the importance of an individualised approach and the need for a paradigm shift from functional (task-space) to joint-space gait analysis in attending to (a)typical gaits and delivering human-centred human-robot interaction. 本文分析了关节空间行走机制和提供功能性步态结果的冗余。对参与多因素研究并在三个疗程中行走的两名健康男性成年人的多种生物力学测量结果进行了分析。两名参与者在步行条件下都采用了不同的人内和人际补偿策略（例如跳马、髋部远足），并表现出显着的步态模式改变，同时保持任务空间（功能）步态参数不变。他们还喜欢不同程度的不对称步长，但在自由行走期间保持对称步时间一致且步频不变。结果证明了个性化方法的重要性以及从功能（任务空间）步态分析到关节空间步态分析的范式转变的必要性，以关注（a）典型步态并提供以人为中心的人机交互。 本文通过案例研究分析了不同关节空间步态机制和补偿策略如何导致相同的功能性步态结果。 T. Bacek,M. Sun,H. Liu,Z. Chen,D. Kulic,D. Oetomo,Y. Tan cs.RO

authors_text: Zhan Chen,Sicheng Li,Bing Yang,Qinghan Li,Hong Liu
title: Multi-Scale Spatial Temporal Graph Convolutional Network for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的多尺度时空图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolutional networks have been widely used for skeleton-based action recognition due to their excellent modeling ability of non-Euclidean data. As the graph convolution is a local operation, it can only utilize the short-range joint dependencies and short-term trajectory but fails to directly model the distant joints relations and long-range temporal information that are vital to distinguishing various actions. To solve this problem, we present a multi-scale spatial graph convolution (MS-GC) module and a multi-scale temporal graph convolution (MT-GC) module to enrich the receptive field of the model in spatial and temporal dimensions. Concretely, the MS-GC and MT-GC modules decompose the corresponding local graph convolution into a set of sub-graph convolution, forming a hierarchical residual architecture. Without introducing additional parameters, the features will be processed with a series of sub-graph convolutions, and each node could complete multiple spatial and temporal aggregations with its neighborhoods. The final equivalent receptive field is accordingly enlarged, which is capable of capturing both short- and long-range dependencies in spatial and temporal domains. By coupling these two modules as a basic block, we further propose a multi-scale spatial temporal graph convolutional network (MST-GCN), which stacks multiple blocks to learn effective motion representations for action recognition. The proposed MST-GCN achieves remarkable performance on three challenging benchmark datasets, NTU RGB+D, NTU-120 RGB+D and Kinetics-Skeleton, for skeleton-based action recognition.

As the graph convolution is a local operation, it can only utilize the short-range joint dependencies and short-term trajectory but fails to directly model the distant joints relations and long-range temporal information that are vital to distinguishing various actions. To solve this problem, we present a multi-scale spatial graph convolution (MS-GC) module and a multi-scale temporal graph convolution (MT-GC) module to enrich the receptive field of the model in spatial and temporal dimensions. Concretely, the MS-GC and MT-GC modules decompose the corresponding local graph convolution into a set of sub-graph convolution, forming a hierarchical residual architecture. Without introducing additional parameters, the features will be processed with a series of sub-graph convolutions, and each node could complete multiple spatial and temporal aggregations with its neighborhoods. The final equivalent receptive field is accordingly enlarged, which is capable of capturing both short- and long-range dependencies in spatial and temporal domains. By coupling these two modules as a basic block, we further propose a multi-scale spatial temporal graph convolutional network (MST-GCN), which stacks multiple blocks to learn effective motion representations for action recognition. The proposed MST-GCN achieves remarkable performance on three challenging benchmark datasets, NTU RGB+D, NTU-120 RGB+D and Kinetics-Skeleton, for skeleton-based action recognition.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络由于其出色的非欧几里得数据建模能力而被广泛用于基于骨架的动作识别。由于图卷积是一种局部操作，它只能利用短程关节依赖性和短期轨迹，而无法直接建模对于区分各种动作至关重要的远距离关节关系和长程时间信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了多尺度空间图卷积（MS-GC）模块和多尺度时间图卷积（MT-GC）模块，以丰富模型在空间和时间维度上的感受野。具体来说，MS-GC和MT-GC模块将相应的局部图卷积分解为一组子图卷积，形成分层残差架构。在不引入额外参数的情况下，特征将通过一系列子图卷积进行处理，每个节点可以与其邻域完成多个空间和时间聚合。最终的等效感受野相应地扩大，能够捕获空间和时间域中的短程和长程依赖性。通过将这两个模块耦合为一个基本块，我们进一步提出了一种多尺度时空图卷积网络（MST-GCN），它堆叠多个块来学习用于动作识别的有效运动表示。所提出的 MST-GCN 在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集（NTU RGB+D、NTU-120 RGB+D 和 Kinetics-Skeleton）上实现了卓越的性能，用于基于骨架的动作识别。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多尺度时空图卷积网络（MST-GCN），用于基于骨骼的动作识别。
AI.motivation: 图卷积网络虽然在建模非欧几里得数据方面表现出色，但其局部操作限制了对远距离关节关系和长期时间信息的建模，这在区分不同动作时至关重要。
AI.method: 论文引入了多尺度空间图卷积（MS-GC）模块和多尺度时间图卷积（MT-GC）模块，通过分解局部图卷积为一系列子图卷积，形成层次化残差结构，从而扩大模型的感受野。
AI.result: 所提出的MST-GCN在三个具有挑战性的基准数据集（NTU RGB+D、NTU-120 RGB+D和Kinetics-Skeleton）上取得了显著的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度空间和时间图卷积模块，有效捕捉了骨骼动作中的短程和长程依赖关系，显著提升了基于骨骼的动作识别性能。

title: Balancing Run-Length Straight-Line Programs*
title_zh: 平衡行程直线计划*
comment: Funded in part by Basal Funds FB0001, Fondecyt Grant 1-200038, and two Conicyt Doctoral Scholarships, ANID, Chile
comments: Funded in part by Basal Funds FB0001, Fondecyt Grant 1-200038, and two Conicyt Doctoral Scholarships, ANID, Chile
abstract: It was recently proved that any SLP generating a given string $w$ can be transformed in linear time into an equivalent balanced SLP of the same asymptotic size. We show that this result also holds for RLSLPs, which are SLPs extended with run-length rules of the form $A \rightarrow B^t$ for $t>2$, deriving $\texttt{exp}(A) = \texttt{exp}(B)^t$. An immediate consequence is the simplification of the algorithm for extracting substrings of an RLSLP-compressed string. We also show that several problems like answering RMQs and computing Karp-Rabin fingerprints on substrings can be solved in $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ space and $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ time, $g_{rl}$ being the size of the smallest RLSLP generating the string, of length $n$. We extend the result to solving more general operations on string ranges, in $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ space and $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ applications of the operation. In general, the smallest RLSLP can be asymptotically smaller than the smallest SLP by up to an $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ factor, so our results can make a difference in terms of the space needed for computing these operations efficiently for some string families.
summary: It was recently proved that any SLP generating a given string $w$ can be transformed in linear time into an equivalent balanced SLP of the same asymptotic size. We show that this result also holds for RLSLPs, which are SLPs extended with run-length rules of the form $A \rightarrow B^t$ for $t>2$, deriving $\texttt{exp}(A) = \texttt{exp}(B)^t$. An immediate consequence is the simplification of the algorithm for extracting substrings of an RLSLP-compressed string. We also show that several problems like answering RMQs and computing Karp-Rabin fingerprints on substrings can be solved in $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ space and $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ time, $g_{rl}$ being the size of the smallest RLSLP generating the string, of length $n$. We extend the result to solving more general operations on string ranges, in $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ space and $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ applications of the operation. In general, the smallest RLSLP can be asymptotically smaller than the smallest SLP by up to an $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ factor, so our results can make a difference in terms of the space needed for computing these operations efficiently for some string families.
abstract_zh: 最近证明，生成给定字符串 $w$ 的任何 SLP 都可以在线性时间内转换为相同渐近大小的等效平衡 SLP。我们证明这个结果也适用于 RLSLP，RLSLP 是用 $A \rightarrow B^t$ 形式的游程规则扩展的 SLP（对于 $t>2$），得出 $\texttt{exp}(A) = \texttt{exp}(B)^t$。直接的结果是简化了提取 RLSLP 压缩字符串的子字符串的算法。我们还表明，回答 RMQ 和计算子字符串上的 Karp-Rabin 指纹等几个问题可以在 $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ 空间和 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ 时间内解决，$g_{rl}$ 是生成字符串的最小 RLSLP 的大小，长度为 $n$。我们将结果扩展到在 $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ 空间和 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ 运算应用中解决字符串范围上的更一般运算。一般来说，最小的 RLSLP 可以比最小的 SLP 渐进地小最多 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ 因子，因此我们的结果可以在有效计算某些字符串族的这些操作所需的空间方面产生影响。

AI.tldr: 本文将平衡直线上下文无关文法（SLP）的结果扩展到带运行长度规则的RLSLP，并展示其在子串操作和范围查询中的高效性。
AI.motivation: 通过引入运行长度规则，RLSLP可能比传统SLP更紧凑，从而在空间效率和操作速度上带来优势。
AI.method: 将SLP的线性时间平衡方法推广到RLSLP，并设计基于RLSLP的子串提取、范围最小值查询和Karp-Rabin指纹计算算法。
AI.result: 在O(g_rl)空间和O(log n)时间内解决RMQ、指纹计算等操作，且RLSLP的大小可能比SLP小O(log n)因子。
AI.conclusion: 平衡RLSLP能有效提升某些字符串家族的高效操作性能，为压缩数据处理提供新方法。

In general, the smallest RLSLP can be asymptotically smaller than the smallest SLP by up to an $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ factor, so our results can make a difference in terms of the space needed for computing these operations efficiently for some string families. 最近证明，生成给定字符串 $w$ 的任何 SLP 都可以在线性时间内转换为相同渐近大小的等效平衡 SLP。我们证明这个结果也适用于 RLSLP，RLSLP 是用 $A \rightarrow B^t$ 形式的游程规则扩展的 SLP（对于 $t>2$），得出 $\texttt{exp}(A) = \texttt{exp}(B)^t$。直接的结果是简化了提取 RLSLP 压缩字符串的子字符串的算法。我们还表明，回答 RMQ 和计算子字符串上的 Karp-Rabin 指纹等几个问题可以在 $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ 空间和 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ 时间内解决，$g_{rl}$ 是生成字符串的最小 RLSLP 的大小，长度为 $n$。我们将结果扩展到在 $\mathcal{O}(g_{rl})$ 空间和 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ 运算应用中解决字符串范围上的更一般运算。一般来说，最小的 RLSLP 可以比最小的 SLP 渐进地小最多 $\mathcal{O}(\log n)$ 因子，因此我们的结果可以在有效计算某些字符串族的这些操作所需的空间方面产生影响。 本文将平衡直线上下文无关文法（SLP）的结果扩展到带运行长度规则的RLSLP，并展示其在子串操作和范围查询中的高效性。 Gonzalo Navarro,Francisco Olivares,Cristian Urbina cs.DS

title: Towards Harnessing Feature Embedding for Robust Learning with Noisy Labels
title_zh: 利用特征嵌入实现带有噪声标签的鲁棒学习
abstract: The memorization effect of deep neural networks (DNNs) plays a pivotal role in recent label noise learning methods. To exploit this effect, the model prediction-based methods have been widely adopted, which aim to exploit the outputs of DNNs in the early stage of learning to correct noisy labels. However, we observe that the model will make mistakes during label prediction, resulting in unsatisfactory performance. By contrast, the produced features in the early stage of learning show better robustness. Inspired by this observation, in this paper, we propose a novel feature embedding-based method for deep learning with label noise, termed LabEl NoiseDilution (LEND). To be specific, we first compute a similarity matrix based on current embedded features to capture the local structure of training data. Then, the noisy supervision signals carried by mislabeled data are overwhelmed by nearby correctly labeled ones (\textit{i.e.}, label noise dilution), of which the effectiveness is guaranteed by the inherent robustness of feature embedding. Finally, the training data with diluted labels are further used to train a robust classifier. Empirically, we conduct extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world noisy datasets by comparing our LEND with several representative robust learning approaches. The results verify the effectiveness of our LEND.
summary: The memorization effect of deep neural networks (DNNs) plays a pivotal role in recent label noise learning methods. To exploit this effect, the model prediction-based methods have been widely adopted, which aim to exploit the outputs of DNNs in the early stage of learning to correct noisy labels. However, we observe that the model will make mistakes during label prediction, resulting in unsatisfactory performance. By contrast, the produced features in the early stage of learning show better robustness. Inspired by this observation, in this paper, we propose a novel feature embedding-based method for deep learning with label noise, termed LabEl NoiseDilution (LEND). To be specific, we first compute a similarity matrix based on current embedded features to capture the local structure of training data. Then, the noisy supervision signals carried by mislabeled data are overwhelmed by nearby correctly labeled ones (\textit{i.e.}, label noise dilution), of which the effectiveness is guaranteed by the inherent robustness of feature embedding. Finally, the training data with diluted labels are further used to train a robust classifier. Empirically, we conduct extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world noisy datasets by comparing our LEND with several representative robust learning approaches. The results verify the effectiveness of our LEND.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的记忆效应在最近的标签噪声学习方法中发挥着关键作用。为了利用这种效应，基于模型预测的方法已被广泛采用，其目的是在学习的早期阶段利用 DNN 的输出来纠正噪声标签。然而，我们观察到该模型在标签预测过程中会出错，导致性能不理想。相比之下，学习早期产生的特征表现出更好的鲁棒性。受这一观察的启发，在本文中，我们提出了一种基于特征嵌入的新颖的标签噪声深度学习方法，称为 LabEl NoiseDilution (LEND)。具体来说，我们首先根据当前嵌入特征计算相似度矩阵，以捕获训练数据的局部结构。然后，错误标记数据携带的噪声监督信号被附近正确标记的监督信号所淹没（\textit{i.e.}，标签噪声稀释），其有效性由特征嵌入的固有鲁棒性保证。最后，带有稀释标签的训练数据进一步用于训练鲁棒分类器。根据经验，我们通过将 LEND 与几种代表性的稳健学习方法进行比较，对合成和现实世界的噪声数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果验证了我们 LEND 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征嵌入的方法LEND，用于在存在噪声标签的情况下进行鲁棒学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖模型预测修正噪声标签，但模型预测本身可能存在错误。研究发现早期学习阶段的特征具有更好的鲁棒性，因此提出利用特征嵌入来提升噪声标签学习的性能。
AI.method: 通过计算当前嵌入特征的相似度矩阵捕捉数据局部结构，利用正确标签的邻近样本稀释噪声标签（即标签噪声稀释），最终训练鲁棒分类器。
AI.result: 在合成和真实噪声数据集上的实验验证了LEND方法的有效性，优于多种代表性鲁棒学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 特征嵌入的内在鲁棒性可有效缓解噪声标签影响，LEND方法通过特征级噪声稀释实现了更优的鲁棒学习效果。

title: Speak Like a Professional: Increasing Speech Intelligibility by Mimicking Professional Announcer Voice with Voice Conversion
title_zh: 像专业人士一样说话：通过语音转换模仿专业播音员的声音来提高语音清晰度
abstract: In most of practical scenarios, the announcement system must deliver speech messages in a noisy environment, in which the background noise cannot be cancelled out. The local noise reduces speech intelligibility and increases listening effort of the listener, hence hamper the effectiveness of announcement system. There has been reported that voices of professional announcers are clearer and more comprehensive than that of non-expert speakers in noisy environment. This finding suggests that the speech intelligibility might be related to the speaking style of professional announcer, which can be adapted using voice conversion method. Motivated by this idea, this paper proposes a speech intelligibility enhancement in noisy environment by applying voice conversion method on non-professional voice. We discovered that the professional announcers and non-professional speakers are clusterized into different clusters on the speaker embedding plane. This implies that the speech intelligibility can be controlled as an independent feature of speaker individuality. To examine the advantage of converted voice in noisy environment, we experimented using test words masked in pink noise at different SNR levels. The results of objective and subjective evaluations confirm that the speech intelligibility of converted voice is higher than that of original voice in low SNR conditions.
summary: In most of practical scenarios, the announcement system must deliver speech messages in a noisy environment, in which the background noise cannot be cancelled out. The local noise reduces speech intelligibility and increases listening effort of the listener, hence hamper the effectiveness of announcement system. There has been reported that voices of professional announcers are clearer and more comprehensive than that of non-expert speakers in noisy environment. This finding suggests that the speech intelligibility might be related to the speaking style of professional announcer, which can be adapted using voice conversion method. Motivated by this idea, this paper proposes a speech intelligibility enhancement in noisy environment by applying voice conversion method on non-professional voice. We discovered that the professional announcers and non-professional speakers are clusterized into different clusters on the speaker embedding plane. This implies that the speech intelligibility can be controlled as an independent feature of speaker individuality. To examine the advantage of converted voice in noisy environment, we experimented using test words masked in pink noise at different SNR levels. The results of objective and subjective evaluations confirm that the speech intelligibility of converted voice is higher than that of original voice in low SNR conditions.
abstract_zh: 在大多数实际场景中，广播系统必须在嘈杂的环境中传递语音消息，而背景噪声无法被抵消。局部噪声降低了语音清晰度并增加了收听者的收听努力，从而妨碍了广播系统的有效性。据报道，在嘈杂的环境中，专业播音员的声音比非专业播音员的声音更清晰、更全面。这一发现表明，语音清晰度可能与专业播音员的说话风格有关，可以使用语音转换方法进行调整。受此思想的启发，本文提出了一种通过对非专业语音应用语音转换方法来增强噪声环境下的语音清晰度的方法。我们发现专业播音员和非专业演讲者在演讲者嵌入平面上聚集成不同的簇。这意味着语音清晰度可以作为说话者个性的独立特征进行控制。为了检验转换后的语音在嘈杂环境中的优势，我们尝试使用不同信噪比水平下粉红噪声掩蔽的测试词。客观和主观评价结果证实，在低信噪比条件下，转换后的语音的语音清晰度高于原始语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过语音转换技术将非专业人士的声音转换为专业播音员的声音，以提高噪声环境下的语音可懂度。
AI.motivation: 专业播音员的语音在嘈杂环境中比非专业人士更清晰，表明语音可懂度与说话风格相关，可通过语音转换技术进行优化。
AI.method: 利用语音转换方法将非专业语音转换为专业播音员语音，并通过说话人嵌入空间聚类分析及不同信噪比下的掩蔽实验验证效果。
AI.result: 客观和主观评估结果表明，转换后的语音在低信噪比条件下比原始语音具有更高的可懂度。
AI.conclusion: 语音转换能有效提升噪声环境下的语音可懂度，证明专业播音员的语音特征可作为独立特征进行控制和优化。

title: Joint Optimization of Sampling Rate Offsets Based on Entire Signal Relationship Among Distributed Microphones
title_zh: 基于分布式麦克风间整体信号关系的采样率偏移联合优化
abstract: In this paper, we propose to simultaneously estimate all the sampling rate offsets (SROs) of multiple devices. In a distributed microphone array, the SRO is inevitable, which deteriorates the performance of array signal processing. Most of the existing SRO estimation methods focused on synchronizing two microphones. When synchronizing more than two microphones, we select one reference microphone and estimate the SRO of each non-reference microphone independently. Hence, the relationship among signals observed by non-reference microphones is not considered. To address this problem, the proposed method jointly optimizes all SROs based on a probabilistic model of a multichannel signal. The SROs and model parameters are alternately updated to increase the log-likelihood based on an auxiliary function. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated on mixtures of various numbers of speakers.
summary: In this paper, we propose to simultaneously estimate all the sampling rate offsets (SROs) of multiple devices. In a distributed microphone array, the SRO is inevitable, which deteriorates the performance of array signal processing. Most of the existing SRO estimation methods focused on synchronizing two microphones. When synchronizing more than two microphones, we select one reference microphone and estimate the SRO of each non-reference microphone independently. Hence, the relationship among signals observed by non-reference microphones is not considered. To address this problem, the proposed method jointly optimizes all SROs based on a probabilistic model of a multichannel signal. The SROs and model parameters are alternately updated to increase the log-likelihood based on an auxiliary function. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated on mixtures of various numbers of speakers.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们建议同时估计多个设备的所有采样率偏移（SRO）。在分布式麦克风阵列中，SRO是不可避免的，这会恶化阵列信号处理的性能。大多数现有的 SRO 估计方法都集中于同步两个麦克风。当同步两个以上麦克风时，我们选择一个参考麦克风并独立估计每个非参考麦克风的 SRO。因此，不考虑非参考麦克风观测到的信号之间的关系。为了解决这个问题，所提出的方法基于多通道信号的概率模型联合优化所有 SRO。 SRO 和模型参数交替更新，以基于辅助函数增加对数似然。该方法的有效性在不同数量的说话者的混合上得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布式麦克风阵列中多通道信号整体关系的采样率偏移（SRO）联合优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在同步多个麦克风时仅独立估计非参考麦克风的SRO，忽略了非参考麦克风信号之间的关联性，导致阵列信号处理性能下降。
AI.method: 构建多通道信号的概率模型，通过交替更新SRO和模型参数以最大化对数似然函数，利用辅助函数优化所有SRO。
AI.result: 在不同数量说话人混合信号的实验中验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化多麦克风信号的整体关系，该方法在采样率偏移估计任务中优于传统独立估计方法。

authors_text: Xiaochuan Fan,Chi Zhang,Yong Yang,Yue Shang,Xueying Zhang,Zhen He,Yun Xiao,Bo Long,Lingfei Wu
title: Automatic Generation of Product-Image Sequence in E-commerce
title_zh: 电子商务中产品图像序列的自动生成
abstract: Product images are essential for providing desirable user experience in an e-commerce platform. For a platform with billions of products, it is extremely time-costly and labor-expensive to manually pick and organize qualified images. Furthermore, there are the numerous and complicated image rules that a product image needs to comply in order to be generated/selected. To address these challenges, in this paper, we present a new learning framework in order to achieve Automatic Generation of Product-Image Sequence (AGPIS) in e-commerce. To this end, we propose a Multi-modality Unified Image-sequence Classifier (MUIsC), which is able to simultaneously detect all categories of rule violations through learning. MUIsC leverages textual review feedback as the additional training target and utilizes product textual description to provide extra semantic information. Based on offline evaluations, we show that the proposed MUIsC significantly outperforms various baselines. Besides MUIsC, we also integrate some other important modules in the proposed framework, such as primary image selection, noncompliant content detection, and image deduplication. With all these modules, our framework works effectively and efficiently in JD.com recommendation platform. By Dec 2021, our AGPIS framework has generated high-standard images for about 1.5 million products and achieves 13.6% in reject rate.
summary: Product images are essential for providing desirable user experience in an e-commerce platform. For a platform with billions of products, it is extremely time-costly and labor-expensive to manually pick and organize qualified images. Furthermore, there are the numerous and complicated image rules that a product image needs to comply in order to be generated/selected. To address these challenges, in this paper, we present a new learning framework in order to achieve Automatic Generation of Product-Image Sequence (AGPIS) in e-commerce. To this end, we propose a Multi-modality Unified Image-sequence Classifier (MUIsC), which is able to simultaneously detect all categories of rule violations through learning. MUIsC leverages textual review feedback as the additional training target and utilizes product textual description to provide extra semantic information. Based on offline evaluations, we show that the proposed MUIsC significantly outperforms various baselines. Besides MUIsC, we also integrate some other important modules in the proposed framework, such as primary image selection, noncompliant content detection, and image deduplication. With all these modules, our framework works effectively and efficiently in JD.com recommendation platform. By Dec 2021, our AGPIS framework has generated high-standard images for about 1.5 million products and achieves 13.6% in reject rate.
abstract_zh: 产品图片对于在电子商务平台中提供理想的用户体验至关重要。对于拥有数十亿产品的平台来说，手动挑选和整理合格的图像是极其耗时和人力成本高昂的。此外，产品图像需要遵守众多且复杂的图像规则才能生成/选择。为了应对这些挑战，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的学习框架，以实现电子商务中的产品图像序列自动生成（AGPIS）。为此，我们提出了一种多模态统一图像序列分类器（MUISC），它能够通过学习同时检测所有类别的规则违规。 MUIsC 利用文本审查反馈作为额外的训练目标，并利用产品文本描述来提供额外的语义信息。基于离线评估，我们表明所提出的 MUIsC 显着优于各种基线。除了 MUIsC 之外，我们还在所提出的框架中集成了一些其他重要模块，例如主图像选择、不合规内容检测和图像重复数据删除。通过所有这些模块，我们的框架在京东推荐平台中有效且高效地工作。截至 2021 年 12 月，我们的 AGPIS 框架已为约 150 万种产品生成了高标准图像，废品率达到 13.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于电商场景下产品图像序列自动生成的框架AGPIS，以解决人工筛选和组织产品图像耗时耗力的问题。
AI.motivation: 电商平台拥有海量商品，手动挑选和整理符合规则的产品图像成本极高且效率低下，同时需满足复杂的图像合规要求。
AI.method: 提出多模态统一图像序列分类器MUIsC，结合文本评论反馈和产品描述信息进行训练，并集成图像初选、违规内容检测和去重等模块。
AI.result: 框架在京东推荐平台实现高效运行，截至2021年12月已为150万产品生成高质量图像，拒绝率降低至13.6%。
AI.conclusion: AGPIS框架通过多模态学习和模块化设计有效解决了电商产品图像生成的自动化难题，显著提升处理效率与合规性。

authors_text: Peng Zhou,Jason K. Eshraghian,Dong-Uk Choi,Wei D. Lu,Sung-Mo Kang
title: Gradient-based Neuromorphic Learning on Dynamical RRAM Arrays
title_zh: 动态 RRAM 阵列上基于梯度的神经形态学习
abstract: We present MEMprop, the adoption of gradient-based learning to train fully memristive spiking neural networks (MSNNs). Our approach harnesses intrinsic device dynamics to trigger naturally arising voltage spikes. These spikes emitted by memristive dynamics are analog in nature, and thus fully differentiable, which eliminates the need for surrogate gradient methods that are prevalent in the spiking neural network (SNN) literature. Memristive neural networks typically either integrate memristors as synapses that map offline-trained networks, or otherwise rely on associative learning mechanisms to train networks of memristive neurons. We instead apply the backpropagation through time (BPTT) training algorithm directly on analog SPICE models of memristive neurons and synapses. Our implementation is fully memristive, in that synaptic weights and spiking neurons are both integrated on resistive RAM (RRAM) arrays without the need for additional circuits to implement spiking dynamics, e.g., analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) or thresholded comparators. As a result, higher-order electrophysical effects are fully exploited to use the state-driven dynamics of memristive neurons at run time. By moving towards non-approximate gradient-based learning, we obtain highly competitive accuracy amongst previously reported lightweight dense fully MSNNs on several benchmarks.
summary: We present MEMprop, the adoption of gradient-based learning to train fully memristive spiking neural networks (MSNNs). Our approach harnesses intrinsic device dynamics to trigger naturally arising voltage spikes. These spikes emitted by memristive dynamics are analog in nature, and thus fully differentiable, which eliminates the need for surrogate gradient methods that are prevalent in the spiking neural network (SNN) literature. Memristive neural networks typically either integrate memristors as synapses that map offline-trained networks, or otherwise rely on associative learning mechanisms to train networks of memristive neurons. We instead apply the backpropagation through time (BPTT) training algorithm directly on analog SPICE models of memristive neurons and synapses. Our implementation is fully memristive, in that synaptic weights and spiking neurons are both integrated on resistive RAM (RRAM) arrays without the need for additional circuits to implement spiking dynamics, e.g., analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) or thresholded comparators. As a result, higher-order electrophysical effects are fully exploited to use the state-driven dynamics of memristive neurons at run time. By moving towards non-approximate gradient-based learning, we obtain highly competitive accuracy amongst previously reported lightweight dense fully MSNNs on several benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MEMprop，采用基于梯度的学习来训练完全忆阻尖峰神经网络 (MSNN)。我们的方法利用固有的设备动力学来触发自然产生的电压尖峰。忆阻动力学发出的这些尖峰本质上是模拟的，因此是完全可微分的，这消除了对尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 文献中普遍使用的替代梯度方法的需要。忆阻神经网络通常要么将忆阻器集成为映射离线训练网络的突触，要么依赖关联学习机制来训练忆阻神经元网络。相反，我们直接在忆阻神经元和突触的模拟 SPICE 模型上应用随时间反向传播 (BPTT) 训练算法。我们的实现是完全忆阻的，因为突触权重和尖峰神经元都集成在电阻 RAM (RRAM) 阵列上，而不需要额外的电路来实现尖峰动态，例如模数转换器 (ADC) 或阈值比较器。因此，高阶电物理效应被充分利用，以在运行时使用忆阻神经元的状态驱动动力学。通过转向基于非近似梯度的学习，我们在多个基准上获得了与先前报道的轻量级密集完全 MSNN 相比极具竞争力的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度的神经形态学习方法MEMprop，用于训练全忆阻器脉冲神经网络（MSNNs）。
AI.motivation: 传统忆阻器神经网络通常依赖于离线训练或联想学习机制，无法充分利用忆阻器的动态特性。本文希望通过梯度下降方法直接在忆阻器器件上进行训练，以提升性能。
AI.method: 本文采用基于时间的反向传播（BPTT）算法，直接在模拟SPICE模型的忆阻器神经元和突触上进行训练，无需额外电路如ADC或阈值比较器。
AI.result: 该方法在多个基准测试中表现出高度竞争力的准确率，优于之前报道的轻量级全忆阻器神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 通过非近似梯度学习方法，本文展示了忆阻器神经网络在运行时利用器件状态驱动动态的潜力，为未来高效神经形态计算提供了新思路。

search_text: Gradient-based Neuromorphic Learning on Dynamical RRAM Arrays 动态 RRAM 阵列上基于梯度的神经形态学习 We present MEMprop, the adoption of gradient-based learning to train fully memristive spiking neural networks (MSNNs). Our approach harnesses intrinsic device dynamics to trigger naturally arising voltage spikes. These spikes emitted by memristive dynamics are analog in nature, and thus fully differentiable, which eliminates the need for surrogate gradient methods that are prevalent in the spiking neural network (SNN) literature. Memristive neural networks typically either integrate memristors as synapses that map offline-trained networks, or otherwise rely on associative learning mechanisms to train networks of memristive neurons. We instead apply the backpropagation through time (BPTT) training algorithm directly on analog SPICE models of memristive neurons and synapses. Our implementation is fully memristive, in that synaptic weights and spiking neurons are both integrated on resistive RAM (RRAM) arrays without the need for additional circuits to implement spiking dynamics, e.g., analog-to-digital converters (ADCs) or thresholded comparators. As a result, higher-order electrophysical effects are fully exploited to use the state-driven dynamics of memristive neurons at run time. By moving towards non-approximate gradient-based learning, we obtain highly competitive accuracy amongst previously reported lightweight dense fully MSNNs on several benchmarks. 我们提出了 MEMprop，采用基于梯度的学习来训练完全忆阻尖峰神经网络 (MSNN)。我们的方法利用固有的设备动力学来触发自然产生的电压尖峰。忆阻动力学发出的这些尖峰本质上是模拟的，因此是完全可微分的，这消除了对尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 文献中普遍使用的替代梯度方法的需要。忆阻神经网络通常要么将忆阻器集成为映射离线训练网络的突触，要么依赖关联学习机制来训练忆阻神经元网络。相反，我们直接在忆阻神经元和突触的模拟 SPICE 模型上应用随时间反向传播 (BPTT) 训练算法。我们的实现是完全忆阻的，因为突触权重和尖峰神经元都集成在电阻 RAM (RRAM) 阵列上，而不需要额外的电路来实现尖峰动态，例如模数转换器 (ADC) 或阈值比较器。因此，高阶电物理效应被充分利用，以在运行时使用忆阻神经元的状态驱动动力学。通过转向基于非近似梯度的学习，我们在多个基准上获得了与先前报道的轻量级密集完全 MSNN 相比极具竞争力的准确性。 本文提出了一种基于梯度的神经形态学习方法MEMprop，用于训练全忆阻器脉冲神经网络（MSNNs）。 Peng Zhou,Jason K. Eshraghian,Dong-Uk Choi,Wei D. Lu,Sung-Mo Kang cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.AR,cs.ET

authors_text: Shurui Gui,Hao Yuan,Jie Wang,Qicheng Lao,Kang Li,Shuiwang Ji
title: FlowX: Towards Explainable Graph Neural Networks via Message Flows
title_zh: FlowX：通过消息流实现可解释的图神经网络
abstract: We investigate the explainability of graph neural networks (GNNs) as a step toward elucidating their working mechanisms. While most current methods focus on explaining graph nodes, edges, or features, we argue that, as the inherent functional mechanism of GNNs, message flows are more natural for performing explainability. To this end, we propose a novel method here, known as FlowX, to explain GNNs by identifying important message flows. To quantify the importance of flows, we propose to follow the philosophy of Shapley values from cooperative game theory. To tackle the complexity of computing all coalitions' marginal contributions, we propose a flow sampling scheme to compute Shapley value approximations as initial assessments of further training. We then propose an information-controlled learning algorithm to train flow scores toward diverse explanation targets: necessary or sufficient explanations. Experimental studies on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our proposed FlowX and its variants lead to improved explainability of GNNs. The code is available at https://github.com/divelab/DIG.
summary: We investigate the explainability of graph neural networks (GNNs) as a step toward elucidating their working mechanisms. While most current methods focus on explaining graph nodes, edges, or features, we argue that, as the inherent functional mechanism of GNNs, message flows are more natural for performing explainability. To this end, we propose a novel method here, known as FlowX, to explain GNNs by identifying important message flows. To quantify the importance of flows, we propose to follow the philosophy of Shapley values from cooperative game theory. To tackle the complexity of computing all coalitions' marginal contributions, we propose a flow sampling scheme to compute Shapley value approximations as initial assessments of further training. We then propose an information-controlled learning algorithm to train flow scores toward diverse explanation targets: necessary or sufficient explanations. Experimental studies on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our proposed FlowX and its variants lead to improved explainability of GNNs. The code is available at https://github.com/divelab/DIG.
abstract_zh: 我们研究图神经网络（GNN）的可解释性，作为阐明其工作机制的一步。虽然当前大多数方法侧重于解释图节点、边或特征，但我们认为，作为 GNN 的固有功能机制，消息流更自然地执行可解释性。为此，我们在这里提出了一种称为 FlowX 的新方法，通过识别重要的消息流来解释 GNN。为了量化流量的重要性，我们建议遵循合作博弈论中的沙普利值哲学。为了解决计算所有联盟边际贡献的复杂性，我们提出了一种流采样方案来计算 Shapley 值近似值作为进一步训练的初始评估。然后，我们提出一种信息控制的学习算法来训练流分数以实现不同的解释目标：必要或充分的解释。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验研究表明，我们提出的 FlowX 及其变体提高了 GNN 的可解释性。代码可在 https://github.com/divelab/DIG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FlowX的新方法，通过识别重要的消息流来提高图神经网络（GNN）的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数方法集中在解释图节点、边或特征，而本文认为消息流作为GNN的内在功能机制，更适合作为解释的基础。
AI.method: 本文提出FlowX方法，通过借鉴合作博弈论中的Shapley值理念，采用流采样方案计算Shapley值近似，并设计信息控制学习算法来训练流评分，以实现必要的或充分的解释目标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FlowX及其变体在合成和真实数据集上均提升了GNN的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: FlowX通过消息流的可解释性分析，为理解GNN的工作机制提供了新的视角和方法。

title: Explaining the root causes of unit-level changes
title_zh: 解释单位层面变化的根本原因
abstract: Existing methods of explainable AI and interpretable ML cannot explain change in the values of an output variable for a statistical unit in terms of the change in the input values and the change in the "mechanism" (the function transforming input to output). We propose two methods based on counterfactuals for explaining unit-level changes at various input granularities using the concept of Shapley values from game theory. These methods satisfy two key axioms desirable for any unit-level change attribution method. Through simulations, we study the reliability and the scalability of the proposed methods. We get sensible results from a case study on identifying the drivers of the change in the earnings for individuals in the US.
summary: Existing methods of explainable AI and interpretable ML cannot explain change in the values of an output variable for a statistical unit in terms of the change in the input values and the change in the "mechanism" (the function transforming input to output). We propose two methods based on counterfactuals for explaining unit-level changes at various input granularities using the concept of Shapley values from game theory. These methods satisfy two key axioms desirable for any unit-level change attribution method. Through simulations, we study the reliability and the scalability of the proposed methods. We get sensible results from a case study on identifying the drivers of the change in the earnings for individuals in the US.
abstract_zh: 现有的可解释人工智能和可解释机器学习方法无法根据输入值的变化和“机制”（将输入转换为输出的函数）的变化来解释统计单位的输出变量值的变化。我们提出了两种基于反事实的方法，使用博弈论中的沙普利值的概念来解释各种输入粒度下的单元级变化。这些方法满足任何单元级变更归因方法所需的两个关键公理。通过仿真，我们研究了所提出方法的可靠性和可扩展性。我们从一项关于确定美国个人收入变化驱动因素的案例研究中得到了合理的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于反事实的方法，利用Shapley值解释统计单元输出值变化的根本原因，考虑输入变量和机制变化的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI方法无法有效解释单个统计单元输出变化的驱动因素，尤其无法区分输入变化与模型机制变化的贡献。
AI.method: 基于博弈论Shapley值，设计两种反事实解释方法，在不同输入粒度下量化输入变量和机制变化对输出变化的贡献。
AI.result: 模拟实验验证方法可靠性和可扩展性，美国个人收入案例显示能合理识别影响收入变化的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法满足关键公理，可有效解释单位层面变化，为可解释AI提供了新的分析工具。

conclusion: 提出的方法满足关键公理，可有效解释单位层面变化，为可解释AI提供了新的分析工具。
search_text: Explaining the root causes of unit-level changes 解释单位层面变化的根本原因 Existing methods of explainable AI and interpretable ML cannot explain change in the values of an output variable for a statistical unit in terms of the change in the input values and the change in the "mechanism" (the function transforming input to output). We propose two methods based on counterfactuals for explaining unit-level changes at various input granularities using the concept of Shapley values from game theory. These methods satisfy two key axioms desirable for any unit-level change attribution method. Through simulations, we study the reliability and the scalability of the proposed methods. We get sensible results from a case study on identifying the drivers of the change in the earnings for individuals in the US. 现有的可解释人工智能和可解释机器学习方法无法根据输入值的变化和“机制”（将输入转换为输出的函数）的变化来解释统计单位的输出变量值的变化。我们提出了两种基于反事实的方法，使用博弈论中的沙普利值的概念来解释各种输入粒度下的单元级变化。这些方法满足任何单元级变更归因方法所需的两个关键公理。通过仿真，我们研究了所提出方法的可靠性和可扩展性。我们从一项关于确定美国个人收入变化驱动因素的案例研究中得到了合理的结果。 本文提出两种基于反事实的方法，利用Shapley值解释统计单元输出值变化的根本原因，考虑输入变量和机制变化的影响。 Kailash Budhathoki,George Michailidis,Dominik Janzing cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Junhao Zhang,Vishwanatha M. Rao,Ye Tian,Yanting Yang,Nicolas Acosta,Zihan Wan,Pin-Yu Lee,Chloe Zhang,Lawrence S. Kegeles,Scott A. Small,Jia Guo
title: Detecting Schizophrenia with 3D Structural Brain MRI Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习通过 3D 结构脑 MRI 检测精神分裂症
abstract: Schizophrenia is a chronic neuropsychiatric disorder that causes distinct structural alterations within the brain. We hypothesize that deep learning applied to a structural neuroimaging dataset could detect disease-related alteration and improve classification and diagnostic accuracy. We tested this hypothesis using a single, widely available, and conventional T1-weighted MRI scan, from which we extracted the 3D whole-brain structure using standard post-processing methods. A deep learning model was then developed, optimized, and evaluated on three open datasets with T1-weighted MRI scans of patients with schizophrenia. Our proposed model outperformed the benchmark model, which was also trained with structural MR images using a 3D CNN architecture. Our model is capable of almost perfectly (area under the ROC curve = 0.987) distinguishing schizophrenia patients from healthy controls on unseen structural MRI scans. Regional analysis localized subcortical regions and ventricles as the most predictive brain regions. Subcortical structures serve a pivotal role in cognitive, affective, and social functions in humans, and structural abnormalities of these regions have been associated with schizophrenia. Our finding corroborates that schizophrenia is associated with widespread alterations in subcortical brain structure and the subcortical structural information provides prominent features in diagnostic classification. Together, these results further demonstrate the potential of deep learning to improve schizophrenia diagnosis and identify its structural neuroimaging signatures from a single, standard T1-weighted brain MRI.
summary: Schizophrenia is a chronic neuropsychiatric disorder that causes distinct structural alterations within the brain. We hypothesize that deep learning applied to a structural neuroimaging dataset could detect disease-related alteration and improve classification and diagnostic accuracy. We tested this hypothesis using a single, widely available, and conventional T1-weighted MRI scan, from which we extracted the 3D whole-brain structure using standard post-processing methods. A deep learning model was then developed, optimized, and evaluated on three open datasets with T1-weighted MRI scans of patients with schizophrenia. Our proposed model outperformed the benchmark model, which was also trained with structural MR images using a 3D CNN architecture. Our model is capable of almost perfectly (area under the ROC curve = 0.987) distinguishing schizophrenia patients from healthy controls on unseen structural MRI scans. Regional analysis localized subcortical regions and ventricles as the most predictive brain regions. Subcortical structures serve a pivotal role in cognitive, affective, and social functions in humans, and structural abnormalities of these regions have been associated with schizophrenia. Our finding corroborates that schizophrenia is associated with widespread alterations in subcortical brain structure and the subcortical structural information provides prominent features in diagnostic classification. Together, these results further demonstrate the potential of deep learning to improve schizophrenia diagnosis and identify its structural neuroimaging signatures from a single, standard T1-weighted brain MRI.
abstract_zh: 精神分裂症是一种慢性神经精神疾病，会导致大脑内明显的结构改变。我们假设将深度学习应用于结构神经影像数据集可以检测与疾病相关的改变并提高分类和诊断的准确性。我们使用单一的、广泛使用的传统 T1 加权 MRI 扫描来测试这一假设，并使用标准后处理方法从中提取 3D 全脑结构。然后使用精神分裂症患者的 T1 加权 MRI 扫描在三个开放数据集上开发、优化和评估深度学习模型。我们提出的模型优于基准模型，该模型也使用 3D CNN 架构通过结构 MR 图像进行训练。我们的模型能够在看不见的结构 MRI 扫描中几乎完美地区分精神分裂症患者和健康对照（ROC 曲线下面积 = 0.987）。区域分析将皮层下区域和脑室定位为最具预测性的大脑区域。皮质下结构在人类认知、情感和社会功能中发挥着关键作用，这些区域的结构异常与精神分裂症有关。我们的发现证实了精神分裂症与皮质下大脑结构的广泛改变有关，并且皮质下结构信息为诊断分类提供了显着特征。总之，这些结果进一步证明了深度学习在改善精神分裂症诊断并从单一标准 T1 加权脑 MRI 中识别其结构神经影像特征的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的3D结构脑MRI分析方法，用于检测精神分裂症。
AI.motivation: 精神分裂症会导致大脑结构显著改变，传统方法诊断准确性有限，需探索更高效的深度学习模型以提升分类与诊断效果。
AI.method: 使用标准T1加权MRI扫描数据，通过标准后处理提取全脑3D结构，构建并优化深度学习模型，在三个公开数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 模型在未见数据上达到0.987的AUC值，准确区分患者与健康对照组，定位出侧脑室和皮层下区域为关键预测脑区。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习能有效提升精神分裂症诊断准确性，并揭示其结构性神经影像特征，为临床提供新工具。

authors_text: Kashu Yamazaki,Sang Truong,Khoa Vo,Michael Kidd,Chase Rainwater,Khoa Luu,Ngan Le
title: VLCap: Vision-Language with Contrastive Learning for Coherent Video Paragraph Captioning
title_zh: VLCap：具有对比学习的视觉语言，用于连贯的视频段落字幕
comment: accepted by The 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP) 2022
comments: accepted by The 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (IEEE ICIP) 2022
abstract: In this paper, we leverage the human perceiving process, that involves vision and language interaction, to generate a coherent paragraph description of untrimmed videos. We propose vision-language (VL) features consisting of two modalities, i.e., (i) vision modality to capture global visual content of the entire scene and (ii) language modality to extract scene elements description of both human and non-human objects (e.g. animals, vehicles, etc), visual and non-visual elements (e.g. relations, activities, etc). Furthermore, we propose to train our proposed VLCap under a contrastive learning VL loss. The experiments and ablation studies on ActivityNet Captions and YouCookII datasets show that our VLCap outperforms existing SOTA methods on both accuracy and diversity metrics.
summary: In this paper, we leverage the human perceiving process, that involves vision and language interaction, to generate a coherent paragraph description of untrimmed videos. We propose vision-language (VL) features consisting of two modalities, i.e., (i) vision modality to capture global visual content of the entire scene and (ii) language modality to extract scene elements description of both human and non-human objects (e.g. animals, vehicles, etc), visual and non-visual elements (e.g. relations, activities, etc). Furthermore, we propose to train our proposed VLCap under a contrastive learning VL loss. The experiments and ablation studies on ActivityNet Captions and YouCookII datasets show that our VLCap outperforms existing SOTA methods on both accuracy and diversity metrics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用涉及视觉和语言交互的人类感知过程来生成未修剪视频的连贯段落描述。我们提出由两种模态组成的视觉语言（VL）特征，即（i）捕获整个场景的全局视觉内容的视觉模态和（ii）提取人类和非人类对象（例如动物、车辆等）、视觉和非视觉元素（例如关系、活动等）的场景元素描述的语言模态。此外，我们建议在对比学习 VL 损失下训练我们提出的 VLCap。 ActivityNet Captions 和 YouCookII 数据集上的实验和消融研究表明，我们的 VLCap 在准确性和多样性指标方面均优于现有的 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLCap方法，通过视觉-语言对比学习生成未剪辑视频的连贯段落描述。
AI.motivation: 现有视频描述方法难以同时捕捉全局视觉信息与多模态语义关系，导致生成描述不够连贯和多样。
AI.method: 设计双模态视觉-语言特征提取器：视觉模态提取全局场景信息，语言模态解析物体及关系描述；采用对比学习损失函数强化模态间对齐。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet Captions和YouCookII数据集上，VLCap在准确率和描述多样性指标均超越当前最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合视觉语言特征与对比学习，VLCap有效提升了视频段落描述的连贯性与多样性，为视频描述任务提供新思路。

title: Self-Healing Robust Neural Networks via Closed-Loop Control
title_zh: 通过闭环控制进行自我修复的鲁棒神经网络
abstract: Despite the wide applications of neural networks, there have been increasing concerns about their vulnerability issue. While numerous attack and defense techniques have been developed, this work investigates the robustness issue from a new angle: can we design a self-healing neural network that can automatically detect and fix the vulnerability issue by itself? A typical self-healing mechanism is the immune system of a human body. This biology-inspired idea has been used in many engineering designs but is rarely investigated in deep learning. This paper considers the post-training self-healing of a neural network, and proposes a closed-loop control formulation to automatically detect and fix the errors caused by various attacks or perturbations. We provide a margin-based analysis to explain how this formulation can improve the robustness of a classifier. To speed up the inference of the proposed self-healing network, we solve the control problem via improving the Pontryagin Maximum Principle-based solver. Lastly, we present an error estimation of the proposed framework for neural networks with nonlinear activation functions. We validate the performance on several network architectures against various perturbations. Since the self-healing method does not need a-priori information about data perturbations/attacks, it can handle a broad class of unforeseen perturbations.
summary: Despite the wide applications of neural networks, there have been increasing concerns about their vulnerability issue. While numerous attack and defense techniques have been developed, this work investigates the robustness issue from a new angle: can we design a self-healing neural network that can automatically detect and fix the vulnerability issue by itself? A typical self-healing mechanism is the immune system of a human body. This biology-inspired idea has been used in many engineering designs but is rarely investigated in deep learning. This paper considers the post-training self-healing of a neural network, and proposes a closed-loop control formulation to automatically detect and fix the errors caused by various attacks or perturbations. We provide a margin-based analysis to explain how this formulation can improve the robustness of a classifier. To speed up the inference of the proposed self-healing network, we solve the control problem via improving the Pontryagin Maximum Principle-based solver. Lastly, we present an error estimation of the proposed framework for neural networks with nonlinear activation functions. We validate the performance on several network architectures against various perturbations. Since the self-healing method does not need a-priori information about data perturbations/attacks, it can handle a broad class of unforeseen perturbations.
abstract_zh: 尽管神经网络应用广泛，但人们越来越担心其脆弱性问题。虽然已经开发了许多攻击和防御技术，但这项工作从一个新的角度研究了鲁棒性问题：我们是否可以设计一个能够自动检测和修复漏洞问题的自我修复神经网络？典型的自愈机制是人体的免疫系统。这种受生物学启发的想法已被用于许多工程设计中，但很少在深度学习中进行研究。本文考虑了神经网络的训练后自我修复，并提出了一种闭环控制公式来自动检测和修复由各种攻击或扰动引起的错误。我们提供基于边际的分析来解释该公式如何提高分类器的稳健性。为了加快所提出的自愈网络的推理速度，我们通过改进基于庞特里亚金极大值原理的求解器来解决控制问题。最后，我们提出了所提出的具有非线性激活函数的神经网络框架的误差估计。我们针对各种扰动验证了多种网络架构的性能。由于自我修复方法不需要有关数据扰动/攻击的先验信息，因此它可以处理广泛的不可预见的扰动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于闭环控制的自修复神经网络方法，旨在自动检测并修复由攻击或扰动引起的错误，提升网络鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在实际应用中面临对抗攻击和扰动的脆弱性问题，现有防御方法依赖先验攻击信息，难以应对未知威胁，需借鉴生物免疫系统的自修复机制。
AI.method: 通过闭环控制框架结合改进的庞特里亚金最大原理求解器，实现无需先验攻击信息的自修复；引入边缘分析和非线性激活函数误差估计以提升效率与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种网络架构和不同扰动场景下验证了方法的有效性，证明其能处理未知扰动且无需攻击先验知识。
AI.conclusion: 该自修复机制通过闭环控制实现了对未知攻击的广谱防御，为提升神经网络鲁棒性提供了新思路。

search_text: Self-Healing Robust Neural Networks via Closed-Loop Control 通过闭环控制进行自我修复的鲁棒神经网络 Despite the wide applications of neural networks, there have been increasing concerns about their vulnerability issue. While numerous attack and defense techniques have been developed, this work investigates the robustness issue from a new angle: can we design a self-healing neural network that can automatically detect and fix the vulnerability issue by itself? A typical self-healing mechanism is the immune system of a human body. This biology-inspired idea has been used in many engineering designs but is rarely investigated in deep learning. This paper considers the post-training self-healing of a neural network, and proposes a closed-loop control formulation to automatically detect and fix the errors caused by various attacks or perturbations. We provide a margin-based analysis to explain how this formulation can improve the robustness of a classifier. To speed up the inference of the proposed self-healing network, we solve the control problem via improving the Pontryagin Maximum Principle-based solver. Lastly, we present an error estimation of the proposed framework for neural networks with nonlinear activation functions. We validate the performance on several network architectures against various perturbations. Since the self-healing method does not need a-priori information about data perturbations/attacks, it can handle a broad class of unforeseen perturbations. 尽管神经网络应用广泛，但人们越来越担心其脆弱性问题。虽然已经开发了许多攻击和防御技术，但这项工作从一个新的角度研究了鲁棒性问题：我们是否可以设计一个能够自动检测和修复漏洞问题的自我修复神经网络？典型的自愈机制是人体的免疫系统。这种受生物学启发的想法已被用于许多工程设计中，但很少在深度学习中进行研究。本文考虑了神经网络的训练后自我修复，并提出了一种闭环控制公式来自动检测和修复由各种攻击或扰动引起的错误。我们提供基于边际的分析来解释该公式如何提高分类器的稳健性。为了加快所提出的自愈网络的推理速度，我们通过改进基于庞特里亚金极大值原理的求解器来解决控制问题。最后，我们提出了所提出的具有非线性激活函数的神经网络框架的误差估计。我们针对各种扰动验证了多种网络架构的性能。由于自我修复方法不需要有关数据扰动/攻击的先验信息，因此它可以处理广泛的不可预见的扰动。 本文提出一种基于闭环控制的自修复神经网络方法，旨在自动检测并修复由攻击或扰动引起的错误，提升网络鲁棒性。 Zhuotong Chen,Qianxiao Li,Zheng Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG

title: An Efficient Global Optimality Certificate for Landmark-Based SLAM
title_zh: 基于地标的 SLAM 的高效全局最优性证书
abstract: Modern state estimation is often formulated as an optimization problem and solved using efficient local search methods. These methods at best guarantee convergence to local minima, but, in some cases, global optimality can also be certified. Although such global optimality certificates have been well established for 3D \textit{pose-graph optimization}, the details have yet to be worked out for the 3D landmark-based SLAM problem, in which estimated states include both robot poses and map landmarks. In this paper, we address this gap by using a graph-theoretic approach to cast the subproblems of landmark-based SLAM into a form that yields a sufficient condition for global optimality. Efficient methods of computing the optimality certificates for these subproblems exist, but first require the construction of a large data matrix. We show that this matrix can be constructed with complexity that remains linear in the number of landmarks and does not exceed the state-of-the-art computational complexity of one local solver iteration. We demonstrate the efficacy of the certificate on simulated and real-world landmark-based SLAM problems. We also integrate our method into the state-of-the-art SE-Sync pipeline to efficiently solve landmark-based SLAM problems to global optimality. Finally, we study the robustness of the global optimality certificate to measurement noise, taking into consideration the effect of the underlying measurement graph.
summary: Modern state estimation is often formulated as an optimization problem and solved using efficient local search methods. These methods at best guarantee convergence to local minima, but, in some cases, global optimality can also be certified. Although such global optimality certificates have been well established for 3D \textit{pose-graph optimization}, the details have yet to be worked out for the 3D landmark-based SLAM problem, in which estimated states include both robot poses and map landmarks. In this paper, we address this gap by using a graph-theoretic approach to cast the subproblems of landmark-based SLAM into a form that yields a sufficient condition for global optimality. Efficient methods of computing the optimality certificates for these subproblems exist, but first require the construction of a large data matrix. We show that this matrix can be constructed with complexity that remains linear in the number of landmarks and does not exceed the state-of-the-art computational complexity of one local solver iteration. We demonstrate the efficacy of the certificate on simulated and real-world landmark-based SLAM problems. We also integrate our method into the state-of-the-art SE-Sync pipeline to efficiently solve landmark-based SLAM problems to global optimality. Finally, we study the robustness of the global optimality certificate to measurement noise, taking into consideration the effect of the underlying measurement graph.
abstract_zh: 现代状态估计通常被表述为优化问题并使用有效的局部搜索方法来解决。这些方法最多可以保证收敛到局部最小值，但在某些情况下，也可以证明全局最优性。尽管这种全局最优性证书已经为 3D \textit{pose-graph optimization} 建立了良好的基础，但基于 3D 地标的 SLAM 问题的细节尚未确定，其中估计状态包括机器人姿势和地图地标。在本文中，我们通过使用图论方法将基于地标的 SLAM 的子问题转化为产生全局最优性的充分条件的形式来解决这一差距。存在计算这些子问题的最优性证书的有效方法，但首先需要构造一个大数据矩阵。我们证明，该矩阵的构建复杂度与地标数量保持线性关系，并且不超过一次局部求解器迭代的最先进的计算复杂度。我们证明了该证书在模拟和现实世界中基于地标的 SLAM 问题上的有效性。我们还将我们的方法集成到最先进的 SE-Sync 管道中，以有效解决基于地标的 SLAM 问题，实现全局最优。最后，考虑到底层测量图的影响，我们研究了全局最优性证书对测量噪声的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的全局最优性证书方法，用于解决包含机器人位姿和地图路标的三维地标SLAM问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM优化方法仅能保证局部最优，而地标SLAM的全局最优性认证方法尚未完善，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 采用图论方法将地标SLAM子问题转化为全局最优性条件，通过线性复杂度构建数据矩阵，集成至SE-Sync框架中。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实场景中验证了证书有效性，证明方法在噪声环境下具有鲁棒性，且计算复杂度优于现有局部求解器。
AI.conclusion: 提出的线性复杂度方法可高效求解地标SLAM的全局最优解，为实际应用提供了可靠理论保障。

Barfoot cs.RO

title: Probabilistic PolarGMM: Unsupervised Cluster Learning of Very Noisy Projection Images of Unknown Pose
title_zh: 概率 PolarGMM：未知姿势的高噪声投影图像的无监督聚类学习
abstract: A crucial step in single particle analysis (SPA) of cryogenic electron microscopy (Cryo-EM), 2D classification and alignment takes a collection of noisy particle images to infer orientations and group similar images together. Averaging these aligned and clustered noisy images produces a set of clean images, ready for further analysis such as 3D reconstruction. Fourier-Bessel steerable principal component analysis (FBsPCA) enables an efficient, adaptable, low-rank rotation operator. We extend the FBsPCA to additionally handle translations. In this extended FBsPCA representation, we use a probabilistic polar-coordinate Gaussian mixture model to learn soft clusters in an unsupervised fashion using an expectation maximization (EM) algorithm. The obtained rotational clusters are thus additionally robust to the presence of pairwise alignment imperfections. Multiple benchmarks from simulated Cryo-EM datasets show probabilistic PolarGMM's improved performance in comparisons with standard single-particle Cryo-EM tools, EMAN2 and RELION, in terms of various clustering metrics and alignment errors.
summary: A crucial step in single particle analysis (SPA) of cryogenic electron microscopy (Cryo-EM), 2D classification and alignment takes a collection of noisy particle images to infer orientations and group similar images together. Averaging these aligned and clustered noisy images produces a set of clean images, ready for further analysis such as 3D reconstruction. Fourier-Bessel steerable principal component analysis (FBsPCA) enables an efficient, adaptable, low-rank rotation operator. We extend the FBsPCA to additionally handle translations. In this extended FBsPCA representation, we use a probabilistic polar-coordinate Gaussian mixture model to learn soft clusters in an unsupervised fashion using an expectation maximization (EM) algorithm. The obtained rotational clusters are thus additionally robust to the presence of pairwise alignment imperfections. Multiple benchmarks from simulated Cryo-EM datasets show probabilistic PolarGMM's improved performance in comparisons with standard single-particle Cryo-EM tools, EMAN2 and RELION, in terms of various clustering metrics and alignment errors.
abstract_zh: 低温电子显微镜 (Cryo-EM) 的单粒子分析 (SPA) 中的一个关键步骤是，二维分类和对齐需要收集噪声粒子图像来推断方向并将相似图像分组在一起。对这些对齐和聚类的噪声图像进行平均会生成一组干净的图像，为进一步分析（例如 3D 重建）做好准备。傅立叶-贝塞尔可操纵主成分分析 (FBsPCA) 可实现高效、适应性强的低阶旋转算子。我们扩展 FBsPCA 来额外处理翻译。在此扩展的 FBsPCA 表示中，我们使用概率极坐标高斯混合模型，使用期望最大化 (EM) 算法以无监督方式学习软簇。因此，所获得的旋转簇对于成对对齐缺陷的存在具有额外的鲁棒性。模拟 Cryo-EM 数据集的多个基准显示，与标准单粒子 Cryo-EM 工具、EMAN2 和 RELION 相比，概率性 PolarGMM 在各种聚类指标和对齐误差方面的性能有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督聚类方法Probabilistic PolarGMM，用于处理低温电子显微镜（Cryo-EM）中噪声大且姿态未知的投影图像，通过改进的傅里叶-贝塞尔可旋转主成分分析（FBsPCA）和概率极坐标高斯混合模型实现更鲁棒的图像对齐与聚类。
AI.motivation: Cryo-EM单颗粒分析中，现有工具在处理高噪声和对齐误差时表现不足，需开发更稳健的2D分类与对齐方法以提高后续3D重建质量。
AI.method: 扩展FBsPCA以处理平移，结合概率极坐标高斯混合模型（PolarGMM）和期望最大化（EM）算法，实现对噪声投影图像的软聚类，增强对对齐误差的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个模拟Cryo-EM数据集上，Probabilistic PolarGMM在聚类指标和对齐误差方面优于EMAN2和RELION等标准工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了Cryo-EM图像处理的聚类与对齐精度，为高质量3D重建提供了更可靠的前期数据处理方案。

search_text: Probabilistic PolarGMM: Unsupervised Cluster Learning of Very Noisy Projection Images of Unknown Pose 概率 PolarGMM：未知姿势的高噪声投影图像的无监督聚类学习 A crucial step in single particle analysis (SPA) of cryogenic electron microscopy (Cryo-EM), 2D classification and alignment takes a collection of noisy particle images to infer orientations and group similar images together. Averaging these aligned and clustered noisy images produces a set of clean images, ready for further analysis such as 3D reconstruction. Fourier-Bessel steerable principal component analysis (FBsPCA) enables an efficient, adaptable, low-rank rotation operator. We extend the FBsPCA to additionally handle translations. In this extended FBsPCA representation, we use a probabilistic polar-coordinate Gaussian mixture model to learn soft clusters in an unsupervised fashion using an expectation maximization (EM) algorithm. The obtained rotational clusters are thus additionally robust to the presence of pairwise alignment imperfections. Multiple benchmarks from simulated Cryo-EM datasets show probabilistic PolarGMM's improved performance in comparisons with standard single-particle Cryo-EM tools, EMAN2 and RELION, in terms of various clustering metrics and alignment errors. 低温电子显微镜 (Cryo-EM) 的单粒子分析 (SPA) 中的一个关键步骤是，二维分类和对齐需要收集噪声粒子图像来推断方向并将相似图像分组在一起。对这些对齐和聚类的噪声图像进行平均会生成一组干净的图像，为进一步分析（例如 3D 重建）做好准备。傅立叶-贝塞尔可操纵主成分分析 (FBsPCA) 可实现高效、适应性强的低阶旋转算子。我们扩展 FBsPCA 来额外处理翻译。在此扩展的 FBsPCA 表示中，我们使用概率极坐标高斯混合模型，使用期望最大化 (EM) 算法以无监督方式学习软簇。因此，所获得的旋转簇对于成对对齐缺陷的存在具有额外的鲁棒性。模拟 Cryo-EM 数据集的多个基准显示，与标准单粒子 Cryo-EM 工具、EMAN2 和 RELION 相比，概率性 PolarGMM 在各种聚类指标和对齐误差方面的性能有所提高。 本文提出一种无监督聚类方法Probabilistic PolarGMM，用于处理低温电子显微镜（Cryo-EM）中噪声大且姿态未知的投影图像，通过改进的傅里叶-贝塞尔可旋转主成分分析（FBsPCA）和概率极坐标高斯混合模型实现更鲁棒的图像对齐与聚类。 Supawit Chockchowwat,Chandrajit L. Bajaj cs.CV,cs.CE,cs.LG

title: Szloca: towards a framework for full 3D tracking through a single camera in context of interactive arts
title_zh: Szloca：在互动艺术的背景下通过单个相机实现完整 3D 跟踪的框架
abstract: Realtime virtual data of objects and human presence in a large area holds a valuable key in enabling many experiences and applications in various industries and with exponential rise in the technological development of artificial intelligence, computer vision has expanded the possibilities of tracking and classifying things through just video inputs, which is also surpassing the limitations of most popular and common hardware setups known traditionally to detect human pose and position, such as low field of view and limited tracking capacity. The benefits of using computer vision in application development is large as it augments traditional input sources (like video streams) and can be integrated in many environments and platforms. In the context of new media interactive arts, based on physical movements and expanding over large areas or gallaries, this research presents a novel way and a framework towards obtaining data and virtual representation of objects/people - such as three-dimensional positions, skeltons/pose and masks from a single rgb camera. Looking at the state of art through some recent developments and building on prior research in the field of computer vision, the paper also proposes an original method to obtain three dimensional position data from monocular images, the model does not rely on complex training of computer vision systems but combines prior computer vision research and adds a capacity to represent z depth, ieto represent a world position in 3 axis from a 2d input source.
summary: Realtime virtual data of objects and human presence in a large area holds a valuable key in enabling many experiences and applications in various industries and with exponential rise in the technological development of artificial intelligence, computer vision has expanded the possibilities of tracking and classifying things through just video inputs, which is also surpassing the limitations of most popular and common hardware setups known traditionally to detect human pose and position, such as low field of view and limited tracking capacity. The benefits of using computer vision in application development is large as it augments traditional input sources (like video streams) and can be integrated in many environments and platforms. In the context of new media interactive arts, based on physical movements and expanding over large areas or gallaries, this research presents a novel way and a framework towards obtaining data and virtual representation of objects/people - such as three-dimensional positions, skeltons/pose and masks from a single rgb camera. Looking at the state of art through some recent developments and building on prior research in the field of computer vision, the paper also proposes an original method to obtain three dimensional position data from monocular images, the model does not rely on complex training of computer vision systems but combines prior computer vision research and adds a capacity to represent z depth, ieto represent a world position in 3 axis from a 2d input source.
abstract_zh: 大范围内物体和人体存在的实时虚拟数据对于在各个行业中实现许多体验和应用至关重要，并且随着人工智能技术发展的指数级增长，计算机视觉扩大了仅通过视频输入来跟踪和分类物体的可能性，这也超越了传统上检测人体姿势和位置的最流行和常见硬件设置的局限性，例如低视野和有限的跟踪能力。在应用程序开发中使用计算机视觉的好处是巨大的，因为它增强了传统的输入源（如视频流），并且可以集成到许多环境和平台中。在新媒体互动艺术的背景下，基于物理运动并扩展到大面积或画廊，这项研究提出了一种新颖的方法和框架，用于获取物体/人的数据和虚拟表示——例如来自单个 RGB 相机的三维位置、骨架/姿势和面具。通过回顾计算机视觉领域的一些最新进展并建立在先前研究的基础上，本文还提出了一种从单目图像获取三维位置数据的原创方法，该模型不依赖于计算机视觉系统的复杂训练，而是结合了先前的计算机视觉研究并增加了表示 z 深度的能力，即从 2d 输入源表示 3 轴上的世界位置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过单目相机实现全三维追踪的框架，用于交互艺术场景中物体和人物的实时虚拟数据获取。
AI.motivation: 传统硬件存在视野局限和追踪能力不足的问题，而计算机视觉可通过视频输入突破这些限制，为大型交互艺术场景提供更灵活的数据采集方案。
AI.method: 结合现有计算机视觉研究成果，通过单目RGB相机获取二维输入，并引入深度估计机制，无需复杂训练即可实现三维坐标重建。
AI.result: 成功构建出可实时获取三维位置、骨骼姿态和掩码信息的框架，验证了单目相机在交互艺术场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为交互艺术提供了新颖的三维追踪解决方案，通过简化硬件配置和算法复杂度，拓展了计算机视觉在艺术领域的应用边界。

authors_text: Mohammad Zeineldeen,Jingjing Xu,Christoph Lüscher,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney
title: Improving the Training Recipe for a Robust Conformer-based Hybrid Model
title_zh: 改进基于稳健一致性的混合模型的训练方法
abstract: Speaker adaptation is important to build robust automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. In this work, we investigate various methods for speaker adaptive training (SAT) based on feature-space approaches for a conformer-based acoustic model (AM) on the Switchboard 300h dataset. We propose a method, called Weighted-Simple-Add, which adds weighted speaker information vectors to the input of the multi-head self-attention module of the conformer AM. Using this method for SAT, we achieve 3.5% and 4.5% relative improvement in terms of WER on the CallHome part of Hub5'00 and Hub5'01 respectively. Moreover, we build on top of our previous work where we proposed a novel and competitive training recipe for a conformer-based hybrid AM. We extend and improve this recipe where we achieve 11% relative improvement in terms of word-error-rate (WER) on Switchboard 300h Hub5'00 dataset. We also make this recipe efficient by reducing the total number of parameters by 34% relative.
summary: Speaker adaptation is important to build robust automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. In this work, we investigate various methods for speaker adaptive training (SAT) based on feature-space approaches for a conformer-based acoustic model (AM) on the Switchboard 300h dataset. We propose a method, called Weighted-Simple-Add, which adds weighted speaker information vectors to the input of the multi-head self-attention module of the conformer AM. Using this method for SAT, we achieve 3.5% and 4.5% relative improvement in terms of WER on the CallHome part of Hub5'00 and Hub5'01 respectively. Moreover, we build on top of our previous work where we proposed a novel and competitive training recipe for a conformer-based hybrid AM. We extend and improve this recipe where we achieve 11% relative improvement in terms of word-error-rate (WER) on Switchboard 300h Hub5'00 dataset. We also make this recipe efficient by reducing the total number of parameters by 34% relative.
abstract_zh: 说话人适应对于构建强大的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统非常重要。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于 Switchboard 300h 数据集上基于一致性的声学模型 (AM) 的特征空间方法的说话者自适应训练 (SAT) 的各种方法。我们提出了一种称为Weighted-Simple-Add的方法，它将加权说话人信息向量添加到conformer AM的多头自注意力模块的输入中。使用此方法进行 SAT，我们在 Hub5'00 和 Hub5'01 的 CallHome 部分的 WER 方面分别实现了 3.5% 和 4.5% 的相对改进。此外，我们在之前的工作基础上，为基于构象异构体的混合增材制造提出了一种新颖且有竞争力的训练方案。我们扩展并改进了这个方法，在 Switchboard 300h Hub5'00 数据集上，我们在字错误率 (WER) 方面实现了 11% 的相对改进。我们还通过将参数总数相对减少 34% 来提高此配方的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进基于Conformer的混合模型的训练方法，以提升自动语音识别系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 构建鲁棒的自动语音识别（ASR）系统需要有效的说话人自适应训练（SAT）方法，以适应不同说话人的语音特征。
AI.method: 提出一种名为Weighted-Simple-Add的方法，在Conformer模型的多头自注意力模块输入中添加加权说话人信息向量，并优化训练配方以减少参数量。
AI.result: 在CallHome数据集上实现Hub5'00和Hub5'01的WER相对降低3.5%和4.5%；在Switchboard 300h Hub5'00数据集上实现11%的WER相对改进，同时减少34%的参数量。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升了Conformer模型的说话人自适应能力，在保持高性能的同时显著优化了模型效率。

search_text: Improving the Training Recipe for a Robust Conformer-based Hybrid Model 改进基于稳健一致性的混合模型的训练方法 Speaker adaptation is important to build robust automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems. In this work, we investigate various methods for speaker adaptive training (SAT) based on feature-space approaches for a conformer-based acoustic model (AM) on the Switchboard 300h dataset. We propose a method, called Weighted-Simple-Add, which adds weighted speaker information vectors to the input of the multi-head self-attention module of the conformer AM. Using this method for SAT, we achieve 3.5% and 4.5% relative improvement in terms of WER on the CallHome part of Hub5'00 and Hub5'01 respectively. Moreover, we build on top of our previous work where we proposed a novel and competitive training recipe for a conformer-based hybrid AM. We extend and improve this recipe where we achieve 11% relative improvement in terms of word-error-rate (WER) on Switchboard 300h Hub5'00 dataset. We also make this recipe efficient by reducing the total number of parameters by 34% relative. 说话人适应对于构建强大的自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统非常重要。在这项工作中，我们研究了基于 Switchboard 300h 数据集上基于一致性的声学模型 (AM) 的特征空间方法的说话者自适应训练 (SAT) 的各种方法。我们提出了一种称为Weighted-Simple-Add的方法，它将加权说话人信息向量添加到conformer AM的多头自注意力模块的输入中。使用此方法进行 SAT，我们在 Hub5'00 和 Hub5'01 的 CallHome 部分的 WER 方面分别实现了 3.5% 和 4.5% 的相对改进。此外，我们在之前的工作基础上，为基于构象异构体的混合增材制造提出了一种新颖且有竞争力的训练方案。我们扩展并改进了这个方法，在 Switchboard 300h Hub5'00 数据集上，我们在字错误率 (WER) 方面实现了 11% 的相对改进。我们还通过将参数总数相对减少 34% 来提高此配方的效率。 本文旨在改进基于Conformer的混合模型的训练方法，以提升自动语音识别系统的鲁棒性。 Mohammad Zeineldeen,Jingjing Xu,Christoph Lüscher,Ralf Schlüter,Hermann Ney cs.CL,eess.AS,stat.ML

title: Nonwatertight Mesh Reconstruction
title_zh: 非水密网格重建
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.03452 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.03452 by other authors
abstract: Reconstructing 3D non-watertight mesh from an unoriented point cloud is an unexplored area in computer vision and computer graphics. In this project, we tried to tackle this problem by extending the learning-based watertight mesh reconstruction pipeline presented in the paper 'Shape as Points'. The core of our approach is to cast the problem as a semantic segmentation problem that identifies the region in the 3D volume where the mesh surface lies and extracts the surfaces from the detected regions. Our approach achieves compelling results compared to the baseline techniques.
summary: Reconstructing 3D non-watertight mesh from an unoriented point cloud is an unexplored area in computer vision and computer graphics. In this project, we tried to tackle this problem by extending the learning-based watertight mesh reconstruction pipeline presented in the paper 'Shape as Points'. The core of our approach is to cast the problem as a semantic segmentation problem that identifies the region in the 3D volume where the mesh surface lies and extracts the surfaces from the detected regions. Our approach achieves compelling results compared to the baseline techniques.
abstract_zh: 从无方向的点云重建 3D 非水密网格是计算机视觉和计算机图形学中尚未探索的领域。在这个项目中，我们试图通过扩展论文“Shape as Points”中提出的基于学习的防水网格重建管道来解决这个问题。我们方法的核心是将问题转化为语义分割问题，识别 3D 体积中网格表面所在的区域，并从检测到的区域中提取表面。与基线技术相比，我们的方法取得了引人注目的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从无向点云中重建非封闭的3D网格，扩展了基于学习的封闭网格重建方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注封闭网格重建，而对非封闭网格的重建方法尚未充分探索，需解决该领域技术空白。
AI.method: 将问题转化为语义分割任务，通过识别3D体积中网格表面区域并提取表面实现重建。
AI.result: 相比基线方法，该方法在非封闭网格重建任务中取得了令人信服的成果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了将非封闭网格重建转化为语义分割的有效性，为相关研究提供了新思路。
