authors_text: Thomas Lubinski,Cassandra Granade,Amos Anderson,Alan Geller,Martin Roetteler,Andrei Petrenko,Bettina Heim
title: Advancing Hybrid Quantum-Classical Computation with Real-Time Execution
title_zh: 通过实时执行推进混合量子经典计算
abstract: The use of mid-circuit measurement and qubit reset within quantum programs has been introduced recently and several applications demonstrated that perform conditional branching based on these measurements. In this work, we go a step further and describe a next-generation implementation of classical computation embedded within quantum programs that enables the real-time calculation and adjustment of program variables based on the mid-circuit state of measured qubits. A full-featured Quantum Intermediate Representation (QIR) model is used to describe the quantum circuit including its embedded classical computation. This integrated approach eliminates the need to evaluate and store a potentially prohibitive volume of classical data within the quantum program in order to explore multiple solution paths. It enables a new type of quantum algorithm that requires fewer round-trips between an external classical driver program and the execution of the quantum program, significantly reducing computational latency, as much of the classical computation can be performed during the coherence time of quantum program execution. We review practical challenges to implementing this approach along with developments underway to address these challenges. An implementation of this novel and powerful quantum programming pattern, a random walk phase estimation algorithm, is demonstrated on a physical quantum computer with an analysis of its benefits and feasibility as compared to existing quantum computing methods.
summary: The use of mid-circuit measurement and qubit reset within quantum programs has been introduced recently and several applications demonstrated that perform conditional branching based on these measurements. In this work, we go a step further and describe a next-generation implementation of classical computation embedded within quantum programs that enables the real-time calculation and adjustment of program variables based on the mid-circuit state of measured qubits. A full-featured Quantum Intermediate Representation (QIR) model is used to describe the quantum circuit including its embedded classical computation. This integrated approach eliminates the need to evaluate and store a potentially prohibitive volume of classical data within the quantum program in order to explore multiple solution paths. It enables a new type of quantum algorithm that requires fewer round-trips between an external classical driver program and the execution of the quantum program, significantly reducing computational latency, as much of the classical computation can be performed during the coherence time of quantum program execution. We review practical challenges to implementing this approach along with developments underway to address these challenges. An implementation of this novel and powerful quantum programming pattern, a random walk phase estimation algorithm, is demonstrated on a physical quantum computer with an analysis of its benefits and feasibility as compared to existing quantum computing methods.
abstract_zh: 最近在量子程序中引入了中电路测量和量子位重置的使用，并且几个应用程序演示了基于这些测量执行条件分支。在这项工作中，我们更进一步描述了嵌入量子程序中的下一代经典计算实现，该实现能够根据测量量子位的中间电路状态实时计算和调整程序变量。全功能的量子中间表示（QIR）模型用于描述量子电路，包括其嵌入式经典计算。这种集成方法消除了在量子程序中评估和存储可能令人望而却步的经典数据量的需要，以便探索多种解决方案路径。它支持一种新型量子算法，需要更少的外部经典驱动程序和量子程序执行之间的往返，从而显着减少计算延迟，因为大部分经典计算可以在量子程序执行的相干时间内执行。我们回顾了实施这种方法的实际挑战以及解决这些挑战的进展。这种新颖而强大的量子编程模式（随机游走相位估计算法）的实现在物理量子计算机上进行了演示，并分析了其与现有量子计算方法相比的优点和可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种嵌入量子程序中的新型经典计算方法，通过实时计算和调整程序变量来优化量子计算过程。
AI.motivation: 传统的量子计算方法需要在外部经典驱动程序和量子程序之间进行多次往返通信，导致计算延迟。本文旨在减少这种延迟，提高量子计算效率。
AI.method: 本文使用了一种完整的量子中间表示（QIR）模型，将经典计算嵌入量子程序中，实现对量子电路中测量量子比特状态的实时计算和调整。
AI.result: 在物理量子计算机上实现了一种随机游走相位估计算法，并分析了其相对于现有量子计算方法的优势和可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过减少外部经典驱动程序与量子程序之间的通信次数，显著降低了计算延迟，为新型量子算法的开发提供了新的思路。

title: Cross-Silo Federated Learning: Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: 跨孤岛联邦学习：挑战与机遇
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is an emerging technology that enables the training of machine learning models from multiple clients while keeping the data distributed and private. Based on the participating clients and the model training scale, federated learning can be classified into two types: cross-device FL where clients are typically mobile devices and the client number can reach up to a scale of millions; cross-silo FL where clients are organizations or companies and the client number is usually small (e.g., within a hundred). While existing studies mainly focus on cross-device FL, this paper aims to provide an overview of the cross-silo FL. More specifically, we first discuss applications of cross-silo FL and outline its major challenges. We then provide a systematic overview of the existing approaches to the challenges in cross-silo FL by focusing on their connections and differences to cross-device FL. Finally, we discuss future directions and open issues that merit research efforts from the community.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is an emerging technology that enables the training of machine learning models from multiple clients while keeping the data distributed and private. Based on the participating clients and the model training scale, federated learning can be classified into two types: cross-device FL where clients are typically mobile devices and the client number can reach up to a scale of millions; cross-silo FL where clients are organizations or companies and the client number is usually small (e.g., within a hundred). While existing studies mainly focus on cross-device FL, this paper aims to provide an overview of the cross-silo FL. More specifically, we first discuss applications of cross-silo FL and outline its major challenges. We then provide a systematic overview of the existing approaches to the challenges in cross-silo FL by focusing on their connections and differences to cross-device FL. Finally, we discuss future directions and open issues that merit research efforts from the community.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 是一项新兴技术，可以训练来自多个客户端的机器学习模型，同时保持数据的分布式和私密性。根据参与的客户端和模型训练规模，联邦学习可以分为两种类型：跨设备联邦学习，客户端通常是移动设备，客户端数量可达百万级规模；跨筒仓 FL，其中客户是组织或公司，且客户数量通常较小（例如一百以内）。虽然现有的研究主要集中在跨设备 FL，但本文旨在提供跨筒仓 FL 的概述。更具体地说，我们首先讨论跨筒仓 FL 的应用并概述其主要挑战。然后，我们系统地概述了应对跨筒仓 FL 挑战的现有方法，重点关注它们与跨设备 FL 的联系和差异。最后，我们讨论未来的方向和值得社区研究的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在综述跨组织联邦学习（cross-silo FL）的应用场景、主要挑战及现有解决方案，并探讨其未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要聚焦于跨设备联邦学习（cross-device FL），而针对参与方为组织或企业的跨组织联邦学习研究相对不足，需系统梳理其挑战与机遇。
AI.method: 通过分析跨组织联邦学习的应用场景，对比其与跨设备联邦学习的异同，系统总结现有技术方法，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 明确了跨组织联邦学习的核心挑战（如数据异质性、通信开销等），梳理了现有技术路线，并指出了隐私保护、模型收敛等未解决的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 跨组织联邦学习需进一步探索适用于组织级数据特性的优化方法，同时需加强跨领域协作以推动技术落地。

search_text: Cross-Silo Federated Learning: Challenges and Opportunities 跨孤岛联邦学习：挑战与机遇 Federated learning (FL) is an emerging technology that enables the training of machine learning models from multiple clients while keeping the data distributed and private. Based on the participating clients and the model training scale, federated learning can be classified into two types: cross-device FL where clients are typically mobile devices and the client number can reach up to a scale of millions; cross-silo FL where clients are organizations or companies and the client number is usually small (e.g., within a hundred). While existing studies mainly focus on cross-device FL, this paper aims to provide an overview of the cross-silo FL. More specifically, we first discuss applications of cross-silo FL and outline its major challenges. We then provide a systematic overview of the existing approaches to the challenges in cross-silo FL by focusing on their connections and differences to cross-device FL. Finally, we discuss future directions and open issues that merit research efforts from the community. 联邦学习 (FL) 是一项新兴技术，可以训练来自多个客户端的机器学习模型，同时保持数据的分布式和私密性。根据参与的客户端和模型训练规模，联邦学习可以分为两种类型：跨设备联邦学习，客户端通常是移动设备，客户端数量可达百万级规模；跨筒仓 FL，其中客户是组织或公司，且客户数量通常较小（例如一百以内）。虽然现有的研究主要集中在跨设备 FL，但本文旨在提供跨筒仓 FL 的概述。更具体地说，我们首先讨论跨筒仓 FL 的应用并概述其主要挑战。然后，我们系统地概述了应对跨筒仓 FL 挑战的现有方法，重点关注它们与跨设备 FL 的联系和差异。最后，我们讨论未来的方向和值得社区研究的开放问题。 本文旨在综述跨组织联邦学习（cross-silo FL）的应用场景、主要挑战及现有解决方案，并探讨其未来研究方向。 Chao Huang,Jianwei Huang,Xin Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

title: Improved Processing of Ultrasound Tongue Videos by Combining ConvLSTM and 3D Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 结合 ConvLSTM 和 3D 卷积网络改进超声舌视频的处理
abstract: Silent Speech Interfaces aim to reconstruct the acoustic signal from a sequence of ultrasound tongue images that records the articulatory movement. The extraction of information about the tongue movement requires us to efficiently process the whole sequence of images, not just as a single image. Several approaches have been suggested to process such a sequential image data. The classic neural network structure combines two-dimensional convolutional (2D-CNN) layers that process the images separately with recurrent layers (eg. an LSTM) on top of them to fuse the information along time. More recently, it was shown that one may also apply a 3D-CNN network that can extract information along both the spatial and the temporal axes in parallel, achieving a similar accuracy while being less time consuming. A third option is to apply the less well-known ConvLSTM layer type, which combines the advantages of LSTM and CNN layers by replacing matrix multiplication with the convolution operation. In this paper, we experimentally compared various combinations of the above mentions layer types for a silent speech interface task, and we obtained the best result with a hybrid model that consists of a combination of 3D-CNN and ConvLSTM layers. This hybrid network is slightly faster, smaller and more accurate than our previous 3D-CNN model. %with combination of (2+1)D CNN.
summary: Silent Speech Interfaces aim to reconstruct the acoustic signal from a sequence of ultrasound tongue images that records the articulatory movement. The extraction of information about the tongue movement requires us to efficiently process the whole sequence of images, not just as a single image. Several approaches have been suggested to process such a sequential image data. The classic neural network structure combines two-dimensional convolutional (2D-CNN) layers that process the images separately with recurrent layers (eg. an LSTM) on top of them to fuse the information along time. More recently, it was shown that one may also apply a 3D-CNN network that can extract information along both the spatial and the temporal axes in parallel, achieving a similar accuracy while being less time consuming. A third option is to apply the less well-known ConvLSTM layer type, which combines the advantages of LSTM and CNN layers by replacing matrix multiplication with the convolution operation. In this paper, we experimentally compared various combinations of the above mentions layer types for a silent speech interface task, and we obtained the best result with a hybrid model that consists of a combination of 3D-CNN and ConvLSTM layers. This hybrid network is slightly faster, smaller and more accurate than our previous 3D-CNN model. %with combination of (2+1)D CNN.
abstract_zh: 无声语音接口旨在从记录发音运动的一系列超声舌头图像中重建声学信号。提取有关舌头运动的信息需要我们有效地处理整个图像序列，而不仅仅是单个图像。已经提出了几种方法来处理这样的连续图像数据。经典的神经网络结构结合了分别处理图像的二维卷积 (2D-CNN) 层和其顶部的循环层（例如 LSTM），以随时间融合信息。最近，研究表明，人们还可以应用 3D-CNN 网络，该网络可以沿空间轴和时间轴并行提取信息，从而实现类似的精度，同时消耗更少的时间。第三种选择是应用不太知名的 ConvLSTM 层类型，它通过用卷积运算代替矩阵乘法来结合 LSTM 和 CNN 层的优点。在本文中，我们通过实验比较了无声语音接口任务中上述层类型的各种组合，并通过由 3D-CNN 和 ConvLSTM 层组合组成的混合模型获得了最佳结果。该混合网络比我们之前的 3D-CNN 模型稍快、更小且更准确。 %结合 (2+1)D CNN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合ConvLSTM和3D卷积网络的混合模型，以改进超声波舌像视频的处理，用于无声语音接口任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理超声波舌像序列时存在效率或准确性不足的问题，需探索更优的神经网络结构以同时有效提取时空信息。
AI.method: 通过实验比较2D-CNN+LSTM、3D-CNN、ConvLSTM等多种组合，最终提出结合3D卷积层与ConvLSTM层的混合网络模型。
AI.result: 混合模型在保持较高准确性的同时，相比先前的3D-CNN模型更快、更小且精度更高。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型在无声语音接口任务中表现出优越性，为超声波舌像序列处理提供了更高效且精确的解决方案。

title: AFT-VO: Asynchronous Fusion Transformers for Multi-View Visual Odometry Estimation
title_zh: AFT-VO：用于多视图视觉里程计估计的异步融合变压器
abstract: Motion estimation approaches typically employ sensor fusion techniques, such as the Kalman Filter, to handle individual sensor failures. More recently, deep learning-based fusion approaches have been proposed, increasing the performance and requiring less model-specific implementations. However, current deep fusion approaches often assume that sensors are synchronised, which is not always practical, especially for low-cost hardware. To address this limitation, in this work, we propose AFT-VO, a novel transformer-based sensor fusion architecture to estimate VO from multiple sensors. Our framework combines predictions from asynchronous multi-view cameras and accounts for the time discrepancies of measurements coming from different sources. Our approach first employs a Mixture Density Network (MDN) to estimate the probability distributions of the 6-DoF poses for every camera in the system. Then a novel transformer-based fusion module, AFT-VO, is introduced, which combines these asynchronous pose estimations, along with their confidences. More specifically, we introduce Discretiser and Source Encoding techniques which enable the fusion of multi-source asynchronous signals. We evaluate our approach on the popular nuScenes and KITTI datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that multi-view fusion for VO estimation provides robust and accurate trajectories, outperforming the state of the art in both challenging weather and lighting conditions.
summary: Motion estimation approaches typically employ sensor fusion techniques, such as the Kalman Filter, to handle individual sensor failures. More recently, deep learning-based fusion approaches have been proposed, increasing the performance and requiring less model-specific implementations. However, current deep fusion approaches often assume that sensors are synchronised, which is not always practical, especially for low-cost hardware. To address this limitation, in this work, we propose AFT-VO, a novel transformer-based sensor fusion architecture to estimate VO from multiple sensors. Our framework combines predictions from asynchronous multi-view cameras and accounts for the time discrepancies of measurements coming from different sources. Our approach first employs a Mixture Density Network (MDN) to estimate the probability distributions of the 6-DoF poses for every camera in the system. Then a novel transformer-based fusion module, AFT-VO, is introduced, which combines these asynchronous pose estimations, along with their confidences. More specifically, we introduce Discretiser and Source Encoding techniques which enable the fusion of multi-source asynchronous signals. We evaluate our approach on the popular nuScenes and KITTI datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that multi-view fusion for VO estimation provides robust and accurate trajectories, outperforming the state of the art in both challenging weather and lighting conditions.
abstract_zh: 运动估计方法通常采用传感器融合技术（例如卡尔曼滤波器）来处理单个传感器故障。最近，人们提出了基于深度学习的融合方法，提高了性能并减少了特定于模型的实现。然而，当前的深度融合方法通常假设传感器是同步的，这并不总是实用的，尤其是对于低成本硬件。为了解决这个限制，在这项工作中，我们提出了 AFT-VO，一种基于变压器的新型传感器融合架构，用于估计来自多个传感器的 VO。我们的框架结合了异步多视图相机的预测，并考虑了来自不同来源的测量的时间差异。我们的方法首先采用混合密度网络 (MDN) 来估计系统中每个摄像机的 6-DoF 位姿的概率分布。然后引入了一种新颖的基于变压器的融合模块 AFT-VO，它将这些异步姿态估计及其置信度结合起来。更具体地说，我们介绍了离散化器和源编码技术，可以实现多源异步信号的融合。我们在流行的 nuScenes 和 KITTI 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们的实验表明，用于 VO 估计的多视图融合提供了稳健且准确的轨迹，在具有挑战性的天气和照明条件下均优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AFT-VO，一种基于异步融合变压器的多视角视觉里程计估计方法，用于处理非同步传感器数据的融合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习融合方法通常假设传感器同步，但在低成本硬件中难以实现，需解决异步传感器数据融合的挑战。
AI.method: 采用混合密度网络（MDN）估计各相机6自由度姿态概率分布，并设计基于变压器的AFT-VO模块，结合异步姿态估计及其置信度，引入离散化与源编码技术实现多源异步信号融合。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和KITTI数据集上实验表明，该方法在复杂天气和光照条件下优于现有方法，提供更鲁棒准确的轨迹估计。
AI.conclusion: AFT-VO通过有效处理异步传感器数据，提升了多视角视觉里程计的精度与鲁棒性，为低成本硬件应用提供了新思路。

method: 采用混合密度网络（MDN）估计各相机6自由度姿态概率分布，并设计基于变压器的AFT-VO模块，结合异步姿态估计及其置信度，引入离散化与源编码技术实现多源异步信号融合。
result: 在nuScenes和KITTI数据集上实验表明，该方法在复杂天气和光照条件下优于现有方法，提供更鲁棒准确的轨迹估计。
conclusion: AFT-VO通过有效处理异步传感器数据，提升了多视角视觉里程计的精度与鲁棒性，为低成本硬件应用提供了新思路。
search_text: AFT-VO: Asynchronous Fusion Transformers for Multi-View Visual Odometry Estimation AFT-VO：用于多视图视觉里程计估计的异步融合变压器 Motion estimation approaches typically employ sensor fusion techniques, such as the Kalman Filter, to handle individual sensor failures. More recently, deep learning-based fusion approaches have been proposed, increasing the performance and requiring less model-specific implementations. However, current deep fusion approaches often assume that sensors are synchronised, which is not always practical, especially for low-cost hardware. To address this limitation, in this work, we propose AFT-VO, a novel transformer-based sensor fusion architecture to estimate VO from multiple sensors. Our framework combines predictions from asynchronous multi-view cameras and accounts for the time discrepancies of measurements coming from different sources. Our approach first employs a Mixture Density Network (MDN) to estimate the probability distributions of the 6-DoF poses for every camera in the system. Then a novel transformer-based fusion module, AFT-VO, is introduced, which combines these asynchronous pose estimations, along with their confidences. More specifically, we introduce Discretiser and Source Encoding techniques which enable the fusion of multi-source asynchronous signals. We evaluate our approach on the popular nuScenes and KITTI datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that multi-view fusion for VO estimation provides robust and accurate trajectories, outperforming the state of the art in both challenging weather and lighting conditions. 运动估计方法通常采用传感器融合技术（例如卡尔曼滤波器）来处理单个传感器故障。最近，人们提出了基于深度学习的融合方法，提高了性能并减少了特定于模型的实现。然而，当前的深度融合方法通常假设传感器是同步的，这并不总是实用的，尤其是对于低成本硬件。为了解决这个限制，在这项工作中，我们提出了 AFT-VO，一种基于变压器的新型传感器融合架构，用于估计来自多个传感器的 VO。我们的框架结合了异步多视图相机的预测，并考虑了来自不同来源的测量的时间差异。我们的方法首先采用混合密度网络 (MDN) 来估计系统中每个摄像机的 6-DoF 位姿的概率分布。然后引入了一种新颖的基于变压器的融合模块 AFT-VO，它将这些异步姿态估计及其置信度结合起来。更具体地说，我们介绍了离散化器和源编码技术，可以实现多源异步信号的融合。我们在流行的 nuScenes 和 KITTI 数据集上评估我们的方法。我们的实验表明，用于 VO 估计的多视图融合提供了稳健且准确的轨迹，在具有挑战性的天气和照明条件下均优于现有技术。 本文提出AFT-VO，一种基于异步融合变压器的多视角视觉里程计估计方法，用于处理非同步传感器数据的融合问题。 Nimet Kaygusuz,Oscar Mendez,Richard Bowden cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Multi-view Feature Augmentation with Adaptive Class Activation Mapping
title_zh: 使用自适应类激活映射进行多视图特征增强
comment: An arxiv version of the paper published in Proceedings of the Thirtieth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-21). See https://www.ijcai.org/proceedings/2021/94
comments: An arxiv version of the paper published in Proceedings of the Thirtieth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-21). See https://www.ijcai.org/proceedings/2021/94
abstract: We propose an end-to-end-trainable feature augmentation module built for image classification that extracts and exploits multi-view local features to boost model performance. Different from using global average pooling (GAP) to extract vectorized features from only the global view, we propose to sample and ensemble diverse multi-view local features to improve model robustness. To sample class-representative local features, we incorporate a simple auxiliary classifier head (comprising only one 1$\times$1 convolutional layer) which efficiently and adaptively attends to class-discriminative local regions of feature maps via our proposed AdaCAM (Adaptive Class Activation Mapping). Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent and noticeable performance gains achieved by our multi-view feature augmentation module.
summary: We propose an end-to-end-trainable feature augmentation module built for image classification that extracts and exploits multi-view local features to boost model performance. Different from using global average pooling (GAP) to extract vectorized features from only the global view, we propose to sample and ensemble diverse multi-view local features to improve model robustness. To sample class-representative local features, we incorporate a simple auxiliary classifier head (comprising only one 1$\times$1 convolutional layer) which efficiently and adaptively attends to class-discriminative local regions of feature maps via our proposed AdaCAM (Adaptive Class Activation Mapping). Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent and noticeable performance gains achieved by our multi-view feature augmentation module.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种专为图像分类而构建的端到端可训练特征增强模块，该模块提取和利用多视图局部特征来提高模型性能。与使用全局平均池化（GAP）仅从全局视图中提取矢量化特征不同，我们建议对不同的多视图局部特征进行采样和集成以提高模型的鲁棒性。为了对类代表局部特征进行采样，我们采用了一个简单的辅助分类器头（仅包含一个 1$\times$1 卷积层），它通过我们提出的 AdaCAM（自适应类激活映射）有效且自适应地处理特征图的类判别局部区域。大量的实验证明我们的多视图特征增强模块实现了一致且显着的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端可训练的多视角特征增强模块，通过提取和利用多视角局部特征来提升图像分类模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统全局平均池化（GAP）仅提取全局特征，可能忽略关键局部信息，导致模型鲁棒性不足。本文旨在通过多视角局部特征增强模型表现。
AI.method: 设计包含辅助分类头（1×1卷积层）的AdaCAM模块，自适应关注类别判别性局部区域，并采样融合多视角局部特征。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该模块在多个数据集上实现显著且稳定的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 多视角特征增强结合自适应类激活映射能有效提升图像分类模型性能，为特征利用提供新思路。

authors_text: A. Huzeyfe Demir,Berke Yavas,Mehmet Yazici,Dogukan Aksu,M. Ali Aydin
title: Object Detection and Tracking with Autonomous UAV
title_zh: 使用自主无人机进行物体检测和跟踪
abstract: In this paper, a combat Unmanned Air Vehicle (UAV) is modeled in the simulation environment. The rotary wing UAV is successfully performed various tasks such as locking on the targets, tracking, and sharing the relevant data with surrounding vehicles. Different software technologies such as API communication, ground control station configuration, autonomous movement algorithms, computer vision, and deep learning are employed.
summary: In this paper, a combat Unmanned Air Vehicle (UAV) is modeled in the simulation environment. The rotary wing UAV is successfully performed various tasks such as locking on the targets, tracking, and sharing the relevant data with surrounding vehicles. Different software technologies such as API communication, ground control station configuration, autonomous movement algorithms, computer vision, and deep learning are employed.
abstract_zh: 本文在仿真环境中对战斗无人机（UAV）进行了建模。旋翼无人机成功执行了锁定目标、跟踪以及与周围车辆共享相关数据等各种任务。采用了API通信、地面控制站配置、自主运动算法、计算机视觉和深度学习等不同的软件技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了自主无人机在模拟环境中的目标检测与跟踪技术，整合多种软件技术实现任务执行。
AI.motivation: 提升无人机在复杂环境下的自主作战能力及多机协同效率，满足现代军事任务需求。
AI.method: 采用API通信、地面控制站配置、自主移动算法结合计算机视觉与深度学习技术实现目标检测与跟踪。
AI.result: 成功在模拟环境中实现无人机目标锁定、持续跟踪及与周边车辆的数据共享功能。
AI.conclusion: 多技术融合方案验证了自主无人机执行复杂任务的可行性，为实战应用提供理论支持。

title: Checking Trustworthiness of Probabilistic Computations in a Typed Natural Deduction System
title_zh: 检查类型化自然演绎系统中概率计算的可信度
comment: ef:F. A. D'Asaro, F. A. Genco, G. Primiero, Checking trustworthiness of probabilistic computations in a typed natural deduction system, Journal of Logic and Computation, 2025, exaf00
comments: ef:F. A. D'Asaro, F. A. Genco, G. Primiero, Checking trustworthiness of probabilistic computations in a typed natural deduction system, Journal of Logic and Computation, 2025, exaf00
abstract: In this paper we present the probabilistic typed natural deduction calculus TPTND, designed to reason about and derive trustworthiness properties of probabilistic computational processes, like those underlying current AI applications. Derivability in TPTND is interpreted as the process of extracting $n$ samples of possibly complex outputs with a certain frequency from a given categorical distribution. We formalize trust for such outputs as a form of hypothesis testing on the distance between such frequency and the intended probability. The main advantage of the calculus is to render such notion of trustworthiness checkable. We present a computational semantics for the terms over which we reason and then the semantics of TPTND, where logical operators as well as a Trust operator are defined through introduction and elimination rules. We illustrate structural and metatheoretical properties, with particular focus on the ability to establish under which term evolutions and logical rules applications the notion of trustworhtiness can be preserved.
summary: In this paper we present the probabilistic typed natural deduction calculus TPTND, designed to reason about and derive trustworthiness properties of probabilistic computational processes, like those underlying current AI applications. Derivability in TPTND is interpreted as the process of extracting $n$ samples of possibly complex outputs with a certain frequency from a given categorical distribution. We formalize trust for such outputs as a form of hypothesis testing on the distance between such frequency and the intended probability. The main advantage of the calculus is to render such notion of trustworthiness checkable. We present a computational semantics for the terms over which we reason and then the semantics of TPTND, where logical operators as well as a Trust operator are defined through introduction and elimination rules. We illustrate structural and metatheoretical properties, with particular focus on the ability to establish under which term evolutions and logical rules applications the notion of trustworhtiness can be preserved.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了概率类型自然演绎演算 TPTND，旨在推理和导出概率计算过程的可信度属性，例如当前人工智能应用程序的基础。 TPTND 中的可导性被解释为从给定的分类分布中以一定频率提取可能复杂输出的 $n$ 个样本的过程。我们将对此类输出的信任形式化为对此类频率与预期概率之间的距离进行假设检验的一种形式。微积分的主要优点是使这种可信度概念变得可检查。我们提出了我们推理的术语的计算语义，然后提出了 TPTND 的语义，其中逻辑运算符以及信任运算符是通过引入和消除规则定义的。我们说明了结构和元理论属性，特别关注建立在术语演变和逻辑规则应用下可以保留可信性概念的能力。

AI.tldr: 设计一种类型自然演绎系统来验证概率计算过程的信任度
AI.motivation: 确保AI应用中概率计算的可信度，通过形式化方法验证其统计特性
AI.method: 提出TPTND演算，定义逻辑和信任运算符的规则，并建立计算语义
AI.result: 验证了系统在保持信任度属性方面的结构和元理论性质
AI.conclusion: 该系统为概率计算的信任度检查提供了形式化框架，有助于确保AI应用的可靠性

search_text: Checking Trustworthiness of Probabilistic Computations in a Typed Natural Deduction System 检查类型化自然演绎系统中概率计算的可信度 In this paper we present the probabilistic typed natural deduction calculus TPTND, designed to reason about and derive trustworthiness properties of probabilistic computational processes, like those underlying current AI applications. Derivability in TPTND is interpreted as the process of extracting $n$ samples of possibly complex outputs with a certain frequency from a given categorical distribution. We formalize trust for such outputs as a form of hypothesis testing on the distance between such frequency and the intended probability. The main advantage of the calculus is to render such notion of trustworthiness checkable. We present a computational semantics for the terms over which we reason and then the semantics of TPTND, where logical operators as well as a Trust operator are defined through introduction and elimination rules. We illustrate structural and metatheoretical properties, with particular focus on the ability to establish under which term evolutions and logical rules applications the notion of trustworhtiness can be preserved. 在本文中，我们提出了概率类型自然演绎演算 TPTND，旨在推理和导出概率计算过程的可信度属性，例如当前人工智能应用程序的基础。 TPTND 中的可导性被解释为从给定的分类分布中以一定频率提取可能复杂输出的 $n$ 个样本的过程。我们将对此类输出的信任形式化为对此类频率与预期概率之间的距离进行假设检验的一种形式。微积分的主要优点是使这种可信度概念变得可检查。我们提出了我们推理的术语的计算语义，然后提出了 TPTND 的语义，其中逻辑运算符以及信任运算符是通过引入和消除规则定义的。我们说明了结构和元理论属性，特别关注建立在术语演变和逻辑规则应用下可以保留可信性概念的能力。 设计一种类型自然演绎系统来验证概率计算过程的信任度 Fabio Aurelio D'Asaro,Francesco Genco,Giuseppe Primiero cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Ritesh Kumar,Siddharth Singh,Shyam Ratan,Mohit Raj,Sonal Sinha,Bornini Lahiri,Vivek Seshadri,Kalika Bali,Atul Kr. Ojha
title: Annotated Speech Corpus for Low Resource Indian Languages: Awadhi, Bhojpuri, Braj and Magahi
title_zh: 针对资源匮乏的印度语言的注释语音语料库：Awadhi、Bhojpuri、Braj 和 Magahi
comment: Speech for Social Good Workshop, 2022, Interspeech 2022
comments: Speech for Social Good Workshop, 2022, Interspeech 2022
abstract: In this paper we discuss an in-progress work on the development of a speech corpus for four low-resource Indo-Aryan languages -- Awadhi, Bhojpuri, Braj and Magahi using the field methods of linguistic data collection. The total size of the corpus currently stands at approximately 18 hours (approx. 4-5 hours each language) and it is transcribed and annotated with grammatical information such as part-of-speech tags, morphological features and Universal dependency relationships. We discuss our methodology for data collection in these languages, most of which was done in the middle of the COVID-19 pandemic, with one of the aims being to generate some additional income for low-income groups speaking these languages. In the paper, we also discuss the results of the baseline experiments for automatic speech recognition system in these languages.
summary: In this paper we discuss an in-progress work on the development of a speech corpus for four low-resource Indo-Aryan languages -- Awadhi, Bhojpuri, Braj and Magahi using the field methods of linguistic data collection. The total size of the corpus currently stands at approximately 18 hours (approx. 4-5 hours each language) and it is transcribed and annotated with grammatical information such as part-of-speech tags, morphological features and Universal dependency relationships. We discuss our methodology for data collection in these languages, most of which was done in the middle of the COVID-19 pandemic, with one of the aims being to generate some additional income for low-income groups speaking these languages. In the paper, we also discuss the results of the baseline experiments for automatic speech recognition system in these languages.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论了一项正在进行的工作，即使用语言数据收集的现场方​​法为四种资源匮乏的印度-雅利安语言（Awadhi、Bhojpuri、Braj 和 Magahi）开发语音语料库。目前语料库的总大小约为 18 小时（每种语言约 4-5 小时），并用词性标签、形态特征和通用依存关系等语法信息进行转录和注释。我们讨论了用这些语言收集数据的方法，其中大部分是在 COVID-19 大流行期间完成的，目的之一是为使用这些语言的低收入群体创造一些额外收入。在本文中，我们还讨论了这些语言的自动语音识别系统的基线实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了为四种低资源印地语系语言（Awadhi、Bhojpuri、Braj和Magahi）构建的带注释语音语料库的开发进展。
AI.motivation: 旨在为低资源语言建立语音语料库以支持自然语言处理研究，同时通过数据收集为低收入群体提供额外收入。
AI.method: 采用田野调查方法收集语音数据，进行转录并标注词性、形态特征和通用依存关系，疫情期间通过远程方式完成数据采集。
AI.result: 建成约18小时的语料库（每种语言4-5小时），完成基础语音识别实验，验证了语料库的可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该语料库为低资源语言的语音技术研究提供了基础，同时体现了学术研究与社会经济支持的结合价值。

title: SVBR-NET: A Non-Blind Spatially Varying Defocus Blur Removal Network
title_zh: SVBR-NET：非盲空间变化散焦模糊去除网络
abstract: Defocus blur is a physical consequence of the optical sensors used in most cameras. Although it can be used as a photographic style, it is commonly viewed as an image degradation modeled as the convolution of a sharp image with a spatially-varying blur kernel. Motivated by the advance of blur estimation methods in the past years, we propose a non-blind approach for image deblurring that can deal with spatially-varying kernels. We introduce two encoder-decoder sub-networks that are fed with the blurry image and the estimated blur map, respectively, and produce as output the deblurred (deconvolved) image. Each sub-network presents several skip connections that allow data propagation from layers spread apart, and also inter-subnetwork skip connections that ease the communication between the modules. The network is trained with synthetically blur kernels that are augmented to emulate blur maps produced by existing blur estimation methods, and our experimental results show that our method works well when combined with a variety of blur estimation methods.
summary: Defocus blur is a physical consequence of the optical sensors used in most cameras. Although it can be used as a photographic style, it is commonly viewed as an image degradation modeled as the convolution of a sharp image with a spatially-varying blur kernel. Motivated by the advance of blur estimation methods in the past years, we propose a non-blind approach for image deblurring that can deal with spatially-varying kernels. We introduce two encoder-decoder sub-networks that are fed with the blurry image and the estimated blur map, respectively, and produce as output the deblurred (deconvolved) image. Each sub-network presents several skip connections that allow data propagation from layers spread apart, and also inter-subnetwork skip connections that ease the communication between the modules. The network is trained with synthetically blur kernels that are augmented to emulate blur maps produced by existing blur estimation methods, and our experimental results show that our method works well when combined with a variety of blur estimation methods.
abstract_zh: 散焦模糊是大多数相机中使用的光学传感器的物理结果。尽管它可以用作一种摄影风格，但它通常被视为图像退化，建模为清晰图像与空间变化的模糊内核的卷积。受过去几年模糊估计方法进步的推动，我们提出了一种非盲图像去模糊方法，可以处理空间变化的内核。我们引入了两个编码器-解码器子网络，分别输入模糊图像和估计的模糊图，并生成去模糊（去卷积）图像作为输出。每个子网络提供多个跳跃连接，允许数据从分散的层传播，并且还提供子网间跳跃连接，以简化模块之间的通信。该网络使用综合模糊内核进行训练，这些内核经过增强以模拟现有模糊估计方法生成的模糊图，我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法与各种模糊估计方法相结合时效果良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SVBR-NET的非盲空间可变失焦模糊去除网络，通过两个编码-解码子网络结合模糊图与模糊图像实现去模糊。
AI.motivation: 失焦模糊是相机光学传感器的物理结果，虽可作为摄影风格但常被视为图像退化。现有方法难以有效处理空间可变模糊核，需提出更优解决方案。
AI.method: 设计两个编码-解码子网络，分别输入模糊图像和估计的模糊图，通过跨层跳接与子网络间连接增强信息传递，使用合成模糊核训练以模拟真实模糊图。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在结合多种模糊估计方法时表现良好，能有效去除空间可变失焦模糊。
AI.conclusion: SVBR-NET通过双子网络结构与跳接设计，在空间可变模糊去除任务中展现出有效性和通用性。

title: Learning neural state-space models: do we need a state estimator?
title_zh: 学习神经状态空间模型：我们需要状态估计器吗？
abstract: In recent years, several algorithms for system identification with neural state-space models have been introduced. Most of the proposed approaches are aimed at reducing the computational complexity of the learning problem, by splitting the optimization over short sub-sequences extracted from a longer training dataset. Different sequences are then processed simultaneously within a minibatch, taking advantage of modern parallel hardware for deep learning. An issue arising in these methods is the need to assign an initial state for each of the sub-sequences, which is required to run simulations and thus to evaluate the fitting loss. In this paper, we provide insights for calibration of neural state-space training algorithms based on extensive experimentation and analyses performed on two recognized system identification benchmarks. Particular focus is given to the choice and the role of the initial state estimation. We demonstrate that advanced initial state estimation techniques are really required to achieve high performance on certain classes of dynamical systems, while for asymptotically stable ones basic procedures such as zero or random initialization already yield competitive performance.
summary: In recent years, several algorithms for system identification with neural state-space models have been introduced. Most of the proposed approaches are aimed at reducing the computational complexity of the learning problem, by splitting the optimization over short sub-sequences extracted from a longer training dataset. Different sequences are then processed simultaneously within a minibatch, taking advantage of modern parallel hardware for deep learning. An issue arising in these methods is the need to assign an initial state for each of the sub-sequences, which is required to run simulations and thus to evaluate the fitting loss. In this paper, we provide insights for calibration of neural state-space training algorithms based on extensive experimentation and analyses performed on two recognized system identification benchmarks. Particular focus is given to the choice and the role of the initial state estimation. We demonstrate that advanced initial state estimation techniques are really required to achieve high performance on certain classes of dynamical systems, while for asymptotically stable ones basic procedures such as zero or random initialization already yield competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 近年来，已经引入了几种使用神经状态空间模型进行系统识别的算法。大多数提出的方法旨在通过将从较长训练数据集中提取的短子序列进行优化来降低学习问题的计算复杂性。然后，利用现代并行硬件进行深度学习，在小批量中同时处理不同的序列。这些方法中出现的一个问题是需要为每个子序列分配一个初始状态，这是运行模拟并评估拟合损失所必需的。在本文中，我们基于对两个公认的系统识别基准进行的广泛实验和分析，为神经状态空间训练算法的校准提供了见解。特别关注初始状态估计的选择和作用。我们证明，在某些类型的动力系统上实现高性能确实需要先进的初始状态估计技术，而对于渐近稳定的系统，诸如零或随机初始化之类的基本过程已经产生了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经状态空间模型训练中是否需要状态估计器，通过实验分析初始状态估计方法对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有神经状态空间模型训练方法需为子序列分配初始状态，但初始状态估计方法的选择对性能影响尚不明确，需系统评估不同场景下的需求。
AI.method: 在两个系统识别基准上进行大量实验，对比不同初始状态估计技术（如零初始化、随机初始化与高级估计方法）的性能差异。
AI.result: 对于某些动态系统，高级初始状态估计技术显著提升性能；而对于渐近稳定系统，简单初始化方法已具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 初始状态估计方法的选择应根据系统稳定性而定，不稳定系统需采用高级估计技术以保证训练效果。

search_text: Learning neural state-space models: do we need a state estimator? 学习神经状态空间模型：我们需要状态估计器吗？ In recent years, several algorithms for system identification with neural state-space models have been introduced. Most of the proposed approaches are aimed at reducing the computational complexity of the learning problem, by splitting the optimization over short sub-sequences extracted from a longer training dataset. Different sequences are then processed simultaneously within a minibatch, taking advantage of modern parallel hardware for deep learning. An issue arising in these methods is the need to assign an initial state for each of the sub-sequences, which is required to run simulations and thus to evaluate the fitting loss. In this paper, we provide insights for calibration of neural state-space training algorithms based on extensive experimentation and analyses performed on two recognized system identification benchmarks. Particular focus is given to the choice and the role of the initial state estimation. We demonstrate that advanced initial state estimation techniques are really required to achieve high performance on certain classes of dynamical systems, while for asymptotically stable ones basic procedures such as zero or random initialization already yield competitive performance. 近年来，已经引入了几种使用神经状态空间模型进行系统识别的算法。大多数提出的方法旨在通过将从较长训练数据集中提取的短子序列进行优化来降低学习问题的计算复杂性。然后，利用现代并行硬件进行深度学习，在小批量中同时处理不同的序列。这些方法中出现的一个问题是需要为每个子序列分配一个初始状态，这是运行模拟并评估拟合损失所必需的。在本文中，我们基于对两个公认的系统识别基准进行的广泛实验和分析，为神经状态空间训练算法的校准提供了见解。特别关注初始状态估计的选择和作用。我们证明，在某些类型的动力系统上实现高性能确实需要先进的初始状态估计技术，而对于渐近稳定的系统，诸如零或随机初始化之类的基本过程已经产生了有竞争力的性能。 本文研究神经状态空间模型训练中是否需要状态估计器，通过实验分析初始状态估计方法对模型性能的影响。 Marco Forgione,Manas Mejari,Dario Piga cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Hua-Bao Ling,Bowen Zhu,Dong Huang,Ding-Hua Chen,Chang-Dong Wang,Jian-Huang Lai
title: Vision Transformer for Contrastive Clustering
title_zh: 用于对比聚类的 Vision Transformer
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) has shown its advantages over the convolutional neural network (CNN) with its ability to capture global long-range dependencies for visual representation learning. Besides ViT, contrastive learning is another popular research topic recently. While previous contrastive learning works are mostly based on CNNs, some recent studies have attempted to combine ViT and contrastive learning for enhanced self-supervised learning. Despite the considerable progress, these combinations of ViT and contrastive learning mostly focus on the instance-level contrastiveness, which often overlook the global contrastiveness and also lack the ability to directly learn the clustering result (e.g., for images). In view of this, this paper presents a novel deep clustering approach termed Vision Transformer for Contrastive Clustering (VTCC), which for the first time, to our knowledge, unifies the Transformer and the contrastive learning for the image clustering task. Specifically, with two random augmentations performed on each image, we utilize a ViT encoder with two weight-sharing views as the backbone. To remedy the potential instability of the ViT, we incorporate a convolutional stem to split each augmented sample into a sequence of patches, which uses multiple stacked small convolutions instead of a big convolution in the patch projection layer. By learning the feature representations for the sequences of patches via the backbone, an instance projector and a cluster projector are further utilized to perform the instance-level contrastive learning and the global clustering structure learning, respectively. Experiments on eight image datasets demonstrate the stability (during the training-from-scratch) and the superiority (in clustering performance) of our VTCC approach over the state-of-the-art.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) has shown its advantages over the convolutional neural network (CNN) with its ability to capture global long-range dependencies for visual representation learning. Besides ViT, contrastive learning is another popular research topic recently. While previous contrastive learning works are mostly based on CNNs, some recent studies have attempted to combine ViT and contrastive learning for enhanced self-supervised learning. Despite the considerable progress, these combinations of ViT and contrastive learning mostly focus on the instance-level contrastiveness, which often overlook the global contrastiveness and also lack the ability to directly learn the clustering result (e.g., for images). In view of this, this paper presents a novel deep clustering approach termed Vision Transformer for Contrastive Clustering (VTCC), which for the first time, to our knowledge, unifies the Transformer and the contrastive learning for the image clustering task. Specifically, with two random augmentations performed on each image, we utilize a ViT encoder with two weight-sharing views as the backbone. To remedy the potential instability of the ViT, we incorporate a convolutional stem to split each augmented sample into a sequence of patches, which uses multiple stacked small convolutions instead of a big convolution in the patch projection layer. By learning the feature representations for the sequences of patches via the backbone, an instance projector and a cluster projector are further utilized to perform the instance-level contrastive learning and the global clustering structure learning, respectively. Experiments on eight image datasets demonstrate the stability (during the training-from-scratch) and the superiority (in clustering performance) of our VTCC approach over the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 已经显示出相对于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的优势，它能够捕获视觉表示学习的全局远程依赖关系。除了ViT之外，对比学习是最近另一个热门的研究课题。虽然之前的对比学习工作大多基于 CNN，但最近的一些研究尝试将 ViT 和对比学习结合起来以增强自监督学习。尽管取得了相当大的进步，但这些 ViT 和对比学习的组合主要关注实例级对比，往往忽视全局对比，也缺乏直接学习聚类结果（例如，对于图像）的能力。鉴于此，本文提出了一种新颖的深度聚类方法，称为视觉变换器对比聚类（VTCC），据我们所知，该方法首次将变换器和图像聚类任务的对比学习结合起来。具体来说，通过对每个图像执行两次随机增强，我们利用具有两个权重共享视图的 ViT 编码器作为主干。为了弥补 ViT 潜在的不稳定性，我们结合了一个卷积干将每个增强样本分割成一系列补丁，它在补丁投影层中使用多个堆叠的小卷积而不是大卷积。通过经由主干学习补丁序列的特征表示，进一步利用实例投影仪和集群投影仪分别执行实例级对比学习和全局聚类结构学习。对八个图像数据集的实验证明了我们的 VTCC 方法相对于最先进的方法的稳定性（在从头开始训练期间）和优越性（在聚类性能方面）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉Transformer（ViT）与对比学习的图像聚类方法VTCC，以提升聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT与对比学习结合的方法主要关注实例级对比，忽视全局对比性和直接聚类能力，导致聚类效果受限。
AI.method: 采用双视图共享权重的ViT编码器，结合卷积茎分割图像块，并通过实例投影器和聚类投影器分别实现实例级对比学习与全局聚类结构学习。
AI.result: 在八个图像数据集上验证了VTCC在训练稳定性与聚类性能上的优越性，优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: VTCC首次将Transformer与对比学习统一于图像聚类任务，通过全局对比与结构学习显著提升了聚类效果。

title: Video Activity Localisation with Uncertainties in Temporal Boundary
title_zh: 时间边界不确定性的视频活动定位
abstract: Current methods for video activity localisation over time assume implicitly that activity temporal boundaries labelled for model training are determined and precise. However, in unscripted natural videos, different activities mostly transit smoothly, so that it is intrinsically ambiguous to determine in labelling precisely when an activity starts and ends over time. Such uncertainties in temporal labelling are currently ignored in model training, resulting in learning mis-matched video-text correlation with poor generalisation in test. In this work, we solve this problem by introducing Elastic Moment Bounding (EMB) to accommodate flexible and adaptive activity temporal boundaries towards modelling universally interpretable video-text correlation with tolerance to underlying temporal uncertainties in pre-fixed annotations. Specifically, we construct elastic boundaries adaptively by mining and discovering frame-wise temporal endpoints that can maximise the alignment between video segments and query sentences. To enable both more accurate matching (segment content attention) and more robust localisation (segment elastic boundaries), we optimise the selection of frame-wise endpoints subject to segment-wise contents by a novel Guided Attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on three video activity localisation benchmarks demonstrate compellingly the EMB's advantages over existing methods without modelling uncertainty.
summary: Current methods for video activity localisation over time assume implicitly that activity temporal boundaries labelled for model training are determined and precise. However, in unscripted natural videos, different activities mostly transit smoothly, so that it is intrinsically ambiguous to determine in labelling precisely when an activity starts and ends over time. Such uncertainties in temporal labelling are currently ignored in model training, resulting in learning mis-matched video-text correlation with poor generalisation in test. In this work, we solve this problem by introducing Elastic Moment Bounding (EMB) to accommodate flexible and adaptive activity temporal boundaries towards modelling universally interpretable video-text correlation with tolerance to underlying temporal uncertainties in pre-fixed annotations. Specifically, we construct elastic boundaries adaptively by mining and discovering frame-wise temporal endpoints that can maximise the alignment between video segments and query sentences. To enable both more accurate matching (segment content attention) and more robust localisation (segment elastic boundaries), we optimise the selection of frame-wise endpoints subject to segment-wise contents by a novel Guided Attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on three video activity localisation benchmarks demonstrate compellingly the EMB's advantages over existing methods without modelling uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 当前随着时间的推移视频活动定位的方法隐含地假设为模型训练标记的活动时间边界是确定的并且是精确的。然而，在无脚本的自然视频中，不同的活动大多是平滑过渡的，因此在标记中准确确定活动随时间的开始和结束时间本质上是不明确的。目前在模型训练中忽略了时间标记的这种不确定性，导致学习不匹配的视频文本相关性，并且在测试中泛化性较差。在这项工作中，我们通过引入弹性矩边界（EMB）来解决这个问题，以适应灵活和自适应的活动时间边界，以建模普遍可解释的视频文本相关性，并容忍预先固定注释中的潜在时间不确定性。具体来说，我们通过挖掘和发现可以最大化视频片段和查询句子之间对齐的逐帧时间端点来自适应地构建弹性边界。为了实现更准确的匹配（分段内容注意力）和更鲁棒的定位（分段弹性边界），我们通过新颖的引导注意力机制优化了受分段内容影响的逐帧端点的选择。对三个视频活动本地化基准进行的大量实验令人信服地证明了 EMB 相对于现有方法的优势，且无需建模不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种处理视频活动定位中时间边界不确定性的方法，通过弹性边界建模提升视频与文本的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频活动定位方法假设时间边界标注精确，但实际自然视频中活动转换平滑导致标注模糊，忽略此问题会使模型泛化能力下降。
AI.method: 引入弹性时刻边界（EMB）框架，通过挖掘帧级时间端点最大化视频片段与查询句的对齐，并设计引导注意力机制优化端点选择。
AI.result: 在三个视频活动定位基准测试中，EMB方法在未建模不确定性的情况下显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 弹性边界建模有效缓解了时间标注不确定性问题，提升了视频-文本关联的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

motivation: 现有视频活动定位方法假设时间边界标注精确，但实际自然视频中活动转换平滑导致标注模糊，忽略此问题会使模型泛化能力下降。
method: 引入弹性时刻边界（EMB）框架，通过挖掘帧级时间端点最大化视频片段与查询句的对齐，并设计引导注意力机制优化端点选择。
result: 在三个视频活动定位基准测试中，EMB方法在未建模不确定性的情况下显著优于现有方法。
conclusion: 弹性边界建模有效缓解了时间标注不确定性问题，提升了视频-文本关联的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
search_text: Video Activity Localisation with Uncertainties in Temporal Boundary 时间边界不确定性的视频活动定位 Current methods for video activity localisation over time assume implicitly that activity temporal boundaries labelled for model training are determined and precise. However, in unscripted natural videos, different activities mostly transit smoothly, so that it is intrinsically ambiguous to determine in labelling precisely when an activity starts and ends over time. Such uncertainties in temporal labelling are currently ignored in model training, resulting in learning mis-matched video-text correlation with poor generalisation in test. In this work, we solve this problem by introducing Elastic Moment Bounding (EMB) to accommodate flexible and adaptive activity temporal boundaries towards modelling universally interpretable video-text correlation with tolerance to underlying temporal uncertainties in pre-fixed annotations. Specifically, we construct elastic boundaries adaptively by mining and discovering frame-wise temporal endpoints that can maximise the alignment between video segments and query sentences. To enable both more accurate matching (segment content attention) and more robust localisation (segment elastic boundaries), we optimise the selection of frame-wise endpoints subject to segment-wise contents by a novel Guided Attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on three video activity localisation benchmarks demonstrate compellingly the EMB's advantages over existing methods without modelling uncertainty. 当前随着时间的推移视频活动定位的方法隐含地假设为模型训练标记的活动时间边界是确定的并且是精确的。然而，在无脚本的自然视频中，不同的活动大多是平滑过渡的，因此在标记中准确确定活动随时间的开始和结束时间本质上是不明确的。目前在模型训练中忽略了时间标记的这种不确定性，导致学习不匹配的视频文本相关性，并且在测试中泛化性较差。在这项工作中，我们通过引入弹性矩边界（EMB）来解决这个问题，以适应灵活和自适应的活动时间边界，以建模普遍可解释的视频文本相关性，并容忍预先固定注释中的潜在时间不确定性。具体来说，我们通过挖掘和发现可以最大化视频片段和查询句子之间对齐的逐帧时间端点来自适应地构建弹性边界。为了实现更准确的匹配（分段内容注意力）和更鲁棒的定位（分段弹性边界），我们通过新颖的引导注意力机制优化了受分段内容影响的逐帧端点的选择。对三个视频活动本地化基准进行的大量实验令人信服地证明了 EMB 相对于现有方法的优势，且无需建模不确定性。 本文提出了一种处理视频活动定位中时间边界不确定性的方法，通过弹性边界建模提升视频与文本的对齐效果。 Jiabo Huang,Hailin Jin,Shaogang Gong,Yang Liu cs.CV

title: Visualizing Non-Fungible Token Ethics: A Case Study On CryptoPunks
title_zh: 可视化不可替代代币道德：加密朋克案例研究
abstract: As a blockchain-based application, Non-Fungible Token (NFT) has received worldwide attention over the past few years. Digital artwork is the main form of NFT that can be stored on different blockchains. Although the NFT market is rapidly developing, we observed potential ethical and racial fairness issues in the design of NFT artworks due to a lack of ethical guidelines or censorship. Therefore, we investigated CryptoPunks, the most famous collection in the NFT market, to explore and visualize its potential ethical issues. We explored the ethical issues from three aspects: design, trading transactions, and related topics on Twitter. We scraped data from Twitter and Dune Analytics using python libraries, Twitter crawler, and sentiment analysis tools. Our five visualizations implied that 1.6 times more male punks were created in the initial design process than the female ones. And the male ones have a higher average selling price than females; lighter-skinned punks tend to sell for higher prices. The results of our study and visualizations provide a preliminary exploration of CryptoPunks and further inspire future ethical-related investigation and research in the NFT domain.
summary: As a blockchain-based application, Non-Fungible Token (NFT) has received worldwide attention over the past few years. Digital artwork is the main form of NFT that can be stored on different blockchains. Although the NFT market is rapidly developing, we observed potential ethical and racial fairness issues in the design of NFT artworks due to a lack of ethical guidelines or censorship. Therefore, we investigated CryptoPunks, the most famous collection in the NFT market, to explore and visualize its potential ethical issues. We explored the ethical issues from three aspects: design, trading transactions, and related topics on Twitter. We scraped data from Twitter and Dune Analytics using python libraries, Twitter crawler, and sentiment analysis tools. Our five visualizations implied that 1.6 times more male punks were created in the initial design process than the female ones. And the male ones have a higher average selling price than females; lighter-skinned punks tend to sell for higher prices. The results of our study and visualizations provide a preliminary exploration of CryptoPunks and further inspire future ethical-related investigation and research in the NFT domain.
abstract_zh: 作为一种基于区块链的应用，非同质代币（NFT）在过去几年受到了全世界的关注。数字艺术品是NFT的主要形式，可以存储在不同的区块链上。尽管 NFT 市场正在快速发展，但由于缺乏道德准则或审查制度，我们在 NFT 艺术品的设计中观察到潜在的道德和种族公平问题。因此，我们调查了 NFT 市场上最著名的集合 CryptoPunks，以探索和可视化其潜在的道德问题。我们从设计、交易交易以及 Twitter 上的相关话题三个方面探讨了道德问题。我们使用 python 库、Twitter 爬虫和情绪分析工具从 Twitter 和 Dune Analytics 中抓取数据。我们的五次可视化表明，在最初的设计过程中创建的男性朋克是女性朋克的 1.6 倍。并且男性的平均售价高于女性；肤色较浅的朋克往往能以更高的价格出售。我们的研究和可视化结果提供了对 CryptoPunks 的初步探索，并进一步启发未来 NFT 领域与伦理相关的调查和研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过可视化分析CryptoPunks NFT作品的伦理问题，探讨其设计、交易及社交媒体讨论中的潜在偏见。
AI.motivation: NFT市场快速发展但缺乏伦理规范，可能导致种族与性别不公平问题，需通过案例研究揭示潜在伦理风险。
AI.method: 利用Python爬虫抓取Twitter和Dune Analytics数据，结合情感分析工具生成五组可视化图表进行分析。
AI.result: 初始设计中男性角色数量是女性的1.6倍，男性NFT平均售价高于女性；肤色较浅的角色交易价格更高。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了CryptoPunks在设计与交易中的伦理问题，为NFT领域后续伦理研究提供初步参考。

title: Non-Parametric Style Transfer
title_zh: 非参数风格迁移
abstract: Recent feed-forward neural methods of arbitrary image style transfer mainly utilized encoded feature map upto its second-order statistics, i.e., linearly transformed the encoded feature map of a content image to have the same mean and variance (or covariance) of a target style feature map. In this work, we extend the second-order statistical feature matching into a general distribution matching based on the understanding that style of an image is represented by the distribution of responses from receptive fields. For this generalization, first, we propose a new feature transform layer that exactly matches the feature map distribution of content image into that of target style image. Second, we analyze the recent style losses consistent with our new feature transform layer to train a decoder network which generates a style transferred image from the transformed feature map. Based on our experimental results, it is proven that the stylized images obtained with our method are more similar with the target style images in all existing style measures without losing content clearness.
summary: Recent feed-forward neural methods of arbitrary image style transfer mainly utilized encoded feature map upto its second-order statistics, i.e., linearly transformed the encoded feature map of a content image to have the same mean and variance (or covariance) of a target style feature map. In this work, we extend the second-order statistical feature matching into a general distribution matching based on the understanding that style of an image is represented by the distribution of responses from receptive fields. For this generalization, first, we propose a new feature transform layer that exactly matches the feature map distribution of content image into that of target style image. Second, we analyze the recent style losses consistent with our new feature transform layer to train a decoder network which generates a style transferred image from the transformed feature map. Based on our experimental results, it is proven that the stylized images obtained with our method are more similar with the target style images in all existing style measures without losing content clearness.
abstract_zh: 最近的任意图像风格转移的前馈神经方法主要利用编码特征图直至其二阶统计量，即对内容图像的编码特征图进行线性变换以具有与目标风格特征图相同的均值和方差（或协方差）。在这项工作中，我们基于图像风格由感受野响应分布表示的理解，将二阶统计特征匹配扩展到一般分布匹配。对于这种概括，首先，我们提出了一个新的特征转换层，该层将内容图像的特征图分布与目标风格图像的特征图分布完全匹配。其次，我们分析与新特征转换层一致的最近风格损失，以训练解码器网络，该解码器网络从转换后的特征图生成风格转移图像。根据我们的实验结果，证明用我们的方法获得的风格化图像与所有现有风格测量中的目标风格图像更相似，而不会损失内容清晰度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布匹配的非参数图像风格迁移方法，通过精确匹配内容图像与目标风格图像的特征图分布来实现更高质量的风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用特征图的二阶统计量（均值和方差）进行风格迁移，无法全面捕捉图像风格的分布特性，导致风格相似度不足或内容清晰度下降。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型特征变换层，直接匹配内容图像与目标风格图像的特征图分布；结合兼容的风格损失函数训练解码器网络，生成最终的风格迁移图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在所有现有风格评估指标上均优于现有方法，生成的图像在保持内容清晰度的同时与目标风格图像更加相似。
AI.conclusion: 通过将风格表示从二阶统计量扩展到完整分布匹配，本文方法实现了更精准的非参数风格迁移，有效提升了风格迁移的质量与一致性。

title: TAM: Topology-Aware Margin Loss for Class-Imbalanced Node Classification
title_zh: TAM：类不平衡节点分类的拓扑感知裕度损失
comment: Accepted to ICML 2022; First two authors equally contributed
comments: Accepted to ICML 2022; First two authors equally contributed
abstract: Learning unbiased node representations under class-imbalanced graph data is challenging due to interactions between adjacent nodes. Existing studies have in common that they compensate the minor class nodes `as a group' according to their overall quantity (ignoring node connections in graph), which inevitably increase the false positive cases for major nodes. We hypothesize that the increase in these false positive cases is highly affected by the label distribution around each node and confirm it experimentally. In addition, in order to handle this issue, we propose Topology-Aware Margin (TAM) to reflect local topology on the learning objective. Our method compares the connectivity pattern of each node with the class-averaged counter-part and adaptively adjusts the margin accordingly based on that. Our method consistently exhibits superiority over the baselines on various node classification benchmark datasets with representative GNN architectures.
summary: Learning unbiased node representations under class-imbalanced graph data is challenging due to interactions between adjacent nodes. Existing studies have in common that they compensate the minor class nodes `as a group' according to their overall quantity (ignoring node connections in graph), which inevitably increase the false positive cases for major nodes. We hypothesize that the increase in these false positive cases is highly affected by the label distribution around each node and confirm it experimentally. In addition, in order to handle this issue, we propose Topology-Aware Margin (TAM) to reflect local topology on the learning objective. Our method compares the connectivity pattern of each node with the class-averaged counter-part and adaptively adjusts the margin accordingly based on that. Our method consistently exhibits superiority over the baselines on various node classification benchmark datasets with representative GNN architectures.
abstract_zh: 由于相邻节点之间的相互作用，在类不平衡图数据下学习无偏节点表示具有挑战性。现有研究的共同点是，它们根据总体数量（忽略图中的节点连接）将次要类节点“作为一个组”进行补偿，这不可避免地增加了主要节点的误报情况。我们假设这些误报案例的增加很大程度上受到每个节点周围标签分布的影响，并通过实验证实了这一点。此外，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了拓扑感知裕度（TAM）来反映学习目标的局部拓扑。我们的方法将每个节点的连接模式与类平均对应节点进行比较，并据此相应地自适应调整裕度。我们的方法在具有代表性的 GNN 架构的各种节点分类基准数据集上始终表现出优于基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种拓扑感知边距损失（TAM），用于解决类别不平衡图数据中节点分类时的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过整体数量补偿少数类节点时忽略图结构，导致主要类节点假阳性增加，而局部拓扑分布对假阳性有显著影响。
AI.method: 设计拓扑感知边距损失函数，通过比较节点连接模式与类别平均模式，自适应调整分类边距以反映局部图结构特征。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，TAM方法在不同GNN架构下均优于现有基线方法，有效缓解了类别不平衡带来的分类偏差。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入拓扑感知机制，TAM方法能够更精确地处理图数据中的类别不平衡问题，提升节点分类性能。

title: Video Anomaly Detection via Prediction Network with Enhanced Spatio-Temporal Memory Exchange
title_zh: 通过具有增强型时空内存交换的预测网络进行视频异常检测
abstract: Video anomaly detection is a challenging task because most anomalies are scarce and non-deterministic. Many approaches investigate the reconstruction difference between normal and abnormal patterns, but neglect that anomalies do not necessarily correspond to large reconstruction errors. To address this issue, we design a Convolutional LSTM Auto-Encoder prediction framework with enhanced spatio-temporal memory exchange using bi-directionalilty and a higher-order mechanism. The bi-directional structure promotes learning the temporal regularity through forward and backward predictions. The unique higher-order mechanism further strengthens spatial information interaction between the encoder and the decoder. Considering the limited receptive fields in Convolutional LSTMs, we also introduce an attention module to highlight informative features for prediction. Anomalies are eventually identified by comparing the frames with their corresponding predictions. Evaluations on three popular benchmarks show that our framework outperforms most existing prediction-based anomaly detection methods.
summary: Video anomaly detection is a challenging task because most anomalies are scarce and non-deterministic. Many approaches investigate the reconstruction difference between normal and abnormal patterns, but neglect that anomalies do not necessarily correspond to large reconstruction errors. To address this issue, we design a Convolutional LSTM Auto-Encoder prediction framework with enhanced spatio-temporal memory exchange using bi-directionalilty and a higher-order mechanism. The bi-directional structure promotes learning the temporal regularity through forward and backward predictions. The unique higher-order mechanism further strengthens spatial information interaction between the encoder and the decoder. Considering the limited receptive fields in Convolutional LSTMs, we also introduce an attention module to highlight informative features for prediction. Anomalies are eventually identified by comparing the frames with their corresponding predictions. Evaluations on three popular benchmarks show that our framework outperforms most existing prediction-based anomaly detection methods.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为大多数异常都是稀缺且不确定的。许多方法研究正常模式和异常模式之间的重建差异，但忽略了异常并不一定对应于大的重建误差。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个卷积 LSTM 自动编码器预测框架，该框架使用双向性和高阶机制增强了时空内存交换。双向结构促进通过前向和后向预测学习时间规律性。独特的高阶机制进一步加强了编码器和解码器之间的空间信息交互。考虑到卷积 LSTM 中有限的感受野，我们还引入了一个注意力模块来突出显示信息特征以进行预测。通过将帧与其相应的预测进行比较，最终可以识别异常情况。对三个流行基准的评估表明，我们的框架优于大多数现有的基于预测的异常检测方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积LSTM自编码器的视频异常检测框架，通过增强时空记忆交换机制提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖重建误差检测异常，但异常未必导致显著误差，需改进时空特征学习与交互机制。
AI.method: 设计双向预测结构增强时序规律学习，引入高阶机制强化编码器-解码器空间交互，并采用注意力模块突出关键特征。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于大多数基于预测的异常检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过优化时空记忆交换有效提升视频异常检测性能。

authors_text: Saravanabalagi Ramachandran,Ganesh Sistu,Varun Ravi Kumar,John McDonald,Senthil Yogamani
title: Woodscape Fisheye Object Detection for Autonomous Driving -- CVPR 2022 OmniCV Workshop Challenge
title_zh: 自动驾驶的 Woodscape 鱼眼目标检测 -- CVPR 2022 OmniCV 研讨会挑战
comment: Workshop on Omnidirectional Computer Vision (OmniCV) at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2021
comments: Workshop on Omnidirectional Computer Vision (OmniCV) at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2021
abstract: Object detection is a comprehensively studied problem in autonomous driving. However, it has been relatively less explored in the case of fisheye cameras. The strong radial distortion breaks the translation invariance inductive bias of Convolutional Neural Networks. Thus, we present the WoodScape fisheye object detection challenge for autonomous driving which was held as part of the CVPR 2022 Workshop on Omnidirectional Computer Vision (OmniCV). This is one of the first competitions focused on fisheye camera object detection. We encouraged the participants to design models which work natively on fisheye images without rectification. We used CodaLab to host the competition based on the publicly available WoodScape fisheye dataset. In this paper, we provide a detailed analysis on the competition which attracted the participation of 120 global teams and a total of 1492 submissions. We briefly discuss the details of the winning methods and analyze their qualitative and quantitative results.
summary: Object detection is a comprehensively studied problem in autonomous driving. However, it has been relatively less explored in the case of fisheye cameras. The strong radial distortion breaks the translation invariance inductive bias of Convolutional Neural Networks. Thus, we present the WoodScape fisheye object detection challenge for autonomous driving which was held as part of the CVPR 2022 Workshop on Omnidirectional Computer Vision (OmniCV). This is one of the first competitions focused on fisheye camera object detection. We encouraged the participants to design models which work natively on fisheye images without rectification. We used CodaLab to host the competition based on the publicly available WoodScape fisheye dataset. In this paper, we provide a detailed analysis on the competition which attracted the participation of 120 global teams and a total of 1492 submissions. We briefly discuss the details of the winning methods and analyze their qualitative and quantitative results.
abstract_zh: 物体检测是自动驾驶中一个综合研究的问题。然而，对于鱼眼相机的研究相对较少。强烈的径向畸变打破了卷积神经网络的平移不变性归纳偏差。因此，我们提出了自动驾驶的 WoodScape 鱼眼目标检测挑战赛，该挑战赛是 CVPR 2022 全向计算机视觉 (OmniCV) 研讨会的一部分。这是首批专注于鱼眼相机目标检测的竞赛之一。我们鼓励参与者设计原生适用于鱼眼图像而无需校正的模型。我们使用 CodaLab 举办基于公开可用的 WoodScape 鱼眼数据集的竞赛。在本文中，我们对吸引了全球 120 个团队参与、总共 1492 份参赛作品的比赛进行了详细分析。我们简要讨论获胜方法的细节并分析其定性和定量结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在CVPR 2022 OmniCV工作坊中举办的WoodScape鱼眼相机目标检测挑战赛，旨在推动自动驾驶领域鱼眼图像目标检测的研究。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼相机的强径向畸变破坏了卷积神经网络的平移不变性归纳偏置，而现有研究对此关注不足，需探索无需图像校正的原生检测方法。
AI.method: 基于公开的WoodScape鱼眼数据集，通过CodaLab平台举办竞赛，鼓励参赛者设计直接处理鱼眼图像的检测模型，并分析120支队伍的1492次提交结果。
AI.result: 竞赛吸引了全球团队参与，分析了优胜方法的定性和定量结果，验证了针对鱼眼畸变的模型设计有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该挑战赛为鱼眼目标检测提供了基准，推动了自动驾驶中复杂视角下目标检测技术的发展。

search_text: Woodscape Fisheye Object Detection for Autonomous Driving -- CVPR 2022 OmniCV Workshop Challenge 自动驾驶的 Woodscape 鱼眼目标检测 -- CVPR 2022 OmniCV 研讨会挑战 Object detection is a comprehensively studied problem in autonomous driving. However, it has been relatively less explored in the case of fisheye cameras. The strong radial distortion breaks the translation invariance inductive bias of Convolutional Neural Networks. Thus, we present the WoodScape fisheye object detection challenge for autonomous driving which was held as part of the CVPR 2022 Workshop on Omnidirectional Computer Vision (OmniCV). This is one of the first competitions focused on fisheye camera object detection. We encouraged the participants to design models which work natively on fisheye images without rectification. We used CodaLab to host the competition based on the publicly available WoodScape fisheye dataset. In this paper, we provide a detailed analysis on the competition which attracted the participation of 120 global teams and a total of 1492 submissions. We briefly discuss the details of the winning methods and analyze their qualitative and quantitative results. 物体检测是自动驾驶中一个综合研究的问题。然而，对于鱼眼相机的研究相对较少。强烈的径向畸变打破了卷积神经网络的平移不变性归纳偏差。因此，我们提出了自动驾驶的 WoodScape 鱼眼目标检测挑战赛，该挑战赛是 CVPR 2022 全向计算机视觉 (OmniCV) 研讨会的一部分。这是首批专注于鱼眼相机目标检测的竞赛之一。我们鼓励参与者设计原生适用于鱼眼图像而无需校正的模型。我们使用 CodaLab 举办基于公开可用的 WoodScape 鱼眼数据集的竞赛。在本文中，我们对吸引了全球 120 个团队参与、总共 1492 份参赛作品的比赛进行了详细分析。我们简要讨论获胜方法的细节并分析其定性和定量结果。 本文介绍了在CVPR 2022 OmniCV工作坊中举办的WoodScape鱼眼相机目标检测挑战赛，旨在推动自动驾驶领域鱼眼图像目标检测的研究。 Saravanabalagi Ramachandran,Ganesh Sistu,Varun Ravi Kumar,John McDonald,Senthil Yogamani cs.CV

title: Batch-Ensemble Stochastic Neural Networks for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于分布外检测的批量集成随机神经网络
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2022 workshop on distribution-free uncertainty quantification (DFUQ), 11 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted to the ICML 2022 workshop on distribution-free uncertainty quantification (DFUQ), 11 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has recently received much attention from the machine learning community due to its importance in deploying machine learning models in real-world applications. In this paper we propose an uncertainty quantification approach by modelling the distribution of features. We further incorporate an efficient ensemble mechanism, namely batch-ensemble, to construct the batch-ensemble stochastic neural networks (BE-SNNs) and overcome the feature collapse problem. We compare the performance of the proposed BE-SNNs with the other state-of-the-art approaches and show that BE-SNNs yield superior performance on several OOD benchmarks, such as the Two-Moons dataset, the FashionMNIST vs MNIST dataset, FashionMNIST vs NotMNIST dataset, and the CIFAR10 vs SVHN dataset.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection has recently received much attention from the machine learning community due to its importance in deploying machine learning models in real-world applications. In this paper we propose an uncertainty quantification approach by modelling the distribution of features. We further incorporate an efficient ensemble mechanism, namely batch-ensemble, to construct the batch-ensemble stochastic neural networks (BE-SNNs) and overcome the feature collapse problem. We compare the performance of the proposed BE-SNNs with the other state-of-the-art approaches and show that BE-SNNs yield superior performance on several OOD benchmarks, such as the Two-Moons dataset, the FashionMNIST vs MNIST dataset, FashionMNIST vs NotMNIST dataset, and the CIFAR10 vs SVHN dataset.
abstract_zh: 由于分布外（OOD）检测在实际应用中部署机器学习模型的重要性，它最近受到了机器学习社区的广泛关注。在本文中，我们通过对特征分布进行建模，提出了一种不确定性量化方法。我们进一步结合了一种高效的集成机制，即批量集成，来构建批量集成随机神经网络（BE-SNN）并克服特征崩溃问题。我们将所提出的 BE-SNN 的性能与其他最先进的方法进行了比较，并表明 BE-SNN 在多个 OOD 基准上产生了卓越的性能，例如 Two-Moons 数据集、FashionMNIST 与 MNIST 数据集、FashionMNIST 与 NotMNIST 数据集以及 CIFAR10 与 SVHN 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合特征分布建模与批处理集成机制的随机神经网络（BE-SNNs），用于改进分布外检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 分布外检测在现实应用中至关重要，但现有方法常面临特征崩溃问题，需更高效的不确定性量化方案。
AI.method: 通过建模特征分布实现不确定性量化，并引入批处理集成机制构建BE-SNNs以解决特征崩溃问题。
AI.result: 在Two-Moons、FashionMNIST vs MNIST等多个基准数据集上，BE-SNNs性能优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: BE-SNNs通过有效结合不确定性量化与批处理集成，在分布外检测任务中展现出优越性。

authors_text: Tangui Le Gléau,Xavier Marjou,Tayeb Lemlouma,Benoit Radier
title: Tackling Asymmetric and Circular Sequential Social Dilemmas with Reinforcement Learning and Graph-based Tit-for-Tat
title_zh: 通过强化学习和基于图的针锋相对解决不对称和循环序列社会困境
abstract: In many societal and industrial interactions, participants generally prefer their pure self-interest at the expense of the global welfare. Known as social dilemmas, this category of non-cooperative games offers situations where multiple actors should all cooperate to achieve the best outcome but greed and fear lead to a worst self-interested issue. Recently, the emergence of Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has generated revived interest in social dilemmas with the introduction of Sequential Social Dilemma (SSD). Cooperative agents mixing RL policies and Tit-for-tat (TFT) strategies have successfully addressed some non-optimal Nash equilibrium issues. However, this kind of paradigm requires symmetrical and direct cooperation between actors, conditions that are not met when mutual cooperation become asymmetric and is possible only with at least a third actor in a circular way. To tackle this issue, this paper extends SSD with Circular Sequential Social Dilemma (CSSD), a new kind of Markov games that better generalizes the diversity of cooperation between agents. Secondly, to address such circular and asymmetric cooperation, we propose a candidate solution based on RL policies and a graph-based TFT. We conducted some experiments on a simple multi-player grid world which offers adaptable cooperation structures. Our work confirmed that our graph-based approach is beneficial to address circular situations by encouraging self-interested agents to reach mutual cooperation.
summary: In many societal and industrial interactions, participants generally prefer their pure self-interest at the expense of the global welfare. Known as social dilemmas, this category of non-cooperative games offers situations where multiple actors should all cooperate to achieve the best outcome but greed and fear lead to a worst self-interested issue. Recently, the emergence of Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has generated revived interest in social dilemmas with the introduction of Sequential Social Dilemma (SSD). Cooperative agents mixing RL policies and Tit-for-tat (TFT) strategies have successfully addressed some non-optimal Nash equilibrium issues. However, this kind of paradigm requires symmetrical and direct cooperation between actors, conditions that are not met when mutual cooperation become asymmetric and is possible only with at least a third actor in a circular way. To tackle this issue, this paper extends SSD with Circular Sequential Social Dilemma (CSSD), a new kind of Markov games that better generalizes the diversity of cooperation between agents. Secondly, to address such circular and asymmetric cooperation, we propose a candidate solution based on RL policies and a graph-based TFT. We conducted some experiments on a simple multi-player grid world which offers adaptable cooperation structures. Our work confirmed that our graph-based approach is beneficial to address circular situations by encouraging self-interested agents to reach mutual cooperation.
abstract_zh: 在许多社会和行业互动中，参与者通常更愿意牺牲全球福利来追求纯粹的自身利益。这类非合作博弈被称为社会困境，它提供了多个参与者都应该合作以实现最佳结果的情况，但贪婪和恐惧会导致最糟糕的自利问题。最近，深度强化学习（RL）的出现，随着顺序社会困境（SSD）的引入，重新引起了人们对社会困境的兴趣。混合强化学习策略和针锋相对 (TFT) 策略的合作代理已经成功解决了一些非最优纳什均衡问题。然而，这种范式需要参与者之间的对称和直接合作，当相互合作变得不对称时，这些条件就无法满足，并且只有至少有第三个参与者以循环方式才有可能实现。为了解决这个问题，本文用循环顺序社会困境（CSSD）扩展了SSD，这是一种新型的马尔可夫博弈，可以更好地概括智能体之间合作的多样性。其次，为了解决这种循环和不对称的合作，我们提出了一种基于强化学习策略和基于图的 TFT 的候选解决方案。我们在一个简单的多人网格世界上进行了一些实验，该世界提供了适应性强的合作结构。我们的工作证实，我们基于图的方法有利于通过鼓励自利主体达成相互合作来解决循环情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度强化学习（RL）和基于图的以牙还牙（TFT）策略的方法，用于解决非对称和循环顺序社会困境（CSSD）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有社会困境解决方案在处理非对称合作和多参与者循环依赖场景时存在局限性，需设计更普适的模型与策略。
AI.method: 扩展传统SSD为CSSD模型，并设计融合RL策略与图结构TFT机制的混合算法，通过多智能体网格世界实验验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效促使自私代理在循环依赖场景中达成合作，优于传统对称合作方案。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的TFT与RL结合的框架为解决复杂社会困境提供了新思路，尤其适用于非对称和多参与者循环场景。

authors_text: Xu Wendi,Wang Xianpeng,Guo Qingxin,Song Xiangman,Zhao Ren,Zhao Guodong,Yang Yang,Xu Te,He Dakuo
title: Towards KAB2S: Learning Key Knowledge from Single-Objective Problems to Multi-Objective Problem
title_zh: 迈向KAB2S：学习从单目标问题到多目标问题的关键知识
abstract: As "a new frontier in evolutionary computation research", evolutionary transfer optimization(ETO) will overcome the traditional paradigm of zero reuse of related experience and knowledge from solved past problems in researches of evolutionary computation. In scheduling applications via ETO, a quite appealing and highly competitive framework "meeting" between them could be formed for both intelligent scheduling and green scheduling, especially for international pledge of "carbon neutrality" from China. To the best of our knowledge, our paper on scheduling here, serves as the 1st work of a class of ETO frameworks when multiobjective optimization problem "meets" single-objective optimization problems in discrete case (not multitasking optimization). More specifically, key knowledge conveyed for industrial applications, like positional building blocks with genetic algorithm based settings, could be used via the new core transfer mechanism and learning techniques for permutation flow shop scheduling problem(PFSP). Extensive studies on well-studied benchmarks validate firm effectiveness and great universality of our proposed ETO-PFSP framework empirically. Our investigations (1) enrich the ETO frameworks, (2) contribute to the classical and fundamental theory of building block for genetic algorithms and memetic algorithms, and (3) head towards the paradigm shift of evolutionary scheduling via learning by proposal and practice of paradigm of "knowledge and building-block based scheduling" (KAB2S) for "industrial intelligence" in China.
summary: As "a new frontier in evolutionary computation research", evolutionary transfer optimization(ETO) will overcome the traditional paradigm of zero reuse of related experience and knowledge from solved past problems in researches of evolutionary computation. In scheduling applications via ETO, a quite appealing and highly competitive framework "meeting" between them could be formed for both intelligent scheduling and green scheduling, especially for international pledge of "carbon neutrality" from China. To the best of our knowledge, our paper on scheduling here, serves as the 1st work of a class of ETO frameworks when multiobjective optimization problem "meets" single-objective optimization problems in discrete case (not multitasking optimization). More specifically, key knowledge conveyed for industrial applications, like positional building blocks with genetic algorithm based settings, could be used via the new core transfer mechanism and learning techniques for permutation flow shop scheduling problem(PFSP). Extensive studies on well-studied benchmarks validate firm effectiveness and great universality of our proposed ETO-PFSP framework empirically. Our investigations (1) enrich the ETO frameworks, (2) contribute to the classical and fundamental theory of building block for genetic algorithms and memetic algorithms, and (3) head towards the paradigm shift of evolutionary scheduling via learning by proposal and practice of paradigm of "knowledge and building-block based scheduling" (KAB2S) for "industrial intelligence" in China.
abstract_zh: 作为“进化计算研究的新前沿”，进化转移优化（ETO）将克服进化计算研究中已解决的相关经验和知识零重用的传统范式。在ETO的调度申请中，无论是智能调度还是绿色调度，尤其是中国“碳中和”的国际承诺，两者之间都可以形成一个颇具吸引力和高度竞争力的框架“会议”。据我们所知，当多目标优化问题“遇到”离散情况下的单目标优化问题（不是多任务优化）时，我们关于调度的论文是一类 ETO 框架的第一项工作。更具体地说，为工业应用传达的关键知识，例如具有基于遗传算法设置的位置构建块，可以通过新的核心传输机制和学习技术用于排列流水车间调度问题（PFSP）。对经过充分研究的基准进行的广泛研究从经验上验证了我们提出的 ETO-PFSP 框架的公司有效性和巨大普遍性。我们的研究（1）丰富了ETO框架，（2）为遗传算法和模因算法的构建块的经典和基础理论做出了贡献，（3）通过学习和实践中国“工业智能”的“基于知识和构建块的调度”（KAB2S）范式，走向进化调度的范式转变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知识迁移的进化优化框架ETO-PFSP，通过从单目标优化问题中学习关键知识以解决多目标调度问题，推动工业智能调度发展。
AI.motivation: 传统进化计算研究忽视已解决问题的经验复用，而中国碳中和承诺对绿色调度提出更高要求，需通过知识迁移提升调度效率与智能化水平。
AI.method: 设计核心知识迁移机制与学习技术，利用遗传算法中的位置构建块（positional building blocks）作为工业应用的关键知识载体，应用于排列流水车间调度问题（PFSP）。
AI.result: 在经典基准测试中验证了ETO-PFSP框架的有效性与通用性，拓展了进化迁移优化理论体系，并为遗传算法构建块理论提供新贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本研究通过知识迁移机制推动进化调度范式向‘基于知识与构建块的调度’（KAB2S）转变，为工业智能提供理论支撑与实践路径。
