search_text: Towards KAB2S: Learning Key Knowledge from Single-Objective Problems to Multi-Objective Problem 迈向KAB2S：学习从单目标问题到多目标问题的关键知识 As "a new frontier in evolutionary computation research", evolutionary transfer optimization(ETO) will overcome the traditional paradigm of zero reuse of related experience and knowledge from solved past problems in researches of evolutionary computation. In scheduling applications via ETO, a quite appealing and highly competitive framework "meeting" between them could be formed for both intelligent scheduling and green scheduling, especially for international pledge of "carbon neutrality" from China. To the best of our knowledge, our paper on scheduling here, serves as the 1st work of a class of ETO frameworks when multiobjective optimization problem "meets" single-objective optimization problems in discrete case (not multitasking optimization). More specifically, key knowledge conveyed for industrial applications, like positional building blocks with genetic algorithm based settings, could be used via the new core transfer mechanism and learning techniques for permutation flow shop scheduling problem(PFSP). Extensive studies on well-studied benchmarks validate firm effectiveness and great universality of our proposed ETO-PFSP framework empirically. Our investigations (1) enrich the ETO frameworks, (2) contribute to the classical and fundamental theory of building block for genetic algorithms and memetic algorithms, and (3) head towards the paradigm shift of evolutionary scheduling via learning by proposal and practice of paradigm of "knowledge and building-block based scheduling" (KAB2S) for "industrial intelligence" in China. 作为“进化计算研究的新前沿”，进化转移优化（ETO）将克服进化计算研究中已解决的相关经验和知识零重用的传统范式。在ETO的调度申请中，无论是智能调度还是绿色调度，尤其是中国“碳中和”的国际承诺，两者之间都可以形成一个颇具吸引力和高度竞争力的框架“会议”。据我们所知，当多目标优化问题“遇到”离散情况下的单目标优化问题（不是多任务优化）时，我们关于调度的论文是一类 ETO 框架的第一项工作。更具体地说，为工业应用传达的关键知识，例如具有基于遗传算法设置的位置构建块，可以通过新的核心传输机制和学习技术用于排列流水车间调度问题（PFSP）。对经过充分研究的基准进行的广泛研究从经验上验证了我们提出的 ETO-PFSP 框架的公司有效性和巨大普遍性。我们的研究（1）丰富了ETO框架，（2）为遗传算法和模因算法的构建块的经典和基础理论做出了贡献，（3）通过学习和实践中国“工业智能”的“基于知识和构建块的调度”（KAB2S）范式，走向进化调度的范式转变。 本文提出一种基于知识迁移的进化优化框架ETO-PFSP，通过从单目标优化问题中学习关键知识以解决多目标调度问题，推动工业智能调度发展。 Xu Wendi,Wang Xianpeng,Guo Qingxin,Song Xiangman,Zhao Ren,Zhao Guodong,Yang Yang,Xu Te,He Dakuo cs.NE,cs.AI

title: ETO Meets Scheduling: Learning Key Knowledge from Single-Objective Problems to Multi-Objective Problem
title_zh: ETO遇见调度：学习从单目标问题到多目标问题的关键知识
abstract: Evolutionary transfer optimization(ETO) serves as "a new frontier in evolutionary computation research", which will avoid zero reuse of experience and knowledge from solved problems in traditional evolutionary computation. In scheduling applications via ETO, a highly competitive "meeting" framework between them could be constituted towards both intelligent scheduling and green scheduling, especially for carbon neutrality within the context of China. To the best of our knowledge, our study on scheduling here, is the 1st work of ETO for complex optimization when multiobjective problem "meets" single-objective problems in combinatorial case (not multitasking optimization). More specifically, key knowledge like positional building blocks clustered, could be learned and transferred for permutation flow shop scheduling problem (PFSP). Empirical studies on well-studied benchmarks validate relatively firm effectiveness and great potential of our proposed ETO-PFSP framework.
summary: Evolutionary transfer optimization(ETO) serves as "a new frontier in evolutionary computation research", which will avoid zero reuse of experience and knowledge from solved problems in traditional evolutionary computation. In scheduling applications via ETO, a highly competitive "meeting" framework between them could be constituted towards both intelligent scheduling and green scheduling, especially for carbon neutrality within the context of China. To the best of our knowledge, our study on scheduling here, is the 1st work of ETO for complex optimization when multiobjective problem "meets" single-objective problems in combinatorial case (not multitasking optimization). More specifically, key knowledge like positional building blocks clustered, could be learned and transferred for permutation flow shop scheduling problem (PFSP). Empirical studies on well-studied benchmarks validate relatively firm effectiveness and great potential of our proposed ETO-PFSP framework.
abstract_zh: 进化转移优化（ETO）作为“进化计算研究的新前沿”，它将避免传统进化计算中已解决问题的经验和知识的零重用。在ETO的调度应用中，它们之间可以构建一个高度竞争的“会议”框架，以实现智能调度和绿色调度，特别是在中国背景下的碳中和。据我们所知，我们在这里对调度的研究是 ETO 针对组合情况下多目标问题“遇到”单目标问题（不是多任务优化）时的复杂优化的第一项工作。更具体地说，可以学习和迁移关键知识，例如聚类的位置构建块，以解决排列流水车间调度问题（PFSP）。对经过充分研究的基准进行的实证研究验证了我们提出的 ETO-PFSP 框架的相对牢固的有效性和巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将进化迁移优化（ETO）应用于调度领域，通过从单目标问题中学习关键知识以解决多目标调度问题，特别是排列流水车间调度问题（PFSP）。
AI.motivation: 传统进化计算无法复用已解决问题的经验，而ETO可实现知识迁移，助力智能调度与绿色调度（如中国碳中和目标），但此前缺乏针对多目标与单目标问题结合的ETO研究。
AI.method: 构建ETO-PFSP框架，从单目标问题中学习位置构建块聚类等关键知识，并迁移至多目标PFSP求解，通过实证验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在经典基准测试中，ETO-PFSP框架展现出较稳定的性能和巨大潜力，证明了知识迁移在多目标调度中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: ETO-PFSP为复杂优化问题提供了新思路，通过跨单多目标问题的知识迁移，可有效提升调度效率与绿色性，未来可拓展至更多实际场景。

title: Noise-aware Physics-informed Machine Learning for Robust PDE Discovery
title_zh: 用于稳健 PDE 发现的噪声感知物理机器学习
comment: 13 pages, 8 figures, v2, v3: corrected typos and author names, v4, v5: improved notations
comments: 13 pages, 8 figures, v2, v3: corrected typos and author names, v4, v5: improved notations
abstract: This work is concerned with discovering the governing partial differential equation (PDE) of a physical system. Existing methods have demonstrated the PDE identification from finite observations but failed to maintain satisfying results against noisy data, partly owing to suboptimal estimated derivatives and found PDE coefficients. We address the issues by introducing a noise-aware physics-informed machine learning (nPIML) framework to discover the governing PDE from data following arbitrary distributions. We propose training a couple of neural networks, namely solver and preselector, in a multi-task learning paradigm, which yields important scores of basis candidates that constitute the hidden physical constraint. After they are jointly trained, the solver network estimates potential candidates, e.g., partial derivatives, for the sparse regression algorithm to initially unveil the most likely parsimonious PDE, decided according to the information criterion. We also propose the denoising physics-informed neural networks (dPINNs), based on Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT), to deliver a set of the optimal finetuned PDE coefficients respecting the noise-reduced variables. The denoising PINNs are structured into forefront projection networks and a PINN, by which the formerly learned solver initializes. Our extensive experiments on five canonical PDEs affirm that the proposed framework presents a robust and interpretable approach for PDE discovery, applicable to a wide range of systems, possibly complicated by noise.
summary: This work is concerned with discovering the governing partial differential equation (PDE) of a physical system. Existing methods have demonstrated the PDE identification from finite observations but failed to maintain satisfying results against noisy data, partly owing to suboptimal estimated derivatives and found PDE coefficients. We address the issues by introducing a noise-aware physics-informed machine learning (nPIML) framework to discover the governing PDE from data following arbitrary distributions. We propose training a couple of neural networks, namely solver and preselector, in a multi-task learning paradigm, which yields important scores of basis candidates that constitute the hidden physical constraint. After they are jointly trained, the solver network estimates potential candidates, e.g., partial derivatives, for the sparse regression algorithm to initially unveil the most likely parsimonious PDE, decided according to the information criterion. We also propose the denoising physics-informed neural networks (dPINNs), based on Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT), to deliver a set of the optimal finetuned PDE coefficients respecting the noise-reduced variables. The denoising PINNs are structured into forefront projection networks and a PINN, by which the formerly learned solver initializes. Our extensive experiments on five canonical PDEs affirm that the proposed framework presents a robust and interpretable approach for PDE discovery, applicable to a wide range of systems, possibly complicated by noise.
abstract_zh: 这项工作涉及发现物理系统的控制偏微分方程（PDE）。现有方法已经证明了从有限观测中识别偏微分方程，但未能针对噪声数据保持令人满意的结果，部分原因是估计导数和发现的偏微分方程系数不理想。我们通过引入噪声感知物理信息机器学习 (nPIML) 框架来解决这些问题，以从遵循任意分布的数据中发现控制偏微分方程。我们建议在多任务学习范式中训练几个神经网络，即求解器和预选器，这会产生构成隐藏物理约束的基础候选的重要分数。在对它们进行联合训练后，求解器网络估计稀疏回归算法的潜在候选者（例如偏导数），以根据信息标准决定最初揭示最可能的简约偏微分方程。我们还提出了基于离散傅立叶变换 (DFT) 的去噪物理通知神经网络 (dPINN)，以提供一组与降噪变量相关的最佳微调 PDE 系数。去噪 PINN 被构造为最前沿的投影网络和 PINN，之前学习的求解器通过它进行初始化。我们对五个典型偏微分方程进行的广泛实验证实，所提出的框架为偏微分方程发现提供了一种稳健且可解释的方法，适用于各种可能因噪声而变得复杂的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种噪声感知的物理信息机器学习框架（nPIML），用于从噪声数据中鲁棒地发现偏微分方程（PDE）。
AI.motivation: 现有PDE识别方法在处理噪声数据时表现不佳，主要由于导数估计不准确和PDE系数优化不足。
AI.method: 设计多任务学习框架，包含求解器网络和预选择器网络，结合稀疏回归与基于离散傅里叶变换的去噪物理信息神经网络（dPINNs）优化系数。
AI.result: 在五个经典PDE实验中验证了框架的有效性，表明其在噪声环境下具有鲁棒性和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂噪声环境下的物理系统建模提供了可靠且通用的PDE发现方案。

search_text: Noise-aware Physics-informed Machine Learning for Robust PDE Discovery 用于稳健 PDE 发现的噪声感知物理机器学习 This work is concerned with discovering the governing partial differential equation (PDE) of a physical system. Existing methods have demonstrated the PDE identification from finite observations but failed to maintain satisfying results against noisy data, partly owing to suboptimal estimated derivatives and found PDE coefficients. We address the issues by introducing a noise-aware physics-informed machine learning (nPIML) framework to discover the governing PDE from data following arbitrary distributions. We propose training a couple of neural networks, namely solver and preselector, in a multi-task learning paradigm, which yields important scores of basis candidates that constitute the hidden physical constraint. After they are jointly trained, the solver network estimates potential candidates, e.g., partial derivatives, for the sparse regression algorithm to initially unveil the most likely parsimonious PDE, decided according to the information criterion. We also propose the denoising physics-informed neural networks (dPINNs), based on Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT), to deliver a set of the optimal finetuned PDE coefficients respecting the noise-reduced variables. The denoising PINNs are structured into forefront projection networks and a PINN, by which the formerly learned solver initializes. Our extensive experiments on five canonical PDEs affirm that the proposed framework presents a robust and interpretable approach for PDE discovery, applicable to a wide range of systems, possibly complicated by noise. 这项工作涉及发现物理系统的控制偏微分方程（PDE）。现有方法已经证明了从有限观测中识别偏微分方程，但未能针对噪声数据保持令人满意的结果，部分原因是估计导数和发现的偏微分方程系数不理想。我们通过引入噪声感知物理信息机器学习 (nPIML) 框架来解决这些问题，以从遵循任意分布的数据中发现控制偏微分方程。我们建议在多任务学习范式中训练几个神经网络，即求解器和预选器，这会产生构成隐藏物理约束的基础候选的重要分数。在对它们进行联合训练后，求解器网络估计稀疏回归算法的潜在候选者（例如偏导数），以根据信息标准决定最初揭示最可能的简约偏微分方程。我们还提出了基于离散傅立叶变换 (DFT) 的去噪物理通知神经网络 (dPINN)，以提供一组与降噪变量相关的最佳微调 PDE 系数。去噪 PINN 被构造为最前沿的投影网络和 PINN，之前学习的求解器通过它进行初始化。我们对五个典型偏微分方程进行的广泛实验证实，所提出的框架为偏微分方程发现提供了一种稳健且可解释的方法，适用于各种可能因噪声而变得复杂的系统。 本文提出了一种噪声感知的物理信息机器学习框架（nPIML），用于从噪声数据中鲁棒地发现偏微分方程（PDE）。 Pongpisit Thanasutives,Takashi Morita,Masayuki Numao,Ken-ichi Fukui math.NA,cs.AI,cs.LG,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Rongxin Xu,Shiva Raj Pokhrel,Qiujun Lan,Gang Li
title: FAIR-BFL: Flexible and Incentive Redesign for Blockchain-based Federated Learning
title_zh: FAIR-BFL：基于区块链的联邦学习的灵活和激励性重新设计
comment: To appear in the proceedings of the 51st International Conference on Parallel Processing (ICPP 2022)
comments: To appear in the proceedings of the 51st International Conference on Parallel Processing (ICPP 2022)
abstract: Vanilla Federated learning (FL) relies on the centralized global aggregation mechanism and assumes that all clients are honest. This makes it a challenge for FL to alleviate the single point of failure and dishonest clients. These impending challenges in the design philosophy of FL call for blockchain-based federated learning (BFL) due to the benefits of coupling FL and blockchain (e.g., democracy, incentive, and immutability). However, one problem in vanilla BFL is that its capabilities do not follow adopters' needs in a dynamic fashion. Besides, vanilla BFL relies on unverifiable clients' self-reported contributions like data size because checking clients' raw data is not allowed in FL for privacy concerns. We design and evaluate a novel BFL framework, and resolve the identified challenges in vanilla BFL with greater flexibility and incentive mechanism called FAIR-BFL. In contrast to existing works, FAIR-BFL offers unprecedented flexibility via the modular design, allowing adopters to adjust its capabilities following business demands in a dynamic fashion. Our design accounts for BFL's ability to quantify each client's contribution to the global learning process. Such quantification provides a rational metric for distributing the rewards among federated clients and helps discover malicious participants that may poison the global model.
summary: Vanilla Federated learning (FL) relies on the centralized global aggregation mechanism and assumes that all clients are honest. This makes it a challenge for FL to alleviate the single point of failure and dishonest clients. These impending challenges in the design philosophy of FL call for blockchain-based federated learning (BFL) due to the benefits of coupling FL and blockchain (e.g., democracy, incentive, and immutability). However, one problem in vanilla BFL is that its capabilities do not follow adopters' needs in a dynamic fashion. Besides, vanilla BFL relies on unverifiable clients' self-reported contributions like data size because checking clients' raw data is not allowed in FL for privacy concerns. We design and evaluate a novel BFL framework, and resolve the identified challenges in vanilla BFL with greater flexibility and incentive mechanism called FAIR-BFL. In contrast to existing works, FAIR-BFL offers unprecedented flexibility via the modular design, allowing adopters to adjust its capabilities following business demands in a dynamic fashion. Our design accounts for BFL's ability to quantify each client's contribution to the global learning process. Such quantification provides a rational metric for distributing the rewards among federated clients and helps discover malicious participants that may poison the global model.
abstract_zh: 普通联邦学习（FL）依赖于集中式全局聚合机制，并假设所有客户端都是诚实的。这使得 FL 面临单点故障和不诚实客户的挑战。由于 FL 和区块链耦合的好处（例如民主、激励和不变性），FL 设计理念中迫在眉睫的挑战需要基于区块链的联邦学习 (BFL)。然而，vanilla BFL 的一个问题是它的功能不能以动态方式满足采用者的需求。此外，普通 BFL 依赖于无法验证的客户自我报告的贡献（例如数据大小），因为出于隐私考虑，FL 不允许检查客户的原始数据。我们设计并评估了一种新颖的 BFL 框架，并以更大的灵活性和激励机制（称为 FAIR-BFL）解决了普通 BFL 中已确定的挑战。与现有作品相比，FAIR-BFL 通过模块化设计提供了前所未有的灵活性，允许采用者以动态方式根据业务需求调整其功能。我们的设计考虑了 BFL 量化每个客户对全球学习过程的贡献的能力。这种量化为在联合客户端之间分配奖励提供了合理的度量，并有助于发现可能毒害全局模型的恶意参与者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAIR-BFL框架，通过模块化设计和贡献量化机制解决区块链联邦学习（BFL）在灵活性和激励机制方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习（FL）存在单点故障和恶意客户端问题，而现有区块链联邦学习（BFL）缺乏动态适应能力且依赖不可验证的客户端自报贡献数据。
AI.method: 设计模块化架构实现动态能力调整，并通过区块链量化客户端对全局模型的实际贡献，结合激励机制分配奖励并识别恶意参与者。
AI.result: FAIR-BFL实现了按需动态调整功能，通过贡献度量化提升奖励分配公平性，有效检测并抑制恶意客户端对全局模型的毒化攻击。
AI.conclusion: FAIR-BFL通过灵活性设计和贡献度量化机制，系统性解决了BFL在动态适应性、激励公平性和安全性方面的核心挑战。

title: On the Impossibility of Decomposing Binary Matroids
title_zh: 论二元拟阵分解的不可能性
abstract: We show that there exist $k$-colorable matroids that are not $(b,c)$-decomposable when $b$ and $c$ are constants. A matroid is $(b,c)$-decomposable, if its ground set of elements can be partitioned into sets $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_l$ with the following two properties. Each set $X_i$ has size at most $ck$. Moreover, for all sets $Y$ such that $|Y \cap X_i| \leq 1$ it is the case that $Y$ is $b$-colorable. A $(b,c)$-decomposition is a strict generalization of a partition decomposition and, thus, our result refutes a conjecture from arXiv:1911.10485v2 .
summary: We show that there exist $k$-colorable matroids that are not $(b,c)$-decomposable when $b$ and $c$ are constants. A matroid is $(b,c)$-decomposable, if its ground set of elements can be partitioned into sets $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_l$ with the following two properties. Each set $X_i$ has size at most $ck$. Moreover, for all sets $Y$ such that $|Y \cap X_i| \leq 1$ it is the case that $Y$ is $b$-colorable. A $(b,c)$-decomposition is a strict generalization of a partition decomposition and, thus, our result refutes a conjecture from arXiv:1911.10485v2 .
abstract_zh: 我们证明，当 $b$ 和 $c$ 为常量时，存在不可 $(b,c)$ 可分解的 $k$ 可着色拟阵。如果拟阵的基本元素集可以划分为具有以下两个属性的集合 $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_l$，则拟阵是 $(b,c)$ 可分解的。每个集合 $X_i$ 的大小最多为 $ck$。此外，对于所有集合$Y$，使得$|Y \cap X_i| \leq 1$ 情况是$Y$ 是$b$ 可着色的。 $(b,c)$ 分解是分区分解的严格概括，因此，我们的结果反驳了 arXiv:1911.10485v2 的猜想。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了存在某些k-可着色的拟阵无法被分解为满足特定条件的(b,c)-分解，从而反驳了之前的猜想。
AI.motivation: 研究拟阵分解的理论边界，特别是针对(b,c)-分解的可行性，以解决关于拟阵结构分解的开放性猜想。
AI.method: 通过构造反例并结合组合数学方法，证明当b和c为常数时，存在无法满足分解条件的k-可着色拟阵。
AI.result: 证明了存在k-可着色的二元拟阵在常数b和c下无法实现(b,c)-分解，直接反驳了arXiv:1911.10485v2中的猜想。
AI.conclusion: 该结果揭示了拟阵分解的理论限制，表明分解条件需更灵活的参数设置，为后续研究提供了新的方向。

search_text: On the Impossibility of Decomposing Binary Matroids 论二元拟阵分解的不可能性 We show that there exist $k$-colorable matroids that are not $(b,c)$-decomposable when $b$ and $c$ are constants. A matroid is $(b,c)$-decomposable, if its ground set of elements can be partitioned into sets $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_l$ with the following two properties. Each set $X_i$ has size at most $ck$. Moreover, for all sets $Y$ such that $|Y \cap X_i| \leq 1$ it is the case that $Y$ is $b$-colorable. A $(b,c)$-decomposition is a strict generalization of a partition decomposition and, thus, our result refutes a conjecture from arXiv:1911.10485v2 . 我们证明，当 $b$ 和 $c$ 为常量时，存在不可 $(b,c)$ 可分解的 $k$ 可着色拟阵。如果拟阵的基本元素集可以划分为具有以下两个属性的集合 $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_l$，则拟阵是 $(b,c)$ 可分解的。每个集合 $X_i$ 的大小最多为 $ck$。此外，对于所有集合$Y$，使得$|Y \cap X_i| \leq 1$ 情况是$Y$ 是$b$ 可着色的。 $(b,c)$ 分解是分区分解的严格概括，因此，我们的结果反驳了 arXiv:1911.10485v2 的猜想。 本文证明了存在某些k-可着色的拟阵无法被分解为满足特定条件的(b,c)-分解，从而反驳了之前的猜想。 Marilena Leichter,Benjamin Moseley,Kirk Pruhs cs.DS,math.CO

title: $k$-Median Clustering via Metric Embedding: Towards Better Initialization with Differential Privacy
title_zh: $k$-通过度量嵌入进行中值聚类：通过差异隐私实现更好的初始化
abstract: When designing clustering algorithms, the choice of initial centers is crucial for the quality of the learned clusters. In this paper, we develop a new initialization scheme, called HST initialization, for the $k$-median problem in the general metric space (e.g., discrete space induced by graphs), based on the construction of metric embedding tree structure of the data. From the tree, we propose a novel and efficient search algorithm, for good initial centers that can be used subsequently for the local search algorithm. Our proposed HST initialization can produce initial centers achieving lower errors than those from another popular initialization method, $k$-median++, with comparable efficiency. The HST initialization can also be extended to the setting of differential privacy (DP) to generate private initial centers. We show that the error from applying DP local search followed by our private HST initialization improves previous results on the approximation error, and approaches the lower bound within a small factor. Experiments justify the theory and demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Our approach can also be extended to the $k$-means problem.
summary: When designing clustering algorithms, the choice of initial centers is crucial for the quality of the learned clusters. In this paper, we develop a new initialization scheme, called HST initialization, for the $k$-median problem in the general metric space (e.g., discrete space induced by graphs), based on the construction of metric embedding tree structure of the data. From the tree, we propose a novel and efficient search algorithm, for good initial centers that can be used subsequently for the local search algorithm. Our proposed HST initialization can produce initial centers achieving lower errors than those from another popular initialization method, $k$-median++, with comparable efficiency. The HST initialization can also be extended to the setting of differential privacy (DP) to generate private initial centers. We show that the error from applying DP local search followed by our private HST initialization improves previous results on the approximation error, and approaches the lower bound within a small factor. Experiments justify the theory and demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. Our approach can also be extended to the $k$-means problem.
abstract_zh: 在设计聚类算法时，初始中心的选择对于学习聚类的质量至关重要。在本文中，我们基于数据的度量嵌入树结构的构造，针对一般度量空间（例如，由图引起的离散空间）中的$k$中值问题，开发了一种新的初始化方案，称为HST初始化。从树中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的搜索算法，以获得可以随后用于局部搜索算法的良好初始中心。我们提出的 HST 初始化可以产生比另一种流行的初始化方法 $k$-median++ 更低的误差的初始中心，并且效率相当。 HST初始化还可以扩展到差分隐私（DP）的设置，以生成私有初始中心。我们表明，应用 DP 局部搜索和我们的私有 HST 初始化所产生的误差改善了先前的近似误差结果，并在一个小因子内接近下界。实验证明了该理论的合理性并证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。我们的方法也可以扩展到 $k$-means 问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于度量嵌入树结构的HST初始化方法，用于改进k-中位数聚类的初始中心选择，并扩展至差分隐私场景。
AI.motivation: 聚类算法的初始中心选择对结果质量影响显著，现有方法如k-中位数++存在误差较大或效率不足的问题，且缺乏差分隐私保护。
AI.method: 通过构建数据的度量嵌入树结构（HST），设计高效搜索算法生成初始中心，并将其扩展至差分隐私场景以生成隐私保护的初始中心。
AI.result: 实验表明HST初始化在误差上优于k-中位数++，且效率相当；差分隐私版本在近似误差上优于现有结果，接近理论下界。
AI.conclusion: HST初始化方法在聚类效果和隐私保护上均表现优异，为k-中位数及k-均值问题提供了有效且高效的解决方案。

title: FingerGAN: A Constrained Fingerprint Generation Scheme for Latent Fingerprint Enhancement
title_zh: FingerGAN：一种用于潜在指纹增强的约束指纹生成方案
abstract: Latent fingerprint enhancement is an essential pre-processing step for latent fingerprint identification. Most latent fingerprint enhancement methods try to restore corrupted gray ridges/valleys. In this paper, we propose a new method that formulates the latent fingerprint enhancement as a constrained fingerprint generation problem within a generative adversarial network (GAN) framework. We name the proposed network as FingerGAN. It can enforce its generated fingerprint (i.e, enhanced latent fingerprint) indistinguishable from the corresponding ground-truth instance in terms of the fingerprint skeleton map weighted by minutia locations and the orientation field regularized by the FOMFE model. Because minutia is the primary feature for fingerprint recognition and minutia can be retrieved directly from the fingerprint skeleton map, we offer a holistic framework which can perform latent fingerprint enhancement in the context of directly optimizing minutia information. This will help improve latent fingerprint identification performance significantly. Experimental results on two public latent fingerprint databases demonstrate that our method outperforms the state of the arts significantly. The codes will be available for non-commercial purposes from \url{https://github.com/HubYZ/LatentEnhancement}.
summary: Latent fingerprint enhancement is an essential pre-processing step for latent fingerprint identification. Most latent fingerprint enhancement methods try to restore corrupted gray ridges/valleys. In this paper, we propose a new method that formulates the latent fingerprint enhancement as a constrained fingerprint generation problem within a generative adversarial network (GAN) framework. We name the proposed network as FingerGAN. It can enforce its generated fingerprint (i.e, enhanced latent fingerprint) indistinguishable from the corresponding ground-truth instance in terms of the fingerprint skeleton map weighted by minutia locations and the orientation field regularized by the FOMFE model. Because minutia is the primary feature for fingerprint recognition and minutia can be retrieved directly from the fingerprint skeleton map, we offer a holistic framework which can perform latent fingerprint enhancement in the context of directly optimizing minutia information. This will help improve latent fingerprint identification performance significantly. Experimental results on two public latent fingerprint databases demonstrate that our method outperforms the state of the arts significantly. The codes will be available for non-commercial purposes from \url{https://github.com/HubYZ/LatentEnhancement}.
abstract_zh: 潜指纹增强是潜指纹识别中必不可少的预处理步骤。大多数潜在指纹增强方法都会尝试恢复损坏的灰色脊/谷。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，将潜在指纹增强表述为生成对抗网络（GAN）框架内的约束指纹生成问题。我们将提议的网络命名为 FingerGAN。它可以强制其生成的指纹（即增强的潜在指纹）在由细节位置加权的指纹骨架图和由 FOMFE 模型正则化的方向场方面与相应的地面实况实例无法区分。由于细节是指纹识别的主要特征，并且可以直接从指纹骨架图中检索细节，因此我们提供了一个整体框架，可以在直接优化细节信息的情况下执行潜在指纹增强。这将有助于显着提高潜指纹识别性能。两个公共潜在指纹数据库的实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于现有技术。这些代码可用于非商业目的的 \url{https://github.com/HubYZ/LatentEnhancement}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的指纹增强方法，用于提升潜指纹识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的潜指纹增强方法主要集中在恢复受损的灰度脊线和谷线，但未能有效优化指纹的细节特征（如细节点），而细节点是指纹识别的关键。
AI.method: 作者将潜指纹增强问题转化为一个受约束的指纹生成问题，并提出名为FingerGAN的网络。该网络通过在生成对抗网络框架中引入指纹骨架图和方向场的约束，确保生成的指纹在细节点信息上与真实指纹高度一致。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FingerGAN在两个公开的潜指纹数据库上显著优于现有方法，有效提升了潜指纹识别的性能。
AI.conclusion: FingerGAN通过直接优化细节点信息，为潜指纹增强提供了一个整体框架，有助于显著提升潜指纹识别的准确性和可靠性。

The codes will be available for non-commercial purposes from \url{https://github.com/HubYZ/LatentEnhancement}. 潜指纹增强是潜指纹识别中必不可少的预处理步骤。大多数潜在指纹增强方法都会尝试恢复损坏的灰色脊/谷。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，将潜在指纹增强表述为生成对抗网络（GAN）框架内的约束指纹生成问题。我们将提议的网络命名为 FingerGAN。它可以强制其生成的指纹（即增强的潜在指纹）在由细节位置加权的指纹骨架图和由 FOMFE 模型正则化的方向场方面与相应的地面实况实例无法区分。由于细节是指纹识别的主要特征，并且可以直接从指纹骨架图中检索细节，因此我们提供了一个整体框架，可以在直接优化细节信息的情况下执行潜在指纹增强。这将有助于显着提高潜指纹识别性能。两个公共潜在指纹数据库的实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于现有技术。这些代码可用于非商业目的的 \url{https://github.com/HubYZ/LatentEnhancement}。 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的指纹增强方法，用于提升潜指纹识别性能。 Yanming Zhu,Xuefei Yin,Jiankun Hu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: fETSmcs: Feature-based ETS model component selection
title_zh: fETSmcs：基于特征的 ETS 模型组件选择
abstract: The well-developed ETS (ExponenTial Smoothing or Error, Trend, Seasonality) method incorporating a family of exponential smoothing models in state space representation has been widely used for automatic forecasting. The existing ETS method uses information criteria for model selection by choosing an optimal model with the smallest information criterion among all models fitted to a given time series. The ETS method under such a model selection scheme suffers from computational complexity when applied to large-scale time series data. To tackle this issue, we propose an efficient approach for ETS model selection by training classifiers on simulated data to predict appropriate model component forms for a given time series. We provide a simulation study to show the model selection ability of the proposed approach on simulated data. We evaluate our approach on the widely used forecasting competition data set M4, in terms of both point forecasts and prediction intervals. To demonstrate the practical value of our method, we showcase the performance improvements from our approach on a monthly hospital data set.
summary: The well-developed ETS (ExponenTial Smoothing or Error, Trend, Seasonality) method incorporating a family of exponential smoothing models in state space representation has been widely used for automatic forecasting. The existing ETS method uses information criteria for model selection by choosing an optimal model with the smallest information criterion among all models fitted to a given time series. The ETS method under such a model selection scheme suffers from computational complexity when applied to large-scale time series data. To tackle this issue, we propose an efficient approach for ETS model selection by training classifiers on simulated data to predict appropriate model component forms for a given time series. We provide a simulation study to show the model selection ability of the proposed approach on simulated data. We evaluate our approach on the widely used forecasting competition data set M4, in terms of both point forecasts and prediction intervals. To demonstrate the practical value of our method, we showcase the performance improvements from our approach on a monthly hospital data set.
abstract_zh: 成熟的 ETS（指数平滑或误差、趋势、季节性）方法在状态空间表示中结合了一系列指数平滑模型，已广泛用于自动预测。现有的ETS方法使用信息准则进行模型选择，通过在拟合给定时间序列的所有模型中选择具有最小信息准则的最优模型。这种模型选择方案下的 ETS 方法在应用于大规模时间序列数据时会遇到计算复杂性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种有效的 ETS 模型选择方法，通过在模拟数据上训练分类器来预测给定时间序列的适当模型组件形式。我们提供了一项模拟研究，以展示所提出的方法在模拟数据上的模型选择能力。我们在广泛使用的预测竞赛数据集 M4 上从点预测和预测区间方面评估了我们的方法。为了证明我们的方法的实用价值，我们展示了我们的方法在每月医院数据集上的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征的ETS模型组件选择方法fETSmcs，通过训练分类器预测时间序列的模型组件形式，解决传统ETS方法在大规模数据下的计算复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ETS方法通过信息准则选择最优模型时，面对大规模时间序列数据存在计算复杂度高的问题，需开发更高效的模型选择方案。
AI.method: 基于模拟数据训练分类器预测时间序列的模型组件形式，避免对所有模型进行拟合；通过M4数据集和实际医院数据集验证方法的预测精度与计算效率。
AI.result: 在模拟数据中验证了模型选择能力，M4数据集的点预测和预测区间评估显示性能提升，实际医院数据集应用中也取得了显著效果。
AI.conclusion: fETSmcs方法在保持预测精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，为大规模时间序列分析提供了高效的ETS模型选择方案。

authors_text: Anna Hlédiková,Dominika Woszczyk,Alican Akman,Soteris Demetriou,Björn Schuller
title: Data Augmentation for Dementia Detection in Spoken Language
title_zh: 口语中痴呆症检测的数据增强
abstract: Dementia is a growing problem as our society ages, and detection methods are often invasive and expensive. Recent deep-learning techniques can offer a faster diagnosis and have shown promising results. However, they require large amounts of labelled data which is not easily available for the task of dementia detection. One effective solution to sparse data problems is data augmentation, though the exact methods need to be selected carefully. To date, there has been no empirical study of data augmentation on Alzheimer's disease (AD) datasets for NLP and speech processing. In this work, we investigate data augmentation techniques for the task of AD detection and perform an empirical evaluation of the different approaches on two kinds of models for both the text and audio domains. We use a transformer-based model for both domains, and SVM and Random Forest models for the text and audio domains, respectively. We generate additional samples using traditional as well as deep learning based methods and show that data augmentation improves performance for both the text- and audio-based models and that such results are comparable to state-of-the-art results on the popular ADReSS set, with carefully crafted architectures and features.
summary: Dementia is a growing problem as our society ages, and detection methods are often invasive and expensive. Recent deep-learning techniques can offer a faster diagnosis and have shown promising results. However, they require large amounts of labelled data which is not easily available for the task of dementia detection. One effective solution to sparse data problems is data augmentation, though the exact methods need to be selected carefully. To date, there has been no empirical study of data augmentation on Alzheimer's disease (AD) datasets for NLP and speech processing. In this work, we investigate data augmentation techniques for the task of AD detection and perform an empirical evaluation of the different approaches on two kinds of models for both the text and audio domains. We use a transformer-based model for both domains, and SVM and Random Forest models for the text and audio domains, respectively. We generate additional samples using traditional as well as deep learning based methods and show that data augmentation improves performance for both the text- and audio-based models and that such results are comparable to state-of-the-art results on the popular ADReSS set, with carefully crafted architectures and features.
abstract_zh: 随着社会老龄化，痴呆症成为一个日益严重的问题，而检测方法往往是侵入性的且昂贵。最近的深度学习技术可以提供更快的诊断，并已显示出有希望的结果。然而，它们需要大量标记数据，这对于痴呆症检测任务来说不容易获得。稀疏数据问题的一种有效解决方案是数据增强，但需要仔细选择确切的方法。迄今为止，还没有针对用于 NLP 和语音处理的阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 数据集进行数据增强的实证研究。在这项工作中，我们研究了用于 AD 检测任务的数据增强技术，并对文本和音频领域的两种模型的不同方法进行了实证评估。我们对这两个领域使用基于转换器的模型，并分别对文本和音频领域使用 SVM 和随机森林模型。我们使用传统方法和基于深度学习的方法生成额外的样本，并表明数据增强提高了基于文本和基于音频的模型的性能，并且这些结果与流行的 ADReSS 集上的最先进的结果相当，具有精心设计的架构和功能。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了数据增强在阿尔茨海默病检测中的应用，通过文本和音频领域模型评估其效果。
AI.motivation: 痴呆检测面临数据稀缺问题，传统方法成本高且侵入性强，需探索有效数据增强策略以提升深度学习模型性能。
AI.method: 采用Transformer模型处理文本和音频数据，结合SVM和随机森林模型，应用传统及深度学习数据增强方法生成额外样本。
AI.result: 数据增强显著提升文本和音频模型性能，结果与ADReSS数据集上的最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强有效缓解痴呆检测中的数据不足问题，且不同模型架构均能受益于该方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本研究探讨了数据增强在阿尔茨海默病检测中的应用，通过文本和音频领域模型评估其效果。

title: Image Aesthetics Assessment Using Graph Attention Network
title_zh: 使用图注意力网络进行图像美学评估
abstract: Aspect ratio and spatial layout are two of the principal factors determining the aesthetic value of a photograph. But, incorporating these into the traditional convolution-based frameworks for the task of image aesthetics assessment is problematic. The aspect ratio of the photographs gets distorted while they are resized/cropped to a fixed dimension to facilitate training batch sampling. On the other hand, the convolutional filters process information locally and are limited in their ability to model the global spatial layout of a photograph. In this work, we present a two-stage framework based on graph neural networks and address both these problems jointly. First, we propose a feature-graph representation in which the input image is modelled as a graph, maintaining its original aspect ratio and resolution. Second, we propose a graph neural network architecture that takes this feature-graph and captures the semantic relationship between the different regions of the input image using visual attention. Our experiments show that the proposed framework advances the state-of-the-art results in aesthetic score regression on the Aesthetic Visual Analysis (AVA) benchmark.
summary: Aspect ratio and spatial layout are two of the principal factors determining the aesthetic value of a photograph. But, incorporating these into the traditional convolution-based frameworks for the task of image aesthetics assessment is problematic. The aspect ratio of the photographs gets distorted while they are resized/cropped to a fixed dimension to facilitate training batch sampling. On the other hand, the convolutional filters process information locally and are limited in their ability to model the global spatial layout of a photograph. In this work, we present a two-stage framework based on graph neural networks and address both these problems jointly. First, we propose a feature-graph representation in which the input image is modelled as a graph, maintaining its original aspect ratio and resolution. Second, we propose a graph neural network architecture that takes this feature-graph and captures the semantic relationship between the different regions of the input image using visual attention. Our experiments show that the proposed framework advances the state-of-the-art results in aesthetic score regression on the Aesthetic Visual Analysis (AVA) benchmark.
abstract_zh: 长宽比和空间布局是决定照片美学价值的两个主要因素。但是，将这些纳入传统的基于卷积的框架来完成图像美学评估任务是有问题的。当照片被调整大小/裁剪到固定尺寸以促进训练批量采样时，照片的长宽比会变形。另一方面，卷积滤波器在本地处理信息，并且在对照片的全局空间布局进行建模的能力方面受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于图神经网络的两阶段框架，并共同解决了这两个问题。首先，我们提出了一种特征图表示，其中输入图像被建模为图，保持其原始长宽比和分辨率。其次，我们提出了一种图神经网络架构，该架构采用该特征图并使用视觉注意捕获输入图像不同区域之间的语义关系。我们的实验表明，所提出的框架在审美视觉分析（AVA）基准的审美得分回归方面取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的两阶段框架，用于解决图像美学评估中保持原始宽高比和建模全局空间布局的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积框架在处理图像美学评估时存在两个问题：调整图像尺寸会破坏宽高比，且局部卷积难以建模全局空间布局。
AI.method: 第一阶段将图像建模为保留原始宽高比的特征图；第二阶段设计图神经网络架构，通过视觉注意力机制捕捉图像区域间的语义关系。
AI.result: 在AVA基准测试中，该框架在美学评分回归任务上超越了现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 图注意力网络有效解决了传统方法在宽高比保持和空间布局建模方面的局限性，为图像美学评估提供了新思路。

search_text: Image Aesthetics Assessment Using Graph Attention Network 使用图注意力网络进行图像美学评估 Aspect ratio and spatial layout are two of the principal factors determining the aesthetic value of a photograph. But, incorporating these into the traditional convolution-based frameworks for the task of image aesthetics assessment is problematic. The aspect ratio of the photographs gets distorted while they are resized/cropped to a fixed dimension to facilitate training batch sampling. On the other hand, the convolutional filters process information locally and are limited in their ability to model the global spatial layout of a photograph. In this work, we present a two-stage framework based on graph neural networks and address both these problems jointly. First, we propose a feature-graph representation in which the input image is modelled as a graph, maintaining its original aspect ratio and resolution. Second, we propose a graph neural network architecture that takes this feature-graph and captures the semantic relationship between the different regions of the input image using visual attention. Our experiments show that the proposed framework advances the state-of-the-art results in aesthetic score regression on the Aesthetic Visual Analysis (AVA) benchmark. 长宽比和空间布局是决定照片美学价值的两个主要因素。但是，将这些纳入传统的基于卷积的框架来完成图像美学评估任务是有问题的。当照片被调整大小/裁剪到固定尺寸以促进训练批量采样时，照片的长宽比会变形。另一方面，卷积滤波器在本地处理信息，并且在对照片的全局空间布局进行建模的能力方面受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于图神经网络的两阶段框架，并共同解决了这两个问题。首先，我们提出了一种特征图表示，其中输入图像被建模为图，保持其原始长宽比和分辨率。其次，我们提出了一种图神经网络架构，该架构采用该特征图并使用视觉注意捕获输入图像不同区域之间的语义关系。我们的实验表明，所提出的框架在审美视觉分析（AVA）基准的审美得分回归方面取得了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的两阶段框架，用于解决图像美学评估中保持原始宽高比和建模全局空间布局的问题。 Koustav Ghosal,Aljosa Smolic cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxuan Lu,Jingya Yan,Zhixuan Qi,Zhongzheng Ge,Yongping Du
title: Contextual embedding and model weighting by fusing domain knowledge on Biomedical Question Answering
title_zh: 通过融合生物医学问答领域的知识进行上下文嵌入和模型加权
abstract: Biomedical Question Answering aims to obtain an answer to the given question from the biomedical domain. Due to its high requirement of biomedical domain knowledge, it is difficult for the model to learn domain knowledge from limited training data. We propose a contextual embedding method that combines open-domain QA model \aoa and \biobert model pre-trained on biomedical domain data. We adopt unsupervised pre-training on large biomedical corpus and supervised fine-tuning on biomedical question answering dataset. Additionally, we adopt an MLP-based model weighting layer to automatically exploit the advantages of two models to provide the correct answer. The public dataset \biomrc constructed from PubMed corpus is used to evaluate our method. Experimental results show that our model outperforms state-of-the-art system by a large margin.
summary: Biomedical Question Answering aims to obtain an answer to the given question from the biomedical domain. Due to its high requirement of biomedical domain knowledge, it is difficult for the model to learn domain knowledge from limited training data. We propose a contextual embedding method that combines open-domain QA model \aoa and \biobert model pre-trained on biomedical domain data. We adopt unsupervised pre-training on large biomedical corpus and supervised fine-tuning on biomedical question answering dataset. Additionally, we adopt an MLP-based model weighting layer to automatically exploit the advantages of two models to provide the correct answer. The public dataset \biomrc constructed from PubMed corpus is used to evaluate our method. Experimental results show that our model outperforms state-of-the-art system by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 生物医学问答旨在从生物医学领域获得给定问题的答案。由于其对生物医学领域知识的要求较高，模型很难从有限的训练数据中学习领域知识。我们提出了一种上下文嵌入方法，结合了在生物医学领域数据上预训练的开放域 QA 模型 \aoa 和 \biobert 模型。我们采用对大型生物医学语料库的无监督预训练和对生物医学问答数据集的监督微调。此外，我们采用基于 MLP 的模型加权层来自动利用两个模型的优势来提供正确的答案。从 PubMed 语料库构建的公共数据集 \biomrc 用于评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的模型大大优于最先进的系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合开放领域QA模型与生物医学预训练模型的上下文嵌入方法，通过模型加权提升生物医学问答性能。
AI.motivation: 生物医学问答任务因领域知识复杂且训练数据有限，传统模型难以有效学习领域特征。
AI.method: 融合AoA开放领域模型与BioBERT生物医学预训练模型，采用无监督预训练与监督微调结合策略，并引入MLP模型加权层自动整合双模型优势。
AI.result: 在基于PubMed的BiOMRC数据集上，该方法显著优于现有最先进系统。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域知识融合与动态模型加权，可有效提升生物医学问答系统的准确率。

title: Marginal Inference queries in Hidden Markov Models under context-free grammar constraints
title_zh: 上下文无关语法约束下隐马尔可夫模型中的边际推理查询
abstract: The primary use of any probabilistic model involving a set of random variables is to run inference and sampling queries on it. Inference queries in classical probabilistic models is concerned by the computation of marginal or conditional probabilities of events given as an input. When the probabilistic model is sequential, more sophisticated marginal inference queries involving complex grammars may be of interest in fields such as computational linguistics and NLP. In this work, we address the question of computing the likelihood of context-free grammars (CFGs) in Hidden Markov Models (HMMs). We provide a dynamic algorithm for the exact computation of the likelihood for the class of unambiguous context-free grammars. We show that the problem is NP-Hard, even with the promise that the input CFG has a degree of ambiguity less than or equal to 2. We then propose a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) algorithm to approximate the likelihood for the case of polynomially-bounded ambiguous CFGs.
summary: The primary use of any probabilistic model involving a set of random variables is to run inference and sampling queries on it. Inference queries in classical probabilistic models is concerned by the computation of marginal or conditional probabilities of events given as an input. When the probabilistic model is sequential, more sophisticated marginal inference queries involving complex grammars may be of interest in fields such as computational linguistics and NLP. In this work, we address the question of computing the likelihood of context-free grammars (CFGs) in Hidden Markov Models (HMMs). We provide a dynamic algorithm for the exact computation of the likelihood for the class of unambiguous context-free grammars. We show that the problem is NP-Hard, even with the promise that the input CFG has a degree of ambiguity less than or equal to 2. We then propose a fully polynomial randomized approximation scheme (FPRAS) algorithm to approximate the likelihood for the case of polynomially-bounded ambiguous CFGs.
abstract_zh: 涉及一组随机变量的任何概率模型的主要用途是对其运行推理和采样查询。经典概率模型中的推理查询涉及作为输入给出的事件的边际概率或条件概率的计算。当概率模型是顺序的时，涉及复杂语法的更复杂的边缘推理查询可能会引起计算语言学和 NLP 等领域的兴趣。在这项工作中，我们解决了计算隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）中上下文无关语法（CFG）的可能性的问题。我们提供了一种动态算法来精确计算一类明确的上下文无关语法的可能性。我们表明，即使输入 CFG 的模糊度小于或等于 2，问题也是 NP-Hard。然后，我们提出了一种完全多项式随机逼近方案 (FPRAS) 算法来逼近多项式有界模糊 CFG 情况的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）中处理上下文无关文法（CFG）约束下的边缘推断查询，提出精确计算和近似算法。
AI.motivation: 序列化概率模型在计算语言学和NLP中需要处理复杂语法结构的推断问题，而现有方法难以高效处理CFG约束下的HMM推断。
AI.method: 设计动态规划算法精确计算无歧义CFG的似然性，并提出全多项式随机近似方案（FPRAS）处理多项式有界歧义CFG。
AI.result: 证明该问题在NP难（即使输入CFG歧义度≤2），并给出针对不同歧义程度CFG的精确与近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 精确计算受限于NP难问题，但通过FPRAS可有效近似处理多项式有界歧义CFG，为NLP等应用提供可行方案。

title: Transport-Oriented Feature Aggregation for Speaker Embedding Learning
title_zh: 用于说话人嵌入学习的面向传输的特征聚合
abstract: Pooling is needed to aggregate frame-level features into utterance-level representations for speaker modeling. Given the success of statistics-based pooling methods, we hypothesize that speaker characteristics are well represented in the statistical distribution over the pre-aggregation layer's output, and propose to use transport-oriented feature aggregation for deriving speaker embeddings. The aggregated representation encodes the geometric structure of the underlying feature distribution, which is expected to contain valuable speaker-specific information that may not be represented by the commonly used statistical measures like mean and variance. The original transport-oriented feature aggregation is also extended to a weighted-frame version to incorporate the attention mechanism. Experiments on speaker verification with the Voxceleb dataset show improvement over statistics pooling and its attentive variant.
summary: Pooling is needed to aggregate frame-level features into utterance-level representations for speaker modeling. Given the success of statistics-based pooling methods, we hypothesize that speaker characteristics are well represented in the statistical distribution over the pre-aggregation layer's output, and propose to use transport-oriented feature aggregation for deriving speaker embeddings. The aggregated representation encodes the geometric structure of the underlying feature distribution, which is expected to contain valuable speaker-specific information that may not be represented by the commonly used statistical measures like mean and variance. The original transport-oriented feature aggregation is also extended to a weighted-frame version to incorporate the attention mechanism. Experiments on speaker verification with the Voxceleb dataset show improvement over statistics pooling and its attentive variant.
abstract_zh: 需要池化将帧级特征聚合成话语级表示以进行说话者建模。鉴于基于统计的池化方法的成功，我们假设说话人特征在预聚合层输出的统计分布中得到了很好的体现，并建议使用面向传输的特征聚合来导出说话人嵌入。聚合表示对底层特征分布的几何结构进行编码，该结构预计包含有价值的特定于说话人的信息，这些信息可能无法用均值和方差等常用统计度量来表示。最初的面向传输的特征聚合也扩展到加权帧版本以纳入注意力机制。使用 Voxceleb 数据集进行说话人验证的实验表明，统计池及其注意变体有所改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运输导向的特征聚合方法，用于改进说话人嵌入学习中的话语级表示生成。
AI.motivation: 传统统计池化方法（如均值方差）可能无法充分捕捉特征分布的几何结构，而说话人特性可能蕴含于该结构中。
AI.method: 设计运输导向特征聚合方法，通过编码特征分布的几何结构生成说话人嵌入，并扩展为加权帧版本以融合注意力机制。
AI.result: 在Voxceleb数据集的说话人验证任务中，该方法优于传统统计池化及其注意力变体。
AI.conclusion: 运输导向聚合能更有效提取说话人特定信息，为嵌入学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Burak Satar,Hongyuan Zhu,Xavier Bresson,Joo Hwee Lim
title: Semantic Role Aware Correlation Transformer for Text to Video Retrieval
title_zh: 用于文本到视频检索的语义角色感知相关转换器
abstract: With the emergence of social media, voluminous video clips are uploaded every day, and retrieving the most relevant visual content with a language query becomes critical. Most approaches aim to learn a joint embedding space for plain textual and visual contents without adequately exploiting their intra-modality structures and inter-modality correlations. This paper proposes a novel transformer that explicitly disentangles the text and video into semantic roles of objects, spatial contexts and temporal contexts with an attention scheme to learn the intra- and inter-role correlations among the three roles to discover discriminative features for matching at different levels. The preliminary results on popular YouCook2 indicate that our approach surpasses a current state-of-the-art method, with a high margin in all metrics. It also overpasses two SOTA methods in terms of two metrics.
summary: With the emergence of social media, voluminous video clips are uploaded every day, and retrieving the most relevant visual content with a language query becomes critical. Most approaches aim to learn a joint embedding space for plain textual and visual contents without adequately exploiting their intra-modality structures and inter-modality correlations. This paper proposes a novel transformer that explicitly disentangles the text and video into semantic roles of objects, spatial contexts and temporal contexts with an attention scheme to learn the intra- and inter-role correlations among the three roles to discover discriminative features for matching at different levels. The preliminary results on popular YouCook2 indicate that our approach surpasses a current state-of-the-art method, with a high margin in all metrics. It also overpasses two SOTA methods in terms of two metrics.
abstract_zh: 随着社交媒体的出现，每天都会上传大量视频剪辑，通过语言查询检索最相关的视觉内容变得至关重要。大多数方法旨在学习纯文本和视觉内容的联合嵌入空间，而没有充分利用其模态内结构和模态间相关性。本文提出了一种新颖的转换器，可以将文本和视频显式地分解为对象的语义角色、空间上下文和时间上下文，并通过注意方案来学习三个角色之间的角色内和角色间相关性，以发现不同级别匹配的判别特征。流行的 YouCook2 的初步结果表明，我们的方法超越了当前最先进的方法，在所有指标上都有很高的优势。它还在两个指标方面超越了两种 SOTA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义角色感知的相关性Transformer模型，用于文本到视频检索任务，通过分解文本和视频的语义角色并学习跨模态相关性以提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在文本与视频联合嵌入空间学习中未能充分挖掘模态内结构及跨模态相关性，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计新型Transformer架构，显式分离文本与视频的语义角色（对象、空间上下文、时间上下文），通过注意力机制学习角色内及跨角色相关性以提取判别特征。
AI.result: 在YouCook2数据集上，该方法在所有指标上显著优于当前SOTA方法，并在两个指标上超越另外两种SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义角色分解与相关性建模有效提升了文本到视频检索性能，验证了方法的有效性与潜力。

authors_text: Burak Satar,Hongyuan Zhu,Hanwang Zhang,Joo Hwee Lim
title: RoME: Role-aware Mixture-of-Expert Transformer for Text-to-Video Retrieval
title_zh: RoME：用于文本到视频检索的角色感知混合专家转换器
comment: Preprint, under review in TCSVT Journal
comments: Preprint, under review in TCSVT Journal
abstract: Seas of videos are uploaded daily with the popularity of social channels; thus, retrieving the most related video contents with user textual queries plays a more crucial role. Most methods consider only one joint embedding space between global visual and textual features without considering the local structures of each modality. Some other approaches consider multiple embedding spaces consisting of global and local features separately, ignoring rich inter-modality correlations. We propose a novel mixture-of-expert transformer RoME that disentangles the text and the video into three levels; the roles of spatial contexts, temporal contexts, and object contexts. We utilize a transformer-based attention mechanism to fully exploit visual and text embeddings at both global and local levels with mixture-of-experts for considering inter-modalities and structures' correlations. The results indicate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the YouCook2 and MSR-VTT datasets, given the same visual backbone without pre-training. Finally, we conducted extensive ablation studies to elucidate our design choices.
summary: Seas of videos are uploaded daily with the popularity of social channels; thus, retrieving the most related video contents with user textual queries plays a more crucial role. Most methods consider only one joint embedding space between global visual and textual features without considering the local structures of each modality. Some other approaches consider multiple embedding spaces consisting of global and local features separately, ignoring rich inter-modality correlations. We propose a novel mixture-of-expert transformer RoME that disentangles the text and the video into three levels; the roles of spatial contexts, temporal contexts, and object contexts. We utilize a transformer-based attention mechanism to fully exploit visual and text embeddings at both global and local levels with mixture-of-experts for considering inter-modalities and structures' correlations. The results indicate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the YouCook2 and MSR-VTT datasets, given the same visual backbone without pre-training. Finally, we conducted extensive ablation studies to elucidate our design choices.
abstract_zh: 随着社交渠道的流行，每天都会有海量的视频上传；因此，通过用户文本查询检索最相关的视频内容起着更加关键的作用。大多数方法只考虑全局视觉和文本特征之间的一个联合嵌入空间，而不考虑每种模态的局部结构。其他一些方法考虑分别由全局和局部特征组成的多个嵌入空间，忽略丰富的模态间相关性。我们提出了一种新颖的专家混合变压器 RoME，它将文本和视频分为三个层次；空间上下文、时间上下文和对象上下文的角色。我们利用基于变压器的注意力机制来充分利用全局和局部层面的视觉和文本嵌入，并结合专家的组合来考虑模态间和结构的相关性。结果表明，在没有预训练的情况下，在相同的视觉主干下，我们的方法优于 YouCook2 和 MSR-VTT 数据集上最先进的方法。最后，我们进行了广泛的消融研究以阐明我们的设计选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于角色感知的混合专家Transformer模型RoME，用于提升文本到视频检索的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅考虑全局嵌入空间或忽略跨模态相关性，难以有效捕捉视频与文本的局部结构和跨模态关联，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 通过分解文本与视频为三个层次（空间、时间、对象上下文），结合Transformer注意力机制与混合专家结构，同时建模全局与局部跨模态关联。
AI.result: 在YouCook2和MSR-VTT数据集上，RoME在相同视觉主干下优于现有方法，且无需预训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过消融实验验证了模型设计的有效性，证明了角色感知与混合专家机制在跨模态检索中的优势。

We utilize a transformer-based attention mechanism to fully exploit visual and text embeddings at both global and local levels with mixture-of-experts for considering inter-modalities and structures' correlations. The results indicate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on the YouCook2 and MSR-VTT datasets, given the same visual backbone without pre-training. Finally, we conducted extensive ablation studies to elucidate our design choices. 随着社交渠道的流行，每天都会有海量的视频上传；因此，通过用户文本查询检索最相关的视频内容起着更加关键的作用。大多数方法只考虑全局视觉和文本特征之间的一个联合嵌入空间，而不考虑每种模态的局部结构。其他一些方法考虑分别由全局和局部特征组成的多个嵌入空间，忽略丰富的模态间相关性。我们提出了一种新颖的专家混合变压器 RoME，它将文本和视频分为三个层次；空间上下文、时间上下文和对象上下文的角色。我们利用基于变压器的注意力机制来充分利用全局和局部层面的视觉和文本嵌入，并结合专家的组合来考虑模态间和结构的相关性。结果表明，在没有预训练的情况下，在相同的视觉主干下，我们的方法优于 YouCook2 和 MSR-VTT 数据集上最先进的方法。最后，我们进行了广泛的消融研究以阐明我们的设计选择。 本文提出一种基于角色感知的混合专家Transformer模型RoME，用于提升文本到视频检索的准确性。 Burak Satar,Hongyuan Zhu,Hanwang Zhang,Joo Hwee Lim cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

title: Repository-Level Prompt Generation for Large Language Models of Code
title_zh: 大型代码语言模型的存储库级提示生成
abstract: With the success of large language models (LLMs) of code and their use as code assistants (e.g. Codex used in GitHub Copilot), techniques for introducing domain-specific knowledge in the prompt design process become important. In this work, we propose a framework called Repo-Level Prompt Generator that learns to generate example-specific prompts using prompt proposals. The prompt proposals take context from the entire repository, thereby incorporating both the structure of the repository and the context from other relevant files (e.g. imports, parent class files). Our technique doesn't require any access to the weights of the LLM, making it applicable in cases where we only have black-box access to the LLM. We conduct experiments on the task of single-line code-autocompletion using code repositories taken from Google Code archives. We demonstrate that an oracle constructed from our prompt proposals gives a remarkably high relative improvement of 36% over Codex, showing the quality of these proposals. Further, we show that when we train a model to predict a prompt proposal, we can achieve significant performance gains over Codex and other baselines. We release our code, data, and trained checkpoints at: \url{https://github.com/shrivastavadisha/repo_level_prompt_generation}.
summary: With the success of large language models (LLMs) of code and their use as code assistants (e.g. Codex used in GitHub Copilot), techniques for introducing domain-specific knowledge in the prompt design process become important. In this work, we propose a framework called Repo-Level Prompt Generator that learns to generate example-specific prompts using prompt proposals. The prompt proposals take context from the entire repository, thereby incorporating both the structure of the repository and the context from other relevant files (e.g. imports, parent class files). Our technique doesn't require any access to the weights of the LLM, making it applicable in cases where we only have black-box access to the LLM. We conduct experiments on the task of single-line code-autocompletion using code repositories taken from Google Code archives. We demonstrate that an oracle constructed from our prompt proposals gives a remarkably high relative improvement of 36% over Codex, showing the quality of these proposals. Further, we show that when we train a model to predict a prompt proposal, we can achieve significant performance gains over Codex and other baselines. We release our code, data, and trained checkpoints at: \url{https://github.com/shrivastavadisha/repo_level_prompt_generation}.
abstract_zh: 随着大型代码语言模型 (LLM) 的成功及其作为代码助手的使用（例如 GitHub Copilot 中使用的 Codex），在提示设计过程中引入特定领域知识的技术变得非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 Repo-Level Prompt Generator 的框架，它学习使用提示提案生成特定于示例的提示。提示建议从整个存储库中获取上下文，从而合并存储库的结构和其他相关文件（例如导入、父类文件）的上下文。我们的技术不需要访问 LLM 的权重，因此适用于我们只能黑盒访问 LLM 的情况。我们使用来自 Google Code 档案的代码存储库对单行代码自动完成任务进行实验。我们证明，根据我们的即时提案构建的预言机相对 Codex 具有 36% 的显着提高，显示了这些提案的质量。此外，我们还表明，当我们训练模型来预测即时提案时，我们可以实现比 Codex 和其他基线显着的性能提升。我们在以下位置发布代码、数据和经过训练的检查点：\url{https://github.com/shrivastavadisha/repo_level_prompt_ Generation}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Repo-Level Prompt Generator的框架，通过利用整个代码仓库的上下文信息生成特定示例的提示，以提升代码补全任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着代码大语言模型（如Codex）的成功应用，如何在提示设计中有效引入领域知识成为关键问题。传统方法依赖模型权重，而实际场景中常需黑盒访问模型，因此需开发无需模型权重的提示生成方法。
AI.method: 框架通过分析整个仓库的结构及相关文件（如导入语句、父类文件）的上下文生成提示提案，并训练模型预测这些提案，无需访问LLM权重。
AI.result: 在Google代码仓库的单行代码补全任务中，基于提案的oracle方法相较Codex提升36%；训练后的模型也显著优于Codex及其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用仓库级上下文生成提示能显著提升代码补全效果，且方法适用于黑盒场景。研究结果表明，结构化上下文信息对提示质量有重要影响。

title: Perceptual Conversational Head Generation with Regularized Driver and Enhanced Renderer
title_zh: 具有正则化驱动程序和增强渲染器的感知会话头部生成
comment: Ailin and Zhewei contributed equally to this work. ACM MM22 workshop paper
comments: Ailin and Zhewei contributed equally to this work. ACM MM22 workshop paper
abstract: This paper reports our solution for ACM Multimedia ViCo 2022 Conversational Head Generation Challenge, which aims to generate vivid face-to-face conversation videos based on audio and reference images. Our solution focuses on training a generalized audio-to-head driver using regularization and assembling a high-visual quality renderer. We carefully tweak the audio-to-behavior model and post-process the generated video using our foreground-background fusion module. We get first place in the listening head generation track and second place in the talking head generation track on the official leaderboard. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/MM2022-ViCoPerceptualHeadGeneration.
summary: This paper reports our solution for ACM Multimedia ViCo 2022 Conversational Head Generation Challenge, which aims to generate vivid face-to-face conversation videos based on audio and reference images. Our solution focuses on training a generalized audio-to-head driver using regularization and assembling a high-visual quality renderer. We carefully tweak the audio-to-behavior model and post-process the generated video using our foreground-background fusion module. We get first place in the listening head generation track and second place in the talking head generation track on the official leaderboard. Our code is available at https://github.com/megvii-research/MM2022-ViCoPerceptualHeadGeneration.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了我们针对 ACM Multimedia ViCo 2022 Conversational Head Generation Challenge 的解决方案，该解决方案旨在基于音频和参考图像生成生动的面对面对话视频。我们的解决方案侧重于使用正则化来训练通用音频到头部驱动程序并组装高视觉质量渲染器。我们仔细调整音频到行为模型，并使用前景-背景融合模块对生成的视频进行后处理。在官方排行榜上，我们在聆听头部生成赛道中获得第一名，在说话头部生成赛道中获得第二名。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/MM2022-ViCoPerceptualHeadGeneration 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频和参考图像生成生动面对面对话视频的方法，通过正则化驱动器和增强渲染器实现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成对话视频时存在质量不足和泛化能力差的问题，需提升视觉真实感和音频行为对齐精度。
AI.method: 训练带正则化的音频到头部驱动模型，结合高质量渲染器，并通过前景-背景融合模块优化视频后处理。
AI.result: 在ACM Multimedia ViCo 2022挑战赛中，获得聆听头部生成第一名和对话头部生成第二名。
AI.conclusion: 正则化驱动与增强渲染的结合有效提升了生成质量，代码已开源供研究复现。

title: On Comparison of Encoders for Attention based End to End Speech Recognition in Standalone and Rescoring Mode
title_zh: 基于注意力的端到端语音识别编码器在独立模式和重评分模式下的比较
abstract: The streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) models are more popular and suitable for voice-based applications. However, non-streaming models provide better performance as they look at the entire audio context. To leverage the benefits of the non-streaming model in streaming applications like voice search, it is commonly used in second pass re-scoring mode. The candidate hypothesis generated using steaming models is re-scored using a non-streaming model. In this work, we evaluate the non-streaming attention-based end-to-end ASR models on the Flipkart voice search task in both standalone and re-scoring modes. These models are based on Listen-Attend-Spell (LAS) encoder-decoder architecture. We experiment with different encoder variations based on LSTM, Transformer, and Conformer. We compare the latency requirements of these models along with their performance. Overall we show that the Transformer model offers acceptable WER with the lowest latency requirements. We report a relative WER improvement of around 16% with the second pass LAS re-scoring with latency overhead under 5ms. We also highlight the importance of CNN front-end with Transformer architecture to achieve comparable word error rates (WER). Moreover, we observe that in the second pass re-scoring mode all the encoders provide similar benefits whereas the difference in performance is prominent in standalone text generation mode.
summary: The streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) models are more popular and suitable for voice-based applications. However, non-streaming models provide better performance as they look at the entire audio context. To leverage the benefits of the non-streaming model in streaming applications like voice search, it is commonly used in second pass re-scoring mode. The candidate hypothesis generated using steaming models is re-scored using a non-streaming model. In this work, we evaluate the non-streaming attention-based end-to-end ASR models on the Flipkart voice search task in both standalone and re-scoring modes. These models are based on Listen-Attend-Spell (LAS) encoder-decoder architecture. We experiment with different encoder variations based on LSTM, Transformer, and Conformer. We compare the latency requirements of these models along with their performance. Overall we show that the Transformer model offers acceptable WER with the lowest latency requirements. We report a relative WER improvement of around 16% with the second pass LAS re-scoring with latency overhead under 5ms. We also highlight the importance of CNN front-end with Transformer architecture to achieve comparable word error rates (WER). Moreover, we observe that in the second pass re-scoring mode all the encoders provide similar benefits whereas the difference in performance is prominent in standalone text generation mode.
abstract_zh: 流式自动语音识别（ASR）模型更流行并且适合基于语音的应用。然而，非流模型在考虑整个音频上下文时提供了更好的性能。为了在语音搜索等流式应用程序中利用非流式模型的优势，它通常用于第二遍重新评分模式。使用非流模型对使用流模型生成的候选假设进行重新评分。在这项工作中，我们在独立和重新评分模式下评估 Flipkart 语音搜索任务上的非流式基于注意力的端到端 ASR 模型。这些模型基于监听-参与-拼写 (LAS) 编码器-解码器架构。我们尝试基于 LSTM、Transformer 和 Conformer 的不同编码器变体。我们比较这些模型的延迟要求及其性能。总的来说，我们表明 Transformer 模型提供了可接受的 WER 和最低的延迟要求。我们报告第二次 LAS 重新评分的相对 WER 提高了约 16%，延迟开销低于 5 毫秒。我们还强调了具有 Transformer 架构的 CNN 前端对于实现可比较的单词错误率 (WER) 的重要性。此外，我们观察到，在第二遍重新评分模式中，所有编码器都提供类似的好处，而在独立文本生成模式中，性能差异很明显。

AI.tldr: 本文在Flipkart语音搜索任务中评估了非流式注意力机制端到端ASR模型在独立模式和重打分模式下的性能，比较了LSTM、Transformer和Conformer等不同编码器的延迟和效果。
AI.motivation: 非流式模型性能更优但无法用于流式应用，需通过重打分模式结合流式模型以兼顾性能与实时性，需验证不同编码器在两种模式下的适用性。
AI.method: 基于LAS架构，采用LSTM、Transformer和Conformer编码器，在独立模式和重打分模式下进行实验，对比词错误率（WER）和延迟，并分析CNN前端对Transformer性能的影响。
AI.result: Transformer模型在保持最低延迟的同时实现16%的相对WER提升，CNN前端对Transformer效果关键；重打分模式下各编码器性能相近，独立模式下差异显著。
AI.conclusion: Transformer编码器在重打分模式中兼具低延迟与高精度，CNN前端优化不可或缺；重打分模式可弱化编码器性能差异，更适合实际应用部署。

search_text: On Comparison of Encoders for Attention based End to End Speech Recognition in Standalone and Rescoring Mode 基于注意力的端到端语音识别编码器在独立模式和重评分模式下的比较 The streaming automatic speech recognition (ASR) models are more popular and suitable for voice-based applications. However, non-streaming models provide better performance as they look at the entire audio context. To leverage the benefits of the non-streaming model in streaming applications like voice search, it is commonly used in second pass re-scoring mode. The candidate hypothesis generated using steaming models is re-scored using a non-streaming model. In this work, we evaluate the non-streaming attention-based end-to-end ASR models on the Flipkart voice search task in both standalone and re-scoring modes. These models are based on Listen-Attend-Spell (LAS) encoder-decoder architecture. We experiment with different encoder variations based on LSTM, Transformer, and Conformer. We compare the latency requirements of these models along with their performance. Overall we show that the Transformer model offers acceptable WER with the lowest latency requirements. We report a relative WER improvement of around 16% with the second pass LAS re-scoring with latency overhead under 5ms. We also highlight the importance of CNN front-end with Transformer architecture to achieve comparable word error rates (WER). Moreover, we observe that in the second pass re-scoring mode all the encoders provide similar benefits whereas the difference in performance is prominent in standalone text generation mode. 流式自动语音识别（ASR）模型更流行并且适合基于语音的应用。然而，非流模型在考虑整个音频上下文时提供了更好的性能。为了在语音搜索等流式应用程序中利用非流式模型的优势，它通常用于第二遍重新评分模式。使用非流模型对使用流模型生成的候选假设进行重新评分。在这项工作中，我们在独立和重新评分模式下评估 Flipkart 语音搜索任务上的非流式基于注意力的端到端 ASR 模型。这些模型基于监听-参与-拼写 (LAS) 编码器-解码器架构。我们尝试基于 LSTM、Transformer 和 Conformer 的不同编码器变体。我们比较这些模型的延迟要求及其性能。总的来说，我们表明 Transformer 模型提供了可接受的 WER 和最低的延迟要求。我们报告第二次 LAS 重新评分的相对 WER 提高了约 16%，延迟开销低于 5 毫秒。我们还强调了具有 Transformer 架构的 CNN 前端对于实现可比较的单词错误率 (WER) 的重要性。此外，我们观察到，在第二遍重新评分模式中，所有编码器都提供类似的好处，而在独立文本生成模式中，性能差异很明显。 本文在Flipkart语音搜索任务中评估了非流式注意力机制端到端ASR模型在独立模式和重打分模式下的性能，比较了LSTM、Transformer和Conformer等不同编码器的延迟和效果。 Raviraj Joshi,Subodh Kumar cs.SD,cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Hardness of Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines
title_zh: 不相关机器上的区间调度的难度
abstract: We provide new (parameterized) computational hardness results for Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines. It is a classical scheduling problem motivated from just-in-time or lean manufacturing, where the goal is to complete jobs exactly at their deadline. We are given $n$ jobs and $m$ machines. Each job has a deadline, a weight, and a processing time that may be different on each machine. The goal is find a schedule that maximized the total weight of jobs completed exactly at their deadline. Note that this uniquely defines a processing time interval for each job on each machine. Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines is closely related to coloring interval graphs and has been thoroughly studied for several decades. However, as pointed out by Mnich and van Bevern [Computers \& Operations Research, 2018], the parameterized complexity for the number $m$ of machines as a parameter remained open. We resolve this by showing that Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the number $m$ of machines. To this end, we prove W[1]-hardness with respect to $m$ of the special case where we have parallel machines with eligible machine sets for jobs. This answers Open Problem 8 of Mnich and van Bevern's list of 15 open problems in the parameterized complexity of scheduling [Computers \& Operations Research, 2018]. Furthermore, we resolve the computational complexity status of the unweighted version of Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines by proving that it is NP-complete. This answers an open question by Sung and Vlach [Journal of Scheduling, 2005].
summary: We provide new (parameterized) computational hardness results for Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines. It is a classical scheduling problem motivated from just-in-time or lean manufacturing, where the goal is to complete jobs exactly at their deadline. We are given $n$ jobs and $m$ machines. Each job has a deadline, a weight, and a processing time that may be different on each machine. The goal is find a schedule that maximized the total weight of jobs completed exactly at their deadline. Note that this uniquely defines a processing time interval for each job on each machine. Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines is closely related to coloring interval graphs and has been thoroughly studied for several decades. However, as pointed out by Mnich and van Bevern [Computers \& Operations Research, 2018], the parameterized complexity for the number $m$ of machines as a parameter remained open. We resolve this by showing that Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the number $m$ of machines. To this end, we prove W[1]-hardness with respect to $m$ of the special case where we have parallel machines with eligible machine sets for jobs. This answers Open Problem 8 of Mnich and van Bevern's list of 15 open problems in the parameterized complexity of scheduling [Computers \& Operations Research, 2018]. Furthermore, we resolve the computational complexity status of the unweighted version of Interval Scheduling on Unrelated Machines by proving that it is NP-complete. This answers an open question by Sung and Vlach [Journal of Scheduling, 2005].
abstract_zh: 我们为不相关机器上的间隔调度提供新的（参数化）计算难度结果。这是一个源自准时生产或精益制造的经典调度问题，其目标是在截止日期前准确完成工作。我们获得了 $n$ 个工作岗位和 $m$ 台机器。每个作业都有截止日期、权重和处理时间，这些在每台机器上可能有所不同。目标是找到一个时间表，使在截止日期前完成的工作总重量最大化。请注意，这唯一地定义了每台机器上每个作业的处理时间间隔。不相关机器上的区间调度与着色区间图密切相关，并且已经被深入研究了几十年。然而，正如 Mnich 和 van Bevern [Computers \& Operations Research, 2018] 所指出的，作为参数的机器数量 $m$ 的参数化复杂性仍然是开放的。我们通过证明当由机器数量 $m$ 参数化时，不相关机器上的间隔调度是 W[1]-hard 的，从而解决了这个问题。为此，我们证明了特殊情况下的 W[1]-硬度 $m$，其中我们拥有具有合格作业机器集的并行机器。这回答了 Mnich 和 van Bevern 在调度的参数化复杂性方面列出的 15 个开放问题的开放问题 8 [Computers \& Operations Research, 2018]。此外，我们通过证明不相关机器上的间隔调度的未加权版本是 NP 完全的来解决其计算复杂性状态。这回答了 Sung 和 Vlach [Journal of Scheduling, 2005] 提出的一个悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无关机器上的区间调度问题的计算复杂性，特别是针对机器数量作为参数的参数化复杂性。
AI.motivation: 区间调度问题源于准时制或精益制造，需在截止时间完成任务。此前关于机器数量参数的参数化复杂性及无权重版本的复杂性仍未解决，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂性分析，证明以机器数量为参数时问题属于W[1]-难，并利用并行机器的特殊情形进行归约；同时采用NP完全性证明方法处理无权重情况。
AI.result: 证明了区间调度问题在机器数量参数下为W[1]-难，解决了Mnich等提出的开放问题8；并证明无权重版本为NP完全，回答了Sung等的开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了两个长期未决的开放问题，明确了区间调度问题在参数化和经典复杂性层面的计算难度边界。

authors_text: Unaiza Sajid,Rizwan Ahmed Khan,Shahid Munir Shah,Sheeraz Arif
title: Breast Cancer Classification using Deep Learned Features Boosted with Handcrafted Features
title_zh: 使用手工特征增强的深度学习特征进行乳腺癌分类
abstract: Breast cancer is one of the leading causes of death among women across the globe. It is difficult to treat if detected at advanced stages, however, early detection can significantly increase chances of survival and improves lives of millions of women. Given the widespread prevalence of breast cancer, it is of utmost importance for the research community to come up with the framework for early detection, classification and diagnosis. Artificial intelligence research community in coordination with medical practitioners are developing such frameworks to automate the task of detection. With the surge in research activities coupled with availability of large datasets and enhanced computational powers, it expected that AI framework results will help even more clinicians in making correct predictions. In this article, a novel framework for classification of breast cancer using mammograms is proposed. The proposed framework combines robust features extracted from novel Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) features with handcrafted features including HOG (Histogram of Oriented Gradients) and LBP (Local Binary Pattern). The obtained results on CBIS-DDSM dataset exceed state of the art.
summary: Breast cancer is one of the leading causes of death among women across the globe. It is difficult to treat if detected at advanced stages, however, early detection can significantly increase chances of survival and improves lives of millions of women. Given the widespread prevalence of breast cancer, it is of utmost importance for the research community to come up with the framework for early detection, classification and diagnosis. Artificial intelligence research community in coordination with medical practitioners are developing such frameworks to automate the task of detection. With the surge in research activities coupled with availability of large datasets and enhanced computational powers, it expected that AI framework results will help even more clinicians in making correct predictions. In this article, a novel framework for classification of breast cancer using mammograms is proposed. The proposed framework combines robust features extracted from novel Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) features with handcrafted features including HOG (Histogram of Oriented Gradients) and LBP (Local Binary Pattern). The obtained results on CBIS-DDSM dataset exceed state of the art.
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌是全球女性死亡的主要原因之一。如果在晚期发现，则很难治疗，但是，早期发现可以显着增加生存机会并改善数百万妇女的生活。鉴于乳腺癌的广泛流行，研究界提出早期检测、分类和诊断的框架至关重要。人工智能研究社区与医疗从业者合作正在开发此类框架来自动执行检测任务。随着研究活动的激增，加上大型数据集的可用性和计算能力的增强，预计人工智能框架的结果将帮助更多的临床医生做出正确的预测。在本文中，提出了一种使用乳房 X 光检查对乳腺癌进行分类的新框架。所提出的框架将从新颖的卷积神经网络（CNN）特征中提取的鲁棒特征与手工特征（包括 HOG（定向梯度直方图）和 LBP（局部二值模式））结合起来。在 CBIS-DDSM 数据集上获得的结果超出了现有技术水平。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合深度学习特征与手工特征的乳腺癌分类框架，以提高分类准确率
AI.motivation: 乳腺癌早期检测对提高生存率至关重要，现有方法在准确性和泛化能力上存在不足，需结合深度学习与传统特征以提升性能
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的深度特征与HOG、LBP等手工特征，通过特征级融合进行分类
AI.result: 在CBIS-DDSM数据集上的实验结果优于当前最先进的方法

search_text: Breast Cancer Classification using Deep Learned Features Boosted with Handcrafted Features 使用手工特征增强的深度学习特征进行乳腺癌分类 Breast cancer is one of the leading causes of death among women across the globe. It is difficult to treat if detected at advanced stages, however, early detection can significantly increase chances of survival and improves lives of millions of women. Given the widespread prevalence of breast cancer, it is of utmost importance for the research community to come up with the framework for early detection, classification and diagnosis. Artificial intelligence research community in coordination with medical practitioners are developing such frameworks to automate the task of detection. With the surge in research activities coupled with availability of large datasets and enhanced computational powers, it expected that AI framework results will help even more clinicians in making correct predictions. In this article, a novel framework for classification of breast cancer using mammograms is proposed. The proposed framework combines robust features extracted from novel Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) features with handcrafted features including HOG (Histogram of Oriented Gradients) and LBP (Local Binary Pattern). The obtained results on CBIS-DDSM dataset exceed state of the art. 乳腺癌是全球女性死亡的主要原因之一。如果在晚期发现，则很难治疗，但是，早期发现可以显着增加生存机会并改善数百万妇女的生活。鉴于乳腺癌的广泛流行，研究界提出早期检测、分类和诊断的框架至关重要。人工智能研究社区与医疗从业者合作正在开发此类框架来自动执行检测任务。随着研究活动的激增，加上大型数据集的可用性和计算能力的增强，预计人工智能框架的结果将帮助更多的临床医生做出正确的预测。在本文中，提出了一种使用乳房 X 光检查对乳腺癌进行分类的新框架。所提出的框架将从新颖的卷积神经网络（CNN）特征中提取的鲁棒特征与手工特征（包括 HOG（定向梯度直方图）和 LBP（局部二值模式））结合起来。在 CBIS-DDSM 数据集上获得的结果超出了现有技术水平。 提出一种结合深度学习特征与手工特征的乳腺癌分类框架，以提高分类准确率 Unaiza Sajid,Rizwan Ahmed Khan,Shahid Munir Shah,Sheeraz Arif eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yassir Zardoua,Bilal Sebbar,Moussab Chbeine,Abdelali Astito,Mohammed Boulaala
title: Role and Integration of Image Processing Systems in Maritime Target Tracking
title_zh: 图像处理系统在海上目标跟踪中的作用和集成
abstract: In recent years, maritime traffic has increased, especially in seaborne trade. To ensure safety, security, and environmental protection, various systems have been deployed, often combining data for improved effectiveness. One key application of this combined data is tracking targets at sea, where the Automatic Identification System (AIS) and X-band marine radar are crucial. Recently, there has been growing interest in using visual data from cameras to enhance tracking. This has led to the development of several tracking algorithms based on image processing. While much of the existing literature addresses data fusion, there hasn't been much focus on why integrating image processing systems is important given the existence of the other systems. In our paper, we aim to analyze these surveillance systems and highlight the reasons for integrating image processing systems. Our main goal is to show how this integration can improve maritime security, offering practical insights into enhancing safety and protection at sea.

To ensure safety, security, and environmental protection, various systems have been deployed, often combining data for improved effectiveness. Recently, there has been growing interest in using visual data from cameras to enhance tracking. This has led to the development of several tracking algorithms based on image processing. While much of the existing literature addresses data fusion, there hasn't been much focus on why integrating image processing systems is important given the existence of the other systems. In our paper, we aim to analyze these surveillance systems and highlight the reasons for integrating image processing systems. Our main goal is to show how this integration can improve maritime security, offering practical insights into enhancing safety and protection at sea.
abstract_zh: 近年来，海上交通量不断增加，特别是海上贸易。为了确保安全、安保和环境保护，已经部署了各种系统，通常结合数据以提高有效性。这种组合数据的一个关键应用是跟踪海上目标，其中自动识别系统 (AIS) 和 X 波段海洋雷达至关重要。最近，人们对使用摄像机的视觉数据来增强跟踪越来越感兴趣。这导致了几种基于图像处理的跟踪算法的发展。虽然许多现有文献都讨论了数据融合，但考虑到其他系统的存在，并没有太多关注为什么集成图像处理系统很重要。在我们的论文中，我们的目标是分析这些监控系统并强调集成图像处理系统的原因。我们的主要目标是展示这种整合如何改善海上安全，为加强海上安全和保护提供实用见解。

AI.tldr: 本文分析图像处理系统在海上目标跟踪中的作用及整合重要性，探讨其如何提升海上安全。
AI.motivation: 随着海上交通增长，现有AIS和雷达系统存在局限，而整合图像处理系统的研究不足，需明确其必要性以增强安全。
AI.method: 通过分析现有监控系统（AIS、雷达）与图像处理技术的对比，评估整合视觉数据对目标跟踪的增强效果。
AI.result: 整合图像处理系统可有效提升海上目标跟踪精度与安全性，为实际应用提供优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 图像处理系统与传统传感器融合具有显著价值，未来需进一步探索其在复杂海况下的应用与优化策略。

authors_text: Yongchun Zhu,Qiang Sheng,Juan Cao,Qiong Nan,Kai Shu,Minghui Wu,Jindong Wang,Fuzhen Zhuang
title: Memory-Guided Multi-View Multi-Domain Fake News Detection
title_zh: 记忆引导的多视图多域假新闻检测
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering (TKDE)
abstract: The wide spread of fake news is increasingly threatening both individuals and society. Great efforts have been made for automatic fake news detection on a single domain (e.g., politics). However, correlations exist commonly across multiple news domains, and thus it is promising to simultaneously detect fake news of multiple domains. Based on our analysis, we pose two challenges in multi-domain fake news detection: 1) domain shift, caused by the discrepancy among domains in terms of words, emotions, styles, etc. 2) domain labeling incompleteness, stemming from the real-world categorization that only outputs one single domain label, regardless of topic diversity of a news piece. In this paper, we propose a Memory-guided Multi-view Multi-domain Fake News Detection Framework (M$^3$FEND) to address these two challenges. We model news pieces from a multi-view perspective, including semantics, emotion, and style. Specifically, we propose a Domain Memory Bank to enrich domain information which could discover potential domain labels based on seen news pieces and model domain characteristics. Then, with enriched domain information as input, a Domain Adapter could adaptively aggregate discriminative information from multiple views for news in various domains. Extensive offline experiments on English and Chinese datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of M$^3$FEND, and online tests verify its superiority in practice. Our code is available at https://github.com/ICTMCG/M3FEND.
summary: The wide spread of fake news is increasingly threatening both individuals and society. Great efforts have been made for automatic fake news detection on a single domain (e.g., politics). However, correlations exist commonly across multiple news domains, and thus it is promising to simultaneously detect fake news of multiple domains. Based on our analysis, we pose two challenges in multi-domain fake news detection: 1) domain shift, caused by the discrepancy among domains in terms of words, emotions, styles, etc. 2) domain labeling incompleteness, stemming from the real-world categorization that only outputs one single domain label, regardless of topic diversity of a news piece. In this paper, we propose a Memory-guided Multi-view Multi-domain Fake News Detection Framework (M$^3$FEND) to address these two challenges. We model news pieces from a multi-view perspective, including semantics, emotion, and style. Specifically, we propose a Domain Memory Bank to enrich domain information which could discover potential domain labels based on seen news pieces and model domain characteristics. Then, with enriched domain information as input, a Domain Adapter could adaptively aggregate discriminative information from multiple views for news in various domains. Extensive offline experiments on English and Chinese datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of M$^3$FEND, and online tests verify its superiority in practice. Our code is available at https://github.com/ICTMCG/M3FEND.
abstract_zh: 假新闻的广泛传播日益威胁着个人和社会。人们在单个领域（例如政治）的自动假新闻检测方面做出了巨大的努力。然而，多个新闻领域普遍存在相关性，因此同时检测多个领域的假新闻是有希望的。根据我们的分析，我们在多领域假新闻检测中提出了两个挑战：1）领域转移，由领域之间在单词、情感、风格等方面的差异引起。2）领域标签不完整，源于现实世界的分类，无论新闻片段的主题多样性如何，只输出一个领域标签。在本文中，我们提出了一种记忆引导的多视图多域假新闻检测框架（M$^3$FEND）来解决这两个挑战。我们从多视角对新闻片段进行建模，包括语义、情感和风格。具体来说，我们提出了一个领域内存库来丰富领域信息，它可以根据看到的新闻片段和模型领域特征发现潜在的领域标签。然后，以丰富的领域信息作为输入，域适配器可以自适应地聚合来自不同领域新闻的多个视图的判别信息。在英文和中文数据集上进行的大量离线实验证明了M$^3$FEND的有效性，在线测试验证了其在实践中的优越性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ICTMCG/M3FEND 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于记忆引导的多视角多领域虚假新闻检测框架M³FEND，解决跨领域虚假新闻检测中的领域偏移和标签不完整问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单领域虚假新闻检测方法难以应对多领域间存在的语义、情感和风格差异，且现实场景中新闻领域标签标注不完整，需探索跨领域关联性以提升检测效果。
AI.method: 通过多视角建模（语义、情感、风格）结合领域记忆库（Domain Memory Bank）挖掘潜在领域标签，并利用领域适配器（Domain Adapter）自适应聚合多视角特征以适应不同领域。
AI.result: 在英文和中文数据集上的离线实验及在线测试均验证了M³FEND的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: M³FEND通过多视角特征融合与领域记忆增强，有效解决了多领域虚假新闻检测中的领域偏移和标签不完整性挑战。
