Based on our analysis, we pose two challenges in multi-domain fake news detection: 1) domain shift, caused by the discrepancy among domains in terms of words, emotions, styles, etc. 2) domain labeling incompleteness, stemming from the real-world categorization that only outputs one single domain label, regardless of topic diversity of a news piece. In this paper, we propose a Memory-guided Multi-view Multi-domain Fake News Detection Framework (M$^3$FEND) to address these two challenges. We model news pieces from a multi-view perspective, including semantics, emotion, and style. Specifically, we propose a Domain Memory Bank to enrich domain information which could discover potential domain labels based on seen news pieces and model domain characteristics. Then, with enriched domain information as input, a Domain Adapter could adaptively aggregate discriminative information from multiple views for news in various domains. Extensive offline experiments on English and Chinese datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of M$^3$FEND, and online tests verify its superiority in practice. Our code is available at https://github.com/ICTMCG/M3FEND. 假新闻的广泛传播日益威胁着个人和社会。人们在单个领域（例如政治）的自动假新闻检测方面做出了巨大的努力。然而，多个新闻领域普遍存在相关性，因此同时检测多个领域的假新闻是有希望的。根据我们的分析，我们在多领域假新闻检测中提出了两个挑战：1）领域转移，由领域之间在单词、情感、风格等方面的差异引起。2）领域标签不完整，源于现实世界的分类，无论新闻片段的主题多样性如何，只输出一个领域标签。在本文中，我们提出了一种记忆引导的多视图多域假新闻检测框架（M$^3$FEND）来解决这两个挑战。我们从多视角对新闻片段进行建模，包括语义、情感和风格。具体来说，我们提出了一个领域内存库来丰富领域信息，它可以根据看到的新闻片段和模型领域特征发现潜在的领域标签。然后，以丰富的领域信息作为输入，域适配器可以自适应地聚合来自不同领域新闻的多个视图的判别信息。在英文和中文数据集上进行的大量离线实验证明了M$^3$FEND的有效性，在线测试验证了其在实践中的优越性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ICTMCG/M3FEND 获取。 本文提出一种基于记忆引导的多视角多领域虚假新闻检测框架M³FEND，解决跨领域虚假新闻检测中的领域偏移和标签不完整问题。 Yongchun Zhu,Qiang Sheng,Juan Cao,Qiong Nan,Kai Shu,Minghui Wu,Jindong Wang,Fuzhen Zhuang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Alexander Munteanu,Simon Omlor,Zhao Song,David P. Woodruff
title: Bounding the Width of Neural Networks via Coupled Initialization -- A Worst Case Analysis
title_zh: 通过耦合初始化限制神经网络的宽度——最坏情况分析
abstract: A common method in training neural networks is to initialize all the weights to be independent Gaussian vectors. We observe that by instead initializing the weights into independent pairs, where each pair consists of two identical Gaussian vectors, we can significantly improve the convergence analysis. While a similar technique has been studied for random inputs [Daniely, NeurIPS 2020], it has not been analyzed with arbitrary inputs. Using this technique, we show how to significantly reduce the number of neurons required for two-layer ReLU networks, both in the under-parameterized setting with logistic loss, from roughly $γ^{-8}$ [Ji and Telgarsky, ICLR 2020] to $γ^{-2}$, where $γ$ denotes the separation margin with a Neural Tangent Kernel, as well as in the over-parameterized setting with squared loss, from roughly $n^4$ [Song and Yang, 2019] to $n^2$, implicitly also improving the recent running time bound of [Brand, Peng, Song and Weinstein, ITCS 2021]. For the under-parameterized setting we also prove new lower bounds that improve upon prior work, and that under certain assumptions, are best possible.
summary: A common method in training neural networks is to initialize all the weights to be independent Gaussian vectors. We observe that by instead initializing the weights into independent pairs, where each pair consists of two identical Gaussian vectors, we can significantly improve the convergence analysis. While a similar technique has been studied for random inputs [Daniely, NeurIPS 2020], it has not been analyzed with arbitrary inputs. Using this technique, we show how to significantly reduce the number of neurons required for two-layer ReLU networks, both in the under-parameterized setting with logistic loss, from roughly $γ^{-8}$ [Ji and Telgarsky, ICLR 2020] to $γ^{-2}$, where $γ$ denotes the separation margin with a Neural Tangent Kernel, as well as in the over-parameterized setting with squared loss, from roughly $n^4$ [Song and Yang, 2019] to $n^2$, implicitly also improving the recent running time bound of [Brand, Peng, Song and Weinstein, ITCS 2021]. For the under-parameterized setting we also prove new lower bounds that improve upon prior work, and that under certain assumptions, are best possible.
abstract_zh: 训练神经网络的常用方法是将所有权重初始化为独立的高斯向量。我们观察到，通过将权重初始化为独立对（其中每对由两个相同的高斯向量组成），我们可以显着改进收敛分析。虽然已经针对随机输入研究了类似的技术 [Daniely, NeurIPS 2020]，但尚未对任意输入进行分析。使用这种技术，我们展示了如何显着减少两层 ReLU 网络所需的神经元数量，无论是在具有逻辑损失的欠参数化设置中，从大约 $γ^{-8}$ [Ji 和 Telgarsky，ICLR 2020] 到 $γ^{-2}$，其中 $γ$ 表示具有神经正切核的分离裕度，以及在具有平方损失的过度参数化设置中，从大约 $n^4$ [Song and Yang, 2019] 到 $n^2$，也隐含地改善了 [Brand, Peng, Song and Weinstein, ITCS 2021] 的最近运行时间限制。对于参数化不足的设置，我们还证明了新的下界，该下界改进了先前的工作，并且在某些假设下是最好的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过耦合初始化方法分析神经网络宽度的上界，提出了一种改进收敛分析的技术。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络训练中独立高斯初始化需要大量神经元，而耦合初始化能显著提升收敛效率，但此前未在任意输入下分析。
AI.method: 将权重初始化为独立的相同高斯向量对，结合神经切线核分离度γ分析两层ReLU网络的宽度需求。
AI.result: 在欠参数化设置下将所需神经元数从γ⁻⁸降至γ⁻²，在过参数化设置下从n⁴降至n²，并改进了现有运行时间界。
AI.conclusion: 耦合初始化有效降低了网络宽度需求，且在特定假设下达到理论最优下界，为网络设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Hao Bian,Zhuchen Shao,Yang Chen,Yifeng Wang,Haoqian Wang,Jian Zhang,Yongbing Zhang
title: Multiple Instance Learning with Mixed Supervision in Gleason Grading
title_zh: 格里森评分中混合监督的多实例学习
abstract: With the development of computational pathology, deep learning methods for Gleason grading through whole slide images (WSIs) have excellent prospects. Since the size of WSIs is extremely large, the image label usually contains only slide-level label or limited pixel-level labels. The current mainstream approach adopts multi-instance learning to predict Gleason grades. However, some methods only considering the slide-level label ignore the limited pixel-level labels containing rich local information. Furthermore, the method of additionally considering the pixel-level labels ignores the inaccuracy of pixel-level labels. To address these problems, we propose a mixed supervision Transformer based on the multiple instance learning framework. The model utilizes both slide-level label and instance-level labels to achieve more accurate Gleason grading at the slide level. The impact of inaccurate instance-level labels is further reduced by introducing an efficient random masking strategy in the mixed supervision training process. We achieve the state-of-the-art performance on the SICAPv2 dataset, and the visual analysis shows the accurate prediction results of instance level. The source code is available at https://github.com/bianhao123/Mixed_supervision.
summary: With the development of computational pathology, deep learning methods for Gleason grading through whole slide images (WSIs) have excellent prospects. Since the size of WSIs is extremely large, the image label usually contains only slide-level label or limited pixel-level labels. The current mainstream approach adopts multi-instance learning to predict Gleason grades. However, some methods only considering the slide-level label ignore the limited pixel-level labels containing rich local information. Furthermore, the method of additionally considering the pixel-level labels ignores the inaccuracy of pixel-level labels. To address these problems, we propose a mixed supervision Transformer based on the multiple instance learning framework. The model utilizes both slide-level label and instance-level labels to achieve more accurate Gleason grading at the slide level. The impact of inaccurate instance-level labels is further reduced by introducing an efficient random masking strategy in the mixed supervision training process. We achieve the state-of-the-art performance on the SICAPv2 dataset, and the visual analysis shows the accurate prediction results of instance level. The source code is available at https://github.com/bianhao123/Mixed_supervision.
abstract_zh: 随着计算病理学的发展，通过整个幻灯片图像（WSI）进行格里森分级的深度学习方法具有良好的前景。由于WSI的大小非常大，图像标签通常只包含幻灯片级标签或有限的像素级标签。目前主流方法采用多实例学习来预测格里森成绩。然而，一些仅考虑幻灯片级标签的方法忽略了包含丰富局部信息的有限像素级标签。此外，额外考虑像素级标签的方法忽略了像素级标签的不准确性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于多实例学习框架的混合监督 Transformer。该模型利用幻灯片级标签和实例级标签来在幻灯片级实现更准确的格里森分级。通过在混合监督训练过程中引入有效的随机屏蔽策略，进一步减少了不准确的实例级标签的影响。我们在 SICAPv2 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并且可视化分析显示了实例级别的准确预测结果。源代码位于https://github.com/bianhao123/Mixed_supervision。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合监督的Transformer模型，用于解决前列腺癌 Gleason 分级中的多实例学习问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用全切片图像（WSI）进行Gleason分级时，要么仅使用滑动级标签忽略像素级标签的局部信息，要么未考虑像素级标签的不准确性，导致分级效果受限。
AI.method: 设计混合监督Transformer框架，同时利用滑动级标签和实例级标签，并引入高效随机掩码策略降低实例级标签噪声影响。
AI.result: 在SICAPv2数据集上达到最先进性能，可视化分析验证了实例级预测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 混合监督方法有效整合多粒度标签信息，通过噪声鲁棒机制提升Gleason分级精度。

title: Applications of Recursively Defined Data Structures
title_zh: 递归定义数据结构的应用
comment: The paper originally appeared in the Australian Computer Journal (ISSN 0004-8917). The journal was published by the Australian Computer Society from 1967 to 1999
comments: The paper originally appeared in the Australian Computer Journal (ISSN 0004-8917). The journal was published by the Australian Computer Society from 1967 to 1999
abstract: A circular program contains a data structure whose definition is self-referential or recursive. The use of such a definition allows efficient functional programs to be written and can avoid repeated evaluations and the creation of intermediate data structures that would have to be garbage collected. This paper uses circular programs in various ways, to implement memo-structures and explicit search-trees to hold solutions to constraint-satisfaction problems.
summary: A circular program contains a data structure whose definition is self-referential or recursive. The use of such a definition allows efficient functional programs to be written and can avoid repeated evaluations and the creation of intermediate data structures that would have to be garbage collected. This paper uses circular programs in various ways, to implement memo-structures and explicit search-trees to hold solutions to constraint-satisfaction problems.
abstract_zh: 循环程序包含其定义是自引用或递归的数据结构。使用这样的定义允许编写高效的功能程序，并且可以避免重复评估和创建必须被垃圾收集的中间数据结构。本文以各种方式使用循环程序来实现备忘录结构和显式搜索树来保存约束满足问题的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了循环程序在实现记忆结构和显式搜索树中的应用，以提高解决约束满足问题的效率。
AI.motivation: 为了提高函数式程序的效率，避免重复计算和中间数据结构的创建，从而减少垃圾回收的负担。
AI.method: 通过使用循环程序，实现记忆结构和显式搜索树来存储约束满足问题的解。
AI.result: 成功实现了高效的函数式程序，减少了中间数据结构的生成，提高了约束满足问题的求解效率。
AI.conclusion: 循环程序在需要高效数据结构和避免重复计算的场景下具有显著优势，适用于解决约束满足问题。

search_text: Applications of Recursively Defined Data Structures 递归定义数据结构的应用 A circular program contains a data structure whose definition is self-referential or recursive. The use of such a definition allows efficient functional programs to be written and can avoid repeated evaluations and the creation of intermediate data structures that would have to be garbage collected. This paper uses circular programs in various ways, to implement memo-structures and explicit search-trees to hold solutions to constraint-satisfaction problems. 循环程序包含其定义是自引用或递归的数据结构。使用这样的定义允许编写高效的功能程序，并且可以避免重复评估和创建必须被垃圾收集的中间数据结构。本文以各种方式使用循环程序来实现备忘录结构和显式搜索树来保存约束满足问题的解决方案。 本文探讨了循环程序在实现记忆结构和显式搜索树中的应用，以提高解决约束满足问题的效率。 Lloyd Allison cs.DS,cs.PL

authors_text: HyunJin Kim,Jungwoo Shin,Alberto A. Del Barrio
title: CTMQ: Cyclic Training of Convolutional Neural Networks with Multiple Quantization Steps
title_zh: CTMQ：具有多个量化步骤的卷积神经网络的循环训练
abstract: This paper proposes a training method having multiple cyclic training for achieving enhanced performance in low-bit quantized convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Quantization is a popular method for obtaining lightweight CNNs, where the initialization with a pretrained model is widely used to overcome degraded performance in low-resolution quantization. However, large quantization errors between real values and their low-bit quantized ones cause difficulties in achieving acceptable performance for complex networks and large datasets. The proposed training method softly delivers the knowledge of pretrained models to low-bit quantized models in multiple quantization steps. In each quantization step, the trained weights of a model are used to initialize the weights of the next model with the quantization bit depth reduced by one. With small change of the quantization bit depth, the performance gap can be bridged, thus providing better weight initialization. In cyclic training, after training a low-bit quantized model, its trained weights are used in the initialization of its accurate model to be trained. By using better training ability of the accurate model in an iterative manner, the proposed method can produce enhanced trained weights for the low-bit quantized model in each cycle. Notably, the training method can advance Top-1 and Top-5 accuracies of the binarized ResNet-18 on the ImageNet dataset by 5.80% and 6.85%, respectively.
summary: This paper proposes a training method having multiple cyclic training for achieving enhanced performance in low-bit quantized convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Quantization is a popular method for obtaining lightweight CNNs, where the initialization with a pretrained model is widely used to overcome degraded performance in low-resolution quantization. However, large quantization errors between real values and their low-bit quantized ones cause difficulties in achieving acceptable performance for complex networks and large datasets. The proposed training method softly delivers the knowledge of pretrained models to low-bit quantized models in multiple quantization steps. In each quantization step, the trained weights of a model are used to initialize the weights of the next model with the quantization bit depth reduced by one. With small change of the quantization bit depth, the performance gap can be bridged, thus providing better weight initialization. In cyclic training, after training a low-bit quantized model, its trained weights are used in the initialization of its accurate model to be trained. By using better training ability of the accurate model in an iterative manner, the proposed method can produce enhanced trained weights for the low-bit quantized model in each cycle. Notably, the training method can advance Top-1 and Top-5 accuracies of the binarized ResNet-18 on the ImageNet dataset by 5.80% and 6.85%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种具有多次循环训练的训练方法，以实现低比特量化卷积神经网络（CNN）的增强性能。量化是获得轻量级 CNN 的一种流行方法，其中预训练模型的初始化被广泛用于克服低分辨率量化中性能下降的问题。然而，实际值与其低位量化值之间的大量化误差导致复杂网络和大型数据集难以实现可接受的性能。所提出的训练方法以多个量化步骤将预训练模型的知识轻柔地传递给低位量化模型。在每个量化步骤中，模型的训练权重用于初始化下一个模型的权重，量化位深度减一。通过量化位深度的微小变化，可以弥补性能差距，从而提供更好的权重初始化。在循环训练中，训练低位量化模型后，将其训练后的权重用于初始化其待训练的精确模型。通过以迭代的方式利用准确模型的更好的训练能力，所提出的方法可以在每个周期中为低位量化模型产生增强的训练权重。值得注意的是，该训练方法可以将 ImageNet 数据集上的二值化 ResNet-18 的 Top-1 和 Top-5 准确率分别提高 5.80% 和 6.85%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CTMQ的循环训练方法，通过多阶段量化步骤提升低比特量化卷积神经网络（CNN）的性能。
AI.motivation: 量化是实现轻量级CNN的常用方法，但低比特量化会导致较大的量化误差，影响复杂网络和大数据集的性能。传统初始化方法难以有效缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 在多个量化阶段中，使用前一阶段训练得到的权重初始化下一阶段的低比特量化模型（每次减少一位量化深度）。通过循环训练，低比特模型的训练权重反向初始化高精度模型，迭代优化低比特模型权重。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法使二值化ResNet-18的Top-1和Top-5准确率分别提升5.80%和6.85%。
AI.conclusion: CTMQ通过循环训练机制有效缩小量化性能差距，为低比特量化模型提供了更优的权重初始化方案，显著提升了模型性能。

authors_text: Jun-Teng Yang,Wen-Yuan Chen,Che-Hua Li,Scott C. -H. Huang,Hsiao-Chun Wu
title: APPFLChain: A Privacy Protection Distributed Artificial-Intelligence Architecture Based on Federated Learning and Consortium Blockchain
title_zh: APPFLChain：基于联邦学习和联盟链的隐私保护分布式人工智能架构
comment: We found that the simulation part in section V is not completed. We need to add more experiments to support it
comments: We found that the simulation part in section V is not completed. We need to add more experiments to support it
abstract: Recent research in Internet of things has been widely applied for industrial practices, fostering the exponential growth of data and connected devices. Henceforth, data-driven AI models would be accessed by different parties through certain data-sharing policies. However, most of the current training procedures rely on the centralized data-collection strategy and a single computational server. However, such a centralized scheme may lead to many issues. Customer data stored in a centralized database may be tampered with so the provenance and authenticity of data cannot be justified. Once the aforementioned security concerns occur, the credibility of the trained AI models would be questionable and even unfavorable outcomes might be produced at the test stage. Lately, blockchain and AI, the two core technologies in Industry 4.0 and Web 3.0, have been explored to facilitate the decentralized AI training strategy. To serve on this very purpose, we propose a new system architecture called APPFLChain, namely an integrated architecture of a Hyperledger Fabric-based blockchain and a federated-learning paradigm. Our proposed new system allows different parties to jointly train AI models and their customers or stakeholders are connected by a consortium blockchain-based network. Our new system can maintain a high degree of security and privacy as users do not need to share sensitive personal information to the server. For numerical evaluation, we simulate a real-world scenario to illustrate the whole operational process of APPFLChain. Simulation results show that taking advantage of the characteristics of consortium blockchain and federated learning, APPFLChain can demonstrate favorable properties including untamperability, traceability, privacy protection, and reliable decision-making.
summary: Recent research in Internet of things has been widely applied for industrial practices, fostering the exponential growth of data and connected devices. Henceforth, data-driven AI models would be accessed by different parties through certain data-sharing policies. However, most of the current training procedures rely on the centralized data-collection strategy and a single computational server. However, such a centralized scheme may lead to many issues. Customer data stored in a centralized database may be tampered with so the provenance and authenticity of data cannot be justified. Once the aforementioned security concerns occur, the credibility of the trained AI models would be questionable and even unfavorable outcomes might be produced at the test stage. Lately, blockchain and AI, the two core technologies in Industry 4.0 and Web 3.0, have been explored to facilitate the decentralized AI training strategy. To serve on this very purpose, we propose a new system architecture called APPFLChain, namely an integrated architecture of a Hyperledger Fabric-based blockchain and a federated-learning paradigm. Our proposed new system allows different parties to jointly train AI models and their customers or stakeholders are connected by a consortium blockchain-based network. Our new system can maintain a high degree of security and privacy as users do not need to share sensitive personal information to the server. For numerical evaluation, we simulate a real-world scenario to illustrate the whole operational process of APPFLChain. Simulation results show that taking advantage of the characteristics of consortium blockchain and federated learning, APPFLChain can demonstrate favorable properties including untamperability, traceability, privacy protection, and reliable decision-making.
abstract_zh: 物联网的最新研究已广泛应用于工业实践，促进了数据和连接设备的指数级增长。今后，不同各方将通过某些数据共享政策来访问数据驱动的人工智能模型。然而，当前大多数训练程序都依赖于集中式数据收集策略和单个计算服务器。然而，这种中心化的方案可能会导致很多问题。存储在集中数据库中的客户数据可能会被篡改，因此无法证明数据的来源和真实性。一旦出现上述安全问题，训练好的人工智能模型的可信度就会受到质疑，甚至在测试阶段可能会产生不利的结果。近年来，区块链和人工智能这两个工业4.0和Web 3.0的核心技术被探索，以促进去中心化的人工智能培训策略。为了实现这一目的，我们提出了一种名为 APPFLChain 的新系统架构，即基于 Hyperledger Fabric 的区块链和联邦学习范式的集成架构。我们提出的新系统允许不同各方共同训练人工智能模型，并且他们的客户或利益相关者通过基于联盟区块链的网络连接。我们的新系统可以保持高度的安全性和隐私性，因为用户不需要向服务器共享敏感的个人信息。为了进行数值评估，我们模拟了一个真实场景来说明 APPFLChain 的整个运行过程。仿真结果表明，利用联盟链和联邦学习的特点，APPFLChain能够展现出不可篡改、可追溯、隐私保护、决策可靠等良好特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于联邦学习和联盟区块链的隐私保护分布式人工智能架构APPFLChain，以解决传统集中式数据收集策略的安全性和隐私问题。
AI.motivation: 集中式数据收集和单服务器计算模式存在数据篡改风险，导致AI模型可信度下降，亟需通过去中心化技术保障数据溯源性与隐私安全。
AI.method: 融合Hyperledger Fabric联盟区块链与联邦学习框架，构建多方联合训练AI模型的系统架构，利用区块链实现数据不可篡改性和可追溯性，通过联邦学习避免敏感数据共享。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了APPFLChain在数据防篡改、可追溯性、隐私保护和可靠决策方面的有效性，满足工业级分布式AI训练需求。
AI.conclusion: APPFLChain通过区块链与联邦学习的集成，为工业4.0场景下的隐私保护型分布式AI提供了安全高效的解决方案。

motivation: 集中式数据收集和单服务器计算模式存在数据篡改风险，导致AI模型可信度下降，亟需通过去中心化技术保障数据溯源性与隐私安全。
method: 融合Hyperledger Fabric联盟区块链与联邦学习框架，构建多方联合训练AI模型的系统架构，利用区块链实现数据不可篡改性和可追溯性，通过联邦学习避免敏感数据共享。
result: 仿真结果验证了APPFLChain在数据防篡改、可追溯性、隐私保护和可靠决策方面的有效性，满足工业级分布式AI训练需求。
conclusion: APPFLChain通过区块链与联邦学习的集成，为工业4.0场景下的隐私保护型分布式AI提供了安全高效的解决方案。
search_text: APPFLChain: A Privacy Protection Distributed Artificial-Intelligence Architecture Based on Federated Learning and Consortium Blockchain APPFLChain：基于联邦学习和联盟链的隐私保护分布式人工智能架构 Recent research in Internet of things has been widely applied for industrial practices, fostering the exponential growth of data and connected devices. Henceforth, data-driven AI models would be accessed by different parties through certain data-sharing policies. However, most of the current training procedures rely on the centralized data-collection strategy and a single computational server. However, such a centralized scheme may lead to many issues. Customer data stored in a centralized database may be tampered with so the provenance and authenticity of data cannot be justified. Once the aforementioned security concerns occur, the credibility of the trained AI models would be questionable and even unfavorable outcomes might be produced at the test stage. Lately, blockchain and AI, the two core technologies in Industry 4.0 and Web 3.0, have been explored to facilitate the decentralized AI training strategy. To serve on this very purpose, we propose a new system architecture called APPFLChain, namely an integrated architecture of a Hyperledger Fabric-based blockchain and a federated-learning paradigm. Our proposed new system allows different parties to jointly train AI models and their customers or stakeholders are connected by a consortium blockchain-based network. Our new system can maintain a high degree of security and privacy as users do not need to share sensitive personal information to the server. For numerical evaluation, we simulate a real-world scenario to illustrate the whole operational process of APPFLChain. Simulation results show that taking advantage of the characteristics of consortium blockchain and federated learning, APPFLChain can demonstrate favorable properties including untamperability, traceability, privacy protection, and reliable decision-making. 物联网的最新研究已广泛应用于工业实践，促进了数据和连接设备的指数级增长。今后，不同各方将通过某些数据共享政策来访问数据驱动的人工智能模型。然而，当前大多数训练程序都依赖于集中式数据收集策略和单个计算服务器。然而，这种中心化的方案可能会导致很多问题。存储在集中数据库中的客户数据可能会被篡改，因此无法证明数据的来源和真实性。一旦出现上述安全问题，训练好的人工智能模型的可信度就会受到质疑，甚至在测试阶段可能会产生不利的结果。近年来，区块链和人工智能这两个工业4.0和Web 3.0的核心技术被探索，以促进去中心化的人工智能培训策略。为了实现这一目的，我们提出了一种名为 APPFLChain 的新系统架构，即基于 Hyperledger Fabric 的区块链和联邦学习范式的集成架构。我们提出的新系统允许不同各方共同训练人工智能模型，并且他们的客户或利益相关者通过基于联盟区块链的网络连接。我们的新系统可以保持高度的安全性和隐私性，因为用户不需要向服务器共享敏感的个人信息。为了进行数值评估，我们模拟了一个真实场景来说明 APPFLChain 的整个运行过程。仿真结果表明，利用联盟链和联邦学习的特点，APPFLChain能够展现出不可篡改、可追溯、隐私保护、决策可靠等良好特性。 本文提出一种基于联邦学习和联盟区块链的隐私保护分布式人工智能架构APPFLChain，以解决传统集中式数据收集策略的安全性和隐私问题。 Jun-Teng Yang,Wen-Yuan Chen,Che-Hua Li,Scott C. -H. Huang,Hsiao-Chun Wu cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.DB,cs.LG

title: Representative Teacher Keys for Knowledge Distillation Model Compression Based on Attention Mechanism for Image Classification
title_zh: 基于注意力机制的图像分类知识蒸馏模型压缩代表性教师要点
comment: eight pages, six figures, three tables
comments: eight pages, six figures, three tables
abstract: With the improvement of AI chips (e.g., GPU, TPU, and NPU) and the fast development of the Internet of Things (IoT), some robust deep neural networks (DNNs) are usually composed of millions or even hundreds of millions of parameters. Such a large model may not be suitable for directly deploying on low computation and low capacity units (e.g., edge devices). Knowledge distillation (KD) has recently been recognized as a powerful model compression method to decrease the model parameters effectively. The central concept of KD is to extract useful information from the feature maps of a large model (i.e., teacher model) as a reference to successfully train a small model (i.e., student model) in which the model size is much smaller than the teacher one. Although many KD methods have been proposed to utilize the information from the feature maps of intermediate layers in the teacher model, most did not consider the similarity of feature maps between the teacher model and the student model. As a result, it may make the student model learn useless information. Inspired by the attention mechanism, we propose a novel KD method called representative teacher key (RTK) that not only considers the similarity of feature maps but also filters out the useless information to improve the performance of the target student model. In the experiments, we validate our proposed method with several backbone networks (e.g., ResNet and WideResNet) and datasets (e.g., CIFAR10, CIFAR100, SVHN, and CINIC10). The results show that our proposed RTK can effectively improve the classification accuracy of the state-of-the-art attention-based KD method.
summary: With the improvement of AI chips (e.g., GPU, TPU, and NPU) and the fast development of the Internet of Things (IoT), some robust deep neural networks (DNNs) are usually composed of millions or even hundreds of millions of parameters. Such a large model may not be suitable for directly deploying on low computation and low capacity units (e.g., edge devices). Knowledge distillation (KD) has recently been recognized as a powerful model compression method to decrease the model parameters effectively. The central concept of KD is to extract useful information from the feature maps of a large model (i.e., teacher model) as a reference to successfully train a small model (i.e., student model) in which the model size is much smaller than the teacher one. Although many KD methods have been proposed to utilize the information from the feature maps of intermediate layers in the teacher model, most did not consider the similarity of feature maps between the teacher model and the student model. As a result, it may make the student model learn useless information. Inspired by the attention mechanism, we propose a novel KD method called representative teacher key (RTK) that not only considers the similarity of feature maps but also filters out the useless information to improve the performance of the target student model. In the experiments, we validate our proposed method with several backbone networks (e.g., ResNet and WideResNet) and datasets (e.g., CIFAR10, CIFAR100, SVHN, and CINIC10). The results show that our proposed RTK can effectively improve the classification accuracy of the state-of-the-art attention-based KD method.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能芯片（例如GPU、TPU和NPU）的改进和物联网（IoT）的快速发展，一些鲁棒的深度神经网络（DNN）通常由数百万甚至数亿个参数组成。如此大的模型可能不适合直接部署在低计算和低容量单元（例如边缘设备）上。知识蒸馏（KD）最近被认为是一种有效减少模型参数的强大模型压缩方法。 KD的核心概念是从大模型（即教师模型）的特征图中提取有用的信息，作为成功训练模型尺寸远小于教师模型的小模型（即学生模型）的参考。尽管已经提出了许多KD方法来利用教师模型中中间层特征图的信息，但大多数方法没有考虑教师模型和学生模型之间特征图的相似性。结果，它可能使学生模型学习无用的信息。受注意力机制的启发，我们提出了一种称为代表性教师密钥（RTK）的新型KD方法，该方法不仅考虑特征图的相似性，而且过滤掉无用信息以提高目标学生模型的性能。在实验中，我们使用多个骨干网络（例如 ResNet 和 WideResNet）和数据集（例如 CIFAR10、CIFAR100、SVHN 和 CINIC10）验证了我们提出的方法。结果表明，我们提出的 RTK 可以有效提高最先进的基于注意力的 KD 方法的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的代表性教师键（RTK）方法，用于知识蒸馏模型压缩，以提高图像分类中小模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法未充分考虑教师模型与学生模型特征图的相似性，导致学生模型可能学习到无效信息，影响压缩效果。
AI.method: 受注意力机制启发，提出RTK方法，通过筛选教师模型特征图中的关键信息并保留与学生模型相似的特征，过滤无效信息以提升学生模型性能。
AI.result: 在ResNet、WideResNet等网络及CIFAR10、CIFAR100等数据集上的实验表明，RTK方法有效提升了现有基于注意力的知识蒸馏方法的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: RTK方法通过结合注意力机制与特征相似性筛选，为图像分类任务中的模型压缩提供了更高效的知识蒸馏方案。

title: Calibrated Nonparametric Scan Statistics for Anomalous Pattern Detection in Graphs
title_zh: 用于图形中异常模式检测的校准非参数扫描统计
abstract: We propose a new approach, the calibrated nonparametric scan statistic (CNSS), for more accurate detection of anomalous patterns in large-scale, real-world graphs. Scan statistics identify connected subgraphs that are interesting or unexpected through maximization of a likelihood ratio statistic; in particular, nonparametric scan statistics (NPSSs) identify subgraphs with a higher than expected proportion of individually significant nodes. However, we show that recently proposed NPSS methods are miscalibrated, failing to account for the maximization of the statistic over the multiplicity of subgraphs. This results in both reduced detection power for subtle signals, and low precision of the detected subgraph even for stronger signals. Thus we develop a new statistical approach to recalibrate NPSSs, correctly adjusting for multiple hypothesis testing and taking the underlying graph structure into account. While the recalibration, based on randomization testing, is computationally expensive, we propose both an efficient (approximate) algorithm and new, closed-form lower bounds (on the expected maximum proportion of significant nodes for subgraphs of a given size, under the null hypothesis of no anomalous patterns). These advances, along with the integration of recent core-tree decomposition methods, enable CNSS to scale to large real-world graphs, with substantial improvement in the accuracy of detected subgraphs. Extensive experiments on both semi-synthetic and real-world datasets are demonstrated to validate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, in comparison with state-of-the-art counterparts.
summary: We propose a new approach, the calibrated nonparametric scan statistic (CNSS), for more accurate detection of anomalous patterns in large-scale, real-world graphs. Scan statistics identify connected subgraphs that are interesting or unexpected through maximization of a likelihood ratio statistic; in particular, nonparametric scan statistics (NPSSs) identify subgraphs with a higher than expected proportion of individually significant nodes. However, we show that recently proposed NPSS methods are miscalibrated, failing to account for the maximization of the statistic over the multiplicity of subgraphs. This results in both reduced detection power for subtle signals, and low precision of the detected subgraph even for stronger signals. Thus we develop a new statistical approach to recalibrate NPSSs, correctly adjusting for multiple hypothesis testing and taking the underlying graph structure into account. While the recalibration, based on randomization testing, is computationally expensive, we propose both an efficient (approximate) algorithm and new, closed-form lower bounds (on the expected maximum proportion of significant nodes for subgraphs of a given size, under the null hypothesis of no anomalous patterns). These advances, along with the integration of recent core-tree decomposition methods, enable CNSS to scale to large real-world graphs, with substantial improvement in the accuracy of detected subgraphs. Extensive experiments on both semi-synthetic and real-world datasets are demonstrated to validate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, in comparison with state-of-the-art counterparts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，即校准的非参数扫描统计量（CNSS），用于更准确地检测大规模真实世界图中的异常模式。扫描统计通​​过最大化似然比统计来识别有趣或意外的连接子图；特别是，非参数扫描统计（NPSS）识别具有高于预期比例的单独重要节点的子图。然而，我们表明最近提出的 NPSS 方法是错误校准的，未能考虑到子图多重性统计量的最大化。这会导致对细微信号的检测能力降低，并且即使对于较强的信号，检测到的子图的精度也较低。因此，我们开发了一种新的统计方法来重新校准 NPSS，正确调整多重假设检验并考虑潜在的图形结构。虽然基于随机化测试的重新校准在计算上是昂贵的，但我们提出了一种有效的（近似）算法和新的封闭式下界（在没有异常模式的零假设下，在给定大小的子图的重要节点的预期最大比例上）。这些进步以及最新核心树分解方法的集成使 CNSS 能够扩展到大型现实世界图，并显着提高了检测到的子图的准确性。与最先进的同行相比，对半合成和真实数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种校准的非参数扫描统计量（CNSS），用于在大规模真实图中更准确地检测异常模式。
AI.motivation: 现有非参数扫描统计量（NPSS）方法因未考虑子图多重假设检验而存在校准问题，导致检测精度和灵敏度不足。
AI.method: 通过随机化检验重新校准NPSS，结合高效算法与闭式下界计算，并整合核心树分解方法以提升可扩展性。
AI.result: 在半合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，CNSS在检测精度和子图定位上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CNSS通过校准和结构优化，显著提升了大规模图中异常模式检测的准确性与计算效率。

method: 通过随机化检验重新校准NPSS，结合高效算法与闭式下界计算，并整合核心树分解方法以提升可扩展性。
result: 在半合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，CNSS在检测精度和子图定位上优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: CNSS通过校准和结构优化，显著提升了大规模图中异常模式检测的准确性与计算效率。
search_text: Calibrated Nonparametric Scan Statistics for Anomalous Pattern Detection in Graphs 用于图形中异常模式检测的校准非参数扫描统计 We propose a new approach, the calibrated nonparametric scan statistic (CNSS), for more accurate detection of anomalous patterns in large-scale, real-world graphs. Scan statistics identify connected subgraphs that are interesting or unexpected through maximization of a likelihood ratio statistic; in particular, nonparametric scan statistics (NPSSs) identify subgraphs with a higher than expected proportion of individually significant nodes. However, we show that recently proposed NPSS methods are miscalibrated, failing to account for the maximization of the statistic over the multiplicity of subgraphs. This results in both reduced detection power for subtle signals, and low precision of the detected subgraph even for stronger signals. Thus we develop a new statistical approach to recalibrate NPSSs, correctly adjusting for multiple hypothesis testing and taking the underlying graph structure into account. While the recalibration, based on randomization testing, is computationally expensive, we propose both an efficient (approximate) algorithm and new, closed-form lower bounds (on the expected maximum proportion of significant nodes for subgraphs of a given size, under the null hypothesis of no anomalous patterns). These advances, along with the integration of recent core-tree decomposition methods, enable CNSS to scale to large real-world graphs, with substantial improvement in the accuracy of detected subgraphs. Extensive experiments on both semi-synthetic and real-world datasets are demonstrated to validate the effectiveness of our proposed methods, in comparison with state-of-the-art counterparts. 我们提出了一种新方法，即校准的非参数扫描统计量（CNSS），用于更准确地检测大规模真实世界图中的异常模式。扫描统计通​​过最大化似然比统计来识别有趣或意外的连接子图；特别是，非参数扫描统计（NPSS）识别具有高于预期比例的单独重要节点的子图。然而，我们表明最近提出的 NPSS 方法是错误校准的，未能考虑到子图多重性统计量的最大化。这会导致对细微信号的检测能力降低，并且即使对于较强的信号，检测到的子图的精度也较低。因此，我们开发了一种新的统计方法来重新校准 NPSS，正确调整多重假设检验并考虑潜在的图形结构。虽然基于随机化测试的重新校准在计算上是昂贵的，但我们提出了一种有效的（近似）算法和新的封闭式下界（在没有异常模式的零假设下，在给定大小的子图的重要节点的预期最大比例上）。这些进步以及最新核心树分解方法的集成使 CNSS 能够扩展到大型现实世界图，并显着提高了检测到的子图的准确性。与最先进的同行相比，对半合成和真实数据集进行的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文提出一种校准的非参数扫描统计量（CNSS），用于在大规模真实图中更准确地检测异常模式。 Chunpai Wang,Daniel B. Neill,Feng Chen stat.ME,cs.AI,cs.SI

title: Learning to Rearrange with Physics-Inspired Risk Awareness
title_zh: 学习利用物理启发的风险意识进行重新安排
comment: Accepted to Risk Aware Decision Making Workshop at Robotics, Science and Systems 2022
comments: Accepted to Risk Aware Decision Making Workshop at Robotics, Science and Systems 2022
abstract: Real-world applications require a robot operating in the physical world with awareness of potential risks besides accomplishing the task. A large part of risky behaviors arises from interacting with objects in ignorance of affordance. To prevent the agent from making unsafe decisions, we propose to train a robotic agent by reinforcement learning to execute tasks with an awareness of physical properties such as mass and friction in an indoor environment. We achieve this through a novel physics-inspired reward function that encourages the agent to learn a policy discerning different masses and friction coefficients. We introduce two novel and challenging indoor rearrangement tasks -- the variable friction pushing task and the variable mass pushing task -- that allow evaluation of the learned policies in trading off performance and physics-inspired risk. Our results demonstrate that by equipping with the proposed reward, the agent is able to learn policies choosing the pushing targets or goal-reaching trajectories with minimum physical cost, which can be further utilized as a precaution to constrain the agent's behavior in a safety-critic environment.
summary: Real-world applications require a robot operating in the physical world with awareness of potential risks besides accomplishing the task. A large part of risky behaviors arises from interacting with objects in ignorance of affordance. To prevent the agent from making unsafe decisions, we propose to train a robotic agent by reinforcement learning to execute tasks with an awareness of physical properties such as mass and friction in an indoor environment. We achieve this through a novel physics-inspired reward function that encourages the agent to learn a policy discerning different masses and friction coefficients. We introduce two novel and challenging indoor rearrangement tasks -- the variable friction pushing task and the variable mass pushing task -- that allow evaluation of the learned policies in trading off performance and physics-inspired risk. Our results demonstrate that by equipping with the proposed reward, the agent is able to learn policies choosing the pushing targets or goal-reaching trajectories with minimum physical cost, which can be further utilized as a precaution to constrain the agent's behavior in a safety-critic environment.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的应用要求机器人在物理世界中运行，除了完成任务外，还必须意识到潜在的风险。很大一部分危险行为是由于在不了解可供性的情况下与物体进行交互而产生的。为了防止智能体做出不安全的决定，我们建议通过强化学习来训练机器人智能体，使其在了解室内环境中的质量和摩擦等物理特性的情况下执行任务。我们通过一种新颖的受物理学启发的奖励函数来实现这一目标，该函数鼓励代理学习识别不同质量和摩擦系数的策略。我们引入了两种新颖且具有挑战性的室内重排任务——可变摩擦推动任务和可变质量推动任务——允许在权衡性能和物理启发风险时评估学习策略。我们的结果表明，通过配备建议的奖励，智能体能够学习以最小的物理成本选择推动目标或达到目标轨迹的策略，这可以进一步用作预防措施，以限制智能体在安全关键环境中的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理启发的风险意识强化学习方法，使机器人在室内重排任务中能感知物体质量与摩擦力等物理特性，避免危险操作。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中机器人需在完成任务的同时规避物理风险，但现有方法缺乏对物体物理属性（如质量、摩擦力）的感知，易导致危险决策。
AI.method: 设计物理启发的奖励函数，通过强化学习训练机器人区分不同质量与摩擦系数的物体，并引入变量摩擦推动任务和变量质量推动任务进行评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用该奖励函数的智能体能学习到最小化物理成本的策略，在安全临界环境中有效约束行为，提升任务安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过物理属性感知与风险意识训练，为机器人安全操作提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更复杂的现实场景。

title: Meta Auxiliary Learning for Low-resource Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于低资源口语理解的元辅助学习
abstract: Spoken language understanding (SLU) treats automatic speech recognition (ASR) and natural language understanding (NLU) as a unified task and usually suffers from data scarcity. We exploit an ASR and NLU joint training method based on meta auxiliary learning to improve the performance of low-resource SLU task by only taking advantage of abundant manual transcriptions of speech data. One obvious advantage of such method is that it provides a flexible framework to implement a low-resource SLU training task without requiring access to any further semantic annotations. In particular, a NLU model is taken as label generation network to predict intent and slot tags from texts; a multi-task network trains ASR task and SLU task synchronously from speech; and the predictions of label generation network are delivered to the multi-task network as semantic targets. The efficiency of the proposed algorithm is demonstrated with experiments on the public CATSLU dataset, which produces more suitable ASR hypotheses for the downstream NLU task.
summary: Spoken language understanding (SLU) treats automatic speech recognition (ASR) and natural language understanding (NLU) as a unified task and usually suffers from data scarcity. We exploit an ASR and NLU joint training method based on meta auxiliary learning to improve the performance of low-resource SLU task by only taking advantage of abundant manual transcriptions of speech data. One obvious advantage of such method is that it provides a flexible framework to implement a low-resource SLU training task without requiring access to any further semantic annotations. In particular, a NLU model is taken as label generation network to predict intent and slot tags from texts; a multi-task network trains ASR task and SLU task synchronously from speech; and the predictions of label generation network are delivered to the multi-task network as semantic targets. The efficiency of the proposed algorithm is demonstrated with experiments on the public CATSLU dataset, which produces more suitable ASR hypotheses for the downstream NLU task.
abstract_zh: 口语理解（SLU）将自动语音识别（ASR）和自然语言理解（NLU）视为统一的任务，通常会遇到数据稀缺的问题。我们利用基于元辅助学习的 ASR 和 NLU 联合训练方法，仅利用丰富的语音数据手动转录来提高低资源 SLU 任务的性能。这种方法的一个明显优点是它提供了一个灵活的框架来实现低资源 SLU 训练任务，而无需访问任何进一步的语义注释。特别是，采用 NLU 模型作为标签生成网络来预测文本中的意图和槽位标签；多任务网络根据语音同步训练 ASR 任务和 SLU 任务；标签生成网络的预测作为语义目标传递给多任务网络。通过在公共 CATSLU 数据集上的实验证明了所提出算法的效率，该数据集为下游 NLU 任务产生了更合适的 ASR 假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元辅助学习的联合训练方法，以提升低资源场景下的语音语言理解（SLU）性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SLU任务因数据稀缺而表现受限，且通常需要大量语义标注。本文旨在通过利用现有语音数据的丰富文本转录，无需额外语义标注即可实现低资源SLU训练。
AI.method: 采用NLU模型作为标签生成网络预测意图和槽位标签，通过多任务网络同步训练ASR和SLU任务，并将标签生成网络的预测结果作为语义目标输入多任务网络。
AI.result: 在公开的CATSLU数据集上实验表明，该方法生成的ASR假设更符合下游NLU任务需求，有效提升低资源SLU性能。
AI.conclusion: 元辅助学习框架能够在无需额外语义标注的情况下，通过联合优化ASR和SLU任务，显著改善低资源场景下的语音语言理解效果。

title: Exploiting Transformation Invariance and Equivariance for Self-supervised Sound Localisation
title_zh: 利用变换不变性和等变性进行自监督声音定位
comment: Camera-ready Version for ACMMM 2022, Project page is https://jinxiang-liu.github.io/SSL-TIE/
comments: Camera-ready Version for ACMMM 2022, Project page is https://jinxiang-liu.github.io/SSL-TIE/
abstract: We present a simple yet effective self-supervised framework for audio-visual representation learning, to localize the sound source in videos. To understand what enables to learn useful representations, we systematically investigate the effects of data augmentations, and reveal that (1) composition of data augmentations plays a critical role, i.e. explicitly encouraging the audio-visual representations to be invariant to various transformations~({\em transformation invariance}); (2) enforcing geometric consistency substantially improves the quality of learned representations, i.e. the detected sound source should follow the same transformation applied on input video frames~({\em transformation equivariance}). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms previous methods on two sound localization benchmarks, namely, Flickr-SoundNet and VGG-Sound. Additionally, we also evaluate audio retrieval and cross-modal retrieval tasks. In both cases, our self-supervised models demonstrate superior retrieval performances, even competitive with the supervised approach in audio retrieval. This reveals the proposed framework learns strong multi-modal representations that are beneficial to sound localisation and generalization to further applications. \textit{All codes will be available}.
summary: We present a simple yet effective self-supervised framework for audio-visual representation learning, to localize the sound source in videos. To understand what enables to learn useful representations, we systematically investigate the effects of data augmentations, and reveal that (1) composition of data augmentations plays a critical role, i.e. explicitly encouraging the audio-visual representations to be invariant to various transformations~({\em transformation invariance}); (2) enforcing geometric consistency substantially improves the quality of learned representations, i.e. the detected sound source should follow the same transformation applied on input video frames~({\em transformation equivariance}). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms previous methods on two sound localization benchmarks, namely, Flickr-SoundNet and VGG-Sound. Additionally, we also evaluate audio retrieval and cross-modal retrieval tasks. In both cases, our self-supervised models demonstrate superior retrieval performances, even competitive with the supervised approach in audio retrieval. This reveals the proposed framework learns strong multi-modal representations that are beneficial to sound localisation and generalization to further applications. \textit{All codes will be available}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个简单而有效的自监督框架，用于视听表示学习，以定位视频中的声源。为了理解什么能够学习有用的表示，我们系统地研究了数据增强的影响，并揭示了（1）数据增强的组合起着关键作用，即明确鼓励视听表示对各种变换保持不变〜（{\em变换不变性}）； （2）强制几何一致性大大提高了学习表示的质量，即检测到的声源应遵循应用于输入视频帧的相同变换〜（{\em变换等方差}）。大量实验表明，我们的模型在两个声音定位基准（即 Flickr-SoundNet 和 VGG-Sound）上显着优于以前的方法。此外，我们还评估音频检索和跨模式检索任务。在这两种情况下，我们的自监督模型都表现出了卓越的检索性能，甚至可以与音频检索中的监督方法相媲美。这表明所提出的框架学习了强大的多模态表示，这有利于声音定位和泛化到进一步的应用。 \textit{所有代码都可用}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的音频-视觉表示框架，用于在视频中定位声源。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在声源定位任务中表现不足，需探索如何通过数据增强和几何一致性约束学习更有效的多模态表示。
AI.method: 通过组合数据增强策略，强制模型对音频-视觉表示具有变换不变性（invariance）和几何一致性（equivariance），即声源检测需遵循输入视频帧的变换规则。
AI.result: 在Flickr-SoundNet和VGG-Sound基准测试中显著优于现有方法，在音频检索和跨模态检索任务中表现接近监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架学习到的多模态表征具有强泛化能力，为声源定位及后续应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Md Jobair Hossain Faruk,Hossain Shahriar,Maria Valero,Farhat Lamia Barsha,Shahriar Sobhan,Md Abdullah Khan,Michael Whitman,Alfredo Cuzzocreak,Dan Lo,Akond Rahman,Fan Wu
title: Malware Detection and Prevention using Artificial Intelligence Techniques
title_zh: 使用人工智能技术检测和预防恶意软件
comment: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (Big Data)
comments: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (Big Data)
abstract: With the rapid technological advancement, security has become a major issue due to the increase in malware activity that poses a serious threat to the security and safety of both computer systems and stakeholders. To maintain stakeholders, particularly, end users security, protecting the data from fraudulent efforts is one of the most pressing concerns. A set of malicious programming code, scripts, active content, or intrusive software that is designed to destroy intended computer systems and programs or mobile and web applications is referred to as malware. According to a study, naive users are unable to distinguish between malicious and benign applications. Thus, computer systems and mobile applications should be designed to detect malicious activities towards protecting the stakeholders. A number of algorithms are available to detect malware activities by utilizing novel concepts including Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. In this study, we emphasize Artificial Intelligence (AI) based techniques for detecting and preventing malware activity. We present a detailed review of current malware detection technologies, their shortcomings, and ways to improve efficiency. Our study shows that adopting futuristic approaches for the development of malware detection applications shall provide significant advantages. The comprehension of this synthesis shall help researchers for further research on malware detection and prevention using AI.

abstract_zh: 随着技术的快速进步，由于恶意软件活动的增加，安全已成为一个主要问题，对计算机系统和利益相关者的安全构成严重威胁。为了维护利益相关者，特别是最终用户的安全，保护数据免遭欺诈是最紧迫的问题之一。旨在破坏预期计算机系统和程序或移动和 Web 应用程序的一组恶意编程代码、脚本、活动内容或侵入性软件称为恶意软件。根据一项研究，天真的用户无法区分恶意应用程序和良性应用程序。因此，计算机系统和移动应用程序的设计应能够检测恶意活动，以保护利益相关者。许多算法可利用人工智能、机器学习和深度学习等新颖概念来检测恶意软件活动。在本研究中，我们强调基于人工智能 (AI) 的技术来检测和预防恶意软件活动。我们详细回顾了当前的恶意软件检测技术、其缺点以及提高效率的方法。我们的研究表明，采用未来的方法来开发恶意软件检测应用程序将提供显着的优势。对这一综合的理解将有助于研究人员进一步研究使用人工智能进行恶意软件检测和预防。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于人工智能技术的恶意软件检测与预防方法，分析现有技术的不足并提出改进方向。
AI.motivation: 随着恶意软件威胁加剧，普通用户难以区分恶意与良性程序，需通过AI技术提升检测效率以保障系统与数据安全。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析当前恶意软件检测技术（包括人工智能、机器学习和深度学习），总结其局限性并提出优化策略。
AI.result: 研究表明，采用前沿AI方法可显著提升恶意软件检测效率与准确性，为未来研究提供改进方向。
AI.conclusion: AI技术是恶意软件检测的关键，需持续探索创新方法以应对新型威胁，推动安全防护技术发展。

authors_text: Darius Muglich,Luisa Zintgraf,Christian Schroeder de Witt,Shimon Whiteson,Jakob Foerster
title: Generalized Beliefs for Cooperative AI
title_zh: 合作人工智能的普遍信念
abstract: Self-play is a common paradigm for constructing solutions in Markov games that can yield optimal policies in collaborative settings. However, these policies often adopt highly-specialized conventions that make playing with a novel partner difficult. To address this, recent approaches rely on encoding symmetry and convention-awareness into policy training, but these require strong environmental assumptions and can complicate policy training. We therefore propose moving the learning of conventions to the belief space. Specifically, we propose a belief learning model that can maintain beliefs over rollouts of policies not seen at training time, and can thus decode and adapt to novel conventions at test time. We show how to leverage this model for both search and training of a best response over various pools of policies to greatly improve ad-hoc teamplay. We also show how our setup promotes explainability and interpretability of nuanced agent conventions.
summary: Self-play is a common paradigm for constructing solutions in Markov games that can yield optimal policies in collaborative settings. However, these policies often adopt highly-specialized conventions that make playing with a novel partner difficult. To address this, recent approaches rely on encoding symmetry and convention-awareness into policy training, but these require strong environmental assumptions and can complicate policy training. We therefore propose moving the learning of conventions to the belief space. Specifically, we propose a belief learning model that can maintain beliefs over rollouts of policies not seen at training time, and can thus decode and adapt to novel conventions at test time. We show how to leverage this model for both search and training of a best response over various pools of policies to greatly improve ad-hoc teamplay. We also show how our setup promotes explainability and interpretability of nuanced agent conventions.
abstract_zh: 自博弈是在马尔可夫博弈中构建解决方案的常见范例，可以在协作环境中产生最优策略。然而，这些政策通常采用高度专业化的惯例，这使得与新伙伴一起玩变得困难。为了解决这个问题，最近的方法依赖于将对称性和惯例意识编码到政策培训中，但这需要强有力的环境假设，并且可能会使政策培训复杂化。因此，我们建议将惯例的学习转移到信念空间。具体来说，我们提出了一种信念学习模型，该模型可以维持对训练时未看到的政策的推出的信念，从而可以在测试时解码和适应新的约定。我们展示了如何利用该模型来搜索和训练对各种策略池的最佳响应，以极大地改善临时团队合作。我们还展示了我们的设置如何促进细致入微的代理约定的可解释性和可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种信念学习模型，通过在信念空间中学习约定，提升合作AI在未见过的策略下的适应能力与即兴团队协作表现。
AI.motivation: 传统自玩方法生成的策略依赖特定约定，难以与新伙伴协作；现有解决方案需强环境假设且训练复杂，亟需更灵活的约定学习机制。
AI.method: 构建信念学习模型，维护未训练策略的信念分布，通过解码新约定实现测试时适应，并用于策略搜索与最佳响应训练。
AI.result: 显著提升跨策略池的即兴协作性能，同时增强代理约定的可解释性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决协作AI中约定泛化难题，为动态合作场景提供更鲁棒且可解释的解决方案。

search_text: Generalized Beliefs for Cooperative AI 合作人工智能的普遍信念 Self-play is a common paradigm for constructing solutions in Markov games that can yield optimal policies in collaborative settings. However, these policies often adopt highly-specialized conventions that make playing with a novel partner difficult. To address this, recent approaches rely on encoding symmetry and convention-awareness into policy training, but these require strong environmental assumptions and can complicate policy training. We therefore propose moving the learning of conventions to the belief space. Specifically, we propose a belief learning model that can maintain beliefs over rollouts of policies not seen at training time, and can thus decode and adapt to novel conventions at test time. We show how to leverage this model for both search and training of a best response over various pools of policies to greatly improve ad-hoc teamplay. We also show how our setup promotes explainability and interpretability of nuanced agent conventions. 自博弈是在马尔可夫博弈中构建解决方案的常见范例，可以在协作环境中产生最优策略。然而，这些政策通常采用高度专业化的惯例，这使得与新伙伴一起玩变得困难。为了解决这个问题，最近的方法依赖于将对称性和惯例意识编码到政策培训中，但这需要强有力的环境假设，并且可能会使政策培训复杂化。因此，我们建议将惯例的学习转移到信念空间。具体来说，我们提出了一种信念学习模型，该模型可以维持对训练时未看到的政策的推出的信念，从而可以在测试时解码和适应新的约定。我们展示了如何利用该模型来搜索和训练对各种策略池的最佳响应，以极大地改善临时团队合作。我们还展示了我们的设置如何促进细致入微的代理约定的可解释性和可解释性。 本文提出一种信念学习模型，通过在信念空间中学习约定，提升合作AI在未见过的策略下的适应能力与即兴团队协作表现。 Darius Muglich,Luisa Zintgraf,Christian Schroeder de Witt,Shimon Whiteson,Jakob Foerster cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Low-resource Accent Classification in Geographically-proximate Settings: A Forensic and Sociophonetics Perspective
title_zh: 地理邻近环境中的低资源口音分类：法医和社会语音学的角度
abstract: Accented speech recognition and accent classification are relatively under-explored research areas in speech technology. Recently, deep learning-based methods and Transformer-based pretrained models have achieved superb performances in both areas. However, most accent classification tasks focused on classifying different kinds of English accents and little attention was paid to geographically-proximate accent classification, especially under a low-resource setting where forensic speech science tasks usually encounter. In this paper, we explored three main accent modelling methods combined with two different classifiers based on 105 speaker recordings retrieved from five urban varieties in Northern England. Although speech representations generated from pretrained models generally have better performances in downstream classification, traditional methods like Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) and formant measurements are equipped with specific strengths. These results suggest that in forensic phonetics scenario where data are relatively scarce, a simple modelling method and classifier could be competitive with state-of-the-art pretrained speech models as feature extractors, which could enhance a sooner estimation for the accent information in practices. Besides, our findings also cross-validated a new methodology in quantifying sociophonetic changes.
summary: Accented speech recognition and accent classification are relatively under-explored research areas in speech technology. Recently, deep learning-based methods and Transformer-based pretrained models have achieved superb performances in both areas. However, most accent classification tasks focused on classifying different kinds of English accents and little attention was paid to geographically-proximate accent classification, especially under a low-resource setting where forensic speech science tasks usually encounter. In this paper, we explored three main accent modelling methods combined with two different classifiers based on 105 speaker recordings retrieved from five urban varieties in Northern England. Although speech representations generated from pretrained models generally have better performances in downstream classification, traditional methods like Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) and formant measurements are equipped with specific strengths. These results suggest that in forensic phonetics scenario where data are relatively scarce, a simple modelling method and classifier could be competitive with state-of-the-art pretrained speech models as feature extractors, which could enhance a sooner estimation for the accent information in practices. Besides, our findings also cross-validated a new methodology in quantifying sociophonetic changes.
abstract_zh: 重音语音识别和重音分类是语音技术中相对尚待探索的研究领域。最近，基于深度学习的方法和基于 Transformer 的预训练模型在这两个领域都取得了优异的性能。然而，大多数口音分类任务侧重于对不同种类的英语口音进行分类，而很少关注地理上邻近的口音分类，特别是在法医语音科学任务通常遇到的资源匮乏的环境下。在本文中，我们基于从英格兰北部五个城市中检索的 105 个说话者录音，探索了三种主要的口音建模方法，并结合了两种不同的分类器。尽管预训练模型生成的语音表示通常在下游分类中具有更好的性能，但梅尔频率倒谱系数 (MFCC) 和共振峰测量等传统方法具有特定的优势。这些结果表明，在数据相对稀缺的法医语音场景中，简单的建模方法和分类器可以与作为特征提取器的最先进的预训练语音模型竞争，这可以增强实践中对口音信息的更快估计。此外，我们的研究结果还交叉验证了量化社交语音变化的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低资源环境下地理接近的口音分类问题，结合法医语音学与社会语音学视角，探索传统方法与预训练模型的性能对比。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注不同英语口音分类，忽视地理接近的低资源场景需求，尤其在法医语音科学中数据稀缺时缺乏有效方法。
AI.method: 基于英格兰北部五个城市变体的105个说话者录音，结合三种口音建模方法与两种分类器，对比预训练模型与传统MFCC、共振峰测量方法的性能。
AI.result: 预训练模型在分类任务中表现优异，但传统方法在特定场景下具独特优势，简单模型在低资源条件下可与先进模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 低资源法医场景中传统方法仍具竞争力，且研究验证了量化社会语音变化的新方法，为实践中的口音分析提供参考。

title: Towards a Tighter Bound on Possible-Rendezvous Areas: Preliminary Results
title_zh: 对可能会合区域进行更严格的限制：初步结果
abstract: Given trajectories with gaps, we investigate methods to tighten spatial bounds on areas (e.g., nodes in a spatial network) where possible rendezvous activity could have occurred. The problem is important for reducing the onerous amount of manual effort to post-process possible rendezvous areas using satellite imagery and has many societal applications to improve public safety, security, and health. The problem of rendezvous detection is challenging due to the difficulty of interpreting missing data within a trajectory gap and the very high cost of detecting gaps in such a large volume of location data. Most recent literature presents formal models, namely space-time prism, to track an object's rendezvous patterns within trajectory gaps on a spatial network. However, the bounds derived from the space-time prism are rather loose, resulting in unnecessarily extensive post-processing manual effort. To address these limitations, we propose a Time Slicing-based Gap-Aware Rendezvous Detection (TGARD) algorithm to tighten the spatial bounds in spatial networks. We propose a Dual Convergence TGARD (DC-TGARD) algorithm to improve computational efficiency using a bi-directional pruning approach. Theoretical results show the proposed spatial bounds on the area of possible rendezvous are tighter than that from related work (space-time prism). Experimental results on synthetic and real-world spatial networks (e.g., road networks) show that the proposed DC-TGARD is more scalable than the TGARD algorithm.
summary: Given trajectories with gaps, we investigate methods to tighten spatial bounds on areas (e.g., nodes in a spatial network) where possible rendezvous activity could have occurred. The problem is important for reducing the onerous amount of manual effort to post-process possible rendezvous areas using satellite imagery and has many societal applications to improve public safety, security, and health. The problem of rendezvous detection is challenging due to the difficulty of interpreting missing data within a trajectory gap and the very high cost of detecting gaps in such a large volume of location data. Most recent literature presents formal models, namely space-time prism, to track an object's rendezvous patterns within trajectory gaps on a spatial network. However, the bounds derived from the space-time prism are rather loose, resulting in unnecessarily extensive post-processing manual effort. To address these limitations, we propose a Time Slicing-based Gap-Aware Rendezvous Detection (TGARD) algorithm to tighten the spatial bounds in spatial networks. We propose a Dual Convergence TGARD (DC-TGARD) algorithm to improve computational efficiency using a bi-directional pruning approach. Theoretical results show the proposed spatial bounds on the area of possible rendezvous are tighter than that from related work (space-time prism). Experimental results on synthetic and real-world spatial networks (e.g., road networks) show that the proposed DC-TGARD is more scalable than the TGARD algorithm.
abstract_zh: 给定有间隙的轨迹，我们研究了收紧可能发生交会活动的区域（例如空间网络中的节点）的空间界限的方法。该问题对于减少使用卫星图像对可能的交会区域进行后处理的繁重人工工作非常重要，并且在改善公共安全、安保和健康方面具有许多社会应用。由于解释轨迹间隙内丢失的数据非常困难，并且在如此大量的位置数据中检测间隙的成本非常高，因此交会检测问题具有挑战性。最近的文献提出了正式模型，即时空棱镜，用于跟踪空间网络上轨迹间隙内物体的交会模式。然而，时空棱镜得出的边界相当宽松，导致不必要的大量后处理手动工作。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于时间切片的间隙感知交会检测（TGARD）算法来收紧空间网络中的空间界限。我们提出了一种双收敛 TGARD (DC-TGARD) 算法，使用双向修剪方法来提高计算效率。理论结果表明，所提出的可能会合区域的空间界限比相关工作（时空棱镜）更严格。合成和现实世界空间网络（例如道路网络）的实验结果表明，所提出的 DC-TGARD 比 TGARD 算法更具可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间切片的间隙感知会面检测算法（TGARD）及其双向剪枝优化版本（DC-TGARD），用于在空间网络中更精确地确定可能的会面区域边界。
AI.motivation: 现有基于时空棱镜模型的方法对轨迹间隙的可能会面区域边界估计过宽，导致人工处理卫星图像的工作量过大，且难以高效处理大规模位置数据。
AI.method: 提出TGARD算法通过时间切片技术收紧空间边界，并设计DC-TGARD采用双向剪枝策略提升计算效率。
AI.result: 理论分析表明新方法的空间边界比时空棱镜模型更紧，实验显示DC-TGARD在合成数据和真实道路网络中比TGARD更具可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DC-TGARD算法有效缩小了可能会面区域的边界范围，在保证准确性的同时降低了计算成本，可应用于公共安全与健康等社会领域。

motivation: 现有基于时空棱镜模型的方法对轨迹间隙的可能会面区域边界估计过宽，导致人工处理卫星图像的工作量过大，且难以高效处理大规模位置数据。
method: 提出TGARD算法通过时间切片技术收紧空间边界，并设计DC-TGARD采用双向剪枝策略提升计算效率。
result: 理论分析表明新方法的空间边界比时空棱镜模型更紧，实验显示DC-TGARD在合成数据和真实道路网络中比TGARD更具可扩展性。
conclusion: DC-TGARD算法有效缩小了可能会面区域的边界范围，在保证准确性的同时降低了计算成本，可应用于公共安全与健康等社会领域。
search_text: Towards a Tighter Bound on Possible-Rendezvous Areas: Preliminary Results 对可能会合区域进行更严格的限制：初步结果 Given trajectories with gaps, we investigate methods to tighten spatial bounds on areas (e.g., nodes in a spatial network) where possible rendezvous activity could have occurred. The problem is important for reducing the onerous amount of manual effort to post-process possible rendezvous areas using satellite imagery and has many societal applications to improve public safety, security, and health. The problem of rendezvous detection is challenging due to the difficulty of interpreting missing data within a trajectory gap and the very high cost of detecting gaps in such a large volume of location data. Most recent literature presents formal models, namely space-time prism, to track an object's rendezvous patterns within trajectory gaps on a spatial network. However, the bounds derived from the space-time prism are rather loose, resulting in unnecessarily extensive post-processing manual effort. To address these limitations, we propose a Time Slicing-based Gap-Aware Rendezvous Detection (TGARD) algorithm to tighten the spatial bounds in spatial networks. We propose a Dual Convergence TGARD (DC-TGARD) algorithm to improve computational efficiency using a bi-directional pruning approach. Theoretical results show the proposed spatial bounds on the area of possible rendezvous are tighter than that from related work (space-time prism). Experimental results on synthetic and real-world spatial networks (e.g., road networks) show that the proposed DC-TGARD is more scalable than the TGARD algorithm. 给定有间隙的轨迹，我们研究了收紧可能发生交会活动的区域（例如空间网络中的节点）的空间界限的方法。该问题对于减少使用卫星图像对可能的交会区域进行后处理的繁重人工工作非常重要，并且在改善公共安全、安保和健康方面具有许多社会应用。由于解释轨迹间隙内丢失的数据非常困难，并且在如此大量的位置数据中检测间隙的成本非常高，因此交会检测问题具有挑战性。最近的文献提出了正式模型，即时空棱镜，用于跟踪空间网络上轨迹间隙内物体的交会模式。然而，时空棱镜得出的边界相当宽松，导致不必要的大量后处理手动工作。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于时间切片的间隙感知交会检测（TGARD）算法来收紧空间网络中的空间界限。我们提出了一种双收敛 TGARD (DC-TGARD) 算法，使用双向修剪方法来提高计算效率。理论结果表明，所提出的可能会合区域的空间界限比相关工作（时空棱镜）更严格。合成和现实世界空间网络（例如道路网络）的实验结果表明，所提出的 DC-TGARD 比 TGARD 算法更具可扩展性。 本文提出一种基于时间切片的间隙感知会面检测算法（TGARD）及其双向剪枝优化版本（DC-TGARD），用于在空间网络中更精确地确定可能的会面区域边界。 Arun Sharma,Jayant Gupta,Subhankar Ghosh cs.DB,cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Ajay Jaiswal,Haoyu Ma,Tianlong Chen,Ying Ding,Zhangyang Wang
title: Training Your Sparse Neural Network Better with Any Mask
title_zh: 使用任何掩模更好地训练你的稀疏神经网络
abstract: Pruning large neural networks to create high-quality, independently trainable sparse masks, which can maintain similar performance to their dense counterparts, is very desirable due to the reduced space and time complexity. As research effort is focused on increasingly sophisticated pruning methods that leads to sparse subnetworks trainable from the scratch, we argue for an orthogonal, under-explored theme: improving training techniques for pruned sub-networks, i.e. sparse training. Apart from the popular belief that only the quality of sparse masks matters for sparse training, in this paper we demonstrate an alternative opportunity: one can carefully customize the sparse training techniques to deviate from the default dense network training protocols, consisting of introducing ``ghost" neurons and skip connections at the early stage of training, and strategically modifying the initialization as well as labels. Our new sparse training recipe is generally applicable to improving training from scratch with various sparse masks. By adopting our newly curated techniques, we demonstrate significant performance gains across various popular datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet), architectures (ResNet-18/32/104, Vgg16, MobileNet), and sparse mask options (lottery ticket, SNIP/GRASP, SynFlow, or even randomly pruning), compared to the default training protocols, especially at high sparsity levels. Code is at https://github.com/VITA-Group/ToST
summary: Pruning large neural networks to create high-quality, independently trainable sparse masks, which can maintain similar performance to their dense counterparts, is very desirable due to the reduced space and time complexity. As research effort is focused on increasingly sophisticated pruning methods that leads to sparse subnetworks trainable from the scratch, we argue for an orthogonal, under-explored theme: improving training techniques for pruned sub-networks, i.e. sparse training. Apart from the popular belief that only the quality of sparse masks matters for sparse training, in this paper we demonstrate an alternative opportunity: one can carefully customize the sparse training techniques to deviate from the default dense network training protocols, consisting of introducing ``ghost" neurons and skip connections at the early stage of training, and strategically modifying the initialization as well as labels. Our new sparse training recipe is generally applicable to improving training from scratch with various sparse masks. By adopting our newly curated techniques, we demonstrate significant performance gains across various popular datasets (CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet), architectures (ResNet-18/32/104, Vgg16, MobileNet), and sparse mask options (lottery ticket, SNIP/GRASP, SynFlow, or even randomly pruning), compared to the default training protocols, especially at high sparsity levels. Code is at https://github.com/VITA-Group/ToST
abstract_zh: 由于空间和时间复杂度的降低，修剪大型神经网络以创建高质量、可独立训练的稀疏掩模是非常理想的，这种掩模可以保持与密集神经网络相似的性能。由于研究工作集中在日益复杂的剪枝方法上，这些方法导致可以从头开始训练稀疏子网络，因此我们主张一个正交的、尚未充分探索的主题：改进剪枝子网络的训练技术，即稀疏训练。除了普遍认为只有稀疏掩码的质量对稀疏训练很重要之外，在本文中，我们展示了另一种机会：可以仔细定制稀疏训练技术，以偏离默认的密集网络训练协议，包括在训练的早期阶段引入“幽灵”神经元和跳过连接，并策略性地修改初始化和标签。我们新的稀疏训练方法通常适用于使用各种稀疏掩码从头开始改进训练。通过采用我们新策划的技术，我们在各种流行数据集上展示了显着的性能提升（CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、TinyImageNet）、架构（ResNet-18/32/104、Vgg16、MobileNet）和稀疏掩码选项（彩票、SNIP/GRASP、SynFlow，甚至随机修剪），与默认训练协议相比，尤其是在高稀疏度级别下。代码位于 https://github.com/VITA-Group/ToST。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进稀疏神经网络训练的新方法，通过定制化训练技术提升不同稀疏掩码的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注稀疏掩码生成方法，而忽视了稀疏网络训练技术的优化，作者认为改进训练策略可显著提升模型效果。
AI.method: 引入'幽灵'神经元和跳跃连接，调整初始化策略与标签设计，制定专门的稀疏训练方案。
AI.result: 在CIFAR/Imagenet等数据集及多种架构（ResNet/VGG/MobileNet）上，相比默认训练协议实现显著性能提升，尤其在高稀疏度场景下效果更明显。
AI.conclusion: 定制化稀疏训练技术能有效提升各类稀疏掩码的模型表现，为稀疏网络训练提供通用解决方案。

title: Spatiotemporal Data Mining: A Survey
title_zh: 时空数据挖掘：调查
abstract: Spatiotemporal data mining aims to discover interesting, useful but non-trivial patterns in big spatial and spatiotemporal data. They are used in various application domains such as public safety, ecology, epidemiology, earth science, etc. This problem is challenging because of the high societal cost of spurious patterns and exorbitant computational cost. Recent surveys of spatiotemporal data mining need update due to rapid growth. In addition, they did not adequately survey parallel techniques for spatiotemporal data mining. This paper provides a more up-to-date survey of spatiotemporal data mining methods. Furthermore, it has a detailed survey of parallel formulations of spatiotemporal data mining.
summary: Spatiotemporal data mining aims to discover interesting, useful but non-trivial patterns in big spatial and spatiotemporal data. They are used in various application domains such as public safety, ecology, epidemiology, earth science, etc. This problem is challenging because of the high societal cost of spurious patterns and exorbitant computational cost. Recent surveys of spatiotemporal data mining need update due to rapid growth. In addition, they did not adequately survey parallel techniques for spatiotemporal data mining. This paper provides a more up-to-date survey of spatiotemporal data mining methods. Furthermore, it has a detailed survey of parallel formulations of spatiotemporal data mining.
abstract_zh: 时空数据挖掘旨在发现大空间和时空数据中有趣、有用但不平凡的模式。它们被用于公共安全、生态学、流行病学、地球科学等各种应用领域。由于虚假模式的社会成本和高昂的计算成本，这个问题具有挑战性。由于快速增长，最近的时空数据挖掘调查需要更新。此外，他们没有充分调查时空数据挖掘的并行技术。本文提供了时空数据挖掘方法的最新概述。此外，它还对时空数据挖掘的并行公式进行了详细的调查。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在提供一个更新的时空数据挖掘方法综述，并详细探讨其并行技术。
AI.motivation: 由于时空数据挖掘领域发展迅速，且现有综述未充分涵盖并行技术，因此需要更新并详细探讨相关方法。
AI.method: 通过全面回顾现有方法，并详细分析并行技术的多种实现方式。
AI.result: 系统梳理了最新的时空数据挖掘技术，并深入分析了并行计算在该领域的应用。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过更新综述和深入探讨并行技术，为未来研究提供了方向，并突显了并行计算在处理大规模时空数据中的重要性。

authors_text: Khaled Mohammed Saifuddin,Briana Bumgardner,Farhan Tanvir,Esra Akbas
title: HyGNN: Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction via Hypergraph Neural Network
title_zh: HyGNN：通过超图神经网络进行药物相互作用预测
comment: Some new experiments have been added. One more dataset has been considered. Theoretical part has been updated too
comments: Some new experiments have been added. One more dataset has been considered. Theoretical part has been updated too
abstract: Drug-Drug Interactions (DDIs) may hamper the functionalities of drugs, and in the worst scenario, they may lead to adverse drug reactions (ADRs). Predicting all DDIs is a challenging and critical problem. Most existing computational models integrate drug-centric information from different sources and leverage them as features in machine learning classifiers to predict DDIs. However, these models have a high chance of failure, especially for the new drugs when all the information is not available. This paper proposes a novel Hypergraph Neural Network (HyGNN) model based on only the SMILES string of drugs, available for any drug, for the DDI prediction problem. To capture the drug similarities, we create a hypergraph from drugs' chemical substructures extracted from the SMILES strings. Then, we develop HyGNN consisting of a novel attention-based hypergraph edge encoder to get the representation of drugs as hyperedges and a decoder to predict the interactions between drug pairs. Furthermore, we conduct extensive experiments to evaluate our model and compare it with several state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed HyGNN model effectively predicts DDIs and impressively outperforms the baselines with a maximum ROC-AUC and PR-AUC of 97.9% and 98.1%, respectively.
summary: Drug-Drug Interactions (DDIs) may hamper the functionalities of drugs, and in the worst scenario, they may lead to adverse drug reactions (ADRs). Predicting all DDIs is a challenging and critical problem. Most existing computational models integrate drug-centric information from different sources and leverage them as features in machine learning classifiers to predict DDIs. However, these models have a high chance of failure, especially for the new drugs when all the information is not available. This paper proposes a novel Hypergraph Neural Network (HyGNN) model based on only the SMILES string of drugs, available for any drug, for the DDI prediction problem. To capture the drug similarities, we create a hypergraph from drugs' chemical substructures extracted from the SMILES strings. Then, we develop HyGNN consisting of a novel attention-based hypergraph edge encoder to get the representation of drugs as hyperedges and a decoder to predict the interactions between drug pairs. Furthermore, we conduct extensive experiments to evaluate our model and compare it with several state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed HyGNN model effectively predicts DDIs and impressively outperforms the baselines with a maximum ROC-AUC and PR-AUC of 97.9% and 98.1%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 药物相互作用（DDI）可能会妨碍药物的功能，在最坏的情况下，它们可能会导致药物不良反应（ADR）。预测所有 DDI 是一个具有挑战性且关键的问题。大多数现有的计算模型都会整合来自不同来源的以药物为中心的信息，并利用它们作为机器学习分类器中的特征来预测 DDI。然而，这些模型失败的可能性很高，特别是对于新药来说，当所有信息都无法获得时。本文提出了一种新颖的超图神经网络 (HyGNN) 模型，仅基于药物的 SMILES 字符串，适用于任何药物，用于 DDI 预测问题。为了捕获药物的相似性，我们根据从 SMILES 字符串中提取的药物化学子结构创建了一个超图。然后，我们开发了 HyGNN，其中包括一种新颖的基于注意力的超图边缘编码器，用于将药物表示为超边缘；以及一个解码器，用于预测药物对之间的相互作用。此外，我们进行了大量的实验来评估我们的模型，并将其与几种最先进的方法进行比较。实验结果表明，我们提出的 HyGNN 模型可以有效预测 DDI，并且明显优于基线，最大 ROC-AUC 和 PR-AUC 分别为 97.9% 和 98.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于超图神经网络（HyGNN）的药物-药物相互作用（DDI）预测方法，仅利用药物的SMILES字符串进行建模。
AI.motivation: 现有DDI预测模型依赖多源药物信息，难以处理新药信息缺失问题。本文旨在开发一种仅依赖SMILES字符串的通用预测方法。
AI.method: 构建基于SMILES化学子结构的超图，设计注意力机制超边编码器提取药物表示，并通过解码器预测药物对相互作用。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，HyGNN达到ROC-AUC 97.9%和PR-AUC 98.1%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HyGNN通过超图建模和SMILES特征提取，实现了高效准确的DDI预测，尤其适用于新药场景。

search_text: HyGNN: Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction via Hypergraph Neural Network HyGNN：通过超图神经网络进行药物相互作用预测 Drug-Drug Interactions (DDIs) may hamper the functionalities of drugs, and in the worst scenario, they may lead to adverse drug reactions (ADRs). Predicting all DDIs is a challenging and critical problem. Most existing computational models integrate drug-centric information from different sources and leverage them as features in machine learning classifiers to predict DDIs. However, these models have a high chance of failure, especially for the new drugs when all the information is not available. This paper proposes a novel Hypergraph Neural Network (HyGNN) model based on only the SMILES string of drugs, available for any drug, for the DDI prediction problem. To capture the drug similarities, we create a hypergraph from drugs' chemical substructures extracted from the SMILES strings. Then, we develop HyGNN consisting of a novel attention-based hypergraph edge encoder to get the representation of drugs as hyperedges and a decoder to predict the interactions between drug pairs. Furthermore, we conduct extensive experiments to evaluate our model and compare it with several state-of-the-art methods. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed HyGNN model effectively predicts DDIs and impressively outperforms the baselines with a maximum ROC-AUC and PR-AUC of 97.9% and 98.1%, respectively. 药物相互作用（DDI）可能会妨碍药物的功能，在最坏的情况下，它们可能会导致药物不良反应（ADR）。预测所有 DDI 是一个具有挑战性且关键的问题。大多数现有的计算模型都会整合来自不同来源的以药物为中心的信息，并利用它们作为机器学习分类器中的特征来预测 DDI。然而，这些模型失败的可能性很高，特别是对于新药来说，当所有信息都无法获得时。本文提出了一种新颖的超图神经网络 (HyGNN) 模型，仅基于药物的 SMILES 字符串，适用于任何药物，用于 DDI 预测问题。为了捕获药物的相似性，我们根据从 SMILES 字符串中提取的药物化学子结构创建了一个超图。然后，我们开发了 HyGNN，其中包括一种新颖的基于注意力的超图边缘编码器，用于将药物表示为超边缘；以及一个解码器，用于预测药物对之间的相互作用。此外，我们进行了大量的实验来评估我们的模型，并将其与几种最先进的方法进行比较。实验结果表明，我们提出的 HyGNN 模型可以有效预测 DDI，并且明显优于基线，最大 ROC-AUC 和 PR-AUC 分别为 97.9% 和 98.1%。 本文提出一种基于超图神经网络（HyGNN）的药物-药物相互作用（DDI）预测方法，仅利用药物的SMILES字符串进行建模。 Khaled Mohammed Saifuddin,Briana Bumgardner,Farhan Tanvir,Esra Akbas q-bio.QM,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Caio F. D. Netto,Marcel R. de Barros,Jefferson F. Coelho,Lucas P. de Freitas,Felipe M. Moreno,Marlon S. Mathias,Marcelo Dottori,Fábio G. Cozman,Anna H. R. Costa,Edson S. Gomi,Eduardo A. Tannuri
title: Modeling Oceanic Variables with Dynamic Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用动态图神经网络对海洋变量进行建模
abstract: Researchers typically resort to numerical methods to understand and predict ocean dynamics, a key task in mastering environmental phenomena. Such methods may not be suitable in scenarios where the topographic map is complex, knowledge about the underlying processes is incomplete, or the application is time critical. On the other hand, if ocean dynamics are observed, they can be exploited by recent machine learning methods. In this paper we describe a data-driven method to predict environmental variables such as current velocity and sea surface height in the region of Santos-Sao Vicente-Bertioga Estuarine System in the southeastern coast of Brazil. Our model exploits both temporal and spatial inductive biases by joining state-of-the-art sequence models (LSTM and Transformers) and relational models (Graph Neural Networks) in an end-to-end framework that learns both the temporal features and the spatial relationship shared among observation sites. We compare our results with the Santos Operational Forecasting System (SOFS). Experiments show that better results are attained by our model, while maintaining flexibility and little domain knowledge dependency.
summary: Researchers typically resort to numerical methods to understand and predict ocean dynamics, a key task in mastering environmental phenomena. Such methods may not be suitable in scenarios where the topographic map is complex, knowledge about the underlying processes is incomplete, or the application is time critical. On the other hand, if ocean dynamics are observed, they can be exploited by recent machine learning methods. In this paper we describe a data-driven method to predict environmental variables such as current velocity and sea surface height in the region of Santos-Sao Vicente-Bertioga Estuarine System in the southeastern coast of Brazil. Our model exploits both temporal and spatial inductive biases by joining state-of-the-art sequence models (LSTM and Transformers) and relational models (Graph Neural Networks) in an end-to-end framework that learns both the temporal features and the spatial relationship shared among observation sites. We compare our results with the Santos Operational Forecasting System (SOFS). Experiments show that better results are attained by our model, while maintaining flexibility and little domain knowledge dependency.
abstract_zh: 研究人员通常采用数值方法来理解和预测海洋动力学，这是掌握环境现象的一项关键任务。此类方法可能不适合地形图复杂、底层流程知识不完整或应用程序时间紧迫的场景。另一方面，如果观察到海洋动力学，则可以通过最近的机器学习方法来利用它们。在本文中，我们描述了一种数据驱动的方法来预测巴西东南海岸桑托斯-圣维森特-贝尔蒂奥加河口系统地区的环境变量，例如海流速度和海面高度。我们的模型通过在端到端框架中加入最先进的序列模型（LSTM 和 Transformers）和关系模型（图神经网络）来利用时间和空间归纳偏差，该框架学习观察站点之间共享的时间特征和空间关系。我们将我们的结果与桑托斯业务预报系统 (SOFS) 进行比较。实验表明，我们的模型可以获得更好的结果，同时保持灵活性和很少的领域知识依赖性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态图神经网络的数据驱动方法，用于预测巴西东南沿海桑托斯-圣维森特-贝尔托加河口系统的海洋环境变量（如洋流速度和海平面高度）。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法在复杂地形、知识不完善或时间敏感场景下效果有限，而机器学习方法可通过观测数据建模海洋动力学，减少对领域知识的依赖。
AI.method: 结合LSTM/Transformer时序模型与图神经网络（GNN），构建端到端框架同时学习时空特征，利用观测站点间的空间关系进行预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在预测精度上优于桑托斯业务预报系统（SOFS），且保持较低的领域知识依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 动态图神经网络框架能有效捕捉海洋环境的时空特征，在复杂场景下提供更灵活、准确的预测方案。

title: Sequential image recovery using joint hierarchical Bayesian learning
title_zh: 使用联合分层贝叶斯学习的顺序图像恢复
abstract: Recovering temporal image sequences (videos) based on indirect, noisy, or incomplete data is an essential yet challenging task. We specifically consider the case where each data set is missing vital information, which prevents the accurate recovery of the individual images. Although some recent (variational) methods have demonstrated high-resolution image recovery based on jointly recovering sequential images, there remain robustness issues due to parameter tuning and restrictions on the type of the sequential images. Here, we present a method based on hierarchical Bayesian learning for the joint recovery of sequential images that incorporates prior intra- and inter-image information. Our method restores the missing information in each image by "borrowing" it from the other images. As a result, \emph{all} of the individual reconstructions yield improved accuracy. Our method can be used for various data acquisitions and allows for uncertainty quantification. Some preliminary results indicate its potential use for sequential deblurring and magnetic resonance imaging.
summary: Recovering temporal image sequences (videos) based on indirect, noisy, or incomplete data is an essential yet challenging task. We specifically consider the case where each data set is missing vital information, which prevents the accurate recovery of the individual images. Although some recent (variational) methods have demonstrated high-resolution image recovery based on jointly recovering sequential images, there remain robustness issues due to parameter tuning and restrictions on the type of the sequential images. Here, we present a method based on hierarchical Bayesian learning for the joint recovery of sequential images that incorporates prior intra- and inter-image information. Our method restores the missing information in each image by "borrowing" it from the other images. As a result, \emph{all} of the individual reconstructions yield improved accuracy. Our method can be used for various data acquisitions and allows for uncertainty quantification. Some preliminary results indicate its potential use for sequential deblurring and magnetic resonance imaging.
abstract_zh: 基于间接、噪声或不完整数据恢复时间图像序列（视频）是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。我们特别考虑每个数据集丢失重要信息的情况，这妨碍了单个图像的准确恢复。尽管最近的一些（变分）方法已经证明了基于联合恢复序列图像的高分辨率图像恢复，但由于参数调整和序列图像类型的限制，仍然存在鲁棒性问题。在这里，我们提出了一种基于分层贝叶斯学习的方法，用于结合先前的图像内和图像间信息来联合恢复序列图像。我们的方法通过从其他图像中“借用”信息来恢复每个图像中丢失的信息。因此，\emph{all} 的各个重建都提高了准确性。我们的方法可用于各种数据采集，并允许不确定性量化。一些初步结果表明其在连续去模糊和磁共振成像方面的潜在用途。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层贝叶斯学习的联合方法，用于从不完整或噪声数据中恢复时间图像序列（视频）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在参数调整和序列图像类型限制方面存在鲁棒性问题，无法准确恢复缺失信息。
AI.method: 通过联合恢复序列图像，利用图像间的先验信息进行信息借用，提升单个图像重建的准确性。
AI.result: 初步结果表明该方法在序列去模糊和磁共振成像中具有应用潜力，并支持不确定性量化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于多种数据采集场景，能够有效提升图像恢复精度并量化不确定性。
