search_text: Sequential image recovery using joint hierarchical Bayesian learning 使用联合分层贝叶斯学习的顺序图像恢复 Recovering temporal image sequences (videos) based on indirect, noisy, or incomplete data is an essential yet challenging task. We specifically consider the case where each data set is missing vital information, which prevents the accurate recovery of the individual images. Although some recent (variational) methods have demonstrated high-resolution image recovery based on jointly recovering sequential images, there remain robustness issues due to parameter tuning and restrictions on the type of the sequential images. Here, we present a method based on hierarchical Bayesian learning for the joint recovery of sequential images that incorporates prior intra- and inter-image information. Our method restores the missing information in each image by "borrowing" it from the other images. As a result, \emph{all} of the individual reconstructions yield improved accuracy. Our method can be used for various data acquisitions and allows for uncertainty quantification. Some preliminary results indicate its potential use for sequential deblurring and magnetic resonance imaging. 基于间接、噪声或不完整数据恢复时间图像序列（视频）是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。我们特别考虑每个数据集丢失重要信息的情况，这妨碍了单个图像的准确恢复。尽管最近的一些（变分）方法已经证明了基于联合恢复序列图像的高分辨率图像恢复，但由于参数调整和序列图像类型的限制，仍然存在鲁棒性问题。在这里，我们提出了一种基于分层贝叶斯学习的方法，用于结合先前的图像内和图像间信息来联合恢复序列图像。我们的方法通过从其他图像中“借用”信息来恢复每个图像中丢失的信息。因此，\emph{all} 的各个重建都提高了准确性。我们的方法可用于各种数据采集，并允许不确定性量化。一些初步结果表明其在连续去模糊和磁共振成像方面的潜在用途。 本文提出了一种基于分层贝叶斯学习的联合方法，用于从不完整或噪声数据中恢复时间图像序列（视频）。 Yao Xiao,Jan Glaubitz cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Stefan Denkovski,Shehroz S. Khan,Brandon Malamis,Sae Young Moon,Bing Ye,Alex Mihailidis
title: Multi Visual Modality Fall Detection Dataset
title_zh: 多视觉模态跌倒检测数据集
abstract: Falls are one of the leading cause of injury-related deaths among the elderly worldwide. Effective detection of falls can reduce the risk of complications and injuries. Fall detection can be performed using wearable devices or ambient sensors; these methods may struggle with user compliance issues or false alarms. Video cameras provide a passive alternative; however, regular RGB cameras are impacted by changing lighting conditions and privacy concerns. From a machine learning perspective, developing an effective fall detection system is challenging because of the rarity and variability of falls. Many existing fall detection datasets lack important real-world considerations, such as varied lighting, continuous activities of daily living (ADLs), and camera placement. The lack of these considerations makes it difficult to develop predictive models that can operate effectively in the real world. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel multi-modality dataset (MUVIM) that contains four visual modalities: infra-red, depth, RGB and thermal cameras. These modalities offer benefits such as obfuscated facial features and improved performance in low-light conditions. We formulated fall detection as an anomaly detection problem, in which a customized spatio-temporal convolutional autoencoder was trained only on ADLs so that a fall would increase the reconstruction error. Our results showed that infra-red cameras provided the highest level of performance (AUC ROC=0.94), followed by thermal (AUC ROC=0.87), depth (AUC ROC=0.86) and RGB (AUC ROC=0.83). This research provides a unique opportunity to analyze the utility of camera modalities in detecting falls in a home setting while balancing performance, passiveness, and privacy.

The lack of these considerations makes it difficult to develop predictive models that can operate effectively in the real world. To address these limitations, we introduce a novel multi-modality dataset (MUVIM) that contains four visual modalities: infra-red, depth, RGB and thermal cameras. Our results showed that infra-red cameras provided the highest level of performance (AUC ROC=0.94), followed by thermal (AUC ROC=0.87), depth (AUC ROC=0.86) and RGB (AUC ROC=0.83). This research provides a unique opportunity to analyze the utility of camera modalities in detecting falls in a home setting while balancing performance, passiveness, and privacy.
abstract_zh: 跌倒是全球老年人因伤害而死亡的主要原因之一。有效检测跌倒可以降低并发症和受伤的风险。跌倒检测可以使用可穿戴设备或环境传感器进行；这些方法可能会遇到用户合规性问题或误报问题。摄像机提供了一种被动的替代方案；然而，常规 RGB 摄像头会受到照明条件变化和隐私问题的影响。从机器学习的角度来看，由于跌倒的罕见性和可变性，开发有效的跌倒检测系统具有挑战性。许多现有的跌倒检测数据集缺乏重要的现实考虑因素，例如变化的照明、连续的日常生活活动 (ADL) 和摄像头放置。缺乏这些考虑因素使得开发能够在现实世界中有效运行的预测模型变得困难。为了解决这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的多模态数据集（MUVIM），其中包含四种视觉模态：红外、深度、RGB 和热感相机。这些模式具有模糊面部特征和改善弱光条件下性能等优点。我们将跌倒检测表述为异常检测问题，其中定制的时空卷积自动编码器仅在 ADL 上进行训练，因此跌倒会增加重建误差。我们的结果表明，红外相机提供了最高水平的性能（AUC ROC = 0.94），其次是热成像（AUC ROC = 0.87），深度（AUC ROC = 0.86）和RGB（AUC ROC = 0.83）。这项研究提供了一个独特的机会来分析摄像头模式在检测家庭环境中跌倒方面的效用，同时平衡性能、被动性和隐私。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多模态视觉数据集（MUVIM），包含红外、热成像、深度和RGB摄像头数据，用于改进居家环境中的跌倒检测系统。
AI.motivation: 现有跌倒检测方法存在用户依从性差、误报率高或隐私问题，且现有数据集缺乏真实场景中的光照变化、日常活动连续性等关键因素。
AI.method: 将跌倒检测建模为异常检测问题，使用仅基于日常活动（ADLs）训练的时空卷积自编码器，通过重建误差识别跌倒事件。
AI.result: 红外摄像头表现最佳（AUC ROC=0.94），其次为热成像（0.87）、深度（0.86）和RGB（0.83）。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据集有效平衡了性能、被动监测与隐私需求，其中红外摄像头在跌倒检测中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Sugirtha T,Sridevi M,Khailash Santhakumar,Hao Liu,B Ravi Kiran,Thomas Gauthier,Senthil Yogamani
title: Self-Supervised 3D Monocular Object Detection by Recycling Bounding Boxes
title_zh: 通过回收边界框进行自监督 3D 单目物体检测
comment: Published at ICCVW-SSLAD 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.10786
comments: Published at ICCVW-SSLAD 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2104.10786
abstract: Modern object detection architectures are moving towards employing self-supervised learning (SSL) to improve performance detection with related pretext tasks. Pretext tasks for monocular 3D object detection have not yet been explored yet in literature. The paper studies the application of established self-supervised bounding box recycling by labeling random windows as the pretext task. The classifier head of the 3D detector is trained to classify random windows containing different proportions of the ground truth objects, thus handling the foreground-background imbalance. We evaluate the pretext task using the RTM3D detection model as baseline, with and without the application of data augmentation. We demonstrate improvements of between 2-3 % in mAP 3D and 0.9-1.5 % BEV scores using SSL over the baseline scores. We propose the inverse class frequency re-weighted (ICFW) mAP score that highlights improvements in detection for low frequency classes in a class imbalanced dataset with long tails. We demonstrate improvements in ICFW both mAP 3D and BEV scores to take into account the class imbalance in the KITTI validation dataset. We see 4-5 % increase in ICFW metric with the pretext task.
summary: Modern object detection architectures are moving towards employing self-supervised learning (SSL) to improve performance detection with related pretext tasks. Pretext tasks for monocular 3D object detection have not yet been explored yet in literature. The paper studies the application of established self-supervised bounding box recycling by labeling random windows as the pretext task. The classifier head of the 3D detector is trained to classify random windows containing different proportions of the ground truth objects, thus handling the foreground-background imbalance. We evaluate the pretext task using the RTM3D detection model as baseline, with and without the application of data augmentation. We demonstrate improvements of between 2-3 % in mAP 3D and 0.9-1.5 % BEV scores using SSL over the baseline scores. We propose the inverse class frequency re-weighted (ICFW) mAP score that highlights improvements in detection for low frequency classes in a class imbalanced dataset with long tails. We demonstrate improvements in ICFW both mAP 3D and BEV scores to take into account the class imbalance in the KITTI validation dataset. We see 4-5 % increase in ICFW metric with the pretext task.
abstract_zh: 现代目标检测架构正朝着采用自监督学习 (SSL) 的方向发展，以提高相关借口任务的检测性能。文献中尚未探索单目 3D 对象检测的借口任务。该论文以标记随机窗口为借口任务，研究了建立的自监督边界框回收的应用。 3D 检测器的分类器头经过训练，可以对包含不同比例的地面真实对象的随机窗口进行分类，从而处理前景-背景不平衡问题。我们使用 RTM3D 检测模型作为基线来评估借口任务，无论是否应用数据增强。我们证明，使用 SSL 后，mAP 3D 分数比基线分数提高了 2-3%，BEV 分数提高了 0.9-1.5%。我们提出了逆类频率重新加权 (ICFW) mAP 分数，该分数突出了长尾类不平衡数据集中低频类检测的改进。我们展示了 ICFW mAP 3D 和 BEV 分数的改进，以考虑 KITTI 验证数据集中的类别不平衡。我们看到借口任务的 ICFW 指标增加了 4-5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的单目三维物体检测方法，通过回收边界框作为预训练任务来解决类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单目三维物体检测方法缺乏有效的自监督预训练任务，且存在前景-背景不平衡问题，影响检测性能。
AI.method: 通过将随机窗口标记为预训练任务，训练3D检测器的分类头以处理类别不平衡，并结合数据增强与逆类频率加权（ICFW）指标评估。
AI.result: 在RTM3D基线模型上，SSL方法使mAP3D和BEV分数分别提升2-3%和0.9-1.5%，ICFW指标提升4-5%。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督方法有效提升了单目三维检测性能，特别是在类别不平衡的数据集上表现显著。

Pretext tasks for monocular 3D object detection have not yet been explored yet in literature. The paper studies the application of established self-supervised bounding box recycling by labeling random windows as the pretext task. The classifier head of the 3D detector is trained to classify random windows containing different proportions of the ground truth objects, thus handling the foreground-background imbalance. We evaluate the pretext task using the RTM3D detection model as baseline, with and without the application of data augmentation. We demonstrate improvements of between 2-3 % in mAP 3D and 0.9-1.5 % BEV scores using SSL over the baseline scores. We propose the inverse class frequency re-weighted (ICFW) mAP score that highlights improvements in detection for low frequency classes in a class imbalanced dataset with long tails. We demonstrate improvements in ICFW both mAP 3D and BEV scores to take into account the class imbalance in the KITTI validation dataset. We see 4-5 % increase in ICFW metric with the pretext task. 现代目标检测架构正朝着采用自监督学习 (SSL) 的方向发展，以提高相关借口任务的检测性能。文献中尚未探索单目 3D 对象检测的借口任务。该论文以标记随机窗口为借口任务，研究了建立的自监督边界框回收的应用。 3D 检测器的分类器头经过训练，可以对包含不同比例的地面真实对象的随机窗口进行分类，从而处理前景-背景不平衡问题。我们使用 RTM3D 检测模型作为基线来评估借口任务，无论是否应用数据增强。我们证明，使用 SSL 后，mAP 3D 分数比基线分数提高了 2-3%，BEV 分数提高了 0.9-1.5%。我们提出了逆类频率重新加权 (ICFW) mAP 分数，该分数突出了长尾类不平衡数据集中低频类检测的改进。我们展示了 ICFW mAP 3D 和 BEV 分数的改进，以考虑 KITTI 验证数据集中的类别不平衡。我们看到借口任务的 ICFW 指标增加了 4-5%。 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的单目三维物体检测方法，通过回收边界框作为预训练任务来解决类别不平衡问题。 Sugirtha T,Sridevi M,Khailash Santhakumar,Hao Liu,B Ravi Kiran,Thomas Gauthier,Senthil Yogamani cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Learning Preconditions of Hybrid Force-Velocity Controllers for Contact-Rich Manipulation
title_zh: 用于富接触操纵的混合力-速度控制器的学习先决条件
abstract: Robots need to manipulate objects in constrained environments like shelves and cabinets when assisting humans in everyday settings like homes and offices. These constraints make manipulation difficult by reducing grasp accessibility, so robots need to use non-prehensile strategies that leverage object-environment contacts to perform manipulation tasks. To tackle the challenge of planning and controlling contact-rich behaviors in such settings, this work uses Hybrid Force-Velocity Controllers (HFVCs) as the skill representation and plans skill sequences with learned preconditions. While HFVCs naturally enable robust and compliant contact-rich behaviors, solvers that synthesize them have traditionally relied on precise object models and closed-loop feedback on object pose, which are difficult to obtain in constrained environments due to occlusions. We first relax HFVCs' need for precise models and feedback with our HFVC synthesis framework, then learn a point-cloud-based precondition function to classify where HFVC executions will still be successful despite modeling inaccuracies. Finally, we use the learned precondition in a search-based task planner to complete contact-rich manipulation tasks in a shelf domain. Our method achieves a task success rate of $73.2\%$, outperforming the $51.5\%$ achieved by a baseline without the learned precondition. While the precondition function is trained in simulation, it can also transfer to a real-world setup without further fine-tuning. See supplementary materials and videos at https://sites.google.com/view/constrained-manipulation/
summary: Robots need to manipulate objects in constrained environments like shelves and cabinets when assisting humans in everyday settings like homes and offices. These constraints make manipulation difficult by reducing grasp accessibility, so robots need to use non-prehensile strategies that leverage object-environment contacts to perform manipulation tasks. To tackle the challenge of planning and controlling contact-rich behaviors in such settings, this work uses Hybrid Force-Velocity Controllers (HFVCs) as the skill representation and plans skill sequences with learned preconditions. While HFVCs naturally enable robust and compliant contact-rich behaviors, solvers that synthesize them have traditionally relied on precise object models and closed-loop feedback on object pose, which are difficult to obtain in constrained environments due to occlusions. We first relax HFVCs' need for precise models and feedback with our HFVC synthesis framework, then learn a point-cloud-based precondition function to classify where HFVC executions will still be successful despite modeling inaccuracies. Finally, we use the learned precondition in a search-based task planner to complete contact-rich manipulation tasks in a shelf domain. Our method achieves a task success rate of $73.2\%$, outperforming the $51.5\%$ achieved by a baseline without the learned precondition. While the precondition function is trained in simulation, it can also transfer to a real-world setup without further fine-tuning. See supplementary materials and videos at https://sites.google.com/view/constrained-manipulation/
abstract_zh: 机器人在家庭和办公室等日常环境中协助人类时，需要在货架和橱柜等受限环境中操纵物体。这些限制降低了抓取的可及性，从而使操作变得困难，因此机器人需要使用非抓取策略来利用物体与环境的接触来执行操作任务。为了应对在此类环境中规划和控制丰富接触行为的挑战，这项工作使用混合力-速度控制器（HFVC）作为技能表示，并在学习的前提条件下规划技能序列。虽然 HFVC 自然能够实现稳健且合规的接触丰富行为，但合成它们的求解器传统上依赖于精确的对象模型和对象姿势的闭环反馈，而由于遮挡，这些在受限环境中很难获得。我们首先通过我们的 HFVC 综合框架放松 HFVC 对精确模型和反馈的需求，然后学习基于点云的前提函数来分类，尽管建模不准确，但 HFVC 执行仍会成功。最后，我们在基于搜索的任务规划器中使用学习到的前提条件来完成货架域中接触丰富的操作任务。我们的方法实现了 $73.2\%$ 的任务成功率，优于没有学习前提条件的基线所达到的 $51.5\%$ 的成功率。虽然前置条件函数是在模拟中训练的，但它也可以转移到现实世界的设置，而无需进一步微调。请参阅补充材料和视频：https://sites.google.com/view/constrained-manipulation/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合力-速度控制器（HFVC）和学习先决条件的接触丰富操作方法，以解决受限环境中机器人操作物体的挑战。
AI.motivation: 在受限环境（如货架和抽屉）中，机器人需要通过非抓取策略利用物体与环境的接触进行操作，但传统方法依赖精确模型和反馈，难以在遮挡等复杂场景中实现。
AI.method: 通过放松HFVC对精确模型的依赖，设计基于点云的先决条件函数，并结合搜索式任务规划器实现接触丰富操作。先决条件函数在仿真中训练，可迁移至真实环境。
AI.result: 方法在货架场景中实现73.2%的任务成功率，优于无先决条件的基线方法（51.5%），且无需额外调优即可迁移至真实环境。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习先决条件提升了受限环境中机器人操作的鲁棒性，验证了仿真到现实的迁移能力，为复杂场景操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gavin S. Hartnett,Li Ang Zhang,Caolionn O'Connell,Andrew J. Lohn,Jair Aguirre
title: Empirical Evaluation of Physical Adversarial Patch Attacks Against Overhead Object Detection Models
title_zh: 针对头顶物体检测模型的物理对抗性补丁攻击的实证评估
abstract: Adversarial patches are images designed to fool otherwise well-performing neural network-based computer vision models. Although these attacks were initially conceived of and studied digitally, in that the raw pixel values of the image were perturbed, recent work has demonstrated that these attacks can successfully transfer to the physical world. This can be accomplished by printing out the patch and adding it into scenes of newly captured images or video footage. In this work we further test the efficacy of adversarial patch attacks in the physical world under more challenging conditions. We consider object detection models trained on overhead imagery acquired through aerial or satellite cameras, and we test physical adversarial patches inserted into scenes of a desert environment. Our main finding is that it is far more difficult to successfully implement the adversarial patch attacks under these conditions than in the previously considered conditions. This has important implications for AI safety as the real-world threat posed by adversarial examples may be overstated.
summary: Adversarial patches are images designed to fool otherwise well-performing neural network-based computer vision models. Although these attacks were initially conceived of and studied digitally, in that the raw pixel values of the image were perturbed, recent work has demonstrated that these attacks can successfully transfer to the physical world. This can be accomplished by printing out the patch and adding it into scenes of newly captured images or video footage. In this work we further test the efficacy of adversarial patch attacks in the physical world under more challenging conditions. We consider object detection models trained on overhead imagery acquired through aerial or satellite cameras, and we test physical adversarial patches inserted into scenes of a desert environment. Our main finding is that it is far more difficult to successfully implement the adversarial patch attacks under these conditions than in the previously considered conditions. This has important implications for AI safety as the real-world threat posed by adversarial examples may be overstated.
abstract_zh: 对抗性补丁是旨在欺骗其他性能良好的基于​​神经网络的计算机视觉模型的图像。尽管这些攻击最初是通过数字方式构思和研究的，因为图像的原始像素值受到干扰，但最近的工作表明这些攻击可以成功转移到物理世界。这可以通过打印补丁并将其添加到新捕获的图像或视频片段的场景中来完成。在这项工作中，我们进一步测试了在更具挑战性的条件下物理世界中对抗性补丁攻击的有效性。我们考虑通过航空或卫星摄像机获取的头顶图像训练对象检测模型，并测试插入沙漠环境场景中的物理对抗补丁。我们的主要发现是，在这些条件下成功实施对抗性补丁攻击比之前考虑的条件要困难得多。这对人工智能安全具有重要影响，因为对抗性例子构成的现实威胁可能被夸大了。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了物理对抗补丁攻击在无人机或卫星拍摄的俯视视角目标检测模型中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管数字对抗攻击已被广泛研究，但其在物理世界的实际威胁尚不明确。本文旨在验证对抗补丁在真实复杂环境（如沙漠）中对关键领域（如空中监控）目标检测模型的攻击效果。
AI.method: 研究人员设计并打印对抗补丁，将其放置于沙漠场景中，通过无人机/卫星拍摄含补丁的图像，测试其对目标检测模型的干扰效果，并与数字攻击结果对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，在沙漠等复杂物理环境下，对抗补丁的攻击成功率显著低于数字环境，表明实际部署中的环境因素大幅削弱了攻击效果。
AI.conclusion: 物理对抗攻击的实际威胁可能被高估，真实环境中的光照、纹理等因素显著提高了攻击难度，这对AI安全评估具有重要启示。

This has important implications for AI safety as the real-world threat posed by adversarial examples may be overstated. 对抗性补丁是旨在欺骗其他性能良好的基于​​神经网络的计算机视觉模型的图像。尽管这些攻击最初是通过数字方式构思和研究的，因为图像的原始像素值受到干扰，但最近的工作表明这些攻击可以成功转移到物理世界。这可以通过打印补丁并将其添加到新捕获的图像或视频片段的场景中来完成。在这项工作中，我们进一步测试了在更具挑战性的条件下物理世界中对抗性补丁攻击的有效性。我们考虑通过航空或卫星摄像机获取的头顶图像训练对象检测模型，并测试插入沙漠环境场景中的物理对抗补丁。我们的主要发现是，在这些条件下成功实施对抗性补丁攻击比之前考虑的条件要困难得多。这对人工智能安全具有重要影响，因为对抗性例子构成的现实威胁可能被夸大了。 本文评估了物理对抗补丁攻击在无人机或卫星拍摄的俯视视角目标检测模型中的有效性。 Gavin S. Hartnett,Li Ang Zhang,Caolionn O'Connell,Andrew J. Lohn,Jair Aguirre cs.CV

authors_text: Alex Mitrevski,Santosh Thoduka,Argentina Ortega Sáinz,Maximilian Schöbel,Patrick Nagel,Paul G. Plöger,Erwin Prassler
title: Deploying Robots in Everyday Environments: Towards Dependable and Practical Robotic Systems
title_zh: 在日常环境中部署机器人：迈向可靠且实用的机器人系统
comment: Presented at the 29th International Workshop on Principles of Diagnosis (DX), 2018
comments: Presented at the 29th International Workshop on Principles of Diagnosis (DX), 2018
abstract: Robot deployment in realistic dynamic environments is a challenging problem despite the fact that robots can be quite skilled at a large number of isolated tasks. One reason for this is that robots are rarely equipped with powerful introspection capabilities, which means that they cannot always deal with failures in a reasonable manner; in addition, manual diagnosis is often a tedious task that requires technicians to have a considerable set of robotics skills. In this paper, we discuss our ongoing efforts - in the context of the ROPOD project - to address some of these problems. In particular, we (i) present our early efforts at developing a robotic black box and consider some factors that complicate its design, (ii) explain our component and system monitoring concept, and (iii) describe the necessity for remote monitoring and experimentation as well as our initial attempts at performing those. Our preliminary work opens a range of promising directions for making robots more usable and reliable in practice - not only in the context of ROPOD, but in a more general sense as well.
summary: Robot deployment in realistic dynamic environments is a challenging problem despite the fact that robots can be quite skilled at a large number of isolated tasks. One reason for this is that robots are rarely equipped with powerful introspection capabilities, which means that they cannot always deal with failures in a reasonable manner; in addition, manual diagnosis is often a tedious task that requires technicians to have a considerable set of robotics skills. In this paper, we discuss our ongoing efforts - in the context of the ROPOD project - to address some of these problems. In particular, we (i) present our early efforts at developing a robotic black box and consider some factors that complicate its design, (ii) explain our component and system monitoring concept, and (iii) describe the necessity for remote monitoring and experimentation as well as our initial attempts at performing those. Our preliminary work opens a range of promising directions for making robots more usable and reliable in practice - not only in the context of ROPOD, but in a more general sense as well.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器人可以非常熟练地完成大量孤立的任务，但在现实动态环境中部署机器人是一个具有挑战性的问题。原因之一是机器人很少具备强大的自省能力，这意味着它们不能总是以合理的方式处理故障；此外，手动诊断往往是一项繁琐的任务，需要技术人员具备相当多的机器人技能。在本文中，我们在 ROPOD 项目的背景下讨论了我们为解决其中一些问题所做的持续努力。特别是，我们（i）介绍了我们在开发机器人黑匣子方面的早期努力，并考虑了一些使其设计复杂化的因素，（ii）解释了我们的组件和系统监控概念，以及（iii）描述了远程监控和实验的必要性以及我们在执行这些方面的初步尝试。我们的初步工作为使机器人在实践中更加可用和可靠开辟了一系列有前途的方向——不仅在 ROPOD 的背景下，而且在更一般的意义上也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决机器人在现实动态环境中部署的挑战，通过开发自我诊断和监控系统提升其可靠性和实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人缺乏强大的自我诊断能力，导致在复杂环境中无法有效应对故障，且人工诊断过程繁琐且需要专业技能。
AI.method: 通过ROPOD项目，提出机器人‘黑箱’设计、组件与系统监控机制，并探索远程监控与实验的实现方法。
AI.result: 初步工作为提升机器人实用性和可靠性提供了可行方向，不仅适用于ROPOD项目，也具有广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为构建更可靠、易用的机器人系统奠定了基础，未来需进一步完善监控与远程实验技术。

authors_text: Zhixuan Liang,Jiannong Cao,Shan Jiang,Divya Saxena,Huafeng Xu
title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning with Opponent Modeling for Distributed Multi-agent Cooperation
title_zh: 分布式多智能体合作的具有对手建模的分层强化学习
abstract: Many real-world applications can be formulated as multi-agent cooperation problems, such as network packet routing and coordination of autonomous vehicles. The emergence of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) provides a promising approach for multi-agent cooperation through the interaction of the agents and environments. However, traditional DRL solutions suffer from the high dimensions of multiple agents with continuous action space during policy search. Besides, the dynamicity of agents' policies makes the training non-stationary. To tackle the issues, we propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning approach with high-level decision-making and low-level individual control for efficient policy search. In particular, the cooperation of multiple agents can be learned in high-level discrete action space efficiently. At the same time, the low-level individual control can be reduced to single-agent reinforcement learning. In addition to hierarchical reinforcement learning, we propose an opponent modeling network to model other agents' policies during the learning process. In contrast to end-to-end DRL approaches, our approach reduces the learning complexity by decomposing the overall task into sub-tasks in a hierarchical way. To evaluate the efficiency of our approach, we conduct a real-world case study in the cooperative lane change scenario. Both simulation and real-world experiments show the superiority of our approach in the collision rate and convergence speed.
summary: Many real-world applications can be formulated as multi-agent cooperation problems, such as network packet routing and coordination of autonomous vehicles. The emergence of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) provides a promising approach for multi-agent cooperation through the interaction of the agents and environments. However, traditional DRL solutions suffer from the high dimensions of multiple agents with continuous action space during policy search. Besides, the dynamicity of agents' policies makes the training non-stationary. To tackle the issues, we propose a hierarchical reinforcement learning approach with high-level decision-making and low-level individual control for efficient policy search. In particular, the cooperation of multiple agents can be learned in high-level discrete action space efficiently. At the same time, the low-level individual control can be reduced to single-agent reinforcement learning. In addition to hierarchical reinforcement learning, we propose an opponent modeling network to model other agents' policies during the learning process. In contrast to end-to-end DRL approaches, our approach reduces the learning complexity by decomposing the overall task into sub-tasks in a hierarchical way. To evaluate the efficiency of our approach, we conduct a real-world case study in the cooperative lane change scenario. Both simulation and real-world experiments show the superiority of our approach in the collision rate and convergence speed.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的应用可以表述为多智能体合作问题，例如网络数据包路由和自动驾驶车辆的协调。深度强化学习（DRL）的出现为通过代理和环境的交互进行多代理合作提供了一种有前途的方法。然而，传统的 DRL 解决方案在策略搜索过程中受到多个智能体的高维度和连续动作空间的困扰。此外，代理人政策的动态性使得培训变得非平稳。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种分层强化学习方法，具有高层决策和低层个人控制，以实现有效的政策搜索。特别是，可以在高级离散动作空间中有效地学习多个智能体的合作。同时，低级个体控制可以简化为单智能体强化学习。除了分层强化学习之外，我们还提出了一个对手建模网络来在学习过程中对其他代理的策略进行建模。与端到端 DRL 方法相比，我们的方法通过以分层方式将整体任务分解为子任务来降低学习复杂性。为了评估我们方法的效率，我们在合作变道场景中进行了实际案例研究。仿真和现实实验都表明了我们的方法在碰撞率和收敛速度方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合分层强化学习与对手建模的多智能体协作方法，解决传统深度强化学习在高维连续动作空间和非平稳训练中的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在处理多智能体协作时面临高维动作空间和动态策略导致的非平稳训练问题，需降低学习复杂度并提升协作效率。
AI.method: 采用分层强化学习框架，将决策分解为高层离散动作规划与底层单智能体控制，并引入对手建模网络动态预测其他智能体策略。
AI.result: 在协作变道场景的仿真与真实实验中，该方法在碰撞率和收敛速度上均优于端到端深度强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 分层结构与对手建模的结合有效降低了多智能体协作的学习复杂度，验证了方法在实际场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Karren Yang,Wan-Yi Lin,Manash Barman,Filipe Condessa,Zico Kolter
title: Defending Multimodal Fusion Models against Single-Source Adversaries
title_zh: 保护多模态融合模型免受单一来源对手的攻击
abstract: Beyond achieving high performance across many vision tasks, multimodal models are expected to be robust to single-source faults due to the availability of redundant information between modalities. In this paper, we investigate the robustness of multimodal neural networks against worst-case (i.e., adversarial) perturbations on a single modality. We first show that standard multimodal fusion models are vulnerable to single-source adversaries: an attack on any single modality can overcome the correct information from multiple unperturbed modalities and cause the model to fail. This surprising vulnerability holds across diverse multimodal tasks and necessitates a solution. Motivated by this finding, we propose an adversarially robust fusion strategy that trains the model to compare information coming from all the input sources, detect inconsistencies in the perturbed modality compared to the other modalities, and only allow information from the unperturbed modalities to pass through. Our approach significantly improves on state-of-the-art methods in single-source robustness, achieving gains of 7.8-25.2% on action recognition, 19.7-48.2% on object detection, and 1.6-6.7% on sentiment analysis, without degrading performance on unperturbed (i.e., clean) data.
summary: Beyond achieving high performance across many vision tasks, multimodal models are expected to be robust to single-source faults due to the availability of redundant information between modalities. In this paper, we investigate the robustness of multimodal neural networks against worst-case (i.e., adversarial) perturbations on a single modality. We first show that standard multimodal fusion models are vulnerable to single-source adversaries: an attack on any single modality can overcome the correct information from multiple unperturbed modalities and cause the model to fail. This surprising vulnerability holds across diverse multimodal tasks and necessitates a solution. Motivated by this finding, we propose an adversarially robust fusion strategy that trains the model to compare information coming from all the input sources, detect inconsistencies in the perturbed modality compared to the other modalities, and only allow information from the unperturbed modalities to pass through. Our approach significantly improves on state-of-the-art methods in single-source robustness, achieving gains of 7.8-25.2% on action recognition, 19.7-48.2% on object detection, and 1.6-6.7% on sentiment analysis, without degrading performance on unperturbed (i.e., clean) data.
abstract_zh: 除了在许多视觉任务中实现高性能之外，由于模态之间冗余信息的可用性，多模态模型预计对单源故障具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们研究了多模态神经网络针对单一模态的最坏情况（即对抗性）扰动的鲁棒性。我们首先表明，标准多模态融合模型容易受到单源对手的攻击：对任何单一模态的攻击都可以克服来自多个未受干扰模态的正确信息，并导致模型失败。这种令人惊讶的漏洞存在于多种多模式任务中，因此需要一个解决方案。受这一发现的启发，我们提出了一种对抗性鲁棒融合策略，该策略训练模型来比较来自所有输入源的信息，检测受扰动模态与其他模态相比的不一致，并且只允许来自未扰动模态的信息通过。我们的方法在单源鲁棒性方面显着改进了最先进的方法，在动作识别上实现了 7.8-25.2% 的增益，在对象检测上实现了 19.7-48.2% 的增益，在情感分析上实现了 1.6-6.7% 的增益，而不会降低未受干扰（即干净）数据的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态融合模型对单源对抗攻击的鲁棒性，并提出了一种增强防御能力的融合策略。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态模型在单个模态受到对抗性扰动时易失效，尽管其他模态信息未被篡改，这一漏洞需要解决。
AI.method: 通过训练模型比较所有输入源的信息，检测被扰动模态与其他模态的不一致性，并仅允许未被扰动模态的信息通过。
AI.result: 在动作识别、目标检测和情感分析任务中，单源鲁棒性分别提升7.8-25.2%、19.7-48.2%和1.6-6.7%，且未损害干净数据性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了多模态模型对单源对抗攻击的防御能力，同时保持了正常数据下的模型表现。

search_text: Defending Multimodal Fusion Models against Single-Source Adversaries 保护多模态融合模型免受单一来源对手的攻击 Beyond achieving high performance across many vision tasks, multimodal models are expected to be robust to single-source faults due to the availability of redundant information between modalities. In this paper, we investigate the robustness of multimodal neural networks against worst-case (i.e., adversarial) perturbations on a single modality. We first show that standard multimodal fusion models are vulnerable to single-source adversaries: an attack on any single modality can overcome the correct information from multiple unperturbed modalities and cause the model to fail. This surprising vulnerability holds across diverse multimodal tasks and necessitates a solution. Motivated by this finding, we propose an adversarially robust fusion strategy that trains the model to compare information coming from all the input sources, detect inconsistencies in the perturbed modality compared to the other modalities, and only allow information from the unperturbed modalities to pass through. Our approach significantly improves on state-of-the-art methods in single-source robustness, achieving gains of 7.8-25.2% on action recognition, 19.7-48.2% on object detection, and 1.6-6.7% on sentiment analysis, without degrading performance on unperturbed (i.e., clean) data. 除了在许多视觉任务中实现高性能之外，由于模态之间冗余信息的可用性，多模态模型预计对单源故障具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们研究了多模态神经网络针对单一模态的最坏情况（即对抗性）扰动的鲁棒性。我们首先表明，标准多模态融合模型容易受到单源对手的攻击：对任何单一模态的攻击都可以克服来自多个未受干扰模态的正确信息，并导致模型失败。这种令人惊讶的漏洞存在于多种多模式任务中，因此需要一个解决方案。受这一发现的启发，我们提出了一种对抗性鲁棒融合策略，该策略训练模型来比较来自所有输入源的信息，检测受扰动模态与其他模态相比的不一致，并且只允许来自未扰动模态的信息通过。我们的方法在单源鲁棒性方面显着改进了最先进的方法，在动作识别上实现了 7.8-25.2% 的增益，在对象检测上实现了 19.7-48.2% 的增益，在情感分析上实现了 1.6-6.7% 的增益，而不会降低未受干扰（即干净）数据的性能。 本文研究多模态融合模型对单源对抗攻击的鲁棒性，并提出了一种增强防御能力的融合策略。 Karren Yang,Wan-Yi Lin,Manash Barman,Filipe Condessa,Zico Kolter cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Syrine Belakaria,Janardhan Rao Doppa,Nicolo Fusi,Rishit Sheth
title: Bayesian Optimization Over Iterative Learners with Structured Responses: A Budget-aware Planning Approach
title_zh: 具有结构化响应的迭代学习器的贝叶斯优化：一种预算意识规划方法
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 26th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics (AISTATS) 2023
abstract: The rising growth of deep neural networks (DNNs) and datasets in size motivates the need for efficient solutions for simultaneous model selection and training. Many methods for hyperparameter optimization (HPO) of iterative learners, including DNNs, attempt to solve this problem by querying and learning a response surface while searching for the optimum of that surface. However, many of these methods make myopic queries, do not consider prior knowledge about the response structure, and/or perform a biased cost-aware search, all of which exacerbate identifying the best-performing model when a total cost budget is specified. This paper proposes a novel approach referred to as {\bf B}udget-{\bf A}ware {\bf P}lanning for {\bf I}terative Learners (BAPI) to solve HPO problems under a constrained cost budget. BAPI is an efficient non-myopic Bayesian optimization solution that accounts for the budget and leverages the prior knowledge about the objective function and cost function to select better configurations and to take more informed decisions during the evaluation (training). Experiments on diverse HPO benchmarks for iterative learners show that BAPI performs better than state-of-the-art baselines in most cases.
summary: The rising growth of deep neural networks (DNNs) and datasets in size motivates the need for efficient solutions for simultaneous model selection and training. Many methods for hyperparameter optimization (HPO) of iterative learners, including DNNs, attempt to solve this problem by querying and learning a response surface while searching for the optimum of that surface. However, many of these methods make myopic queries, do not consider prior knowledge about the response structure, and/or perform a biased cost-aware search, all of which exacerbate identifying the best-performing model when a total cost budget is specified. This paper proposes a novel approach referred to as {\bf B}udget-{\bf A}ware {\bf P}lanning for {\bf I}terative Learners (BAPI) to solve HPO problems under a constrained cost budget. BAPI is an efficient non-myopic Bayesian optimization solution that accounts for the budget and leverages the prior knowledge about the objective function and cost function to select better configurations and to take more informed decisions during the evaluation (training). Experiments on diverse HPO benchmarks for iterative learners show that BAPI performs better than state-of-the-art baselines in most cases.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 和数据集规模的不断增长激发了对同步模型选择和训练的有效解决方案的需求。许多迭代学习器的超参数优化 (HPO) 方法（包括 DNN）都试图通过查询和学习响应面并同时搜索响应面的最优值来解决此问题。然而，这些方法中的许多方法都会进行短视查询，不考虑有关响应结构的先验知识，和/或执行有偏差的成本感知搜索，所有这些都会在指定总成本预算时加剧识别最佳性能模型。本文提出了一种称为{\bf B}udget-{\bf A}ware {\bf P}lanning 的新颖方法，用于{\bf I}迭代学习器 (BAPI)，以在有限的成本预算下解决 HPO 问题。 BAPI 是一种高效的非近视贝叶斯优化解决方案，它考虑预算并利用有关目标函数和成本函数的先验知识来选择更好的配置并在评估（训练）期间做出更明智的决策。对迭代学习器的各种 HPO 基准进行的实验表明，在大多数情况下，BAPI 的性能优于最先进的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BAPI的预算感知贝叶斯优化方法，用于在受限成本预算下解决迭代学习器（如深度神经网络）的超参数优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超参数优化方法在处理深度神经网络等迭代学习器时存在效率低下问题，主要表现为短视查询、忽略响应结构先验知识以及存在偏差的成本感知搜索，导致在预算约束下难以找到最优模型。
AI.method: BAPI采用非短视贝叶斯优化框架，结合预算约束和目标函数/成本函数的先验知识，在训练过程中进行更优配置选择和决策。
AI.result: 在多个迭代学习器的超参数优化基准测试中，BAPI在多数情况下优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: BAPI通过整合预算约束和先验知识，有效解决了传统方法在成本受限场景下的超参数优化不足问题。

authors_text: Moshe Sipper,Jason H. Moore,Ryan J. Urbanowicz
title: Solution and Fitness Evolution (SAFE): Coevolving Solutions and Their Objective Functions
title_zh: 解决方案和适应度进化（SAFE）：共同进化解决方案及其目标函数
abstract: We recently highlighted a fundamental problem recognized to confound algorithmic optimization, namely, \textit{conflating} the objective with the objective function. Even when the former is well defined, the latter may not be obvious, e.g., in learning a strategy to navigate a maze to find a goal (objective), an effective objective function to \textit{evaluate} strategies may not be a simple function of the distance to the objective. We proposed to automate the means by which a good objective function may be discovered -- a proposal reified herein. We present \textbf{S}olution \textbf{A}nd \textbf{F}itness \textbf{E}volution (\textbf{SAFE}), a \textit{commensalistic} coevolutionary algorithm that maintains two coevolving populations: a population of candidate solutions and a population of candidate objective functions. As proof of principle of this concept, we show that SAFE successfully evolves not only solutions within a robotic maze domain, but also the objective functions needed to measure solution quality during evolution.
summary: We recently highlighted a fundamental problem recognized to confound algorithmic optimization, namely, \textit{conflating} the objective with the objective function. Even when the former is well defined, the latter may not be obvious, e.g., in learning a strategy to navigate a maze to find a goal (objective), an effective objective function to \textit{evaluate} strategies may not be a simple function of the distance to the objective. We proposed to automate the means by which a good objective function may be discovered -- a proposal reified herein. We present \textbf{S}olution \textbf{A}nd \textbf{F}itness \textbf{E}volution (\textbf{SAFE}), a \textit{commensalistic} coevolutionary algorithm that maintains two coevolving populations: a population of candidate solutions and a population of candidate objective functions. As proof of principle of this concept, we show that SAFE successfully evolves not only solutions within a robotic maze domain, but also the objective functions needed to measure solution quality during evolution.
abstract_zh: 我们最近强调了一个被认为会混淆算法优化的基本问题，即“将目标与目标函数混为一谈”。即使前者被很好地定义，后者也可能并不明显，例如，在学习一种策略来导航迷宫以找到目标（目标）时，\ textit {evaluate}策略的有效目标函数可能不是到目标的距离的简单函数。我们提议将发现良好目标函数的方法自动化——这里具体化了这一提议。我们提出 \textbf{S}olution \textbf{A}nd \textbf{F}itness \textbf{E}volution (\textbf{SAFE})，这是一种 \textit{commensalistic} 协同进化算法，它维护两个共同进化群体：候选解的群体和候选目标函数的群体。作为这个概念的原理证明，我们证明 SAFE 不仅成功地进化了机器人迷宫域内的解决方案，而且还成功地进化了在进化过程中测量解决方案质量所需的目标函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAFE的共生协同进化算法，通过同时进化候选解决方案和候选目标函数，解决优化算法中目标与目标函数混淆的问题。
AI.motivation: 在算法优化中，即使目标明确，目标函数的设计可能并不直观，例如在迷宫导航任务中，单纯的距离度量可能无法有效评估策略质量，因此需要自动发现合适的目标函数。
AI.method: SAFE算法维护两个协同进化的种群：候选解决方案种群和候选目标函数种群，通过共生机制使两者相互适应和优化。
AI.result: SAFE在机器人迷宫领域成功演化出有效解决方案及对应的目标函数，验证了协同进化的可行性。
AI.conclusion: SAFE展示了协同进化解决方案与目标函数的潜力，为复杂优化问题中目标函数设计难题提供了新思路。

search_text: Solution and Fitness Evolution (SAFE): Coevolving Solutions and Their Objective Functions 解决方案和适应度进化（SAFE）：共同进化解决方案及其目标函数 We recently highlighted a fundamental problem recognized to confound algorithmic optimization, namely, \textit{conflating} the objective with the objective function. Even when the former is well defined, the latter may not be obvious, e.g., in learning a strategy to navigate a maze to find a goal (objective), an effective objective function to \textit{evaluate} strategies may not be a simple function of the distance to the objective. We proposed to automate the means by which a good objective function may be discovered -- a proposal reified herein. We present \textbf{S}olution \textbf{A}nd \textbf{F}itness \textbf{E}volution (\textbf{SAFE}), a \textit{commensalistic} coevolutionary algorithm that maintains two coevolving populations: a population of candidate solutions and a population of candidate objective functions. As proof of principle of this concept, we show that SAFE successfully evolves not only solutions within a robotic maze domain, but also the objective functions needed to measure solution quality during evolution. 我们最近强调了一个被认为会混淆算法优化的基本问题，即“将目标与目标函数混为一谈”。即使前者被很好地定义，后者也可能并不明显，例如，在学习一种策略来导航迷宫以找到目标（目标）时，\ textit {evaluate}策略的有效目标函数可能不是到目标的距离的简单函数。我们提议将发现良好目标函数的方法自动化——这里具体化了这一提议。我们提出 \textbf{S}olution \textbf{A}nd \textbf{F}itness \textbf{E}volution (\textbf{SAFE})，这是一种 \textit{commensalistic} 协同进化算法，它维护两个共同进化群体：候选解的群体和候选目标函数的群体。作为这个概念的原理证明，我们证明 SAFE 不仅成功地进化了机器人迷宫域内的解决方案，而且还成功地进化了在进化过程中测量解决方案质量所需的目标函数。 本文提出了一种名为SAFE的共生协同进化算法，通过同时进化候选解决方案和候选目标函数，解决优化算法中目标与目标函数混淆的问题。 Moshe Sipper,Jason H. Moore,Ryan J. Urbanowicz cs.NE,cs.RO

title: Binary and Multinomial Classification through Evolutionary Symbolic Regression
title_zh: 通过进化符号回归进行二元和多项分类
comment: ef:Proceedings of 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion
comments: ef:Proceedings of 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference Companion
abstract: We present three evolutionary symbolic regression-based classification algorithms for binary and multinomial datasets: GPLearnClf, CartesianClf, and ClaSyCo. Tested over 162 datasets and compared to three state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms -- XGBoost, LightGBM, and a deep neural network -- we find our algorithms to be competitive. Further, we demonstrate how to find the best method for one's dataset automatically, through the use of a state-of-the-art hyperparameter optimizer.
summary: We present three evolutionary symbolic regression-based classification algorithms for binary and multinomial datasets: GPLearnClf, CartesianClf, and ClaSyCo. Tested over 162 datasets and compared to three state-of-the-art machine learning algorithms -- XGBoost, LightGBM, and a deep neural network -- we find our algorithms to be competitive. Further, we demonstrate how to find the best method for one's dataset automatically, through the use of a state-of-the-art hyperparameter optimizer.
abstract_zh: 我们针对二元和多项数据集提出了三种基于进化符号回归的分类算法：GPLearnClf、CartesianClf 和 ClaSyCo。通过测试超过 162 个数据集，并与三种最先进的机器学习算法（XGBoost、LightGBM 和深度神经网络）进行比较，我们发现我们的算法具有竞争力。此外，我们演示了如何通过使用最先进的超参数优化器自动找到适合数据集的最佳方法。

AI.tldr: 提出三种基于进化符号回归的分类算法，并在多个数据集上验证其有效性
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习方法在处理复杂分类任务时可能存在可解释性不足的问题，因此寻求通过进化符号回归方法提升分类性能和可解释性
AI.method: 提出三种进化符号回归分类算法（GPLearnClf、CartesianClf、ClaSyCo），并结合超参数优化器自动选择最佳模型
AI.result: 在162个数据集上的实验表明，所提出的算法在性能上与XGBoost、LightGBM和深度神经网络等先进方法相当
AI.conclusion: 进化符号回归方法在分类任务中表现优异，且结合超参数优化可提升方法适用性，为不同数据集提供自动化的最佳选择

title: p-Meta: Towards On-device Deep Model Adaptation
title_zh: p-Meta：迈向设备上深度模型适配
abstract: Data collected by IoT devices are often private and have a large diversity across users. Therefore, learning requires pre-training a model with available representative data samples, deploying the pre-trained model on IoT devices, and adapting the deployed model on the device with local data. Such an on-device adaption for deep learning empowered applications demands data and memory efficiency. However, existing gradient-based meta learning schemes fail to support memory-efficient adaptation. To this end, we propose p-Meta, a new meta learning method that enforces structure-wise partial parameter updates while ensuring fast generalization to unseen tasks. Evaluations on few-shot image classification and reinforcement learning tasks show that p-Meta not only improves the accuracy but also substantially reduces the peak dynamic memory by a factor of 2.5 on average compared to state-of-the-art few-shot adaptation methods.
summary: Data collected by IoT devices are often private and have a large diversity across users. Therefore, learning requires pre-training a model with available representative data samples, deploying the pre-trained model on IoT devices, and adapting the deployed model on the device with local data. Such an on-device adaption for deep learning empowered applications demands data and memory efficiency. However, existing gradient-based meta learning schemes fail to support memory-efficient adaptation. To this end, we propose p-Meta, a new meta learning method that enforces structure-wise partial parameter updates while ensuring fast generalization to unseen tasks. Evaluations on few-shot image classification and reinforcement learning tasks show that p-Meta not only improves the accuracy but also substantially reduces the peak dynamic memory by a factor of 2.5 on average compared to state-of-the-art few-shot adaptation methods.
abstract_zh: 物联网设备收集的数据通常是私有的，并且在不同用户之间具有很大的多样性。因此，学习需要使用可用的代表性数据样本预训练模型，在物联网设备上部署预训练的模型，并使用本地数据调整设备上部署的模型。这种针对深度学习支持的应用程序的设备上适应需要数据和内存效率。然而，现有的基于梯度的元学习方案无法支持内存高效的适应。为此，我们提出了 p-Meta，这是一种新的元学习方法，它强制执行结构方面的部分参数更新，同时确保快速泛化到未见过的任务。对少样本图像分类和强化学习任务的评估表明，与最先进的少样本自适应方法相比，p-Meta 不仅提高了准确性，而且将峰值动态内存平均降低了 2.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出p-Meta方法，解决物联网设备上深度模型适应的数据和内存效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的元学习方法无法满足物联网设备在本地数据适应时对内存效率的要求。
AI.method: 通过结构化部分参数更新机制，实现快速泛化且降低内存消耗的元学习方法p-Meta。
AI.result: 在少样本分类和强化学习任务中，准确率提升且峰值动态内存平均减少2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: p-Meta在保持模型适应效果的同时显著优化了设备端深度学习的内存效率。

authors_text: Ke Yu,Shantanu Ghosh,Zhexiong Liu,Christopher Deible,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: Anatomy-Guided Weakly-Supervised Abnormality Localization in Chest X-rays
title_zh: 胸部 X 射线解剖引导弱监督异常定位
abstract: Creating a large-scale dataset of abnormality annotation on medical images is a labor-intensive and costly task. Leveraging weak supervision from readily available data such as radiology reports can compensate lack of large-scale data for anomaly detection methods. However, most of the current methods only use image-level pathological observations, failing to utilize the relevant anatomy mentions in reports. Furthermore, Natural Language Processing (NLP)-mined weak labels are noisy due to label sparsity and linguistic ambiguity. We propose an Anatomy-Guided chest X-ray Network (AGXNet) to address these issues of weak annotation. Our framework consists of a cascade of two networks, one responsible for identifying anatomical abnormalities and the second responsible for pathological observations. The critical component in our framework is an anatomy-guided attention module that aids the downstream observation network in focusing on the relevant anatomical regions generated by the anatomy network. We use Positive Unlabeled (PU) learning to account for the fact that lack of mention does not necessarily mean a negative label. Our quantitative and qualitative results on the MIMIC-CXR dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of AGXNet in disease and anatomical abnormality localization. Experiments on the NIH Chest X-ray dataset show that the learned feature representations are transferable and can achieve the state-of-the-art performances in disease classification and competitive disease localization results. Our code is available at https://github.com/batmanlab/AGXNet
summary: Creating a large-scale dataset of abnormality annotation on medical images is a labor-intensive and costly task. Leveraging weak supervision from readily available data such as radiology reports can compensate lack of large-scale data for anomaly detection methods. However, most of the current methods only use image-level pathological observations, failing to utilize the relevant anatomy mentions in reports. Furthermore, Natural Language Processing (NLP)-mined weak labels are noisy due to label sparsity and linguistic ambiguity. We propose an Anatomy-Guided chest X-ray Network (AGXNet) to address these issues of weak annotation. Our framework consists of a cascade of two networks, one responsible for identifying anatomical abnormalities and the second responsible for pathological observations. The critical component in our framework is an anatomy-guided attention module that aids the downstream observation network in focusing on the relevant anatomical regions generated by the anatomy network. We use Positive Unlabeled (PU) learning to account for the fact that lack of mention does not necessarily mean a negative label. Our quantitative and qualitative results on the MIMIC-CXR dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of AGXNet in disease and anatomical abnormality localization. Experiments on the NIH Chest X-ray dataset show that the learned feature representations are transferable and can achieve the state-of-the-art performances in disease classification and competitive disease localization results. Our code is available at https://github.com/batmanlab/AGXNet
abstract_zh: 创建医学图像异常注释的大规模数据集是一项劳动密集型且成本高昂的任务。利用放射学报告等现成数据的弱监督可以弥补异常检测方法大规模数据的缺乏。然而，目前的大多数方法仅使用图像级病理观察，未能利用报告中提到的相关解剖学内容。此外，由于标签稀疏性和语言歧义，自然语言处理（NLP）挖掘的弱标签存在噪声。我们提出了解剖引导胸部 X 射线网络（AGXNet）来解决这些弱注释问题。我们的框架由两个网络的级联组成，一个负责识别解剖异常，第二个负责病理观察。我们框架中的关键组件是解剖学引导的注意力模块，它帮助下游观察网络关注解剖网络生成的相关解剖区域。我们使用正向无标签（PU）学习来解释缺乏提及并不一定意味着负面标签的事实。我们在 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上的定量和定性结果证明了 AGXNet 在疾病和解剖异常定位方面的有效性。在 NIH 胸部 X 射线数据集上的实验表明，学习到的特征表示是可转移的，并且可以在疾病分类和竞争性疾病定位结果中实现最先进的性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/batmanlab/AGXNet

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解剖学引导的弱监督方法，用于在胸部X光片中定位异常区域。
AI.motivation: 创建大规模的医学图像异常标注数据集成本高昂且耗时，现有方法未能有效利用报告中的解剖学信息，且自然语言处理生成的弱标签存在噪声。
AI.method: 设计了包含两个网络的AGXNet框架，通过解剖学引导注意力模块关联解剖结构与病理观察，并采用正负未标记（PU）学习处理标签噪声问题。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上实现了疾病和解剖异常定位的有效性，在NIH数据集上证明了特征表示的可迁移性，达到分类和定位的最先进水平。

search_text: Anatomy-Guided Weakly-Supervised Abnormality Localization in Chest X-rays 胸部 X 射线解剖引导弱监督异常定位 Creating a large-scale dataset of abnormality annotation on medical images is a labor-intensive and costly task. Leveraging weak supervision from readily available data such as radiology reports can compensate lack of large-scale data for anomaly detection methods. However, most of the current methods only use image-level pathological observations, failing to utilize the relevant anatomy mentions in reports. Furthermore, Natural Language Processing (NLP)-mined weak labels are noisy due to label sparsity and linguistic ambiguity. We propose an Anatomy-Guided chest X-ray Network (AGXNet) to address these issues of weak annotation. Our framework consists of a cascade of two networks, one responsible for identifying anatomical abnormalities and the second responsible for pathological observations. The critical component in our framework is an anatomy-guided attention module that aids the downstream observation network in focusing on the relevant anatomical regions generated by the anatomy network. We use Positive Unlabeled (PU) learning to account for the fact that lack of mention does not necessarily mean a negative label. Our quantitative and qualitative results on the MIMIC-CXR dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of AGXNet in disease and anatomical abnormality localization. Experiments on the NIH Chest X-ray dataset show that the learned feature representations are transferable and can achieve the state-of-the-art performances in disease classification and competitive disease localization results. Our code is available at https://github.com/batmanlab/AGXNet 创建医学图像异常注释的大规模数据集是一项劳动密集型且成本高昂的任务。利用放射学报告等现成数据的弱监督可以弥补异常检测方法大规模数据的缺乏。然而，目前的大多数方法仅使用图像级病理观察，未能利用报告中提到的相关解剖学内容。此外，由于标签稀疏性和语言歧义，自然语言处理（NLP）挖掘的弱标签存在噪声。我们提出了解剖引导胸部 X 射线网络（AGXNet）来解决这些弱注释问题。我们的框架由两个网络的级联组成，一个负责识别解剖异常，第二个负责病理观察。我们框架中的关键组件是解剖学引导的注意力模块，它帮助下游观察网络关注解剖网络生成的相关解剖区域。我们使用正向无标签（PU）学习来解释缺乏提及并不一定意味着负面标签的事实。我们在 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上的定量和定性结果证明了 AGXNet 在疾病和解剖异常定位方面的有效性。在 NIH 胸部 X 射线数据集上的实验表明，学习到的特征表示是可转移的，并且可以在疾病分类和竞争性疾病定位结果中实现最先进的性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/batmanlab/AGXNet 本文提出了一种基于解剖学引导的弱监督方法，用于在胸部X光片中定位异常区域。 Ke Yu,Shantanu Ghosh,Zhexiong Liu,Christopher Deible,Kayhan Batmanghelich cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiyuan Yao,Tianyu Shi,Site Li,Yiting Xie,Yuanyuan Qin,Xiongjie Xie,Huan Lu,Yan Zhang
title: Towards Modern Card Games with Large-Scale Action Spaces Through Action Representation
title_zh: 通过动作表现走向具有大规模动作空间的现代卡牌游戏
comment: Accpeted as IEEE CoG2022 proceedings paper
comments: Accpeted as IEEE CoG2022 proceedings paper
abstract: Axie infinity is a complicated card game with a huge-scale action space. This makes it difficult to solve this challenge using generic Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms. We propose a hybrid RL framework to learn action representations and game strategies. To avoid evaluating every action in the large feasible action set, our method evaluates actions in a fixed-size set which is determined using action representations. We compare the performance of our method with the other two baseline methods in terms of their sample efficiency and the winning rates of the trained models. We empirically show that our method achieves an overall best winning rate and the best sample efficiency among the three methods.
summary: Axie infinity is a complicated card game with a huge-scale action space. This makes it difficult to solve this challenge using generic Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms. We propose a hybrid RL framework to learn action representations and game strategies. To avoid evaluating every action in the large feasible action set, our method evaluates actions in a fixed-size set which is determined using action representations. We compare the performance of our method with the other two baseline methods in terms of their sample efficiency and the winning rates of the trained models. We empirically show that our method achieves an overall best winning rate and the best sample efficiency among the three methods.
abstract_zh: Axie Infinity 是一款复杂的卡牌游戏，具有巨大的动作空间。这使得使用通用强化学习 (RL) 算法很难解决这一挑战。我们提出了一个混合强化学习框架来学习动作表征和游戏策略。为了避免评估大型可行动作集中的每个动作，我们的方法评估使用动作表示确定的固定大小集中的动作。我们将我们的方法与其他两种基线方法在样本效率和训练模型的获胜率方面进行比较。我们的经验表明，我们的方法在三种方法中实现了总体最佳胜率和最佳样本效率。

AI.tldr: 解决大规模动作空间的现代卡牌游戏问题，提出混合强化学习框架以提高样本效率和胜率
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在大规模动作空间下效率低下，难以处理如Axie Infinity等复杂卡牌游戏的策略学习问题
AI.method: 采用混合强化学习框架，通过动作表示技术将大规模动作空间映射到固定大小的评估集合，从而减少计算量并提高效率
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在样本效率和训练模型胜率方面优于其他两种基线方法，表现最佳
AI.conclusion: 混合强化学习框架通过动作表示有效处理大规模动作空间问题，为复杂卡牌游戏的AI策略训练提供了可行解决方案

title: RandStainNA: Learning Stain-Agnostic Features from Histology Slides by Bridging Stain Augmentation and Normalization
title_zh: RandStainNA：通过桥接染色增强和标准化，从组织学载玻片中学习染色不可知的特征
abstract: Stain variations often decrease the generalization ability of deep learning based approaches in digital histopathology analysis. Two separate proposals, namely stain normalization (SN) and stain augmentation (SA), have been spotlighted to reduce the generalization error, where the former alleviates the stain shift across different medical centers using template image and the latter enriches the accessible stain styles by the simulation of more stain variations. However, their applications are bounded by the selection of template images and the construction of unrealistic styles. To address the problems, we unify SN and SA with a novel RandStainNA scheme, which constrains variable stain styles in a practicable range to train a stain agnostic deep learning model. The RandStainNA is applicable to stain normalization in a collection of color spaces i.e. HED, HSV, LAB. Additionally, we propose a random color space selection scheme to gain extra performance improvement. We evaluate our method by two diagnostic tasks i.e. tissue subtype classification and nuclei segmentation, with various network backbones. The performance superiority over both SA and SN yields that the proposed RandStainNA can consistently improve the generalization ability, that our models can cope with more incoming clinical datasets with unpredicted stain styles. The codes is available at https://github.com/yiqings/RandStainNA.
summary: Stain variations often decrease the generalization ability of deep learning based approaches in digital histopathology analysis. Two separate proposals, namely stain normalization (SN) and stain augmentation (SA), have been spotlighted to reduce the generalization error, where the former alleviates the stain shift across different medical centers using template image and the latter enriches the accessible stain styles by the simulation of more stain variations. However, their applications are bounded by the selection of template images and the construction of unrealistic styles. To address the problems, we unify SN and SA with a novel RandStainNA scheme, which constrains variable stain styles in a practicable range to train a stain agnostic deep learning model. The RandStainNA is applicable to stain normalization in a collection of color spaces i.e. HED, HSV, LAB. Additionally, we propose a random color space selection scheme to gain extra performance improvement. We evaluate our method by two diagnostic tasks i.e. tissue subtype classification and nuclei segmentation, with various network backbones. The performance superiority over both SA and SN yields that the proposed RandStainNA can consistently improve the generalization ability, that our models can cope with more incoming clinical datasets with unpredicted stain styles. The codes is available at https://github.com/yiqings/RandStainNA.
abstract_zh: 染色变化通常会降低数字组织病理学分析中基于深度学习的方法的泛化能力。两个单独的提议，即染色归一化（SN）和染色增强（SA），已被人们关注以减少泛化误差，其中前者使用模板图像减轻不同医疗中心之间的染色偏移，后者通过模拟更多染色变化来丰富可访问的染色样式。然而，它们的应用受到模板图像的选择和不切实际的样式的构造的限制。为了解决这些问题，我们将 SN 和 SA 与一种新颖的 RandStainNA 方案结合起来，该方案将可变的污渍样式限制在可行的范围内，以训练与污渍无关的深度学习模型。 RandStainNA 适用于一系列颜色空间（即 HED、HSV、LAB）中的染色标准化。此外，我们提出了一种随机颜色空间选择方案，以获得额外的性能改进。我们通过两个诊断任务（即组织亚型分类和细胞核分割）以及各种网络主干来评估我们的方法。相对于 SA 和 SN 的性能优势使得所提出的 RandStainNA 可以持续提高泛化能力，我们的模型可以处理更多具有不可预测染色风格的传入临床数据集。代码可在 https://github.com/yiqings/RandStainNA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RandStainNA方法，通过统一染色归一化与染色增强技术，解决数字病理分析中染色差异导致的模型泛化能力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有染色归一化(SN)依赖模板图像且染色增强(SA)生成不真实风格，限制了模型泛化能力，需统一两者并约束染色风格范围以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计RandStainNA框架，在HED/HSV/LAB等多色域中约束染色风格范围，结合随机色域选择策略，统一实现染色归一化与增强。
AI.result: 在组织亚型分类和细胞核分割任务中，RandStainNA优于SA和SN方法，显著提升模型对未知染色风格临床数据集的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: RandStainNA通过融合染色归一化与增强技术，在多色域约束下有效提升模型泛化能力，可应对临床中不可预测的染色风格挑战。

The performance superiority over both SA and SN yields that the proposed RandStainNA can consistently improve the generalization ability, that our models can cope with more incoming clinical datasets with unpredicted stain styles. The codes is available at https://github.com/yiqings/RandStainNA. 染色变化通常会降低数字组织病理学分析中基于深度学习的方法的泛化能力。两个单独的提议，即染色归一化（SN）和染色增强（SA），已被人们关注以减少泛化误差，其中前者使用模板图像减轻不同医疗中心之间的染色偏移，后者通过模拟更多染色变化来丰富可访问的染色样式。然而，它们的应用受到模板图像的选择和不切实际的样式的构造的限制。为了解决这些问题，我们将 SN 和 SA 与一种新颖的 RandStainNA 方案结合起来，该方案将可变的污渍样式限制在可行的范围内，以训练与污渍无关的深度学习模型。 RandStainNA 适用于一系列颜色空间（即 HED、HSV、LAB）中的染色标准化。此外，我们提出了一种随机颜色空间选择方案，以获得额外的性能改进。我们通过两个诊断任务（即组织亚型分类和细胞核分割）以及各种网络主干来评估我们的方法。相对于 SA 和 SN 的性能优势使得所提出的 RandStainNA 可以持续提高泛化能力，我们的模型可以处理更多具有不可预测染色风格的传入临床数据集。代码可在 https://github.com/yiqings/RandStainNA 获取。 本文提出RandStainNA方法，通过统一染色归一化与染色增强技术，解决数字病理分析中染色差异导致的模型泛化能力不足问题。 Yiqing Shen,Yulin Luo,Dinggang Shen,Jing Ke cs.CV

title: TEVR: Improving Speech Recognition by Token Entropy Variance Reduction
title_zh: TEVR：通过令牌熵方差减少提高语音识别
comment: 10 pages including 2 pages appendix, 1 figure, 6 tables
comments: 10 pages including 2 pages appendix, 1 figure, 6 tables
abstract: This paper presents TEVR, a speech recognition model designed to minimize the variation in token entropy w.r.t. to the language model. This takes advantage of the fact that if the language model will reliably and accurately predict a token anyway, then the acoustic model doesn't need to be accurate in recognizing it. We train German ASR models with 900 million parameters and show that on CommonVoice German, TEVR scores a very competitive 3.64% word error rate, which outperforms the best reported results by a relative 16.89% reduction in word error rate. We hope that releasing our fully trained speech recognition pipeline to the community will lead to privacy-preserving offline virtual assistants in the future.
summary: This paper presents TEVR, a speech recognition model designed to minimize the variation in token entropy w.r.t. to the language model. This takes advantage of the fact that if the language model will reliably and accurately predict a token anyway, then the acoustic model doesn't need to be accurate in recognizing it. We train German ASR models with 900 million parameters and show that on CommonVoice German, TEVR scores a very competitive 3.64% word error rate, which outperforms the best reported results by a relative 16.89% reduction in word error rate. We hope that releasing our fully trained speech recognition pipeline to the community will lead to privacy-preserving offline virtual assistants in the future.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 TEVR，这是一种语音识别模型，旨在最小化令牌熵随时间的变化。到语言模型。这利用了这样一个事实：如果语言模型无论如何都能可靠且准确地预测标记，那么声学模型就不需要准确地识别它。我们使用 9 亿个参数训练德语 ASR 模型，结果表明，在 CommonVoice German 上，TEVR 获得了极具竞争力的 3.64% 单词错误率，其单词错误率相对降低了 16.89%，优于最佳报告结果。我们希望向社区发布我们训练有素的语音识别管道将在未来带来保护隐私的离线虚拟助手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TEVR语音识别模型，通过降低token熵的方差来提升识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 当语言模型能可靠预测token时，声学模型无需精确识别，从而减少冗余计算并提升整体性能。
AI.method: 训练9亿参数的德语ASR模型，通过最小化token熵方差优化模型，利用CommonVoice德语数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在CommonVoice德语数据集上达到3.64%词错误率，较先前最佳结果降低16.89%。
AI.conclusion: TEVR方法有效提升语音识别性能，未来可推动隐私保护的离线虚拟助手发展。

authors_text: Sandhya Aneja,Nagender Aneja,Pg Emeroylariffion Abas,Abdul Ghani Naim
title: Defense against adversarial attacks on deep convolutional neural networks through nonlocal denoising
title_zh: 通过非局部去噪防御深度卷积神经网络的对抗性攻击
comment: ef:IAES International Journal of Artificial Intelligence, Vol. 11, No. 3, September 2022, pp. 961~968, ISSN: 2252-8938
comments: ef:IAES International Journal of Artificial Intelligence, Vol. 11, No. 3, September 2022, pp. 961~968, ISSN: 2252-8938
abstract: Despite substantial advances in network architecture performance, the susceptibility of adversarial attacks makes deep learning challenging to implement in safety-critical applications. This paper proposes a data-centric approach to addressing this problem. A nonlocal denoising method with different luminance values has been used to generate adversarial examples from the Modified National Institute of Standards and Technology database (MNIST) and Canadian Institute for Advanced Research (CIFAR-10) data sets. Under perturbation, the method provided absolute accuracy improvements of up to 9.3% in the MNIST data set and 13% in the CIFAR-10 data set. Training using transformed images with higher luminance values increases the robustness of the classifier. We have shown that transfer learning is disadvantageous for adversarial machine learning. The results indicate that simple adversarial examples can improve resilience and make deep learning easier to apply in various applications.
summary: Despite substantial advances in network architecture performance, the susceptibility of adversarial attacks makes deep learning challenging to implement in safety-critical applications. This paper proposes a data-centric approach to addressing this problem. A nonlocal denoising method with different luminance values has been used to generate adversarial examples from the Modified National Institute of Standards and Technology database (MNIST) and Canadian Institute for Advanced Research (CIFAR-10) data sets. Under perturbation, the method provided absolute accuracy improvements of up to 9.3% in the MNIST data set and 13% in the CIFAR-10 data set. Training using transformed images with higher luminance values increases the robustness of the classifier. We have shown that transfer learning is disadvantageous for adversarial machine learning. The results indicate that simple adversarial examples can improve resilience and make deep learning easier to apply in various applications.
abstract_zh: 尽管网络架构性能取得了巨大进步，但对抗性攻击的敏感性使得深度学习在安全关键型应用程序中实施起来充满挑战。本文提出了一种以数据为中心的方法来解决这个问题。具有不同亮度值的非局部去噪方法已用于从修改后的国家标准与技术研究所数据库（MNIST）和加拿大高级研究所（CIFAR-10）数据集中生成对抗性示例。在扰动下，该方法在 MNIST 数据集中的绝对准确度提高了高达 9.3%，在 CIFAR-10 数据集中的绝对准确度提高了 13%。使用具有较高亮度值的变换图像进行训练可以提高分类器的鲁棒性。我们已经证明，迁移学习对于对抗性机器学习是不利的。结果表明，简单的对抗性示例可以提高弹性，并使深度学习更容易应用于各种应用中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过非局部去噪方法提升深度卷积神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗攻击导致深度学习难以应用于安全关键场景，需探索更有效的防御机制。
AI.method: 采用非局部去噪技术结合不同亮度值生成对抗样本，并利用高亮度转换图像进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上准确率提升9.3%，CIFAR-10数据集提升13%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 简单对抗样本可增强模型鲁棒性，而迁移学习在对抗场景中存在局限性。

authors_text: Deepak K. Gupta,Udbhav Bamba,Abhishek Thakur,Akash Gupta,Suraj Sharan,Ertugrul Demir,Dilip K. Prasad
title: UltraMNIST Classification: A Benchmark to Train CNNs for Very Large Images
title_zh: UltraMNIST 分类：针对超大图像训练 CNN 的基准
abstract: Convolutional neural network (CNN) approaches available in the current literature are designed to work primarily with low-resolution images. When applied on very large images, challenges related to GPU memory, smaller receptive field than needed for semantic correspondence and the need to incorporate multi-scale features arise. The resolution of input images can be reduced, however, with significant loss of critical information. Based on the outlined issues, we introduce a novel research problem of training CNN models for very large images, and present 'UltraMNIST dataset', a simple yet representative benchmark dataset for this task. UltraMNIST has been designed using the popular MNIST digits with additional levels of complexity added to replicate well the challenges of real-world problems. We present two variants of the problem: 'UltraMNIST classification' and 'Budget-aware UltraMNIST classification'. The standard UltraMNIST classification benchmark is intended to facilitate the development of novel CNN training methods that make the effective use of the best available GPU resources. The budget-aware variant is intended to promote development of methods that work under constrained GPU memory. For the development of competitive solutions, we present several baseline models for the standard benchmark and its budget-aware variant. We study the effect of reducing resolution on the performance and present results for baseline models involving pretrained backbones from among the popular state-of-the-art models. Finally, with the presented benchmark dataset and the baselines, we hope to pave the ground for a new generation of CNN methods suitable for handling large images in an efficient and resource-light manner.
summary: Convolutional neural network (CNN) approaches available in the current literature are designed to work primarily with low-resolution images. When applied on very large images, challenges related to GPU memory, smaller receptive field than needed for semantic correspondence and the need to incorporate multi-scale features arise. The resolution of input images can be reduced, however, with significant loss of critical information. Based on the outlined issues, we introduce a novel research problem of training CNN models for very large images, and present 'UltraMNIST dataset', a simple yet representative benchmark dataset for this task. UltraMNIST has been designed using the popular MNIST digits with additional levels of complexity added to replicate well the challenges of real-world problems. We present two variants of the problem: 'UltraMNIST classification' and 'Budget-aware UltraMNIST classification'. The standard UltraMNIST classification benchmark is intended to facilitate the development of novel CNN training methods that make the effective use of the best available GPU resources. The budget-aware variant is intended to promote development of methods that work under constrained GPU memory. For the development of competitive solutions, we present several baseline models for the standard benchmark and its budget-aware variant. We study the effect of reducing resolution on the performance and present results for baseline models involving pretrained backbones from among the popular state-of-the-art models. Finally, with the presented benchmark dataset and the baselines, we hope to pave the ground for a new generation of CNN methods suitable for handling large images in an efficient and resource-light manner.
abstract_zh: 当前文献中可用的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 方法主要用于处理低分辨率图像。当应用于非常大的图像时，会出现与 GPU 内存、比语义对应所需的感受野更小的相关的挑战以及合并多尺度特征的需要。然而，输入图像的分辨率可能会降低，从而导致关键信息的显着丢失。基于概述的问题，我们引入了一个针对超大图像训练 CNN 模型的新研究问题，并提出了“UltraMNIST 数据集”，这是该任务的一个简单但具有代表性的基准数据集。 UltraMNIST 是使用流行的 MNIST 数字设计的，并增加了额外的复杂性，以更好地复制现实世界问题的挑战。我们提出了该问题的两种变体：“UltraMNIST 分类”和“预算感知 UltraMNIST 分类”。标准 UltraMNIST 分类基准旨在促进新型 CNN 训练方法的开发，从而有效利用最佳可用 GPU 资源。预算感知变体旨在促进在 GPU 内存受限的情况下工作的方法的开发。为了开发有竞争力的解决方案，我们为标准基准及其预算感知变体提供了几个基准模型。我们研究了降低分辨率对性能的影响，并展示了涉及流行的最先进模型中预训练骨干的基线模型的结果。最后，通过所提出的基准数据集和基线，我们希望为适合以高效和资源轻的方式处理大图像的新一代 CNN 方法奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UltraMNIST数据集，作为训练卷积神经网络（CNN）处理超大图像的基准，解决现有方法在GPU内存、感受野和多尺度特征提取方面的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN主要针对低分辨率图像设计，处理超大图像时面临GPU内存不足、感受野不足及多尺度特征提取困难等问题，而降低分辨率会导致关键信息丢失。
AI.method: 基于MNIST数字构建UltraMNIST数据集，增加复杂度模拟现实挑战；设计两种任务变体（标准分类与预算感知分类），并提供基线模型进行评估，分析分辨率降低对性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有预训练模型在超大图像上表现不佳，分辨率降低显著影响性能；预算感知分类任务验证了资源受限下的方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: UltraMNIST基准为开发高效处理超大图像的CNN方法提供了基础，推动资源轻量化与性能优化方向的研究。

search_text: UltraMNIST Classification: A Benchmark to Train CNNs for Very Large Images UltraMNIST 分类：针对超大图像训练 CNN 的基准 Convolutional neural network (CNN) approaches available in the current literature are designed to work primarily with low-resolution images. When applied on very large images, challenges related to GPU memory, smaller receptive field than needed for semantic correspondence and the need to incorporate multi-scale features arise. The resolution of input images can be reduced, however, with significant loss of critical information. Based on the outlined issues, we introduce a novel research problem of training CNN models for very large images, and present 'UltraMNIST dataset', a simple yet representative benchmark dataset for this task. UltraMNIST has been designed using the popular MNIST digits with additional levels of complexity added to replicate well the challenges of real-world problems. We present two variants of the problem: 'UltraMNIST classification' and 'Budget-aware UltraMNIST classification'. The standard UltraMNIST classification benchmark is intended to facilitate the development of novel CNN training methods that make the effective use of the best available GPU resources. The budget-aware variant is intended to promote development of methods that work under constrained GPU memory. For the development of competitive solutions, we present several baseline models for the standard benchmark and its budget-aware variant. We study the effect of reducing resolution on the performance and present results for baseline models involving pretrained backbones from among the popular state-of-the-art models. Finally, with the presented benchmark dataset and the baselines, we hope to pave the ground for a new generation of CNN methods suitable for handling large images in an efficient and resource-light manner. 当前文献中可用的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 方法主要用于处理低分辨率图像。当应用于非常大的图像时，会出现与 GPU 内存、比语义对应所需的感受野更小的相关的挑战以及合并多尺度特征的需要。然而，输入图像的分辨率可能会降低，从而导致关键信息的显着丢失。基于概述的问题，我们引入了一个针对超大图像训练 CNN 模型的新研究问题，并提出了“UltraMNIST 数据集”，这是该任务的一个简单但具有代表性的基准数据集。 UltraMNIST 是使用流行的 MNIST 数字设计的，并增加了额外的复杂性，以更好地复制现实世界问题的挑战。我们提出了该问题的两种变体：“UltraMNIST 分类”和“预算感知 UltraMNIST 分类”。标准 UltraMNIST 分类基准旨在促进新型 CNN 训练方法的开发，从而有效利用最佳可用 GPU 资源。预算感知变体旨在促进在 GPU 内存受限的情况下工作的方法的开发。为了开发有竞争力的解决方案，我们为标准基准及其预算感知变体提供了几个基准模型。我们研究了降低分辨率对性能的影响，并展示了涉及流行的最先进模型中预训练骨干的基线模型的结果。最后，通过所提出的基准数据集和基线，我们希望为适合以高效和资源轻的方式处理大图像的新一代 CNN 方法奠定基础。 本文提出UltraMNIST数据集，作为训练卷积神经网络（CNN）处理超大图像的基准，解决现有方法在GPU内存、感受野和多尺度特征提取方面的局限性。 Deepak K. Gupta,Udbhav Bamba,Abhishek Thakur,Akash Gupta,Suraj Sharan,Ertugrul Demir,Dilip K. Prasad cs.CV

title: Learning to Infer 3D Shape Programs with Differentiable Renderer
title_zh: 学习使用可微分渲染器推断 3D 形状程序
comment: Technical report written in 2020; 10 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1901.02875 by other authors
comments: Technical report written in 2020; 10 pages, 5 figures. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1901.02875 by other authors
abstract: Given everyday artifacts, such as tables and chairs, humans recognize high-level regularities within them, such as the symmetries of a table, the repetition of its legs, while possessing low-level priors of their geometries, e.g., surfaces are smooth and edges are sharp. This kind of knowledge constitutes an important part of human perceptual understanding and reasoning. Representations of and how to reason in such knowledge, and the acquisition thereof, are still open questions in artificial intelligence (AI) and cognitive science. Building on the previous proposal of the \emph{3D shape programs} representation alone with the accompanying neural generator and executor from \citet{tian2019learning}, we propose an analytical yet differentiable executor that is more faithful and controllable in interpreting shape programs (particularly in extrapolation) and more sample efficient (requires no training). These facilitate the generator's learning when ground truth programs are not available, and should be especially useful when new shape-program components are enrolled either by human designers or -- in the context of library learning -- algorithms themselves. Preliminary experiments on using it for adaptation illustrate the aforesaid advantages of the proposed module, encouraging similar methods being explored in building machines that learn to reason with the kind of knowledge described above, and even learn this knowledge itself.
summary: Given everyday artifacts, such as tables and chairs, humans recognize high-level regularities within them, such as the symmetries of a table, the repetition of its legs, while possessing low-level priors of their geometries, e.g., surfaces are smooth and edges are sharp. This kind of knowledge constitutes an important part of human perceptual understanding and reasoning. Representations of and how to reason in such knowledge, and the acquisition thereof, are still open questions in artificial intelligence (AI) and cognitive science. Building on the previous proposal of the \emph{3D shape programs} representation alone with the accompanying neural generator and executor from \citet{tian2019learning}, we propose an analytical yet differentiable executor that is more faithful and controllable in interpreting shape programs (particularly in extrapolation) and more sample efficient (requires no training). These facilitate the generator's learning when ground truth programs are not available, and should be especially useful when new shape-program components are enrolled either by human designers or -- in the context of library learning -- algorithms themselves. Preliminary experiments on using it for adaptation illustrate the aforesaid advantages of the proposed module, encouraging similar methods being explored in building machines that learn to reason with the kind of knowledge described above, and even learn this knowledge itself.
abstract_zh: 对于桌子和椅子等日常物品，人类能够识别其中的高级规律，例如桌子的对称性、桌腿的重复性，同时拥有其几何形状的低级先验，例如表面光滑、边缘锋利。这种知识构成了人类感性认识和推理的重要组成部分。这些知识的表示、如何推理以及获取这些知识仍然是人工智能（AI）和认知科学中的悬而未决的问题。基于之前提出的 \emph{3D 形状程序} 表示以及来自 \citet{tian2019learning} 的附带神经生成器和执行器，我们提出了一种分析性但可微分的执行器，它在解释形状程序（特别是外推法）方面更加忠实和可控，并且样本效率更高（不需要训练）。当地面实况程序不可用时，这些有助于生成器的学习，并且当新的形状程序组件由人类设计者或在库学习的背景下算法本身注册时尤其有用。使用它进行适应的初步实验说明了所提出的模块的上述优点，鼓励在构建学习用上述知识进行推理的机器时探索类似的方法，甚至学习这种知识本身。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微分渲染器的3D形状程序推理方法，通过改进执行器提升生成器的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过感知物体的高层规律（如对称性）和几何先验（如表面平滑）理解3D形状，但AI在建模此类知识方面仍存在挑战。现有方法在样本效率和可控性上不足，需改进以支持无监督学习和新组件扩展。
AI.method: 设计了一种分析型可微分执行器，通过更精确的形状程序解释和无需训练的样本效率，增强生成器在无真实程序标注情况下的学习能力，并支持人工或算法新增组件的适应性。
AI.result: 初步实验验证了该模块在样本效率和程序外推上的优势，为构建具备类似人类知识推理能力的机器提供了可行方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AI学习几何推理和自主获取知识提供了新思路，未来可拓展至更复杂的形状生成与认知建模任务。

title: Guided Exploration in Reinforcement Learning via Monte Carlo Critic Optimization
title_zh: 通过蒙特卡罗批评优化引导强化学习探索
comment: Short version of this paper is accepted to AAMAS 2024
comments: Short version of this paper is accepted to AAMAS 2024
abstract: The class of deep deterministic off-policy algorithms is effectively applied to solve challenging continuous control problems. Current approaches commonly utilize random noise as an exploration method, which has several drawbacks, including the need for manual adjustment for a given task and the absence of exploratory calibration during the training process. We address these challenges by proposing a novel guided exploration method that uses an ensemble of Monte Carlo Critics for calculating exploratory action correction. The proposed method enhances the traditional exploration scheme by dynamically adjusting exploration. Subsequently, we present a novel algorithm that leverages the proposed exploratory module for both policy and critic modification. The presented algorithm demonstrates superior performance compared to modern reinforcement learning algorithms across a variety of problems in the DMControl suite.
summary: The class of deep deterministic off-policy algorithms is effectively applied to solve challenging continuous control problems. Current approaches commonly utilize random noise as an exploration method, which has several drawbacks, including the need for manual adjustment for a given task and the absence of exploratory calibration during the training process. We address these challenges by proposing a novel guided exploration method that uses an ensemble of Monte Carlo Critics for calculating exploratory action correction. The proposed method enhances the traditional exploration scheme by dynamically adjusting exploration. Subsequently, we present a novel algorithm that leverages the proposed exploratory module for both policy and critic modification. The presented algorithm demonstrates superior performance compared to modern reinforcement learning algorithms across a variety of problems in the DMControl suite.
abstract_zh: 深度确定性离策略算法可有效地应用于解决具有挑战性的连续控制问题。当前的方法通常利用随机噪声作为探索方法，但这种方法有几个缺点，包括需要对给定任务进行手动调整以及在训练过程中缺乏探索性校准。我们通过提出一种新颖的引导探索方法来解决这些挑战，该方法使用蒙特卡罗批评的集合来计算探索性动作校正。该方法通过动态调整探索来增强传统的探索方案。随后，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，该算法利用所提出的探索性模块来进行政策和评论家修改。与现代强化学习算法相比，所提出的算法在 DMControl 套件中的各种问题上都表现出了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于蒙特卡洛评论家优化的引导探索方法，以改进深度确定性离线策略算法在连续控制问题中的探索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖随机噪声进行探索，存在需手动调整参数且训练过程中缺乏探索校准的问题，影响算法性能和稳定性。
AI.method: 通过构建蒙特卡洛评论家集合动态计算探索动作修正量，结合策略与评论家联合优化，实现探索过程的自适应调整。
AI.result: 新算法在DMControl基准测试中优于现代强化学习算法，在多种连续控制任务中展现更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态探索校准机制有效解决了传统探索策略的缺陷，为复杂控制问题提供了更可靠的解决方案。
