search_text: Guided Exploration in Reinforcement Learning via Monte Carlo Critic Optimization 通过蒙特卡罗批评优化引导强化学习探索 The class of deep deterministic off-policy algorithms is effectively applied to solve challenging continuous control problems. Current approaches commonly utilize random noise as an exploration method, which has several drawbacks, including the need for manual adjustment for a given task and the absence of exploratory calibration during the training process. We address these challenges by proposing a novel guided exploration method that uses an ensemble of Monte Carlo Critics for calculating exploratory action correction. The proposed method enhances the traditional exploration scheme by dynamically adjusting exploration. Subsequently, we present a novel algorithm that leverages the proposed exploratory module for both policy and critic modification. The presented algorithm demonstrates superior performance compared to modern reinforcement learning algorithms across a variety of problems in the DMControl suite. 深度确定性离策略算法可有效地应用于解决具有挑战性的连续控制问题。当前的方法通常利用随机噪声作为探索方法，但这种方法有几个缺点，包括需要对给定任务进行手动调整以及在训练过程中缺乏探索性校准。我们通过提出一种新颖的引导探索方法来解决这些挑战，该方法使用蒙特卡罗批评的集合来计算探索性动作校正。该方法通过动态调整探索来增强传统的探索方案。随后，我们提出了一种新颖的算法，该算法利用所提出的探索性模块来进行政策和评论家修改。与现代强化学习算法相比，所提出的算法在 DMControl 套件中的各种问题上都表现出了卓越的性能。 本文提出一种基于蒙特卡洛评论家优化的引导探索方法，以改进深度确定性离线策略算法在连续控制问题中的探索效率。 Igor Kuznetsov cs.LG,cs.AI

title: SKTR: Trace Recovery from Stochastically Known Logs
title_zh: SKTR：从随机已知日志中进行跟踪恢复
comment: Submitted version -- Accepted to the 5th International Conference on Process Mining (ICPM), 2023
comments: Submitted version -- Accepted to the 5th International Conference on Process Mining (ICPM), 2023
abstract: Developments in machine learning together with the increasing usage of sensor data challenge the reliance on deterministic logs, requiring new process mining solutions for uncertain, and in particular stochastically known, logs. In this work we formulate {trace recovery}, the task of generating a deterministic log from stochastically known logs that is as faithful to reality as possible. An effective trace recovery algorithm would be a powerful aid for maintaining credible process mining tools for uncertain settings. We propose an algorithmic framework for this task that recovers the best alignment between a stochastically known log and a process model, with three innovative features. Our algorithm, SKTR, 1) handles both Markovian and non-Markovian processes; 2) offers a quality-based balance between a process model and a log, depending on the available process information, sensor quality, and machine learning predictiveness power; and 3) offers a novel use of a synchronous product multigraph to create the log. An empirical analysis using five publicly available datasets, three of which use predictive models over standard video capturing benchmarks, shows an average relative accuracy improvement of more than 10 over a common baseline.
summary: Developments in machine learning together with the increasing usage of sensor data challenge the reliance on deterministic logs, requiring new process mining solutions for uncertain, and in particular stochastically known, logs. In this work we formulate {trace recovery}, the task of generating a deterministic log from stochastically known logs that is as faithful to reality as possible. An effective trace recovery algorithm would be a powerful aid for maintaining credible process mining tools for uncertain settings. We propose an algorithmic framework for this task that recovers the best alignment between a stochastically known log and a process model, with three innovative features. Our algorithm, SKTR, 1) handles both Markovian and non-Markovian processes; 2) offers a quality-based balance between a process model and a log, depending on the available process information, sensor quality, and machine learning predictiveness power; and 3) offers a novel use of a synchronous product multigraph to create the log. An empirical analysis using five publicly available datasets, three of which use predictive models over standard video capturing benchmarks, shows an average relative accuracy improvement of more than 10 over a common baseline.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的发展以及传感器数据使用的增加对确定性日志的依赖提出了挑战，需要新的流程挖掘解决方案来处理不确定的日志，特别是随机已知的日志。在这项工作中，我们制定了{跟踪恢复}，即从随机已知日志生成尽可能忠实于现实的确定性日志的任务。有效的跟踪恢复算法将有力地帮助维护针对不确定设置的可靠流程挖掘工具。我们为此任务提出了一个算法框架，它可以恢复随机已知日志和过程模型之间的最佳对齐，并具有三个创新功能。我们的算法 SKTR，1) 处理马尔可夫过程和非马尔可夫过程； 2) 根据可用的过程信息、传感器质量和机器学习预测能力，在过程模型和日志之间提供基于质量的平衡； 3) 提供了同步乘积多重图的新颖用法来创建日志。使用五个公开可用的数据集进行的实证分析（其中三个数据集使用相对于标准视频捕获基准的预测模型）显示，与通用基线相比，平均相对准确度提高了 10 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SKTR算法，从随机已知日志中恢复确定性日志，以提高不确定环境下的流程挖掘准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性日志难以应对传感器数据和机器学习带来的不确定性，需开发新型流程挖掘解决方案。
AI.method: 提出SKTR框架，包含处理马尔可夫和非马尔可夫过程、基于质量平衡模型与日志、利用同步乘积多重图生成日志的创新方法。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上实验证明，SKTR平均相对准确率较基准方法提升超10%。
AI.conclusion: SKTR通过创新算法有效解决了随机已知日志的轨迹恢复问题，为不确定场景下的流程挖掘提供了可靠工具。

title: Evaluation of Semantic Answer Similarity Metrics
title_zh: 语义答案相似度度量的评估
comment: 3rd International Conference on NLP & Big Data (NLPD 2022), 4th International Conference on Machine Learning & Applications (CMLA 2022)
comments: 3rd International Conference on NLP & Big Data (NLPD 2022), 4th International Conference on Machine Learning & Applications (CMLA 2022)
abstract: There are several issues with the existing general machine translation or natural language generation evaluation metrics, and question-answering (QA) systems are indifferent in that context. To build robust QA systems, we need the ability to have equivalently robust evaluation systems to verify whether model predictions to questions are similar to ground-truth annotations. The ability to compare similarity based on semantics as opposed to pure string overlap is important to compare models fairly and to indicate more realistic acceptance criteria in real-life applications. We build upon the first to our knowledge paper that uses transformer-based model metrics to assess semantic answer similarity and achieve higher correlations to human judgement in the case of no lexical overlap. We propose cross-encoder augmented bi-encoder and BERTScore models for semantic answer similarity, trained on a new dataset consisting of name pairs of US-American public figures. As far as we are concerned, we provide the first dataset of co-referent name string pairs along with their similarities, which can be used for training.
summary: There are several issues with the existing general machine translation or natural language generation evaluation metrics, and question-answering (QA) systems are indifferent in that context. To build robust QA systems, we need the ability to have equivalently robust evaluation systems to verify whether model predictions to questions are similar to ground-truth annotations. The ability to compare similarity based on semantics as opposed to pure string overlap is important to compare models fairly and to indicate more realistic acceptance criteria in real-life applications. We build upon the first to our knowledge paper that uses transformer-based model metrics to assess semantic answer similarity and achieve higher correlations to human judgement in the case of no lexical overlap. We propose cross-encoder augmented bi-encoder and BERTScore models for semantic answer similarity, trained on a new dataset consisting of name pairs of US-American public figures. As far as we are concerned, we provide the first dataset of co-referent name string pairs along with their similarities, which can be used for training.
abstract_zh: 现有的通用机器翻译或自然语言生成评估指标存在几个问题，而问答（QA）系统在这种情况下无动于衷。为了构建强大的 QA 系统，我们需要能够拥有同等强大的评估系统来验证模型对问题的预测是否与真实注释相似。基于语义而不是纯粹的字符串重叠来比较相似性的能力对于公平地比较模型并在现实应用程序中指示更现实的接受标准非常重要。我们建立在我们的知识论文的第一个基础上，该论文使用基于变压器的模型度量来评估语义答案相似性，并在没有词汇重叠的情况下实现与人类判断的更高相关性。我们提出了用于语义答案相似性的跨编码器增强双编码器和 BERTScore 模型，并在由美国公众人物姓名对组成的新数据集上进行训练。就我们而言，我们提供了第一个共同指代名称字符串对及其相似性的数据集，可用于训练。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估语义答案相似度指标，以改进问答系统的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标无法准确衡量语义相似但词汇不同的答案，需更稳健的评估系统以提升问答系统可靠性。
AI.method: 提出交叉编码器增强的双编码器与BERTScore模型，并构建美国公众人物姓名对数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 模型在无词汇重叠场景下与人类判断相关性更高，且首次提供共指姓名字符串对的相似度数据集。
AI.conclusion: 新方法与数据集为语义答案相似度评估提供了工具，有助于提升问答系统评估效果。

title: Synthesizing Personalized Non-speech Vocalization from Discrete Speech Representations
title_zh: 从离散语音表示合成个性化非语音发声
abstract: We formulated non-speech vocalization (NSV) modeling as a text-to-speech task and verified its viability. Specifically, we evaluated the phonetic expressivity of HUBERT speech units on NSVs and verified our model's ability to control over speaker timbre even though the training data is speaker few-shot. In addition, we substantiated that the heterogeneity in recording conditions is the major obstacle for NSV modeling. Finally, we discussed five improvements over our method for future research. Audio samples of synthesized NSVs are available on our demo page: https://resemble-ai.github.io/reLaugh.
summary: We formulated non-speech vocalization (NSV) modeling as a text-to-speech task and verified its viability. Specifically, we evaluated the phonetic expressivity of HUBERT speech units on NSVs and verified our model's ability to control over speaker timbre even though the training data is speaker few-shot. In addition, we substantiated that the heterogeneity in recording conditions is the major obstacle for NSV modeling. Finally, we discussed five improvements over our method for future research. Audio samples of synthesized NSVs are available on our demo page: https://resemble-ai.github.io/reLaugh.
abstract_zh: 我们将非语音发声（NSV）建模制定为文本转语音任务，并验证了其可行性。具体来说，我们评估了 NSV 上 HUBERT 语音单元的语音表现力，并验证了我们的模型控制说话人音色的能力，即使训练数据是说话人的少数样本。此外，我们证实记录条件的异质性是 NSV 建模的主要障碍。最后，我们讨论了未来研究方法的五项改进。我们的演示页面上提供了合成 NSV 的音频样本：https://resemble-ai.github.io/reLaugh。

AI.tldr: 本文将非语音发声（NSV）建模作为文本到语音任务，验证其可行性并探讨个性化音色控制与录音条件异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有NSV合成方法在个性化音色控制和跨录音条件适应性方面存在不足，需探索更高效的建模方式。
AI.method: 基于HUBERT语音单元评估NSV的语音表达性，通过少量说话人数据训练模型，并分析录音条件差异对NSV建模的影响。
AI.result: 验证了模型在少量数据下控制说话人音色的能力，确认录音条件异质性是NSV建模的主要障碍，并提出五个改进方向。
AI.conclusion: NSV建模作为文本到语音任务具有可行性，但需进一步解决数据异质性问题以提升生成质量与稳定性。

search_text: Synthesizing Personalized Non-speech Vocalization from Discrete Speech Representations 从离散语音表示合成个性化非语音发声 We formulated non-speech vocalization (NSV) modeling as a text-to-speech task and verified its viability. Specifically, we evaluated the phonetic expressivity of HUBERT speech units on NSVs and verified our model's ability to control over speaker timbre even though the training data is speaker few-shot. In addition, we substantiated that the heterogeneity in recording conditions is the major obstacle for NSV modeling. Finally, we discussed five improvements over our method for future research. Audio samples of synthesized NSVs are available on our demo page: https://resemble-ai.github.io/reLaugh. 我们将非语音发声（NSV）建模制定为文本转语音任务，并验证了其可行性。具体来说，我们评估了 NSV 上 HUBERT 语音单元的语音表现力，并验证了我们的模型控制说话人音色的能力，即使训练数据是说话人的少数样本。此外，我们证实记录条件的异质性是 NSV 建模的主要障碍。最后，我们讨论了未来研究方法的五项改进。我们的演示页面上提供了合成 NSV 的音频样本：https://resemble-ai.github.io/reLaugh。 本文将非语音发声（NSV）建模作为文本到语音任务，验证其可行性并探讨个性化音色控制与录音条件异质性问题。 Chin-Cheng Hsu cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Wang Shen,Cheng Ming,Wenbo Bao,Guangtao Zhai,Li Chen,Zhiyong Gao
title: Enhanced Deep Animation Video Interpolation
title_zh: 增强型深度动画视频插值
abstract: Existing learning-based frame interpolation algorithms extract consecutive frames from high-speed natural videos to train the model. Compared to natural videos, cartoon videos are usually in a low frame rate. Besides, the motion between consecutive cartoon frames is typically nonlinear, which breaks the linear motion assumption of interpolation algorithms. Thus, it is unsuitable for generating a training set directly from cartoon videos. For better adapting frame interpolation algorithms from nature video to animation video, we present AutoFI, a simple and effective method to automatically render training data for deep animation video interpolation. AutoFI takes a layered architecture to render synthetic data, which ensures the assumption of linear motion. Experimental results show that AutoFI performs favorably in training both DAIN and ANIN. However, most frame interpolation algorithms will still fail in error-prone areas, such as fast motion or large occlusion. Besides AutoFI, we also propose a plug-and-play sketch-based post-processing module, named SktFI, to refine the final results using user-provided sketches manually. With AutoFI and SktFI, the interpolated animation frames show high perceptual quality.
summary: Existing learning-based frame interpolation algorithms extract consecutive frames from high-speed natural videos to train the model. Compared to natural videos, cartoon videos are usually in a low frame rate. Besides, the motion between consecutive cartoon frames is typically nonlinear, which breaks the linear motion assumption of interpolation algorithms. Thus, it is unsuitable for generating a training set directly from cartoon videos. For better adapting frame interpolation algorithms from nature video to animation video, we present AutoFI, a simple and effective method to automatically render training data for deep animation video interpolation. AutoFI takes a layered architecture to render synthetic data, which ensures the assumption of linear motion. Experimental results show that AutoFI performs favorably in training both DAIN and ANIN. However, most frame interpolation algorithms will still fail in error-prone areas, such as fast motion or large occlusion. Besides AutoFI, we also propose a plug-and-play sketch-based post-processing module, named SktFI, to refine the final results using user-provided sketches manually. With AutoFI and SktFI, the interpolated animation frames show high perceptual quality.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于学习的帧插值算法从高速自然视频中提取连续帧来训练模型。与自然视频相比，卡通视频通常帧率较低。此外，连续卡通帧之间的运动通常是非线性的，这打破了插值算法的线性运动假设。因此，它不适合直接从卡通视频生成训练集。为了更好地适应从自然视频到动画视频的帧插值算法，我们提出了 AutoFI，一种简单有效的方法来自动渲染深度动画视频插值的训练数据。 AutoFI 采用分层架构来渲染合成数据，这确保了线性运动的假设。实验结果表明，AutoFI 在训练 DAIN 和 ANIN 方面均表现良好。然而，大多数帧插值算法在容易出错的区域（例如快速运动或大遮挡）仍然会失败。除了 AutoFI 之外，我们还提出了一种即插即用的基于草图的后处理模块，名为 SktFI，可以使用用户提供的草图手动完善最终结果。使用 AutoFI 和 SktFI，插值动画帧显示出高感知质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoFI和SktFI方法，解决动画视频插值中因低帧率和非线性运动导致的训练数据不足及插值质量缺陷问题。
AI.motivation: 现有帧插值算法基于自然视频的线性运动假设，但卡通视频存在低帧率和非线性运动，导致直接训练效果不佳，需专用解决方案。
AI.method: AutoFI通过分层架构生成符合线性运动假设的合成训练数据；SktFI作为后处理模块，利用用户手绘草图优化插值结果。
AI.result: AutoFI有效提升DAIN和ANIN模型在动画视频上的插值性能，SktFI可修复快速运动或遮挡区域的误差，最终帧具有高感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 结合AutoFI的数据生成与SktFI的后处理优化，可显著提升动画视频插值效果，为低帧率动画内容生成提供可行方案。

authors_text: Haoran Li,Christopher J. Ford,Matteo Bianchi,Manuel G. Catalano,Efi Psomopoulou,Nathan F. Lepora
title: BRL/Pisa/IIT SoftHand: A Low-cost, 3D-Printed, Underactuated, Tendon-Driven Hand with Soft and Adaptive Synergies
title_zh: BRL/Pisa/IIT SoftHand：一种低成本、3D 打印、欠驱动、肌腱驱动的手，具有柔软和自适应协同作用
comment: 7 pages,9 figures,to be published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 7 pages,9 figures,to be published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: This paper introduces the BRL/Pisa/IIT (BPI) SoftHand: a single actuator-driven, low-cost, 3D-printed, tendon-driven, underactuated robot hand that can be used to perform a range of grasping tasks. Based on the adaptive synergies of the Pisa/IIT SoftHand, we design a new joint system and tendon routing to facilitate the inclusion of both soft and adaptive synergies, which helps us balance durability, affordability and grasping performance of the hand. The focus of this work is on the design, simulation, synergies and grasping tests of this SoftHand. The novel phalanges are designed and printed based on linkages, gear pairs and geometric restraint mechanisms, and can be applied to most tendon-driven robotic hands. We show that the robot hand can successfully grasp and lift various target objects and adapt to hold complex geometric shapes, reflecting the successful adoption of the soft and adaptive synergies. We intend to open-source the design of the hand so that it can be built cheaply on a home 3D-printer. For more detail: https://sites.google.com/view/bpi-softhandtactile-group-bri/brlpisaiit-softhand-design
summary: This paper introduces the BRL/Pisa/IIT (BPI) SoftHand: a single actuator-driven, low-cost, 3D-printed, tendon-driven, underactuated robot hand that can be used to perform a range of grasping tasks. Based on the adaptive synergies of the Pisa/IIT SoftHand, we design a new joint system and tendon routing to facilitate the inclusion of both soft and adaptive synergies, which helps us balance durability, affordability and grasping performance of the hand. The focus of this work is on the design, simulation, synergies and grasping tests of this SoftHand. The novel phalanges are designed and printed based on linkages, gear pairs and geometric restraint mechanisms, and can be applied to most tendon-driven robotic hands. We show that the robot hand can successfully grasp and lift various target objects and adapt to hold complex geometric shapes, reflecting the successful adoption of the soft and adaptive synergies. We intend to open-source the design of the hand so that it can be built cheaply on a home 3D-printer. For more detail: https://sites.google.com/view/bpi-softhandtactile-group-bri/brlpisaiit-softhand-design
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 BRL/Pisa/IIT (BPI) SoftHand：一种单执行器驱动、低成本、3D 打印、肌腱驱动、欠驱动机器人手，可用于执行一系列抓取任务。基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的自适应协同作用，我们设计了新的关节系统和肌腱布线，以促进软协同和自适应协同的融合，这有助于我们平衡手的耐用性、可承受性和抓握性能。这项工作的重点是该 SoftHand 的设计、仿真、协同和抓取测试。新颖的指骨是基于连杆、齿轮副和几何约束机构设计和打印的，可应用于大多数肌腱驱动的机器人手。我们表明，机器人手可以成功地抓取和举起各种目标物体，并适应握住复杂的几何形状，反映出软性和自适应协同作用的成功采用。我们打算开源这只手的设计源代码，以便可以在家用 3D 打印机上廉价地构建它。有关更多详细信息：https://sites.google.com/view/bpi-softhandtactile-group-bri/brlpisaiit-softhand-design

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种低成本、3D打印的欠驱动肌腱驱动机械手，通过软性和自适应协同机制实现多样化抓取任务。
AI.motivation: 现有机械手存在成本高、结构复杂或适应性不足的问题，需设计兼顾耐用性、经济性及抓取性能的新型机械手。
AI.method: 基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的自适应协同原理，设计新型关节系统与肌腱路由，结合3D打印技术实现连杆、齿轮对及几何约束机制的指节结构。
AI.result: 机械手成功抓取多种物体并适应复杂几何形状，验证了软性与自适应协同的有效性，设计将开源以支持家庭3D打印机制造。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过结构创新平衡了成本、耐用性与抓取性能，开源计划可促进低成本机器人手的普及与应用。

We show that the robot hand can successfully grasp and lift various target objects and adapt to hold complex geometric shapes, reflecting the successful adoption of the soft and adaptive synergies. We intend to open-source the design of the hand so that it can be built cheaply on a home 3D-printer. For more detail: https://sites.google.com/view/bpi-softhandtactile-group-bri/brlpisaiit-softhand-design 本文介绍了 BRL/Pisa/IIT (BPI) SoftHand：一种单执行器驱动、低成本、3D 打印、肌腱驱动、欠驱动机器人手，可用于执行一系列抓取任务。基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的自适应协同作用，我们设计了新的关节系统和肌腱布线，以促进软协同和自适应协同的融合，这有助于我们平衡手的耐用性、可承受性和抓握性能。这项工作的重点是该 SoftHand 的设计、仿真、协同和抓取测试。新颖的指骨是基于连杆、齿轮副和几何约束机构设计和打印的，可应用于大多数肌腱驱动的机器人手。我们表明，机器人手可以成功地抓取和举起各种目标物体，并适应握住复杂的几何形状，反映出软性和自适应协同作用的成功采用。我们打算开源这只手的设计源代码，以便可以在家用 3D 打印机上廉价地构建它。有关更多详细信息：https://sites.google.com/view/bpi-softhandtactile-group-bri/brlpisaiit-softhand-design 本文介绍了一种低成本、3D打印的欠驱动肌腱驱动机械手，通过软性和自适应协同机制实现多样化抓取任务。 Haoran Li,Christopher J. Ford,Matteo Bianchi,Manuel G. Catalano,Efi Psomopoulou,Nathan F. Lepora cs.RO

title: Diagnostic Communication and Visual System based on Vehicle UDS Protocol
title_zh: 基于车辆UDS协议的诊断通信和视觉系统
abstract: Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) is a diagnostic communication protocol used in electronic control units (ECUs) within automotive electronics, which is specified in the ISO 14229-1. It is derived from ISO 14230-3 (KWP2000) and the now obsolete ISO 15765-3 (Diagnostic Communication over Controller Area Network (DoCAN). 'Unified' in this context means that it is an international and not a company-specific standard. By now this communication protocol is used in all new ECUs made by Tier 1 suppliers of Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM), and is incorporated into other standards, such as AUTOSAR. The ECUs in modern vehicles control nearly all functions, including electronic fuel injection (EFI), engine control, the transmission, anti-lock braking system, door locks, braking, window operation, and more.
summary: Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) is a diagnostic communication protocol used in electronic control units (ECUs) within automotive electronics, which is specified in the ISO 14229-1. It is derived from ISO 14230-3 (KWP2000) and the now obsolete ISO 15765-3 (Diagnostic Communication over Controller Area Network (DoCAN). 'Unified' in this context means that it is an international and not a company-specific standard. By now this communication protocol is used in all new ECUs made by Tier 1 suppliers of Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM), and is incorporated into other standards, such as AUTOSAR. The ECUs in modern vehicles control nearly all functions, including electronic fuel injection (EFI), engine control, the transmission, anti-lock braking system, door locks, braking, window operation, and more.
abstract_zh: 统一诊断服务 (UDS) 是一种用于汽车电子电子控制单元 (ECU) 的诊断通信协议，在 ISO 14229-1 中指定。它源自 ISO 14230-3 (KWP2000) 和现已废弃的 ISO 15765-3（控制器局域网诊断通信 (DoCAN)）。在此上下文中的“统一”意味着它是一个国际标准，而不是特定于公司的标准。到目前为止，该通信协议已用于原始设备制造商 (OEM) 的一级供应商制造的所有新 ECU 中，并已纳入其他标准，例如 AUTOSAR。现代车辆中的 ECU 控制几乎所有功能，包括电子燃油喷射 (EFI)、发动机控制、变速箱、防抱死制动系统、门锁、制动、车窗操作等。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了基于车辆UDS协议的诊断通信与可视化系统，阐述了UDS协议在汽车电子控制单元（ECU）中的应用及其标准化意义。
AI.motivation: 随着现代车辆功能复杂化，亟需统一的诊断通信标准以实现跨厂商ECU的兼容性与高效维护。
AI.method: 基于ISO 14229-1标准，整合UDS协议框架并结合AUTOSAR等系统，设计支持多ECU诊断的通信与可视化方案。
AI.result: UDS协议已成为主流ECU诊断标准，广泛应用于发动机控制、制动系统等功能模块的诊断通信中。
AI.conclusion: UDS协议通过统一接口规范，显著提升了汽车电子系统的诊断效率与跨平台兼容性，是智能汽车发展的重要基础。

title: Review on Social Behavior Analysis of Laboratory Animals: From Methodologies to Applications
title_zh: 实验动物社会行为分析综述：从方法论到应用
abstract: As the bridge between genetic and physiological aspects, animal behaviour analysis is one of the most significant topics in biology and ecological research. However, identifying, tracking and recording animal behaviour are labour intensive works that require professional knowledge. To mitigate the spend for annotating data, researchers turn to computer vision techniques for automatic label algorithms, since most of the data are recorded visually. In this work, we explore a variety of behaviour detection algorithms, covering traditional vision methods, statistical methods and deep learning methods. The objective of this work is to provide a thorough investigation of related work, furnishing biologists with a scratch of efficient animal behaviour detection methods. Apart from that, we also discuss the strengths and weaknesses of those algorithms to provide some insights for those who already delve into this field.
summary: As the bridge between genetic and physiological aspects, animal behaviour analysis is one of the most significant topics in biology and ecological research. However, identifying, tracking and recording animal behaviour are labour intensive works that require professional knowledge. To mitigate the spend for annotating data, researchers turn to computer vision techniques for automatic label algorithms, since most of the data are recorded visually. In this work, we explore a variety of behaviour detection algorithms, covering traditional vision methods, statistical methods and deep learning methods. The objective of this work is to provide a thorough investigation of related work, furnishing biologists with a scratch of efficient animal behaviour detection methods. Apart from that, we also discuss the strengths and weaknesses of those algorithms to provide some insights for those who already delve into this field.
abstract_zh: 作为遗传和生理方面之间的桥梁，动物行为分析是生物学和生态学研究中最重要的课题之一。然而，识别、跟踪和记录动物行为是一项劳动密集型工作，需要专业知识。为了减少注释数据的支出，研究人员转向计算机视觉技术来实现自动标签算法，因为大多数数据都是以视觉方式记录的。在这项工作中，我们探索了多种行为检测算法，涵盖传统的视觉方法、统计方法和深度学习方法。这项工作的目的是对相关工作进行彻底的调查，为生物学家提供有效的动物行为检测方法的初步知识。除此之外，我们还讨论了这些算法的优点和缺点，为那些已经深入研究该领域的人提供一些见解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了实验室动物社会行为分析的方法与应用，涵盖传统视觉方法、统计方法及深度学习技术。
AI.motivation: 动物行为分析在生物学研究中至关重要，但传统人工标注数据耗时且需专业知识，亟需高效自动化方法。
AI.method: 通过调研行为检测算法，系统梳理传统视觉、统计模型及深度学习方法，并分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 提供了动物行为检测方法的全面概述，为研究者选择技术路线及优化算法提供了参考依据。
AI.conclusion: 计算机视觉技术显著提升行为分析效率，但需进一步解决复杂场景下的准确性与泛化性问题。

title: Machine Learning-based Biological Ageing Estimation Technologies: A Survey
title_zh: 基于机器学习的生物衰老估计技术：调查
comment: in Recent Advances in AI-enabled Automated Medical Diagnosis https://www.routledge.com/Recent-Advances-in-AI-enabled-Automated-Medical-Diagnosis/Jiang-Crookes-Wei-Zhang-Chazot/p/book/9781032008431
comments: in Recent Advances in AI-enabled Automated Medical Diagnosis https://www.routledge.com/Recent-Advances-in-AI-enabled-Automated-Medical-Diagnosis/Jiang-Crookes-Wei-Zhang-Chazot/p/book/9781032008431
abstract: In recent years, there are various methods of estimating Biological Age (BA) have been developed. Especially with the development of machine learning (ML), there are more and more types of BA predictions, and the accuracy has been greatly improved. The models for the estimation of BA play an important role in monitoring healthy aging, and could provide new tools to detect health status in the general population and give warnings to sub-healthy people. We will mainly review three age prediction methods by using ML. They are based on blood biomarkers, facial images, and structural neuroimaging features. For now, the model using blood biomarkers is the simplest, most direct, and most accurate method. The face image method is affected by various aspects such as race, environment, etc., the prediction accuracy is not very good, which cannot make a great contribution to the medical field. In summary, we are here to track the way forward in the era of big data for us and other potential general populations and show ways to leverage the vast amounts of data available today.
summary: In recent years, there are various methods of estimating Biological Age (BA) have been developed. Especially with the development of machine learning (ML), there are more and more types of BA predictions, and the accuracy has been greatly improved. The models for the estimation of BA play an important role in monitoring healthy aging, and could provide new tools to detect health status in the general population and give warnings to sub-healthy people. We will mainly review three age prediction methods by using ML. They are based on blood biomarkers, facial images, and structural neuroimaging features. For now, the model using blood biomarkers is the simplest, most direct, and most accurate method. The face image method is affected by various aspects such as race, environment, etc., the prediction accuracy is not very good, which cannot make a great contribution to the medical field. In summary, we are here to track the way forward in the era of big data for us and other potential general populations and show ways to leverage the vast amounts of data available today.
abstract_zh: 近年来，已经开发了多种估计生物年龄（BA）的方法。特别是随着机器学习（ML）的发展，BA预测的类型越来越多，准确性也得到了很大的提高。 BA估计模型在监测健康老龄化方面发挥着重要作用，可以为检测一般人群的健康状况和对亚健康人群发出警告提供新的工具。我们将主要回顾三种使用机器学习的年龄预测方法。它们基于血液生物标志物、面部图像和结构神经影像特征。目前来看，利用血液生物标志物的模型是最简单、最直接、最准确的方法。人脸图像方法受种族、环境等各方面的影响，预测精度不是很好，无法为医学领域做出很大的贡献。总之，我们来这里是为了跟踪我们和其他潜在普通人群在大数据时代的前进方向，并展示利用当今可用的大量数据的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于机器学习的生物衰老估计技术，重点分析了三种方法：血液生物标志物、面部图像和结构神经影像特征。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习的发展，生物年龄（BA）预测的准确性显著提升，这对监测健康老龄化和检测亚健康人群具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾，对比分析基于血液生物标志物、面部图像及结构神经影像特征的三种机器学习预测方法。
AI.result: 血液生物标志物方法最简单、直接且准确；面部图像方法受种族、环境等因素影响，预测精度较低；结构神经影像方法未明确提及效果。
AI.conclusion: 当前血液生物标志物模型是最佳选择，但需进一步探索大数据时代下更高效的生物衰老预测途径。

ai_content_json.method: 通过文献回顾，对比分析基于血液生物标志物、面部图像及结构神经影像特征的三种机器学习预测方法。
ai_content_json.result: 血液生物标志物方法最简单、直接且准确；面部图像方法受种族、环境等因素影响，预测精度较低；结构神经影像方法未明确提及效果。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 当前血液生物标志物模型是最佳选择，但需进一步探索大数据时代下更高效的生物衰老预测途径。

search_text: Machine Learning-based Biological Ageing Estimation Technologies: A Survey 基于机器学习的生物衰老估计技术：调查 In recent years, there are various methods of estimating Biological Age (BA) have been developed. Especially with the development of machine learning (ML), there are more and more types of BA predictions, and the accuracy has been greatly improved. The models for the estimation of BA play an important role in monitoring healthy aging, and could provide new tools to detect health status in the general population and give warnings to sub-healthy people. We will mainly review three age prediction methods by using ML. They are based on blood biomarkers, facial images, and structural neuroimaging features. For now, the model using blood biomarkers is the simplest, most direct, and most accurate method. The face image method is affected by various aspects such as race, environment, etc., the prediction accuracy is not very good, which cannot make a great contribution to the medical field. In summary, we are here to track the way forward in the era of big data for us and other potential general populations and show ways to leverage the vast amounts of data available today. 近年来，已经开发了多种估计生物年龄（BA）的方法。特别是随着机器学习（ML）的发展，BA预测的类型越来越多，准确性也得到了很大的提高。 BA估计模型在监测健康老龄化方面发挥着重要作用，可以为检测一般人群的健康状况和对亚健康人群发出警告提供新的工具。我们将主要回顾三种使用机器学习的年龄预测方法。它们基于血液生物标志物、面部图像和结构神经影像特征。目前来看，利用血液生物标志物的模型是最简单、最直接、最准确的方法。人脸图像方法受种族、环境等各方面的影响，预测精度不是很好，无法为医学领域做出很大的贡献。总之，我们来这里是为了跟踪我们和其他潜在普通人群在大数据时代的前进方向，并展示利用当今可用的大量数据的方法。 本文综述了基于机器学习的生物衰老估计技术，重点分析了三种方法：血液生物标志物、面部图像和结构神经影像特征。 Zhaonian Zhang,Richard Jiang,Danny Crookes,Paul Chazot cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Sentiment Analysis with R: Natural Language Processing for Semi-Automated Assessments of Qualitative Data
title_zh: 使用 R 进行情感分析：用于定性数据半自动评估的自然语言处理
abstract: Sentiment analysis is a sub-discipline in the field of natural language processing and computational linguistics and can be used for automated or semi-automated analyses of text documents. One of the aims of these analyses is to recognize an expressed attitude as positive or negative as it can be contained in comments on social media platforms or political documents and speeches as well as fictional and nonfictional texts. Regarding analyses of comments on social media platforms, this is an extension of the previous tutorial on semi-automated screenings of social media network data. A longitudinal perspective regarding social media comments as well as cross-sectional perspectives regarding fictional and nonfictional texts, e.g. entire books and libraries, can lead to extensive text documents. Their analyses can be simplified and accelerated by using sentiment analysis with acceptable inter-rater reliability. Therefore, this tutorial introduces the basic functions for performing a sentiment analysis with R and explains how text documents can be analysed step by step - regardless of their underlying formatting. All prerequisites and steps are described in detail and associated codes are available on GitHub. A comparison of two political speeches illustrates a possible use case.
summary: Sentiment analysis is a sub-discipline in the field of natural language processing and computational linguistics and can be used for automated or semi-automated analyses of text documents. One of the aims of these analyses is to recognize an expressed attitude as positive or negative as it can be contained in comments on social media platforms or political documents and speeches as well as fictional and nonfictional texts. Regarding analyses of comments on social media platforms, this is an extension of the previous tutorial on semi-automated screenings of social media network data. A longitudinal perspective regarding social media comments as well as cross-sectional perspectives regarding fictional and nonfictional texts, e.g. entire books and libraries, can lead to extensive text documents. Their analyses can be simplified and accelerated by using sentiment analysis with acceptable inter-rater reliability. Therefore, this tutorial introduces the basic functions for performing a sentiment analysis with R and explains how text documents can be analysed step by step - regardless of their underlying formatting. All prerequisites and steps are described in detail and associated codes are available on GitHub. A comparison of two political speeches illustrates a possible use case.
abstract_zh: 情感分析是自然语言处理和计算语言学领域的一个子学科，可用于文本文档的自动或半自动分析。这些分析的目的之一是识别社交媒体平台评论或政治文件和演讲以及虚构和非虚构文本中所表达的积极或消极态度。关于社交媒体平台评论的分析，这是之前半自动筛选社交媒体网络数据教程的延伸。关于社交媒体评论的纵向视角以及关于虚构和非虚构文本的横向视角，例如整个书籍和图书馆，可以产生大量的文本文档。通过使用具有可接受的评估者间可靠性的情绪分析，可以简化和加速他们的分析。因此，本教程介绍了使用 R 执行情感分析的基本功能，并解释了如何逐步分析文本文档 - 无论其底层格式如何。详细描述了所有先决条件和步骤，并且相关代码可在 GitHub 上获取。两次政治演讲的比较说明了一个可能的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了使用R语言进行情感分析的方法，用于半自动化处理定性文本数据，如社交媒体评论、政治演讲和书籍。
AI.motivation: 传统人工分析大规模文本数据效率低且耗时，情感分析可提升处理速度并保持可接受的评分一致性。
AI.method: 通过R语言的自然语言处理功能，分步骤解析文本数据，包括数据预处理、情感词典应用及结果可视化，并提供GitHub代码支持。
AI.result: 展示了两种政治演讲的情感分析案例，验证了方法在不同文本类型中的适用性及可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该教程为研究者提供了系统化的R语言情感分析框架，适用于跨领域文本的半自动化评估。

authors_text: Yechao Bai,Xiaogang Wang,Marcelo H. Ang Jr,Daniela Rus
title: BIMS-PU: Bi-Directional and Multi-Scale Point Cloud Upsampling
title_zh: BIMS-PU：双向多尺度点云上采样
comment: Accepted to RA-L 2022. in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: Accepted to RA-L 2022. in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: The learning and aggregation of multi-scale features are essential in empowering neural networks to capture the fine-grained geometric details in the point cloud upsampling task. Most existing approaches extract multi-scale features from a point cloud of a fixed resolution, hence obtain only a limited level of details. Though an existing approach aggregates a feature hierarchy of different resolutions from a cascade of upsampling sub-network, the training is complex with expensive computation. To address these issues, we construct a new point cloud upsampling pipeline called BIMS-PU that integrates the feature pyramid architecture with a bi-directional up and downsampling path. Specifically, we decompose the up/downsampling procedure into several up/downsampling sub-steps by breaking the target sampling factor into smaller factors. The multi-scale features are naturally produced in a parallel manner and aggregated using a fast feature fusion method. Supervision signal is simultaneously applied to all upsampled point clouds of different scales. Moreover, we formulate a residual block to ease the training of our model. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on different datasets show that our method achieves superior results to state-of-the-art approaches. Last but not least, we demonstrate that point cloud upsampling can improve robot perception by ameliorating the 3D data quality.
summary: The learning and aggregation of multi-scale features are essential in empowering neural networks to capture the fine-grained geometric details in the point cloud upsampling task. Most existing approaches extract multi-scale features from a point cloud of a fixed resolution, hence obtain only a limited level of details. Though an existing approach aggregates a feature hierarchy of different resolutions from a cascade of upsampling sub-network, the training is complex with expensive computation. To address these issues, we construct a new point cloud upsampling pipeline called BIMS-PU that integrates the feature pyramid architecture with a bi-directional up and downsampling path. Specifically, we decompose the up/downsampling procedure into several up/downsampling sub-steps by breaking the target sampling factor into smaller factors. The multi-scale features are naturally produced in a parallel manner and aggregated using a fast feature fusion method. Supervision signal is simultaneously applied to all upsampled point clouds of different scales. Moreover, we formulate a residual block to ease the training of our model. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments on different datasets show that our method achieves superior results to state-of-the-art approaches. Last but not least, we demonstrate that point cloud upsampling can improve robot perception by ameliorating the 3D data quality.
abstract_zh: 多尺度特征的学习和聚合对于使神经网络能够捕获点云上采样任务中的细粒度几何细节至关重要。大多数现有方法从固定分辨率的点云中提取多尺度特征，因此只能获得有限的细节水平。尽管现有的方法从级联的上采样子网络中聚合了不同分辨率的特征层次结构，但训练很复杂，计算成本很高。为了解决这些问题，我们构建了一个名为 BIMS-PU 的新点云上采样管道，它将特征金字塔架构与双向上采样和下采样路径集成在一起。具体来说，我们通过将目标采样因子分解为更小的因子，将上/下采样过程分解为几个上/下采​​样子步骤。多尺度特征自然以并行方式产生，并使用快速特征融合方法聚合。监督信号同时应用于所有不同尺度的上采样点云。此外，我们制定了一个残差块来简化模型的训练。对不同数据集进行的广泛的定量和定性实验表明，我们的方法取得了优于最先进方法的结果。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，我们证明点云上采样可以通过改善 3D 数据质量来改善机器人感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BIMS-PU的点云上采样方法，通过双向多尺度特征学习提升几何细节的捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在固定分辨率点云中提取多尺度特征时细节有限，且级联上采样网络训练复杂、计算成本高。
AI.method: 构建集成特征金字塔架构的双向上下采样路径，将目标采样因子分解为多级子步骤并行生成多尺度特征，结合快速特征融合与残差块优化训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上定量定性实验均优于现有方法，并验证了该方法可提升机器人感知的3D数据质量。
AI.conclusion: BIMS-PU通过高效多尺度特征学习与并行处理机制，在点云上采样任务中实现了精度与效率的双重提升。

title: Distilling a Pretrained Language Model to a Multilingual ASR Model
title_zh: 将预训练语言模型提炼为多语言 ASR 模型
comment: Accepted to Interspeech 2022. Official implementation provided in https://github.com/juice500ml/xlm_to_xlsr
comments: Accepted to Interspeech 2022. Official implementation provided in https://github.com/juice500ml/xlm_to_xlsr
abstract: Multilingual speech data often suffer from long-tailed language distribution, resulting in performance degradation. However, multilingual text data is much easier to obtain, yielding a more useful general language model. Hence, we are motivated to distill the rich knowledge embedded inside a well-trained teacher text model to the student speech model. We propose a novel method called the Distilling a Language model to a Speech model (Distill-L2S), which aligns the latent representations of two different modalities. The subtle differences are handled by the shrinking mechanism, nearest-neighbor interpolation, and a learnable linear projection layer. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our distillation method by applying it to the multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) task. We distill the transformer-based cross-lingual language model (InfoXLM) while fine-tuning the large-scale multilingual ASR model (XLSR-wav2vec 2.0) for each language. We show the superiority of our method on 20 low-resource languages of the CommonVoice dataset with less than 100 hours of speech data.
summary: Multilingual speech data often suffer from long-tailed language distribution, resulting in performance degradation. However, multilingual text data is much easier to obtain, yielding a more useful general language model. Hence, we are motivated to distill the rich knowledge embedded inside a well-trained teacher text model to the student speech model. We propose a novel method called the Distilling a Language model to a Speech model (Distill-L2S), which aligns the latent representations of two different modalities. The subtle differences are handled by the shrinking mechanism, nearest-neighbor interpolation, and a learnable linear projection layer. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our distillation method by applying it to the multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR) task. We distill the transformer-based cross-lingual language model (InfoXLM) while fine-tuning the large-scale multilingual ASR model (XLSR-wav2vec 2.0) for each language. We show the superiority of our method on 20 low-resource languages of the CommonVoice dataset with less than 100 hours of speech data.
abstract_zh: 多语言语音数据经常受到长尾语言分布的影响，导致性能下降。然而，多语言文本数据更容易获得，从而产生更有用的通用语言模型。因此，我们有动力将训练有素的教师文本模型中嵌入的丰富知识提炼到学生语音模型中。我们提出了一种称为“将语言模型蒸馏为语音模型”（Distill-L2S）的新颖方法，该方法对齐两种不同模态的潜在表示。细微的差异是通过收缩机制、最近邻插值和可学习的线性投影层来处理的。我们通过将蒸馏方法应用于多语言自动语音识别（ASR）任务来证明其有效性。我们提炼了基于 Transformer 的跨语言语言模型 (InfoXLM)，同时针对每种语言微调了大规模多语言 ASR 模型 (XLSR-wav2vec 2.0)。我们在 CommonVoice 数据集的 20 种低资源语言（语音数据不足 100 小时）上展示了我们的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将预训练语言模型知识蒸馏到多语言语音识别模型的方法，以解决多语言语音数据长尾分布导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 多语言语音数据存在长尾分布问题，而多语言文本数据更易获取，通过蒸馏语言模型知识可提升低资源语言的语音识别性能。
AI.method: 提出Distill-L2S方法，通过收缩机制、最近邻插值和可学习线性投影层对齐文本模型与语音模型的潜在表示，实现跨模态知识蒸馏。
AI.result: 在CommonVoice数据集的20种低资源语言（语音数据少于100小时）上验证，表明该方法在语音识别任务中优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态知识蒸馏有效提升了多语言语音模型在低资源语言上的性能，为解决长尾分布问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dexiang Hong,Xiaoqi Ma,Xinyao Wang,Congcong Li,Yufei Wang,Longyin Wen
title: SC-Transformer++: Structured Context Transformer for Generic Event Boundary Detection
title_zh: SC-Transformer++：用于通用事件边界检测的结构化上下文转换器
comment: winner method at LOVEU@CVPR'22 Generic Event Boundary Detection Challenge
comments: winner method at LOVEU@CVPR'22 Generic Event Boundary Detection Challenge
abstract: This report presents the algorithm used in the submission of Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) Challenge at CVPR 2022. In this work, we improve the existing Structured Context Transformer (SC-Transformer) method for GEBD. Specifically, a transformer decoder module is added after transformer encoders to extract high quality frame features. The final classification is performed jointly on the results of the original binary classifier and a newly introduced multi-class classifier branch. To enrich motion information, optical flow is introduced as a new modality. Finally, model ensemble is used to further boost performance. The proposed method achieves 86.49% F1 score on Kinetics-GEBD test set. which improves 2.86% F1 score compared to the previous SOTA method.
summary: This report presents the algorithm used in the submission of Generic Event Boundary Detection (GEBD) Challenge at CVPR 2022. In this work, we improve the existing Structured Context Transformer (SC-Transformer) method for GEBD. Specifically, a transformer decoder module is added after transformer encoders to extract high quality frame features. The final classification is performed jointly on the results of the original binary classifier and a newly introduced multi-class classifier branch. To enrich motion information, optical flow is introduced as a new modality. Finally, model ensemble is used to further boost performance. The proposed method achieves 86.49% F1 score on Kinetics-GEBD test set. which improves 2.86% F1 score compared to the previous SOTA method.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了在 CVPR 2022 上提交通用事件边界检测 (GEBD) 挑战赛时使用的算法。在这项工作中，我们改进了 GEBD 现有的结构化上下文变换器 (SC-Transformer) 方法。具体来说，在Transformer编码器之后添加Transformer解码器模块以提取高质量的帧特征。最终的分类是对原始二元分类器和新引入的多类分类器分支的结果联合执行的。为了丰富运动信息，引入光流作为一种新的模态。最后，模型集成用于进一步提高性能。该方法在 Kinetics-GEBD 测试集上取得了 86.49% 的 F1 分数。与之前的 SOTA 方法相比，F1 分数提高了 2.86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的SC-Transformer++方法，用于解决通用事件边界检测（GEBD）任务，旨在更准确地识别视频中事件的起始和结束位置。
AI.motivation: 为提升事件边界检测性能，需增强模型对上下文信息和运动特征的建模能力，同时优化分类策略以提高检测精度。
AI.method: 在SC-Transformer编码器后添加Transformer解码器提取高质量帧特征，结合二分类器与新引入的多分类器分支进行联合分类，并引入光流作为新模态丰富运动信息，最终通过模型集成提升性能。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-GEBD测试集上达到86.49%的F1分数，较之前最优方法提升2.86%。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模块协同优化与多模态特征融合，SC-Transformer++在事件边界检测任务中实现了显著性能提升，验证了方法的有效性。

title: FreSCo: Frequency-Domain Scan Context for LiDAR-based Place Recognition with Translation and Rotation Invariance
title_zh: FreSCo：用于基于 LiDAR 的具有平移和旋转不变性的位置识别的频域扫描上下文
abstract: Place recognition plays a crucial role in re-localization and loop closure detection tasks for robots and vehicles. This paper seeks a well-defined global descriptor for LiDAR-based place recognition. Compared to local descriptors, global descriptors show remarkable performance in urban road scenes but are usually viewpoint-dependent. To this end, we propose a simple yet robust global descriptor dubbed FreSCo that decomposes the viewpoint difference during revisit and achieves both translation and rotation invariance by leveraging Fourier Transform and circular shift technique. Besides, a fast two-stage pose estimation method is proposed to estimate the relative pose after place retrieval by utilizing the compact 2D point clouds extracted from the original data. Experiments show that FreSCo exhibited superior performance than contemporaneous methods on sequences of different scenes from multiple datasets. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/soytony/FreSCo.
summary: Place recognition plays a crucial role in re-localization and loop closure detection tasks for robots and vehicles. This paper seeks a well-defined global descriptor for LiDAR-based place recognition. Compared to local descriptors, global descriptors show remarkable performance in urban road scenes but are usually viewpoint-dependent. To this end, we propose a simple yet robust global descriptor dubbed FreSCo that decomposes the viewpoint difference during revisit and achieves both translation and rotation invariance by leveraging Fourier Transform and circular shift technique. Besides, a fast two-stage pose estimation method is proposed to estimate the relative pose after place retrieval by utilizing the compact 2D point clouds extracted from the original data. Experiments show that FreSCo exhibited superior performance than contemporaneous methods on sequences of different scenes from multiple datasets. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/soytony/FreSCo.
abstract_zh: 位置识别在机器人和车辆的重新定位和闭环检测任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。本文为基于激光雷达的地点识别寻找一个明确定义的全局描述符。与局部描述符相比，全局描述符在城市道路场景中表现出显着的性能，但通常依赖于视点。为此，我们提出了一种简单而强大的全局描述符，称为 FreSCo，它可以分解重访期间的视点差异，并通过利用傅里叶变换和循环移位技术实现平移和旋转不变性。此外，还提出了一种快速两阶段姿态估计方法，利用从原始数据中提取的紧凑二维点云来估计位置检索后的相对姿态。实验表明，FreSCo 在多个数据集的不同场景序列上表现出比同期方法更优越的性能。代码将在 https://github.com/soytony/FreSCo 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiDAR的地点识别全局描述符FreSCo，通过频域变换和循环移位技术实现平移旋转不变性。
AI.motivation: 现有全局描述符在城市道路场景表现优异但存在视角依赖性，需开发更鲁棒且视角无关的描述符以提升定位可靠性。
AI.method: 采用傅里叶变换分解视角差异，结合循环移位技术构建频域扫描上下文，设计两阶段姿态估计方法处理压缩点云数据。
AI.result: 在多个数据集的多场景序列测试中，FreSCo相较同期方法展现出更优的地点识别性能，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FreSCo通过频域特征提取有效解决了视角变化问题，为LiDAR-based定位提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiDAR的地点识别全局描述符FreSCo，通过频域变换和循环移位技术实现平移旋转不变性。
motivation: 现有全局描述符在城市道路场景表现优异但存在视角依赖性，需开发更鲁棒且视角无关的描述符以提升定位可靠性。
method: 采用傅里叶变换分解视角差异，结合循环移位技术构建频域扫描上下文，设计两阶段姿态估计方法处理压缩点云数据。
result: 在多个数据集的多场景序列测试中，FreSCo相较同期方法展现出更优的地点识别性能，且代码已开源。
conclusion: FreSCo通过频域特征提取有效解决了视角变化问题，为LiDAR-based定位提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
search_text: FreSCo: Frequency-Domain Scan Context for LiDAR-based Place Recognition with Translation and Rotation Invariance FreSCo：用于基于 LiDAR 的具有平移和旋转不变性的位置识别的频域扫描上下文 Place recognition plays a crucial role in re-localization and loop closure detection tasks for robots and vehicles. This paper seeks a well-defined global descriptor for LiDAR-based place recognition. Compared to local descriptors, global descriptors show remarkable performance in urban road scenes but are usually viewpoint-dependent. To this end, we propose a simple yet robust global descriptor dubbed FreSCo that decomposes the viewpoint difference during revisit and achieves both translation and rotation invariance by leveraging Fourier Transform and circular shift technique. Besides, a fast two-stage pose estimation method is proposed to estimate the relative pose after place retrieval by utilizing the compact 2D point clouds extracted from the original data. Experiments show that FreSCo exhibited superior performance than contemporaneous methods on sequences of different scenes from multiple datasets. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/soytony/FreSCo. 位置识别在机器人和车辆的重新定位和闭环检测任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。本文为基于激光雷达的地点识别寻找一个明确定义的全局描述符。与局部描述符相比，全局描述符在城市道路场景中表现出显着的性能，但通常依赖于视点。为此，我们提出了一种简单而强大的全局描述符，称为 FreSCo，它可以分解重访期间的视点差异，并通过利用傅里叶变换和循环移位技术实现平移和旋转不变性。此外，还提出了一种快速两阶段姿态估计方法，利用从原始数据中提取的紧凑二维点云来估计位置检索后的相对姿态。实验表明，FreSCo 在多个数据集的不同场景序列上表现出比同期方法更优越的性能。代码将在 https://github.com/soytony/FreSCo 上公开提供。 本文提出一种基于LiDAR的地点识别全局描述符FreSCo，通过频域变换和循环移位技术实现平移旋转不变性。 Yongzhi Fan,Xin Du,Lun Luo,Jizhong Shen cs.RO

title: Inverted Semantic-Index for Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于图像检索的倒排语义索引
abstract: This paper addresses the construction of inverted index for large-scale image retrieval. The inverted index proposed by J. Sivic brings a significant acceleration by reducing distance computations with only a small fraction of the database. The state-of-the-art inverted indices aim to build finer partitions that produce a concise and accurate candidate list. However, partitioning in these frameworks is generally achieved by unsupervised clustering methods which ignore the semantic information of images. In this paper, we replace the clustering method with image classification, during the construction of codebook. We then propose a merging and splitting method to solve the problem that the number of partitions is unchangeable in the inverted semantic-index. Next, we combine our semantic-index with the product quantization (PQ) so as to alleviate the accuracy loss caused by PQ compression. Finally, we evaluate our model on large-scale image retrieval benchmarks. Experiment results demonstrate that our model can significantly improve the retrieval accuracy by generating high-quality candidate lists.
summary: This paper addresses the construction of inverted index for large-scale image retrieval. The inverted index proposed by J. Sivic brings a significant acceleration by reducing distance computations with only a small fraction of the database. The state-of-the-art inverted indices aim to build finer partitions that produce a concise and accurate candidate list. However, partitioning in these frameworks is generally achieved by unsupervised clustering methods which ignore the semantic information of images. In this paper, we replace the clustering method with image classification, during the construction of codebook. We then propose a merging and splitting method to solve the problem that the number of partitions is unchangeable in the inverted semantic-index. Next, we combine our semantic-index with the product quantization (PQ) so as to alleviate the accuracy loss caused by PQ compression. Finally, we evaluate our model on large-scale image retrieval benchmarks. Experiment results demonstrate that our model can significantly improve the retrieval accuracy by generating high-quality candidate lists.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了用于大规模图像检索的倒排索引的构建。 J. Sivic 提出的倒排索引通过减少仅使用数据库的一小部分的距离计算来带来显着的加速。最先进的倒排索引旨在构建更精细的分区，从而生成简洁而准确的候选列表。然而，这些框架中的分区通常是通过无监督聚类方法来实现的，忽略了图像的语义信息。在本文中，我们在码本的构建过程中用图像分类代替了聚类方法。然后我们提出了一种合并和分裂的方法来解决倒排语义索引中分区数量不变的问题。接下来，我们将语义索引与乘积量化（PQ）相结合，以减轻 PQ 压缩造成的精度损失。最后，我们在大规模图像检索基准上评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以通过生成高质量的候选列表来显着提高检索精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义索引的倒排索引构建方法，用于提升大规模图像检索的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有倒排索引方法依赖无监督聚类划分图像分区，忽视图像语义信息，导致候选列表不够精确。
AI.method: 用图像分类替代聚类构建码本，引入合并与分割机制动态调整分区数量，并结合乘积量化（PQ）减少压缩损失。
AI.result: 在大规模图像检索基准测试中，该方法生成的高质量候选列表显著提升了检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合语义信息与乘积量化的倒排语义索引有效解决了传统方法的精度不足问题。

title: SAT: Self-adaptive training for fashion compatibility prediction
title_zh: SAT：时尚兼容性预测的自适应训练
abstract: This paper presents a self-adaptive training (SAT) model for fashion compatibility prediction. It focuses on the learning of some hard items, such as those that share similar color, texture, and pattern features but are considered incompatible due to the aesthetics or temporal shifts. Specifically, we first design a method to define hard outfits and a difficulty score (DS) is defined and assigned to each outfit based on the difficulty in recommending an item for it. Then, we propose a self-adaptive triplet loss (SATL), where the DS of the outfit is considered. Finally, we propose a very simple conditional similarity network combining the proposed SATL to achieve the learning of hard items in the fashion compatibility prediction. Experiments on the publicly available Polyvore Outfits and Polyvore Outfits-D datasets demonstrate our SAT's effectiveness in fashion compatibility prediction. Besides, our SATL can be easily extended to other conditional similarity networks to improve their performance.
summary: This paper presents a self-adaptive training (SAT) model for fashion compatibility prediction. It focuses on the learning of some hard items, such as those that share similar color, texture, and pattern features but are considered incompatible due to the aesthetics or temporal shifts. Specifically, we first design a method to define hard outfits and a difficulty score (DS) is defined and assigned to each outfit based on the difficulty in recommending an item for it. Then, we propose a self-adaptive triplet loss (SATL), where the DS of the outfit is considered. Finally, we propose a very simple conditional similarity network combining the proposed SATL to achieve the learning of hard items in the fashion compatibility prediction. Experiments on the publicly available Polyvore Outfits and Polyvore Outfits-D datasets demonstrate our SAT's effectiveness in fashion compatibility prediction. Besides, our SATL can be easily extended to other conditional similarity networks to improve their performance.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于时尚兼容性预测的自适应训练（SAT）模型。它侧重于学习一些困难的项目，例如那些具有相似颜色、纹理和图案特征但由于美观或时间变化而被认为不兼容的项目。具体来说，我们首先设计一种定义硬服装的方法，并根据推荐项目的难度来定义难度分数（DS）并分配给每个服装。然后，我们提出了自适应三元组损失（SATL），其中考虑了服装的 DS。最后，我们结合所提出的 SATL 提出了一个非常简单的条件相似性网络，以实现时尚兼容性预测中硬项目的学习。在公开的 Polyvore Outfits 和 Polyvore Outfits-D 数据集上进行的实验证明了我们的 SAT 在时尚兼容性预测方面的有效性。此外，我们的 SATL 可以轻松扩展到其他条件相似性网络，以提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应训练模型（SAT），用于解决时尚搭配预测中难以学习的物品对问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理具有相似颜色、纹理但因审美或时间变化而被视为不兼容的时尚物品时效果不佳，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 通过定义困难搭配（硬物品）及难度评分（DS），结合自适应三元组损失（SATL）与条件相似度网络，实现对困难样本的自适应学习。
AI.result: 在Polyvore Outfits和Polyvore Outfits-D数据集上验证，SAT模型在时尚兼容性预测任务中表现优异，且SATL可扩展至其他模型提升性能。
AI.conclusion: SAT通过动态调整训练难度，有效解决了时尚搭配中的复杂案例，为条件相似度网络提供了通用优化方案。

title: Language Models as Knowledge Embeddings
title_zh: 作为知识嵌入的语言模型
comment: This revision corrects some texts after fixing a data leakage issue
comments: This revision corrects some texts after fixing a data leakage issue
abstract: Knowledge embeddings (KE) represent a knowledge graph (KG) by embedding entities and relations into continuous vector spaces. Existing methods are mainly structure-based or description-based. Structure-based methods learn representations that preserve the inherent structure of KGs. They cannot well represent abundant long-tail entities in real-world KGs with limited structural information. Description-based methods leverage textual information and language models. Prior approaches in this direction barely outperform structure-based ones, and suffer from problems like expensive negative sampling and restrictive description demand. In this paper, we propose LMKE, which adopts Language Models to derive Knowledge Embeddings, aiming at both enriching representations of long-tail entities and solving problems of prior description-based methods. We formulate description-based KE learning with a contrastive learning framework to improve efficiency in training and evaluation. Experimental results show that LMKE achieves state-of-the-art performance on KE benchmarks of link prediction and triple classification, especially for long-tail entities.
summary: Knowledge embeddings (KE) represent a knowledge graph (KG) by embedding entities and relations into continuous vector spaces. Existing methods are mainly structure-based or description-based. Structure-based methods learn representations that preserve the inherent structure of KGs. They cannot well represent abundant long-tail entities in real-world KGs with limited structural information. Description-based methods leverage textual information and language models. Prior approaches in this direction barely outperform structure-based ones, and suffer from problems like expensive negative sampling and restrictive description demand. In this paper, we propose LMKE, which adopts Language Models to derive Knowledge Embeddings, aiming at both enriching representations of long-tail entities and solving problems of prior description-based methods. We formulate description-based KE learning with a contrastive learning framework to improve efficiency in training and evaluation. Experimental results show that LMKE achieves state-of-the-art performance on KE benchmarks of link prediction and triple classification, especially for long-tail entities.
abstract_zh: 知识嵌入（KE）通过将实体和关系嵌入到连续向量空间中来表示知识图（KG）。现有的方法主要是基于结构或基于描述的。基于结构的方法学习保留知识图谱固有结构的表示。它们无法很好地表示结构信息有限的现实世界知识图谱中丰富的长尾实体。基于描述的方法利用文本信息和语言模型。这个方向上的现有方法几乎没有优于基于结构的方法，并且存在诸如昂贵的负采样和限制性描述需求等问题。在本文中，我们提出了LMKE，它采用语言模型来导出知识嵌入，旨在丰富长尾实体的表示并解决现有基于描述的方法的问题。我们制定了基于描述的KE学习和对比学习框架，以提高训练和评估的效率。实验结果表明，LMKE 在链路预测和三元分类的 KE 基准上实现了最先进的性能，特别是对于长尾实体。

AI.tldr: 提出LMKE方法，利用语言模型生成知识嵌入以解决现有方法在长尾实体表示和效率上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化方法难以有效表示长尾实体，基于描述的方法存在负采样成本高和描述需求严格的问题，需更高效且适应性强的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用对比学习框架，结合语言模型生成知识嵌入，优化长尾实体表示并提升训练效率。
AI.result: LMKE在链接预测和三元组分类任务中达到最先进水平，尤其在长尾实体表现突出。
AI.conclusion: LMKE有效解决了长尾实体表示和描述方法效率问题，验证了语言模型在知识嵌入中的潜力。

search_text: Language Models as Knowledge Embeddings 作为知识嵌入的语言模型 Knowledge embeddings (KE) represent a knowledge graph (KG) by embedding entities and relations into continuous vector spaces. Existing methods are mainly structure-based or description-based. Structure-based methods learn representations that preserve the inherent structure of KGs. They cannot well represent abundant long-tail entities in real-world KGs with limited structural information. Description-based methods leverage textual information and language models. Prior approaches in this direction barely outperform structure-based ones, and suffer from problems like expensive negative sampling and restrictive description demand. In this paper, we propose LMKE, which adopts Language Models to derive Knowledge Embeddings, aiming at both enriching representations of long-tail entities and solving problems of prior description-based methods. We formulate description-based KE learning with a contrastive learning framework to improve efficiency in training and evaluation. Experimental results show that LMKE achieves state-of-the-art performance on KE benchmarks of link prediction and triple classification, especially for long-tail entities. 知识嵌入（KE）通过将实体和关系嵌入到连续向量空间中来表示知识图（KG）。现有的方法主要是基于结构或基于描述的。基于结构的方法学习保留知识图谱固有结构的表示。它们无法很好地表示结构信息有限的现实世界知识图谱中丰富的长尾实体。基于描述的方法利用文本信息和语言模型。这个方向上的现有方法几乎没有优于基于结构的方法，并且存在诸如昂贵的负采样和限制性描述需求等问题。在本文中，我们提出了LMKE，它采用语言模型来导出知识嵌入，旨在丰富长尾实体的表示并解决现有基于描述的方法的问题。我们制定了基于描述的KE学习和对比学习框架，以提高训练和评估的效率。实验结果表明，LMKE 在链路预测和三元分类的 KE 基准上实现了最先进的性能，特别是对于长尾实体。 提出LMKE方法，利用语言模型生成知识嵌入以解决现有方法在长尾实体表示和效率上的不足。 Xintao Wang,Qianyu He,Jiaqing Liang,Yanghua Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Juewen Peng,Zhiguo Cao,Xianrui Luo,Hao Lu,Ke Xian,Jianming Zhang
title: BokehMe: When Neural Rendering Meets Classical Rendering
title_zh: BokehMe：当神经渲染遇到经典渲染
abstract: We propose BokehMe, a hybrid bokeh rendering framework that marries a neural renderer with a classical physically motivated renderer. Given a single image and a potentially imperfect disparity map, BokehMe generates high-resolution photo-realistic bokeh effects with adjustable blur size, focal plane, and aperture shape. To this end, we analyze the errors from the classical scattering-based method and derive a formulation to calculate an error map. Based on this formulation, we implement the classical renderer by a scattering-based method and propose a two-stage neural renderer to fix the erroneous areas from the classical renderer. The neural renderer employs a dynamic multi-scale scheme to efficiently handle arbitrary blur sizes, and it is trained to handle imperfect disparity input. Experiments show that our method compares favorably against previous methods on both synthetic image data and real image data with predicted disparity. A user study is further conducted to validate the advantage of our method.
summary: We propose BokehMe, a hybrid bokeh rendering framework that marries a neural renderer with a classical physically motivated renderer. Given a single image and a potentially imperfect disparity map, BokehMe generates high-resolution photo-realistic bokeh effects with adjustable blur size, focal plane, and aperture shape. To this end, we analyze the errors from the classical scattering-based method and derive a formulation to calculate an error map. Based on this formulation, we implement the classical renderer by a scattering-based method and propose a two-stage neural renderer to fix the erroneous areas from the classical renderer. The neural renderer employs a dynamic multi-scale scheme to efficiently handle arbitrary blur sizes, and it is trained to handle imperfect disparity input. Experiments show that our method compares favorably against previous methods on both synthetic image data and real image data with predicted disparity. A user study is further conducted to validate the advantage of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 BokehMe，一种混合​​散景渲染框架，它将神经渲染器与经典的物理驱动渲染器结合起来。给定单个图像和可能不完美的视差图，BokehMe 可以生成高分辨率的照片级真实散景效果，并具有可调节的模糊大小、焦平面和光圈形状。为此，我们分析了经典的基于散射的方法的误差，并导出了计算误差图的公式。基于这个公式，我们通过基于散射的方法实现经典渲染器，并提出一个两阶段神经渲染器来修复经典渲染器的错误区域。神经渲染器采用动态多尺度方案来有效处理任意模糊尺寸，并且经过训练可以处理不完美的视差输入。实验表明，我们的方法在合成图像数据和具有预测视差的真实图像数据上都优于以前的方法。进一步进行用户研究以验证我们方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BokehMe框架，结合神经渲染与经典物理渲染方法，实现高质量可调节的景深模糊效果。
AI.motivation: 经典散射法存在误差且难以处理不完美视差图，神经渲染可补正但缺乏物理真实性，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 采用两阶段渲染：经典散射法生成基础效果并计算误差图，神经渲染器通过动态多尺度方案修正错误区域，支持任意模糊参数。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像数据集上优于现有方法，用户研究验证了视觉质量优势。
AI.conclusion: 混合框架有效结合物理真实性和神经网络补正能力，为可控景深渲染提供新方案。

authors_text: Weilin Wan,Lei Yang,Lingjie Liu,Zhuoying Zhang,Ruixing Jia,Yi-King Choi,Jia Pan,Christian Theobalt,Taku Komura,Wenping Wang
title: Learn to Predict How Humans Manipulate Large-sized Objects from Interactive Motions
title_zh: 学习预测人类如何通过交互式动作操纵大型物体
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 7, Issue: 2, April 2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 7, Issue: 2, April 2022)
abstract: Understanding human intentions during interactions has been a long-lasting theme, that has applications in human-robot interaction, virtual reality and surveillance. In this study, we focus on full-body human interactions with large-sized daily objects and aim to predict the future states of objects and humans given a sequential observation of human-object interaction. As there is no such dataset dedicated to full-body human interactions with large-sized daily objects, we collected a large-scale dataset containing thousands of interactions for training and evaluation purposes. We also observe that an object's intrinsic physical properties are useful for the object motion prediction, and thus design a set of object dynamic descriptors to encode such intrinsic properties. We treat the object dynamic descriptors as a new modality and propose a graph neural network, HO-GCN, to fuse motion data and dynamic descriptors for the prediction task. We show the proposed network that consumes dynamic descriptors can achieve state-of-the-art prediction results and help the network better generalize to unseen objects. We also demonstrate the predicted results are useful for human-robot collaborations.
summary: Understanding human intentions during interactions has been a long-lasting theme, that has applications in human-robot interaction, virtual reality and surveillance. In this study, we focus on full-body human interactions with large-sized daily objects and aim to predict the future states of objects and humans given a sequential observation of human-object interaction. As there is no such dataset dedicated to full-body human interactions with large-sized daily objects, we collected a large-scale dataset containing thousands of interactions for training and evaluation purposes. We also observe that an object's intrinsic physical properties are useful for the object motion prediction, and thus design a set of object dynamic descriptors to encode such intrinsic properties. We treat the object dynamic descriptors as a new modality and propose a graph neural network, HO-GCN, to fuse motion data and dynamic descriptors for the prediction task. We show the proposed network that consumes dynamic descriptors can achieve state-of-the-art prediction results and help the network better generalize to unseen objects. We also demonstrate the predicted results are useful for human-robot collaborations.
abstract_zh: 在交互过程中理解人类意图一直是一个长期的主题，它在人机交互、虚拟现实和监控中都有应用。在这项研究中，我们关注人类与大型日常物体的全身交互，旨在通过对人与物体交互的连续观察来预测物体和人类的未来状态。由于没有专门用于人体与大型日常物体的全身交互的数据集，我们收集了一个包含数千个交互的大型数据集，用于训练和评估目的。我们还观察到对象的内在物理属性对于对象运动预测很有用，因此设计了一组对象动态描述符来编码这些内在属性。我们将对象动态描述符视为一种新的模态，并提出了一种图神经网络 HO-GCN，以融合运动数据和动态描述符来进行预测任务。我们展示了所提出的使用动态描述符的网络可以实现最先进的预测结果，并帮助网络更好地泛化到看不见的对象。我们还证明预测结果对于人机协作很有用。

AI.tldr: 预测人类与大尺寸物体互动时的物体和人类未来状态
AI.motivation: 缺乏专用数据集且物体物理属性对预测有帮助，需改进预测方法
AI.method: 构建大规模数据集，设计物体动态描述符，并提出HO-GCN融合运动数据和描述符
AI.result: 达到SOTA，提升泛化能力，支持人机协作
AI.conclusion: 填补数据集空白，提出有效方法，促进人机协作应用

abstract: The palindrome pattern matching (pal-matching) is a kind of generalized pattern matching, in which two strings $x$ and $y$ of same length are considered to match (pal-match) if they have the same palindromic structures, i.e., for any possible $1 \le i < j \le |x| = |y|$, $x[i..j]$ is a palindrome if and only if $y[i..j]$ is a palindrome. The pal-matching problem is the problem of searching for, in a text, the occurrences of the substrings that pal-match with a pattern. Given a text $T$ of length $n$ over an alphabet of size $σ$, an index for pal-matching is to support, given a pattern $P$ of length $m$, the counting queries that compute the number $\mathsf{occ}$ of occurrences of $P$ and the locating queries that compute the occurrences of $P$. The authors in~[I et al., Theor. Comput. Sci., 2013] proposed an $O(n \lg n)$-bit data structure to support the counting queries in $O(m \lg σ)$ time and the locating queries in $O(m \lg σ+ \mathsf{occ})$ time. In this paper, we propose an FM-index type index for the pal-matching problem, which we call the PalFM-index, that occupies $2n \lg \min(σ, \lg n) + 2n + o(n)$ bits of space and supports the counting queries in $O(m)$ time. The PalFM-indexes can support the locating queries in $O(m + Δ\mathsf{occ})$ time by adding $\frac{n}Δ \lg n + n + o(n)$ bits of space, where $Δ$ is a parameter chosen from $\{1, 2, \dots, n\}$ in the preprocessing phase.

The pal-matching problem is the problem of searching for, in a text, the occurrences of the substrings that pal-match with a pattern. Given a text $T$ of length $n$ over an alphabet of size $σ$, an index for pal-matching is to support, given a pattern $P$ of length $m$, the counting queries that compute the number $\mathsf{occ}$ of occurrences of $P$ and the locating queries that compute the occurrences of $P$. The authors in~[I et al., Theor. Comput. Sci., 2013] proposed an $O(n \lg n)$-bit data structure to support the counting queries in $O(m \lg σ)$ time and the locating queries in $O(m \lg σ+ \mathsf{occ})$ time. In this paper, we propose an FM-index type index for the pal-matching problem, which we call the PalFM-index, that occupies $2n \lg \min(σ, \lg n) + 2n + o(n)$ bits of space and supports the counting queries in $O(m)$ time. The PalFM-indexes can support the locating queries in $O(m + Δ\mathsf{occ})$ time by adding $\frac{n}Δ \lg n + n + o(n)$ bits of space, where $Δ$ is a parameter chosen from $\{1, 2, \dots, n\}$ in the preprocessing phase.
abstract_zh: 回文模式匹配（pal-matching）是一种广义的模式匹配，其中两个长度相同的字符串 $x$ 和 $y$ 如果具有相同的回文结构，则认为它们匹配（pal-match），即对于任何可能的 $1 \le i < j \le |x| = |y|$, $x[i..j]$ 是回文当且仅当 $y[i..j]$ 是回文。匹配问题是在文本中搜索与模式匹配的子字符串的出现的问题。给定长度为 $n$ 的文本 $T$，在大小为 $σ$ 的字母表上，给定长度为 $m$ 的模式 $P$，好友匹配的索引将支持计算 $P$ 出现次数 $\mathsf{occ}$ 的计数查询和计算 $P$ 出现次数的定位查询。作者~[I et al., Theor.计算。 Sci., 2013]提出了一个$O(n \lg n)$位数据结构来支持$O(m \lg σ)$时间的计数查询和$O(m \lg σ+ \mathsf{occ})$时间的定位查询。在本文中，我们针对 pal 匹配问题提出了一种 FM-index 类型的索引，我们称之为 PalFM-index，它占用 $2n \lg \min(σ, \lg n) + 2n + o(n)$ 位空间，并支持 $O(m)$ 时间内的计数查询。 PalFM 索引可以通过添加 $\frac{n}Δ \lg n + n + o(n)$ 位空间来支持 $O(m + Δ\mathsf{occ})$ 时间内的定位查询，其中 $Δ$ 是在预处理阶段从 $\{1, 2, \dots, n\}$ 中选择的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PalFM-index的新型FM索引，用于解决回文模式匹配问题，优化了空间和时间效率。
AI.motivation: 现有回文匹配方法在空间复杂度和查询时间上存在不足，需设计更高效的索引结构以支持快速计数和定位查询。
AI.method: 构建基于FM索引的PalFM-index，利用2n lg min(σ, lg n) + 2n + o(n)位空间，并通过参数Δ调整定位查询效率。
AI.result: 实现O(m)时间复杂度的计数查询，定位查询通过增加空间后达到O(m + Δocc)时间复杂度，空间效率优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PalFM-index在回文模式匹配中提供了更优的空间和时间性能，为相关应用提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: PalFM-index: FM-index for Palindrome Pattern Matching PalFM-index：用于回文模式匹配的 FM-index The palindrome pattern matching (pal-matching) is a kind of generalized pattern matching, in which two strings $x$ and $y$ of same length are considered to match (pal-match) if they have the same palindromic structures, i.e., for any possible $1 \le i < j \le |x| = |y|$, $x[i..j]$ is a palindrome if and only if $y[i..j]$ is a palindrome. The pal-matching problem is the problem of searching for, in a text, the occurrences of the substrings that pal-match with a pattern. Given a text $T$ of length $n$ over an alphabet of size $σ$, an index for pal-matching is to support, given a pattern $P$ of length $m$, the counting queries that compute the number $\mathsf{occ}$ of occurrences of $P$ and the locating queries that compute the occurrences of $P$. The authors in~[I et al., Theor. Comput. Sci., 2013] proposed an $O(n \lg n)$-bit data structure to support the counting queries in $O(m \lg σ)$ time and the locating queries in $O(m \lg σ+ \mathsf{occ})$ time. In this paper, we propose an FM-index type index for the pal-matching problem, which we call the PalFM-index, that occupies $2n \lg \min(σ, \lg n) + 2n + o(n)$ bits of space and supports the counting queries in $O(m)$ time. The PalFM-indexes can support the locating queries in $O(m + Δ\mathsf{occ})$ time by adding $\frac{n}Δ \lg n + n + o(n)$ bits of space, where $Δ$ is a parameter chosen from $\{1, 2, \dots, n\}$ in the preprocessing phase. 回文模式匹配（pal-matching）是一种广义的模式匹配，其中两个长度相同的字符串 $x$ 和 $y$ 如果具有相同的回文结构，则认为它们匹配（pal-match），即对于任何可能的 $1 \le i < j \le |x| = |y|$, $x[i..j]$ 是回文当且仅当 $y[i..j]$ 是回文。匹配问题是在文本中搜索与模式匹配的子字符串的出现的问题。给定长度为 $n$ 的文本 $T$，在大小为 $σ$ 的字母表上，给定长度为 $m$ 的模式 $P$，好友匹配的索引将支持计算 $P$ 出现次数 $\mathsf{occ}$ 的计数查询和计算 $P$ 出现次数的定位查询。作者~[I et al., Theor.计算。 Sci., 2013]提出了一个$O(n \lg n)$位数据结构来支持$O(m \lg σ)$时间的计数查询和$O(m \lg σ+ \mathsf{occ})$时间的定位查询。在本文中，我们针对 pal 匹配问题提出了一种 FM-index 类型的索引，我们称之为 PalFM-index，它占用 $2n \lg \min(σ, \lg n) + 2n + o(n)$ 位空间，并支持 $O(m)$ 时间内的计数查询。 PalFM 索引可以通过添加 $\frac{n}Δ \lg n + n + o(n)$ 位空间来支持 $O(m + Δ\mathsf{occ})$ 时间内的定位查询，其中 $Δ$ 是在预处理阶段从 $\{1, 2, \dots, n\}$ 中选择的参数。 本文提出了一种名为PalFM-index的新型FM索引，用于解决回文模式匹配问题，优化了空间和时间效率。 Shinya Nagashita,Tomohiro I cs.DS

title: Non-iterative Coarse-to-fine Registration based on Single-pass Deep Cumulative Learning
title_zh: 基于单遍深度累积学习的非迭代粗精配准
comment: Accepted at International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2022)
comments: Accepted at International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2022)
abstract: Deformable image registration is a crucial step in medical image analysis for finding a non-linear spatial transformation between a pair of fixed and moving images. Deep registration methods based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been widely used as they can perform image registration in a fast and end-to-end manner. However, these methods usually have limited performance for image pairs with large deformations. Recently, iterative deep registration methods have been used to alleviate this limitation, where the transformations are iteratively learned in a coarse-to-fine manner. However, iterative methods inevitably prolong the registration runtime, and tend to learn separate image features for each iteration, which hinders the features from being leveraged to facilitate the registration at later iterations. In this study, we propose a Non-Iterative Coarse-to-finE registration Network (NICE-Net) for deformable image registration. In the NICE-Net, we propose: (i) a Single-pass Deep Cumulative Learning (SDCL) decoder that can cumulatively learn coarse-to-fine transformations within a single pass (iteration) of the network, and (ii) a Selectively-propagated Feature Learning (SFL) encoder that can learn common image features for the whole coarse-to-fine registration process and selectively propagate the features as needed. Extensive experiments on six public datasets of 3D brain Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) show that our proposed NICE-Net can outperform state-of-the-art iterative deep registration methods while only requiring similar runtime to non-iterative methods.
summary: Deformable image registration is a crucial step in medical image analysis for finding a non-linear spatial transformation between a pair of fixed and moving images. Deep registration methods based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been widely used as they can perform image registration in a fast and end-to-end manner. However, these methods usually have limited performance for image pairs with large deformations. Recently, iterative deep registration methods have been used to alleviate this limitation, where the transformations are iteratively learned in a coarse-to-fine manner. However, iterative methods inevitably prolong the registration runtime, and tend to learn separate image features for each iteration, which hinders the features from being leveraged to facilitate the registration at later iterations. In this study, we propose a Non-Iterative Coarse-to-finE registration Network (NICE-Net) for deformable image registration. In the NICE-Net, we propose: (i) a Single-pass Deep Cumulative Learning (SDCL) decoder that can cumulatively learn coarse-to-fine transformations within a single pass (iteration) of the network, and (ii) a Selectively-propagated Feature Learning (SFL) encoder that can learn common image features for the whole coarse-to-fine registration process and selectively propagate the features as needed. Extensive experiments on six public datasets of 3D brain Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) show that our proposed NICE-Net can outperform state-of-the-art iterative deep registration methods while only requiring similar runtime to non-iterative methods.
abstract_zh: 可变形图像配准是医学图像分析中寻找一对固定图像和运动图像之间的非线性空间变换的关键步骤。基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度配准方法已被广泛使用，因为它们可以快速且端到端的方式执行图像配准。然而，这些方法对于变形较大的图像对通常性能有限。最近，迭代深度配准方法已被用来缓解这一限制，其中以从粗到细的方式迭代学习变换。然而，迭代方法不可避免地会延长配准运行时间，并且往往会为每次迭代学习单独的图像特征，这阻碍了在以后的迭代中利用这些特征来促进配准。在本研究中，我们提出了一种用于可变形图像配准的非迭代粗到细配准网络（NICE-Net）。在 NICE-Net 中，我们提出：（i）单通道深度累积学习（SDCL）解码器，可以在网络的单通道（迭代）内累积学习从粗到精的转换，以及（ii）选择性传播特征学习（SFL）编码器，可以学习整个从粗到精配准过程的常见图像特征，并根据需要选择性地传播特征。对 3D 脑磁共振成像 (MRI) 的六个公共数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们提出的 NICE-Net 可以超越最先进的迭代深度配准方法，同时只需要与非迭代方法相似的运行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单次深度累积学习的非迭代粗到细图像配准方法NICE-Net，用于解决医学图像分析中大形变配准的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的配准方法在处理大形变图像对时性能有限，而迭代方法虽能缓解此问题但存在计算耗时且特征重复学习效率低的缺陷。
AI.method: 设计了单次深度累积学习解码器（SDCL）实现单次前向传播中的粗到细变换学习，并引入选择性传播特征学习编码器（SFL）以提取全局共享特征并按需传播。
AI.result: 在六个公开的3D脑MRI数据集上实验表明，NICE-Net在配准精度上优于现有迭代方法，且运行时间与非迭代方法相当。
AI.conclusion: NICE-Net通过单次累积学习机制有效融合了非迭代方法的速度优势与迭代方法的形变处理能力，为医学图像配准提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jianglin Lu,Jie Zhou,Yudong Chen,Witold Pedrycz,Kwok-Wai Hung
title: Asymmetric Transfer Hashing with Adaptive Bipartite Graph Learning
title_zh: 具有自适应二分图学习的非对称传输哈希
abstract: Thanks to the efficient retrieval speed and low storage consumption, learning to hash has been widely used in visual retrieval tasks. However, existing hashing methods assume that the query and retrieval samples lie in homogeneous feature space within the same domain. As a result, they cannot be directly applied to heterogeneous cross-domain retrieval. In this paper, we propose a Generalized Image Transfer Retrieval (GITR) problem, which encounters two crucial bottlenecks: 1) the query and retrieval samples may come from different domains, leading to an inevitable {domain distribution gap}; 2) the features of the two domains may be heterogeneous or misaligned, bringing up an additional {feature gap}. To address the GITR problem, we propose an Asymmetric Transfer Hashing (ATH) framework with its unsupervised/semi-supervised/supervised realizations. Specifically, ATH characterizes the domain distribution gap by the discrepancy between two asymmetric hash functions, and minimizes the feature gap with the help of a novel adaptive bipartite graph constructed on cross-domain data. By jointly optimizing asymmetric hash functions and the bipartite graph, not only can knowledge transfer be achieved but information loss caused by feature alignment can also be avoided. Meanwhile, to alleviate negative transfer, the intrinsic geometrical structure of single-domain data is preserved by involving a domain affinity graph. Extensive experiments on both single-domain and cross-domain benchmarks under different GITR subtasks indicate the superiority of our ATH method in comparison with the state-of-the-art hashing methods.
summary: Thanks to the efficient retrieval speed and low storage consumption, learning to hash has been widely used in visual retrieval tasks. However, existing hashing methods assume that the query and retrieval samples lie in homogeneous feature space within the same domain. As a result, they cannot be directly applied to heterogeneous cross-domain retrieval. In this paper, we propose a Generalized Image Transfer Retrieval (GITR) problem, which encounters two crucial bottlenecks: 1) the query and retrieval samples may come from different domains, leading to an inevitable {domain distribution gap}; 2) the features of the two domains may be heterogeneous or misaligned, bringing up an additional {feature gap}. To address the GITR problem, we propose an Asymmetric Transfer Hashing (ATH) framework with its unsupervised/semi-supervised/supervised realizations. Specifically, ATH characterizes the domain distribution gap by the discrepancy between two asymmetric hash functions, and minimizes the feature gap with the help of a novel adaptive bipartite graph constructed on cross-domain data. By jointly optimizing asymmetric hash functions and the bipartite graph, not only can knowledge transfer be achieved but information loss caused by feature alignment can also be avoided. Meanwhile, to alleviate negative transfer, the intrinsic geometrical structure of single-domain data is preserved by involving a domain affinity graph. Extensive experiments on both single-domain and cross-domain benchmarks under different GITR subtasks indicate the superiority of our ATH method in comparison with the state-of-the-art hashing methods.
abstract_zh: 由于高效的检索速度和低存储消耗，哈希学习已广泛应用于视觉检索任务中。然而，现有的哈希方法假设查询和检索样本位于同一域内的同质特征空间中。因此，它们不能直接应用于异构跨域检索。在本文中，我们提出了广义图像传输检索（GITR）问题，该问题遇到了两个关键瓶颈：1）查询和检索样本可能来自不同的域，导致不可避免的{域分布差距}； 2）两个域的特征可能是异构的或不一致的，从而产生额外的{特征差距}。为了解决 GITR 问题，我们提出了一种非对称传输哈希（ATH）框架及其无监督/半监督/监督实现。具体来说，ATH 通过两个非对称哈希函数之间的差异来表征域分布差距，并借助在跨域数据上构建的新型自适应二分图来最小化特征差距。通过联合优化非对称哈希函数和二分图，不仅可以实现知识转移，还可以避免特征对齐带来的信息丢失。同时，为了减轻负迁移，通过涉及域亲和图来保留单域数据的内在几何结构。在不同 GITR 子任务下对单域和跨域基准进行的广泛实验表明，与最先进的哈希方法相比，我们的 ATH 方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非对称迁移哈希框架（ATH），解决跨域图像检索中的领域分布差距和特征差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有哈希方法仅适用于同领域检索，无法处理跨域场景下的领域分布差距和异构特征差距。
AI.method: 通过非对称哈希函数表征领域分布差距，结合自适应二分图缩小特征差距，并利用领域亲和图保持单域数据结构以避免负迁移。
AI.result: 在单域和跨域基准测试中，ATH方法在检索性能上优于现有最先进哈希方法。
AI.conclusion: ATH框架有效解决了跨域哈希中的关键瓶颈，为异构领域检索提供了新思路。
