title: RSTAM: An Effective Black-Box Impersonation Attack on Face Recognition using a Mobile and Compact Printer
title_zh: RSTAM：使用移动紧凑型打印机对人脸识别进行有效的黑盒模拟攻击
abstract: Face recognition has achieved considerable progress in recent years thanks to the development of deep neural networks, but it has recently been discovered that deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples. This means that face recognition models or systems based on deep neural networks are also susceptible to adversarial examples. However, the existing methods of attacking face recognition models or systems with adversarial examples can effectively complete white-box attacks but not black-box impersonation attacks, physical attacks, or convenient attacks, particularly on commercial face recognition systems. In this paper, we propose a new method to attack face recognition models or systems called RSTAM, which enables an effective black-box impersonation attack using an adversarial mask printed by a mobile and compact printer. First, RSTAM enhances the transferability of the adversarial masks through our proposed random similarity transformation strategy. Furthermore, we propose a random meta-optimization strategy for ensembling several pre-trained face models to generate more general adversarial masks. Finally, we conduct experiments on the CelebA-HQ, LFW, Makeup Transfer (MT), and CASIA-FaceV5 datasets. The performance of the attacks is also evaluated on state-of-the-art commercial face recognition systems: Face++, Baidu, Aliyun, Tencent, and Microsoft. Extensive experiments show that RSTAM can effectively perform black-box impersonation attacks on face recognition models or systems.
summary: Face recognition has achieved considerable progress in recent years thanks to the development of deep neural networks, but it has recently been discovered that deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples. This means that face recognition models or systems based on deep neural networks are also susceptible to adversarial examples. However, the existing methods of attacking face recognition models or systems with adversarial examples can effectively complete white-box attacks but not black-box impersonation attacks, physical attacks, or convenient attacks, particularly on commercial face recognition systems. In this paper, we propose a new method to attack face recognition models or systems called RSTAM, which enables an effective black-box impersonation attack using an adversarial mask printed by a mobile and compact printer. First, RSTAM enhances the transferability of the adversarial masks through our proposed random similarity transformation strategy. Furthermore, we propose a random meta-optimization strategy for ensembling several pre-trained face models to generate more general adversarial masks. Finally, we conduct experiments on the CelebA-HQ, LFW, Makeup Transfer (MT), and CASIA-FaceV5 datasets. The performance of the attacks is also evaluated on state-of-the-art commercial face recognition systems: Face++, Baidu, Aliyun, Tencent, and Microsoft. Extensive experiments show that RSTAM can effectively perform black-box impersonation attacks on face recognition models or systems.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于深度神经网络的发展，人脸识别取得了长足的进步，但最近发现深度神经网络很容易受到对抗样本的影响。这意味着基于深度神经网络的人脸识别模型或系统也容易受到对抗性例子的影响。然而，现有的利用对抗性例子攻击人脸识别模型或系统的方法可以有效地完成白盒攻击，但不能完成黑盒模仿攻击、物理攻击或便利攻击，特别是在商业人脸识别系统上。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 RSTAM 的攻击人脸识别模型或系统的新方法，该方法使用由移动紧凑型打印机打印的对抗性掩模来实现有效的黑盒模拟攻击。首先，RSTAM 通过我们提出的随机相似性变换策略增强了对抗性掩模的可转移性。此外，我们提出了一种随机元优化策略，用于集成多个预先训练的面部模型以生成更通用的对抗性掩模。最后，我们在 CelebA-HQ、LFW、Makeup Transfer (MT) 和 CASIA-FaceV5 数据集上进行实验。攻击的性能也在最先进的商业人脸识别系统上进行了评估：Face++、百度、阿里云、腾讯和微软。大量实验表明，RSTAM可以有效地对人脸识别模型或系统进行黑盒模拟攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RSTAM的新方法，用于对基于深度神经网络的人脸识别系统进行有效的黑盒伪装攻击。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在人脸识别领域取得了显著进展，但其对对抗样本的脆弱性已被发现。然而，现有方法主要针对白盒攻击，难以对商业人脸识别系统实施黑盒伪装攻击或物理攻击。
AI.method: RSTAM通过随机相似性变换策略增强对抗面具的可迁移性，并提出随机元优化策略，通过集成多个预训练的人脸模型生成更通用的对抗面具。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ、LFW、Makeup Transfer (MT)和CASIA-FaceV5数据集上进行了实验，并在Face++、百度、阿里云、腾讯和微软等先进的商业人脸识别系统上评估了攻击效果。实验表明，RSTAM可以有效地对人脸识别模型或系统进行黑盒伪装攻击。
AI.conclusion: RSTAM方法在黑盒伪装攻击方面表现出色，能够有效攻击基于深度神经网络的人脸识别系统，为该领域安全研究提供了新的思路。

title: CV 3315 Is All You Need : Semantic Segmentation Competition
title_zh: CV 3315 就是您所需要的：语义分割竞赛
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.15203 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.15203 by other authors
abstract: This competition focus on Urban-Sense Segmentation based on the vehicle camera view. Class highly unbalanced Urban-Sense images dataset challenge the existing solutions and further studies. Deep Conventional neural network-based semantic segmentation methods such as encoder-decoder architecture and multi-scale and pyramid-based approaches become flexible solutions applicable to real-world applications. In this competition, we mainly review the literature and conduct experiments on transformer-driven methods especially SegFormer, to achieve an optimal trade-off between performance and efficiency. For example, SegFormer-B0 achieved 74.6% mIoU with the smallest FLOPS, 15.6G, and the largest model, SegFormer- B5 archived 80.2% mIoU. According to multiple factors, including individual case failure analysis, individual class performance, training pressure and efficiency estimation, the final candidate model for the competition is SegFormer- B2 with 50.6 GFLOPS and 78.5% mIoU evaluated on the testing set. Checkout our code implementation at https://vmv.re/cv3315.
summary: This competition focus on Urban-Sense Segmentation based on the vehicle camera view. Class highly unbalanced Urban-Sense images dataset challenge the existing solutions and further studies. Deep Conventional neural network-based semantic segmentation methods such as encoder-decoder architecture and multi-scale and pyramid-based approaches become flexible solutions applicable to real-world applications. In this competition, we mainly review the literature and conduct experiments on transformer-driven methods especially SegFormer, to achieve an optimal trade-off between performance and efficiency. For example, SegFormer-B0 achieved 74.6% mIoU with the smallest FLOPS, 15.6G, and the largest model, SegFormer- B5 archived 80.2% mIoU. According to multiple factors, including individual case failure analysis, individual class performance, training pressure and efficiency estimation, the final candidate model for the competition is SegFormer- B2 with 50.6 GFLOPS and 78.5% mIoU evaluated on the testing set. Checkout our code implementation at https://vmv.re/cv3315.
abstract_zh: 本次比赛的重点是基于车辆摄像头视图的城市感分割。类高度不平衡的 Urban-Sense 图像数据集对现有的解决方案和进一步的研究提出了挑战。传统的基于神经网络的语义分割方法，例如编码器-解码器架构以及多尺度和基于金字塔的方法，成为适用于实际应用的灵活解决方案。在本次比赛中，我们主要回顾文献并针对变压器驱动的方法尤其是SegFormer进行实验，以实现性能和效率之间的最佳权衡。例如，SegFormer-B0 以最小的 FLOPS（15.6G）实现了 74.6% mIoU，而最大的模型 SegFormer-B5 则达到了 80.2% mIoU。根据个案失败分析、单班表现、训练压力、效率预估等多重因素，最终比赛候选模型为SegFormer-B2，在测试集上的评估结果为50.6 GFLOPS和78.5% mIoU。在 https://vmv.re/cv3315 查看我们的代码实现。

AI.tldr: 该论文主要任务是在车辆摄像头视角下进行Urban-Sense语义分割竞赛，探索高效且性能优越的分割方法。
AI.motivation: 由于Urban-Sense数据集存在类别不平衡问题，现有方法面临挑战，需探索更灵活高效的语义分割方案以适应实际应用。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与实验，重点研究基于Transformer的SegFormer模型，评估不同规模模型的性能与计算效率，以实现最佳平衡。
AI.result: SegFormer-B2模型在测试集上达到78.5% mIoU，计算量为50.6 GFLOPS，综合性能与效率最优。
AI.conclusion: SegFormer-B2在性能与效率间取得良好平衡，适合实际应用，为Urban-Sense语义分割提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Roshan Sharma,Tyler Vuong,Mark Lindsey,Hira Dhamyal,Rita Singh,Bhiksha Raj
title: Self-supervision and Learnable STRFs for Age, Emotion, and Country Prediction
title_zh: 用于年龄、情绪和国家/地区预测的自我监督和可学习 STRF
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, Baltimore, Maryland, USA, PMLR 162, 2022
abstract: This work presents a multitask approach to the simultaneous estimation of age, country of origin, and emotion given vocal burst audio for the 2022 ICML Expressive Vocalizations Challenge ExVo-MultiTask track. The method of choice utilized a combination of spectro-temporal modulation and self-supervised features, followed by an encoder-decoder network organized in a multitask paradigm. We evaluate the complementarity between the tasks posed by examining independent task-specific and joint models, and explore the relative strengths of different feature sets. We also introduce a simple score fusion mechanism to leverage the complementarity of different feature sets for this task. We find that robust data preprocessing in conjunction with score fusion over spectro-temporal receptive field and HuBERT models achieved our best ExVo-MultiTask test score of 0.412.
summary: This work presents a multitask approach to the simultaneous estimation of age, country of origin, and emotion given vocal burst audio for the 2022 ICML Expressive Vocalizations Challenge ExVo-MultiTask track. The method of choice utilized a combination of spectro-temporal modulation and self-supervised features, followed by an encoder-decoder network organized in a multitask paradigm. We evaluate the complementarity between the tasks posed by examining independent task-specific and joint models, and explore the relative strengths of different feature sets. We also introduce a simple score fusion mechanism to leverage the complementarity of different feature sets for this task. We find that robust data preprocessing in conjunction with score fusion over spectro-temporal receptive field and HuBERT models achieved our best ExVo-MultiTask test score of 0.412.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种多任务方法，可以同时估计 2022 年 ICML Expressive Vocalizations Challenge ExVo-MultiTask 赛道的声音爆发音频的年龄、原籍国和情绪。选择的方法结合了谱时调制和自监督功能，然后是以多任务范例组织的编码器-解码器网络。我们通过检查独立的特定任务模型和联合模型来评估任务之间的互补性，并探索不同特征集的相对优势。 We also introduce a simple score fusion mechanism to leverage the complementarity of different feature sets for this task.我们发现，稳健的数据预处理与谱时感受野和 HuBERT 模型上的分数融合相结合，实现了我们最好的 ExVo-MultiTask 测试分数 0.412。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多任务方法，利用语音爆发音频同时预测年龄、情绪和国家。
AI.motivation: 为了解决多任务学习中不同任务间的互补性问题，提升模型在年龄、情绪和国家预测任务中的性能。
AI.method: 结合频谱时域调制与自监督特征，采用编码器-解码器网络的多任务框架，并引入分数融合机制以整合不同特征集的优势。
AI.result: 通过数据预处理与分数融合，结合spectro-temporal receptive field和HuBERT模型，最终在ExVo-MultiTask测试集上取得0.412的最优成绩。
AI.conclusion: 证明了数据预处理与特征融合在多任务学习中的有效性，为语音驱动的多任务情感与人口统计学分析提供了新思路。

title: Construct a Sentence with Multiple Specified Words
title_zh: 用多个指定单词构造一个句子
abstract: This paper demonstrates a task to finetune a BART model so it can construct a sentence from an arbitrary set of words, which used to be a difficult NLP task. The training task is making sentences with four words, but the trained model can generate sentences when fewer or more words are provided. The output sentences have high quality in general. The model can have some real-world applications, and this task can be used as an evaluation mechanism for any language model as well.
summary: This paper demonstrates a task to finetune a BART model so it can construct a sentence from an arbitrary set of words, which used to be a difficult NLP task. The training task is making sentences with four words, but the trained model can generate sentences when fewer or more words are provided. The output sentences have high quality in general. The model can have some real-world applications, and this task can be used as an evaluation mechanism for any language model as well.
abstract_zh: This paper demonstrates a task to finetune a BART model so it can construct a sentence from an arbitrary set of words, which used to be a difficult NLP task.训练任务是用四个单词造句，但训练后的模型可以在提供更少或更多单词时生成句子。输出的句子总体质量较高。该模型可以有一些现实世界的应用，并且该任务也可以用作任何语言模型的评估机制。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过微调BART模型，实现从任意给定词组生成高质量句子的任务。
AI.motivation: 解决传统NLP中难以生成包含指定多词的句子问题，并探索模型在实际场景中的应用及评估价值。
AI.method: 采用微调BART模型的方法，以四词句子生成为训练任务，扩展至支持不同数量词组输入。
AI.result: 模型生成句子质量较高，具备实际应用潜力，并可作为语言模型的评估基准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了BART模型在可控文本生成中的有效性，为多词句构建及模型评估提供了新思路。

title: Generating Diverse Vocal Bursts with StyleGAN2 and MEL-Spectrograms
title_zh: 使用 StyleGAN2 和 MEL 频谱图生成多样化的声音爆发
comment: To be published at the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition (ExVo Generate) held in conjunction with the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning
comments: To be published at the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition (ExVo Generate) held in conjunction with the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning
abstract: We describe our approach for the generative emotional vocal burst task (ExVo Generate) of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Competition. We train a conditional StyleGAN2 architecture on mel-spectrograms of preprocessed versions of the audio samples. The mel-spectrograms generated by the model are then inverted back to the audio domain. As a result, our generated samples substantially improve upon the baseline provided by the competition from a qualitative and quantitative perspective for all emotions. More precisely, even for our worst-performing emotion (awe), we obtain an FAD of 1.76 compared to the baseline of 4.81 (as a reference, the FAD between the train/validation sets for awe is 0.776).
summary: We describe our approach for the generative emotional vocal burst task (ExVo Generate) of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Competition. We train a conditional StyleGAN2 architecture on mel-spectrograms of preprocessed versions of the audio samples. The mel-spectrograms generated by the model are then inverted back to the audio domain. As a result, our generated samples substantially improve upon the baseline provided by the competition from a qualitative and quantitative perspective for all emotions. More precisely, even for our worst-performing emotion (awe), we obtain an FAD of 1.76 compared to the baseline of 4.81 (as a reference, the FAD between the train/validation sets for awe is 0.776).
abstract_zh: 我们描述了 ICML 表达发声竞赛的生成情感爆发任务（ExVoGenerate）的方法。我们在音频样本预处理版本的梅尔频谱图上训练条件 StyleGAN2 架构。然后将模型生成的梅尔频谱图反演回音频域。因此，我们生成的样本从所有情绪的定性和定量角度大大改善了竞赛提供的基线。更准确地说，即使对于我们表现最差的情绪（敬畏），与基线 4.81 相比，我们也获得了 1.76 的 FAD（作为参考，敬畏的训练/验证集之间的 FAD 为 0.776）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于StyleGAN2和mel频谱图生成多样化情感语音爆发的方法，在ICML竞赛中显著优于基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音生成方法在多样性和质量上存在不足，竞赛需要更有效的生成模型来提升情感语音的逼真度。
AI.method: 采用条件StyleGAN2模型，以预处理音频的mel频谱图为训练数据，通过频谱图逆变换生成音频，实现情感语音爆发的生成。
AI.result: 在所有情绪类别中均超越基线模型，尤其在最难生成的'敬畏'情绪上，FAD值从4.81降至1.76（接近训练集与验证集的0.776）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合生成对抗网络与频谱特征转换，有效提升了情感语音爆发的生成质量与多样性。

search_text: Generating Diverse Vocal Bursts with StyleGAN2 and MEL-Spectrograms 使用 StyleGAN2 和 MEL 频谱图生成多样化的声音爆发 We describe our approach for the generative emotional vocal burst task (ExVo Generate) of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Competition. We train a conditional StyleGAN2 architecture on mel-spectrograms of preprocessed versions of the audio samples. The mel-spectrograms generated by the model are then inverted back to the audio domain. As a result, our generated samples substantially improve upon the baseline provided by the competition from a qualitative and quantitative perspective for all emotions. More precisely, even for our worst-performing emotion (awe), we obtain an FAD of 1.76 compared to the baseline of 4.81 (as a reference, the FAD between the train/validation sets for awe is 0.776). 我们描述了 ICML 表达发声竞赛的生成情感爆发任务（ExVoGenerate）的方法。我们在音频样本预处理版本的梅尔频谱图上训练条件 StyleGAN2 架构。然后将模型生成的梅尔频谱图反演回音频域。因此，我们生成的样本从所有情绪的定性和定量角度大大改善了竞赛提供的基线。更准确地说，即使对于我们表现最差的情绪（敬畏），与基线 4.81 相比，我们也获得了 1.76 的 FAD（作为参考，敬畏的训练/验证集之间的 FAD 为 0.776）。 本文提出基于StyleGAN2和mel频谱图生成多样化情感语音爆发的方法，在ICML竞赛中显著优于基线模型。 Marco Jiralerspong,Gauthier Gidel cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Yihan Wu,Xi Wang,Shaofei Zhang,Lei He,Ruihua Song,Jian-Yun Nie
title: Self-supervised Context-aware Style Representation for Expressive Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 用于表达性语音合成的自监督上下文感知风格表示
abstract: Expressive speech synthesis, like audiobook synthesis, is still challenging for style representation learning and prediction. Deriving from reference audio or predicting style tags from text requires a huge amount of labeled data, which is costly to acquire and difficult to define and annotate accurately. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for learning style representation from abundant plain text in a self-supervised manner. It leverages an emotion lexicon and uses contrastive learning and deep clustering. We further integrate the style representation as a conditioned embedding in a multi-style Transformer TTS. Comparing with multi-style TTS by predicting style tags trained on the same dataset but with human annotations, our method achieves improved results according to subjective evaluations on both in-domain and out-of-domain test sets in audiobook speech. Moreover, with implicit context-aware style representation, the emotion transition of synthesized audio in a long paragraph appears more natural. The audio samples are available on the demo web.
summary: Expressive speech synthesis, like audiobook synthesis, is still challenging for style representation learning and prediction. Deriving from reference audio or predicting style tags from text requires a huge amount of labeled data, which is costly to acquire and difficult to define and annotate accurately. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for learning style representation from abundant plain text in a self-supervised manner. It leverages an emotion lexicon and uses contrastive learning and deep clustering. We further integrate the style representation as a conditioned embedding in a multi-style Transformer TTS. Comparing with multi-style TTS by predicting style tags trained on the same dataset but with human annotations, our method achieves improved results according to subjective evaluations on both in-domain and out-of-domain test sets in audiobook speech. Moreover, with implicit context-aware style representation, the emotion transition of synthesized audio in a long paragraph appears more natural. The audio samples are available on the demo web.
abstract_zh: 表达性语音合成（如有声读物合成）对于风格表示学习和预测仍然具有挑战性。 Deriving from reference audio or predicting style tags from text requires a huge amount of labeled data, which is costly to acquire and difficult to define and annotate accurately.在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，以自监督的方式从丰富的纯文本中学习风格表示。它利用情感词典并使用对比学习和深度聚类。我们进一步将风格表示作为条件嵌入集成到多风格 Transformer TTS 中。 Comparing with multi-style TTS by predicting style tags trained on the same dataset but with human annotations, our method achieves improved results according to subjective evaluations on both in-domain and out-of-domain test sets in audiobook speech. Moreover, with implicit context-aware style representation, the emotion transition of synthesized audio in a long paragraph appears more natural. The audio samples are available on the demo web.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督上下文感知风格表示方法，用于生成更具表现力的语音合成，特别是在有声读物场景中。
AI.motivation: 传统风格表示学习依赖大量标注数据（如参考音频或文本风格标签），获取成本高且标注难度大，限制了表现力语音合成的发展。
AI.method: 利用情感词典结合对比学习和深度聚类技术，从海量未标注文本中自监督学习风格表示，并将该表示作为条件嵌入集成到多风格Transformer TTS模型中。
AI.result: 在相同数据集上，相比基于人工标注风格标签的多风格TTS方法，本文方法在有声读物场景的领域内和领域外测试集中均取得更优主观评价结果，且长段落语音的情感过渡更自然。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效捕捉文本的上下文感知风格特征，无需依赖标注数据即可提升语音合成的表现力和自然度。

title: FastBVP-Net: a lightweight pulse extraction network for measuring heart rhythm via facial videos
title_zh: FastBVP-Net：一种轻量级脉冲提取网络，用于通过面部视频测量心律
abstract: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) is an attractive camera-based health monitoring method that can measure the heart rhythm from facial videos. Many well-established deep-learning models have been reported to measure heart rate (HR) and heart rate variability (HRV). However, most of these models usually require a 30-second facial video and enormous computational resources to obtain accurate and robust results, which significantly limits their applications in real-world scenarios. Hence, we propose a lightweight pulse extraction network, FastBVP-Net, to quickly measure heart rhythm via facial videos. The proposed FastBVP-Net uses a multi-frequency mode signal fusion (MMSF) mechanism to characterize the different modes of the raw signals in a decompose module and reconstruct the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal under a complex noise environment in a compose module. Meanwhile, an oversampling training scheme is used to solve the over-fitting problem caused by the limitations of the datasets. Then, the HR and HRV can be estimated based on the extracted BVP signals. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets to validate the proposed FastBVP-Net. For intra-dataset and cross-dataset testing, the proposed approach achieves better performance for HR and HRV estimation from 30-second facial videos with fewer computational burdens than the current well-established methods. Moreover, the proposed approach also achieves competitive results from 15-second facial videos. Therefore, the proposed FastBVP-Net has the potential to be applied in many real-world scenarios with shorter videos.
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) is an attractive camera-based health monitoring method that can measure the heart rhythm from facial videos. Many well-established deep-learning models have been reported to measure heart rate (HR) and heart rate variability (HRV). However, most of these models usually require a 30-second facial video and enormous computational resources to obtain accurate and robust results, which significantly limits their applications in real-world scenarios. Hence, we propose a lightweight pulse extraction network, FastBVP-Net, to quickly measure heart rhythm via facial videos. The proposed FastBVP-Net uses a multi-frequency mode signal fusion (MMSF) mechanism to characterize the different modes of the raw signals in a decompose module and reconstruct the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal under a complex noise environment in a compose module. Meanwhile, an oversampling training scheme is used to solve the over-fitting problem caused by the limitations of the datasets. Then, the HR and HRV can be estimated based on the extracted BVP signals. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets to validate the proposed FastBVP-Net. For intra-dataset and cross-dataset testing, the proposed approach achieves better performance for HR and HRV estimation from 30-second facial videos with fewer computational burdens than the current well-established methods. Moreover, the proposed approach also achieves competitive results from 15-second facial videos. Therefore, the proposed FastBVP-Net has the potential to be applied in many real-world scenarios with shorter videos.
abstract_zh: 远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）是一种有吸引力的基于摄像头的健康监测方法，可以通过面部视频测量心律。据报道，许多成熟的深度学习模型都可以测量心率（HR）和心率变异性（HRV）。 However, most of these models usually require a 30-second facial video and enormous computational resources to obtain accurate and robust results, which significantly limits their applications in real-world scenarios.因此，我们提出了一种轻量级脉冲提取网络 FastBVP-Net，通过面部视频快速测量心律。 The proposed FastBVP-Net uses a multi-frequency mode signal fusion (MMSF) mechanism to characterize the different modes of the raw signals in a decompose module and reconstruct the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal under a complex noise environment in a compose module.同时，采用过采样训练方案来解决由于数据集的限制而导致的过拟合问题。然后，可以根据提取的 BVP 信号来估计 HR 和 HRV。在基准数据集上进行了全面的实验，以验证所提出的 FastBVP-Net。 For intra-dataset and cross-dataset testing, the proposed approach achieves better performance for HR and HRV estimation from 30-second facial videos with fewer computational burdens than the current well-established methods.此外，所提出的方法还从 15 秒的面部视频中获得了有竞争力的结果。因此，所提出的 FastBVP-Net 有潜力应用于许多较短视频的现实场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级脉冲提取网络FastBVP-Net，通过面部视频快速测量心率和心率变异性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型测量心率需30秒视频及大量计算资源，限制了实际应用，需开发更高效的方法。
AI.method: 采用多频模式信号融合机制分解重构血容积脉搏信号，并结合过采样训练方案解决数据集不足导致的过拟合问题。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上，FastBVP-Net在30秒视频中HR/HRV估计性能优于现有方法，且支持15秒视频输入。
AI.conclusion: FastBVP-Net具备计算负担小、视频时长短的优势，适用于多种现实场景的心率监测需求。

However, most of these models usually require a 30-second facial video and enormous computational resources to obtain accurate and robust results, which significantly limits their applications in real-world scenarios. Hence, we propose a lightweight pulse extraction network, FastBVP-Net, to quickly measure heart rhythm via facial videos. The proposed FastBVP-Net uses a multi-frequency mode signal fusion (MMSF) mechanism to characterize the different modes of the raw signals in a decompose module and reconstruct the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal under a complex noise environment in a compose module. Meanwhile, an oversampling training scheme is used to solve the over-fitting problem caused by the limitations of the datasets. Then, the HR and HRV can be estimated based on the extracted BVP signals. Comprehensive experiments are conducted on the benchmark datasets to validate the proposed FastBVP-Net. For intra-dataset and cross-dataset testing, the proposed approach achieves better performance for HR and HRV estimation from 30-second facial videos with fewer computational burdens than the current well-established methods. Moreover, the proposed approach also achieves competitive results from 15-second facial videos. Therefore, the proposed FastBVP-Net has the potential to be applied in many real-world scenarios with shorter videos. 远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）是一种有吸引力的基于摄像头的健康监测方法，可以通过面部视频测量心律。据报道，许多成熟的深度学习模型都可以测量心率（HR）和心率变异性（HRV）。 However, most of these models usually require a 30-second facial video and enormous computational resources to obtain accurate and robust results, which significantly limits their applications in real-world scenarios.因此，我们提出了一种轻量级脉冲提取网络 FastBVP-Net，通过面部视频快速测量心律。 The proposed FastBVP-Net uses a multi-frequency mode signal fusion (MMSF) mechanism to characterize the different modes of the raw signals in a decompose module and reconstruct the blood volume pulse (BVP) signal under a complex noise environment in a compose module.同时，采用过采样训练方案来解决由于数据集的限制而导致的过拟合问题。然后，可以根据提取的 BVP 信号来估计 HR 和 HRV。在基准数据集上进行了全面的实验，以验证所提出的 FastBVP-Net。 For intra-dataset and cross-dataset testing, the proposed approach achieves better performance for HR and HRV estimation from 30-second facial videos with fewer computational burdens than the current well-established methods.此外，所提出的方法还从 15 秒的面部视频中获得了有竞争力的结果。因此，所提出的 FastBVP-Net 有潜力应用于许多较短视频的现实场景。 本文提出一种轻量级脉冲提取网络FastBVP-Net，通过面部视频快速测量心率和心率变异性。 Jialiang Zhuang,Yuheng Chen,Yun Zhang,Xiujuan Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: David Munechika,Zijie J. Wang,Jack Reidy,Josh Rubin,Krishna Gade,Krishnaram Kenthapadi,Duen Horng Chau
title: Visual Auditor: Interactive Visualization for Detection and Summarization of Model Biases
title_zh: Visual Auditor：用于检测和总结模型偏差的交互式可视化
abstract: As machine learning (ML) systems become increasingly widespread, it is necessary to audit these systems for biases prior to their deployment. Recent research has developed algorithms for effectively identifying intersectional bias in the form of interpretable, underperforming subsets (or slices) of the data. However, these solutions and their insights are limited without a tool for visually understanding and interacting with the results of these algorithms. We propose Visual Auditor, an interactive visualization tool for auditing and summarizing model biases. Visual Auditor assists model validation by providing an interpretable overview of intersectional bias (bias that is present when examining populations defined by multiple features), details about relationships between problematic data slices, and a comparison between underperforming and overperforming data slices in a model. Our open-source tool runs directly in both computational notebooks and web browsers, making model auditing accessible and easily integrated into current ML development workflows. An observational user study in collaboration with domain experts at Fiddler AI highlights that our tool can help ML practitioners identify and understand model biases.
summary: As machine learning (ML) systems become increasingly widespread, it is necessary to audit these systems for biases prior to their deployment. Recent research has developed algorithms for effectively identifying intersectional bias in the form of interpretable, underperforming subsets (or slices) of the data. However, these solutions and their insights are limited without a tool for visually understanding and interacting with the results of these algorithms. We propose Visual Auditor, an interactive visualization tool for auditing and summarizing model biases. Visual Auditor assists model validation by providing an interpretable overview of intersectional bias (bias that is present when examining populations defined by multiple features), details about relationships between problematic data slices, and a comparison between underperforming and overperforming data slices in a model. Our open-source tool runs directly in both computational notebooks and web browsers, making model auditing accessible and easily integrated into current ML development workflows. An observational user study in collaboration with domain experts at Fiddler AI highlights that our tool can help ML practitioners identify and understand model biases.
abstract_zh: As machine learning (ML) systems become increasingly widespread, it is necessary to audit these systems for biases prior to their deployment.最近的研究开发了算法，可以有效地识别可解释的、表现不佳的数据子集（或切片）形式的交叉偏差。然而，如果没有直观地理解这些算法的结果并与之交互的工具，这些解决方案及其见解就会受到限制。 We propose Visual Auditor, an interactive visualization tool for auditing and summarizing model biases. Visual Auditor 通过提供交叉偏差（检查由多个特征定义的群体时存在的偏差）的可解释概述、有问题的数据切片之间关系的详细信息以及模型中表现不佳和表现优异的数据切片之间的比较来协助模型验证。我们的开源工具直接在计算笔记本和网络浏览器中运行，使模型审计变得可访问并轻松集成到当前的机器学习开发工作流程中。与 Fiddler AI 领域专家合作进行的一项观察性用户研究强调，我们的工具可以帮助 ML 从业者识别和理解模型偏差。

AI.tldr: 开发交互式可视化工具Visual Auditor以检测和总结机器学习模型中的偏差
AI.motivation: 现有算法识别交叉偏差但缺乏可视化工具，限制了结果的理解和交互，需开发工具辅助模型审计
AI.method: 提出开源工具Visual Auditor，支持在计算笔记本和浏览器中运行，提供交叉偏差的可视化概览、数据切片关系分析及表现对比
AI.result: 用户研究表明工具能有效帮助ML从业者识别和理解模型中的偏差
AI.conclusion: Visual Auditor通过可视化和交互功能提升模型审计的可访问性与实用性，促进公平性

title: SLIC: Self-Supervised Learning with Iterative Clustering for Human Action Videos
title_zh: SLIC：针对人类动作视频的迭代聚类自监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised methods have significantly closed the gap with end-to-end supervised learning for image classification. In the case of human action videos, however, where both appearance and motion are significant factors of variation, this gap remains significant. One of the key reasons for this is that sampling pairs of similar video clips, a required step for many self-supervised contrastive learning methods, is currently done conservatively to avoid false positives. A typical assumption is that similar clips only occur temporally close within a single video, leading to insufficient examples of motion similarity. To mitigate this, we propose SLIC, a clustering-based self-supervised contrastive learning method for human action videos. Our key contribution is that we improve upon the traditional intra-video positive sampling by using iterative clustering to group similar video instances. This enables our method to leverage pseudo-labels from the cluster assignments to sample harder positives and negatives. SLIC outperforms state-of-the-art video retrieval baselines by +15.4% on top-1 recall on UCF101 and by +5.7% when directly transferred to HMDB51. With end-to-end finetuning for action classification, SLIC achieves 83.2% top-1 accuracy (+0.8%) on UCF101 and 54.5% on HMDB51 (+1.6%). SLIC is also competitive with the state-of-the-art in action classification after self-supervised pretraining on Kinetics400.
summary: Self-supervised methods have significantly closed the gap with end-to-end supervised learning for image classification. In the case of human action videos, however, where both appearance and motion are significant factors of variation, this gap remains significant. One of the key reasons for this is that sampling pairs of similar video clips, a required step for many self-supervised contrastive learning methods, is currently done conservatively to avoid false positives. A typical assumption is that similar clips only occur temporally close within a single video, leading to insufficient examples of motion similarity. To mitigate this, we propose SLIC, a clustering-based self-supervised contrastive learning method for human action videos. Our key contribution is that we improve upon the traditional intra-video positive sampling by using iterative clustering to group similar video instances. This enables our method to leverage pseudo-labels from the cluster assignments to sample harder positives and negatives. SLIC outperforms state-of-the-art video retrieval baselines by +15.4% on top-1 recall on UCF101 and by +5.7% when directly transferred to HMDB51. With end-to-end finetuning for action classification, SLIC achieves 83.2% top-1 accuracy (+0.8%) on UCF101 and 54.5% on HMDB51 (+1.6%). SLIC is also competitive with the state-of-the-art in action classification after self-supervised pretraining on Kinetics400.
abstract_zh: Self-supervised methods have significantly closed the gap with end-to-end supervised learning for image classification.然而，就人类动作视频而言，外观和动作都是重要的变化因素，这种差距仍然很大。造成这种情况的关键原因之一是对相似视频剪辑对进行采样，这是许多自监督对比学习方法的必需步骤，目前是保守地进行的，以避免误报。一个典型的假设是，相似的剪辑仅在时间上接近的单个视频中出现，导致运动相似性的例子不足。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了 SLIC，一种基于聚类的人类动作视频的自监督对比学习方法。我们的主要贡献是，通过使用迭代聚类对相似的视频实例进行分组，改进了传统的视频内正采样。 This enables our method to leverage pseudo-labels from the cluster assignments to sample harder positives and negatives. SLIC 在 UCF101 上的 top-1 召回率上比最先进的视频检索基线高出 +15.4%，在直接转移到 HMDB51 时比最先进的视频检索基线高出 +5.7%。 With end-to-end finetuning for action classification, SLIC achieves 83.2% top-1 accuracy (+0.8%) on UCF101 and 54.5% on HMDB51 (+1.6%). SLIC is also competitive with the state-of-the-art in action classification after self-supervised pretraining on Kinetics400.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLIC方法，通过迭代聚类改进自监督学习在人类动作视频中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法在动作视频中因保守的相似片段采样策略，导致运动相似性学习不足，影响性能。
AI.method: 基于聚类的自监督对比学习方法SLIC，通过迭代聚类生成伪标签，增强正负样本采样难度。
AI.result: 在UCF101上视频检索提升15.4%，动作分类达83.2%；HMDB51分别提升5.7%和54.5%。Kinetics400预训练后分类性能与SOTA相当。
AI.conclusion: SLIC通过聚类优化采样策略，有效提升动作视频的自监督学习效果，优于现有基线方法。

title: From Shallow to Deep: Compositional Reasoning over Graphs for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 由浅入深：视觉问答的图组合推理
abstract: In order to achieve a general visual question answering (VQA) system, it is essential to learn to answer deeper questions that require compositional reasoning on the image and external knowledge. Meanwhile, the reasoning process should be explicit and explainable to understand the working mechanism of the model. It is effortless for human but challenging for machines. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Graph Neural Module Network (HGNMN) that reasons over multi-layer graphs with neural modules to address the above issues. Specifically, we first encode the image by multi-layer graphs from the visual, semantic and commonsense views since the clues that support the answer may exist in different modalities. Our model consists of several well-designed neural modules that perform specific functions over graphs, which can be used to conduct multi-step reasoning within and between different graphs. Compared to existing modular networks, we extend visual reasoning from one graph to more graphs. We can explicitly trace the reasoning process according to module weights and graph attentions. Experiments show that our model not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CRIC dataset but also obtains explicit and explainable reasoning procedures.
summary: In order to achieve a general visual question answering (VQA) system, it is essential to learn to answer deeper questions that require compositional reasoning on the image and external knowledge. Meanwhile, the reasoning process should be explicit and explainable to understand the working mechanism of the model. It is effortless for human but challenging for machines. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Graph Neural Module Network (HGNMN) that reasons over multi-layer graphs with neural modules to address the above issues. Specifically, we first encode the image by multi-layer graphs from the visual, semantic and commonsense views since the clues that support the answer may exist in different modalities. Our model consists of several well-designed neural modules that perform specific functions over graphs, which can be used to conduct multi-step reasoning within and between different graphs. Compared to existing modular networks, we extend visual reasoning from one graph to more graphs. We can explicitly trace the reasoning process according to module weights and graph attentions. Experiments show that our model not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CRIC dataset but also obtains explicit and explainable reasoning procedures.
abstract_zh: 为了实现通用的视觉问答（VQA）系统，必须学会回答需要对图像和外部知识进行组合推理的更深层次的问题。 Meanwhile, the reasoning process should be explicit and explainable to understand the working mechanism of the model. It is effortless for human but challenging for machines.在本文中，我们提出了一种分层图神经模块网络（HGNMN），它通过神经模块对多层图进行推理来解决上述问题。具体来说，我们首先从视觉、语义和常识角度通过多层图对图像进行编码，因为支持答案的线索可能以不同的方式存在。我们的模型由几个精心设计的神经模块组成，这些模块在图上执行特定功能，可用于在不同图内和不同图之间进行多步推理。 Compared to existing modular networks, we extend visual reasoning from one graph to more graphs. We can explicitly trace the reasoning process according to module weights and graph attentions.实验表明，我们的模型不仅在 CRIC 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，而且还获得了明确且可解释的推理过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于视觉问答的层次化图神经模块网络（HGNMN），以实现更深层次的组合推理。

search_text: From Shallow to Deep: Compositional Reasoning over Graphs for Visual Question Answering 由浅入深：视觉问答的图组合推理 In order to achieve a general visual question answering (VQA) system, it is essential to learn to answer deeper questions that require compositional reasoning on the image and external knowledge. Meanwhile, the reasoning process should be explicit and explainable to understand the working mechanism of the model. It is effortless for human but challenging for machines. In this paper, we propose a Hierarchical Graph Neural Module Network (HGNMN) that reasons over multi-layer graphs with neural modules to address the above issues. Specifically, we first encode the image by multi-layer graphs from the visual, semantic and commonsense views since the clues that support the answer may exist in different modalities. Our model consists of several well-designed neural modules that perform specific functions over graphs, which can be used to conduct multi-step reasoning within and between different graphs. Compared to existing modular networks, we extend visual reasoning from one graph to more graphs. We can explicitly trace the reasoning process according to module weights and graph attentions. Experiments show that our model not only achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CRIC dataset but also obtains explicit and explainable reasoning procedures. 为了实现通用的视觉问答（VQA）系统，必须学会回答需要对图像和外部知识进行组合推理的更深层次的问题。 Meanwhile, the reasoning process should be explicit and explainable to understand the working mechanism of the model. It is effortless for human but challenging for machines.在本文中，我们提出了一种分层图神经模块网络（HGNMN），它通过神经模块对多层图进行推理来解决上述问题。具体来说，我们首先从视觉、语义和常识角度通过多层图对图像进行编码，因为支持答案的线索可能以不同的方式存在。我们的模型由几个精心设计的神经模块组成，这些模块在图上执行特定功能，可用于在不同图内和不同图之间进行多步推理。 Compared to existing modular networks, we extend visual reasoning from one graph to more graphs. We can explicitly trace the reasoning process according to module weights and graph attentions.实验表明，我们的模型不仅在 CRIC 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，而且还获得了明确且可解释的推理过程。 本文提出了一种用于视觉问答的层次化图神经模块网络（HGNMN），以实现更深层次的组合推理。 Zihao Zhu cs.CV

title: Maximum independent set (stable set) problem: Computational testing with binary search and convex programming using a bin packing approach
title_zh: 最大独立集（稳定集）问题：使用装箱方法进行二分搜索和凸规划的计算测试
comment: Introduced an approach that connects binary search, convex programming and bin packing; introduced a new type of function
comments: Introduced an approach that connects binary search, convex programming and bin packing; introduced a new type of function
abstract: This paper deals with the maximum independent set (M.I.S.) problem, also known as the stable set problem. The basic mathematical programming model that captures this problem is an Integer Program (I.P.) with zero-one variables $x_j$ and only the \textit{edge inequalities} with an objective function value of the form $~\textstyle \sum_{j=1}^N x_j~$ where $N$ is the number of vertices in the input. We consider $LP(k)$, which is the Linear programming (LP) relaxation of the I.P. with an additional constraint $\textstyle \sum_{j=1}^N x_j = k ~~ (0 \le k \le N). ~~ $ We then consider a convex programming variant $CP(k)$ of $LP(k)$, which is the same as $LP(k)$, except that the objective function is a nonlinear convex function (which we minimise). $~$The M.I.S. problem can be solved by solving $CP(k)$ for every value of $k$ in the interval $~0 \le k \le N~$ where the convex function is minimised using a \it{bin packing} type of approach. In this paper, we present efforts to developing a convex function for $CP(k)$.. However, in the latest version, in the absence of a convex function, we have introduced a new function; and for a certain instance, when we provide partial solutions (that is, for 5 vertices out of 150), the frequency of hitting an optimal complete integer solution increases significantly.

The basic mathematical programming model that captures this problem is an Integer Program (I.P.) with zero-one variables $x_j$ and only the \textit{edge inequalities} with an objective function value of the form $~\textstyle \sum_{j=1}^N x_j~$ where $N$ is the number of vertices in the input. We consider $LP(k)$, which is the Linear programming (LP) relaxation of the I.P. with an additional constraint $\textstyle \sum_{j=1}^N x_j = k ~~ (0 \le k \le N). ~~ $ We then consider a convex programming variant $CP(k)$ of $LP(k)$, which is the same as $LP(k)$, except that the objective function is a nonlinear convex function (which we minimise). $~$The M.I.S. problem can be solved by solving $CP(k)$ for every value of $k$ in the interval $~0 \le k \le N~$ where the convex function is minimised using a \it{bin packing} type of approach. In this paper, we present efforts to developing a convex function for $CP(k)$.. However, in the latest version, in the absence of a convex function, we have introduced a new function; and for a certain instance, when we provide partial solutions (that is, for 5 vertices out of 150), the frequency of hitting an optimal complete integer solution increases significantly.
abstract_zh: 本文讨论最大独立集（M.I.S.）问题，也称为稳定集问题。解决这个问题的基本数学规划模型是一个整数规划（I.P.），具有零一变量 $x_j$ 和仅 \textit{边不等式}，目标函数值的形式为 $~\textstyle \sum_{j=1}^N x_j~$，其中 $N$ 是输入中的顶点数。我们考虑 $LP(k)$，它是 I.P. 的线性规划 (LP) 松弛。带有附加约束 $\textstyle \sum_{j=1}^N x_j = k ~~ (0 \le k \le N)。 ~~ $ We then consider a convex programming variant $CP(k)$ of $LP(k)$, which is the same as $LP(k)$, except that the objective function is a nonlinear convex function (which we minimise). $~$M.I.S. problem can be solved by solving $CP(k)$ for every value of $k$ in the interval $~0 \le k \le N~$ where the convex function is minimised using a \it{bin packing} type of approach. In this paper, we present efforts to developing a convex function for $CP(k)$.. However, in the latest version, in the absence of a convex function, we have introduced a new function;对于某个实例，当我们提供部分解（即 150 个顶点中的 5 个）时，找到最佳完整整数解的频率会显着增加。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了最大独立集问题，通过引入线性规划松弛和凸规划方法，并结合类似装箱的策略进行计算测试。
AI.motivation: 传统求解最大独立集问题的方法在大规模图中效率低下，需探索更高效的计算模型和算法。
AI.method: 提出LP(k)线性规划松弛模型和CP(k)凸规划变体，结合装箱思路对凸函数进行优化，并利用部分解提升全局解的搜索效率。
AI.result: 在特定实例中，提供部分解（如150顶点中5个）后，获得完整最优整数解的频率显著提高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决最大独立集问题提供了新思路，但凸函数的设计仍需进一步完善以提升普适性。

title: Predicting Stock Price Movement after Disclosure of Corporate Annual Reports: A Case Study of 2021 China CSI 300 Stocks
title_zh: 企业年报披露后股价走势预测：以2021年沪深300股票为例
comment: My experimental conditions were not set correctly, and almost all the data in the table were filled in incorrectly. I had to repeat all the experiments and make updated descriptions, but the wrong data and descriptions caused confusion to others. I may need several months to redo the experiment, so I hope to withdraw my manuscript first
comments: My experimental conditions were not set correctly, and almost all the data in the table were filled in incorrectly. I had to repeat all the experiments and make updated descriptions, but the wrong data and descriptions caused confusion to others. I may need several months to redo the experiment, so I hope to withdraw my manuscript first
abstract: In the current stock market, computer science and technology are more and more widely used to analyse stocks. Not same as most related machine learning stock price prediction work, this work study the predicting the tendency of the stock price on the second day right after the disclosure of the companies' annual reports. We use a variety of different models, including decision tree, logistic regression, random forest, neural network, prototypical networks. We use two sets of financial indicators (key and expanded) to conduct experiments, these financial indicators are obtained from the EastMoney website disclosed by companies, and finally we find that these models are not well behaved to predict the tendency. In addition, we also filter stocks with ROE greater than 0.15 and net cash ratio greater than 0.9. We conclude that according to the financial indicators based on the just-released annual report of the company, the predictability of the stock price movement on the second day after disclosure is weak, with maximum accuracy about 59.6% and maximum precision about 0.56 on our test set by the random forest classifier, and the stock filtering does not improve the performance. And random forests perform best in general among all these models which conforms to some work's findings.
summary: In the current stock market, computer science and technology are more and more widely used to analyse stocks. Not same as most related machine learning stock price prediction work, this work study the predicting the tendency of the stock price on the second day right after the disclosure of the companies' annual reports. We use a variety of different models, including decision tree, logistic regression, random forest, neural network, prototypical networks. We use two sets of financial indicators (key and expanded) to conduct experiments, these financial indicators are obtained from the EastMoney website disclosed by companies, and finally we find that these models are not well behaved to predict the tendency. In addition, we also filter stocks with ROE greater than 0.15 and net cash ratio greater than 0.9. We conclude that according to the financial indicators based on the just-released annual report of the company, the predictability of the stock price movement on the second day after disclosure is weak, with maximum accuracy about 59.6% and maximum precision about 0.56 on our test set by the random forest classifier, and the stock filtering does not improve the performance. And random forests perform best in general among all these models which conforms to some work's findings.
abstract_zh: 在当前的股票市场中，计算机科学技术越来越广泛地应用于股票分析。 Not same as most related machine learning stock price prediction work, this work study the predicting the tendency of the stock price on the second day right after the disclosure of the companies' annual reports.我们使用各种不同的模型，包括决策树、逻辑回归、随机森林、神经网络、原型网络。 We use two sets of financial indicators (key and expanded) to conduct experiments, these financial indicators are obtained from the EastMoney website disclosed by companies, and finally we find that these models are not well behaved to predict the tendency.此外，我们还筛选ROE大于0.15、净现金比率大于0.9的股票。 We conclude that according to the financial indicators based on the just-released annual report of the company, the predictability of the stock price movement on the second day after disclosure is weak, with maximum accuracy about 59.6% and maximum precision about 0.56 on our test set by the random forest classifier, and the stock filtering does not improve the performance.总体而言，随机森林在所有这些模型中表现最好，这符合一些工作的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在披露公司年度报告后第二天股票价格走势的预测问题，使用多种机器学习模型进行分析。
AI.motivation: 在当前股票市场中，计算机科学和技术被越来越多地用于股票分析。本文不同于大多数相关机器学习股票价格预测工作，旨在研究公司年度报告披露后第二天股票价格走势的预测。
AI.method: 本文使用了多种不同的模型，包括决策树、逻辑回归、随机森林、神经网络和原型网络，并使用两组财务指标（关键指标和扩展指标）进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，这些模型在预测股票价格走势方面表现不佳，最大准确率约为59.6%，最大精确率约为0.56。股票筛选并未提高性能，随机森林在所有模型中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 基于公司刚刚发布的年度报告的财务指标，预测披露后第二天股票价格走势的可预测性较弱，随机森林模型在所有模型中表现最佳。

ai_content_json.result: 实验结果显示，这些模型在预测股票价格走势方面表现不佳，最大准确率约为59.6%，最大精确率约为0.56。股票筛选并未提高性能，随机森林在所有模型中表现最佳。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 基于公司刚刚发布的年度报告的财务指标，预测披露后第二天股票价格走势的可预测性较弱，随机森林模型在所有模型中表现最佳。

tldr: 本文研究了在披露公司年度报告后第二天股票价格走势的预测问题，使用多种机器学习模型进行分析。
motivation: 在当前股票市场中，计算机科学和技术被越来越多地用于股票分析。本文不同于大多数相关机器学习股票价格预测工作，旨在研究公司年度报告披露后第二天股票价格走势的预测。
method: 本文使用了多种不同的模型，包括决策树、逻辑回归、随机森林、神经网络和原型网络，并使用两组财务指标（关键指标和扩展指标）进行实验。
result: 实验结果显示，这些模型在预测股票价格走势方面表现不佳，最大准确率约为59.6%，最大精确率约为0.56。股票筛选并未提高性能，随机森林在所有模型中表现最佳。
conclusion: 基于公司刚刚发布的年度报告的财务指标，预测披露后第二天股票价格走势的可预测性较弱，随机森林模型在所有模型中表现最佳。
search_text: Predicting Stock Price Movement after Disclosure of Corporate Annual Reports: A Case Study of 2021 China CSI 300 Stocks 企业年报披露后股价走势预测：以2021年沪深300股票为例 In the current stock market, computer science and technology are more and more widely used to analyse stocks. Not same as most related machine learning stock price prediction work, this work study the predicting the tendency of the stock price on the second day right after the disclosure of the companies' annual reports. We use a variety of different models, including decision tree, logistic regression, random forest, neural network, prototypical networks. We use two sets of financial indicators (key and expanded) to conduct experiments, these financial indicators are obtained from the EastMoney website disclosed by companies, and finally we find that these models are not well behaved to predict the tendency. In addition, we also filter stocks with ROE greater than 0.15 and net cash ratio greater than 0.9. We conclude that according to the financial indicators based on the just-released annual report of the company, the predictability of the stock price movement on the second day after disclosure is weak, with maximum accuracy about 59.6% and maximum precision about 0.56 on our test set by the random forest classifier, and the stock filtering does not improve the performance. And random forests perform best in general among all these models which conforms to some work's findings. 在当前的股票市场中，计算机科学技术越来越广泛地应用于股票分析。 Not same as most related machine learning stock price prediction work, this work study the predicting the tendency of the stock price on the second day right after the disclosure of the companies' annual reports.我们使用各种不同的模型，包括决策树、逻辑回归、随机森林、神经网络、原型网络。 We use two sets of financial indicators (key and expanded) to conduct experiments, these financial indicators are obtained from the EastMoney website disclosed by companies, and finally we find that these models are not well behaved to predict the tendency.此外，我们还筛选ROE大于0.15、净现金比率大于0.9的股票。 We conclude that according to the financial indicators based on the just-released annual report of the company, the predictability of the stock price movement on the second day after disclosure is weak, with maximum accuracy about 59.6% and maximum precision about 0.56 on our test set by the random forest classifier, and the stock filtering does not improve the performance.总体而言，随机森林在所有这些模型中表现最好，这符合一些工作的发现。 本文研究了在披露公司年度报告后第二天股票价格走势的预测问题，使用多种机器学习模型进行分析。 Fengyu Han,Yue Wang q-fin.ST,cs.AI

title: Learning to learn online with neuromodulated synaptic plasticity in spiking neural networks
title_zh: 学习如何利用尖峰神经网络中的神经调节突触可塑性在线学习
abstract: We propose that in order to harness our understanding of neuroscience toward machine learning, we must first have powerful tools for training brain-like models of learning. Although substantial progress has been made toward understanding the dynamics of learning in the brain, neuroscience-derived models of learning have yet to demonstrate the same performance capabilities as methods in deep learning such as gradient descent. Inspired by the successes of machine learning using gradient descent, we demonstrate that models of neuromodulated synaptic plasticity from neuroscience can be trained in Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) with a framework of learning to learn through gradient descent to address challenging online learning problems. This framework opens a new path toward developing neuroscience inspired online learning algorithms.
summary: We propose that in order to harness our understanding of neuroscience toward machine learning, we must first have powerful tools for training brain-like models of learning. Although substantial progress has been made toward understanding the dynamics of learning in the brain, neuroscience-derived models of learning have yet to demonstrate the same performance capabilities as methods in deep learning such as gradient descent. Inspired by the successes of machine learning using gradient descent, we demonstrate that models of neuromodulated synaptic plasticity from neuroscience can be trained in Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) with a framework of learning to learn through gradient descent to address challenging online learning problems. This framework opens a new path toward developing neuroscience inspired online learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们建议，为了将我们对神经科学的理解运用到机器学习中，我们首先必须拥有强大的工具来训练类脑学习模型。尽管在理解大脑学习动态方面已经取得了实质性进展，但神经科学衍生的学习模型尚未表现出与梯度下降等深度学习方法相同的性能。受使用梯度下降的机器学习成功的启发，我们证明了神经科学中的神经调节突触可塑性模型可以在尖峰神经网络（SNN）中进行训练，并具有通过梯度下降学习的框架，以解决具有挑战性的在线学习问题。 This framework opens a new path toward developing neuroscience inspired online learning algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经调节突触可塑性的在线学习框架，用于训练脉冲神经网络以解决复杂学习任务。
AI.motivation: 现有神经科学启发的学习模型性能不足，需结合深度学习方法（如梯度下降）提升其在线学习能力。
AI.method: 通过梯度下降的'学习到学习'框架，训练神经调节突触可塑性模型，应用于脉冲神经网络架构。
AI.result: 该框架有效解决了具有挑战性的在线学习问题，验证了神经科学机制与机器学习方法的结合潜力。
AI.conclusion: 此研究为开发神经科学启发的在线学习算法提供了新路径，促进脑启发模型与深度学习的融合。

authors_text: Byeonggeun Kim,Seunghan Yang,Jangho Kim,Hyunsin Park,Juntae Lee,Simyung Chang
title: Domain Generalization with Relaxed Instance Frequency-wise Normalization for Multi-device Acoustic Scene Classification
title_zh: 多设备声学场景分类的宽松实例频率归一化的域泛化
abstract: While using two-dimensional convolutional neural networks (2D-CNNs) in image processing, it is possible to manipulate domain information using channel statistics, and instance normalization has been a promising way to get domain-invariant features. However, unlike image processing, we analyze that domain-relevant information in an audio feature is dominant in frequency statistics rather than channel statistics. Motivated by our analysis, we introduce Relaxed Instance Frequency-wise Normalization (RFN): a plug-and-play, explicit normalization module along the frequency axis which can eliminate instance-specific domain discrepancy in an audio feature while relaxing undesirable loss of useful discriminative information. Empirically, simply adding RFN to networks shows clear margins compared to previous domain generalization approaches on acoustic scene classification and yields improved robustness for multiple audio devices. Especially, the proposed RFN won the DCASE2021 challenge TASK1A, low-complexity acoustic scene classification with multiple devices, with a clear margin, and RFN is an extended work of our technical report.
summary: While using two-dimensional convolutional neural networks (2D-CNNs) in image processing, it is possible to manipulate domain information using channel statistics, and instance normalization has been a promising way to get domain-invariant features. However, unlike image processing, we analyze that domain-relevant information in an audio feature is dominant in frequency statistics rather than channel statistics. Motivated by our analysis, we introduce Relaxed Instance Frequency-wise Normalization (RFN): a plug-and-play, explicit normalization module along the frequency axis which can eliminate instance-specific domain discrepancy in an audio feature while relaxing undesirable loss of useful discriminative information. Empirically, simply adding RFN to networks shows clear margins compared to previous domain generalization approaches on acoustic scene classification and yields improved robustness for multiple audio devices. Especially, the proposed RFN won the DCASE2021 challenge TASK1A, low-complexity acoustic scene classification with multiple devices, with a clear margin, and RFN is an extended work of our technical report.
abstract_zh: 在图像处理中使用二维卷积神经网络（2D-CNN）时，可以使用通道统计来操纵域信息，并且实例归一化是获得域不变特征的有前途的方法。然而，与图像处理不同，我们分析音频特征中的域相关信息在频率统计而不是通道统计中占主导地位。在我们的分析的推动下，我们引入了宽松实例频率标准化（RFN）：一种沿频率轴的即插即用、显式标准化模块，可以消除音频特征中特定于实例的域差异，同时缓解有用判别信息的不良损失。根据经验，与之前的声学场景分类领域泛化方法相比，简单地将 RFN 添加到网络中显示出明显的优势，并提高了多个音频设备的鲁棒性。特别是，所提出的RFN以明显的优势赢得了DCASE2021挑战TASK1A，多设备低复杂度声学场景分类，并且RFN是我们技术报告的扩展工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Relaxed Instance Frequency-wise Normalization (RFN)的归一化模块，用于改进多设备声学场景分类中的领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统实例归一化依赖通道统计量，但音频特征的领域相关信息主要存在于频率统计量中，需设计更适应音频特性的归一化方法。
AI.method: 设计沿频率轴的RFN模块，通过放松归一化约束保留判别信息，消除音频特征中实例特定的领域差异。
AI.result: RFN在声学场景分类任务中显著优于先前方法，并在DCASE2021挑战赛TASK1A中取得明显优势。
AI.conclusion: RFN通过频率轴归一化有效解决了音频领域的泛化问题，为多设备声学场景分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sophia Bano,Alessandro Casella,Francisco Vasconcelos,Abdul Qayyum,Abdesslam Benzinou,Moona Mazher,Fabrice Meriaudeau,Chiara Lena,Ilaria Anita Cintorrino,Gaia Romana De Paolis,Jessica Biagioli,Daria Grechishnikova,Jing Jiao,Bizhe Bai,Yanyan Qiao,Binod Bhattarai,Rebati Raman Gaire,Ronast Subedi,Eduard Vazquez,Szymon Płotka,Aneta Lisowska,Arkadiusz Sitek,George Attilakos,Ruwan Wimalasundera,Anna L David, et al. title: Placental Vessel Segmentation and Registration in Fetoscopy: Literature Review and MICCAI FetReg2021 Challenge Findings
title_zh: Fetoscopy 中的胎盘血管分割和配准：文献综述和 MICCAI FetReg2021 挑战赛结果
abstract: Fetoscopy laser photocoagulation is a widely adopted procedure for treating Twin-to-Twin Transfusion Syndrome (TTTS). The procedure involves photocoagulation pathological anastomoses to regulate blood exchange among twins. The procedure is particularly challenging due to the limited field of view, poor manoeuvrability of the fetoscope, poor visibility, and variability in illumination. These challenges may lead to increased surgery time and incomplete ablation. Computer-assisted intervention (CAI) can provide surgeons with decision support and context awareness by identifying key structures in the scene and expanding the fetoscopic field of view through video mosaicking. Research in this domain has been hampered by the lack of high-quality data to design, develop and test CAI algorithms. Through the Fetoscopic Placental Vessel Segmentation and Registration (FetReg2021) challenge, which was organized as part of the MICCAI2021 Endoscopic Vision challenge, we released the first largescale multicentre TTTS dataset for the development of generalized and robust semantic segmentation and video mosaicking algorithms. For this challenge, we released a dataset of 2060 images, pixel-annotated for vessels, tool, fetus and background classes, from 18 in-vivo TTTS fetoscopy procedures and 18 short video clips. Seven teams participated in this challenge and their model performance was assessed on an unseen test dataset of 658 pixel-annotated images from 6 fetoscopic procedures and 6 short clips. The challenge provided an opportunity for creating generalized solutions for fetoscopic scene understanding and mosaicking. In this paper, we present the findings of the FetReg2021 challenge alongside reporting a detailed literature review for CAI in TTTS fetoscopy. Through this challenge, its analysis and the release of multi-centre fetoscopic data, we provide a benchmark for future research in this field.
summary: Fetoscopy laser photocoagulation is a widely adopted procedure for treating Twin-to-Twin Transfusion Syndrome (TTTS). The procedure involves photocoagulation pathological anastomoses to regulate blood exchange among twins. The procedure is particularly challenging due to the limited field of view, poor manoeuvrability of the fetoscope, poor visibility, and variability in illumination. These challenges may lead to increased surgery time and incomplete ablation. Computer-assisted intervention (CAI) can provide surgeons with decision support and context awareness by identifying key structures in the scene and expanding the fetoscopic field of view through video mosaicking. Research in this domain has been hampered by the lack of high-quality data to design, develop and test CAI algorithms. Through the Fetoscopic Placental Vessel Segmentation and Registration (FetReg2021) challenge, which was organized as part of the MICCAI2021 Endoscopic Vision challenge, we released the first largescale multicentre TTTS dataset for the development of generalized and robust semantic segmentation and video mosaicking algorithms. For this challenge, we released a dataset of 2060 images, pixel-annotated for vessels, tool, fetus and background classes, from 18 in-vivo TTTS fetoscopy procedures and 18 short video clips. Seven teams participated in this challenge and their model performance was assessed on an unseen test dataset of 658 pixel-annotated images from 6 fetoscopic procedures and 6 short clips. The challenge provided an opportunity for creating generalized solutions for fetoscopic scene understanding and mosaicking. In this paper, we present the findings of the FetReg2021 challenge alongside reporting a detailed literature review for CAI in TTTS fetoscopy. Through this challenge, its analysis and the release of multi-centre fetoscopic data, we provide a benchmark for future research in this field.
abstract_zh: 胎儿镜激光光凝术是一种广泛采用的治疗双胞胎输血综合症（TTTS）的手术。该手术涉及光凝病理吻合术以调节双胞胎之间的血液交换。由于视野有限、胎儿镜的可操作性差、能见度差以及照明的可变性，该过程特别具有挑战性。 These challenges may lead to increased surgery time and incomplete ablation.计算机辅助干预 (CAI) 可以通过识别场景中的关键结构并通过视频拼接扩大胎儿视场视野，为外科医生提供决策支持和情境感知。 Research in this domain has been hampered by the lack of high-quality data to design, develop and test CAI algorithms.通过作为 MICCAI2021 内窥镜视觉挑战的一部分组织的胎儿镜胎盘血管分割和配准 (FetReg2021) 挑战赛，我们发布了第一个大规模多中心 TTTS 数据集，用于开发通用且稳健的语义分割和视频镶嵌算法。针对这一挑战，我们发布了包含 2060 个图像的数据集，这些图像对血管、工具、胎儿和背景类别进行了像素注释，来自 18 个体内 TTTS 胎儿镜检查程序和 18 个短视频剪辑。七个团队参加了这项挑战，他们的模型性能在未见过的测试数据集上进行了评估，该数据集包含来自 6 个胎儿镜手术和 6 个短片的 658 个像素注释图像。 The challenge provided an opportunity for creating generalized solutions for fetoscopic scene understanding and mosaicking.在本文中，我们介绍了 FetReg2021 挑战赛的结果，同时报告了 TTTS 胎儿镜检查中 CAI 的详细文献综述。 Through this challenge, its analysis and the release of multi-centre fetoscopic data, we provide a benchmark for future research in this field.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了FetReg2021挑战赛的成果，旨在通过胎镜下胎盘血管分割与配准技术，提升TTTS胎儿镜激光光凝术的计算机辅助干预（CAI）水平。
AI.motivation: TTTS胎儿镜手术因视野受限、照明不均等问题导致手术难度大，现有CAI算法缺乏高质量多中心数据支持，亟需建立标准化数据集与评估基准。
AI.method: 发布包含18例临床胎镜手术的2060张像素级标注图像的多中心数据集，组织MICCAI2021 FetReg2021挑战赛，评估7支队伍在血管/工具/胎儿/背景分割及视频拼接任务中的算法性能。
AI.result: 挑战赛提供了658张测试图像的评估结果，验证了多中心数据集的有效性，推动了胎镜场景理解与视频拼接算法的通用化研究。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据集与挑战赛的发布，为TTTS胎儿镜CAI领域建立了首个标准化研究基准，促进了计算机视觉技术在产科微创手术中的应用发展。

authors_text: Bodong Zhang,Beatrice Knudsen,Deepika Sirohi,Alessandro Ferrero,Tolga Tasdizen
title: Stain Based Contrastive Co-training for Histopathological Image Analysis
title_zh: 用于组织病理学图像分析的基于染色的对比协同训练
abstract: We propose a novel semi-supervised learning approach for classification of histopathology images. We employ strong supervision with patch-level annotations combined with a novel co-training loss to create a semi-supervised learning framework. Co-training relies on multiple conditionally independent and sufficient views of the data. We separate the hematoxylin and eosin channels in pathology images using color deconvolution to create two views of each slide that can partially fulfill these requirements. Two separate CNNs are used to embed the two views into a joint feature space. We use a contrastive loss between the views in this feature space to implement co-training. We evaluate our approach in clear cell renal cell and prostate carcinomas, and demonstrate improvement over state-of-the-art semi-supervised learning methods.
summary: We propose a novel semi-supervised learning approach for classification of histopathology images. We employ strong supervision with patch-level annotations combined with a novel co-training loss to create a semi-supervised learning framework. Co-training relies on multiple conditionally independent and sufficient views of the data. We separate the hematoxylin and eosin channels in pathology images using color deconvolution to create two views of each slide that can partially fulfill these requirements. Two separate CNNs are used to embed the two views into a joint feature space. We use a contrastive loss between the views in this feature space to implement co-training. We evaluate our approach in clear cell renal cell and prostate carcinomas, and demonstrate improvement over state-of-the-art semi-supervised learning methods.
abstract_zh: We propose a novel semi-supervised learning approach for classification of histopathology images. We employ strong supervision with patch-level annotations combined with a novel co-training loss to create a semi-supervised learning framework. Co-training relies on multiple conditionally independent and sufficient views of the data.我们使用颜色解卷积分离病理图像中的苏木精和伊红通道，以创建可以部分满足这些要求的每张幻灯片的两个视图。 Two separate CNNs are used to embed the two views into a joint feature space. We use a contrastive loss between the views in this feature space to implement co-training.我们评估了我们在透明细胞肾细胞癌和前列腺癌中的方法，并证明了相对于最先进的半监督学习方法的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于染色对比共训练的半监督学习方法，用于提升组织病理学图像分类的准确性。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学图像标注成本高昂，现有方法难以有效利用有限标注数据与未标注数据，需探索多视图学习与半监督框架的结合。
AI.method: 通过颜色分解分离苏木精和伊红通道生成双视图，使用两个CNN分别提取特征并映射到联合空间，以对比损失实现视图间共训练。
AI.result: 在肾透明细胞癌和前列腺癌数据集上，该方法优于现有半监督学习技术，分类性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 染色通道分解与对比共训练结合能有效提升病理图像分类效果，为半监督医学图像分析提供新思路。

title: Multi-Modal and Multi-Factor Branching Time Active Inference
title_zh: 多模态和多因素分支时间主动推理
abstract: Active inference is a state-of-the-art framework for modelling the brain that explains a wide range of mechanisms such as habit formation, dopaminergic discharge and curiosity. Recently, two versions of branching time active inference (BTAI) based on Monte-Carlo tree search have been developed to handle the exponential (space and time) complexity class that occurs when computing the prior over all possible policies up to the time horizon. However, those two versions of BTAI still suffer from an exponential complexity class w.r.t the number of observed and latent variables being modelled. In the present paper, we resolve this limitation by first allowing the modelling of several observations, each of them having its own likelihood mapping. Similarly, we allow each latent state to have its own transition mapping. The inference algorithm then exploits the factorisation of the likelihood and transition mappings to accelerate the computation of the posterior. Those two optimisations were tested on the dSprites environment in which the metadata of the dSprites dataset was used as input to the model instead of the dSprites images. On this task, $BTAI_{VMP}$ (Champion et al., 2022b,a) was able to solve 96.9\% of the task in 5.1 seconds, and $BTAI_{BF}$ (Champion et al., 2021a) was able to solve 98.6\% of the task in 17.5 seconds. Our new approach ($BTAI_{3MF}$) outperformed both of its predecessors by solving the task completly (100\%) in only 2.559 seconds. Finally, $BTAI_{3MF}$ has been implemented in a flexible and easy to use (python) package, and we developed a graphical user interface to enable the inspection of the model's beliefs, planning process and behaviour.

In the present paper, we resolve this limitation by first allowing the modelling of several observations, each of them having its own likelihood mapping. The inference algorithm then exploits the factorisation of the likelihood and transition mappings to accelerate the computation of the posterior. Those two optimisations were tested on the dSprites environment in which the metadata of the dSprites dataset was used as input to the model instead of the dSprites images. On this task, $BTAI_{VMP}$ (Champion et al., 2022b,a) was able to solve 96.9\% of the task in 5.1 seconds, and $BTAI_{BF}$ (Champion et al., 2021a) was able to solve 98.6\% of the task in 17.5 seconds. Our new approach ($BTAI_{3MF}$) outperformed both of its predecessors by solving the task completly (100\%) in only 2.559 seconds. Finally, $BTAI_{3MF}$ has been implemented in a flexible and easy to use (python) package, and we developed a graphical user interface to enable the inspection of the model's beliefs, planning process and behaviour.
abstract_zh: 主动推理是一种最先进的大脑建模框架，它解释了习惯形成、多巴胺能放电和好奇心等多种机制。最近，基于蒙特卡罗树搜索的分支时间主动推理 (BTAI) 的两个版本已经开发出来，用于处理计算时间范围内所有可能策略的先验时出现的指数（空间和时间）复杂度类别。然而，这两个版本的 BTAI 仍然面临着指数复杂度级别的问题，即所建模的观察变量和潜在变量的数量。在本文中，我们通过首先允许对多个观测值进行建模来解决此限制，每个观测值都有自己的似然映射。 Similarly, we allow each latent state to have its own transition mapping.然后，推理算法利用似然和转移映射的因式分解来加速后验的计算。这两种优化在 dSprites 环境中进行了测试，其中 dSprites 数据集的元数据而不是 dSprites 图像用作模型的输入。在此任务中，$BTAI_{VMP}$ (Champion et al., 2022b,a) 能够在 5.1 秒内解决 96.9\% 的任务，$BTAI_{BF}$ (Champion et al., 2021a) 能够在 17.5 秒内解决 98.6\% 的任务。 Our new approach ($BTAI_{3MF}$) outperformed both of its predecessors by solving the task completly (100\%) in only 2.559 seconds.最后，$BTAI_{3MF}$ 已在灵活且易于使用的 (python) 包中实现，并且我们开发了图形用户界面来检查模型的信念、规划过程和行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的分支时间主动推理框架（BTAI_3MF），通过多模态和多因子建模解决原有方法的指数级复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分支时间主动推理（BTAI）方法在处理观测变量和潜在变量时仍面临指数级计算复杂度的挑战，限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: 允许每个观测和潜在状态拥有独立的似然映射和转移映射，并利用这些映射的分解特性加速后验计算。
AI.result: 在dSprites环境中，BTAI_3MF以100%准确率完成任务仅需2.559秒，显著优于前代方法（BTAI_VMP: 96.9%/5.1秒，BTAI_BF: 98.6%/17.5秒）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多模态分解有效降低了计算复杂度，且已实现为Python工具包并配备可视化界面，提升了实用性与可解释性。

search_text: Multi-Modal and Multi-Factor Branching Time Active Inference 多模态和多因素分支时间主动推理 Active inference is a state-of-the-art framework for modelling the brain that explains a wide range of mechanisms such as habit formation, dopaminergic discharge and curiosity. Recently, two versions of branching time active inference (BTAI) based on Monte-Carlo tree search have been developed to handle the exponential (space and time) complexity class that occurs when computing the prior over all possible policies up to the time horizon. However, those two versions of BTAI still suffer from an exponential complexity class w.r.t the number of observed and latent variables being modelled. In the present paper, we resolve this limitation by first allowing the modelling of several observations, each of them having its own likelihood mapping. Similarly, we allow each latent state to have its own transition mapping. The inference algorithm then exploits the factorisation of the likelihood and transition mappings to accelerate the computation of the posterior. Those two optimisations were tested on the dSprites environment in which the metadata of the dSprites dataset was used as input to the model instead of the dSprites images. On this task, $BTAI_{VMP}$ (Champion et al., 2022b,a) was able to solve 96.9\% of the task in 5.1 seconds, and $BTAI_{BF}$ (Champion et al., 2021a) was able to solve 98.6\% of the task in 17.5 seconds. Our new approach ($BTAI_{3MF}$) outperformed both of its predecessors by solving the task completly (100\%) in only 2.559 seconds. Finally, $BTAI_{3MF}$ has been implemented in a flexible and easy to use (python) package, and we developed a graphical user interface to enable the inspection of the model's beliefs, planning process and behaviour. 主动推理是一种最先进的大脑建模框架，它解释了习惯形成、多巴胺能放电和好奇心等多种机制。最近，基于蒙特卡罗树搜索的分支时间主动推理 (BTAI) 的两个版本已经开发出来，用于处理计算时间范围内所有可能策略的先验时出现的指数（空间和时间）复杂度类别。然而，这两个版本的 BTAI 仍然面临着指数复杂度级别的问题，即所建模的观察变量和潜在变量的数量。在本文中，我们通过首先允许对多个观测值进行建模来解决此限制，每个观测值都有自己的似然映射。 Similarly, we allow each latent state to have its own transition mapping.然后，推理算法利用似然和转移映射的因式分解来加速后验的计算。这两种优化在 dSprites 环境中进行了测试，其中 dSprites 数据集的元数据而不是 dSprites 图像用作模型的输入。在此任务中，$BTAI_{VMP}$ (Champion et al., 2022b,a) 能够在 5.1 秒内解决 96.9\% 的任务，$BTAI_{BF}$ (Champion et al., 2021a) 能够在 17.5 秒内解决 98.6\% 的任务。 Our new approach ($BTAI_{3MF}$) outperformed both of its predecessors by solving the task completly (100\%) in only 2.559 seconds.最后，$BTAI_{3MF}$ 已在灵活且易于使用的 (python) 包中实现，并且我们开发了图形用户界面来检查模型的信念、规划过程和行为。 本文提出了一种改进的分支时间主动推理框架（BTAI_3MF），通过多模态和多因子建模解决原有方法的指数级复杂度问题。 Théophile Champion,Marek Grześ,Howard Bowman cs.AI

title: Computing the Minimum Bottleneck Moving Spanning Tree
title_zh: 计算移动生成树的最小瓶颈
comment: A preliminary version to appear in MFCS 2022
comments: A preliminary version to appear in MFCS 2022
abstract: Given a set $P$ of $n$ points that are moving in the plane, we consider the problem of computing a spanning tree for these moving points that does not change its combinatorial structure during the point movement. The objective is to minimize the bottleneck weight of the spanning tree (i.e., the largest Euclidean length of all edges) during the whole movement. The problem was solved in $O(n^2)$ time previously [Akitaya, Biniaz, Bose, De Carufel, Maheshwari, Silveira, and Smid, WADS 2021]. In this paper, we present a new algorithm of $O(n^{4/3} \log^3 n)$ time.
summary: Given a set $P$ of $n$ points that are moving in the plane, we consider the problem of computing a spanning tree for these moving points that does not change its combinatorial structure during the point movement. The objective is to minimize the bottleneck weight of the spanning tree (i.e., the largest Euclidean length of all edges) during the whole movement. The problem was solved in $O(n^2)$ time previously [Akitaya, Biniaz, Bose, De Carufel, Maheshwari, Silveira, and Smid, WADS 2021]. In this paper, we present a new algorithm of $O(n^{4/3} \log^3 n)$ time.
abstract_zh: 给定在平面上移动的 $n$ 个点的集合 $P$，我们考虑为这些移动点计算生成树的问题，该生成树在点移动期间不会改变其组合结构。目标是在整个移动过程中最小化生成树的瓶颈权重（即所有边的最大欧几里德长度）。该问题之前已在 $O(n^2)$ 时间内得到解决 [Akitaya、Biniaz、Bose、De Carufel、Maheshwari、Silveira 和 Smid，WADS 2021]。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的算法，时间为$O(n^{4/3} \log^3 n)$。

AI.tldr: 计算平面移动点集的最小瓶颈移动生成树，使得树的组合结构在点移动过程中保持不变，且最小化所有边中最大欧氏长度。
AI.motivation: 已有算法时间复杂度为O(n²)，在大规模点集场景下效率不足，需要更高效的算法来解决问题。
AI.method: 提出一种新的算法，时间复杂度为O(n^{4/3} log³ n)，通过更优的数据结构和算法设计实现了计算效率的提升。
AI.result: 新算法将时间复杂度从O(n²)降低到O(n^{4/3} log³ n)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法显著提升了计算移动点集最小瓶颈生成树的效率，对于大规模动态点集场景具有重要的理论意义和实际应用价值。

title: Optimal and Robust Category-level Perception: Object Pose and Shape Estimation from 2D and 3D Semantic Keypoints
title_zh: 最佳且鲁棒的类别级感知：根据 2D 和 3D 语义关键点估计物体姿态和形状
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.08383
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.08383
abstract: We consider a category-level perception problem, where one is given 2D or 3D sensor data picturing an object of a given category (e.g., a car), and has to reconstruct the 3D pose and shape of the object despite intra-class variability (i.e., different car models have different shapes). We consider an active shape model, where -- for an object category -- we are given a library of potential CAD models describing objects in that category, and we adopt a standard formulation where pose and shape are estimated from 2D or 3D keypoints via non-convex optimization. Our first contribution is to develop PACE3D* and PACE2D*, the first certifiably optimal solvers for pose and shape estimation using 3D and 2D keypoints, respectively. Both solvers rely on the design of tight (i.e., exact) semidefinite relaxations. Our second contribution is to develop outlier-robust versions of both solvers, named PACE3D# and PACE2D#. Towards this goal, we propose ROBIN, a general graph-theoretic framework to prune outliers, which uses compatibility hypergraphs to model measurements' compatibility. We show that in category-level perception problems these hypergraphs can be built from the winding orders of the keypoints (in 2D) or their convex hulls (in 3D), and many outliers can be filtered out via maximum hyperclique computation. The last contribution is an extensive experimental evaluation. Besides providing an ablation study on simulated datasets and on the PASCAL3D+ dataset, we combine our solver with a deep keypoint detector, and show that PACE3D# improves over the state of the art in vehicle pose estimation in the ApolloScape datasets, and its runtime is compatible with practical applications. We release our code at https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/PACE.

abstract_zh: We consider a category-level perception problem, where one is given 2D or 3D sensor data picturing an object of a given category (e.g., a car), and has to reconstruct the 3D pose and shape of the object despite intra-class variability (i.e., different car models have different shapes). Our first contribution is to develop PACE3D* and PACE2D*, the first certifiably optimal solvers for pose and shape estimation using 3D and 2D keypoints, respectively. Both solvers rely on the design of tight (i.e., exact) semidefinite relaxations. Our second contribution is to develop outlier-robust versions of both solvers, named PACE3D# and PACE2D#.为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 ROBIN，一种用于修剪异常值的通用图论框架，它使用兼容性超图来对测量的兼容性进行建模。 We show that in category-level perception problems these hypergraphs can be built from the winding orders of the keypoints (in 2D) or their convex hulls (in 3D), and many outliers can be filtered out via maximum hyperclique computation. The last contribution is an extensive experimental evaluation. AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从2D或3D语义关键点中重建目标物体的3D姿态和形状，解决类别内形状差异带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理同一类别下不同物体模型的形状差异，需开发鲁棒且精确的姿态和形状估计方法。
AI.method: 提出PACE3D*和PACE2D*求解器，通过紧致半定松弛实现最优解；设计ROBIN框架利用超图剪枝异常值，结合关键点拓扑结构过滤噪声。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和PASCAL3D+上验证有效性，结合深度检测器后在ApolloScape数据集上超越现有方法，且运行时长满足实际应用需求。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为类别级感知提供了最优且鲁棒的解决方案，通过理论分析与实验验证其在复杂场景下的实用性。
