tldr: 本文研究如何从2D或3D语义关键点中重建目标物体的3D姿态和形状，解决类别内形状差异带来的挑战。
motivation: 现有方法难以处理同一类别下不同物体模型的形状差异，需开发鲁棒且精确的姿态和形状估计方法。
method: 提出PACE3D*和PACE2D*求解器，通过紧致半定松弛实现最优解；设计ROBIN框架利用超图剪枝异常值，结合关键点拓扑结构过滤噪声。
result: 在模拟数据集和PASCAL3D+上验证有效性，结合深度检测器后在ApolloScape数据集上超越现有方法，且运行时长满足实际应用需求。
conclusion: 本文方法为类别级感知提供了最优且鲁棒的解决方案，通过理论分析与实验验证其在复杂场景下的实用性。
search_text: Optimal and Robust Category-level Perception: Object Pose and Shape Estimation from 2D and 3D Semantic Keypoints 最佳且鲁棒的类别级感知：根据 2D 和 3D 语义关键点估计物体姿态和形状 We consider a category-level perception problem, where one is given 2D or 3D sensor data picturing an object of a given category (e.g., a car), and has to reconstruct the 3D pose and shape of the object despite intra-class variability (i.e., different car models have different shapes). We consider an active shape model, where -- for an object category -- we are given a library of potential CAD models describing objects in that category, and we adopt a standard formulation where pose and shape are estimated from 2D or 3D keypoints via non-convex optimization. Our first contribution is to develop PACE3D* and PACE2D*, the first certifiably optimal solvers for pose and shape estimation using 3D and 2D keypoints, respectively. Both solvers rely on the design of tight (i.e., exact) semidefinite relaxations. Our second contribution is to develop outlier-robust versions of both solvers, named PACE3D# and PACE2D#. Towards this goal, we propose ROBIN, a general graph-theoretic framework to prune outliers, which uses compatibility hypergraphs to model measurements' compatibility. We show that in category-level perception problems these hypergraphs can be built from the winding orders of the keypoints (in 2D) or their convex hulls (in 3D), and many outliers can be filtered out via maximum hyperclique computation. The last contribution is an extensive experimental evaluation. Besides providing an ablation study on simulated datasets and on the PASCAL3D+ dataset, we combine our solver with a deep keypoint detector, and show that PACE3D# improves over the state of the art in vehicle pose estimation in the ApolloScape datasets, and its runtime is compatible with practical applications. We release our code at https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/PACE. We consider a category-level perception problem, where one is given 2D or 3D sensor data picturing an object of a given category (e.g., a car), and has to reconstruct the 3D pose and shape of the object despite intra-class variability (i.e., different car models have different shapes). We consider an active shape model, where -- for an object category -- we are given a library of potential CAD models describing objects in that category, and we adopt a standard formulation where pose and shape are estimated from 2D or 3D keypoints via non-convex optimization. Our first contribution is to develop PACE3D* and PACE2D*, the first certifiably optimal solvers for pose and shape estimation using 3D and 2D keypoints, respectively. Both solvers rely on the design of tight (i.e., exact) semidefinite relaxations. Our second contribution is to develop outlier-robust versions of both solvers, named PACE3D# and PACE2D#.为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 ROBIN，一种用于修剪异常值的通用图论框架，它使用兼容性超图来对测量的兼容性进行建模。 We show that in category-level perception problems these hypergraphs can be built from the winding orders of the keypoints (in 2D) or their convex hulls (in 3D), and many outliers can be filtered out via maximum hyperclique computation. The last contribution is an extensive experimental evaluation. Besides providing an ablation study on simulated datasets and on the PASCAL3D+ dataset, we combine our solver with a deep keypoint detector, and show that PACE3D# improves over the state of the art in vehicle pose estimation in the ApolloScape datasets, and its runtime is compatible with practical applications. We release our code at https://github.com/MIT-SPARK/PACE. 本文研究如何从2D或3D语义关键点中重建目标物体的3D姿态和形状，解决类别内形状差异带来的挑战。 Jingnan Shi,Heng Yang,Luca Carlone cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Multitask vocal burst modeling with ResNets and pre-trained paralinguistic Conformers
title_zh: 使用 ResNet 和预训练的副语言 Conformers 进行多任务发声建模
comment: To be published in the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop & Competition 2022 (https://www.competitions.hume.ai/exvo2022)
comments: To be published in the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop & Competition 2022 (https://www.competitions.hume.ai/exvo2022)
abstract: This technical report presents the modeling approaches used in our submission to the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop & Competition multitask track (ExVo-MultiTask). We first applied image classification models of various sizes on mel-spectrogram representations of the vocal bursts, as is standard in sound event detection literature. Results from these models show an increase of 21.24% over the baseline system with respect to the harmonic mean of the task metrics, and comprise our team's main submission to the MultiTask track. We then sought to characterize the headroom in the MultiTask track by applying a large pre-trained Conformer model that previously achieved state-of-the-art results on paralinguistic tasks like speech emotion recognition and mask detection. We additionally investigated the relationship between the sub-tasks of emotional expression, country of origin, and age prediction, and discovered that the best performing models are trained as single-task models, questioning whether the problem truly benefits from a multitask setting.
summary: This technical report presents the modeling approaches used in our submission to the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop & Competition multitask track (ExVo-MultiTask). We first applied image classification models of various sizes on mel-spectrogram representations of the vocal bursts, as is standard in sound event detection literature. Results from these models show an increase of 21.24% over the baseline system with respect to the harmonic mean of the task metrics, and comprise our team's main submission to the MultiTask track. We then sought to characterize the headroom in the MultiTask track by applying a large pre-trained Conformer model that previously achieved state-of-the-art results on paralinguistic tasks like speech emotion recognition and mask detection. We additionally investigated the relationship between the sub-tasks of emotional expression, country of origin, and age prediction, and discovered that the best performing models are trained as single-task models, questioning whether the problem truly benefits from a multitask setting.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告介绍了我们提交给 ICML 表达性发声研讨会和竞赛多任务轨道 (ExVo-MultiTask) 时使用的建模方法。我们首先将各种尺寸的图像分类模型应用于声音爆发的梅尔频谱图表示，这是声音事件检测文献中的标准。这些模型的结果显示，任务指标的调和平均值比基准系统提高了 21.24%，并且构成了我们团队向多任务轨道提交的主要内容。然后，我们试图通过应用大型预训练 Conformer 模型来描述多任务轨道中的余量，该模型之前在语音情感识别和面具检测等副语言任务上取得了最先进的结果。我们还研究了情绪表达、原籍国和年龄预测等子任务之间的关系，发现表现最好的模型被训练为单任务模型，质疑该问题是否真正受益于多任务设置。

AI.tldr: 本论文主要研究利用ResNets和预训练Conformer模型进行多任务语音爆发建模，以提升情感表达、国籍起源及年龄预测等子任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过多任务学习提升语音爆发在情感、国籍和年龄预测等子任务的性能，并探索预训练模型在该领域的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用图像分类模型（如ResNets）处理mel频谱图，并引入预训练Conformer模型进行多任务学习，同时分析各子任务间的关联性。
AI.result: 模型在调和平均值上较基线提升21.24%，但最佳模型为单任务训练，质疑多任务设置的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习在语音爆发建模中效果有限，单任务模型可能更优，需进一步验证多任务的必要性。

authors_text: Shivam Goel,Yash Shukla,Vasanth Sarathy,Matthias Scheutz,Jivko Sinapov
title: RAPid-Learn: A Framework for Learning to Recover for Handling Novelties in Open-World Environments
title_zh: RAPid-Learn：学习恢复以处理开放世界环境中的新事物的框架
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL 2022)
comments: Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL 2022)
abstract: We propose RAPid-Learn: Learning to Recover and Plan Again, a hybrid planning and learning method, to tackle the problem of adapting to sudden and unexpected changes in an agent's environment (i.e., novelties). RAPid-Learn is designed to formulate and solve modifications to a task's Markov Decision Process (MDPs) on-the-fly and is capable of exploiting domain knowledge to learn any new dynamics caused by the environmental changes. It is capable of exploiting the domain knowledge to learn action executors which can be further used to resolve execution impasses, leading to a successful plan execution. This novelty information is reflected in its updated domain model. We demonstrate its efficacy by introducing a wide variety of novelties in a gridworld environment inspired by Minecraft, and compare our algorithm with transfer learning baselines from the literature. Our method is (1) effective even in the presence of multiple novelties, (2) more sample efficient than transfer learning RL baselines, and (3) robust to incomplete model information, as opposed to pure symbolic planning approaches.
summary: We propose RAPid-Learn: Learning to Recover and Plan Again, a hybrid planning and learning method, to tackle the problem of adapting to sudden and unexpected changes in an agent's environment (i.e., novelties). RAPid-Learn is designed to formulate and solve modifications to a task's Markov Decision Process (MDPs) on-the-fly and is capable of exploiting domain knowledge to learn any new dynamics caused by the environmental changes. It is capable of exploiting the domain knowledge to learn action executors which can be further used to resolve execution impasses, leading to a successful plan execution. This novelty information is reflected in its updated domain model. We demonstrate its efficacy by introducing a wide variety of novelties in a gridworld environment inspired by Minecraft, and compare our algorithm with transfer learning baselines from the literature. Our method is (1) effective even in the presence of multiple novelties, (2) more sample efficient than transfer learning RL baselines, and (3) robust to incomplete model information, as opposed to pure symbolic planning approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 RAPid-Learn：学习恢复和再次计划，这是一种混合计划和学习方法，以解决适应代理环境中突然和意外变化（即新奇事物）的问题。 RAPid-Learn 旨在动态制定和解决任务马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的修改，并且能够利用领域知识来学习由环境变化引起的任何新动态。它能够利用领域知识来学习动作执行器，这些执行器可以进一步用于解决执行僵局，从而成功执行计划。这种新颖的信息反映在其更新的域模型中。我们通过在受《我的世界》启发的网格世界环境中引入各种新奇事物来展示其功效，并将我们的算法与文献中的迁移学习基线进行比较。我们的方法（1）即使在存在多种新颖性的情况下也是有效的，（2）比迁移学习 RL 基线更有效的样本，（3）与纯粹的符号规划方法相比，对不完整的模型信息具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPid-Learn框架，结合规划与学习方法，解决开放世界环境中因突发变化（新颖性）导致的智能体适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理环境突变时存在局限，如纯符号规划对不完整模型信息敏感，迁移学习样本效率低，需开发更高效的适应性框架。
AI.method: 基于马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）动态调整任务模型，融合领域知识学习新动态，通过更新领域模型解决执行阻塞问题。
AI.result: 在Minecraft启发的网格世界中，该方法在多新颖性场景下表现更优，样本效率高于迁移学习基线，且对不完整模型信息鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: RAPid-Learn通过结合规划与学习优势，有效应对开放世界环境中的动态变化，为复杂场景下的智能体适应提供新思路。

This novelty information is reflected in its updated domain model. We demonstrate its efficacy by introducing a wide variety of novelties in a gridworld environment inspired by Minecraft, and compare our algorithm with transfer learning baselines from the literature. Our method is (1) effective even in the presence of multiple novelties, (2) more sample efficient than transfer learning RL baselines, and (3) robust to incomplete model information, as opposed to pure symbolic planning approaches. 我们提出 RAPid-Learn：学习恢复和再次计划，这是一种混合计划和学习方法，以解决适应代理环境中突然和意外变化（即新奇事物）的问题。 RAPid-Learn 旨在动态制定和解决任务马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的修改，并且能够利用领域知识来学习由环境变化引起的任何新动态。它能够利用领域知识来学习动作执行器，这些执行器可以进一步用于解决执行僵局，从而成功执行计划。这种新颖的信息反映在其更新的域模型中。我们通过在受《我的世界》启发的网格世界环境中引入各种新奇事物来展示其功效，并将我们的算法与文献中的迁移学习基线进行比较。我们的方法（1）即使在存在多种新颖性的情况下也是有效的，（2）比迁移学习 RL 基线更有效的样本，（3）与纯粹的符号规划方法相比，对不完整的模型信息具有鲁棒性。 本文提出RAPid-Learn框架，结合规划与学习方法，解决开放世界环境中因突发变化（新颖性）导致的智能体适应问题。 Shivam Goel,Yash Shukla,Vasanth Sarathy,Matthias Scheutz,Jivko Sinapov cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Predicting within and across language phoneme recognition performance of self-supervised learning speech pre-trained models
title_zh: 预测自监督学习语音预训练模型的语言内和跨语言音素识别性能
abstract: In this work, we analyzed and compared speech representations extracted from different frozen self-supervised learning (SSL) speech pre-trained models on their ability to capture articulatory features (AF) information and their subsequent prediction of phone recognition performance for within and across language scenarios. Specifically, we compared CPC, wav2vec 2.0, and HuBert. First, frame-level AF probing tasks were implemented. Subsequently, phone-level end-to-end ASR systems for phoneme recognition tasks were implemented, and the performance on the frame-level AF probing task and the phone accuracy were correlated. Compared to the conventional speech representation MFCC, all SSL pre-trained speech representations captured more AF information, and achieved better phoneme recognition performance within and across languages, with HuBert performing best. The frame-level AF probing task is a good predictor of phoneme recognition performance, showing the importance of capturing AF information in the speech representations. Compared with MFCC, in the within-language scenario, the performance of these SSL speech pre-trained models on AF probing tasks achieved a maximum relative increase of 34.4%, and it resulted in the lowest PER of 10.2%. In the cross-language scenario, the maximum relative increase of 26.7% also resulted in the lowest PER of 23.0%.
summary: In this work, we analyzed and compared speech representations extracted from different frozen self-supervised learning (SSL) speech pre-trained models on their ability to capture articulatory features (AF) information and their subsequent prediction of phone recognition performance for within and across language scenarios. Specifically, we compared CPC, wav2vec 2.0, and HuBert. First, frame-level AF probing tasks were implemented. Subsequently, phone-level end-to-end ASR systems for phoneme recognition tasks were implemented, and the performance on the frame-level AF probing task and the phone accuracy were correlated. Compared to the conventional speech representation MFCC, all SSL pre-trained speech representations captured more AF information, and achieved better phoneme recognition performance within and across languages, with HuBert performing best. The frame-level AF probing task is a good predictor of phoneme recognition performance, showing the importance of capturing AF information in the speech representations. Compared with MFCC, in the within-language scenario, the performance of these SSL speech pre-trained models on AF probing tasks achieved a maximum relative increase of 34.4%, and it resulted in the lowest PER of 10.2%. In the cross-language scenario, the maximum relative increase of 26.7% also resulted in the lowest PER of 23.0%.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们分析和比较了从不同的冷冻自监督学习 (SSL) 语音预训练模型中提取的语音表示，了解它们捕获发音特征 (AF) 信息的能力以及随后对语言场景内和跨语言场景的电话识别性能的预测。 Specifically, we compared CPC, wav2vec 2.0, and HuBert. First, frame-level AF probing tasks were implemented.随后，实现了用于音素识别任务的电话级端到端 ASR 系统，并将帧级 AF 探测任务的性能与电话准确率相关联。与传统的语音表示 MFCC 相比，所有 SSL 预训练的语音表示捕获了更多的 AF 信息，并在语言内和跨语言中实现了更好的音素识别性能，其中 HuBert 表现最好。帧级 AF 探测任务是音素识别性能的良好预测器，显示了在语音表示中捕获 AF 信息的重要性。与 MFCC 相比，在语言内场景中，这些 SSL 语音预训练模型在 AF 探测任务上的性能最大相对提升了 34.4%，而 PER 最低为 10.2%。 In the cross-language scenario, the maximum relative increase of 26.7% also resulted in the lowest PER of 23.0%.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了不同自监督学习语音预训练模型在捕捉发音特征信息及预测同语言和跨语言音素识别性能方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统语音特征（如MFCC）在跨语言场景下表现有限，需验证自监督学习模型是否能更有效捕捉发音特征以提升音素识别性能。
AI.method: 通过帧级发音特征探测任务和端到端ASR系统，对比CPC、wav2vec 2.0、HuBert等模型的发音特征捕捉能力与音素识别性能相关性。
AI.result: 所有SSL模型均优于MFCC，其中HuBert表现最佳。同语言场景下AF探测性能提升34.4%，PER降至10.2%；跨语言场景下提升26.7%，PER降至23.0%。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习模型能更有效捕捉发音特征，帧级AF探测任务可预测音素识别性能，SSL模型在多语言场景中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Ceyhun Efe Kayan,Kivilcim Yuksel Aldogan,Abdurrahman Gumus
title: An Intensity and Phase Stacked Analysis of Phase-OTDR System using Deep Transfer Learning and Recurrent Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度迁移学习和循环神经网络对相位 OTDR 系统进行强度和相位叠加分析
abstract: Distributed acoustic sensors (DAS) are effective apparatus which are widely used in many application areas for recording signals of various events with very high spatial resolution along the optical fiber. To detect and recognize the recorded events properly, advanced signal processing algorithms with high computational demands are crucial. Convolutional neural networks are highly capable tools for extracting spatial information and very suitable for event recognition applications in DAS. Long-short term memory (LSTM) is an effective instrument for processing sequential data. In this study, we proposed a multi-input multi-output, two stage feature extraction methodology that combines the capabilities of these neural network architectures with transfer learning to classify vibrations applied to an optical fiber by a piezo transducer. First, we extracted the differential amplitude and phase information from the Phase-OTDR recordings and stored them in a temporal-spatial data matrix. Then, we used a state-of-the-art pre-trained CNN without dense layers as a feature extractor in the first stage. In the second stage, we used LSTMs to further analyze the features extracted by the CNN. Finally, we used a dense layer to classify the extracted features. To observe the effect of the utilized CNN architecture, we tested our model with five state-of-the art pre-trained models (VGG-16, ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, MobileNet and Inception-v3). The results show that using the VGG-16 architecture in our framework manages to obtain 100% classification accuracy in 50 trainings and got the best results on our Phase-OTDR dataset. Outcomes of this study indicate that the pre-trained CNNs combined with LSTM are very suitable for the analysis of differential amplitude and phase information, represented in a temporal spatial data matrix which is promising for event recognition operations in DAS applications.

abstract_zh: Distributed acoustic sensors (DAS) are effective apparatus which are widely used in many application areas for recording signals of various events with very high spatial resolution along the optical fiber.为了正确检测和识别记录的事件，具有高计算要求的先进信号处理算法至关重要。 Convolutional neural networks are highly capable tools for extracting spatial information and very suitable for event recognition applications in DAS.长短期记忆（LSTM）是处理顺序数据的有效工具。 In this study, we proposed a multi-input multi-output, two stage feature extraction methodology that combines the capabilities of these neural network architectures with transfer learning to classify vibrations applied to an optical fiber by a piezo transducer. First, we extracted the differential amplitude and phase information from the Phase-OTDR recordings and stored them in a temporal-spatial data matrix.然后，我们在第一阶段使用最先进的、没有密集层的预训练 CNN 作为特征提取器。在第二阶段，我们使用LSTM进一步分析CNN提取的特征。最后，我们使用密集层对提取的特征进行分类。 To observe the effect of the utilized CNN architecture, we tested our model with five state-of-the art pre-trained models (VGG-16, ResNet-50, DenseNet-121, MobileNet and Inception-v3). The results show that using the VGG-16 architecture in our framework manages to obtain 100% classification accuracy in 50 trainings and got the best results on our Phase-OTDR dataset. Outcomes of this study indicate that the pre-trained CNNs combined with LSTM are very suitable for the analysis of differential amplitude and phase information, represented in a temporal spatial data matrix which is promising for event recognition operations in DAS applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度迁移学习与循环神经网络的两阶段特征提取方法，用于分析相位OTDR系统的强度和相位信息，以提升分布式声学传感器（DAS）中事件识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有DAS事件识别方法计算复杂度高且效果有限，需融合空间特征提取与时间序列分析能力以提高识别精度。
AI.method: 采用预训练CNN（如VGG-16）提取相位OTDR记录的时空间矩阵特征，通过LSTM网络处理时序特征，最终使用全连接层进行分类，并对比五种CNN模型性能。
AI.result: 在50次训练中，基于VGG-16的模型实现100%分类准确率，且在相位OTDR数据集上表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 预训练CNN与LSTM结合的方法能有效分析相位OTDR的时空间数据，为DAS事件识别提供新思路。

Outcomes of this study indicate that the pre-trained CNNs combined with LSTM are very suitable for the analysis of differential amplitude and phase information, represented in a temporal spatial data matrix which is promising for event recognition operations in DAS applications. 本文提出一种结合深度迁移学习与循环神经网络的两阶段特征提取方法，用于分析相位OTDR系统的强度和相位信息，以提升分布式声学传感器（DAS）中事件识别的准确性。 Ceyhun Efe Kayan,Kivilcim Yuksel Aldogan,Abdurrahman Gumus cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Hao Guan,Ling Yue,Pew-Thian Yap,Shifu Xiao,Andrea Bozoki,Mingxia Liu
title: Attention-Guided Autoencoder for Automated Progression Prediction of Subjective Cognitive Decline with Structural MRI
title_zh: 注意力引导自动编码器通过结构 MRI 自动预测主观认知衰退的进展
abstract: Subjective cognitive decline (SCD) is a preclinical stage of Alzheimer's disease (AD) which occurs even before mild cognitive impairment (MCI). Progressive SCD will convert to MCI with the potential of further evolving to AD. Therefore, early identification of progressive SCD with neuroimaging techniques (e.g., structural MRI) is of great clinical value for early intervention of AD. However, existing MRI-based machine/deep learning methods usually suffer the small-sample-size problem which poses a great challenge to related neuroimaging analysis. The central question we aim to tackle in this paper is how to leverage related domains (e.g., AD/NC) to assist the progression prediction of SCD. Meanwhile, we are concerned about which brain areas are more closely linked to the identification of progressive SCD. To this end, we propose an attention-guided autoencoder model for efficient cross-domain adaptation which facilitates the knowledge transfer from AD to SCD. The proposed model is composed of four key components: 1) a feature encoding module for learning shared subspace representations of different domains, 2) an attention module for automatically locating discriminative brain regions of interest defined in brain atlases, 3) a decoding module for reconstructing the original input, 4) a classification module for identification of brain diseases. Through joint training of these four modules, domain invariant features can be learned. Meanwhile, the brain disease related regions can be highlighted by the attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on the publicly available ADNI dataset and a private CLAS dataset have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method. The proposed model is straightforward to train and test with only 5-10 seconds on CPUs and is suitable for medical tasks with small datasets.

Through joint training of these four modules, domain invariant features can be learned. Meanwhile, the brain disease related regions can be highlighted by the attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on the publicly available ADNI dataset and a private CLAS dataset have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method. The proposed model is straightforward to train and test with only 5-10 seconds on CPUs and is suitable for medical tasks with small datasets.
abstract_zh: 主观认知衰退（SCD）是阿尔茨海默病（AD）的临床前阶段，甚至发生在轻度认知障碍（MCI）之前。渐进式 SCD 将转化为 MCI，并有可能进一步演变为 AD。 Therefore, early identification of progressive SCD with neuroimaging techniques (e.g., structural MRI) is of great clinical value for early intervention of AD. However, existing MRI-based machine/deep learning methods usually suffer the small-sample-size problem which poses a great challenge to related neuroimaging analysis. The central question we aim to tackle in this paper is how to leverage related domains (e.g., AD/NC) to assist the progression prediction of SCD.同时，我们关注哪些大脑区域与进行性 SCD 的识别更为密切相关。 To this end, we propose an attention-guided autoencoder model for efficient cross-domain adaptation which facilitates the knowledge transfer from AD to SCD. The proposed model is composed of four key components: 1) a feature encoding module for learning shared subspace representations of different domains, 2) an attention module for automatically locating discriminative brain regions of interest defined in brain atlases, 3) a decoding module for reconstructing the original input, 4) a classification module for identification of brain diseases.通过这四个模块的联合训练，可以学习领域不变特征。同时，注意力机制可以突出脑部疾病相关区域。 Extensive experiments on the publicly available ADNI dataset and a private CLAS dataset have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.所提出的模型可以直接在 CPU 上进行训练和测试，仅需 5-10 秒，适用于小数据集的医疗任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构MRI的注意力引导自编码器模型，用于预测主观认知下降（SCD）的进展，通过跨领域知识迁移解决小样本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于MRI的SCD进展预测方法因样本量小而效果受限，需利用相关领域（如AD/NC）数据辅助预测，并识别与进展相关的脑区。
AI.method: 设计包含特征编码、注意力模块、解码和分类四个组件的自编码器，通过联合训练学习领域不变特征，注意力机制定位关键脑区。
AI.result: 在ADNI和CLAS数据集上验证了方法有效性，模型训练测试仅需5-10秒，适用于小数据医学任务。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过跨领域适应和注意力机制有效提升了SCD进展预测性能，为小样本神经影像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sever Topan,Karen Leung,Yuxiao Chen,Pritish Tupekar,Edward Schmerling,Jonas Nilsson,Michael Cox,Marco Pavone
title: Interaction-Dynamics-Aware Perception Zones for Obstacle Detection Safety Evaluation
title_zh: 用于障碍物检测安全评估的交互动力学感知感知区域
abstract: To enable safe autonomous vehicle (AV) operations, it is critical that an AV's obstacle detection module can reliably detect obstacles that pose a safety threat (i.e., are safety-critical). It is therefore desirable that the evaluation metric for the perception system captures the safety-criticality of objects. Unfortunately, existing perception evaluation metrics tend to make strong assumptions about the objects and ignore the dynamic interactions between agents, and thus do not accurately capture the safety risks in reality. To address these shortcomings, we introduce an interaction-dynamics-aware obstacle detection evaluation metric by accounting for closed-loop dynamic interactions between an ego vehicle and obstacles in the scene. By borrowing existing theory from optimal control theory, namely Hamilton-Jacobi reachability, we present a computationally tractable method for constructing a ``safety zone'': a region in state space that defines where safety-critical obstacles lie for the purpose of defining safety metrics. Our proposed safety zone is mathematically complete, and can be easily computed to reflect a variety of safety requirements. Using an off-the-shelf detection algorithm from the nuScenes detection challenge leaderboard, we demonstrate that our approach is computationally lightweight, and can better capture safety-critical perception errors than a baseline approach.
summary: To enable safe autonomous vehicle (AV) operations, it is critical that an AV's obstacle detection module can reliably detect obstacles that pose a safety threat (i.e., are safety-critical). It is therefore desirable that the evaluation metric for the perception system captures the safety-criticality of objects. Unfortunately, existing perception evaluation metrics tend to make strong assumptions about the objects and ignore the dynamic interactions between agents, and thus do not accurately capture the safety risks in reality. To address these shortcomings, we introduce an interaction-dynamics-aware obstacle detection evaluation metric by accounting for closed-loop dynamic interactions between an ego vehicle and obstacles in the scene. By borrowing existing theory from optimal control theory, namely Hamilton-Jacobi reachability, we present a computationally tractable method for constructing a ``safety zone'': a region in state space that defines where safety-critical obstacles lie for the purpose of defining safety metrics. Our proposed safety zone is mathematically complete, and can be easily computed to reflect a variety of safety requirements. Using an off-the-shelf detection algorithm from the nuScenes detection challenge leaderboard, we demonstrate that our approach is computationally lightweight, and can better capture safety-critical perception errors than a baseline approach.
abstract_zh: 为了实现安全的自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 操作，自动驾驶车辆的障碍物检测模块能够可靠地检测构成安全威胁（即安全关键）的障碍物至关重要。因此，期望感知系统的评估指标能够捕获物体的安全关键性。不幸的是，现有的感知评估指标往往对物体做出强烈的假设，而忽略了智能体之间的动态交互，因此无法准确捕捉现实中的安全风险。为了解决这些缺点，我们通过考虑自我车辆与场景中障碍物之间的闭环动态交互，引入了一种交互动力学感知的障碍物检测评估指标。通过借鉴最优控制理论中的现有理论，即汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性，我们提出了一种计算上易于处理的方法来构建“安全区”：状态空间中的一个区域，它定义安全关键障碍所在的位置，以便定义安全度量。我们提出的安全区在数学上是完整的，并且可以轻松计算以反映各种安全要求。使用 nuScenes 检测挑战排行榜中的现成检测算法，我们证明了我们的方法在计算上是轻量级的，并且比基线方法可以更好地捕获安全关键的感知错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交互动力学的障碍物检测安全评估方法，通过构建安全区域来更准确地识别对自动驾驶车辆构成安全威胁的障碍物。
AI.motivation: 现有障碍物检测评估指标未能考虑车辆与障碍物之间的动态交互，导致无法准确反映真实场景中的安全风险，亟需改进评估方法以提升自动驾驶安全性。
AI.method: 借助最优控制理论中的哈密顿-雅可比可达性理论，构建状态空间中的安全区域（safety zone），通过计算动态交互下的潜在危险区域来定义安全关键障碍物。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法计算效率高，相较于基线方法能更有效地捕捉安全关键性感知误差，并适用于现有检测算法（如nuScenes挑战赛算法）。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的交互动力学感知安全评估方法，为自动驾驶系统的障碍物检测提供了数学完备且可扩展的安全性分析框架。

Using an off-the-shelf detection algorithm from the nuScenes detection challenge leaderboard, we demonstrate that our approach is computationally lightweight, and can better capture safety-critical perception errors than a baseline approach. 为了实现安全的自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 操作，自动驾驶车辆的障碍物检测模块能够可靠地检测构成安全威胁（即安全关键）的障碍物至关重要。因此，期望感知系统的评估指标能够捕获物体的安全关键性。不幸的是，现有的感知评估指标往往对物体做出强烈的假设，而忽略了智能体之间的动态交互，因此无法准确捕捉现实中的安全风险。为了解决这些缺点，我们通过考虑自我车辆与场景中障碍物之间的闭环动态交互，引入了一种交互动力学感知的障碍物检测评估指标。通过借鉴最优控制理论中的现有理论，即汉密尔顿-雅可比可达性，我们提出了一种计算上易于处理的方法来构建“安全区”：状态空间中的一个区域，它定义安全关键障碍所在的位置，以便定义安全度量。我们提出的安全区在数学上是完整的，并且可以轻松计算以反映各种安全要求。使用 nuScenes 检测挑战排行榜中的现成检测算法，我们证明了我们的方法在计算上是轻量级的，并且比基线方法可以更好地捕获安全关键的感知错误。 本文提出一种基于交互动力学的障碍物检测安全评估方法，通过构建安全区域来更准确地识别对自动驾驶车辆构成安全威胁的障碍物。 Sever Topan,Karen Leung,Yuxiao Chen,Pritish Tupekar,Edward Schmerling,Jonas Nilsson,Michael Cox,Marco Pavone cs.RO,eess.SY

title: Burst2Vec: An Adversarial Multi-Task Approach for Predicting Emotion, Age, and Origin from Vocal Bursts
title_zh: Burst2Vec：一种对抗性多任务方法，用于根据声音爆发预测情绪、年龄和起源
abstract: We present Burst2Vec, our multi-task learning approach to predict emotion, age, and origin (i.e., native country/language) from vocal bursts. Burst2Vec utilises pre-trained speech representations to capture acoustic information from raw waveforms and incorporates the concept of model debiasing via adversarial training. Our models achieve a relative 30 % performance gain over baselines using pre-extracted features and score the highest amongst all participants in the ICML ExVo 2022 Multi-Task Challenge.
summary: We present Burst2Vec, our multi-task learning approach to predict emotion, age, and origin (i.e., native country/language) from vocal bursts. Burst2Vec utilises pre-trained speech representations to capture acoustic information from raw waveforms and incorporates the concept of model debiasing via adversarial training. Our models achieve a relative 30 % performance gain over baselines using pre-extracted features and score the highest amongst all participants in the ICML ExVo 2022 Multi-Task Challenge.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Burst2Vec，这是我们的多任务学习方法，可以根据声音爆发来预测情绪、年龄和起源（即祖国/语言）。 Burst2Vec utilises pre-trained speech representations to capture acoustic information from raw waveforms and incorporates the concept of model debiasing via adversarial training. Our models achieve a relative 30 % performance gain over baselines using pre-extracted features and score the highest amongst all participants in the ICML ExVo 2022 Multi-Task Challenge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Burst2Vec多任务学习模型，用于从语音爆发中预测情绪、年龄及来源（母国/语言）。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手动特征工程，且存在模型偏差问题，需通过对抗训练提升多任务预测的公平性与准确性。
AI.method: 利用预训练语音表征提取声学特征，结合对抗训练机制进行模型去偏，实现情绪、年龄和来源的联合预测。
AI.result: 相较基线模型提升30%性能，在ICML ExVo 2022多任务挑战中取得最高分。
AI.conclusion: 对抗多任务学习有效提升语音爆发分析性能，验证了模型去偏与跨任务表征学习的协同优势。

title: Motion Estimation for Large Displacements and Deformations
title_zh: 大位移和变形的运动估计
abstract: Large displacement optical flow is an integral part of many computer vision tasks. Variational optical flow techniques based on a coarse-to-fine scheme interpolate sparse matches and locally optimize an energy model conditioned on colour, gradient and smoothness, making them sensitive to noise in the sparse matches, deformations, and arbitrarily large displacements. This paper addresses this problem and presents HybridFlow, a variational motion estimation framework for large displacements and deformations. A multi-scale hybrid matching approach is performed on the image pairs. Coarse-scale clusters formed by classifying pixels according to their feature descriptors are matched using the clusters' context descriptors. We apply a multi-scale graph matching on the finer-scale superpixels contained within each matched pair of coarse-scale clusters. Small clusters that cannot be further subdivided are matched using localized feature matching. Together, these initial matches form the flow, which is propagated by an edge-preserving interpolation and variational refinement. Our approach does not require training and is robust to substantial displacements and rigid and non-rigid transformations due to motion in the scene, making it ideal for large-scale imagery such as Wide-Area Motion Imagery (WAMI). More notably, HybridFlow works on directed graphs of arbitrary topology representing perceptual groups, which improves motion estimation in the presence of significant deformations. We demonstrate HybridFlow's superior performance to state-of-the-art variational techniques on two benchmark datasets and report comparable results with state-of-the-art deep-learning-based techniques.

Variational optical flow techniques based on a coarse-to-fine scheme interpolate sparse matches and locally optimize an energy model conditioned on colour, gradient and smoothness, making them sensitive to noise in the sparse matches, deformations, and arbitrarily large displacements. This paper addresses this problem and presents HybridFlow, a variational motion estimation framework for large displacements and deformations. A multi-scale hybrid matching approach is performed on the image pairs. Coarse-scale clusters formed by classifying pixels according to their feature descriptors are matched using the clusters' context descriptors. We apply a multi-scale graph matching on the finer-scale superpixels contained within each matched pair of coarse-scale clusters. Small clusters that cannot be further subdivided are matched using localized feature matching. Together, these initial matches form the flow, which is propagated by an edge-preserving interpolation and variational refinement. Our approach does not require training and is robust to substantial displacements and rigid and non-rigid transformations due to motion in the scene, making it ideal for large-scale imagery such as Wide-Area Motion Imagery (WAMI). More notably, HybridFlow works on directed graphs of arbitrary topology representing perceptual groups, which improves motion estimation in the presence of significant deformations. We demonstrate HybridFlow's superior performance to state-of-the-art variational techniques on two benchmark datasets and report comparable results with state-of-the-art deep-learning-based techniques.
abstract_zh: Large displacement optical flow is an integral part of many computer vision tasks.基于从粗到细方案的变分光流技术对稀疏匹配进行插值，并局部优化以颜色、梯度和平滑度为条件的能量模型，使其对稀疏匹配、变形和任意大位移中的噪声敏感。 This paper addresses this problem and presents HybridFlow, a variational motion estimation framework for large displacements and deformations. A multi-scale hybrid matching approach is performed on the image pairs. Coarse-scale clusters formed by classifying pixels according to their feature descriptors are matched using the clusters' context descriptors. We apply a multi-scale graph matching on the finer-scale superpixels contained within each matched pair of coarse-scale clusters. Small clusters that cannot be further subdivided are matched using localized feature matching. Together, these initial matches form the flow, which is propagated by an edge-preserving interpolation and variational refinement.我们的方法不需要训练，并且对于场景中运动引起的大量位移以及刚性和非刚性变换具有鲁棒性，使其成为诸如广域运动图像（WAMI）等大规模图像的理想选择。更值得注意的是，HybridFlow 适用于表示感知组的任意拓扑的有向图，这改进了存在显着变形的运动估计。我们在两个基准数据集上展示了 HybridFlow 相对于最先进的变分技术的卓越性能，并报告了与最先进的基于深度学习的技术的可比结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的变分运动估计框架HybridFlow，用于处理大位移和变形的运动估计问题，适用于大范围运动图像（WAMI）。
AI.motivation: 现有变分光流方法对稀疏匹配噪声、变形和大位移敏感，难以有效处理复杂场景中的显著形变和大范围运动。
AI.method: 采用多尺度混合匹配策略：粗尺度通过特征描述子聚类并利用上下文描述子匹配集群；细尺度对超像素进行多尺度图匹配；小集群采用局部特征匹配。通过边缘保持插值和变分优化传播初始匹配结果，并支持任意拓扑结构的有向图以提升形变估计能力。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上优于最先进的变分方法，且与基于深度学习的最新技术结果相当。
AI.conclusion: HybridFlow通过多尺度混合匹配和图结构建模，在无需训练的情况下实现了对大位移和显著形变的鲁棒运动估计，适用于大范围运动图像分析。

authors_text: Fagner Cunha,Eulanda M. dos Santos,Juan G. Colonna
title: Bag of Tricks for Long-Tail Visual Recognition of Animal Species in Camera-Trap Images
title_zh: 相机陷阱图像中动物物种长尾视觉识别的技巧
abstract: Camera traps are a method for monitoring wildlife and they collect a large number of pictures. The number of images collected of each species usually follows a long-tail distribution, i.e., a few classes have a large number of instances, while a lot of species have just a small percentage. Although in most cases these rare species are the ones of interest to ecologists, they are often neglected when using deep-learning models because these models require a large number of images for the training. In this work, a simple and effective framework called Square-Root Sampling Branch (SSB) is proposed, which combines two classification branches that are trained using square-root sampling and instance sampling to improve long-tail visual recognition, and this is compared to state-of-the-art methods for handling this task: square-root sampling, class-balanced focal loss, and balanced group softmax. To achieve a more general conclusion, the methods for handling long-tail visual recognition were systematically evaluated in four families of computer vision models (ResNet, MobileNetV3, EfficientNetV2, and Swin Transformer) and four camera-trap datasets with different characteristics. Initially, a robust baseline with the most recent training tricks was prepared and, then, the methods for improving long-tail recognition were applied. Our experiments show that square-root sampling was the method that most improved the performance for minority classes by around 15%; however, this was at the cost of reducing the majority classes' accuracy by at least 3%. Our proposed framework (SSB) demonstrated itself to be competitive with the other methods and achieved the best or the second-best results for most of the cases for the tail classes; but, unlike the square-root sampling, the loss in the performance of the head classes was minimal, thus achieving the best trade-off among all the evaluated methods.

In this work, a simple and effective framework called Square-Root Sampling Branch (SSB) is proposed, which combines two classification branches that are trained using square-root sampling and instance sampling to improve long-tail visual recognition, and this is compared to state-of-the-art methods for handling this task: square-root sampling, class-balanced focal loss, and balanced group softmax. To achieve a more general conclusion, the methods for handling long-tail visual recognition were systematically evaluated in four families of computer vision models (ResNet, MobileNetV3, EfficientNetV2, and Swin Transformer) and four camera-trap datasets with different characteristics. Initially, a robust baseline with the most recent training tricks was prepared and, then, the methods for improving long-tail recognition were applied.我们的实验表明，平方根采样是最能将少数类别的性能提高约 15% 的方法；然而，这是以大多数类的准确率降低至少 3% 为代价的。 Our proposed framework (SSB) demonstrated itself to be competitive with the other methods and achieved the best or the second-best results for most of the cases for the tail classes; but, unlike the square-root sampling, the loss in the performance of the head classes was minimal, thus achieving the best trade-off among all the evaluated methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SSB的框架，用于解决相机陷阱图像中动物物种长尾分布的视觉识别问题，通过改进深度学习模型对稀有物种的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 相机陷阱图像中物种分布呈现长尾特性，稀有物种（尾部类别）因样本量少常被深度学习模型忽视，而生态学家更关注这些物种，亟需有效方法提升其识别性能。
AI.method: 提出Square-Root Sampling Branch (SSB)框架，结合平方根采样与实例采样双分支训练，对比平方根采样、类别平衡焦损失等方法，在四种模型（ResNet等）和四个数据集上系统评估。
AI.result: 平方根采样使尾部类别提升约15%但头部类别下降3%；SSB在尾部类别表现最优或次优，且头部类别性能损失最小，实现最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: SSB框架在长尾视觉识别中优于现有方法，有效兼顾头部与尾部类别性能，为生态监测提供可靠解决方案。

search_text: Bag of Tricks for Long-Tail Visual Recognition of Animal Species in Camera-Trap Images 相机陷阱图像中动物物种长尾视觉识别的技巧 Camera traps are a method for monitoring wildlife and they collect a large number of pictures. The number of images collected of each species usually follows a long-tail distribution, i.e., a few classes have a large number of instances, while a lot of species have just a small percentage. Although in most cases these rare species are the ones of interest to ecologists, they are often neglected when using deep-learning models because these models require a large number of images for the training. In this work, a simple and effective framework called Square-Root Sampling Branch (SSB) is proposed, which combines two classification branches that are trained using square-root sampling and instance sampling to improve long-tail visual recognition, and this is compared to state-of-the-art methods for handling this task: square-root sampling, class-balanced focal loss, and balanced group softmax. To achieve a more general conclusion, the methods for handling long-tail visual recognition were systematically evaluated in four families of computer vision models (ResNet, MobileNetV3, EfficientNetV2, and Swin Transformer) and four camera-trap datasets with different characteristics. Initially, a robust baseline with the most recent training tricks was prepared and, then, the methods for improving long-tail recognition were applied. Our experiments show that square-root sampling was the method that most improved the performance for minority classes by around 15%; however, this was at the cost of reducing the majority classes' accuracy by at least 3%. Our proposed framework (SSB) demonstrated itself to be competitive with the other methods and achieved the best or the second-best results for most of the cases for the tail classes; but, unlike the square-root sampling, the loss in the performance of the head classes was minimal, thus achieving the best trade-off among all the evaluated methods. 相机陷阱是监测野生动物的一种方法，它们会收集大量图片。 The number of images collected of each species usually follows a long-tail distribution, i.e., a few classes have a large number of instances, while a lot of species have just a small percentage. Although in most cases these rare species are the ones of interest to ecologists, they are often neglected when using deep-learning models because these models require a large number of images for the training. In this work, a simple and effective framework called Square-Root Sampling Branch (SSB) is proposed, which combines two classification branches that are trained using square-root sampling and instance sampling to improve long-tail visual recognition, and this is compared to state-of-the-art methods for handling this task: square-root sampling, class-balanced focal loss, and balanced group softmax. To achieve a more general conclusion, the methods for handling long-tail visual recognition were systematically evaluated in four families of computer vision models (ResNet, MobileNetV3, EfficientNetV2, and Swin Transformer) and four camera-trap datasets with different characteristics. Initially, a robust baseline with the most recent training tricks was prepared and, then, the methods for improving long-tail recognition were applied.我们的实验表明，平方根采样是最能将少数类别的性能提高约 15% 的方法；然而，这是以大多数类的准确率降低至少 3% 为代价的。 Our proposed framework (SSB) demonstrated itself to be competitive with the other methods and achieved the best or the second-best results for most of the cases for the tail classes; but, unlike the square-root sampling, the loss in the performance of the head classes was minimal, thus achieving the best trade-off among all the evaluated methods. 本文提出一种名为SSB的框架，用于解决相机陷阱图像中动物物种长尾分布的视觉识别问题，通过改进深度学习模型对稀有物种的识别能力。 Fagner Cunha,Eulanda M. dos Santos,Juan G. Colonna cs.CV

title: Ev-NeRF: Event Based Neural Radiance Field
title_zh: Ev-NeRF：基于事件的神经辐射场
abstract: We present Ev-NeRF, a Neural Radiance Field derived from event data. While event cameras can measure subtle brightness changes in high frame rates, the measurements in low lighting or extreme motion suffer from significant domain discrepancy with complex noise. As a result, the performance of event-based vision tasks does not transfer to challenging environments, where the event cameras are expected to thrive over normal cameras. We find that the multi-view consistency of NeRF provides a powerful self-supervision signal for eliminating the spurious measurements and extracting the consistent underlying structure despite highly noisy input. Instead of posed images of the original NeRF, the input to Ev-NeRF is the event measurements accompanied by the movements of the sensors. Using the loss function that reflects the measurement model of the sensor, Ev-NeRF creates an integrated neural volume that summarizes the unstructured and sparse data points captured for about 2-4 seconds. The generated neural volume can also produce intensity images from novel views with reasonable depth estimates, which can serve as a high-quality input to various vision-based tasks. Our results show that Ev-NeRF achieves competitive performance for intensity image reconstruction under extreme noise conditions and high-dynamic-range imaging.
summary: We present Ev-NeRF, a Neural Radiance Field derived from event data. While event cameras can measure subtle brightness changes in high frame rates, the measurements in low lighting or extreme motion suffer from significant domain discrepancy with complex noise. As a result, the performance of event-based vision tasks does not transfer to challenging environments, where the event cameras are expected to thrive over normal cameras. We find that the multi-view consistency of NeRF provides a powerful self-supervision signal for eliminating the spurious measurements and extracting the consistent underlying structure despite highly noisy input. Instead of posed images of the original NeRF, the input to Ev-NeRF is the event measurements accompanied by the movements of the sensors. Using the loss function that reflects the measurement model of the sensor, Ev-NeRF creates an integrated neural volume that summarizes the unstructured and sparse data points captured for about 2-4 seconds. The generated neural volume can also produce intensity images from novel views with reasonable depth estimates, which can serve as a high-quality input to various vision-based tasks. Our results show that Ev-NeRF achieves competitive performance for intensity image reconstruction under extreme noise conditions and high-dynamic-range imaging.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Ev-NeRF，一种源自事件数据的神经辐射场。 While event cameras can measure subtle brightness changes in high frame rates, the measurements in low lighting or extreme motion suffer from significant domain discrepancy with complex noise. As a result, the performance of event-based vision tasks does not transfer to challenging environments, where the event cameras are expected to thrive over normal cameras. We find that the multi-view consistency of NeRF provides a powerful self-supervision signal for eliminating the spurious measurements and extracting the consistent underlying structure despite highly noisy input. Ev-NeRF 的输入不是原始 NeRF 的姿势图像，而是伴随传感器运动的事件测量值。 Using the loss function that reflects the measurement model of the sensor, Ev-NeRF creates an integrated neural volume that summarizes the unstructured and sparse data points captured for about 2-4 seconds. The generated neural volume can also produce intensity images from novel views with reasonable depth estimates, which can serve as a high-quality input to various vision-based tasks. Our results show that Ev-NeRF achieves competitive performance for intensity image reconstruction under extreme noise conditions and high-dynamic-range imaging.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ev-NeRF，一种基于事件相机数据的神经辐射场方法，用于解决事件相机在低光或高速运动场景下的噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在低光照或极端运动环境下会产生显著噪声，导致基于事件的视觉任务性能下降，需通过多视角一致性消除噪声并提取结构信息。
AI.method: 利用NeRF的多视角一致性作为自监督信号，以事件数据和传感器运动为输入，结合传感器测量模型损失函数，生成整合稀疏事件数据的神经体。
AI.result: Ev-NeRF在极端噪声条件下和高动态范围成像中实现了具有竞争力的强度图像重建效果，并能生成合理深度估计的新视角图像。
AI.conclusion: Ev-NeRF通过神经辐射场框架有效处理事件数据噪声，为事件相机在复杂环境下的应用提供了高质量的输入基础。

title: OPERA: Harmonizing Task-Oriented Dialogs and Information Seeking Experience
title_zh: OPERA：协调面向任务的对话和信息搜索体验
abstract: Existing studies in conversational AI mostly treat task-oriented dialog (TOD) and question answering (QA) as separate tasks. Towards the goal of constructing a conversational agent that can complete user tasks and support information seeking, it is important to build a system that handles both TOD and QA with access to various external knowledge. In this work, we propose a new task, Open-Book TOD (OB-TOD), which combines TOD with QA task and expand external knowledge sources to include both explicit knowledge sources (e.g., the Web) and implicit knowledge sources (e.g., pre-trained language models). We create a new dataset OB-MultiWOZ, where we enrich TOD sessions with QA-like information seeking experience grounded on external knowledge. We propose a unified model OPERA (Open-book End-to-end Task-oriented Dialog) which can appropriately access explicit and implicit external knowledge to tackle the defined task. Experimental results demonstrate OPERA's superior performance compared to closed-book baselines and illustrate the value of both knowledge types.
summary: Existing studies in conversational AI mostly treat task-oriented dialog (TOD) and question answering (QA) as separate tasks. Towards the goal of constructing a conversational agent that can complete user tasks and support information seeking, it is important to build a system that handles both TOD and QA with access to various external knowledge. In this work, we propose a new task, Open-Book TOD (OB-TOD), which combines TOD with QA task and expand external knowledge sources to include both explicit knowledge sources (e.g., the Web) and implicit knowledge sources (e.g., pre-trained language models). We create a new dataset OB-MultiWOZ, where we enrich TOD sessions with QA-like information seeking experience grounded on external knowledge. We propose a unified model OPERA (Open-book End-to-end Task-oriented Dialog) which can appropriately access explicit and implicit external knowledge to tackle the defined task. Experimental results demonstrate OPERA's superior performance compared to closed-book baselines and illustrate the value of both knowledge types.
abstract_zh: 对话式人工智能的现有研究大多将面向任务的对话（TOD）和问题回答（QA）视为单独的任务。为了构建一个能够完成用户任务并支持信息搜索的会话代理的目标，构建一个能够处理 TOD 和 QA 并能够访问各种外部知识的系统非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新任务，Open-Book TOD（OB-TOD），它将 TOD 与 QA 任务相结合，并扩展外部知识源以包括显性知识源（例如 Web）和隐性知识源（例如预训练的语言模型）。我们创建了一个新的数据集 OB-MultiWOZ，在其中我们通过基于外部知识的类似 QA 的信息寻求经验来丰富 TOD 会话。我们提出了一个统一的模型 OPERA（开放式端到端任务导向对话），它可以适当地访问显式和隐式的外部知识来处理定义的任务。实验结果证明了 OPERA 与闭卷基线相比具有优越的性能，并说明了两种知识类型的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合任务导向对话（TOD）与问答（QA）的新任务——开放书籍TOD（OB-TOD），并开发了统一模型OPERA以整合显式与隐式外部知识。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将TOD与QA视为独立任务，但实际应用中需同时支持用户任务完成与信息检索，需整合外部知识以提升系统能力。
AI.method: 提出OB-TOD任务，构建包含显式（如网络）与隐式知识（如预训练模型）的数据集OB-MultiWOZ，并设计可访问多源知识的统一模型OPERA。
AI.result: OPERA在实验中优于封闭式基线模型，验证了显式与隐式知识结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 整合TOD与QA任务并利用多源外部知识能显著提升对话系统性能，OPERA模型为此提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: OPERA: Harmonizing Task-Oriented Dialogs and Information Seeking Experience OPERA：协调面向任务的对话和信息搜索体验 Existing studies in conversational AI mostly treat task-oriented dialog (TOD) and question answering (QA) as separate tasks. Towards the goal of constructing a conversational agent that can complete user tasks and support information seeking, it is important to build a system that handles both TOD and QA with access to various external knowledge. In this work, we propose a new task, Open-Book TOD (OB-TOD), which combines TOD with QA task and expand external knowledge sources to include both explicit knowledge sources (e.g., the Web) and implicit knowledge sources (e.g., pre-trained language models). We create a new dataset OB-MultiWOZ, where we enrich TOD sessions with QA-like information seeking experience grounded on external knowledge. We propose a unified model OPERA (Open-book End-to-end Task-oriented Dialog) which can appropriately access explicit and implicit external knowledge to tackle the defined task. Experimental results demonstrate OPERA's superior performance compared to closed-book baselines and illustrate the value of both knowledge types. 对话式人工智能的现有研究大多将面向任务的对话（TOD）和问题回答（QA）视为单独的任务。为了构建一个能够完成用户任务并支持信息搜索的会话代理的目标，构建一个能够处理 TOD 和 QA 并能够访问各种外部知识的系统非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新任务，Open-Book TOD（OB-TOD），它将 TOD 与 QA 任务相结合，并扩展外部知识源以包括显性知识源（例如 Web）和隐性知识源（例如预训练的语言模型）。我们创建了一个新的数据集 OB-MultiWOZ，在其中我们通过基于外部知识的类似 QA 的信息寻求经验来丰富 TOD 会话。我们提出了一个统一的模型 OPERA（开放式端到端任务导向对话），它可以适当地访问显式和隐式的外部知识来处理定义的任务。实验结果证明了 OPERA 与闭卷基线相比具有优越的性能，并说明了两种知识类型的价值。 本文提出了一种结合任务导向对话（TOD）与问答（QA）的新任务——开放书籍TOD（OB-TOD），并开发了统一模型OPERA以整合显式与隐式外部知识。 Miaoran Li,Baolin Peng,Jianfeng Gao,Zhu Zhang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR

authors_text: Duowei Li,Jianping Wu,Feng Zhu,Tianyi Chen,Yiik Diew Wong
title: Modeling Adaptive Platoon and Reservation Based Autonomous Intersection Control: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 基于自适应排和预留的自主交叉口控制建模：深度强化学习方法
comment: This paper has been accepted by 10th Symposium of the European Association for Research in Transportation (hEART 2022)
comments: This paper has been accepted by 10th Symposium of the European Association for Research in Transportation (hEART 2022)
abstract: As a strategy to reduce travel delay and enhance energy efficiency, platooning of connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) at non-signalized intersections has become increasingly popular in academia. However, few studies have attempted to model the relation between the optimal platoon size and the traffic conditions around the intersection. To this end, this study proposes an adaptive platoon based autonomous intersection control model powered by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) technique. The model framework has following two levels: the first level adopts a First Come First Serve (FCFS) reservation based policy integrated with a nonconflicting lane selection mechanism to determine vehicles' passing priority; and the second level applies a deep Q-network algorithm to identify the optimal platoon size based on the real-time traffic condition of an intersection. When being tested on a traffic micro-simulator, our proposed model exhibits superior performances on travel efficiency and fuel conservation as compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: As a strategy to reduce travel delay and enhance energy efficiency, platooning of connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) at non-signalized intersections has become increasingly popular in academia. However, few studies have attempted to model the relation between the optimal platoon size and the traffic conditions around the intersection. To this end, this study proposes an adaptive platoon based autonomous intersection control model powered by deep reinforcement learning (DRL) technique. The model framework has following two levels: the first level adopts a First Come First Serve (FCFS) reservation based policy integrated with a nonconflicting lane selection mechanism to determine vehicles' passing priority; and the second level applies a deep Q-network algorithm to identify the optimal platoon size based on the real-time traffic condition of an intersection. When being tested on a traffic micro-simulator, our proposed model exhibits superior performances on travel efficiency and fuel conservation as compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 作为减少出行延误和提高能源效率的策略，在非信号交叉口联网和自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 的队列在学术界越来越受欢迎。 However, few studies have attempted to model the relation between the optimal platoon size and the traffic conditions around the intersection.为此，本研究提出了一种基于自适应排的自主交叉口控制模型，该模型由深度强化学习（DRL）技术提供支持。该模型框架分为以下两个层次：第一层次采用先到先服务（FCFS）预留策略，结合非冲突车道选择机制来确定车辆的通行优先级；第二级采用深度Q网络算法，根据路口实时交通状况确定最佳排量。当在交通微型模拟器上进行测试时，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的模型在行驶效率和燃油节省方面表现出卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的自适应车队与预约机制结合的自主交叉口控制模型，旨在优化非信号交叉口的交通效率和能源消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对连接自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）在非信号交叉口最优车队规模与交通状况关系的建模，导致调度效率与能耗优化不足。
AI.method: 采用两层框架：第一层基于先到先得（FCFS）预约策略与非冲突车道选择机制分配通行优先级；第二层利用深度Q网络（DQN）算法实时计算最优车队规模。
AI.result: 在交通微模拟器测试中，该模型在旅行效率和燃油消耗指标上均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过动态适配车队规模与优先级策略，有效提升了交叉口交通效率及能源经济性，为智能交通系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Zongsheng Cao,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Xiaochun Cao,Qingming Huang
title: Geometry Interaction Knowledge Graph Embeddings
title_zh: 几何交互知识图嵌入
abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) embeddings have shown great power in learning representations of entities and relations for link prediction tasks. Previous work usually embeds KGs into a single geometric space such as Euclidean space (zero curved), hyperbolic space (negatively curved) or hyperspherical space (positively curved) to maintain their specific geometric structures (e.g., chain, hierarchy and ring structures). However, the topological structure of KGs appears to be complicated, since it may contain multiple types of geometric structures simultaneously. Therefore, embedding KGs in a single space, no matter the Euclidean space, hyperbolic space or hyperspheric space, cannot capture the complex structures of KGs accurately. To overcome this challenge, we propose Geometry Interaction knowledge graph Embeddings (GIE), which learns spatial structures interactively between the Euclidean, hyperbolic and hyperspherical spaces. Theoretically, our proposed GIE can capture a richer set of relational information, model key inference patterns, and enable expressive semantic matching across entities. Experimental results on three well-established knowledge graph completion benchmarks show that our GIE achieves the state-of-the-art performance with fewer parameters.
summary: Knowledge graph (KG) embeddings have shown great power in learning representations of entities and relations for link prediction tasks. Previous work usually embeds KGs into a single geometric space such as Euclidean space (zero curved), hyperbolic space (negatively curved) or hyperspherical space (positively curved) to maintain their specific geometric structures (e.g., chain, hierarchy and ring structures). However, the topological structure of KGs appears to be complicated, since it may contain multiple types of geometric structures simultaneously. Therefore, embedding KGs in a single space, no matter the Euclidean space, hyperbolic space or hyperspheric space, cannot capture the complex structures of KGs accurately. To overcome this challenge, we propose Geometry Interaction knowledge graph Embeddings (GIE), which learns spatial structures interactively between the Euclidean, hyperbolic and hyperspherical spaces. Theoretically, our proposed GIE can capture a richer set of relational information, model key inference patterns, and enable expressive semantic matching across entities. Experimental results on three well-established knowledge graph completion benchmarks show that our GIE achieves the state-of-the-art performance with fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）嵌入在学习链接预测任务的实体和关系表示方面表现出了强大的能力。以前的工作通常将知识图谱嵌入到单个几何空间中，例如欧几里德空间（零弯曲）、双曲空间（负弯曲）或超球面空间（正弯曲），以保持其特定的几何结构（例如链、层次和环结构）。然而，知识图谱的拓扑结构显得很复杂，因为它可能同时包含多种类型的几何结构。因此，将知识图谱嵌入到单个空间中，无论是欧氏空间、双曲空间还是超球面空间，都无法准确捕获知识图谱的复杂结构。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了几何交互知识图嵌入（GIE），它可以交互地学习欧几里德空间、双曲空间和超球面空间之间的空间结构。理论上，我们提出的 GIE 可以捕获更丰富的关系信息，对关键推理模式进行建模，并实现跨实体的表达语义匹配。三个成熟的知识图谱完成基准的实验结果表明，我们的 GIE 以更少的参数实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GIE的知识图谱嵌入方法，通过欧几里得、双曲和超球面空间的交互学习，解决单一几何空间无法准确捕捉知识图谱复杂结构的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法通常将图谱映射到单一几何空间（如欧几里得、双曲或超球面空间），但实际知识图谱可能同时包含链式、层次和环状等多种几何结构，单一空间难以准确建模。
AI.method: 提出Geometry Interaction Embeddings（GIE）方法，通过交互学习欧几里得、双曲和超球面空间的结构特征，以更丰富地捕捉关系信息并实现跨实体的语义匹配。
AI.result: 在三个主流知识图谱补全基准测试中，GIE在参数量更少的情况下达到当时最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过多几何空间交互建模，GIE能够有效表征知识图谱的复杂拓扑结构，为关系推理和语义匹配提供了更强大的表达能力。

To overcome this challenge, we propose Geometry Interaction knowledge graph Embeddings (GIE), which learns spatial structures interactively between the Euclidean, hyperbolic and hyperspherical spaces. Theoretically, our proposed GIE can capture a richer set of relational information, model key inference patterns, and enable expressive semantic matching across entities. Experimental results on three well-established knowledge graph completion benchmarks show that our GIE achieves the state-of-the-art performance with fewer parameters. 知识图（KG）嵌入在学习链接预测任务的实体和关系表示方面表现出了强大的能力。以前的工作通常将知识图谱嵌入到单个几何空间中，例如欧几里德空间（零弯曲）、双曲空间（负弯曲）或超球面空间（正弯曲），以保持其特定的几何结构（例如链、层次和环结构）。然而，知识图谱的拓扑结构显得很复杂，因为它可能同时包含多种类型的几何结构。因此，将知识图谱嵌入到单个空间中，无论是欧氏空间、双曲空间还是超球面空间，都无法准确捕获知识图谱的复杂结构。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了几何交互知识图嵌入（GIE），它可以交互地学习欧几里德空间、双曲空间和超球面空间之间的空间结构。理论上，我们提出的 GIE 可以捕获更丰富的关系信息，对关键推理模式进行建模，并实现跨实体的表达语义匹配。三个成熟的知识图谱完成基准的实验结果表明，我们的 GIE 以更少的参数实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种名为GIE的知识图谱嵌入方法，通过欧几里得、双曲和超球面空间的交互学习，解决单一几何空间无法准确捕捉知识图谱复杂结构的问题。 Zongsheng Cao,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Xiaochun Cao,Qingming Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Deep embedded clustering algorithm for clustering PACS repositories
title_zh: 用于聚类 PACS 存储库的深度嵌入式聚类算法
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2021 IEEE 34th International Symposium on Computer-Based Medical Systems (CBMS)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2021 IEEE 34th International Symposium on Computer-Based Medical Systems (CBMS)
abstract: Creating large datasets of medical radiology images from several sources can be challenging because of the differences in the acquisition and storage standards. One possible way of controlling and/or assessing the image selection process is through medical image clustering. This, however, requires an efficient method for learning latent image representations. In this paper, we tackle the problem of fully-unsupervised clustering of medical images using pixel data only. We test the performance of several contemporary approaches, built on top of a convolutional autoencoder (CAE) - convolutional deep embedded clustering (CDEC) and convolutional improved deep embedded clustering (CIDEC) - and three approaches based on preset feature extraction - histogram of oriented gradients (HOG), local binary pattern (LBP) and principal component analysis (PCA). CDEC and CIDEC are end-to-end clustering solutions, involving simultaneous learning of latent representations and clustering assignments, whereas the remaining approaches rely on k-means clustering from fixed embeddings. We train the models on 30,000 images, and test them using a separate test set consisting of 8,000 images. We sampled the data from the PACS repository archive of the Clinical Hospital Centre Rijeka. For evaluation, we use silhouette score, homogeneity score and normalised mutual information (NMI) on two target parameters, closely associated with commonly occurring DICOM tags - Modality and anatomical region (adjusted BodyPartExamined tag). CIDEC attains an NMI score of 0.473 with respect to anatomical region, and CDEC attains an NMI score of 0.645 with respect to the tag Modality - both outperforming other commonly used feature descriptors.

CDEC and CIDEC are end-to-end clustering solutions, involving simultaneous learning of latent representations and clustering assignments, whereas the remaining approaches rely on k-means clustering from fixed embeddings. We train the models on 30,000 images, and test them using a separate test set consisting of 8,000 images. We sampled the data from the PACS repository archive of the Clinical Hospital Centre Rijeka. For evaluation, we use silhouette score, homogeneity score and normalised mutual information (NMI) on two target parameters, closely associated with commonly occurring DICOM tags - Modality and anatomical region (adjusted BodyPartExamined tag). CIDEC attains an NMI score of 0.473 with respect to anatomical region, and CDEC attains an NMI score of 0.645 with respect to the tag Modality - both outperforming other commonly used feature descriptors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度嵌入聚类的算法，用于对PACS医学影像库进行无监督聚类。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据因采集和存储标准差异难以整合，需通过高效的学习潜在表示方法来控制和评估影像选择过程。
AI.method: 对比了基于卷积自编码器的CDEC/CIDEC端到端聚类方法与HOG/LBP/PCA等传统特征提取方法，使用30,000张训练图像和8,000张测试图像进行评估。
AI.result: CIDEC在解剖区域NMI得分为0.473，CDEC在模态标签NMI得分为0.645，均优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度嵌入聚类方法在医学影像无监督聚类任务中优于传统特征描述子，尤其在DICOM标签相关参数上表现突出。

authors_text: Bushra Yousuf,Rejwan Bin Sulaiman,Musarrat Saberin Nipun
title: A novel approach to increase scalability while training machine learning algorithms using Bfloat 16 in credit card fraud detection
title_zh: 一种在信用卡欺诈检测中使用 Bfloat 16 训练机器学习算法时提高可扩展性的新颖方法
abstract: The use of credit cards has become quite common these days as digital banking has become the norm. With this increase, fraud in credit cards also has a huge problem and loss to the banks and customers alike. Normal fraud detection systems, are not able to detect the fraud since fraudsters emerge with new techniques to commit fraud. This creates the need to use machine learning-based software to detect frauds. Currently, the machine learning softwares that are available focuses only on the accuracy of detecting frauds but does not focus on the cost or time factors to detect. This research focuses on machine learning scalability for banks' credit card fraud detection systems. We have compared the existing machine learning algorithms and methods that are available with the newly proposed technique. The goal is to prove that using fewer bits for training a machine learning algorithm will result in a more scalable system, that will reduce the time and will also be less costly to implement.

We have compared the existing machine learning algorithms and methods that are available with the newly proposed technique.目标是证明使用更少的位数来训练机器学习算法将产生更具可扩展性的系统，从而减少时间并且实现成本更低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用Bfloat 16格式提升信用欺诈检测机器学习模型训练可扩展性的新方法，旨在降低时间和成本。
AI.motivation: 现有欺诈检测系统难以应对新型欺诈手段，且现有算法过度追求准确性而忽视计算成本与效率问题。
AI.method: 通过对比实验验证Bfloat 16低精度训练在保持检测效果的同时，提升模型训练的可扩展性并减少资源消耗。
AI.result: 实验表明使用Bfloat 16的新型方法在训练效率、系统扩展性及实施成本方面均优于传统算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为银行提供更高效经济的欺诈检测解决方案，未来可推广至其他需要高扩展性的机器学习场景。

authors_text: Jing Tan,Lars Braubach,Kai Jander,Rongjun Xu,Kai Chen
title: A Novel Multi-Agent Scheduling Mechanism for Adaptation of Production Plans in Case of Supply Chain Disruptions
title_zh: 一种新颖的多代理调度机制，用于在供应链中断的情况下调整生产计划
abstract: Manufacturing companies typically use sophisticated production planning systems optimizing production steps, often delivering near-optimal solutions. As a downside for delivering a near-optimal schedule, planning systems have high computational demands resulting in hours of computation. Under normal circumstances this is not issue if there is enough buffer time before implementation of the schedule (e.g. at night for the next day). However, in case of unexpected disruptions such as delayed part deliveries or defectively manufactured goods, the planned schedule may become invalid and swift replanning becomes necessary. Such immediate replanning is unsuited for existing optimal planners due to the computational requirements. This paper proposes a novel solution that can effectively and efficiently perform replanning in case of different types of disruptions using an existing plan. The approach is based on the idea to adhere to the existing schedule as much as possible, adapting it based on limited local changes. For that purpose an agent-based scheduling mechanism has been devised, in which agents represent materials and production sites and use local optimization techniques and negotiations to generate an adapted (sufficient, but non-optimal) schedule. The approach has been evaluated using real production data from Huawei, showing that efficient schedules are produced in short time. The system has been implemented as proof of concept and is currently reimplemented and transferred to a production system based on the Jadex agent platform.

The approach has been evaluated using real production data from Huawei, showing that efficient schedules are produced in short time. The system has been implemented as proof of concept and is currently reimplemented and transferred to a production system based on the Jadex agent platform.
abstract_zh: 制造公司通常使用复杂的生产计划系统来优化生产步骤，通常提供接近最佳的解决方案。作为提供近乎最佳的时间表的缺点，规划系统具有很高的计算需求，导致计算时间较长。在正常情况下，如果在执行计划之前有足够的缓冲时间（例如第二天晚上），这不是问题。然而，如果出现意外中断，例如零件交付延迟或制造的产品有缺陷，计划的时间表可能会失效，并且需要迅速重新计划。由于计算要求，这种立即重新规划不适合现有的最优规划器。本文提出了一种新颖的解决方案，可以使用现有计划在发生不同类型的中断时有效且高效地执行重新计划。该方法的基本理念是尽可能遵守现有时间表，并根据有限的当地变化进行调整。为此，设计了一种基于代理的调度机制，其中代理代表材料和生产地点，并使用本地优化技术和协商来生成适应的（足够的，但非最优的）调度。该方法已使用华为的实际生产数据进行了评估，表明可以在短时间内制定高效的计划。该系统已作为概念验证实施，目前正在重新实施并转移到基于 Jadex 代理平台的生产系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体的调度机制，用于在供应链中断时快速调整生产计划。
AI.motivation: 传统生产计划系统计算复杂度高，无法满足突发中断情况下快速重规划的需求。
AI.method: 设计多智能体系统，通过局部调整和协商生成次优但可行的调度方案。
AI.result: 基于华为实际生产数据验证，系统能在短时间内生成高效调度方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为供应链中断场景下的快速重规划提供了可行的技术路径。

search_text: A Novel Multi-Agent Scheduling Mechanism for Adaptation of Production Plans in Case of Supply Chain Disruptions 一种新颖的多代理调度机制，用于在供应链中断的情况下调整生产计划 Manufacturing companies typically use sophisticated production planning systems optimizing production steps, often delivering near-optimal solutions. As a downside for delivering a near-optimal schedule, planning systems have high computational demands resulting in hours of computation. Under normal circumstances this is not issue if there is enough buffer time before implementation of the schedule (e.g. at night for the next day). However, in case of unexpected disruptions such as delayed part deliveries or defectively manufactured goods, the planned schedule may become invalid and swift replanning becomes necessary. Such immediate replanning is unsuited for existing optimal planners due to the computational requirements. This paper proposes a novel solution that can effectively and efficiently perform replanning in case of different types of disruptions using an existing plan. The approach is based on the idea to adhere to the existing schedule as much as possible, adapting it based on limited local changes. For that purpose an agent-based scheduling mechanism has been devised, in which agents represent materials and production sites and use local optimization techniques and negotiations to generate an adapted (sufficient, but non-optimal) schedule. The approach has been evaluated using real production data from Huawei, showing that efficient schedules are produced in short time. The system has been implemented as proof of concept and is currently reimplemented and transferred to a production system based on the Jadex agent platform. 制造公司通常使用复杂的生产计划系统来优化生产步骤，通常提供接近最佳的解决方案。作为提供近乎最佳的时间表的缺点，规划系统具有很高的计算需求，导致计算时间较长。在正常情况下，如果在执行计划之前有足够的缓冲时间（例如第二天晚上），这不是问题。然而，如果出现意外中断，例如零件交付延迟或制造的产品有缺陷，计划的时间表可能会失效，并且需要迅速重新计划。由于计算要求，这种立即重新规划不适合现有的最优规划器。本文提出了一种新颖的解决方案，可以使用现有计划在发生不同类型的中断时有效且高效地执行重新计划。该方法的基本理念是尽可能遵守现有时间表，并根据有限的当地变化进行调整。为此，设计了一种基于代理的调度机制，其中代理代表材料和生产地点，并使用本地优化技术和协商来生成适应的（足够的，但非最优的）调度。该方法已使用华为的实际生产数据进行了评估，表明可以在短时间内制定高效的计划。该系统已作为概念验证实施，目前正在重新实施并转移到基于 Jadex 代理平台的生产系统。 本文提出了一种基于多智能体的调度机制，用于在供应链中断时快速调整生产计划。 Jing Tan,Lars Braubach,Kai Jander,Rongjun Xu,Kai Chen cs.AI,cs.MA,math.OC

title: Independent evaluation of state-of-the-art deep networks for mammography
title_zh: 对最先进的乳腺 X 线摄影深度网络进行独立评估
abstract: Deep neural models have shown remarkable performance in image recognition tasks, whenever large datasets of labeled images are available. The largest datasets in radiology are available for screening mammography. Recent reports, including in high impact journals, document performance of deep models at or above that of trained radiologists. What is not yet known is whether performance of these trained models is robust and replicates across datasets. Here we evaluate performance of five published state-of-the-art models on four publicly available mammography datasets. The limited size of public datasets precludes retraining the model and so we are limited to evaluate those models that have been made available with pre-trained parameters. Where test data was available, we replicated published results. However, the trained models performed poorly on out-of-sample data, except when based on all four standard views of a mammographic exam. We conclude that future progress will depend on a concerted effort to make more diverse and larger mammography datasets publicly available. Meanwhile, results that are not accompanied by a release of trained models for independent validation should be judged cautiously.
summary: Deep neural models have shown remarkable performance in image recognition tasks, whenever large datasets of labeled images are available. The largest datasets in radiology are available for screening mammography. Recent reports, including in high impact journals, document performance of deep models at or above that of trained radiologists. What is not yet known is whether performance of these trained models is robust and replicates across datasets. Here we evaluate performance of five published state-of-the-art models on four publicly available mammography datasets. The limited size of public datasets precludes retraining the model and so we are limited to evaluate those models that have been made available with pre-trained parameters. Where test data was available, we replicated published results. However, the trained models performed poorly on out-of-sample data, except when based on all four standard views of a mammographic exam. We conclude that future progress will depend on a concerted effort to make more diverse and larger mammography datasets publicly available. Meanwhile, results that are not accompanied by a release of trained models for independent validation should be judged cautiously.
abstract_zh: 只要有大量标记图像数据集可用，深度神经模型就在图像识别任务中表现出卓越的性能。放射学领域最大的数据集可用于筛查乳房 X 光检查。最近的报告（包括高影响力期刊上的报告）记录了深度模型的性能达到或高于经过培训的放射科医生的性能。目前尚不清楚这些经过训练的模型的性能是否稳健并且可以跨数据集复制。在这里，我们评估了五个已发布的最先进模型在四个公开可用的乳房X线摄影数据集上的性能。 The limited size of public datasets precludes retraining the model and so we are limited to evaluate those models that have been made available with pre-trained parameters.在有测试数据的情况下，我们复制了已发布的结果。然而，训练后的模型在样本外数据上表现不佳，除非基于乳房 X 光检查的所有四个标准视图。我们的结论是，未来的进展将取决于共同努力，公开提供更多样化、更大的乳腺X线摄影数据集。同时，对于没有发布经过训练的模型进行独立验证的结果，应谨慎判断。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了五种先进的深度学习模型在四个公开乳腺X光数据集上的性能，以检验其跨数据集的鲁棒性和可重复性。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度模型在乳腺X光筛查中表现出色，但其性能是否具有鲁棒性和跨数据集可重复性尚不清楚，需通过独立验证确认。
AI.method: 在无法重新训练模型的前提下，使用四个公开数据集测试五种预训练深度模型的性能，并对比其在测试数据上的表现。
AI.result: 模型在非样本数据上表现较差，仅当使用乳腺X光检查的全部四种标准视图时性能较优。
AI.conclusion: 未来需推动更多样化和更大规模的乳腺X光数据集公开，同时应谨慎对待未提供训练模型供独立验证的研究结果。

authors_text: Arjun Majumdar,Gunjan Aggarwal,Bhavika Devnani,Judy Hoffman,Dhruv Batra
title: ZSON: Zero-Shot Object-Goal Navigation using Multimodal Goal Embeddings
title_zh: ZSON：使用多模态目标嵌入的零样本对象目标导航
abstract: We present a scalable approach for learning open-world object-goal navigation (ObjectNav) -- the task of asking a virtual robot (agent) to find any instance of an object in an unexplored environment (e.g., "find a sink"). Our approach is entirely zero-shot -- i.e., it does not require ObjectNav rewards or demonstrations of any kind. Instead, we train on the image-goal navigation (ImageNav) task, in which agents find the location where a picture (i.e., goal image) was captured. Specifically, we encode goal images into a multimodal, semantic embedding space to enable training semantic-goal navigation (SemanticNav) agents at scale in unannotated 3D environments (e.g., HM3D). After training, SemanticNav agents can be instructed to find objects described in free-form natural language (e.g., "sink", "bathroom sink", etc.) by projecting language goals into the same multimodal, semantic embedding space. As a result, our approach enables open-world ObjectNav. We extensively evaluate our agents on three ObjectNav datasets (Gibson, HM3D, and MP3D) and observe absolute improvements in success of 4.2% - 20.0% over existing zero-shot methods. For reference, these gains are similar or better than the 5% improvement in success between the Habitat 2020 and 2021 ObjectNav challenge winners. In an open-world setting, we discover that our agents can generalize to compound instructions with a room explicitly mentioned (e.g., "Find a kitchen sink") and when the target room can be inferred (e.g., "Find a sink and a stove").
summary: We present a scalable approach for learning open-world object-goal navigation (ObjectNav) -- the task of asking a virtual robot (agent) to find any instance of an object in an unexplored environment (e.g., "find a sink"). Our approach is entirely zero-shot -- i.e., it does not require ObjectNav rewards or demonstrations of any kind. Instead, we train on the image-goal navigation (ImageNav) task, in which agents find the location where a picture (i.e., goal image) was captured. Specifically, we encode goal images into a multimodal, semantic embedding space to enable training semantic-goal navigation (SemanticNav) agents at scale in unannotated 3D environments (e.g., HM3D). After training, SemanticNav agents can be instructed to find objects described in free-form natural language (e.g., "sink", "bathroom sink", etc.) by projecting language goals into the same multimodal, semantic embedding space. As a result, our approach enables open-world ObjectNav. We extensively evaluate our agents on three ObjectNav datasets (Gibson, HM3D, and MP3D) and observe absolute improvements in success of 4.2% - 20.0% over existing zero-shot methods. For reference, these gains are similar or better than the 5% improvement in success between the Habitat 2020 and 2021 ObjectNav challenge winners. In an open-world setting, we discover that our agents can generalize to compound instructions with a room explicitly mentioned (e.g., "Find a kitchen sink") and when the target room can be inferred (e.g., "Find a sink and a stove").
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于学习开放世界对象目标导航（ObjectNav）的可扩展方法——要求虚拟机器人（代理）在未探索的环境中找到对象的任何实例（例如，“找到一个水槽”）的任务。 Our approach is entirely zero-shot -- i.e., it does not require ObjectNav rewards or demonstrations of any kind.相反，我们训练图像目标导航（ImageNav）任务，其中代理找到捕获图片（即目标图像）的位置。具体来说，我们将目标图像编码到多模态语义嵌入空间中，以便能够在未注释的 3D 环境（例如 HM3D）中大规模训练语义目标导航（SemanticNav）代理。训练后，SemanticNav 代理可以通过将语言目标投影到相同的多模态语义嵌入空间中来指示以自由形式的自然语言（例如“水槽”、“浴室水槽”等）描述的对象来查找。 As a result, our approach enables open-world ObjectNav.我们在三个 ObjectNav 数据集（Gibson、HM3D 和 MP3D）上广泛评估我们的代理，并观察到与现有零样本方法相比，成功率绝对提高了 4.2% - 20.0%。作为参考，这些收益与 Habitat 2020 和 2021 年 ObjectNav 挑战赛获胜者之间 5% 的成功率提升相似或更好。在开放世界环境中，我们发现我们的代理可以概括为明确提到的房间（例如“查找厨房水槽”）以及何时可以推断目标房间（例如“查找水槽和炉子”）的复合指令。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种零样本目标导航方法ZSON，通过多模态语义嵌入空间实现虚拟机器人对未探索环境中任意物体的定位。
AI.motivation: 传统目标导航需依赖标注数据或演示，难以适应开放世界场景。本文旨在开发无需特定奖励或演示的零样本解决方案，提升机器人在未知环境中的泛化能力。
AI.method: 基于图像目标导航任务训练模型，将目标图像编码为多模态语义嵌入。通过将自然语言指令映射到同一嵌入空间，实现跨模态目标定位，无需额外标注。
AI.result: 在Gibson、HM3D和MP3D三个数据集上，成功率较现有零样本方法提升4.2%-20%，且能处理包含房间信息的复合指令（如'找到厨房水槽'）。
AI.conclusion: ZSON验证了多模态嵌入空间在零样本目标导航中的有效性，为开放世界机器人导航提供了可扩展解决方案，未来可拓展至更复杂任务场景。

ai_content.conclusion: ZSON验证了多模态嵌入空间在零样本目标导航中的有效性，为开放世界机器人导航提供了可扩展解决方案，未来可拓展至更复杂任务场景。
