search_text: ZSON: Zero-Shot Object-Goal Navigation using Multimodal Goal Embeddings ZSON：使用多模态目标嵌入的零样本对象目标导航 We present a scalable approach for learning open-world object-goal navigation (ObjectNav) -- the task of asking a virtual robot (agent) to find any instance of an object in an unexplored environment (e.g., "find a sink"). Our approach is entirely zero-shot -- i.e., it does not require ObjectNav rewards or demonstrations of any kind. Instead, we train on the image-goal navigation (ImageNav) task, in which agents find the location where a picture (i.e., goal image) was captured. Specifically, we encode goal images into a multimodal, semantic embedding space to enable training semantic-goal navigation (SemanticNav) agents at scale in unannotated 3D environments (e.g., HM3D). After training, SemanticNav agents can be instructed to find objects described in free-form natural language (e.g., "sink", "bathroom sink", etc.) by projecting language goals into the same multimodal, semantic embedding space. As a result, our approach enables open-world ObjectNav. We extensively evaluate our agents on three ObjectNav datasets (Gibson, HM3D, and MP3D) and observe absolute improvements in success of 4.2% - 20.0% over existing zero-shot methods. For reference, these gains are similar or better than the 5% improvement in success between the Habitat 2020 and 2021 ObjectNav challenge winners. In an open-world setting, we discover that our agents can generalize to compound instructions with a room explicitly mentioned (e.g., "Find a kitchen sink") and when the target room can be inferred (e.g., "Find a sink and a stove"). 我们提出了一种用于学习开放世界对象目标导航（ObjectNav）的可扩展方法——要求虚拟机器人（代理）在未探索的环境中找到对象的任何实例（例如，“找到一个水槽”）的任务。 Our approach is entirely zero-shot -- i.e., it does not require ObjectNav rewards or demonstrations of any kind.相反，我们训练图像目标导航（ImageNav）任务，其中代理找到捕获图片（即目标图像）的位置。具体来说，我们将目标图像编码到多模态语义嵌入空间中，以便能够在未注释的 3D 环境（例如 HM3D）中大规模训练语义目标导航（SemanticNav）代理。训练后，SemanticNav 代理可以通过将语言目标投影到相同的多模态语义嵌入空间中来指示以自由形式的自然语言（例如“水槽”、“浴室水槽”等）描述的对象来查找。 As a result, our approach enables open-world ObjectNav.我们在三个 ObjectNav 数据集（Gibson、HM3D 和 MP3D）上广泛评估我们的代理，并观察到与现有零样本方法相比，成功率绝对提高了 4.2% - 20.0%。作为参考，这些收益与 Habitat 2020 和 2021 年 ObjectNav 挑战赛获胜者之间 5% 的成功率提升相似或更好。在开放世界环境中，我们发现我们的代理可以概括为明确提到的房间（例如“查找厨房水槽”）以及何时可以推断目标房间（例如“查找水槽和炉子”）的复合指令。 本文提出一种零样本目标导航方法ZSON，通过多模态语义嵌入空间实现虚拟机器人对未探索环境中任意物体的定位。 Arjun Majumdar,Gunjan Aggarwal,Bhavika Devnani,Judy Hoffman,Dhruv Batra cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Text-Driven Stylization of Video Objects
title_zh: 视频对象的文本驱动风格化
abstract: We tackle the task of stylizing video objects in an intuitive and semantic manner following a user-specified text prompt. This is a challenging task as the resulting video must satisfy multiple properties: (1) it has to be temporally consistent and avoid jittering or similar artifacts, (2) the resulting stylization must preserve both the global semantics of the object and its fine-grained details, and (3) it must adhere to the user-specified text prompt. To this end, our method stylizes an object in a video according to two target texts. The first target text prompt describes the global semantics and the second target text prompt describes the local semantics. To modify the style of an object, we harness the representational power of CLIP to get a similarity score between (1) the local target text and a set of local stylized views, and (2) a global target text and a set of stylized global views. We use a pretrained atlas decomposition network to propagate the edits in a temporally consistent manner. We demonstrate that our method can generate consistent style changes over time for a variety of objects and videos, that adhere to the specification of the target texts. We also show how varying the specificity of the target texts and augmenting the texts with a set of prefixes results in stylizations with different levels of detail. Full results are given on our project webpage: https://sloeschcke.github.io/Text-Driven-Stylization-of-Video-Objects/
summary: We tackle the task of stylizing video objects in an intuitive and semantic manner following a user-specified text prompt. This is a challenging task as the resulting video must satisfy multiple properties: (1) it has to be temporally consistent and avoid jittering or similar artifacts, (2) the resulting stylization must preserve both the global semantics of the object and its fine-grained details, and (3) it must adhere to the user-specified text prompt. To this end, our method stylizes an object in a video according to two target texts. The first target text prompt describes the global semantics and the second target text prompt describes the local semantics. To modify the style of an object, we harness the representational power of CLIP to get a similarity score between (1) the local target text and a set of local stylized views, and (2) a global target text and a set of stylized global views. We use a pretrained atlas decomposition network to propagate the edits in a temporally consistent manner. We demonstrate that our method can generate consistent style changes over time for a variety of objects and videos, that adhere to the specification of the target texts. We also show how varying the specificity of the target texts and augmenting the texts with a set of prefixes results in stylizations with different levels of detail. Full results are given on our project webpage: https://sloeschcke.github.io/Text-Driven-Stylization-of-Video-Objects/
abstract_zh: 我们按照用户指定的文本提示，以直观和语义的方式处理视频对象风格化的任务。这是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为生成的视频必须满足多个属性：（1）它必须在时间上一致并避免抖动或类似的伪影，（2）生成的样式化必须保留对象的全局语义及其细粒度细节，（3）它必须遵守用户指定的文本提示。为此，我们的方法根据两个目标文本对视频中的对象进行风格化。第一目标文本提示描述全局语义，第二目标文本提示描述局部语义。为了修改对象的样式，我们利用 CLIP 的表征能力来获得 (1) 本地目标文本和一组本地风格化视图，以及 (2) 全局目标文本和一组风格化全局视图之间的相似性得分。我们使用预训练的图集分解网络以时间一致的方式传播编辑。我们证明，我们的方法可以随着时间的推移为各种对象和视频生成一致的样式变化，并且符合目标文本的规范。我们还展示了如何改变目标文本的特异性并使用一组前缀增强文本，从而产生具有不同细节级别的风格化。完整结果在我们的项目网页上给出：https://sloeschcke.github.io/Text-Driven-Stylization-of-Video-Objects/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本提示的视频对象风格化方法，通过用户指定的文本描述实现视频中物体的语义一致且时间连续的风格转换。
AI.motivation: 视频风格化需同时满足时间连续性、语义保真度和文本描述匹配三重挑战，现有方法难以兼顾全局语义与局部细节的精准控制。
AI.method: 采用双文本提示机制（全局语义+局部语义），结合CLIP模型计算文本与风格化视图的相似度，并利用预训练的atlas分解网络实现时间一致的风格传播。
AI.result: 方法在多种物体和视频上实现了符合文本描述的时序一致风格转换，通过调整文本具体性和添加前缀可控制风格细节层次。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离全局/局部语义控制和时序传播机制，有效解决了文本驱动视频风格化的多维度挑战，为文本到视频的生成提供了新思路。

title: Popular Critical Matchings in the Many-to-Many Setting
title_zh: 多对多环境中流行的关键匹配
abstract: We consider the many-to-many bipartite matching problem in the presence of two-sided preferences and two-sided lower quotas. The input to our problem is a bipartite graph G=(A U B, E), where each vertex in A U B specifies a strict preference ordering over its neighbors. Each vertex has an upper quota and a lower quota denoting the maximum and minimum number of vertices that can be assigned to it from its neighborhood. In the many-to-many setting with two-sided lower quotas, informally, a critical matching is a matching which fulfils vertex lower quotas to the maximum possible extent. This is a natural generalization of the definition of critical matching in the one-to-one setting [Kavitha T., FSTTCS 2021]. Our goal in the given problem is to find a popular matching in the set of critical matchings. A matching is popular in a given set of matchings if it remains undefeated in a head-to-head election with any matching in that set. Here, vertices cast votes between pairs of matchings. We show that there always exists a matching that is popular in the set of critical matchings. We present an efficient algorithm to compute such a matching of the largest size. We prove the popularity of our matching using a dual certificate.
summary: We consider the many-to-many bipartite matching problem in the presence of two-sided preferences and two-sided lower quotas. The input to our problem is a bipartite graph G=(A U B, E), where each vertex in A U B specifies a strict preference ordering over its neighbors. Each vertex has an upper quota and a lower quota denoting the maximum and minimum number of vertices that can be assigned to it from its neighborhood. In the many-to-many setting with two-sided lower quotas, informally, a critical matching is a matching which fulfils vertex lower quotas to the maximum possible extent. This is a natural generalization of the definition of critical matching in the one-to-one setting [Kavitha T., FSTTCS 2021]. Our goal in the given problem is to find a popular matching in the set of critical matchings. A matching is popular in a given set of matchings if it remains undefeated in a head-to-head election with any matching in that set. Here, vertices cast votes between pairs of matchings. We show that there always exists a matching that is popular in the set of critical matchings. We present an efficient algorithm to compute such a matching of the largest size. We prove the popularity of our matching using a dual certificate.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑存在双边偏好和双边较低配额的情况下的多对多双向匹配问题。我们问题的输入是一个二部图 G=(A U B, E)，其中 A U B 中的每个顶点都指定了对其邻居的严格优先顺序。每个顶点都有一个上限配额和一个下限配额，表示可以从其邻域分配给它的顶点的最大和最小数量。在具有两侧较低配额的多对多设置中，非正式地，关键匹配是最大可能程度地满足顶点较低配额的匹配。这是一对一设置中关键匹配定义的自然概括 [Kavitha T., FSTTCS 2021]。我们在给定问题中的目标是在关键匹配集中找到流行的匹配。如果某个匹配在与给定匹配组中的任何匹配项的正面选举中保持不败，则该匹配项在该组匹配项中很受欢迎。在这里，顶点在匹配对之间投票。我们表明，在关键匹配集中始终存在流行的匹配。我们提出了一种有效的算法来计算最大尺寸的匹配。我们使用双证书证明我们匹配的受欢迎程度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具有双方面偏好和下限配额的多对多匹配场景中，如何找到满足下限配额且受欢迎的匹配。
AI.motivation: 在多对多匹配问题中，确保每个参与者满足最低配额需求同时找到受欢迎的匹配具有实际意义，例如资源分配和任务调度场景。
AI.method: 通过构建双证书证明匹配的受欢迎性，并设计高效算法计算最大规模的受欢迎临界匹配。
AI.result: 证明了临界匹配集中总存在受欢迎匹配，并给出了计算该匹配的高效算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了临界匹配与受欢迎性准则，为多对多匹配问题提供了理论保证和实用算法。

search_text: Popular Critical Matchings in the Many-to-Many Setting 多对多环境中流行的关键匹配 We consider the many-to-many bipartite matching problem in the presence of two-sided preferences and two-sided lower quotas. The input to our problem is a bipartite graph G=(A U B, E), where each vertex in A U B specifies a strict preference ordering over its neighbors. Each vertex has an upper quota and a lower quota denoting the maximum and minimum number of vertices that can be assigned to it from its neighborhood. In the many-to-many setting with two-sided lower quotas, informally, a critical matching is a matching which fulfils vertex lower quotas to the maximum possible extent. This is a natural generalization of the definition of critical matching in the one-to-one setting [Kavitha T., FSTTCS 2021]. Our goal in the given problem is to find a popular matching in the set of critical matchings. A matching is popular in a given set of matchings if it remains undefeated in a head-to-head election with any matching in that set. Here, vertices cast votes between pairs of matchings. We show that there always exists a matching that is popular in the set of critical matchings. We present an efficient algorithm to compute such a matching of the largest size. We prove the popularity of our matching using a dual certificate. 我们考虑存在双边偏好和双边较低配额的情况下的多对多双向匹配问题。我们问题的输入是一个二部图 G=(A U B, E)，其中 A U B 中的每个顶点都指定了对其邻居的严格优先顺序。每个顶点都有一个上限配额和一个下限配额，表示可以从其邻域分配给它的顶点的最大和最小数量。在具有两侧较低配额的多对多设置中，非正式地，关键匹配是最大可能程度地满足顶点较低配额的匹配。这是一对一设置中关键匹配定义的自然概括 [Kavitha T., FSTTCS 2021]。我们在给定问题中的目标是在关键匹配集中找到流行的匹配。如果某个匹配在与给定匹配组中的任何匹配项的正面选举中保持不败，则该匹配项在该组匹配项中很受欢迎。在这里，顶点在匹配对之间投票。我们表明，在关键匹配集中始终存在流行的匹配。我们提出了一种有效的算法来计算最大尺寸的匹配。我们使用双证书证明我们匹配的受欢迎程度。 本文研究了在具有双方面偏好和下限配额的多对多匹配场景中，如何找到满足下限配额且受欢迎的匹配。 Meghana Nasre,Prajakta Nimbhorkar,Keshav Ranjan,Ankita Sarkar cs.DS

authors_text: Andres Campero,Michelle Vaccaro,Jaeyoon Song,Haoran Wen,Abdullah Almaatouq,Thomas W. Malone
title: A Test for Evaluating Performance in Human-Computer Systems
title_zh: 评估人机系统性能的测试
abstract: The Turing test for comparing computer performance to that of humans is well known, but, surprisingly, there is no widely used test for comparing how much better human-computer systems perform relative to humans alone, computers alone, or other baselines. Here, we show how to perform such a test using the ratio of means as a measure of effect size. Then we demonstrate the use of this test in three ways. First, in an analysis of 79 recently published experimental results, we find that, surprisingly, over half of the studies find a decrease in performance, the mean and median ratios of performance improvement are both approximately 1 (corresponding to no improvement at all), and the maximum ratio is 1.36 (a 36% improvement). Second, we experimentally investigate whether a higher performance improvement ratio is obtained when 100 human programmers generate software using GPT-3, a massive, state-of-the-art AI system. In this case, we find a speed improvement ratio of 1.27 (a 27% improvement). Finally, we find that 50 human non-programmers using GPT-3 can perform the task about as well as--and less expensively than--the human programmers. In this case, neither the non-programmers nor the computer would have been able to perform the task alone, so this is an example of a very strong form of human-computer synergy.
summary: The Turing test for comparing computer performance to that of humans is well known, but, surprisingly, there is no widely used test for comparing how much better human-computer systems perform relative to humans alone, computers alone, or other baselines. Here, we show how to perform such a test using the ratio of means as a measure of effect size. Then we demonstrate the use of this test in three ways. First, in an analysis of 79 recently published experimental results, we find that, surprisingly, over half of the studies find a decrease in performance, the mean and median ratios of performance improvement are both approximately 1 (corresponding to no improvement at all), and the maximum ratio is 1.36 (a 36% improvement). Second, we experimentally investigate whether a higher performance improvement ratio is obtained when 100 human programmers generate software using GPT-3, a massive, state-of-the-art AI system. In this case, we find a speed improvement ratio of 1.27 (a 27% improvement). Finally, we find that 50 human non-programmers using GPT-3 can perform the task about as well as--and less expensively than--the human programmers. In this case, neither the non-programmers nor the computer would have been able to perform the task alone, so this is an example of a very strong form of human-computer synergy.
abstract_zh: 用于比较计算机性能与人类性能的图灵测试是众所周知的，但令人惊讶的是，没有广泛使用的测试来比较人机系统相对于单独的人类、单独的计算机或其他基线的性能好多少。在这里，我们展示了如何使用均值比作为效应大小的度量来执行此类检验。然后我们通过三种方式演示该测试的使用。首先，在对最近发表的 79 个实验结果的分析中，我们令人惊讶地发现，超过一半的研究发现性能有所下降，性能改善的平均值和中位数比率均约为 1（相当于根本没有改善），最大比率为 1.36（改善了 36%）。其次，我们通过实验研究当 100 名人类程序员使用 GPT-3（一个大规模、最先进的人工智能系统）生成软件时是否可以获得更高的性能改进率。在这种情况下，我们发现速度提高率为 1.27（提高了 27%）。最后，我们发现 50 名使用 GPT-3 的人类非程序员可以执行与人类程序员一样好的任务，而且成本更低。在这种情况下，非程序员和计算机都无法单独执行任务，因此这是人机协同作用的一个非常强大的例子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种评估人机系统性能的新方法，通过比较人类、计算机及人机协同的性能差异，验证人机协同效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管图灵测试被广泛用于比较计算机与人类性能，但缺乏有效评估人机系统相对于人类或计算机单独表现的标准化测试方法。
AI.method: 采用均值比作为效应量指标，通过三类实验验证：分析79项研究数据、测试GPT-3辅助程序员的效率、对比非程序员与程序员使用GPT-3的性能差异。
AI.result: 79项研究中半数显示性能下降，均值比接近1（无提升）；GPT-3使程序员效率提升27%，非程序员使用GPT-3的性能接近程序员且成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 人机协同可实现显著性能提升，但整体改进有限，需进一步探索优化协同模式的方法。

authors_text: Khoa D. Doan,Yingjie Lao,Peng Yang,Ping Li
title: Defending Backdoor Attacks on Vision Transformer via Patch Processing
title_zh: 通过补丁处理防御对 Vision Transformer 的后门攻击
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have a radically different architecture with significantly less inductive bias than Convolutional Neural Networks. Along with the improvement in performance, security and robustness of ViTs are also of great importance to study. In contrast to many recent works that exploit the robustness of ViTs against adversarial examples, this paper investigates a representative causative attack, i.e., backdoor. We first examine the vulnerability of ViTs against various backdoor attacks and find that ViTs are also quite vulnerable to existing attacks. However, we observe that the clean-data accuracy and backdoor attack success rate of ViTs respond distinctively to patch transformations before the positional encoding. Then, based on this finding, we propose an effective method for ViTs to defend both patch-based and blending-based trigger backdoor attacks via patch processing. The performances are evaluated on several benchmark datasets, including CIFAR10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet, which show the proposed novel defense is very successful in mitigating backdoor attacks for ViTs. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first defensive strategy that utilizes a unique characteristic of ViTs against backdoor attacks. The paper will appear in the Proceedings of the AAAI'23 Conference. This work was initially submitted in November 2021 to CVPR'22, then it was re-submitted to ECCV'22. The paper was made public in June 2022. The authors sincerely thank all the referees from the Program Committees of CVPR'22, ECCV'22, and AAAI'23.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have a radically different architecture with significantly less inductive bias than Convolutional Neural Networks. Along with the improvement in performance, security and robustness of ViTs are also of great importance to study. In contrast to many recent works that exploit the robustness of ViTs against adversarial examples, this paper investigates a representative causative attack, i.e., backdoor. We first examine the vulnerability of ViTs against various backdoor attacks and find that ViTs are also quite vulnerable to existing attacks. However, we observe that the clean-data accuracy and backdoor attack success rate of ViTs respond distinctively to patch transformations before the positional encoding. Then, based on this finding, we propose an effective method for ViTs to defend both patch-based and blending-based trigger backdoor attacks via patch processing. The performances are evaluated on several benchmark datasets, including CIFAR10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet, which show the proposed novel defense is very successful in mitigating backdoor attacks for ViTs. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first defensive strategy that utilizes a unique characteristic of ViTs against backdoor attacks. The paper will appear in the Proceedings of the AAAI'23 Conference. This work was initially submitted in November 2021 to CVPR'22, then it was re-submitted to ECCV'22. The paper was made public in June 2022. The authors sincerely thank all the referees from the Program Committees of CVPR'22, ECCV'22, and AAAI'23.
abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 具有完全不同的架构，其归纳偏差比卷积神经网络要少得多。随着性能的提高，ViT 的安全性和鲁棒性也具有重要的研究意义。与最近许多利用 ViT 对抗对抗性示例的鲁棒性的研究相比，本文研究了一种代表性的因果攻击，即后门。我们首先检查 ViT 对抗各种后门攻击的脆弱性，发现 ViT 也很容易受到现有攻击的影响。然而，我们观察到 ViT 的干净数据准确性和后门攻击成功率对位置编码之前的补丁转换有明显的响应。然后，基于这一发现，我们提出了一种有效的 ViT 方法，通过补丁处理来防御基于补丁和基于混合的触发后门攻击。在多个基准数据集（包括 CIFAR10、GTSRB 和 TinyImageNet）上对性能进行了评估，这表明所提出的新颖防御方法在减轻 ViT 后门攻击方面非常成功。据我们所知，本文提出了第一个利用 ViT 独特特性来抵御后门攻击的防御策略。该论文将发表在 AAAI'23 会议记录中。这项工作最初于 2021 年 11 月提交给 CVPR'22，然后重新提交给 ECCV'22。该论文于2022年6月公开。作者衷心感谢CVPR'22、ECCV'22和AAAI'23程序委员会的所有审稿人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过补丁处理方法防御视觉Transformer（ViT）中的后门攻击。
AI.motivation: ViT相较于卷积神经网络具有更少的归纳偏置，但其安全性尚未充分研究。现有工作多关注对抗样本，而针对ViT的后门攻击防御研究较少，需探索有效防御方法。
AI.method: 通过分析ViT在位置编码前对补丁变换的响应特性，提出一种补丁处理方法，有效防御基于补丁和混合触发器的后门攻击。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、GTSRB和TinyImageNet数据集上验证，该方法显著缓解了ViT的后门攻击问题，是首个利用ViT特性进行后门防御的策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的补丁处理方法为ViT后门攻击防御提供了新颖且有效的解决方案，具有重要的研究价值。

search_text: Defending Backdoor Attacks on Vision Transformer via Patch Processing 通过补丁处理防御对 Vision Transformer 的后门攻击 Vision Transformers (ViTs) have a radically different architecture with significantly less inductive bias than Convolutional Neural Networks. Along with the improvement in performance, security and robustness of ViTs are also of great importance to study. In contrast to many recent works that exploit the robustness of ViTs against adversarial examples, this paper investigates a representative causative attack, i.e., backdoor. We first examine the vulnerability of ViTs against various backdoor attacks and find that ViTs are also quite vulnerable to existing attacks. However, we observe that the clean-data accuracy and backdoor attack success rate of ViTs respond distinctively to patch transformations before the positional encoding. Then, based on this finding, we propose an effective method for ViTs to defend both patch-based and blending-based trigger backdoor attacks via patch processing. The performances are evaluated on several benchmark datasets, including CIFAR10, GTSRB, and TinyImageNet, which show the proposed novel defense is very successful in mitigating backdoor attacks for ViTs. To the best of our knowledge, this paper presents the first defensive strategy that utilizes a unique characteristic of ViTs against backdoor attacks. The paper will appear in the Proceedings of the AAAI'23 Conference. This work was initially submitted in November 2021 to CVPR'22, then it was re-submitted to ECCV'22. The paper was made public in June 2022. The authors sincerely thank all the referees from the Program Committees of CVPR'22, ECCV'22, and AAAI'23. 视觉变压器 (ViT) 具有完全不同的架构，其归纳偏差比卷积神经网络要少得多。随着性能的提高，ViT 的安全性和鲁棒性也具有重要的研究意义。与最近许多利用 ViT 对抗对抗性示例的鲁棒性的研究相比，本文研究了一种代表性的因果攻击，即后门。我们首先检查 ViT 对抗各种后门攻击的脆弱性，发现 ViT 也很容易受到现有攻击的影响。然而，我们观察到 ViT 的干净数据准确性和后门攻击成功率对位置编码之前的补丁转换有明显的响应。然后，基于这一发现，我们提出了一种有效的 ViT 方法，通过补丁处理来防御基于补丁和基于混合的触发后门攻击。在多个基准数据集（包括 CIFAR10、GTSRB 和 TinyImageNet）上对性能进行了评估，这表明所提出的新颖防御方法在减轻 ViT 后门攻击方面非常成功。据我们所知，本文提出了第一个利用 ViT 独特特性来抵御后门攻击的防御策略。该论文将发表在 AAAI'23 会议记录中。这项工作最初于 2021 年 11 月提交给 CVPR'22，然后重新提交给 ECCV'22。该论文于2022年6月公开。作者衷心感谢CVPR'22、ECCV'22和AAAI'23程序委员会的所有审稿人。 本文提出通过补丁处理方法防御视觉Transformer（ViT）中的后门攻击。 Khoa D. Doan,Yingjie Lao,Peng Yang,Ping Li cs.CV

title: A transient equivalence between Aldous-Broder and Wilson's algorithms and a two-stage framework for generating uniform spanning trees
title_zh: Aldous-Broder 和 Wilson 算法与生成统一生成树的两阶段框架之间的瞬态等价
abstract: The $Aldous\text{-}Broder$ and $Wilson$ are two well-known algorithms to generate uniform spanning trees (USTs) based on random walks. This work studies their relationship while they construct random trees with the goal of reducing the total time required to build the spanning tree. Using the notion of $branches$ $-$ paths generated by the two algorithms on particular stopping times, we show that the trees built by the two algorithms when running on a complete graph are statistically equivalent on these stopping times. This leads to a hybrid algorithm that can generate uniform spanning trees of complete graphs faster than either of the two algorithms. An efficient two-stage framework is also proposed to explore this hybrid approach beyond complete graphs, showing its feasibility in various examples, including transitive graphs where it requires 25% less time than $Wilson$ to generate a UST.
summary: The $Aldous\text{-}Broder$ and $Wilson$ are two well-known algorithms to generate uniform spanning trees (USTs) based on random walks. This work studies their relationship while they construct random trees with the goal of reducing the total time required to build the spanning tree. Using the notion of $branches$ $-$ paths generated by the two algorithms on particular stopping times, we show that the trees built by the two algorithms when running on a complete graph are statistically equivalent on these stopping times. This leads to a hybrid algorithm that can generate uniform spanning trees of complete graphs faster than either of the two algorithms. An efficient two-stage framework is also proposed to explore this hybrid approach beyond complete graphs, showing its feasibility in various examples, including transitive graphs where it requires 25% less time than $Wilson$ to generate a UST.
abstract_zh: $Aldous\text{-}Broder$ 和 $Wilson$ 是两种著名的基于随机游走生成均匀生成树 (UST) 的算法。 This work studies their relationship while they construct random trees with the goal of reducing the total time required to build the spanning tree. Using the notion of $branches$ $-$ paths generated by the two algorithms on particular stopping times, we show that the trees built by the two algorithms when running on a complete graph are statistically equivalent on these stopping times.这导致了一种混合算法，它可以比这两种算法中的任何一种更快地生成完整图的统一生成树。 An efficient two-stage framework is also proposed to explore this hybrid approach beyond complete graphs, showing its feasibility in various examples, including transitive graphs where it requires 25% less time than $Wilson$ to generate a UST.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Aldous-Broder与Wilson算法在生成均匀生成树（UST）时的瞬时等价性，并提出一种两阶段框架以提高生成效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在生成UST时存在时间效率瓶颈，需探索更优的混合方法以减少计算时间。
AI.method: 通过定义特定停止时间下的'分支'路径，证明两种算法在完全图上的统计等价性，并设计混合算法与两阶段框架。
AI.result: 混合算法在完全图上生成UST速度优于单一算法，两阶段框架在传递图中较Wilson算法节省25%时间。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在保持均匀性的同时提升了UST生成效率，为大规模图的随机生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: MohammadHossein AskariHemmat,Reyhane Askari Hemmat,Alex Hoffman,Ivan Lazarevich,Ehsan Saboori,Olivier Mastropietro,Sudhakar Sah,Yvon Savaria,Jean-Pierre David
title: QReg: On Regularization Effects of Quantization
title_zh: QReg：论量化的正则化效应
abstract: In this paper we study the effects of quantization in DNN training. We hypothesize that weight quantization is a form of regularization and the amount of regularization is correlated with the quantization level (precision). We confirm our hypothesis by providing analytical study and empirical results. By modeling weight quantization as a form of additive noise to weights, we explore how this noise propagates through the network at training time. We then show that the magnitude of this noise is correlated with the level of quantization. To confirm our analytical study, we performed an extensive list of experiments summarized in this paper in which we show that the regularization effects of quantization can be seen in various vision tasks and models, over various datasets. Based on our study, we propose that 8-bit quantization provides a reliable form of regularization in different vision tasks and models.
summary: In this paper we study the effects of quantization in DNN training. We hypothesize that weight quantization is a form of regularization and the amount of regularization is correlated with the quantization level (precision). We confirm our hypothesis by providing analytical study and empirical results. By modeling weight quantization as a form of additive noise to weights, we explore how this noise propagates through the network at training time. We then show that the magnitude of this noise is correlated with the level of quantization. To confirm our analytical study, we performed an extensive list of experiments summarized in this paper in which we show that the regularization effects of quantization can be seen in various vision tasks and models, over various datasets. Based on our study, we propose that 8-bit quantization provides a reliable form of regularization in different vision tasks and models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了 DNN 训练中量化的影响。我们假设权重量化是正则化的一种形式，正则化的量与量化级别（精度）相关。我们通过提供分析研究和实证结果来证实我们的假设。通过将权重量化建模为权重加性噪声的一种形式，我们探索了这种噪声在训练时如何通过网络传播。然后我们证明该噪声的大小与量化水平相关。为了证实我们的分析研究，我们进行了本文中总结的大量实验，其中我们表明量化的正则化效果可以在各种视觉任务和模型中以及各种数据集上看到。根据我们的研究，我们提出 8 位量化在不同的视觉任务和模型中提供了可靠的正则化形式。

AI.tldr: 本文研究量化对深度神经网络训练的正则化效应，提出量化级别与正则化强度相关，并验证了8位量化在视觉任务中的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 量化通常用于模型压缩，但其对训练过程的影响机制尚不明确。作者假设量化本质是正则化手段，旨在揭示其作用机制并提供可靠的训练策略。
AI.method: 将权重量化建模为加性噪声，分析噪声在训练过程中的传播路径，并通过多数据集、多模型的视觉任务实验验证量化正则化效果。
AI.result: 实验表明量化噪声强度与精度水平相关，8位量化在多种视觉任务中展现出稳定的正则化效果，能提升模型泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 量化可作为有效的正则化方法，8位量化在视觉任务中具有普适性和可靠性，为训练优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yiqing Shen,Liwu Xu,Yuzhe Yang,Yaqian Li,Yandong Guo
title: Mixed Sample Augmentation for Online Distillation
title_zh: 用于在线蒸馏的混合样品增强
abstract: Mixed Sample Regularization (MSR), such as MixUp or CutMix, is a powerful data augmentation strategy to generalize convolutional neural networks. Previous empirical analysis has illustrated an orthogonal performance gain between MSR and conventional offline Knowledge Distillation (KD). To be more specific, student networks can be enhanced with the involvement of MSR in the training stage of sequential distillation. Yet, the interplay between MSR and online knowledge distillation, where an ensemble of peer students learn mutually from each other, remains unexplored. To bridge the gap, we make the first attempt at incorporating CutMix into online distillation, where we empirically observe a significant improvement. Encouraged by this fact, we propose an even stronger MSR specifically for online distillation, named as Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix. Furthermore, a novel online distillation framework is designed upon Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix, to enhance the distillation with feature level mutual learning and a self-ensemble teacher. Comprehensive evaluations on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 with six network architectures show that our approach can consistently outperform state-of-the-art distillation methods.
summary: Mixed Sample Regularization (MSR), such as MixUp or CutMix, is a powerful data augmentation strategy to generalize convolutional neural networks. Previous empirical analysis has illustrated an orthogonal performance gain between MSR and conventional offline Knowledge Distillation (KD). To be more specific, student networks can be enhanced with the involvement of MSR in the training stage of sequential distillation. Yet, the interplay between MSR and online knowledge distillation, where an ensemble of peer students learn mutually from each other, remains unexplored. To bridge the gap, we make the first attempt at incorporating CutMix into online distillation, where we empirically observe a significant improvement. Encouraged by this fact, we propose an even stronger MSR specifically for online distillation, named as Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix. Furthermore, a novel online distillation framework is designed upon Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix, to enhance the distillation with feature level mutual learning and a self-ensemble teacher. Comprehensive evaluations on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 with six network architectures show that our approach can consistently outperform state-of-the-art distillation methods.
abstract_zh: 混合样本正则化 (MSR)，例如 MixUp 或 CutMix，是一种强大的数据增强策略，用于泛化卷积神经网络。 Previous empirical analysis has illustrated an orthogonal performance gain between MSR and conventional offline Knowledge Distillation (KD). To be more specific, student networks can be enhanced with the involvement of MSR in the training stage of sequential distillation.然而，MSR 与在线知识蒸馏（一群同学相互学习）之间的相互作用尚未得到探索。为了弥补这一差距，我们首次尝试将 CutMix 纳入在线蒸馏中，根据经验观察到显着的改进。 Encouraged by this fact, we propose an even stronger MSR specifically for online distillation, named as Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix.此外，在 Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix 上设计了一种新颖的在线蒸馏框架，通过特征级相互学习和自集成教师来增强蒸馏。对具有六种网络架构的 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 的综合评估表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的蒸馏方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将CutMix与在线知识蒸馏结合，设计CutⁿMix方法及新型框架以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示混合样本正则化（MSR）与离线知识蒸馏（KD）效果正交，但MSR与在线蒸馏（学生间互学）的协同机制尚未被探索。
AI.method: 提出CutⁿMix增强方法，并构建包含特征级互学与自集成教师的在线蒸馏框架。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100数据集上，使用六种网络架构验证了该方法持续优于现有蒸馏技术。
AI.conclusion: CutⁿMix与新型框架有效融合了MSR与在线蒸馏，为知识蒸馏提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出将CutMix与在线知识蒸馏结合，设计CutⁿMix方法及新型框架以提升模型性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究显示混合样本正则化（MSR）与离线知识蒸馏（KD）效果正交，但MSR与在线蒸馏（学生间互学）的协同机制尚未被探索。

ai_content.result: 在CIFAR10/100数据集上，使用六种网络架构验证了该方法持续优于现有蒸馏技术。

search_text: Mixed Sample Augmentation for Online Distillation 用于在线蒸馏的混合样品增强 Mixed Sample Regularization (MSR), such as MixUp or CutMix, is a powerful data augmentation strategy to generalize convolutional neural networks. Previous empirical analysis has illustrated an orthogonal performance gain between MSR and conventional offline Knowledge Distillation (KD). To be more specific, student networks can be enhanced with the involvement of MSR in the training stage of sequential distillation. Yet, the interplay between MSR and online knowledge distillation, where an ensemble of peer students learn mutually from each other, remains unexplored. To bridge the gap, we make the first attempt at incorporating CutMix into online distillation, where we empirically observe a significant improvement. Encouraged by this fact, we propose an even stronger MSR specifically for online distillation, named as Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix. Furthermore, a novel online distillation framework is designed upon Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix, to enhance the distillation with feature level mutual learning and a self-ensemble teacher. Comprehensive evaluations on CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 with six network architectures show that our approach can consistently outperform state-of-the-art distillation methods. 混合样本正则化 (MSR)，例如 MixUp 或 CutMix，是一种强大的数据增强策略，用于泛化卷积神经网络。 Previous empirical analysis has illustrated an orthogonal performance gain between MSR and conventional offline Knowledge Distillation (KD). To be more specific, student networks can be enhanced with the involvement of MSR in the training stage of sequential distillation.然而，MSR 与在线知识蒸馏（一群同学相互学习）之间的相互作用尚未得到探索。为了弥补这一差距，我们首次尝试将 CutMix 纳入在线蒸馏中，根据经验观察到显着的改进。 Encouraged by this fact, we propose an even stronger MSR specifically for online distillation, named as Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix.此外，在 Cut\textsuperscript{n}Mix 上设计了一种新颖的在线蒸馏框架，通过特征级相互学习和自集成教师来增强蒸馏。对具有六种网络架构的 CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 的综合评估表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的蒸馏方法。 本文提出将CutMix与在线知识蒸馏结合，设计CutⁿMix方法及新型框架以提升模型性能。 Yiqing Shen,Liwu Xu,Yuzhe Yang,Yaqian Li,Yandong Guo cs.CV

authors_text: Akhter Al Amin,Saad Hassan,Cecilia O. Alm,Matt Huenerfauth
title: Using BERT Embeddings to Model Word Importance in Conversational Transcripts for Deaf and Hard of Hearing Users
title_zh: 使用 BERT 嵌入对聋哑和听力障碍用户的对话记录中的单词重要性进行建模
abstract: Deaf and hard of hearing individuals regularly rely on captioning while watching live TV. Live TV captioning is evaluated by regulatory agencies using various caption evaluation metrics. However, caption evaluation metrics are often not informed by preferences of DHH users or how meaningful the captions are. There is a need to construct caption evaluation metrics that take the relative importance of words in a transcript into account. We conducted correlation analysis between two types of word embeddings and human-annotated labeled word-importance scores in existing corpus. We found that normalized contextualized word embeddings generated using BERT correlated better with manually annotated importance scores than word2vec-based word embeddings. We make available a pairing of word embeddings and their human-annotated importance scores. We also provide proof-of-concept utility by training word importance models, achieving an F1-score of 0.57 in the 6-class word importance classification task.
summary: Deaf and hard of hearing individuals regularly rely on captioning while watching live TV. Live TV captioning is evaluated by regulatory agencies using various caption evaluation metrics. However, caption evaluation metrics are often not informed by preferences of DHH users or how meaningful the captions are. There is a need to construct caption evaluation metrics that take the relative importance of words in a transcript into account. We conducted correlation analysis between two types of word embeddings and human-annotated labeled word-importance scores in existing corpus. We found that normalized contextualized word embeddings generated using BERT correlated better with manually annotated importance scores than word2vec-based word embeddings. We make available a pairing of word embeddings and their human-annotated importance scores. We also provide proof-of-concept utility by training word importance models, achieving an F1-score of 0.57 in the 6-class word importance classification task.
abstract_zh: 失聪和听力障碍人士在观看直播电视时经常依赖字幕。监管机构使用各种字幕评估指标对直播电视字幕进行评估。然而，字幕评估指标通常不考虑 DHH 用户的偏好或字幕的意义。需要构建考虑转录本中单词的相对重要性的标题评估指标。我们对现有语料库中两种类型的词嵌入和人工注释的标记词重要性分数之间进行了相关性分析。 We found that normalized contextualized word embeddings generated using BERT correlated better with manually annotated importance scores than word2vec-based word embeddings.我们提供了一对词嵌入及其人工注释的重要性得分。 We also provide proof-of-concept utility by training word importance models, achieving an F1-score of 0.57 in the 6-class word importance classification task.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用BERT嵌入模型来评估对话转录中词语的重要性，以提升听障及听力障碍用户使用的字幕质量评估体系。
AI.motivation: 现有字幕评估指标未充分考虑听障用户对词语重要性的实际需求，需开发更符合用户需求的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过对比分析BERT与word2vec词嵌入与人工标注词语重要性评分的相关性，构建基于BERT的归一化上下文词嵌入模型，并训练分类任务验证效果。
AI.result: BERT嵌入与人工评分相关性优于word2vec，实现6分类词重要性识别任务F1分数0.57，公开词嵌入与重要性评分数据集。
AI.conclusion: BERT嵌入能有效捕捉词语语境重要性，为听障用户字幕质量评估提供新方法论与数据支持。

title: Robustness to corruption in pre-trained Bayesian neural networks
title_zh: 预训练贝叶斯神经网络对腐败的鲁棒性
comment: Published in the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
comments: Published in the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
abstract: We develop ShiftMatch, a new training-data-dependent likelihood for robustness to corruption in Bayesian neural networks (BNNs). ShiftMatch is inspired by the training-data-dependent "EmpCov" priors from Izmailov et al. (2021a), and efficiently matches test-time spatial correlations to those at training time. Critically, ShiftMatch is designed to leave the neural network's training time likelihood unchanged, allowing it to use publicly available samples from pre-trained BNNs. Using pre-trained HMC samples, ShiftMatch gives strong performance improvements on CIFAR-10-C, outperforms EmpCov priors (though ShiftMatch uses extra information from a minibatch of corrupted test points), and is perhaps the first Bayesian method capable of convincingly outperforming plain deep ensembles.
summary: We develop ShiftMatch, a new training-data-dependent likelihood for robustness to corruption in Bayesian neural networks (BNNs). ShiftMatch is inspired by the training-data-dependent "EmpCov" priors from Izmailov et al. (2021a), and efficiently matches test-time spatial correlations to those at training time. Critically, ShiftMatch is designed to leave the neural network's training time likelihood unchanged, allowing it to use publicly available samples from pre-trained BNNs. Using pre-trained HMC samples, ShiftMatch gives strong performance improvements on CIFAR-10-C, outperforms EmpCov priors (though ShiftMatch uses extra information from a minibatch of corrupted test points), and is perhaps the first Bayesian method capable of convincingly outperforming plain deep ensembles.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了 ShiftMatch，这是一种新的依赖于训练数据的可能性，可提高贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 中的腐败鲁棒性。 ShiftMatch 的灵感来自于 Izmailov 等人的依赖于训练数据的“EmpCov”先验。 (2021a)，并有效地将测试时的空间相关性与训练时的空间相关性相匹配。至关重要的是，ShiftMatch 的设计目的是保持神经网络的训练时间可能性不变，从而允许它使用来自预训练 BNN 的公开可用样本。使用预先训练的 HMC 样本，ShiftMatch 在 CIFAR-10-C 上提​​供了强大的性能改进，优于 EmpCov 先验（尽管 ShiftMatch 使用来自损坏测试点的小批量的额外信息），并且可能是第一个能够令人信服地优于普通深度集成的贝叶斯方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShiftMatch方法，通过改进贝叶斯神经网络的训练数据依赖似然，提升其对损坏数据的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 预训练贝叶斯神经网络在应对损坏数据时表现不足，需设计新方法保持训练时似然不变并利用预训练样本提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于EmpCov先验设计ShiftMatch，匹配测试时与训练时的空间相关性，同时保持训练似然不变，利用预训练HMC样本进行优化。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10-C数据集上显著优于EmpCov先验，且可能成为首个性能超越普通深度集成的贝叶斯方法。
AI.conclusion: ShiftMatch有效增强了预训练BNN的损坏鲁棒性，验证了训练数据依赖似然设计的有效性与实用性。

title: HM3D-ABO: A Photo-realistic Dataset for Object-centric Multi-view 3D Reconstruction
title_zh: HM3D-ABO：用于以对象为中心的多视图 3D 重建的逼真数据集
abstract: Reconstructing 3D objects is an important computer vision task that has wide application in AR/VR. Deep learning algorithm developed for this task usually relies on an unrealistic synthetic dataset, such as ShapeNet and Things3D. On the other hand, existing real-captured object-centric datasets usually do not have enough annotation to enable supervised training or reliable evaluation. In this technical report, we present a photo-realistic object-centric dataset HM3D-ABO. It is constructed by composing realistic indoor scene and realistic object. For each configuration, we provide multi-view RGB observations, a water-tight mesh model for the object, ground truth depth map and object mask. The proposed dataset could also be useful for tasks such as camera pose estimation and novel-view synthesis. The dataset generation code is released at https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/HM3D-ABO.
summary: Reconstructing 3D objects is an important computer vision task that has wide application in AR/VR. Deep learning algorithm developed for this task usually relies on an unrealistic synthetic dataset, such as ShapeNet and Things3D. On the other hand, existing real-captured object-centric datasets usually do not have enough annotation to enable supervised training or reliable evaluation. In this technical report, we present a photo-realistic object-centric dataset HM3D-ABO. It is constructed by composing realistic indoor scene and realistic object. For each configuration, we provide multi-view RGB observations, a water-tight mesh model for the object, ground truth depth map and object mask. The proposed dataset could also be useful for tasks such as camera pose estimation and novel-view synthesis. The dataset generation code is released at https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/HM3D-ABO.
abstract_zh: 重建 3D 对象是一项重要的计算机视觉任务，在 AR/VR 中有着广泛的应用。为此任务开发的深度学习算法通常依赖于不切实际的合成数据集，例如 ShapeNet 和 Things3D。另一方面，现有的真实捕获的以对象为中心的数据集通常没有足够的注释来支持监督训练或可靠的评估。在这份技术报告中，我们提出了一个逼真的以对象为中心的数据集 HM3D-ABO。它是由真实的室内场景和真实的物体组合而成。对于每种配置，我们提供多视图 RGB 观察、对象的防水网格模型、地面真实深度图和对象掩模。所提出的数据集对于相机姿态估计和新颖视图合成等任务也很有用。数据集生成代码发布于https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/HM3D-ABO。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为HM3D-ABO的高质量真实感物体中心多视角3D重建数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有3D重建数据集要么依赖不真实的合成数据（如ShapeNet），要么缺乏足够的标注信息，难以支持监督训练和可靠评估。
AI.method: 通过组合真实室内场景与物体生成数据集，提供多视角RGB图像、物体水密网格模型、真实深度图和物体掩码。
AI.result: 构建了包含多模态标注的高质量数据集，并开源生成代码，可应用于相机位姿估计和新视角合成等任务。
AI.conclusion: HM3D-ABO数据集有效解决了现有数据集的局限性，为物体中心3D重建及相关任务提供了更可靠的训练与评估资源。

search_text: HM3D-ABO: A Photo-realistic Dataset for Object-centric Multi-view 3D Reconstruction HM3D-ABO：用于以对象为中心的多视图 3D 重建的逼真数据集 Reconstructing 3D objects is an important computer vision task that has wide application in AR/VR. Deep learning algorithm developed for this task usually relies on an unrealistic synthetic dataset, such as ShapeNet and Things3D. On the other hand, existing real-captured object-centric datasets usually do not have enough annotation to enable supervised training or reliable evaluation. In this technical report, we present a photo-realistic object-centric dataset HM3D-ABO. It is constructed by composing realistic indoor scene and realistic object. For each configuration, we provide multi-view RGB observations, a water-tight mesh model for the object, ground truth depth map and object mask. The proposed dataset could also be useful for tasks such as camera pose estimation and novel-view synthesis. The dataset generation code is released at https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/HM3D-ABO. 重建 3D 对象是一项重要的计算机视觉任务，在 AR/VR 中有着广泛的应用。为此任务开发的深度学习算法通常依赖于不切实际的合成数据集，例如 ShapeNet 和 Things3D。另一方面，现有的真实捕获的以对象为中心的数据集通常没有足够的注释来支持监督训练或可靠的评估。在这份技术报告中，我们提出了一个逼真的以对象为中心的数据集 HM3D-ABO。它是由真实的室内场景和真实的物体组合而成。对于每种配置，我们提供多视图 RGB 观察、对象的防水网格模型、地面真实深度图和对象掩模。所提出的数据集对于相机姿态估计和新颖视图合成等任务也很有用。数据集生成代码发布于https://github.com/zhenpeiyang/HM3D-ABO。 本文提出一个名为HM3D-ABO的高质量真实感物体中心多视角3D重建数据集。 Zhenpei Yang,Zaiwei Zhang,Qixing Huang cs.CV

title: Megapixel Image Generation with Step-Unrolled Denoising Autoencoders
title_zh: 使用逐步展开的去噪自动编码器生成百万像素图像
abstract: An ongoing trend in generative modelling research has been to push sample resolutions higher whilst simultaneously reducing computational requirements for training and sampling. We aim to push this trend further via the combination of techniques - each component representing the current pinnacle of efficiency in their respective areas. These include vector-quantized GAN (VQ-GAN), a vector-quantization (VQ) model capable of high levels of lossy - but perceptually insignificant - compression; hourglass transformers, a highly scaleable self-attention model; and step-unrolled denoising autoencoders (SUNDAE), a non-autoregressive (NAR) text generative model. Unexpectedly, our method highlights weaknesses in the original formulation of hourglass transformers when applied to multidimensional data. In light of this, we propose modifications to the resampling mechanism, applicable in any task applying hierarchical transformers to multidimensional data. Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of SUNDAE to long sequence lengths - four times longer than prior work. Our proposed framework scales to high-resolutions ($1024 \times 1024$) and trains quickly (2-4 days). Crucially, the trained model produces diverse and realistic megapixel samples in approximately 2 seconds on a consumer-grade GPU (GTX 1080Ti). In general, the framework is flexible: supporting an arbitrary number of sampling steps, sample-wise self-stopping, self-correction capabilities, conditional generation, and a NAR formulation that allows for arbitrary inpainting masks. We obtain FID scores of 10.56 on FFHQ256 - close to the original VQ-GAN in less than half the sampling steps - and 21.85 on FFHQ1024 in only 100 sampling steps.
summary: An ongoing trend in generative modelling research has been to push sample resolutions higher whilst simultaneously reducing computational requirements for training and sampling. We aim to push this trend further via the combination of techniques - each component representing the current pinnacle of efficiency in their respective areas. These include vector-quantized GAN (VQ-GAN), a vector-quantization (VQ) model capable of high levels of lossy - but perceptually insignificant - compression; hourglass transformers, a highly scaleable self-attention model; and step-unrolled denoising autoencoders (SUNDAE), a non-autoregressive (NAR) text generative model. Unexpectedly, our method highlights weaknesses in the original formulation of hourglass transformers when applied to multidimensional data. In light of this, we propose modifications to the resampling mechanism, applicable in any task applying hierarchical transformers to multidimensional data. Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of SUNDAE to long sequence lengths - four times longer than prior work. Our proposed framework scales to high-resolutions ($1024 \times 1024$) and trains quickly (2-4 days). Crucially, the trained model produces diverse and realistic megapixel samples in approximately 2 seconds on a consumer-grade GPU (GTX 1080Ti). In general, the framework is flexible: supporting an arbitrary number of sampling steps, sample-wise self-stopping, self-correction capabilities, conditional generation, and a NAR formulation that allows for arbitrary inpainting masks. We obtain FID scores of 10.56 on FFHQ256 - close to the original VQ-GAN in less than half the sampling steps - and 21.85 on FFHQ1024 in only 100 sampling steps.
abstract_zh: 生成模型研究的一个持续趋势是提高样本分辨率，同时减少训练和采样的计算要求。我们的目标是通过技术组合进一步推动这一趋势——每个组件都代表了各自领域当前效率的巅峰。其中包括矢量量化 GAN (VQ-GAN)，这是一种矢量量化 (VQ) 模型，能够进行高水平的有损压缩（但在感知上微不足道）； hourglass transformers, a highly scaleable self-attention model; and step-unrolled denoising autoencoders (SUNDAE), a non-autoregressive (NAR) text generative model. Unexpectedly, our method highlights weaknesses in the original formulation of hourglass transformers when applied to multidimensional data.鉴于此，我们建议对重采样机制进行修改，适用于将分层变换器应用于多维数据的任何任务。 Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of SUNDAE to long sequence lengths - four times longer than prior work. Our proposed framework scales to high-resolutions ($1024 \times 1024$) and trains quickly (2-4 days). Crucially, the trained model produces diverse and realistic megapixel samples in approximately 2 seconds on a consumer-grade GPU (GTX 1080Ti).一般来说，该框架是灵活的：支持任意数量的采样步骤、样本自停止、自校正功能、条件生成以及允许任意修复掩模的 NAR 公式。我们在 FFHQ256 上获得了 10.56 的 FID 分数（在不到一半的采样步骤中接近原始 VQ-GAN），在 FFHQ1024 上仅用了 100 个采样步骤就获得了 21.85 的 FID 分数。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合矢量量化生成对抗网络(VQ-GAN)、改进的沙漏变换器和可扩展的步长展开去噪自编码器(SUNDAE)的框架，用于生成高分辨率(1024×1024)的高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 在生成模型研究中，提高样本分辨率同时降低计算需求是重要趋势。现有方法在效率或质量上存在不足，需探索更高效的多技术组合方案。
AI.method: 融合VQ-GAN的高效压缩能力、改进的沙漏变换器(修正多维数据重采样机制)以及扩展至长序列的SUNDAE模型，构建非自回归文本生成框架，支持条件生成、自修正和任意修复掩码。
AI.result: 在FFHQ256数据集上获得10.56的FID分数(原VQ-GAN的1/2采样步数)，在FFHQ1024上21.85的FID分数(仅需100采样步)；消费级GPU(1080Ti)2秒生成高质量1024×1024图像。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架在保持高分辨率生成质量的同时显著提升效率，通过技术改进解决了沙漏变换器的多维数据缺陷，验证了非自回归模型在长序列任务中的扩展性。

authors_text: Flavia Sofia Acerbo,Jan Swevers,Tinne Tuytelaars,Tong Duy Son
title: MPC-based Imitation Learning for Safe and Human-like Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 基于 MPC 的模仿学习，实现安全且类人的自动驾驶
comment: Accepted at the 1st Workshop on Safe Learning for Autonomous Driving (SL4AD), co-located with the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 1st Workshop on Safe Learning for Autonomous Driving (SL4AD), co-located with the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022)
abstract: To ensure user acceptance of autonomous vehicles (AVs), control systems are being developed to mimic human drivers from demonstrations of desired driving behaviors. Imitation learning (IL) algorithms serve this purpose, but struggle to provide safety guarantees on the resulting closed-loop system trajectories. On the other hand, Model Predictive Control (MPC) can handle nonlinear systems with safety constraints, but realizing human-like driving with it requires extensive domain knowledge. This work suggests the use of a seamless combination of the two techniques to learn safe AV controllers from demonstrations of desired driving behaviors, by using MPC as a differentiable control layer within a hierarchical IL policy. With this strategy, IL is performed in closed-loop and end-to-end, through parameters in the MPC cost, model or constraints. Experimental results of this methodology are analyzed for the design of a lane keeping control system, learned via behavioral cloning from observations (BCO), given human demonstrations on a fixed-base driving simulator.
summary: To ensure user acceptance of autonomous vehicles (AVs), control systems are being developed to mimic human drivers from demonstrations of desired driving behaviors. Imitation learning (IL) algorithms serve this purpose, but struggle to provide safety guarantees on the resulting closed-loop system trajectories. On the other hand, Model Predictive Control (MPC) can handle nonlinear systems with safety constraints, but realizing human-like driving with it requires extensive domain knowledge. This work suggests the use of a seamless combination of the two techniques to learn safe AV controllers from demonstrations of desired driving behaviors, by using MPC as a differentiable control layer within a hierarchical IL policy. With this strategy, IL is performed in closed-loop and end-to-end, through parameters in the MPC cost, model or constraints. Experimental results of this methodology are analyzed for the design of a lane keeping control system, learned via behavioral cloning from observations (BCO), given human demonstrations on a fixed-base driving simulator.
abstract_zh: 为了确保用户接受自动驾驶汽车 (AV)，我们正在开发控制系统，通过演示所需的驾驶行为来模仿人类驾驶员。模仿学习 (IL) 算法可以实现此目的，但很难为生成的闭环系统轨迹提供安全保证。另一方面，模型预测控制（MPC）可以处理具有安全约束的非线性系统，但用其实现类人驾驶需要广泛的领域知识。这项工作建议使用两种技术的无缝组合，通过使用 MPC 作为分层 IL 策略中的可微控制层，从所需驾驶行为的演示中学习安全的 AV 控制器。通过这种策略，IL 通过 MPC 成本、模型或约束中的参数以闭环和端到端的方式执行。该方法的实验结果被分析用于车道保持控制系统的设计，通过观察行为克隆（BCO）学习，并在固定基座驾驶模拟器上进行人体演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合模仿学习（IL）与模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，通过将MPC作为分层IL策略中的可微控制层，从人类驾驶示范中学习安全且类人行为的自动驾驶控制器。
AI.motivation: 传统IL算法难以保证闭环系统安全性，而MPC虽能处理安全约束但需大量领域知识实现类人驾驶。为兼顾安全性与人类行为拟真性，需融合两者优势。
AI.method: 将MPC作为分层IL策略的底层控制层，通过调整MPC的成本函数、模型或约束参数，在闭环和端到端框架中进行模仿学习，利用行为克隆从观察数据中学习车道保持控制策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在固定基驾驶模拟器中通过人类示范数据训练的BCO（基于观察的行为克隆）控制器，能够有效实现安全且类人驾驶行为的车道保持控制。
AI.conclusion: 结合MPC与IL的分层框架可有效平衡自动驾驶系统的安全性与人类行为拟真性，为安全高效的自动驾驶控制提供新思路。

search_text: MPC-based Imitation Learning for Safe and Human-like Autonomous Driving 基于 MPC 的模仿学习，实现安全且类人的自动驾驶 To ensure user acceptance of autonomous vehicles (AVs), control systems are being developed to mimic human drivers from demonstrations of desired driving behaviors. Imitation learning (IL) algorithms serve this purpose, but struggle to provide safety guarantees on the resulting closed-loop system trajectories. On the other hand, Model Predictive Control (MPC) can handle nonlinear systems with safety constraints, but realizing human-like driving with it requires extensive domain knowledge. This work suggests the use of a seamless combination of the two techniques to learn safe AV controllers from demonstrations of desired driving behaviors, by using MPC as a differentiable control layer within a hierarchical IL policy. With this strategy, IL is performed in closed-loop and end-to-end, through parameters in the MPC cost, model or constraints. Experimental results of this methodology are analyzed for the design of a lane keeping control system, learned via behavioral cloning from observations (BCO), given human demonstrations on a fixed-base driving simulator. 为了确保用户接受自动驾驶汽车 (AV)，我们正在开发控制系统，通过演示所需的驾驶行为来模仿人类驾驶员。模仿学习 (IL) 算法可以实现此目的，但很难为生成的闭环系统轨迹提供安全保证。另一方面，模型预测控制（MPC）可以处理具有安全约束的非线性系统，但用其实现类人驾驶需要广泛的领域知识。这项工作建议使用两种技术的无缝组合，通过使用 MPC 作为分层 IL 策略中的可微控制层，从所需驾驶行为的演示中学习安全的 AV 控制器。通过这种策略，IL 通过 MPC 成本、模型或约束中的参数以闭环和端到端的方式执行。该方法的实验结果被分析用于车道保持控制系统的设计，通过观察行为克隆（BCO）学习，并在固定基座驾驶模拟器上进行人体演示。 本文提出一种结合模仿学习（IL）与模型预测控制（MPC）的方法，通过将MPC作为分层IL策略中的可微控制层，从人类驾驶示范中学习安全且类人行为的自动驾驶控制器。 Flavia Sofia Acerbo,Jan Swevers,Tinne Tuytelaars,Tong Duy Son cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Huidong Xie,Zhao Liu,Luyao Shi,Kathleen Greco,Xiongchao Chen,Bo Zhou,Attila Feher,John C. Stendahl,Nabil Boutagy,Tassos C. Kyriakides,Ge Wang,Albert J. Sinusas,Chi Liu
title: Segmentation-free PVC for Cardiac SPECT using a Densely-connected Multi-dimensional Dynamic Network
title_zh: 使用密集连接的多维动态网络进行心脏 SPECT 的无分段 PVC
comment: 12 pages, 11 figures. Accepted for publication at IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
comments: 12 pages, 11 figures. Accepted for publication at IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging
abstract: In nuclear imaging, limited resolution causes partial volume effects (PVEs) that affect image sharpness and quantitative accuracy. Partial volume correction (PVC) methods incorporating high-resolution anatomical information from CT or MRI have been demonstrated to be effective. However, such anatomical-guided methods typically require tedious image registration and segmentation steps. Accurately segmented organ templates are also hard to obtain, particularly in cardiac SPECT imaging, due to the lack of hybrid SPECT/CT scanners with high-end CT and associated motion artifacts. Slight mis-registration/mis-segmentation would result in severe degradation in image quality after PVC. In this work, we develop a deep-learning-based method for fast cardiac SPECT PVC without anatomical information and associated organ segmentation. The proposed network involves a densely-connected multi-dimensional dynamic mechanism, allowing the convolutional kernels to be adapted based on the input images, even after the network is fully trained. Intramyocardial blood volume (IMBV) is introduced as an additional clinical-relevant loss function for network optimization. The proposed network demonstrated promising performance on 28 canine studies acquired on a GE Discovery NM/CT 570c dedicated cardiac SPECT scanner with a 64-slice CT using Technetium-99m-labeled red blood cells. This work showed that the proposed network with densely-connected dynamic mechanism produced superior results compared with the same network without such mechanism. Results also showed that the proposed network without anatomical information could produce images with statistically comparable IMBV measurements to the images generated by anatomical-guided PVC methods, which could be helpful in clinical translation.
summary: In nuclear imaging, limited resolution causes partial volume effects (PVEs) that affect image sharpness and quantitative accuracy. Partial volume correction (PVC) methods incorporating high-resolution anatomical information from CT or MRI have been demonstrated to be effective. However, such anatomical-guided methods typically require tedious image registration and segmentation steps. Accurately segmented organ templates are also hard to obtain, particularly in cardiac SPECT imaging, due to the lack of hybrid SPECT/CT scanners with high-end CT and associated motion artifacts. Slight mis-registration/mis-segmentation would result in severe degradation in image quality after PVC. In this work, we develop a deep-learning-based method for fast cardiac SPECT PVC without anatomical information and associated organ segmentation. The proposed network involves a densely-connected multi-dimensional dynamic mechanism, allowing the convolutional kernels to be adapted based on the input images, even after the network is fully trained. Intramyocardial blood volume (IMBV) is introduced as an additional clinical-relevant loss function for network optimization. The proposed network demonstrated promising performance on 28 canine studies acquired on a GE Discovery NM/CT 570c dedicated cardiac SPECT scanner with a 64-slice CT using Technetium-99m-labeled red blood cells. This work showed that the proposed network with densely-connected dynamic mechanism produced superior results compared with the same network without such mechanism. Results also showed that the proposed network without anatomical information could produce images with statistically comparable IMBV measurements to the images generated by anatomical-guided PVC methods, which could be helpful in clinical translation.
abstract_zh: In nuclear imaging, limited resolution causes partial volume effects (PVEs) that affect image sharpness and quantitative accuracy.结合 CT 或 MRI 高分辨率解剖信息的部分容积校正 (PVC) 方法已被证明是有效的。 However, such anatomical-guided methods typically require tedious image registration and segmentation steps.由于缺乏具有高端 CT 和相关运动伪影的混合 SPECT/CT 扫描仪，准确分割的器官模板也很难获得，特别是在心脏 SPECT 成像中。 Slight mis-registration/mis-segmentation would result in severe degradation in image quality after PVC.在这项工作中，我们开发了一种基于深度学习的快速心脏 SPECT PVC 方法，无需解剖信息和相关器官分割。所提出的网络涉及密集连接的多维动态机制，即使在网络经过充分训练之后，也允许卷积核根据输入图像进行调整。 Intramyocardial blood volume (IMBV) is introduced as an additional clinical-relevant loss function for network optimization.该网络在 28 项犬类研究中展示了良好的性能，这些研究是在 GE Discovery NM/CT 570c 专用心脏 SPECT 扫描仪上获得的，该扫描仪具有 64 层 CT，使用 Technetium-99m 标记的红细胞。这项工作表明，与没有这种机制的相同网络相比，所提出的具有密集连接动态机制的网络产生了更好的结果。结果还表明，所提出的没有解剖信息的网络可以生成与解剖引导 PVC 方法生成的图像在统计上可比较的 IMBV 测量图像，这可能有助于临床转化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需解剖信息和器官分割的心脏SPECT部分体积校正（PVC）深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统PVC方法依赖CT/MRI解剖信息但需复杂配准和分割步骤，而心脏SPECT因缺乏高端CT和运动伪影导致分割困难且误差影响校正效果。
AI.method: 设计密集连接的多维动态网络，通过动态自适应卷积核实现输入图像相关性学习，并引入心肌内血容量（IMBV）作为临床相关损失函数优化网络。
AI.result: 在28例犬类心脏SPECT数据集上验证，动态机制网络较普通网络性能更优，且无解剖信息的PVC图像IMBV测量值与解剖引导方法具有统计学可比性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需解剖信息即可实现有效PVC，IMBV指标的临床相关性为方法转化提供了支持。

title: How to hide your voice: Noise-cancelling bird photography blind
title_zh: 如何隐藏你的声音：降噪鸟类摄影盲人
comment: 26 pages, 11 figures. Revised argument in sections 2 and 4, results unchanged, references added
comments: 26 pages, 11 figures. Revised argument in sections 2 and 4, results unchanged, references added
abstract: Getting close to birds is a great challenge in wildlife photography. Bird photography blinds may be the most effective and least intrusive way if properly designed. However, the acoustic design of the blinds has been overlooked so far. Herein, we present noise-cancelling blinds which allow photographing birds at close range. Firstly, we conduct a questionnaire in the eco-tourism centre located in Yunnan, China. Thus, we determine the birders' expectations of the indoor sound environment. We then identify diverse variables to examine the impact of architectural and acoustic decisions on noise propagation. Finally, we examine the acoustic performance of the blinds by considering the birds' hearing threshold. The numerical simulations are performed in the acoustics module of Comsol MultiPhysics. Our study demonstrated that photography blinds require a strong and thorough acoustic design for both human and bird well-being.
summary: Getting close to birds is a great challenge in wildlife photography. Bird photography blinds may be the most effective and least intrusive way if properly designed. However, the acoustic design of the blinds has been overlooked so far. Herein, we present noise-cancelling blinds which allow photographing birds at close range. Firstly, we conduct a questionnaire in the eco-tourism centre located in Yunnan, China. Thus, we determine the birders' expectations of the indoor sound environment. We then identify diverse variables to examine the impact of architectural and acoustic decisions on noise propagation. Finally, we examine the acoustic performance of the blinds by considering the birds' hearing threshold. The numerical simulations are performed in the acoustics module of Comsol MultiPhysics. Our study demonstrated that photography blinds require a strong and thorough acoustic design for both human and bird well-being.
abstract_zh: 近距离接触鸟类是野生动物摄影的一大挑战。如果设计得当，鸟类摄影百叶窗可能是最有效且干扰最小的方法。然而，迄今为止，百叶窗的声学设计一直被忽视。 Herein, we present noise-cancelling blinds which allow photographing birds at close range.首先，我们在位于中国云南的生态旅游中心进行了问卷调查。由此，我们确定了观鸟者对室内声环境的期望。然后，我们确定不同的变量来检查建筑和声学决策对噪声传播的影响。最后，我们通过考虑鸟类的听觉阈值来检查百叶窗的声学性能。数值模拟在 Comsol MultiPhysics 的声学模块中进行。我们的研究表明，为了人类和鸟类的福祉，摄影百叶窗需要强大而彻底的声学设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有降噪功能的鸟类摄影隐蔽装置设计，通过声学优化实现近距离鸟类拍摄。
AI.motivation: 传统鸟类摄影隐蔽装置忽视声学设计，人类活动噪音会干扰鸟类行为并影响拍摄效果。
AI.method: 通过问卷调查确定声学需求，分析建筑声学变量影响，利用COMSOL Multiphysics进行声学模拟验证。
AI.result: 证明摄影隐蔽装置需兼顾人类与鸟类听觉阈值的声学设计，有效降低噪音干扰。
AI.conclusion: 鸟类摄影隐蔽装置必须进行系统性声学设计，以保障拍摄质量与野生动物福利。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种具有降噪功能的鸟类摄影隐蔽装置设计，通过声学优化实现近距离鸟类拍摄。
ai_content.motivation: 传统鸟类摄影隐蔽装置忽视声学设计，人类活动噪音会干扰鸟类行为并影响拍摄效果。

ai_content.result: 证明摄影隐蔽装置需兼顾人类与鸟类听觉阈值的声学设计，有效降低噪音干扰。
ai_content.conclusion: 鸟类摄影隐蔽装置必须进行系统性声学设计，以保障拍摄质量与野生动物福利。

search_text: How to hide your voice: Noise-cancelling bird photography blind 如何隐藏你的声音：降噪鸟类摄影盲人 Getting close to birds is a great challenge in wildlife photography. Bird photography blinds may be the most effective and least intrusive way if properly designed. However, the acoustic design of the blinds has been overlooked so far. Herein, we present noise-cancelling blinds which allow photographing birds at close range. Firstly, we conduct a questionnaire in the eco-tourism centre located in Yunnan, China. Thus, we determine the birders' expectations of the indoor sound environment. We then identify diverse variables to examine the impact of architectural and acoustic decisions on noise propagation. Finally, we examine the acoustic performance of the blinds by considering the birds' hearing threshold. The numerical simulations are performed in the acoustics module of Comsol MultiPhysics. Our study demonstrated that photography blinds require a strong and thorough acoustic design for both human and bird well-being. 近距离接触鸟类是野生动物摄影的一大挑战。如果设计得当，鸟类摄影百叶窗可能是最有效且干扰最小的方法。然而，迄今为止，百叶窗的声学设计一直被忽视。 Herein, we present noise-cancelling blinds which allow photographing birds at close range.首先，我们在位于中国云南的生态旅游中心进行了问卷调查。由此，我们确定了观鸟者对室内声环境的期望。然后，我们确定不同的变量来检查建筑和声学决策对噪声传播的影响。最后，我们通过考虑鸟类的听觉阈值来检查百叶窗的声学性能。数值模拟在 Comsol MultiPhysics 的声学模块中进行。我们的研究表明，为了人类和鸟类的福祉，摄影百叶窗需要强大而彻底的声学设计。 本文提出一种具有降噪功能的鸟类摄影隐蔽装置设计，通过声学优化实现近距离鸟类拍摄。 Caner Baydur,Baojing Pu,Xiaoqing Xu cs.HC,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Achievement and Fragility of Long-term Equitability
title_zh: 长期公平的成就和脆弱性
abstract: Equipping current decision-making tools with notions of fairness, equitability, or other ethically motivated outcomes, is one of the top priorities in recent research efforts in machine learning, AI, and optimization. In this paper, we investigate how to allocate limited resources to {locally interacting} communities in a way to maximize a pertinent notion of equitability. In particular, we look at the dynamic setting where the allocation is repeated across multiple periods (e.g., yearly), the local communities evolve in the meantime (driven by the provided allocation), and the allocations are modulated by feedback coming from the communities themselves. We employ recent mathematical tools stemming from data-driven feedback online optimization, by which communities can learn their (possibly unknown) evolution, satisfaction, as well as they can share information with the deciding bodies. We design dynamic policies that converge to an allocation that maximize equitability in the long term. We further demonstrate our model and methodology with realistic examples of healthcare and education subsidies design in Sub-Saharian countries. One of the key empirical takeaways from our setting is that long-term equitability is fragile, in the sense that it can be easily lost when deciding bodies weigh in other factors (e.g., equality in allocation) in the allocation strategy. Moreover, a naive compromise, while not providing significant advantage to the communities, can promote inequality in social outcomes.

We employ recent mathematical tools stemming from data-driven feedback online optimization, by which communities can learn their (possibly unknown) evolution, satisfaction, as well as they can share information with the deciding bodies. We design dynamic policies that converge to an allocation that maximize equitability in the long term. We further demonstrate our model and methodology with realistic examples of healthcare and education subsidies design in Sub-Saharian countries. One of the key empirical takeaways from our setting is that long-term equitability is fragile, in the sense that it can be easily lost when deciding bodies weigh in other factors (e.g., equality in allocation) in the allocation strategy. Moreover, a naive compromise, while not providing significant advantage to the communities, can promote inequality in social outcomes.
abstract_zh: 为当前的决策工具配备公平、公正或其他道德动机结果的概念，是机器学习、人工智能和优化领域近期研究工作的首要任务之一。在本文中，我们研究了如何将有限的资源分配给{本地交互}社区，以最大化相关的公平概念。特别是，我们着眼于动态环境，其中分配在多个时期（例如每年）重复，当地社区同时发展（由提供的分配驱动），并且分配由社区本身的反馈进行调节。 We employ recent mathematical tools stemming from data-driven feedback online optimization, by which communities can learn their (possibly unknown) evolution, satisfaction, as well as they can share information with the deciding bodies.我们设计动态政策，以实现长期公平性最大化的分配。我们通过撒哈拉以南国家医疗保健和教育补贴设计的现实例子进一步展示了我们的模型和方法。从我们的背景中得出的关键经验教训之一是，长期公平性是脆弱的，因为当决策机构在分配策略中权衡其他因素（例如分配平等）时，长期公平性很容易丧失。此外，天真的妥协虽然不能为社区带来显着优势，但可能会加剧社会结果的不平等。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在动态环境中通过资源分配实现长期公平性，考虑社区反馈和演化因素。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习和优化领域的研究重点是将公平性等伦理目标融入决策工具，但现有方法难以应对动态变化的社区需求和反馈机制。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的反馈在线优化方法，结合社区自我学习与信息共享机制，设计动态分配策略以最大化长期公平性。
AI.result: 实证表明长期公平性具有脆弱性，当决策者引入其他因素（如分配平等性）时易被破坏，简单折中方案可能加剧社会不平等。
AI.conclusion: 长期公平性可通过动态策略实现，但需警惕政策设计中其他目标的干扰，避免因短视妥协导致系统性不平等。

authors_text: Lijun Sun,Yu-Cheng Chang,Chao Lyu,Ye Shi,Yuhui Shi,Chin-Teng Lin
title: Toward multi-target self-organizing pursuit in a partially observable Markov game
title_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫博弈中的多目标自组织追踪
abstract: The multiple-target self-organizing pursuit (SOP) problem has wide applications and has been considered a challenging self-organization game for distributed systems, in which intelligent agents cooperatively pursue multiple dynamic targets with partial observations. This work proposes a framework for decentralized multi-agent systems to improve the implicit coordination capabilities in search and pursuit. We model a self-organizing system as a partially observable Markov game (POMG) featured by large-scale, decentralization, partial observation, and noncommunication. The proposed distributed algorithm: fuzzy self-organizing cooperative coevolution (FSC2) is then leveraged to resolve the three challenges in multi-target SOP: distributed self-organizing search (SOS), distributed task allocation, and distributed single-target pursuit. FSC2 includes a coordinated multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MARL) method that enables homogeneous agents to learn natural SOS patterns. Additionally, we propose a fuzzy-based distributed task allocation method, which locally decomposes multi-target SOP into several single-target pursuit problems. The cooperative coevolution principle is employed to coordinate distributed pursuers for each single-target pursuit problem. Therefore, the uncertainties of inherent partial observation and distributed decision-making in the POMG can be alleviated. The experimental results demonstrate that by decomposing the SOP task, FSC2 achieves superior performance compared with other implicit coordination policies fully trained by general MARL algorithms. The scalability of FSC2 is proved that up to 2048 FSC2 agents perform efficient multi-target SOP with almost 100 percent capture rates. Empirical analyses and ablation studies verify the interpretability, rationality, and effectiveness of component algorithms in FSC2.
summary: The multiple-target self-organizing pursuit (SOP) problem has wide applications and has been considered a challenging self-organization game for distributed systems, in which intelligent agents cooperatively pursue multiple dynamic targets with partial observations. This work proposes a framework for decentralized multi-agent systems to improve the implicit coordination capabilities in search and pursuit. We model a self-organizing system as a partially observable Markov game (POMG) featured by large-scale, decentralization, partial observation, and noncommunication. The proposed distributed algorithm: fuzzy self-organizing cooperative coevolution (FSC2) is then leveraged to resolve the three challenges in multi-target SOP: distributed self-organizing search (SOS), distributed task allocation, and distributed single-target pursuit. FSC2 includes a coordinated multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MARL) method that enables homogeneous agents to learn natural SOS patterns. Additionally, we propose a fuzzy-based distributed task allocation method, which locally decomposes multi-target SOP into several single-target pursuit problems. The cooperative coevolution principle is employed to coordinate distributed pursuers for each single-target pursuit problem. Therefore, the uncertainties of inherent partial observation and distributed decision-making in the POMG can be alleviated. The experimental results demonstrate that by decomposing the SOP task, FSC2 achieves superior performance compared with other implicit coordination policies fully trained by general MARL algorithms. The scalability of FSC2 is proved that up to 2048 FSC2 agents perform efficient multi-target SOP with almost 100 percent capture rates. Empirical analyses and ablation studies verify the interpretability, rationality, and effectiveness of component algorithms in FSC2.
abstract_zh: 多目标自组织追踪（SOP）问题具有广泛的应用，并被认为是分布式系统中具有挑战性的自组织博弈，其中智能代理通过部分观测来协作追踪多个动态目标。 This work proposes a framework for decentralized multi-agent systems to improve the implicit coordination capabilities in search and pursuit.我们将自组织系统建模为部分可观察马尔可夫博弈（POMG），其特点是大规模、去中心化、部分观察和非通信。然后利用所提出的分布式算法：模糊自组织协同进化（FSC2）来解决多目标SOP中的三个挑战：分布式自组织搜索（SOS）、分布式任务分配和分布式单目标追踪。 FSC2 includes a coordinated multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MARL) method that enables homogeneous agents to learn natural SOS patterns.此外，我们提出了一种基于模糊的分布式任务分配方法，该方法将多目标 SOP 局部分解为多个单目标追踪问题。 The cooperative coevolution principle is employed to coordinate distributed pursuers for each single-target pursuit problem. Therefore, the uncertainties of inherent partial observation and distributed decision-making in the POMG can be alleviated.实验结果表明，通过分解 SOP 任务，FSC2 与其他由通用 MARL 算法完全训练的隐式协调策略相比，取得了优越的性能。 The scalability of FSC2 is proved that up to 2048 FSC2 agents perform efficient multi-target SOP with almost 100 percent capture rates. Empirical analyses and ablation studies verify the interpretability, rationality, and effectiveness of component algorithms in FSC2.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FSC2的分布式算法框架，用于解决多目标自组织追踪问题，通过部分可观测马尔可夫博弈（POMG）建模并分解任务以提升多智能体系统的协同效率。
AI.motivation: 多目标自组织追踪在分布式系统中面临部分观测、非通信和大规模分散决策的挑战，传统方法难以有效协调智能体实现高效追踪。
AI.method: 提出FSC2算法，结合模糊任务分配、多智能体深度强化学习（MARL）和协同进化原理，将多目标问题分解为单目标追踪子任务，缓解部分观测与分布式决策的不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明，FSC2在2048个智能体规模下实现接近100%的捕获率，性能优于传统MARL算法，消融实验验证了组件的有效性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: FSC2通过任务分解与协同进化机制，有效解决了多目标自组织追踪中的关键挑战，证明了其可扩展性与实际应用价值。

result: 实验表明，FSC2在2048个智能体规模下实现接近100%的捕获率，性能优于传统MARL算法，消融实验验证了组件的有效性与可解释性。
conclusion: FSC2通过任务分解与协同进化机制，有效解决了多目标自组织追踪中的关键挑战，证明了其可扩展性与实际应用价值。
search_text: Toward multi-target self-organizing pursuit in a partially observable Markov game 部分可观察马尔可夫博弈中的多目标自组织追踪 The multiple-target self-organizing pursuit (SOP) problem has wide applications and has been considered a challenging self-organization game for distributed systems, in which intelligent agents cooperatively pursue multiple dynamic targets with partial observations. This work proposes a framework for decentralized multi-agent systems to improve the implicit coordination capabilities in search and pursuit. We model a self-organizing system as a partially observable Markov game (POMG) featured by large-scale, decentralization, partial observation, and noncommunication. The proposed distributed algorithm: fuzzy self-organizing cooperative coevolution (FSC2) is then leveraged to resolve the three challenges in multi-target SOP: distributed self-organizing search (SOS), distributed task allocation, and distributed single-target pursuit. FSC2 includes a coordinated multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MARL) method that enables homogeneous agents to learn natural SOS patterns. Additionally, we propose a fuzzy-based distributed task allocation method, which locally decomposes multi-target SOP into several single-target pursuit problems. The cooperative coevolution principle is employed to coordinate distributed pursuers for each single-target pursuit problem. Therefore, the uncertainties of inherent partial observation and distributed decision-making in the POMG can be alleviated. The experimental results demonstrate that by decomposing the SOP task, FSC2 achieves superior performance compared with other implicit coordination policies fully trained by general MARL algorithms. The scalability of FSC2 is proved that up to 2048 FSC2 agents perform efficient multi-target SOP with almost 100 percent capture rates. Empirical analyses and ablation studies verify the interpretability, rationality, and effectiveness of component algorithms in FSC2. 多目标自组织追踪（SOP）问题具有广泛的应用，并被认为是分布式系统中具有挑战性的自组织博弈，其中智能代理通过部分观测来协作追踪多个动态目标。 This work proposes a framework for decentralized multi-agent systems to improve the implicit coordination capabilities in search and pursuit.我们将自组织系统建模为部分可观察马尔可夫博弈（POMG），其特点是大规模、去中心化、部分观察和非通信。然后利用所提出的分布式算法：模糊自组织协同进化（FSC2）来解决多目标SOP中的三个挑战：分布式自组织搜索（SOS）、分布式任务分配和分布式单目标追踪。 FSC2 includes a coordinated multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MARL) method that enables homogeneous agents to learn natural SOS patterns.此外，我们提出了一种基于模糊的分布式任务分配方法，该方法将多目标 SOP 局部分解为多个单目标追踪问题。 The cooperative coevolution principle is employed to coordinate distributed pursuers for each single-target pursuit problem. Therefore, the uncertainties of inherent partial observation and distributed decision-making in the POMG can be alleviated.实验结果表明，通过分解 SOP 任务，FSC2 与其他由通用 MARL 算法完全训练的隐式协调策略相比，取得了优越的性能。 The scalability of FSC2 is proved that up to 2048 FSC2 agents perform efficient multi-target SOP with almost 100 percent capture rates. Empirical analyses and ablation studies verify the interpretability, rationality, and effectiveness of component algorithms in FSC2. 本文提出一种名为FSC2的分布式算法框架，用于解决多目标自组织追踪问题，通过部分可观测马尔可夫博弈（POMG）建模并分解任务以提升多智能体系统的协同效率。 Lijun Sun,Yu-Cheng Chang,Chao Lyu,Ye Shi,Yuhui Shi,Chin-Teng Lin cs.MA,cs.AI

title: How to train accurate BNNs for embedded systems?
title_zh: 如何为嵌入式系统训练准确的 BNN？
comment: ef:Embedded Machine Learning for Cyber-Physical, IoT, and Edge Computing (2023)
comments: ef:Embedded Machine Learning for Cyber-Physical, IoT, and Edge Computing (2023)
abstract: A key enabler of deploying convolutional neural networks on resource-constrained embedded systems is the binary neural network (BNN). BNNs save on memory and simplify computation by binarizing both features and weights. Unfortunately, binarization is inevitably accompanied by a severe decrease in accuracy. To reduce the accuracy gap between binary and full-precision networks, many repair methods have been proposed in the recent past, which we have classified and put into a single overview in this chapter. The repair methods are divided into two main branches, training techniques and network topology changes, which can further be split into smaller categories. The latter category introduces additional cost (energy consumption or additional area) for an embedded system, while the former does not. From our overview, we observe that progress has been made in reducing the accuracy gap, but BNN papers are not aligned on what repair methods should be used to get highly accurate BNNs. Therefore, this chapter contains an empirical review that evaluates the benefits of many repair methods in isolation over the ResNet-20\&CIFAR10 and ResNet-18\&CIFAR100 benchmarks. We found three repair categories most beneficial: feature binarizer, feature normalization, and double residual. Based on this review we discuss future directions and research opportunities. We sketch the benefit and costs associated with BNNs on embedded systems because it remains to be seen whether BNNs will be able to close the accuracy gap while staying highly energy-efficient on resource-constrained embedded systems.

BNNs save on memory and simplify computation by binarizing both features and weights. Unfortunately, binarization is inevitably accompanied by a severe decrease in accuracy. The repair methods are divided into two main branches, training techniques and network topology changes, which can further be split into smaller categories. The latter category introduces additional cost (energy consumption or additional area) for an embedded system, while the former does not. From our overview, we observe that progress has been made in reducing the accuracy gap, but BNN papers are not aligned on what repair methods should be used to get highly accurate BNNs. Therefore, this chapter contains an empirical review that evaluates the benefits of many repair methods in isolation over the ResNet-20\&CIFAR10 and ResNet-18\&CIFAR100 benchmarks. We found three repair categories most beneficial: feature binarizer, feature normalization, and double residual. Based on this review we discuss future directions and research opportunities. We sketch the benefit and costs associated with BNNs on embedded systems because it remains to be seen whether BNNs will be able to close the accuracy gap while staying highly energy-efficient on resource-constrained embedded systems.
abstract_zh: 在资源受限的嵌入式系统上部署卷积神经网络的关键推动者是二元神经网络 (BNN)。 BNN 通过对特征和权重进行二值化来节省内存并简化计算。不幸的是，二值化不可避免地伴随着精度的严重下降。为了缩小二进制网络和全精度网络之间的精度差距，最近提出了许多修复方法，我们对它们进行了分类并在本章中进行了单独概述。修复方法分为两个主要分支，训练技术和网络拓扑变化，这可以进一步分为更小的类别。后一类会给嵌入式系统带来额外的成本（能源消耗或额外的面积），而前者则不会。从我们的概述中，我们观察到在缩小精度差距方面已经取得了进展，但 BNN 论文在应该使用哪些修复方法来获得高精度 BNN 方面并未达成共识。因此，本章包含一个实证回顾，评估了许多独立修复方法相对于 ResNet-20\&CIFAR10 和 ResNet-18\&CIFAR100 基准的好处。我们发现三种最有益的修复类别：特征二值化器、特征归一化和双残差。基于这篇评论，我们讨论未来的方向和研究机会。我们概述了与嵌入式系统上的 BNN 相关的收益和成本，因为 BNN 是否能够缩小精度差距，同时在资源受限的嵌入式系统上保持高能效，还有待观察。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过分类和评估修复方法，提高二值神经网络（BNN）在嵌入式系统中的准确性。
AI.motivation: BNN因内存和计算效率适合嵌入式系统，但二值化导致精度下降。现有修复方法缺乏共识，需系统评估以指导实践。
AI.method: 将修复方法分为训练技术和网络结构修改两类，通过实证分析在ResNet-20/CIFAR10和ResNet-18/CIFAR100基准上评估其效果。
AI.result: 发现特征二值化、特征归一化和双重残差三类方法对提升精度最有效。
AI.conclusion: 尽管修复方法缩小了精度差距，但BNN在嵌入式系统中能否兼顾高精度与能效仍需进一步研究。
