authors_text: Kubilay Can Demir,Matthias May,Axel Schmid,Michael Uder,Katharina Breininger,Tobias Weise,Andreas Maier,Seung Hee Yang
title: PoCaP Corpus: A Multimodal Dataset for Smart Operating Room Speech Assistant using Interventional Radiology Workflow Analysis
title_zh: PoCaP Corpus：使用介入放射学工作流程分析的智能手术室语音助手的多模态数据集
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, Text, Speech and Dialogue 2022 Conference
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, Text, Speech and Dialogue 2022 Conference
abstract: This paper presents a new multimodal interventional radiology dataset, called PoCaP (Port Catheter Placement) Corpus. This corpus consists of speech and audio signals in German, X-ray images, and system commands collected from 31 PoCaP interventions by six surgeons with average duration of 81.4 $\pm$ 41.0 minutes. The corpus aims to provide a resource for developing a smart speech assistant in operating rooms. In particular, it may be used to develop a speech controlled system that enables surgeons to control the operation parameters such as C-arm movements and table positions. In order to record the dataset, we acquired consent by the institutional review board and workers council in the University Hospital Erlangen and by the patients for data privacy. We describe the recording set-up, data structure, workflow and preprocessing steps, and report the first PoCaP Corpus speech recognition analysis results with 11.52 $\%$ word error rate using pretrained models. The findings suggest that the data has the potential to build a robust command recognition system and will allow the development of a novel intervention support systems using speech and image processing in the medical domain.
summary: This paper presents a new multimodal interventional radiology dataset, called PoCaP (Port Catheter Placement) Corpus. This corpus consists of speech and audio signals in German, X-ray images, and system commands collected from 31 PoCaP interventions by six surgeons with average duration of 81.4 $\pm$ 41.0 minutes. The corpus aims to provide a resource for developing a smart speech assistant in operating rooms. In particular, it may be used to develop a speech controlled system that enables surgeons to control the operation parameters such as C-arm movements and table positions. In order to record the dataset, we acquired consent by the institutional review board and workers council in the University Hospital Erlangen and by the patients for data privacy. We describe the recording set-up, data structure, workflow and preprocessing steps, and report the first PoCaP Corpus speech recognition analysis results with 11.52 $\%$ word error rate using pretrained models. The findings suggest that the data has the potential to build a robust command recognition system and will allow the development of a novel intervention support systems using speech and image processing in the medical domain.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的多模式介入放射学数据集，称为 PoCaP（导管放置）语料库。该语料库由德语语音和音频信号、X 射线图像以及从 6 名外科医生 31 次 PoCaP 干预中收集的系统命令组成，平均持续时间为 81.4 $\pm$ 41.0 分钟。该语料库旨在为开发手术室智能语音助手提供资源。特别是，它可用于开发语音控制系统，使外科医生能够控制操作参数，例如 C 形臂运动和手术台位置。为了记录数据集，我们获得了埃尔兰根大学医院的机构审查委员会和工人委员会以及患者的数据隐私同意。我们描述了录音设置、数据结构、工作流程和预处理步骤，并报告了第一个 PoCaP Corpus 语音识别分析结果，使用预训练模型的单词错误率为 11.52 $\%$。研究结果表明，这些数据有潜力构建强大的命令识别系统，并将允许在医疗领域使用语音和图像处理开发新型干预支持系统。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为PoCaP Corpus的多模态数据集，用于开发智能手术室语音助手，包含德国语音、X光图像和系统指令。
AI.motivation: 为开发手术室语音控制系统提供资源，使外科医生能通过语音控制设备参数（如C臂移动和手术台位置），提升手术效率与安全性。
AI.method: 通过机构审查委员会和患者同意收集31例介入放射学手术数据，包含语音、音频、X光图像及系统指令，并进行预处理与语音识别分析。
AI.result: 使用预训练模型对语音识别分析得出11.52%的词错误率，表明数据具备构建鲁棒指令识别系统的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可支持开发结合语音与图像处理的新型手术辅助系统，为医疗领域的智能手术室研究提供重要资源。

The corpus aims to provide a resource for developing a smart speech assistant in operating rooms. In order to record the dataset, we acquired consent by the institutional review board and workers council in the University Hospital Erlangen and by the patients for data privacy. We describe the recording set-up, data structure, workflow and preprocessing steps, and report the first PoCaP Corpus speech recognition analysis results with 11.52 $\%$ word error rate using pretrained models. The findings suggest that the data has the potential to build a robust command recognition system and will allow the development of a novel intervention support systems using speech and image processing in the medical domain. 本文提出了一种新的多模式介入放射学数据集，称为 PoCaP（导管放置）语料库。该语料库由德语语音和音频信号、X 射线图像以及从 6 名外科医生 31 次 PoCaP 干预中收集的系统命令组成，平均持续时间为 81.4 $\pm$ 41.0 分钟。该语料库旨在为开发手术室智能语音助手提供资源。特别是，它可用于开发语音控制系统，使外科医生能够控制操作参数，例如 C 形臂运动和手术台位置。为了记录数据集，我们获得了埃尔兰根大学医院的机构审查委员会和工人委员会以及患者的数据隐私同意。我们描述了录音设置、数据结构、工作流程和预处理步骤，并报告了第一个 PoCaP Corpus 语音识别分析结果，使用预训练模型的单词错误率为 11.52 $\%$。研究结果表明，这些数据有潜力构建强大的命令识别系统，并将允许在医疗领域使用语音和图像处理开发新型干预支持系统。 本文介绍了一个名为PoCaP Corpus的多模态数据集，用于开发智能手术室语音助手，包含德国语音、X光图像和系统指令。 Kubilay Can Demir,Matthias May,Axel Schmid,Michael Uder,Katharina Breininger,Tobias Weise,Andreas Maier,Seung Hee Yang cs.SD,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Debarpan Bhattacharya,Debottam Dutta,Neeraj Kumar Sharma,Srikanth Raj Chetupalli,Pravin Mote,Sriram Ganapathy,Chandrakiran C,Sahiti Nori,Suhail K K,Sadhana Gonuguntla,Murali Alagesan
title: Analyzing the impact of SARS-CoV-2 variants on respiratory sound signals
title_zh: 分析 SARS-CoV-2 变异体对呼吸音信号的影响
abstract: The COVID-19 outbreak resulted in multiple waves of infections that have been associated with different SARS-CoV-2 variants. Studies have reported differential impact of the variants on respiratory health of patients. We explore whether acoustic signals, collected from COVID-19 subjects, show computationally distinguishable acoustic patterns suggesting a possibility to predict the underlying virus variant. We analyze the Coswara dataset which is collected from three subject pools, namely, i) healthy, ii) COVID-19 subjects recorded during the delta variant dominant period, and iii) data from COVID-19 subjects recorded during the omicron surge. Our findings suggest that multiple sound categories, such as cough, breathing, and speech, indicate significant acoustic feature differences when comparing COVID-19 subjects with omicron and delta variants. The classification areas-under-the-curve are significantly above chance for differentiating subjects infected by omicron from those infected by delta. Using a score fusion from multiple sound categories, we obtained an area-under-the-curve of 89% and 52.4% sensitivity at 95% specificity. Additionally, a hierarchical three class approach was used to classify the acoustic data into healthy and COVID-19 positive, and further COVID-19 subjects into delta and omicron variants providing high level of 3-class classification accuracy. These results suggest new ways for designing sound based COVID-19 diagnosis approaches.
summary: The COVID-19 outbreak resulted in multiple waves of infections that have been associated with different SARS-CoV-2 variants. Studies have reported differential impact of the variants on respiratory health of patients. We explore whether acoustic signals, collected from COVID-19 subjects, show computationally distinguishable acoustic patterns suggesting a possibility to predict the underlying virus variant. We analyze the Coswara dataset which is collected from three subject pools, namely, i) healthy, ii) COVID-19 subjects recorded during the delta variant dominant period, and iii) data from COVID-19 subjects recorded during the omicron surge. Our findings suggest that multiple sound categories, such as cough, breathing, and speech, indicate significant acoustic feature differences when comparing COVID-19 subjects with omicron and delta variants. The classification areas-under-the-curve are significantly above chance for differentiating subjects infected by omicron from those infected by delta. Using a score fusion from multiple sound categories, we obtained an area-under-the-curve of 89% and 52.4% sensitivity at 95% specificity. Additionally, a hierarchical three class approach was used to classify the acoustic data into healthy and COVID-19 positive, and further COVID-19 subjects into delta and omicron variants providing high level of 3-class classification accuracy. These results suggest new ways for designing sound based COVID-19 diagnosis approaches.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 爆发导致多波感染，这些感染与不同的 SARS-CoV-2 变种有关。研究报告了变异对患者呼吸系统健康的不同影响。我们探索从 COVID-19 受试者收集的声学信号是否显示出计算上可区分的声学模式，这表明有可能预测潜在的病毒变体。我们分析了从三个受试者池收集的 Coswara 数据集，即 i) 健康受试者，ii) 在 delta 变异主导期记录的 COVID-19 受试者，以及 iii) 在 omicron 激增期间记录的 COVID-19 受试者数据。我们的研究结果表明，在将 COVID-19 受试者与 omicron 和 delta 变体进行比较时，多种声音类别（例如咳嗽、呼吸和言语）表明存在显着的声学特征差异。曲线下的分类区域明显高于区分 omicron 感染者和 delta 感染者的机会。使用多个声音类别的分数融合，我们获得了 89% 的曲线下面积和 52.4% 的灵敏度以及 95% 的特异性。此外，还使用分层三类方法将声学数据分类为健康和 COVID-19 阳性，并将 COVID-19 受试者进一步分类为 delta 和 omicron 变体，从而提供高水平的 3 类分类准确性。这些结果提出了设计基于合理的 COVID-19 诊断方法的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过分析呼吸道声音信号，探讨不同SARS-CoV-2变体（如Delta和Omicron）对COVID-19患者呼吸声特征的影响，并研究是否可通过声学模式预测病毒变体。
AI.motivation: 由于SARS-CoV-2不同变体对患者呼吸道健康的影响存在差异，研究者希望通过声学信号分析提供一种非侵入性的诊断方法，以区分不同变体感染的患者。
AI.method: 研究使用Coswara数据集，包含健康人群、Delta变体主导期和Omicron激增期的COVID-19患者呼吸声数据，通过分析咳嗽、呼吸和语音等声学特征，结合机器学习模型进行分类与区分。
AI.result: 实验表明，Omicron与Delta感染患者的声学特征存在显著差异，融合多类声音信号的分类模型达到89%的AUC值，在95%特异度下敏感度为52.4%；三类分类（健康/COVID-19阳性/Delta/Omicron）也取得较高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 声学信号分析可为基于声音的COVID-19诊断方法提供新思路，尤其在区分不同病毒变体方面具有潜力。

authors_text: Yinghui Meng,Zhenglong Du,Chen Zhao,Minghao Dong,Drew Pienta,Zhihui Xu,Weihua Zhou
title: Automatic extraction of coronary arteries using deep learning in invasive coronary angiograms
title_zh: 在侵入性冠状动脉造影中使用深度学习自动提取冠状动脉
abstract: Accurate extraction of coronary arteries from invasive coronary angiography (ICA) is important in clinical decision-making for the diagnosis and risk stratification of coronary artery disease (CAD). In this study, we develop a method using deep learning to automatically extract the coronary artery lumen. Methods. A deep learning model U-Net 3+, which incorporates the full-scale skip connections and deep supervisions, was proposed for automatic extraction of coronary arteries from ICAs. Transfer learning and a hybrid loss function were employed in this novel coronary artery extraction framework. Results. A data set containing 616 ICAs obtained from 210 patients was used. In the technical evaluation, the U-Net 3+ achieved a Dice score of 0.8942 and a sensitivity of 0.8735, which is higher than U-Net ++ (Dice score: 0.8814, the sensitivity of 0.8331) and U-net (Dice score: 0.8799, the sensitivity of 0.8305). Conclusion. Our study demonstrates that the U-Net 3+ is superior to other segmentation frameworks for the automatic extraction of the coronary arteries from ICAs. This result suggests great promise for clinical use.
summary: Accurate extraction of coronary arteries from invasive coronary angiography (ICA) is important in clinical decision-making for the diagnosis and risk stratification of coronary artery disease (CAD). In this study, we develop a method using deep learning to automatically extract the coronary artery lumen. Methods. A deep learning model U-Net 3+, which incorporates the full-scale skip connections and deep supervisions, was proposed for automatic extraction of coronary arteries from ICAs. Transfer learning and a hybrid loss function were employed in this novel coronary artery extraction framework. Results. A data set containing 616 ICAs obtained from 210 patients was used. In the technical evaluation, the U-Net 3+ achieved a Dice score of 0.8942 and a sensitivity of 0.8735, which is higher than U-Net ++ (Dice score: 0.8814, the sensitivity of 0.8331) and U-net (Dice score: 0.8799, the sensitivity of 0.8305). Conclusion. Our study demonstrates that the U-Net 3+ is superior to other segmentation frameworks for the automatic extraction of the coronary arteries from ICAs. This result suggests great promise for clinical use.
abstract_zh: 从侵入性冠状动脉造影（ICA）中准确提取冠状动脉对于冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的诊断和风险分层的临床决策非常重要。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种利用深度学习自动提取冠状动脉管腔的方法。方法。提出了一种深度学习模型 U-Net 3+，它结合了全尺寸跳跃连接和深度监督，用于从 ICA 中自动提取冠状动脉。这种新型冠状动脉提取框架采用了迁移学习和混合损失函数。结果。使用的数据集包含从 210 名患者获得的 616 个 ICA。在技​​术评测中，U-Net 3+取得了0.8942的Dice分数和0.8735的灵敏度，高于U-Net++（Dice分数：0.8814，灵敏度0.8331）和U-net（Dice分数：0.8799，灵敏度0.8305）。结论。我们的研究表明，在从 ICA 中自动提取冠状动脉方面，U-Net 3+ 优于其他分割框架。这一结果预示着临床应用的巨大前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动提取冠状动脉的方法，用于侵入性冠状动脉造影（ICA）。
AI.motivation: 准确提取ICA中的冠状动脉对临床决策和冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的诊断及风险分层至关重要，需开发自动化方法提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用改进的U-Net 3+模型，结合全尺度跳跃连接和深度监督，并引入迁移学习和混合损失函数框架。
AI.result: 在包含616例ICA的数据集上，U-Net 3+的Dice得分为0.8942，灵敏度为0.8735，优于U-Net++和U-Net模型。
AI.conclusion: U-Net 3+在自动提取冠状动脉任务中表现优异，显示出在临床应用中的巨大潜力。

In the technical evaluation, the U-Net 3+ achieved a Dice score of 0.8942 and a sensitivity of 0.8735, which is higher than U-Net ++ (Dice score: 0.8814, the sensitivity of 0.8331) and U-net (Dice score: 0.8799, the sensitivity of 0.8305). Conclusion. Our study demonstrates that the U-Net 3+ is superior to other segmentation frameworks for the automatic extraction of the coronary arteries from ICAs. This result suggests great promise for clinical use. 从侵入性冠状动脉造影（ICA）中准确提取冠状动脉对于冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的诊断和风险分层的临床决策非常重要。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种利用深度学习自动提取冠状动脉管腔的方法。方法。提出了一种深度学习模型 U-Net 3+，它结合了全尺寸跳跃连接和深度监督，用于从 ICA 中自动提取冠状动脉。这种新型冠状动脉提取框架采用了迁移学习和混合损失函数。结果。使用的数据集包含从 210 名患者获得的 616 个 ICA。在技​​术评测中，U-Net 3+取得了0.8942的Dice分数和0.8735的灵敏度，高于U-Net++（Dice分数：0.8814，灵敏度0.8331）和U-net（Dice分数：0.8799，灵敏度0.8305）。结论。我们的研究表明，在从 ICA 中自动提取冠状动脉方面，U-Net 3+ 优于其他分割框架。这一结果预示着临床应用的巨大前景。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动提取冠状动脉的方法，用于侵入性冠状动脉造影（ICA）。 Yinghui Meng,Zhenglong Du,Chen Zhao,Minghao Dong,Drew Pienta,Zhihui Xu,Weihua Zhou eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Pranay Manocha,Anurag Kumar,Buye Xu,Anjali Menon,Israel D. Gebru,Vamsi K. Ithapu,Paul Calamia
title: SAQAM: Spatial Audio Quality Assessment Metric
title_zh: SAQAM：空间音频质量评估指标
abstract: Audio quality assessment is critical for assessing the perceptual realism of sounds. However, the time and expense of obtaining ''gold standard'' human judgments limit the availability of such data. For AR&VR, good perceived sound quality and localizability of sources are among the key elements to ensure complete immersion of the user. Our work introduces SAQAM which uses a multi-task learning framework to assess listening quality (LQ) and spatialization quality (SQ) between any given pair of binaural signals without using any subjective data. We model LQ by training on a simulated dataset of triplet human judgments, and SQ by utilizing activation-level distances from networks trained for direction of arrival (DOA) estimation. We show that SAQAM correlates well with human responses across four diverse datasets. Since it is a deep network, the metric is differentiable, making it suitable as a loss function for other tasks. For example, simply replacing an existing loss with our metric yields improvement in a speech-enhancement network.
summary: Audio quality assessment is critical for assessing the perceptual realism of sounds. However, the time and expense of obtaining ''gold standard'' human judgments limit the availability of such data. For AR&VR, good perceived sound quality and localizability of sources are among the key elements to ensure complete immersion of the user. Our work introduces SAQAM which uses a multi-task learning framework to assess listening quality (LQ) and spatialization quality (SQ) between any given pair of binaural signals without using any subjective data. We model LQ by training on a simulated dataset of triplet human judgments, and SQ by utilizing activation-level distances from networks trained for direction of arrival (DOA) estimation. We show that SAQAM correlates well with human responses across four diverse datasets. Since it is a deep network, the metric is differentiable, making it suitable as a loss function for other tasks. For example, simply replacing an existing loss with our metric yields improvement in a speech-enhancement network.
abstract_zh: Audio quality assessment is critical for assessing the perceptual realism of sounds. However, the time and expense of obtaining ''gold standard'' human judgments limit the availability of such data.对于 AR 和 VR 来说，良好的感知音质和信号源的定位能力是确保用户完全沉浸的关键要素。我们的工作引入了 SAQAM，它使用多任务学习框架来评估任何给定双耳信号对之间的听力质量 (LQ) 和空间化质量 (SQ)，而不使用任何主观数据。我们通过在三元组人类判断的模拟数据集上进行训练来对 LQ 进行建模，并通过利用来自经过训练的到达方向 (DOA) 估计的网络的激活级别距离来对 SQ 进行建模。我们证明 SAQAM 与四个不同数据集中的人类反应具有良好的相关性。 Since it is a deep network, the metric is differentiable, making it suitable as a loss function for other tasks.例如，简单地用我们的度量替换现有的损失就可以改善语音增强网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAQAM，一种无需主观数据即可评估双耳音频信号感知质量与空间化质量的深度学习指标。
AI.motivation: 传统音频质量评估依赖耗时耗力的人类主观判断，而AR/VR应用中缺乏高效的空间音频质量客观评估方法。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，通过模拟三元组人类判断训练感知质量（LQ），结合DOA估计网络的激活距离计算空间化质量（SQ）。
AI.result: SAQAM在四个不同数据集上均与人类评估结果高度相关，并可作为可微分损失函数提升语音增强任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SAQAM为无监督空间音频质量评估提供了有效解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Xufeng Qian,Yue Xu,Fuyu Lv,Shengyu Zhang,Ziwen Jiang,Qingwen Liu,Xiaoyi Zeng,Tat-Seng Chua,Fei Wu
title: Intelligent Request Strategy Design in Recommender System
title_zh: 推荐系统中的智能请求策略设计
abstract: Waterfall Recommender System (RS), a popular form of RS in mobile applications, is a stream of recommended items consisting of successive pages that can be browsed by scrolling. In waterfall RS, when a user finishes browsing a page, the edge (e.g., mobile phones) would send a request to the cloud server to get a new page of recommendations, known as the paging request mechanism. RSs typically put a large number of items into one page to reduce excessive resource consumption from numerous paging requests, which, however, would diminish the RSs' ability to timely renew the recommendations according to users' real-time interest and lead to a poor user experience. Intuitively, inserting additional requests inside pages to update the recommendations with a higher frequency can alleviate the problem. However, previous attempts, including only non-adaptive strategies (e.g., insert requests uniformly), would eventually lead to resource overconsumption. To this end, we envision a new learning task of edge intelligence named Intelligent Request Strategy Design (IRSD). It aims to improve the effectiveness of waterfall RSs by determining the appropriate occasions of request insertion based on users' real-time intention. Moreover, we propose a new paradigm of adaptive request insertion strategy named Uplift-based On-edge Smart Request Framework (AdaRequest). AdaRequest 1) captures the dynamic change of users' intentions by matching their real-time behaviors with their historical interests based on attention-based neural networks. 2) estimates the counterfactual uplift of user purchase brought by an inserted request based on causal inference. 3) determines the final request insertion strategy by maximizing the utility function under online resource constraints. We conduct extensive experiments on both offline dataset and online A/B test to verify the effectiveness of AdaRequest.
summary: Waterfall Recommender System (RS), a popular form of RS in mobile applications, is a stream of recommended items consisting of successive pages that can be browsed by scrolling. In waterfall RS, when a user finishes browsing a page, the edge (e.g., mobile phones) would send a request to the cloud server to get a new page of recommendations, known as the paging request mechanism. RSs typically put a large number of items into one page to reduce excessive resource consumption from numerous paging requests, which, however, would diminish the RSs' ability to timely renew the recommendations according to users' real-time interest and lead to a poor user experience. Intuitively, inserting additional requests inside pages to update the recommendations with a higher frequency can alleviate the problem. However, previous attempts, including only non-adaptive strategies (e.g., insert requests uniformly), would eventually lead to resource overconsumption. To this end, we envision a new learning task of edge intelligence named Intelligent Request Strategy Design (IRSD). It aims to improve the effectiveness of waterfall RSs by determining the appropriate occasions of request insertion based on users' real-time intention. Moreover, we propose a new paradigm of adaptive request insertion strategy named Uplift-based On-edge Smart Request Framework (AdaRequest). AdaRequest 1) captures the dynamic change of users' intentions by matching their real-time behaviors with their historical interests based on attention-based neural networks. 2) estimates the counterfactual uplift of user purchase brought by an inserted request based on causal inference. 3) determines the final request insertion strategy by maximizing the utility function under online resource constraints. We conduct extensive experiments on both offline dataset and online A/B test to verify the effectiveness of AdaRequest.
abstract_zh: 瀑布推荐系统（RS）是移动应用中流行的 RS 形式，是由可通过滚动浏览的连续页面组成的推荐项目流。在瀑布RS中，当用户浏览完页面时，边缘（例如手机）会向云服务器发送请求以获取新的推荐页面，称为分页请求机制。 RS通常将大量的项目放入一个页面中，以减少大量寻呼请求带来的过多资源消耗，但这会削弱RS根据用户的实时兴趣及时更新推荐的能力，从而导致较差的用户体验。 Intuitively, inserting additional requests inside pages to update the recommendations with a higher frequency can alleviate the problem.然而，之前的尝试，仅包括非自适应策略（例如统一插入请求），最终会导致资源过度消耗。 To this end, we envision a new learning task of edge intelligence named Intelligent Request Strategy Design (IRSD).它的目的是通过根据用户的实时意图确定适当的请求插入时机来提高瀑布RS的有效性。 Moreover, we propose a new paradigm of adaptive request insertion strategy named Uplift-based On-edge Smart Request Framework (AdaRequest). AdaRequest 1) 基于基于注意力的神经网络，将用户的实时行为与历史兴趣进行匹配，从而捕获用户意图的动态变化。 2) estimates the counterfactual uplift of user purchase brought by an inserted request based on causal inference. 3) determines the final request insertion strategy by maximizing the utility function under online resource constraints. We conduct extensive experiments on both offline dataset and online A/B test to verify the effectiveness of AdaRequest.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AdaRequest的自适应请求插入策略，旨在通过实时捕捉用户意图和因果推断优化请求时机，提升瀑布流推荐系统的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统瀑布流推荐系统因页面请求机制导致推荐更新不及时且资源消耗过大，现有非自适应策略无法平衡实时性与资源效率。
AI.method: 提出AdaRequest框架：1）基于注意力网络匹配用户实时行为与历史兴趣，捕捉意图动态变化；2）通过因果推断估计插入请求带来的购买提升值；3）在在线资源约束下最大化效用函数确定请求策略。
AI.result: 在离线数据集和在线A/B测试中验证了AdaRequest在推荐效果和资源消耗上的优越性。
AI.conclusion: AdaRequest通过动态适配用户意图和因果分析，在保证推荐实时性的同时降低资源消耗，为边缘智能推荐系统提供新范式。

authors_text: Luis Botelho,Luis Nunes,Ricardo Ribeiro,Rui J. Lopes
title: Learning Rhetorical Structure Theory-based descriptions of observed behaviour
title_zh: 学习修辞结构对观察到的行为进行基于理论的描述
abstract: In a previous paper, we have proposed a set of concepts, axiom schemata and algorithms that can be used by agents to learn to describe their behaviour, goals, capabilities, and environment. The current paper proposes a new set of concepts, axiom schemata and algorithms that allow the agent to learn new descriptions of an observed behaviour (e.g., perplexing actions), of its actor (e.g., undesired propositions or actions), and of its environment (e.g., incompatible propositions). Each learned description (e.g., a certain action prevents another action from being performed in the future) is represented by a relationship between entities (either propositions or actions) and is learned by the agent, just by observation, using domain-independent axiom schemata and or learning algorithms. The relations used by agents to represent the descriptions they learn were inspired on the Theory of Rhetorical Structure (RST). The main contribution of the paper is the relation family Although, inspired on the RST relation Concession. The accurate definition of the relations of the family Although involves a set of deontic concepts whose definition and corresponding algorithms are presented. The relations of the family Although, once extracted from the agent's observations, express surprise at the observed behaviour and, in certain circumstances, present a justification for it. The paper shows results of the presented proposals in a demonstration scenario, using implemented software.

abstract_zh: 在之前的论文中，我们提出了一组概念、公理模式和算法，代理可以使用它们来学习描述其行为、目标、能力和环境。当前的论文提出了一组新的概念、公理模式和算法，允许智能体学习对观察到的行为（例如，令人困惑的动作）、其参与者（例如，不需要的命题或动作）及其环境（例如，不兼容的命题）的新描述。每个学习的描述（例如，某个动作阻止将来执行另一个动作）由实体（命题或动作）之间的关系表示，并且由代理仅通过观察、使用与领域无关的公理模式和/或学习算法来学习。 The relations used by agents to represent the descriptions they learn were inspired on the Theory of Rhetorical Structure (RST). The main contribution of the paper is the relation family Although, inspired on the RST relation Concession.家庭关系的准确定义虽然涉及一组道义概念，但给出了这些概念的定义和相应的算法。家庭关系尽管一旦从代理人的观察中提取出来，就会对观察到的行为表示惊讶，并在某些情况下提出其合理性。 The paper shows results of the presented proposals in a demonstration scenario, using implemented software.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于修辞结构理论（RST）的方法，使智能体能够通过观察学习描述其自身行为、环境及他者行为的意外性，并建立类似‘尽管’的逻辑关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理观察到的意外行为或矛盾命题，需让智能体通过观察自动推导出能表达惊讶或解释的描述性关系。
AI.method: 设计基于RST‘让步’关系的‘尽管’关系族，结合道义逻辑概念与领域无关的算法，通过观察行为序列推导实体间关系。
AI.result: 在演示场景中验证了方法有效性，智能体能从观察中提取表达惊讶并部分解释行为的‘尽管’关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出的关系族为智能体理解意外行为提供了新框架，未来可扩展至更复杂的社会交互场景。

title: InfoAT: Improving Adversarial Training Using the Information Bottleneck Principle
title_zh: InfoAT：利用信息瓶颈原理改进对抗训练
comment: Published in: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems ( Early Access )
comments: Published in: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems ( Early Access )
abstract: Adversarial training (AT) has shown excellent high performance in defending against adversarial examples. Recent studies demonstrate that examples are not equally important to the final robustness of models during AT, that is, the so-called hard examples that can be attacked easily exhibit more influence than robust examples on the final robustness. Therefore, guaranteeing the robustness of hard examples is crucial for improving the final robustness of the model. However, defining effective heuristics to search for hard examples is still difficult. In this article, inspired by the information bottleneck (IB) principle, we uncover that an example with high mutual information of the input and its associated latent representation is more likely to be attacked. Based on this observation, we propose a novel and effective adversarial training method (InfoAT). InfoAT is encouraged to find examples with high mutual information and exploit them efficiently to improve the final robustness of models. Experimental results show that InfoAT achieves the best robustness among different datasets and models in comparison with several state-of-the-art methods.

However, defining effective heuristics to search for hard examples is still difficult. Based on this observation, we propose a novel and effective adversarial training method (InfoAT). InfoAT is encouraged to find examples with high mutual information and exploit them efficiently to improve the final robustness of models. abstract_zh: Adversarial training (AT) has shown excellent high performance in defending against adversarial examples.最近的研究表明，在AT过程中，样例对于模型的最终鲁棒性并不同样重要，即容易被攻击的所谓硬样例比鲁棒样例对最终鲁棒性的影响更大。 Therefore, guaranteeing the robustness of hard examples is crucial for improving the final robustness of the model. However, defining effective heuristics to search for hard examples is still difficult.在本文中，受信息瓶颈（IB）原理的启发，我们发现输入及其相关潜在表示具有高互信息的示例更有可能受到攻击。 Based on this observation, we propose a novel and effective adversarial training method (InfoAT). InfoAT is encouraged to find examples with high mutual information and exploit them efficiently to improve the final robustness of models.实验结果表明，与几种最先进的方法相比，InfoAT 在不同数据集和模型中实现了最佳的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息瓶颈原理的对抗训练方法InfoAT，通过识别并高效利用高互信息样本提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练中困难样本对模型鲁棒性影响更大，但有效识别这些样本的启发式方法存在困难。
AI.method: 受信息瓶颈原理启发，通过计算输入与潜在表示的互信息识别易受攻击样本，并在对抗训练中优先利用此类样本。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和模型上，InfoAT相较现有方法取得最佳鲁棒性表现。
AI.conclusion: InfoAT通过有效利用高互信息样本提升模型鲁棒性，验证了信息瓶颈原理在对抗训练中的有效性。

authors_text: Shuyan Huang,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Xiangen Hu,Zitao Liu,Weiqi Luo
title: A Design of A Simple Yet Effective Exercise Recommendation System in K-12 Online Learning
title_zh: K-12在线学习中简单而有效的运动推荐系统的设计
comment: AIED 2022: The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (accepted)
comments: AIED 2022: The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (accepted)
abstract: We propose a simple but effective method to recommend exercises with high quality and diversity for students. Our method is made up of three key components: (1) candidate generation module; (2) diversity-promoting module; and (3) scope restriction module. The proposed method improves the overall recommendation performance in terms of recall, and increases the diversity of the recommended candidates by 0.81\% compared to the baselines.
summary: We propose a simple but effective method to recommend exercises with high quality and diversity for students. Our method is made up of three key components: (1) candidate generation module; (2) diversity-promoting module; and (3) scope restriction module. The proposed method improves the overall recommendation performance in terms of recall, and increases the diversity of the recommended candidates by 0.81\% compared to the baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来为学生推荐高质量和多样性的练习。我们的方法由三个关键部分组成：（1）候选生成模块； (2)多样性促进模块； (3)范围限制模块。所提出的方法提高了召回率方面的整体推荐性能，并且与基线相比，推荐候选的多样性增加了 0.81%。

AI.tldr: 设计一个针对K-12在线学习的简单有效的练习推荐系统，提升推荐质量与多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统在保证练习质量的同时难以兼顾多样性，需改进以满足K-12学生个性化学习需求。
AI.method: 提出包含候选生成模块、多样性促进模块和范围限制模块的三阶段推荐方法。
AI.result: 相比基线方法，召回率整体提升且推荐多样性增加0.81%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持推荐质量的同时有效提升多样性，适用于K-12在线教育场景。

search_text: A Design of A Simple Yet Effective Exercise Recommendation System in K-12 Online Learning K-12在线学习中简单而有效的运动推荐系统的设计 We propose a simple but effective method to recommend exercises with high quality and diversity for students. Our method is made up of three key components: (1) candidate generation module; (2) diversity-promoting module; and (3) scope restriction module. The proposed method improves the overall recommendation performance in terms of recall, and increases the diversity of the recommended candidates by 0.81\% compared to the baselines. 我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来为学生推荐高质量和多样性的练习。我们的方法由三个关键部分组成：（1）候选生成模块； (2)多样性促进模块； (3)范围限制模块。所提出的方法提高了召回率方面的整体推荐性能，并且与基线相比，推荐候选的多样性增加了 0.81%。 设计一个针对K-12在线学习的简单有效的练习推荐系统，提升推荐质量与多样性。 Shuyan Huang,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Xiangen Hu,Zitao Liu,Weiqi Luo cs.IR,cs.AI

title: Speech Quality Assessment through MOS using Non-Matching References
title_zh: 使用不匹配参考通过 MOS 进行语音质量评估
abstract: Human judgments obtained through Mean Opinion Scores (MOS) are the most reliable way to assess the quality of speech signals. However, several recent attempts to automatically estimate MOS using deep learning approaches lack robustness and generalization capabilities, limiting their use in real-world applications. In this work, we present a novel framework, NORESQA-MOS, for estimating the MOS of a speech signal. Unlike prior works, our approach uses non-matching references as a form of conditioning to ground the MOS estimation by neural networks. We show that NORESQA-MOS provides better generalization and more robust MOS estimation than previous state-of-the-art methods such as DNSMOS and NISQA, even though we use a smaller training set. Moreover, we also show that our generic framework can be combined with other learning methods such as self-supervised learning and can further supplement the benefits from these methods.
summary: Human judgments obtained through Mean Opinion Scores (MOS) are the most reliable way to assess the quality of speech signals. However, several recent attempts to automatically estimate MOS using deep learning approaches lack robustness and generalization capabilities, limiting their use in real-world applications. In this work, we present a novel framework, NORESQA-MOS, for estimating the MOS of a speech signal. Unlike prior works, our approach uses non-matching references as a form of conditioning to ground the MOS estimation by neural networks. We show that NORESQA-MOS provides better generalization and more robust MOS estimation than previous state-of-the-art methods such as DNSMOS and NISQA, even though we use a smaller training set. Moreover, we also show that our generic framework can be combined with other learning methods such as self-supervised learning and can further supplement the benefits from these methods.
abstract_zh: 通过平均意见得分 (MOS) 获得的人类判断是评估语音信号质量的最可靠方法。 However, several recent attempts to automatically estimate MOS using deep learning approaches lack robustness and generalization capabilities, limiting their use in real-world applications.在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架 NORESQA-MOS，用于估计语音信号的 MOS。 Unlike prior works, our approach uses non-matching references as a form of conditioning to ground the MOS estimation by neural networks. We show that NORESQA-MOS provides better generalization and more robust MOS estimation than previous state-of-the-art methods such as DNSMOS and NISQA, even though we use a smaller training set. Moreover, we also show that our generic framework can be combined with other learning methods such as self-supervised learning and can further supplement the benefits from these methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非匹配参考的新型语音质量评估框架NORESQA-MOS，用于更准确地估计语音信号的MOS得分。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在自动估计MOS时存在鲁棒性和泛化能力不足的问题，限制了其在实际应用中的效果。
AI.method: 通过引入非匹配参考作为条件输入，利用神经网络进行MOS估计，并结合自监督学习等方法增强模型性能。
AI.result: NORESQA-MOS在较小训练集下优于DNSMOS和NISQA等现有方法，且具有更好的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过非匹配参考条件有效提升了语音质量评估的准确性，且具备与其他学习方法结合的扩展性。

authors_text: Shriya Atmakuri,Tejas Chheda,Dinesh Kandula,Nishant Yadav,Taesung Lee,Hessel Tuinhof
title: Robustness of Explanation Methods for NLP Models
title_zh: NLP 模型解释方法的稳健性
abstract: Explanation methods have emerged as an important tool to highlight the features responsible for the predictions of neural networks. There is mounting evidence that many explanation methods are rather unreliable and susceptible to malicious manipulations. In this paper, we particularly aim to understand the robustness of explanation methods in the context of text modality. We provide initial insights and results towards devising a successful adversarial attack against text explanations. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt to evaluate the adversarial robustness of an explanation method. Our experiments show the explanation method can be largely disturbed for up to 86% of the tested samples with small changes in the input sentence and its semantics.
summary: Explanation methods have emerged as an important tool to highlight the features responsible for the predictions of neural networks. There is mounting evidence that many explanation methods are rather unreliable and susceptible to malicious manipulations. In this paper, we particularly aim to understand the robustness of explanation methods in the context of text modality. We provide initial insights and results towards devising a successful adversarial attack against text explanations. To our knowledge, this is the first attempt to evaluate the adversarial robustness of an explanation method. Our experiments show the explanation method can be largely disturbed for up to 86% of the tested samples with small changes in the input sentence and its semantics.
abstract_zh: 解释方法已成为突出神经网络预测特征的重要工具。越来越多的证据表明，许多解释方法相当不可靠，并且容易受到恶意操纵。在本文中，我们特别旨在了解文本模态背景下解释方法的稳健性。我们提供了初步的见解和结果，以设计针对文本解释的成功的对抗性攻击。据我们所知，这是评估解释方法的对抗稳健性的首次尝试。我们的实验表明，只要输入句子及其语义发生微小变化，高达 86% 的测试样本的解释方法就会受到很大干扰。

AI.tldr: 本文研究文本模态下NLP模型解释方法的鲁棒性，并首次尝试设计对抗攻击以评估其可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法存在不可靠性和易受恶意操纵的问题，但文本模态下的对抗鲁棒性尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 通过设计对抗性扰动，在保持输入语义的前提下微调文本，观察解释方法的输出变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，86%的测试样本在输入发生微小语义变化时，其解释结果被显著干扰。
AI.conclusion: 当前解释方法对对抗性扰动高度敏感，需进一步研究提升其鲁棒性以确保可信度。

title: Open-source objective-oriented framework for head-related transfer function
title_zh: 用于头部相关传递函数的开源目标导向框架
comment: Not submitted anywhere in the current form
comments: Not submitted anywhere in the current form
abstract: Throughout last 30 years, numerous head-related transfer function (HRTF) models have been developed and there are more to come. This paper describes a framework based on objective-oriented programming paradigm, in which each HRTF representation method can be implemented as a separate class. Its modular structure allows the source code to be conveniently shared between researchers, while common interface provides easy access to data regardless of the internal structure of the classes. The paper discusses difficulties of designing the framework, maintaining the balance between its flexibility and finding common features of every possible directivity representation. Exemplary use cases are included and explained. Adoption of the framework will enhance possibilities of accuracy comparison between various HRTF models, thus improving the evaluation of current and future representation methods. The framework, developed in the form of a MATLAB toolbox, is designed to handle not only HRTFs but also other types of spatial data, such as e.g. sound source directivity, microphone directivity, etc.

abstract_zh: Throughout last 30 years, numerous head-related transfer function (HRTF) models have been developed and there are more to come.本文描述了一个基于面向目标的编程范式的框架，其中每个HRTF表示方法都可以作为单独的类来实现。其模块化结构允许研究人员之间方便地共享源代码，而无论类的内部结构如何，通用接口都可以轻松访问数据。本文讨论了设计框架、保持其灵活性和找到每种可能的方向性表示的共同特征之间的平衡的困难。 Exemplary use cases are included and explained.该框架的采用将增强各种HRTF模型之间精度比较的可能性，从而改善对当前和未来表示方法的评估。该框架以 MATLAB 工具箱的形式开发，不仅可以处理 HRTF，还可以处理其他类型的空间数据，例如空间数据。 sound source directivity, microphone directivity, etc.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源的面向对象框架，用于实现和比较不同头相关传递函数（HRTF）模型，支持模块化设计和数据共享。
AI.motivation: 现有HRTF模型众多且缺乏统一框架，难以高效比较和评估不同方法的准确性，需构建灵活且标准化的工具促进研究。
AI.method: 基于面向对象编程范式，将每种HRTF表示方法封装为独立类，通过模块化结构和通用接口实现代码共享与数据访问，采用MATLAB工具箱开发。
AI.result: 框架支持HRTF及其他空间数据的处理，提供示例用例，提升不同模型间的准确性比较效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为HRTF研究提供标准化工具，促进模型评估与优化，同时可扩展至其他空间数据领域。

The framework, developed in the form of a MATLAB toolbox, is designed to handle not only HRTFs but also other types of spatial data, such as e.g. sound source directivity, microphone directivity, etc. Throughout last 30 years, numerous head-related transfer function (HRTF) models have been developed and there are more to come.本文描述了一个基于面向目标的编程范式的框架，其中每个HRTF表示方法都可以作为单独的类来实现。其模块化结构允许研究人员之间方便地共享源代码，而无论类的内部结构如何，通用接口都可以轻松访问数据。本文讨论了设计框架、保持其灵活性和找到每种可能的方向性表示的共同特征之间的平衡的困难。 Exemplary use cases are included and explained.该框架的采用将增强各种HRTF模型之间精度比较的可能性，从而改善对当前和未来表示方法的评估。该框架以 MATLAB 工具箱的形式开发，不仅可以处理 HRTF，还可以处理其他类型的空间数据，例如空间数据。 sound source directivity, microphone directivity, etc. 本文提出一个开源的面向对象框架，用于实现和比较不同头相关传递函数（HRTF）模型，支持模块化设计和数据共享。 Adam Szwajcowski eess.AS,cs.SD

title: AnyMorph: Learning Transferable Polices By Inferring Agent Morphology
title_zh: AnyMorph：通过推断代理形态来学习可转移策略
abstract: The prototypical approach to reinforcement learning involves training policies tailored to a particular agent from scratch for every new morphology. Recent work aims to eliminate the re-training of policies by investigating whether a morphology-agnostic policy, trained on a diverse set of agents with similar task objectives, can be transferred to new agents with unseen morphologies without re-training. This is a challenging problem that required previous approaches to use hand-designed descriptions of the new agent's morphology. Instead of hand-designing this description, we propose a data-driven method that learns a representation of morphology directly from the reinforcement learning objective. Ours is the first reinforcement learning algorithm that can train a policy to generalize to new agent morphologies without requiring a description of the agent's morphology in advance. We evaluate our approach on the standard benchmark for agent-agnostic control, and improve over the current state of the art in zero-shot generalization to new agents. Importantly, our method attains good performance without an explicit description of morphology.
summary: The prototypical approach to reinforcement learning involves training policies tailored to a particular agent from scratch for every new morphology. Recent work aims to eliminate the re-training of policies by investigating whether a morphology-agnostic policy, trained on a diverse set of agents with similar task objectives, can be transferred to new agents with unseen morphologies without re-training. This is a challenging problem that required previous approaches to use hand-designed descriptions of the new agent's morphology. Instead of hand-designing this description, we propose a data-driven method that learns a representation of morphology directly from the reinforcement learning objective. Ours is the first reinforcement learning algorithm that can train a policy to generalize to new agent morphologies without requiring a description of the agent's morphology in advance. We evaluate our approach on the standard benchmark for agent-agnostic control, and improve over the current state of the art in zero-shot generalization to new agents. Importantly, our method attains good performance without an explicit description of morphology.
abstract_zh: 强化学习的原型方法涉及针对每种新形态从头开始为特定代理量身定制的训练策略。最近的工作旨在通过调查在具有相似任务目标的不同智能体上训练的形态不可知策略是否可以转移到具有未见过的形态的新智能体而无需重新训练，从而消除策略的重新训练。 This is a challenging problem that required previous approaches to use hand-designed descriptions of the new agent's morphology.我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法，可以直接从强化学习目标中学习形态的表示，而不是手动设计这种描述。我们的算法是第一个强化学习算法，可以训练策略以泛化到新的代理形态，而无需提前描述代理的形态。我们根据与代理无关的控制的标准基准来评估我们的方法，并改进对新代理的零样本泛化的当前技术水平。 Importantly, our method attains good performance without an explicit description of morphology.

AI.tldr: 开发一种无需预先形态描述即可泛化到新智能体形态的强化学习策略
AI.motivation: 传统方法需为每个新形态从头训练策略，而现有形态无关策略依赖人工设计的形态描述，限制了灵活性和泛化能力
AI.method: 提出数据驱动方法，直接从强化学习目标中学习形态表征，无需显式形态描述即可实现跨形态策略迁移
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中超越现有最优方法，在零样本形态泛化任务中取得更优性能且无需形态描述
AI.conclusion: 证明了通过强化学习目标隐式学习形态表征的可行性，为通用智能体控制提供了新范式

authors_text: Yanjie Fu,Meng Ge,Haoran Yin,Xinyuan Qian,Longbiao Wang,Gaoyan Zhang,Jianwu Dang
title: Iterative Sound Source Localization for Unknown Number of Sources
title_zh: 未知数量声源的迭代声源定位
abstract: Sound source localization aims to seek the direction of arrival (DOA) of all sound sources from the observed multi-channel audio. For the practical problem of unknown number of sources, existing localization algorithms attempt to predict a likelihood-based coding (i.e., spatial spectrum) and employ a pre-determined threshold to detect the source number and corresponding DOA value. However, these threshold-based algorithms are not stable since they are limited by the careful choice of threshold. To address this problem, we propose an iterative sound source localization approach called ISSL, which can iteratively extract each source's DOA without threshold until the termination criterion is met. Unlike threshold-based algorithms, ISSL designs an active source detector network based on binary classifier to accept residual spatial spectrum and decide whether to stop the iteration. By doing so, our ISSL can deal with an arbitrary number of sources, even more than the number of sources seen during the training stage. The experimental results show that our ISSL achieves significant performance improvements in both DOA estimation and source number detection compared with the existing threshold-based algorithms.
summary: Sound source localization aims to seek the direction of arrival (DOA) of all sound sources from the observed multi-channel audio. For the practical problem of unknown number of sources, existing localization algorithms attempt to predict a likelihood-based coding (i.e., spatial spectrum) and employ a pre-determined threshold to detect the source number and corresponding DOA value. However, these threshold-based algorithms are not stable since they are limited by the careful choice of threshold. To address this problem, we propose an iterative sound source localization approach called ISSL, which can iteratively extract each source's DOA without threshold until the termination criterion is met. Unlike threshold-based algorithms, ISSL designs an active source detector network based on binary classifier to accept residual spatial spectrum and decide whether to stop the iteration. By doing so, our ISSL can deal with an arbitrary number of sources, even more than the number of sources seen during the training stage. The experimental results show that our ISSL achieves significant performance improvements in both DOA estimation and source number detection compared with the existing threshold-based algorithms.
abstract_zh: 声源定位旨在从观察到的多通道音频中寻找所有声源的到达方向（DOA）。针对源数量未知的实际问题，现有的定位算法尝试预测基于似然的编码（即空间谱），并采用预先确定的阈值来检测源数量和相应的DOA值。然而，这些基于阈值的算法并不稳定，因为它们受到阈值仔细选择的限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为 ISSL 的迭代声源定位方法，它可以迭代地提取每个声源的 DOA，无需阈值，直到满足终止标准。与基于阈值的算法不同，ISL设计了一个基于二元分类器的主动源检测器网络来接受残留空间谱并决定是否停止迭代。通过这样做，我们的 ISSL 可以处理任意数量的源，甚至比训练阶段看到的源数量还要多。实验结果表明，与现有的基于阈值的算法相比，我们的 ISSL 在 DOA 估计和源数检测方面都取得了显着的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预设阈值的迭代声源定位方法ISSL，用于解决未知数量声源的定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于阈值的声源定位算法因阈值选择敏感导致稳定性不足，难以准确检测未知数量的声源。
AI.method: 设计迭代声源定位框架ISSL，通过残差空间谱的二分类器主动检测声源，无需预设阈值且支持训练阶段未见过的声源数量。
AI.result: 实验表明ISSL在DOA估计精度和声源数量检测方面显著优于传统阈值法。
AI.conclusion: ISSL通过迭代机制和分类器设计，实现了对任意数量声源的鲁棒定位，突破了传统方法的阈值限制。

title: Indecision Trees: Learning Argument-Based Reasoning under Quantified Uncertainty
title_zh: 犹豫不决树：在量化不确定性下学习基于论证的推理
abstract: Using Machine Learning systems in the real world can often be problematic, with inexplicable black-box models, the assumed certainty of imperfect measurements, or providing a single classification instead of a probability distribution. This paper introduces Indecision Trees, a modification to Decision Trees which learn under uncertainty, can perform inference under uncertainty, provide a robust distribution over the possible labels, and can be disassembled into a set of logical arguments for use in other reasoning systems.
summary: Using Machine Learning systems in the real world can often be problematic, with inexplicable black-box models, the assumed certainty of imperfect measurements, or providing a single classification instead of a probability distribution. This paper introduces Indecision Trees, a modification to Decision Trees which learn under uncertainty, can perform inference under uncertainty, provide a robust distribution over the possible labels, and can be disassembled into a set of logical arguments for use in other reasoning systems.
abstract_zh: 在现实世界中使用机器学习系统通常会出现问题，比如难以解释的黑盒模型、不完美测量的假设确定性，或者提供单一分类而不是概率分布。本文介绍了犹豫不决树，它是决策树的一种修改，它可以在不确定性下学习，可以在不确定性下执行推理，提供可能标签的稳健分布，并且可以分解为一组逻辑参数以用于其他推理系统。

AI.tldr: 提出一种改进的决策树模型——Indecision Trees，用于在量化不确定性下进行基于论据的推理，提供稳健的概率分布并支持逻辑分解。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型存在黑箱特性、假设测量绝对确定性及仅输出单一分类等问题，难以应对现实场景中的不确定性与可解释性需求。
AI.method: 通过修改决策树结构，引入量化不确定性处理机制，使模型能够输出标签的概率分布，并将决策过程分解为可解释的逻辑论据集合。
AI.result: 实现了支持不确定性推理的决策树模型，可生成稳健的预测分布，并成功将模型分解为逻辑论证形式以供其他系统使用。
AI.conclusion: Indecision Trees有效解决了传统模型在不确定性处理与可解释性方面的缺陷，为复杂场景下的机器学习应用提供了新思路。

tldr: 提出一种改进的决策树模型——Indecision Trees，用于在量化不确定性下进行基于论据的推理，提供稳健的概率分布并支持逻辑分解。
motivation: 传统机器学习模型存在黑箱特性、假设测量绝对确定性及仅输出单一分类等问题，难以应对现实场景中的不确定性与可解释性需求。
method: 通过修改决策树结构，引入量化不确定性处理机制，使模型能够输出标签的概率分布，并将决策过程分解为可解释的逻辑论据集合。
result: 实现了支持不确定性推理的决策树模型，可生成稳健的预测分布，并成功将模型分解为逻辑论证形式以供其他系统使用。
conclusion: Indecision Trees有效解决了传统模型在不确定性处理与可解释性方面的缺陷，为复杂场景下的机器学习应用提供了新思路。
search_text: Indecision Trees: Learning Argument-Based Reasoning under Quantified Uncertainty 犹豫不决树：在量化不确定性下学习基于论证的推理 Using Machine Learning systems in the real world can often be problematic, with inexplicable black-box models, the assumed certainty of imperfect measurements, or providing a single classification instead of a probability distribution. This paper introduces Indecision Trees, a modification to Decision Trees which learn under uncertainty, can perform inference under uncertainty, provide a robust distribution over the possible labels, and can be disassembled into a set of logical arguments for use in other reasoning systems. 在现实世界中使用机器学习系统通常会出现问题，比如难以解释的黑盒模型、不完美测量的假设确定性，或者提供单一分类而不是概率分布。本文介绍了犹豫不决树，它是决策树的一种修改，它可以在不确定性下学习，可以在不确定性下执行推理，提供可能标签的稳健分布，并且可以分解为一组逻辑参数以用于其他推理系统。 提出一种改进的决策树模型——Indecision Trees，用于在量化不确定性下进行基于论据的推理，提供稳健的概率分布并支持逻辑分解。 Jonathan S. Kent,David H. Menager cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.LO

title: Adversarial Zoom Lens: A Novel Physical-World Attack to DNNs
title_zh: 对抗性变焦镜头：对 DNN 的一种新颖的物理世界攻击
abstract: Although deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be fragile, no one has studied the effects of zooming-in and zooming-out of images in the physical world on DNNs performance. In this paper, we demonstrate a novel physical adversarial attack technique called Adversarial Zoom Lens (AdvZL), which uses a zoom lens to zoom in and out of pictures of the physical world, fooling DNNs without changing the characteristics of the target object. The proposed method is so far the only adversarial attack technique that does not add physical adversarial perturbation attack DNNs. In a digital environment, we construct a data set based on AdvZL to verify the antagonism of equal-scale enlarged images to DNNs. In the physical environment, we manipulate the zoom lens to zoom in and out of the target object, and generate adversarial samples. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of AdvZL in both digital and physical environments. We further analyze the antagonism of the proposed data set to the improved DNNs. On the other hand, we provide a guideline for defense against AdvZL by means of adversarial training. Finally, we look into the threat possibilities of the proposed approach to future autonomous driving and variant attack ideas similar to the proposed attack.
summary: Although deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be fragile, no one has studied the effects of zooming-in and zooming-out of images in the physical world on DNNs performance. In this paper, we demonstrate a novel physical adversarial attack technique called Adversarial Zoom Lens (AdvZL), which uses a zoom lens to zoom in and out of pictures of the physical world, fooling DNNs without changing the characteristics of the target object. The proposed method is so far the only adversarial attack technique that does not add physical adversarial perturbation attack DNNs. In a digital environment, we construct a data set based on AdvZL to verify the antagonism of equal-scale enlarged images to DNNs. In the physical environment, we manipulate the zoom lens to zoom in and out of the target object, and generate adversarial samples. The experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of AdvZL in both digital and physical environments. We further analyze the antagonism of the proposed data set to the improved DNNs. On the other hand, we provide a guideline for defense against AdvZL by means of adversarial training. Finally, we look into the threat possibilities of the proposed approach to future autonomous driving and variant attack ideas similar to the proposed attack.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络 (DNN) 众所周知很脆弱，但没有人研究过物理世界中图像的放大和缩小对 DNN 性能的影响。在本文中，我们演示了一种称为对抗变焦镜头（AdvZL）的新型物理对抗攻击技术，该技术使用变焦镜头放大和缩小物理世界的图片，在不改变目标对象特征的情况下愚弄 DNN。所提出的方法是迄今为止唯一不添加物理对抗性扰动攻击 DNN 的对抗性攻击技术。在数字环境中，我们构建了基于AdvZL的数据集来验证等尺度放大图像对DNN的对抗性。在物理环境中，我们操纵变焦镜头放大和缩小目标物体，并生成对抗性样本。实验结果证明了 AdvZL ​​在数字和物理环境中的有效性。我们进一步分析了所提出的数据集与改进的 DNN 的对抗。另一方面，我们提供了通过对抗性训练防御 AdvZL ​​的指南。最后，我们研究了所提出的未来自动驾驶方法的威胁可能性以及与所提出的攻击类似的变体攻击思想。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Adversarial Zoom Lens（AdvZL）的新物理世界对抗攻击方法，通过调整镜头焦距在不改变目标物体特征的情况下欺骗深度神经网络（DNNs）。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击多依赖物理扰动，而未研究物理世界中图像缩放对DNNs的影响。本文旨在探索无需物理扰动的新型攻击方式，并分析其对改进DNNs的威胁。
AI.method: 在数字环境中构建AdvZL数据集验证等比例缩放图像的对抗性；在物理环境中通过调整镜头焦距生成对抗样本，并通过对抗训练提出防御指南。
AI.result: AdvZL在数字和物理环境中均有效，对抗数据集对改进DNNs具有显著威胁，对抗训练可缓解攻击影响，同时揭示了该方法对自动驾驶等未来技术的潜在风险。
AI.conclusion: AdvZL是首个无需物理扰动的对抗攻击方法，其有效性及对自动驾驶系统的威胁值得警惕，未来需进一步研究类似攻击的防御策略。

title: Relative Survivable Network Design
title_zh: 相对生存网络设计
abstract: One of the most important and well-studied settings for network design is edge-connectivity requirements. This encompasses uniform demands such as the Minimum $k$-Edge-Connected Spanning Subgraph problem ($k$-ECSS), as well as nonuniform demands such as the Survivable Network Design problem. A weakness of these formulations, though, is that we are not able to ask for fault-tolerance larger than the connectivity. We introduce and study new variants of these problems under a notion of relative fault-tolerance. Informally, we require not that two nodes are connected if there are a bounded number of faults (as in the classical setting), but that two nodes are connected if there are a bounded number of faults and the two nodes are connected in the underlying graph post-faults. That is, the subgraph we build must "behave" identically to the underlying graph with respect to connectivity after bounded faults. We define and introduce these problems, and provide the first approximation algorithms: a $(1+4/k)$-approximation for the unweighted relative version of $k$-ECSS, a $2$-approximation for the weighted relative version of $k$-ECSS, and a $27/4$-approximation for the special case of Relative Survivable Network Design with only a single demand with a connectivity requirement of $3$. To obtain these results, we introduce a number of technical ideas that may of independent interest. First, we give a generalization of Jain's iterative rounding analysis that works even when the cut-requirement function is not weakly supermodular, but instead satisfies a weaker definition we introduce and term local weak supermodularity. Second, we prove a structure theorem and design an approximation algorithm utilizing a new decomposition based on important separators, which are structures commonly used in fixed-parameter algorithms that have not commonly been used in approximation algorithms.
summary: One of the most important and well-studied settings for network design is edge-connectivity requirements. This encompasses uniform demands such as the Minimum $k$-Edge-Connected Spanning Subgraph problem ($k$-ECSS), as well as nonuniform demands such as the Survivable Network Design problem. A weakness of these formulations, though, is that we are not able to ask for fault-tolerance larger than the connectivity. We introduce and study new variants of these problems under a notion of relative fault-tolerance. Informally, we require not that two nodes are connected if there are a bounded number of faults (as in the classical setting), but that two nodes are connected if there are a bounded number of faults and the two nodes are connected in the underlying graph post-faults. That is, the subgraph we build must "behave" identically to the underlying graph with respect to connectivity after bounded faults. We define and introduce these problems, and provide the first approximation algorithms: a $(1+4/k)$-approximation for the unweighted relative version of $k$-ECSS, a $2$-approximation for the weighted relative version of $k$-ECSS, and a $27/4$-approximation for the special case of Relative Survivable Network Design with only a single demand with a connectivity requirement of $3$. To obtain these results, we introduce a number of technical ideas that may of independent interest. First, we give a generalization of Jain's iterative rounding analysis that works even when the cut-requirement function is not weakly supermodular, but instead satisfies a weaker definition we introduce and term local weak supermodularity. Second, we prove a structure theorem and design an approximation algorithm utilizing a new decomposition based on important separators, which are structures commonly used in fixed-parameter algorithms that have not commonly been used in approximation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 网络设计最重要且经过充分研究的设置之一是边缘连接要求。这包括统一要求，例如最小 $k$-边连接生成子图问题 ($k$-ECSS)，以及非统一要求，例如可生存网络设计问题。然而，这些公式的一个弱点是我们无法要求比连接性更大的容错能力。我们在相对容错的概念下引入并研究这些问题的新变体。非正式地，我们不要求在存在有限数量的故障时连接两个节点（如在经典设置中），而是在存在有限数量的故障时连接两个节点，并且这两个节点在故障后的底层图中连接。也就是说，我们构建的子图在有界故障后的连通性方面必须与底层图“表现”相同。我们定义并介绍这些问题，并提供第一个近似算法：$k$-ECSS 的未加权相对版本的 $(1+4/k)$ 近似，$k$-ECSS 的加权相对版本的 $2$ 近似，以及仅具有 $3$ 连接要求的单一需求的相对可生存网络设计的特殊情况的 $27/4$ 近似。为了获得这些结果，我们引入了一些可能具有独立意义的技术想法。首先，我们给出了 Jain 迭代舍入分析的概括，即使当切割要求函数不是弱超模性，而是满足我们引入并称为局部弱超模性的较弱定义时，该分析也能起作用。其次，我们证明了结构定理，并利用基于重要分隔符的新分解设计了近似算法，这些分隔符是固定参数算法中常用的结构，但在近似算法中并不常用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并研究了相对容错网络设计问题，旨在构建在有限故障下与底层图连通性行为一致的子图，并开发了相应的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 传统网络设计模型无法满足超过连通性的容错需求，需引入新的相对容错概念以确保故障后节点连接性与原图一致。
AI.method: 推广Jain的迭代舍入分析（引入局部弱超模性），结合重要分隔符分解结构定理设计近似算法。
AI.result: 提出无权重相对k-ECSS的(1+4/k)近似算法、有权重版2近似算法，以及单需求3连通性相对生存网络的27/4近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 新模型与算法为网络设计提供了更灵活的容错框架，技术手段（如局部弱超模性分析）可能对其他问题有独立价值。

Informally, we require not that two nodes are connected if there are a bounded number of faults (as in the classical setting), but that two nodes are connected if there are a bounded number of faults and the two nodes are connected in the underlying graph post-faults. That is, the subgraph we build must "behave" identically to the underlying graph with respect to connectivity after bounded faults. We define and introduce these problems, and provide the first approximation algorithms: a $(1+4/k)$-approximation for the unweighted relative version of $k$-ECSS, a $2$-approximation for the weighted relative version of $k$-ECSS, and a $27/4$-approximation for the special case of Relative Survivable Network Design with only a single demand with a connectivity requirement of $3$. To obtain these results, we introduce a number of technical ideas that may of independent interest. First, we give a generalization of Jain's iterative rounding analysis that works even when the cut-requirement function is not weakly supermodular, but instead satisfies a weaker definition we introduce and term local weak supermodularity. Second, we prove a structure theorem and design an approximation algorithm utilizing a new decomposition based on important separators, which are structures commonly used in fixed-parameter algorithms that have not commonly been used in approximation algorithms. 网络设计最重要且经过充分研究的设置之一是边缘连接要求。这包括统一要求，例如最小 $k$-边连接生成子图问题 ($k$-ECSS)，以及非统一要求，例如可生存网络设计问题。然而，这些公式的一个弱点是我们无法要求比连接性更大的容错能力。我们在相对容错的概念下引入并研究这些问题的新变体。非正式地，我们不要求在存在有限数量的故障时连接两个节点（如在经典设置中），而是在存在有限数量的故障时连接两个节点，并且这两个节点在故障后的底层图中连接。也就是说，我们构建的子图在有界故障后的连通性方面必须与底层图“表现”相同。我们定义并介绍这些问题，并提供第一个近似算法：$k$-ECSS 的未加权相对版本的 $(1+4/k)$ 近似，$k$-ECSS 的加权相对版本的 $2$ 近似，以及仅具有 $3$ 连接要求的单一需求的相对可生存网络设计的特殊情况的 $27/4$ 近似。为了获得这些结果，我们引入了一些可能具有独立意义的技术想法。首先，我们给出了 Jain 迭代舍入分析的概括，即使当切割要求函数不是弱超模性，而是满足我们引入并称为局部弱超模性的较弱定义时，该分析也能起作用。其次，我们证明了结构定理，并利用基于重要分隔符的新分解设计了近似算法，这些分隔符是固定参数算法中常用的结构，但在近似算法中并不常用。 本文提出并研究了相对容错网络设计问题，旨在构建在有限故障下与底层图连通性行为一致的子图，并开发了相应的近似算法。 Michael Dinitz,Ama Koranteng,Guy Kortsarz cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Zhangyang Gao,Cheng Tan,Lirong Wu,Stan Z. Li
title: CoSP: Co-supervised pretraining of pocket and ligand
title_zh: CoSP：口袋和配体的共同监督预训练
abstract: Can we inject the pocket-ligand interaction knowledge into the pre-trained model and jointly learn their chemical space? Pretraining molecules and proteins has attracted considerable attention in recent years, while most of these approaches focus on learning one of the chemical spaces and lack the injection of biological knowledge. We propose a co-supervised pretraining (CoSP) framework to simultaneously learn 3D pocket and ligand representations. We use a gated geometric message passing layer to model both 3D pockets and ligands, where each node's chemical features, geometric position and orientation are considered. To learn biological meaningful embeddings, we inject the pocket-ligand interaction knowledge into the pretraining model via contrastive loss. Considering the specificity of molecules, we further propose a chemical similarity-enhanced negative sampling strategy to improve the contrastive learning performance. Through extensive experiments, we conclude that CoSP can achieve competitive results in pocket matching, molecule property predictions, and virtual screening.
summary: Can we inject the pocket-ligand interaction knowledge into the pre-trained model and jointly learn their chemical space? Pretraining molecules and proteins has attracted considerable attention in recent years, while most of these approaches focus on learning one of the chemical spaces and lack the injection of biological knowledge. We propose a co-supervised pretraining (CoSP) framework to simultaneously learn 3D pocket and ligand representations. We use a gated geometric message passing layer to model both 3D pockets and ligands, where each node's chemical features, geometric position and orientation are considered. To learn biological meaningful embeddings, we inject the pocket-ligand interaction knowledge into the pretraining model via contrastive loss. Considering the specificity of molecules, we further propose a chemical similarity-enhanced negative sampling strategy to improve the contrastive learning performance. Through extensive experiments, we conclude that CoSP can achieve competitive results in pocket matching, molecule property predictions, and virtual screening.
abstract_zh: Can we inject the pocket-ligand interaction knowledge into the pre-trained model and jointly learn their chemical space?近年来，预训练分子和蛋白质引起了相当大的关注，而这些方法大多数集中于学习化学空间之一，缺乏生物学知识的注入。 We propose a co-supervised pretraining (CoSP) framework to simultaneously learn 3D pocket and ligand representations.我们使用门控几何消息传递层对 3D 口袋和配体进行建模，其中考虑了每个节点的化学特征、几何位置和方向。 To learn biological meaningful embeddings, we inject the pocket-ligand interaction knowledge into the pretraining model via contrastive loss.考虑到分子的特异性，我们进一步提出了化学相似性增强的负采样策略来提高对比学习性能。通过大量的实验，我们得出结论，CoSP 在口袋匹配、分子特性预测和虚拟筛选方面可以取得有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CoSP的协同监督预训练框架，用于同时学习蛋白质口袋和配体的三维表示。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练方法多单独学习分子或蛋白质的化学空间，缺乏对生物相互作用知识的注入，难以捕捉口袋-配体间的生物学意义。
AI.method: 采用门控几何消息传递层建模口袋和配体的化学特征、几何位置及方向，并通过对比损失注入相互作用知识，结合化学相似性增强的负采样策略优化对比学习。
AI.result: 在口袋匹配、分子属性预测和虚拟筛选任务中取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: CoSP通过整合生物学知识和化学相似性负采样策略，有效学习到具有生物学意义的嵌入表示，提升预训练模型性能。

title: Reinforcement learning based adaptive metaheuristics
title_zh: 基于强化学习的自适应元启发法
comment: To appear in the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) 2022, Companion Proceedings
comments: To appear in the Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO) 2022, Companion Proceedings
abstract: Parameter adaptation, that is the capability to automatically adjust an algorithm's hyperparameters depending on the problem being faced, is one of the main trends in evolutionary computation applied to numerical optimization. While several handcrafted adaptation policies have been proposed over the years to address this problem, only few attempts have been done so far at applying machine learning to learn such policies. Here, we introduce a general-purpose framework for performing parameter adaptation in continuous-domain metaheuristics based on state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. We demonstrate the applicability of this framework on two algorithms, namely Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategies (CMA-ES) and Differential Evolution (DE), for which we learn, respectively, adaptation policies for the step-size (for CMA-ES), and the scale factor and crossover rate (for DE). We train these policies on a set of 46 benchmark functions at different dimensionalities, with various inputs to the policies, in two settings: one policy per function, and one global policy for all functions. Compared, respectively, to the Cumulative Step-size Adaptation (CSA) policy and to two well-known adaptive DE variants (iDE and jDE), our policies are able to produce competitive results in the majority of cases, especially in the case of DE.
summary: Parameter adaptation, that is the capability to automatically adjust an algorithm's hyperparameters depending on the problem being faced, is one of the main trends in evolutionary computation applied to numerical optimization. While several handcrafted adaptation policies have been proposed over the years to address this problem, only few attempts have been done so far at applying machine learning to learn such policies. Here, we introduce a general-purpose framework for performing parameter adaptation in continuous-domain metaheuristics based on state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms. We demonstrate the applicability of this framework on two algorithms, namely Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategies (CMA-ES) and Differential Evolution (DE), for which we learn, respectively, adaptation policies for the step-size (for CMA-ES), and the scale factor and crossover rate (for DE). We train these policies on a set of 46 benchmark functions at different dimensionalities, with various inputs to the policies, in two settings: one policy per function, and one global policy for all functions. Compared, respectively, to the Cumulative Step-size Adaptation (CSA) policy and to two well-known adaptive DE variants (iDE and jDE), our policies are able to produce competitive results in the majority of cases, especially in the case of DE.
abstract_zh: 参数自适应，即根据所面临的问题自动调整算法的超参数的能力，是应用于数值优化的进化计算的主要趋势之一。尽管多年来已经提出了一些手工制定的适应政策来解决这个问题，但迄今为止在应用机器学习来学习此类政策方面只做了很少的尝试。在这里，我们介绍了一个通用框架，用于基于最先进的强化学习算法在连续域元启发式中执行参数自适应。我们证明了该框架在两种算法上的适用性，即协方差矩阵适应进化策略（CMA-ES）和差分进化（DE），我们分别学习了步长（对于 CMA-ES）以及比例因子和交叉率（对于 DE）的适应策略。我们在不同维度的一组 46 个基准函数上训练这些策略，并在两种设置中对策略进行各种输入：每个函数一个策略，以及所有函数一个全局策略。分别与累积步长自适应（CSA）策略和两种著名的自适应 DE 变体（iDE 和 jDE）相比，我们的策略能够在大多数情况下产生有竞争力的结果，特别是在 DE 的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的通用框架，用于在连续域元启发式算法中实现参数自适应，具体应用于CMA-ES和DE算法。
AI.motivation: 传统元启发式算法的参数调整依赖人工设计策略，难以适应复杂问题。机器学习方法在该领域的应用研究较少，亟需探索自动化参数调整方案。
AI.method: 采用先进强化学习算法构建参数自适应框架，分别针对CMA-ES的步长和DE的缩放因子/交叉率训练适应策略，在46个基准函数上进行多维测试，对比函数特定策略与全局策略效果。
AI.result: 所提策略在多数测试案例中表现优于CSA、iDE和jDE等现有方法，尤其在DE算法中展现出显著竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习框架能有效实现元启发式算法的参数自适应，为数值优化问题提供了新的自动化解决方案。

title: Deformable CNN and Imbalance-Aware Feature Learning for Singing Technique Classification
title_zh: 用于歌唱技术分类的可变形 CNN 和不平衡感知特征学习
abstract: Singing techniques are used for expressive vocal performances by employing temporal fluctuations of the timbre, the pitch, and other components of the voice. Their classification is a challenging task, because of mainly two factors: 1) the fluctuations in singing techniques have a wide variety and are affected by many factors and 2) existing datasets are imbalanced. To deal with these problems, we developed a novel audio feature learning method based on deformable convolution with decoupled training of the feature extractor and the classifier using a class-weighted loss function. The experimental results show the following: 1) the deformable convolution improves the classification results, particularly when it is applied to the last two convolutional layers, and 2) both re-training the classifier and weighting the cross-entropy loss function by a smoothed inverse frequency enhance the classification performance.
summary: Singing techniques are used for expressive vocal performances by employing temporal fluctuations of the timbre, the pitch, and other components of the voice. Their classification is a challenging task, because of mainly two factors: 1) the fluctuations in singing techniques have a wide variety and are affected by many factors and 2) existing datasets are imbalanced. To deal with these problems, we developed a novel audio feature learning method based on deformable convolution with decoupled training of the feature extractor and the classifier using a class-weighted loss function. The experimental results show the following: 1) the deformable convolution improves the classification results, particularly when it is applied to the last two convolutional layers, and 2) both re-training the classifier and weighting the cross-entropy loss function by a smoothed inverse frequency enhance the classification performance.
abstract_zh: 歌唱技术通过利用音色、音高和声音其他成分的时间波动来进行富有表现力的声乐表演。他们的分类是一项具有挑战性的任务，主要因为两个因素：1）歌唱技巧的波动多种多样，受到多种因素的影响；2）现有数据集不平衡。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种基于可变形卷积的新型音频特征学习方法，使用类加权损失函数对特征提取器和分类器进行解耦训练。实验结果表明：1）可变形卷积改善了分类结果，特别是当它应用于最后两个卷积层时，2）重新训练分类器和通过平滑逆频率加权交叉熵损失函数都增强了分类性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合可变形卷积神经网络（Deformable CNN）与不平衡感知特征学习方法，用于解决歌唱技巧分类中的数据不平衡和声学特征多样性问题。
AI.motivation: 歌唱技巧分类面临两大挑战：声学特征波动复杂多变，且现有数据集存在类别不平衡问题，导致传统方法分类性能受限。
AI.method: 设计基于可变形卷积的音频特征学习框架，解耦特征提取器与分类器的训练过程，并采用类别加权损失函数（smoothed inverse frequency加权交叉熵）优化模型。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 可变形卷积在最后两层应用时显著提升分类准确率；2) 分类器重训练与损失函数加权策略协同提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过可变形卷积捕捉声学特征多样性，结合不平衡感知损失函数有效缓解数据偏差，为歌唱技巧分类提供新解决方案。

search_text: Deformable CNN and Imbalance-Aware Feature Learning for Singing Technique Classification 用于歌唱技术分类的可变形 CNN 和不平衡感知特征学习 Singing techniques are used for expressive vocal performances by employing temporal fluctuations of the timbre, the pitch, and other components of the voice. Their classification is a challenging task, because of mainly two factors: 1) the fluctuations in singing techniques have a wide variety and are affected by many factors and 2) existing datasets are imbalanced. To deal with these problems, we developed a novel audio feature learning method based on deformable convolution with decoupled training of the feature extractor and the classifier using a class-weighted loss function. The experimental results show the following: 1) the deformable convolution improves the classification results, particularly when it is applied to the last two convolutional layers, and 2) both re-training the classifier and weighting the cross-entropy loss function by a smoothed inverse frequency enhance the classification performance. 歌唱技术通过利用音色、音高和声音其他成分的时间波动来进行富有表现力的声乐表演。他们的分类是一项具有挑战性的任务，主要因为两个因素：1）歌唱技巧的波动多种多样，受到多种因素的影响；2）现有数据集不平衡。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种基于可变形卷积的新型音频特征学习方法，使用类加权损失函数对特征提取器和分类器进行解耦训练。实验结果表明：1）可变形卷积改善了分类结果，特别是当它应用于最后两个卷积层时，2）重新训练分类器和通过平滑逆频率加权交叉熵损失函数都增强了分类性能。 本文提出结合可变形卷积神经网络（Deformable CNN）与不平衡感知特征学习方法，用于解决歌唱技巧分类中的数据不平衡和声学特征多样性问题。 Yuya Yamamoto,Juhan Nam,Hiroko Terasawa cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS

title: Exact Prosody Cloning in Zero-Shot Multispeaker Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 零样本多扬声器文本转语音中的精确韵律克隆
abstract: The cloning of a speaker's voice using an untranscribed reference sample is one of the great advances of modern neural text-to-speech (TTS) methods. Approaches for mimicking the prosody of a transcribed reference audio have also been proposed recently. In this work, we bring these two tasks together for the first time through utterance level normalization in conjunction with an utterance level speaker embedding. We further introduce a lightweight aligner for extracting fine-grained prosodic features, that can be finetuned on individual samples within seconds. We show that it is possible to clone the voice of a speaker as well as the prosody of a spoken reference independently without any degradation in quality and high similarity to both original voice and prosody, as our objective evaluation and human study show. All of our code and trained models are available, alongside static and interactive demos.
summary: The cloning of a speaker's voice using an untranscribed reference sample is one of the great advances of modern neural text-to-speech (TTS) methods. Approaches for mimicking the prosody of a transcribed reference audio have also been proposed recently. In this work, we bring these two tasks together for the first time through utterance level normalization in conjunction with an utterance level speaker embedding. We further introduce a lightweight aligner for extracting fine-grained prosodic features, that can be finetuned on individual samples within seconds. We show that it is possible to clone the voice of a speaker as well as the prosody of a spoken reference independently without any degradation in quality and high similarity to both original voice and prosody, as our objective evaluation and human study show. All of our code and trained models are available, alongside static and interactive demos.
abstract_zh: 使用未转录的参考样本克隆说话者的声音是现代神经文本转语音 (TTS) 方法的重大进步之一。最近还提出了模仿转录参考音频的韵律的方法。在这项工作中，我们首次通过言语级别归一化与言语级别说话人嵌入相结合，将这两项任务结合在一起。我们进一步引入了一种轻量级对齐器，用于提取细粒度的韵律特征，可以在几秒钟内对单个样本进行微调。正如我们的客观评估和人类研究所表明的那样，我们证明，可以独立克隆说话者的声音以及口语参考的韵律，而不会降低质量，并且与原始语音和韵律高度相似。我们所有的代码和经过训练的模型以及静态和交互式演示都可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需转录参考样本即可同时克隆说话人语音和韵律的零样本多说话人文本到语音合成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需分别处理语音克隆与韵律模仿任务，且难以在无转录参考样本的情况下实现高质量的韵律克隆。
AI.method: 通过话语级归一化与话语级说话人嵌入结合，引入轻量级对齐器提取细粒度韵律特征，并可在数秒内对单个样本进行微调。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能独立克隆语音与韵律，且质量无损，与原始语音和韵律高度相似，代码与模型已开源并提供演示。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次实现无需转录的语音与韵律联合克隆，为零样本TTS提供了新思路与实用工具。

title: On the Optimisation of the GSACA Suffix Array Construction Algorithm
title_zh: GSACA后缀数组构建算法的优化
abstract: The suffix array is arguably one of the most important data structures in sequence analysis and consequently there is a multitude of suffix sorting algorithms. However, to this date the GSACA algorithm introduced in 2015 is the only known non-recursive linear-time suffix array construction algorithm (SACA). Despite its interesting theoretical properties, there has been little effort in improving the algorithm's subpar real-world performance. There is a super-linear algorithm DSH which relies on the same sorting principle and is faster than DivSufSort, the fastest SACA for over a decade. This paper is concerned with analysing the sorting principle used in GSACA and DSH and exploiting its properties in order to give an optimised linear-time algorithm. Our resulting algorithm is not only significantly faster than GSACA but also outperforms DivSufSort and DSH.
summary: The suffix array is arguably one of the most important data structures in sequence analysis and consequently there is a multitude of suffix sorting algorithms. However, to this date the GSACA algorithm introduced in 2015 is the only known non-recursive linear-time suffix array construction algorithm (SACA). Despite its interesting theoretical properties, there has been little effort in improving the algorithm's subpar real-world performance. There is a super-linear algorithm DSH which relies on the same sorting principle and is faster than DivSufSort, the fastest SACA for over a decade. This paper is concerned with analysing the sorting principle used in GSACA and DSH and exploiting its properties in order to give an optimised linear-time algorithm. Our resulting algorithm is not only significantly faster than GSACA but also outperforms DivSufSort and DSH.
abstract_zh: 后缀数组可以说是序列分析中最重要的数据结构之一，因此有多种后缀排序算法。然而，迄今为止，2015 年推出的 GSACA 算法是唯一已知的非递归线性时间后缀数组构造算法 (SACA)。尽管其理论特性很有趣，但在改善该算法低于标准的实际性能方面却几乎没有做出任何努力。有一种超线性算法DSH，它依赖于相同的排序原理，并且比十多年来最快的SACA DivSufSort更快。本文主要分析 GSACA 和 DSH 中使用的排序原理，并利用其特性来给出优化的线性时间算法。我们的算法不仅明显快于 GSACA，而且优于 DivSufSort 和 DSH。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在优化GSACA算法，提升其实际性能并保持线性时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: GSACA算法虽具有线性时间复杂度，但实际性能不佳，而现有超线性算法DSH虽更快但复杂度更高，因此需优化GSACA以提升其实际效率。
AI.method: 通过分析GSACA与DSH的排序原理，利用其特性对算法关键步骤进行优化，以减少实际运行时间。
AI.result: 优化后的算法在保持线性时间复杂度的同时，实际运行速度显著优于GSACA、DivSufSort及DSH。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化GSACA的排序机制，成功提升了其实际性能，证明了改进算法在效率上的优越性。

Our resulting algorithm is not only significantly faster than GSACA but also outperforms DivSufSort and DSH. 后缀数组可以说是序列分析中最重要的数据结构之一，因此有多种后缀排序算法。然而，迄今为止，2015 年推出的 GSACA 算法是唯一已知的非递归线性时间后缀数组构造算法 (SACA)。尽管其理论特性很有趣，但在改善该算法低于标准的实际性能方面却几乎没有做出任何努力。有一种超线性算法DSH，它依赖于相同的排序原理，并且比十多年来最快的SACA DivSufSort更快。本文主要分析 GSACA 和 DSH 中使用的排序原理，并利用其特性来给出优化的线性时间算法。我们的算法不仅明显快于 GSACA，而且优于 DivSufSort 和 DSH。 本文旨在优化GSACA算法，提升其实际性能并保持线性时间复杂度。 Jannik Olbrich,Enno Ohlebusch,Thomas Büchler cs.DS

title: Optimized Views Photogrammetry: Precision Analysis and A Large-scale Case Study in Qingdao
title_zh: 优化视图摄影测量：精度分析及青岛大尺度案例研究
abstract: UAVs have become one of the widely used remote sensing platforms and played a critical role in the construction of smart cities. However, due to the complex environment in urban scenes, secure and accurate data acquisition brings great challenges to 3D modeling and scene updating. Optimal trajectory planning of UAVs and accurate data collection of onboard cameras are non-trivial issues in urban modeling. This study presents the principle of optimized views photogrammetry and verifies its precision and potential in large-scale 3D modeling. Different from oblique photogrammetry, optimized views photogrammetry uses rough models to generate and optimize UAV trajectories, which is achieved through the consideration of model point reconstructability and view point redundancy. Based on the principle of optimized views photogrammetry, this study first conducts a precision analysis of 3D models by using UAV images of optimized views photogrammetry and then executes a large-scale case study in the urban region of Qingdao city, China, to verify its engineering potential. By using GCPs for image orientation precision analysis and TLS (terrestrial laser scanning) point clouds for model quality analysis, experimental results show that optimized views photogrammetry could construct stable image connection networks and could achieve comparable image orientation accuracy. Benefiting from the accurate image acquisition strategy, the quality of mesh models significantly improves, especially for urban areas with serious occlusions, in which 3 to 5 times of higher accuracy has been achieved. Besides, the case study in Qingdao city verifies that optimized views photogrammetry can be a reliable and powerful solution for the large-scale 3D modeling in complex urban scenes.
summary: UAVs have become one of the widely used remote sensing platforms and played a critical role in the construction of smart cities. However, due to the complex environment in urban scenes, secure and accurate data acquisition brings great challenges to 3D modeling and scene updating. Based on the principle of optimized views photogrammetry, this study first conducts a precision analysis of 3D models by using UAV images of optimized views photogrammetry and then executes a large-scale case study in the urban region of Qingdao city, China, to verify its engineering potential. By using GCPs for image orientation precision analysis and TLS (terrestrial laser scanning) point clouds for model quality analysis, experimental results show that optimized views photogrammetry could construct stable image connection networks and could achieve comparable image orientation accuracy. Benefiting from the accurate image acquisition strategy, the quality of mesh models significantly improves, especially for urban areas with serious occlusions, in which 3 to 5 times of higher accuracy has been achieved. Besides, the case study in Qingdao city verifies that optimized views photogrammetry can be a reliable and powerful solution for the large-scale 3D modeling in complex urban scenes.
abstract_zh: 无人机已成为广泛应用的遥感平台之一，在智慧城市建设中发挥着关键作用。然而，由于城市场景环境复杂，安全、准确的数据采集给3D建模和场景更新带来了巨大的挑战。无人机的最佳轨迹规划和机载摄像头的准确数据收集是城市建模中的重要问题。本研究提出了优化视图摄影测量的原理，并验证了其在大规模 3D 建模中的精度和潜力。与倾斜摄影测量不同，优化视图摄影测量使用粗糙模型来生成和优化无人机轨迹，这是通过考虑模型点可重构性和视点冗余来实现的。本研究基于优化视野摄影测量原理，首先利用无人机优化视野摄影测量图像对3D模型进行精密分析，然后在中国青岛市城区进行大规模案例研究，验证其工程潜力。通过使用GCP进行图像定向精度分析和TLS（地面激光扫描）点云进行模型质量分析，实验结果表明，优化视图摄影测量可以构建稳定的图像连接网络，并且可以达到可比的图像定向精度。受益于精确的图像采集策略，网格模型的质量显着提高，特别是对于遮挡严重的城市区域，精度提高了3~5倍。此外，青岛市的案例研究证明，优化视图摄影测量可以成为复杂城市场景中大规模3D建模的可靠而强大的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化视角摄影测量方法，并通过青岛大规模案例验证其在复杂城市场景中的3D建模精度与工程潜力。
AI.motivation: 城市复杂环境导致无人机数据采集与3D建模面临安全性和精度挑战，需改进轨迹规划与影像采集策略以提升建模质量。
AI.method: 基于粗糙模型生成并优化无人机轨迹，结合模型点可重建性与视角冗余度；通过GCP（地面控制点）分析影像定向精度，利用TLS点云评估模型质量。
AI.result: 构建稳定影像连接网络，影像定向精度与传统方法相当；在严重遮挡区域模型精度提升3-5倍，青岛案例验证了方法的工程可行性。
AI.conclusion: 优化视角摄影测量为复杂城市大范围高精度3D建模提供了可靠解决方案，尤其适用于遮挡严重的场景。
