title: Capture Salient Historical Information: A Fast and Accurate Non-Autoregressive Model for Multi-turn Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 捕获显着的历史信息：一种快速准确的多轮口语理解非自回归模型
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.07005
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.07005
abstract: Spoken Language Understanding (SLU), a core component of the task-oriented dialogue system, expects a shorter inference facing the impatience of human users. Existing work increases inference speed by designing non-autoregressive models for single-turn SLU tasks but fails to apply to multi-turn SLU in confronting the dialogue history. The intuitive idea is to concatenate all historical utterances and utilize the non-autoregressive models directly. However, this approach seriously misses the salient historical information and suffers from the uncoordinated-slot problems. To overcome those shortcomings, we propose a novel model for multi-turn SLU named Salient History Attention with Layer-Refined Transformer (SHA-LRT), which composes of an SHA module, a Layer-Refined Mechanism (LRM), and a Slot Label Generation (SLG) task. SHA captures salient historical information for the current dialogue from both historical utterances and results via a well-designed history-attention mechanism. LRM predicts preliminary SLU results from Transformer's middle states and utilizes them to guide the final prediction, and SLG obtains the sequential dependency information for the non-autoregressive encoder. Experiments on public datasets indicate that our model significantly improves multi-turn SLU performance (17.5% on Overall) with accelerating (nearly 15 times) the inference process over the state-of-the-art baseline as well as effective on the single-turn SLU tasks.

Existing work increases inference speed by designing non-autoregressive models for single-turn SLU tasks but fails to apply to multi-turn SLU in confronting the dialogue history. The intuitive idea is to concatenate all historical utterances and utilize the non-autoregressive models directly. However, this approach seriously misses the salient historical information and suffers from the uncoordinated-slot problems. To overcome those shortcomings, we propose a novel model for multi-turn SLU named Salient History Attention with Layer-Refined Transformer (SHA-LRT), which composes of an SHA module, a Layer-Refined Mechanism (LRM), and a Slot Label Generation (SLG) task. SHA captures salient historical information for the current dialogue from both historical utterances and results via a well-designed history-attention mechanism. LRM predicts preliminary SLU results from Transformer's middle states and utilizes them to guide the final prediction, and SLG obtains the sequential dependency information for the non-autoregressive encoder. Experiments on public datasets indicate that our model significantly improves multi-turn SLU performance (17.5% on Overall) with accelerating (nearly 15 times) the inference process over the state-of-the-art baseline as well as effective on the single-turn SLU tasks.
abstract_zh: 口语理解（SLU）是面向任务的对话系统的核心组成部分，面对人类用户的不耐烦，它期望更短的推理。现有工作通过为单轮 SLU 任务设计非自回归模型来提高推理速度，但无法应用于面对对话历史的多轮 SLU。直观的想法是连接所有历史话语并直接利用非自回归模型。然而，这种方法严重遗漏了重要的历史信息，并且存在不协调时隙问题。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种新的多轮 SLU 模型，名为带有层细化变压器的显着历史注意力（SHA-LRT），它由 SHA 模块、层细化机制（LRM）和时隙标签生成（SLG）任务组成。 SHA 通过精心设计的历史关注机制，从历史话语和结果中捕获当前对话的显着历史信息。 LRM根据Transformer的中间状态预测初步SLU结果，并利用它们来指导最终预测，SLG获得非自回归编码器的顺序依赖信息。在公共数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型显着提高了多轮 SLU 性能（总体提高了 17.5%），推理过程比最先进的基线加速了（近 15 倍），并且在单轮 SLU 任务上也很有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且准确的非自回归模型SHA-LRT，用于解决多轮语音语言理解中历史信息捕捉不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有非自回归模型在单轮任务中有效，但直接拼接历史对话会导致关键信息丢失和槽位不协调问题，需改进多轮对话处理能力。
AI.method: 设计SHA模块通过历史注意力机制捕捉关键信息，结合LRM机制利用中间状态引导预测，以及SLG任务获取序列依赖关系，组成SHA-LRT模型。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上整体性能提升17.5%，推理速度加快15倍，同时在单轮任务中表现有效。
AI.conclusion: SHA-LRT通过创新模块设计有效解决了多轮SLU的历史信息利用难题，显著提升性能与效率。

Experiments on public datasets indicate that our model significantly improves multi-turn SLU performance (17.5% on Overall) with accelerating (nearly 15 times) the inference process over the state-of-the-art baseline as well as effective on the single-turn SLU tasks. 口语理解（SLU）是面向任务的对话系统的核心组成部分，面对人类用户的不耐烦，它期望更短的推理。现有工作通过为单轮 SLU 任务设计非自回归模型来提高推理速度，但无法应用于面对对话历史的多轮 SLU。直观的想法是连接所有历史话语并直接利用非自回归模型。然而，这种方法严重遗漏了重要的历史信息，并且存在不协调时隙问题。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种新的多轮 SLU 模型，名为带有层细化变压器的显着历史注意力（SHA-LRT），它由 SHA 模块、层细化机制（LRM）和时隙标签生成（SLG）任务组成。 SHA 通过精心设计的历史关注机制，从历史话语和结果中捕获当前对话的显着历史信息。 LRM根据Transformer的中间状态预测初步SLU结果，并利用它们来指导最终预测，SLG获得非自回归编码器的顺序依赖信息。在公共数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型显着提高了多轮 SLU 性能（总体提高了 17.5%），推理过程比最先进的基线加速了（近 15 倍），并且在单轮 SLU 任务上也很有效。 本文提出一种快速且准确的非自回归模型SHA-LRT，用于解决多轮语音语言理解中历史信息捕捉不足的问题。 Lizhi Cheng,Weijia jia,Wenmian Yang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Bioinspired composite learning control under discontinuous friction for industrial robots
title_zh: 工业机器人间断摩擦下的仿生复合学习控制
comment: Submitted to 2022 IFAC International Workshop on Adaptive and Learning Control Systems
comments: Submitted to 2022 IFAC International Workshop on Adaptive and Learning Control Systems
abstract: Adaptive control can be applied to robotic systems with parameter uncertainties, but improving its performance is usually difficult, especially under discontinuous friction. Inspired by the human motor learning control mechanism, an adaptive learning control approach is proposed for a broad class of robotic systems with discontinuous friction, where a composite error learning technique that exploits data memory is employed to enhance parameter estimation. Compared with the classical feedback error learning control, the proposed approach can achieve superior transient and steady-state tracking without high-gain feedback and persistent excitation at the cost of extra computational burden and memory usage. The performance improvement of the proposed approach has been verified by experiments based on a DENSO industrial robot.
summary: Adaptive control can be applied to robotic systems with parameter uncertainties, but improving its performance is usually difficult, especially under discontinuous friction. Inspired by the human motor learning control mechanism, an adaptive learning control approach is proposed for a broad class of robotic systems with discontinuous friction, where a composite error learning technique that exploits data memory is employed to enhance parameter estimation. Compared with the classical feedback error learning control, the proposed approach can achieve superior transient and steady-state tracking without high-gain feedback and persistent excitation at the cost of extra computational burden and memory usage. The performance improvement of the proposed approach has been verified by experiments based on a DENSO industrial robot.
abstract_zh: 自适应控制可以应用于参数不确定的机器人系统，但提高其性能通常很困难，特别是在不连续摩擦下。受人类运动学习控制机制的启发，针对具有不连续摩擦的一类广泛的机器人系统提出了一种自适应学习控制方法，其中采用利用数据存储器的复合误差学习技术来增强参数估计。与经典的反馈误差学习控制相比，所提出的方法可以在没有高增益反馈和持续激励的情况下实现优异的瞬态和稳态跟踪，但代价是额外的计算负担和内存使用。 The performance improvement of the proposed approach has been verified by experiments based on a DENSO industrial robot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物启发的复合学习控制方法，用于解决工业机器人在不连续摩擦下的控制性能问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应控制在参数不确定和不连续摩擦环境下难以提升性能，需寻找新型控制策略以提高跟踪精度。
AI.method: 基于人类运动学习机制，设计复合误差学习技术，结合数据记忆增强参数估计，避免高增益反馈和持续激励。
AI.result: 通过DENSO工业机器人实验验证，该方法在瞬态和稳态跟踪性能上优于传统方法，但需承担额外计算和存储成本。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法无需高增益反馈即可实现高性能控制，适用于工业场景，但需权衡计算资源消耗。

authors_text: Akash Amalan,Rui Wang,Yanqi Qiao,Emmanouil Panaousis,Kaitai Liang
title: MULTI-FLGANs: Multi-Distributed Adversarial Networks for Non-IID distribution
title_zh: MULTI-FLGAN：用于非 IID 分布的多分布式对抗网络
abstract: Federated learning is an emerging concept in the domain of distributed machine learning. This concept has enabled GANs to benefit from the rich distributed training data while preserving privacy. However, in a non-iid setting, current federated GAN architectures are unstable, struggling to learn the distinct features and vulnerable to mode collapse. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture MULTI-FLGAN to solve the problem of low-quality images, mode collapse and instability for non-iid datasets. Our results show that MULTI-FLGAN is four times as stable and performant (i.e. high inception score) on average over 20 clients compared to baseline FLGAN.
summary: Federated learning is an emerging concept in the domain of distributed machine learning. This concept has enabled GANs to benefit from the rich distributed training data while preserving privacy. However, in a non-iid setting, current federated GAN architectures are unstable, struggling to learn the distinct features and vulnerable to mode collapse. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture MULTI-FLGAN to solve the problem of low-quality images, mode collapse and instability for non-iid datasets. Our results show that MULTI-FLGAN is four times as stable and performant (i.e. high inception score) on average over 20 clients compared to baseline FLGAN.
abstract_zh: Federated learning is an emerging concept in the domain of distributed machine learning. This concept has enabled GANs to benefit from the rich distributed training data while preserving privacy.然而，在非独立同分布的环境中，当前的联邦 GAN 架构不稳定，难以学习独特的特征，并且容易受到模式崩溃的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的架构 MULTI-FLGAN 来解决非独立同分布数据集的低质量图像、模式崩溃和不稳定问题。我们的结果表明，与基线 FLGAN 相比，MULTI-FLGAN 在超过 20 个客户端上的平均稳定性和性能（即高初始分数）是其四倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MULTI-FLGAN架构，解决联邦生成对抗网络（FLGAN）在非独立同分布（non-IID）数据下的图像质量低、模式崩溃和稳定性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦GAN在非IID设置中存在训练不稳定、难以学习数据分布特征且易发生模式崩溃的问题，影响生成效果与模型性能。
AI.method: 设计多分布式对抗网络架构MULTI-FLGAN，通过改进生成器与判别器的分布式协作机制，增强对非IID数据的适应性并缓解模式崩溃。
AI.result: 在20个客户端的实验中，MULTI-FLGAN的稳定性提升4倍，生成图像的Inception分数显著高于基线FLGAN。
AI.conclusion: MULTI-FLGAN有效解决了非IID联邦GAN的稳定性与生成质量问题，为分布式隐私保护生成任务提供了更优方案。

authors_text: Wenzheng Hou,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Shilong Bao,Yuan He,Qingming Huang
title: AdAUC: End-to-end Adversarial AUC Optimization Against Long-tail Problems
title_zh: AdAUC：针对长尾问题的端到端对抗性 AUC 优化
abstract: It is well-known that deep learning models are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Existing studies of adversarial training have made great progress against this challenge. As a typical trait, they often assume that the class distribution is overall balanced. However, long-tail datasets are ubiquitous in a wide spectrum of applications, where the amount of head class instances is larger than the tail classes. Under such a scenario, AUC is a much more reasonable metric than accuracy since it is insensitive toward class distribution. Motivated by this, we present an early trial to explore adversarial training methods to optimize AUC. The main challenge lies in that the positive and negative examples are tightly coupled in the objective function. As a direct result, one cannot generate adversarial examples without a full scan of the dataset. To address this issue, based on a concavity regularization scheme, we reformulate the AUC optimization problem as a saddle point problem, where the objective becomes an instance-wise function. This leads to an end-to-end training protocol. Furthermore, we provide a convergence guarantee of the proposed algorithm. Our analysis differs from the existing studies since the algorithm is asked to generate adversarial examples by calculating the gradient of a min-max problem. Finally, the extensive experimental results show the performance and robustness of our algorithm in three long-tail datasets.
summary: It is well-known that deep learning models are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Existing studies of adversarial training have made great progress against this challenge. As a typical trait, they often assume that the class distribution is overall balanced. However, long-tail datasets are ubiquitous in a wide spectrum of applications, where the amount of head class instances is larger than the tail classes. Under such a scenario, AUC is a much more reasonable metric than accuracy since it is insensitive toward class distribution. Motivated by this, we present an early trial to explore adversarial training methods to optimize AUC. The main challenge lies in that the positive and negative examples are tightly coupled in the objective function. As a direct result, one cannot generate adversarial examples without a full scan of the dataset. To address this issue, based on a concavity regularization scheme, we reformulate the AUC optimization problem as a saddle point problem, where the objective becomes an instance-wise function. This leads to an end-to-end training protocol. Furthermore, we provide a convergence guarantee of the proposed algorithm. Our analysis differs from the existing studies since the algorithm is asked to generate adversarial examples by calculating the gradient of a min-max problem. Finally, the extensive experimental results show the performance and robustness of our algorithm in three long-tail datasets.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度学习模型很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。现有的对抗性训练研究在应对这一挑战方面取得了巨大进展。作为一个典型特征，他们经常假设班级分布是总体平衡的。然而，长尾数据集在广泛的应用中普遍存在，其中头类实例的数量大于尾类实例的数量。在这种情况下，AUC 是一个比准确度更合理的指标，因为它对类别分布不敏感。受此启发，我们提出了一项早期试验，探索优化 AUC 的对抗性训练方法。主要挑战在于目标函数中正例和负例紧密耦合。直接的结果是，如果不对数据集进行全面扫描，就无法生成对抗性示例。为了解决这个问题，基于凹性正则化方案，我们将 AUC 优化问题重新表述为鞍点问题，其中目标成为实例函数。这导致了端到端的训练协议。此外，我们提供了所提出算法的收敛保证。我们的分析与现有研究不同，因为算法被要求通过计算最小-最大问题的梯度来生成对抗性示例。最后，广泛的实验结果表明了我们的算法在三个长尾数据集中的性能和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdAUC方法，通过端到端对抗训练优化长尾数据集下的AUC指标。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练假设类别分布平衡，但实际应用中长尾数据普遍存在，AUC比准确率更适合作为评估指标。
AI.method: 基于凹性正则化方案，将AUC优化问题重构为鞍点问题，实现实例级函数优化并提供收敛性保证。
AI.result: 在三个长尾数据集上的实验验证了算法的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为长尾场景下的对抗训练提供了新的优化框架和理论支持。

tldr: 本文提出AdAUC方法，通过端到端对抗训练优化长尾数据集下的AUC指标。
motivation: 现有对抗训练假设类别分布平衡，但实际应用中长尾数据普遍存在，AUC比准确率更适合作为评估指标。
method: 基于凹性正则化方案，将AUC优化问题重构为鞍点问题，实现实例级函数优化并提供收敛性保证。
result: 在三个长尾数据集上的实验验证了算法的有效性和鲁棒性。
conclusion: 该方法为长尾场景下的对抗训练提供了新的优化框架和理论支持。
search_text: AdAUC: End-to-end Adversarial AUC Optimization Against Long-tail Problems AdAUC：针对长尾问题的端到端对抗性 AUC 优化 It is well-known that deep learning models are vulnerable to adversarial examples. Existing studies of adversarial training have made great progress against this challenge. As a typical trait, they often assume that the class distribution is overall balanced. However, long-tail datasets are ubiquitous in a wide spectrum of applications, where the amount of head class instances is larger than the tail classes. Under such a scenario, AUC is a much more reasonable metric than accuracy since it is insensitive toward class distribution. Motivated by this, we present an early trial to explore adversarial training methods to optimize AUC. The main challenge lies in that the positive and negative examples are tightly coupled in the objective function. As a direct result, one cannot generate adversarial examples without a full scan of the dataset. To address this issue, based on a concavity regularization scheme, we reformulate the AUC optimization problem as a saddle point problem, where the objective becomes an instance-wise function. This leads to an end-to-end training protocol. Furthermore, we provide a convergence guarantee of the proposed algorithm. Our analysis differs from the existing studies since the algorithm is asked to generate adversarial examples by calculating the gradient of a min-max problem. Finally, the extensive experimental results show the performance and robustness of our algorithm in three long-tail datasets. 众所周知，深度学习模型很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。现有的对抗性训练研究在应对这一挑战方面取得了巨大进展。作为一个典型特征，他们经常假设班级分布是总体平衡的。然而，长尾数据集在广泛的应用中普遍存在，其中头类实例的数量大于尾类实例的数量。在这种情况下，AUC 是一个比准确度更合理的指标，因为它对类别分布不敏感。受此启发，我们提出了一项早期试验，探索优化 AUC 的对抗性训练方法。主要挑战在于目标函数中正例和负例紧密耦合。直接的结果是，如果不对数据集进行全面扫描，就无法生成对抗性示例。为了解决这个问题，基于凹性正则化方案，我们将 AUC 优化问题重新表述为鞍点问题，其中目标成为实例函数。这导致了端到端的训练协议。此外，我们提供了所提出算法的收敛保证。我们的分析与现有研究不同，因为算法被要求通过计算最小-最大问题的梯度来生成对抗性示例。最后，广泛的实验结果表明了我们的算法在三个长尾数据集中的性能和鲁棒性。 本文提出AdAUC方法，通过端到端对抗训练优化长尾数据集下的AUC指标。 Wenzheng Hou,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Shilong Bao,Yuan He,Qingming Huang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Neural Networks with A La Carte Selection of Activation Functions
title_zh: 具有激活函数点菜选择的神经网络
abstract: Activation functions (AFs), which are pivotal to the success (or failure) of a neural network, have received increased attention in recent years, with researchers seeking to design novel AFs that improve some aspect of network performance. In this paper we take another direction, wherein we combine a slew of known AFs into successful architectures, proposing three methods to do so beneficially: 1) generate AF architectures at random, 2) use Optuna, an automatic hyper-parameter optimization software framework, with a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) sampler, and 3) use Optuna with a Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) sampler. We show that all methods often produce significantly better results for 25 classification problems when compared with a standard network composed of ReLU hidden units and a softmax output unit. Optuna with the TPE sampler emerged as the best AF architecture-producing method.
summary: Activation functions (AFs), which are pivotal to the success (or failure) of a neural network, have received increased attention in recent years, with researchers seeking to design novel AFs that improve some aspect of network performance. In this paper we take another direction, wherein we combine a slew of known AFs into successful architectures, proposing three methods to do so beneficially: 1) generate AF architectures at random, 2) use Optuna, an automatic hyper-parameter optimization software framework, with a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) sampler, and 3) use Optuna with a Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) sampler. We show that all methods often produce significantly better results for 25 classification problems when compared with a standard network composed of ReLU hidden units and a softmax output unit. Optuna with the TPE sampler emerged as the best AF architecture-producing method.
abstract_zh: 激活函数（AF）对于神经网络的成功（或失败）至关重要，近年来受到越来越多的关注，研究人员寻求设计新颖的 AF 来改善网络性能的某些方面。在本文中，我们采取了另一个方向，其中我们将大量已知的 AF 组合成成功的架构，并提出了三种有益的方法：1）随机生成 AF 架构，2）使用 Optuna（一种自动超参数优化软件框架）和树结构 Parzen 估计器（TPE）采样器，3）使用 Optuna 和协方差矩阵适应进化策略（CMA-ES）采样器。我们表明，与由 ReLU 隐藏单元和 softmax 输出单元组成的标准网络相比，所有方法通常都能为 25 个分类问题产生明显更好的结果。带有 TPE 采样器的 Optuna 成为最佳 AF 架构生成方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过组合多种已知激活函数来构建神经网络架构，以提升分类任务性能。
AI.motivation: 激活函数对神经网络性能至关重要，传统方法侧重设计新激活函数，而本文尝试通过组合现有激活函数优化网络表现。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 随机生成激活函数架构；2) 使用Optuna框架结合TPE采样器进行超参数优化；3) 使用Optuna结合CMA-ES采样器进行优化。
AI.result: 在25个分类任务中，所有方法均显著优于标准ReLU网络，其中TPE采样器表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 组合多种激活函数可有效提升网络性能，且Optuna结合TPE采样器是生成优质激活函数架构的最佳方法。

authors_text: Weifeng Wu,Fan Yang,Xiansong Fang,Xiang Cai,Xiaohui Liu,Fan Zhang,Sheng Wang
title: Ultrafast carbon nanotube photodetectors with bandwidth over 60 GHz
title_zh: 带宽超过 60 GHz 的超快碳纳米管光电探测器
abstract: The future interconnect links in intra- and inter-chip require the photodetector with high bandwidth, ultra-wide waveband, compact footprint, low-cost, and compatible integration process with silicon complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology. Here, we demonstrate a CMOS-compatible carbon nanotube (CNT) photodetector that exhibits high responsivity, high bandwidth and broad spectral operation over all optical telecommunication band based on high-purity CNT arrays. The ultrafast CNT photodetector demonstrates the 100 Gbit/s Nyquist-shaped on-off-keying (OOK) signal transmission, which can address the demand for high-speed optical interconnects in and between data centers. Furthermore, the photodetector exhibits a bandwidth over 60 GHz by scaling down the active area to 20 μm2. As the CNT photodetectors are fabricated by doping-free process, it also provides a cost-effective solution to integrate CNT photonic devices with CNT-based CMOS integrated circuits. Our work paves a way for future CNT-based high-speed optical interconnects and optoelectronic integrated circuits (OEICs).
summary: The future interconnect links in intra- and inter-chip require the photodetector with high bandwidth, ultra-wide waveband, compact footprint, low-cost, and compatible integration process with silicon complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor (CMOS) technology. Here, we demonstrate a CMOS-compatible carbon nanotube (CNT) photodetector that exhibits high responsivity, high bandwidth and broad spectral operation over all optical telecommunication band based on high-purity CNT arrays. The ultrafast CNT photodetector demonstrates the 100 Gbit/s Nyquist-shaped on-off-keying (OOK) signal transmission, which can address the demand for high-speed optical interconnects in and between data centers. Furthermore, the photodetector exhibits a bandwidth over 60 GHz by scaling down the active area to 20 μm2. As the CNT photodetectors are fabricated by doping-free process, it also provides a cost-effective solution to integrate CNT photonic devices with CNT-based CMOS integrated circuits. Our work paves a way for future CNT-based high-speed optical interconnects and optoelectronic integrated circuits (OEICs).
abstract_zh: 未来芯片内和芯片间的互连链路需要光电探测器具有高带宽、超宽波段、紧凑的占地面积、低成本以及与硅互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）技术兼容的集成工艺。在这里，我们展示了一种兼容 CMOS 的碳纳米管 (CNT) 光电探测器，该探测器基于高纯度 CNT 阵列，在所有光通信频段上表现出高响应度、高带宽和宽光谱操作。超快 CNT 光电探测器演示了 100 Gbit/s 奈奎斯特形开关键控 (OOK) 信号传输，可以满足数据中心内部和之间的高速光学互连的需求。此外，通过将有源面积缩小至 20 μm2，光电探测器的带宽超过 60 GHz。由于CNT光电探测器是通过无掺杂工艺制造的，因此它还提供了一种将CNT光子器件与基于CNT的CMOS集成电路集成的经济有效的解决方案。我们的工作为未来基于 CNT 的高速光学互连和光电集成电路 (OEIC) 铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于碳纳米管（CNT）的超高速光电探测器，带宽超过60 GHz，用于未来高速光互连。
AI.motivation: 当前芯片内外互连需要高带宽、宽波段、小尺寸、低成本且与CMOS工艺兼容的光电探测器，传统技术难以满足需求。
AI.method: 采用高纯度碳纳米管阵列，结合无掺杂工艺和微缩化活性区（20 μm²）设计，实现与CMOS兼容的光电探测器。
AI.result: 探测器带宽超60 GHz，支持100 Gbit/s的OOK信号传输，且具备低成本集成CMOS电路的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为基于碳纳米管的高速光互连和光电集成电路（OEIC）提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Shaoyang Wang,Chau Yuen,Wei Ni,Guan Yong Liang,Tiejun Lv
title: Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cost- and Delay-Sensitive Virtual Network Function Placement and Routing
title_zh: 用于成本和延迟敏感的虚拟网络功能布局和路由的多代理深度强化学习
comment: 17 pages, 15 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Communications
comments: 17 pages, 15 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Communications
abstract: This paper proposes an effective and novel multiagent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL)-based method for solving the joint virtual network function (VNF) placement and routing (P&R), where multiple service requests with differentiated demands are delivered at the same time. The differentiated demands of the service requests are reflected by their delay- and cost-sensitive factors. We first construct a VNF P&R problem to jointly minimize a weighted sum of service delay and resource consumption cost, which is NP-complete. Then, the joint VNF P&R problem is decoupled into two iterative subtasks: placement subtask and routing subtask. Each subtask consists of multiple concurrent parallel sequential decision processes. By invoking the deep deterministic policy gradient method and multi-agent technique, an MADRL-P&R framework is designed to perform the two subtasks. The new joint reward and internal rewards mechanism is proposed to match the goals and constraints of the placement and routing subtasks. We also propose the parameter migration-based model-retraining method to deal with changing network topologies. Corroborated by experiments, the proposed MADRL-P&R framework is superior to its alternatives in terms of service cost and delay, and offers higher flexibility for personalized service demands. The parameter migration-based model-retraining method can efficiently accelerate convergence under moderate network topology changes.
summary: This paper proposes an effective and novel multiagent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL)-based method for solving the joint virtual network function (VNF) placement and routing (P&R), where multiple service requests with differentiated demands are delivered at the same time. The differentiated demands of the service requests are reflected by their delay- and cost-sensitive factors. We first construct a VNF P&R problem to jointly minimize a weighted sum of service delay and resource consumption cost, which is NP-complete. Then, the joint VNF P&R problem is decoupled into two iterative subtasks: placement subtask and routing subtask. Each subtask consists of multiple concurrent parallel sequential decision processes. By invoking the deep deterministic policy gradient method and multi-agent technique, an MADRL-P&R framework is designed to perform the two subtasks. The new joint reward and internal rewards mechanism is proposed to match the goals and constraints of the placement and routing subtasks. We also propose the parameter migration-based model-retraining method to deal with changing network topologies. Corroborated by experiments, the proposed MADRL-P&R framework is superior to its alternatives in terms of service cost and delay, and offers higher flexibility for personalized service demands. The parameter migration-based model-retraining method can efficiently accelerate convergence under moderate network topology changes.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种有效且新颖的基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的方法来解决联合虚拟网络功能（VNF）布局和路由（P＆R）问题，其中同时传递具有差异化需求的多个服务请求。服务请求的差异化需求通过其延迟和成本敏感因素反映出来。我们首先构造一个VNF P&R问题来共同最小化服务延迟和资源消耗成本的加权和，这是NP完全的。然后，联合VNF P&R问题被解耦为两个迭代子任务：放置子任务和路由子任务。每个子任务由多个并发的并行顺序决策过程组成。通过调用深度确定性策略梯度方法和多智能体技术，设计了 MADRL-P&R 框架来执行这两个子任务。提出了新的联合奖励和内部奖励机制来匹配布局布线子任务的目标和约束。我们还提出了基于参数迁移的模型再训练方法来应对不断变化的网络拓扑。经实验证实，所提出的MADRL-P&R框架在服务成本和延迟方面优于其替代方案，并为个性化服务需求提供了更高的灵活性。基于参数迁移的模型再训练方法可以在适度的网络拓扑变化下有效地加速收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的方法，用于解决具有延迟和成本敏感需求的虚拟网络功能（VNF）部署和路由问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的VNF部署和路由方法难以同时满足服务请求的延迟和成本敏感需求，并且在动态网络拓扑下表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过将联合VNF部署和路由问题分解为部署子任务和路由子任务，并采用深度确定性策略梯度方法和多智能体技术设计MADRL-P&R框架，同时引入新的联合奖励和内部奖励机制以及基于参数迁移的模型重训练方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的MADRL-P&R框架在服务成本和延迟方面优于现有方法，并能更好地适应个性化服务需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在处理延迟和成本敏感的VNF部署和路由问题上表现优异，且在动态网络拓扑下具有较高的灵活性和收敛速度。

search_text: Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Cost- and Delay-Sensitive Virtual Network Function Placement and Routing 用于成本和延迟敏感的虚拟网络功能布局和路由的多代理深度强化学习 This paper proposes an effective and novel multiagent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL)-based method for solving the joint virtual network function (VNF) placement and routing (P&R), where multiple service requests with differentiated demands are delivered at the same time. The differentiated demands of the service requests are reflected by their delay- and cost-sensitive factors. We first construct a VNF P&R problem to jointly minimize a weighted sum of service delay and resource consumption cost, which is NP-complete. Then, the joint VNF P&R problem is decoupled into two iterative subtasks: placement subtask and routing subtask. Each subtask consists of multiple concurrent parallel sequential decision processes. By invoking the deep deterministic policy gradient method and multi-agent technique, an MADRL-P&R framework is designed to perform the two subtasks. The new joint reward and internal rewards mechanism is proposed to match the goals and constraints of the placement and routing subtasks. We also propose the parameter migration-based model-retraining method to deal with changing network topologies. Corroborated by experiments, the proposed MADRL-P&R framework is superior to its alternatives in terms of service cost and delay, and offers higher flexibility for personalized service demands. The parameter migration-based model-retraining method can efficiently accelerate convergence under moderate network topology changes. 本文提出了一种有效且新颖的基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的方法来解决联合虚拟网络功能（VNF）布局和路由（P＆R）问题，其中同时传递具有差异化需求的多个服务请求。服务请求的差异化需求通过其延迟和成本敏感因素反映出来。我们首先构造一个VNF P&R问题来共同最小化服务延迟和资源消耗成本的加权和，这是NP完全的。然后，联合VNF P&R问题被解耦为两个迭代子任务：放置子任务和路由子任务。每个子任务由多个并发的并行顺序决策过程组成。通过调用深度确定性策略梯度方法和多智能体技术，设计了 MADRL-P&R 框架来执行这两个子任务。提出了新的联合奖励和内部奖励机制来匹配布局布线子任务的目标和约束。我们还提出了基于参数迁移的模型再训练方法来应对不断变化的网络拓扑。经实验证实，所提出的MADRL-P&R框架在服务成本和延迟方面优于其替代方案，并为个性化服务需求提供了更高的灵活性。基于参数迁移的模型再训练方法可以在适度的网络拓扑变化下有效地加速收敛。 本文提出了一种基于多智能体深度强化学习（MADRL）的方法，用于解决具有延迟和成本敏感需求的虚拟网络功能（VNF）部署和路由问题。 Shaoyang Wang,Chau Yuen,Wei Ni,Guan Yong Liang,Tiejun Lv cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NI

authors_text: David B. Adrian,Andras Gabor Kupcsik,Markus Spies,Heiko Neumann
title: Efficient and Robust Training of Dense Object Nets for Multi-Object Robot Manipulation
title_zh: 用于多对象机器人操作的密集对象网络的高效和鲁棒训练
abstract: We propose a framework for robust and efficient training of Dense Object Nets (DON) with a focus on multi-object robot manipulation scenarios. DON is a popular approach to obtain dense, view-invariant object descriptors, which can be used for a multitude of downstream tasks in robot manipulation, such as, pose estimation, state representation for control, etc.. However, the original work focused training on singulated objects, with limited results on instance-specific, multi-object applications. Additionally, a complex data collection pipeline, including 3D reconstruction and mask annotation of each object, is required for training. In this paper, we further improve the efficacy of DON with a simplified data collection and training regime, that consistently yields higher precision and enables robust tracking of keypoints with less data requirements. In particular, we focus on training with multi-object data instead of singulated objects, combined with a well-chosen augmentation scheme. We additionally propose an alternative loss formulation to the original pixelwise formulation that offers better results and is less sensitive to hyperparameters. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of our proposed framework on a real-world robotic grasping task.
summary: We propose a framework for robust and efficient training of Dense Object Nets (DON) with a focus on multi-object robot manipulation scenarios. DON is a popular approach to obtain dense, view-invariant object descriptors, which can be used for a multitude of downstream tasks in robot manipulation, such as, pose estimation, state representation for control, etc.. However, the original work focused training on singulated objects, with limited results on instance-specific, multi-object applications. Additionally, a complex data collection pipeline, including 3D reconstruction and mask annotation of each object, is required for training. In this paper, we further improve the efficacy of DON with a simplified data collection and training regime, that consistently yields higher precision and enables robust tracking of keypoints with less data requirements. In particular, we focus on training with multi-object data instead of singulated objects, combined with a well-chosen augmentation scheme. We additionally propose an alternative loss formulation to the original pixelwise formulation that offers better results and is less sensitive to hyperparameters. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of our proposed framework on a real-world robotic grasping task.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个强大且高效的密集对象网络（DON）训练框架，重点关注多对象机器人操作场景。 DON is a popular approach to obtain dense, view-invariant object descriptors, which can be used for a multitude of downstream tasks in robot manipulation, such as, pose estimation, state representation for control, etc.. However, the original work focused training on singulated objects, with limited results on instance-specific, multi-object applications.此外，训练还需要复杂的数据收集管道，包括每个对象的 3D 重建和掩模注释。 In this paper, we further improve the efficacy of DON with a simplified data collection and training regime, that consistently yields higher precision and enables robust tracking of keypoints with less data requirements.特别是，我们专注于使用多对象数据而不是单一对象进行训练，并结合精心选择的增强方案。 We additionally propose an alternative loss formulation to the original pixelwise formulation that offers better results and is less sensitive to hyperparameters.最后，我们展示了我们提出的框架在现实世界机器人抓取任务中的稳健性和准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效且鲁棒的密集物体网络（DON）训练框架，专注于多物体机器人操作场景。
AI.motivation: 原始DON训练主要针对单一物体，难以处理多物体实例，且数据收集流程复杂，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 采用多物体数据训练结合精心设计的数据增强方案，并提出一种替代像素级损失函数的新损失形式，简化数据需求。
AI.result: 在真实机器人抓取任务中验证了框架的鲁棒性和准确性，关键点跟踪精度更高且数据需求更低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过优化数据利用和损失函数设计，有效提升了DON在多物体机器人操作中的性能。

title: ER: Equivariance Regularizer for Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: ER：用于知识图补全的等方差正则化器
abstract: Tensor factorization and distanced based models play important roles in knowledge graph completion (KGC). However, the relational matrices in KGC methods often induce a high model complexity, bearing a high risk of overfitting. As a remedy, researchers propose a variety of different regularizers such as the tensor nuclear norm regularizer. Our motivation is based on the observation that the previous work only focuses on the "size" of the parametric space, while leaving the implicit semantic information widely untouched. To address this issue, we propose a new regularizer, namely, Equivariance Regularizer (ER), which can suppress overfitting by leveraging the implicit semantic information. Specifically, ER can enhance the generalization ability of the model by employing the semantic equivariance between the head and tail entities. Moreover, it is a generic solution for both distance based models and tensor factorization based models. The experimental results indicate a clear and substantial improvement over the state-of-the-art relation prediction methods.
summary: Tensor factorization and distanced based models play important roles in knowledge graph completion (KGC). However, the relational matrices in KGC methods often induce a high model complexity, bearing a high risk of overfitting. As a remedy, researchers propose a variety of different regularizers such as the tensor nuclear norm regularizer. Our motivation is based on the observation that the previous work only focuses on the "size" of the parametric space, while leaving the implicit semantic information widely untouched. To address this issue, we propose a new regularizer, namely, Equivariance Regularizer (ER), which can suppress overfitting by leveraging the implicit semantic information. Specifically, ER can enhance the generalization ability of the model by employing the semantic equivariance between the head and tail entities. Moreover, it is a generic solution for both distance based models and tensor factorization based models. The experimental results indicate a clear and substantial improvement over the state-of-the-art relation prediction methods.
abstract_zh: 张量分解和基于距离的模型在知识图补全（KGC）中发挥着重要作用。然而，KGC方法中的关系矩阵往往会导致模型复杂度较高，存在较高的过拟合风险。作为补救措施，研究人员提出了各种不同的正则化器，例如张量核范数正则化器。我们的动机是基于这样的观察：之前的工作只关注参数空间的“大小”，而隐含的语义信息广泛未受影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的正则化器，即等方差正则化器（ER），它可以通过利用隐式语义信息来抑制过度拟合。具体来说，ER可以利用头实体和尾实体之间的语义等变性来增强模型的泛化能力。此外，它是基于距离的模型和基于张量分解的模型的通用解决方案。实验结果表明，与最先进的关系预测方法相比，有了明显而实质性的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ER的等变正则化器，用于知识图谱补全任务，通过利用头实体和尾实体间的语义等变性来抑制过拟合并提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱补全方法中，关系矩阵导致模型复杂度高且易过拟合，而传统正则化方法仅关注参数空间规模，忽略了丰富的隐含语义信息。
AI.method: 设计等变正则化器（ER），通过强制头实体与尾实体在语义空间中的对称性约束，增强模型对语义关系的鲁棒性，适用于距离模型和张量分解模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，ER在关系预测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，有效提升了模型泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: ER通过挖掘语义等变性提供了一种通用且有效的正则化方案，为知识图谱补全任务提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为ER的等变正则化器，用于知识图谱补全任务，通过利用头实体和尾实体间的语义等变性来抑制过拟合并提升模型泛化能力。
motivation: 现有知识图谱补全方法中，关系矩阵导致模型复杂度高且易过拟合，而传统正则化方法仅关注参数空间规模，忽略了丰富的隐含语义信息。
method: 设计等变正则化器（ER），通过强制头实体与尾实体在语义空间中的对称性约束，增强模型对语义关系的鲁棒性，适用于距离模型和张量分解模型。
result: 实验表明，ER在关系预测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法，有效提升了模型泛化性能。
conclusion: ER通过挖掘语义等变性提供了一种通用且有效的正则化方案，为知识图谱补全任务提供了新思路。
search_text: ER: Equivariance Regularizer for Knowledge Graph Completion ER：用于知识图补全的等方差正则化器 Tensor factorization and distanced based models play important roles in knowledge graph completion (KGC). However, the relational matrices in KGC methods often induce a high model complexity, bearing a high risk of overfitting. As a remedy, researchers propose a variety of different regularizers such as the tensor nuclear norm regularizer. Our motivation is based on the observation that the previous work only focuses on the "size" of the parametric space, while leaving the implicit semantic information widely untouched. To address this issue, we propose a new regularizer, namely, Equivariance Regularizer (ER), which can suppress overfitting by leveraging the implicit semantic information. Specifically, ER can enhance the generalization ability of the model by employing the semantic equivariance between the head and tail entities. Moreover, it is a generic solution for both distance based models and tensor factorization based models. The experimental results indicate a clear and substantial improvement over the state-of-the-art relation prediction methods. 张量分解和基于距离的模型在知识图补全（KGC）中发挥着重要作用。然而，KGC方法中的关系矩阵往往会导致模型复杂度较高，存在较高的过拟合风险。作为补救措施，研究人员提出了各种不同的正则化器，例如张量核范数正则化器。我们的动机是基于这样的观察：之前的工作只关注参数空间的“大小”，而隐含的语义信息广泛未受影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的正则化器，即等方差正则化器（ER），它可以通过利用隐式语义信息来抑制过度拟合。具体来说，ER可以利用头实体和尾实体之间的语义等变性来增强模型的泛化能力。此外，它是基于距离的模型和基于张量分解的模型的通用解决方案。实验结果表明，与最先进的关系预测方法相比，有了明显而实质性的改进。 本文提出一种名为ER的等变正则化器，用于知识图谱补全任务，通过利用头实体和尾实体间的语义等变性来抑制过拟合并提升模型泛化能力。 Zongsheng Cao,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Qingming Huang cs.AI

authors_text: Qi Liao,Tianlun Hu,Nikolaj Marchenko,Peter Kulics,Lutz Ewe
title: HARU: Haptic Augmented Reality-Assisted User-Centric Industrial Network Planning
title_zh: HARU：触觉增强现实辅助以用户为中心的工业网络规划
abstract: To support Industry 4.0 applications with haptics and human-machine interaction, 6G requires a new framework that is fully autonomous, visual, and interactive. In this paper, we provide an end-to-end solution, HARU, for private network planning services, especially industrial networks. The solution consists of the following functions: collecting visual and sensory data from the user device, reconstructing 3D radio propagation environment and conducting network planning on a server, and visualizing network performance with AR on the user device with enabled haptic feedback. The functions are empowered by three key technical components: 1) vision- and sensor fusion-based 3D environment reconstruction, 2) ray tracing-based radio map generation and network planning, and 3) AR-assisted network visualization enabled by real-time camera relocalization. We conducted the proof-of-concept in a Bosch plant in Germany and showed good network coverage of the optimized antenna location, as well as high accuracy in both environment reconstruction and camera relocalization. We also achieved real-time AR-supported network monitoring with an end-to-end latency of about $32$ ms per frame.
summary: To support Industry 4.0 applications with haptics and human-machine interaction, 6G requires a new framework that is fully autonomous, visual, and interactive. In this paper, we provide an end-to-end solution, HARU, for private network planning services, especially industrial networks. The solution consists of the following functions: collecting visual and sensory data from the user device, reconstructing 3D radio propagation environment and conducting network planning on a server, and visualizing network performance with AR on the user device with enabled haptic feedback. The functions are empowered by three key technical components: 1) vision- and sensor fusion-based 3D environment reconstruction, 2) ray tracing-based radio map generation and network planning, and 3) AR-assisted network visualization enabled by real-time camera relocalization. We conducted the proof-of-concept in a Bosch plant in Germany and showed good network coverage of the optimized antenna location, as well as high accuracy in both environment reconstruction and camera relocalization. We also achieved real-time AR-supported network monitoring with an end-to-end latency of about $32$ ms per frame.
abstract_zh: 为了通过触觉和人机交互支持工业 4.0 应用，6G 需要一个完全自主、可视化和交互式的新框架。在本文中，我们为专网规划服务，特别是工业网络提供端到端解决方案HARU。该解决方案包含以下功能：从用户设备收集视觉和感官数据，在服务器上重建 3D 无线电传播环境并进行网络规划，并在启用触觉反馈的用户设备上通过 AR 可视化网络性能。这些功能由三个关键技术组件提供支持：1）基于视觉和传感器融合的 3D 环境重建，2）基于光线追踪的无线电地图生成和网络规划，3）通过实时摄像机重新定位实现的 AR 辅助网络可视化。我们在德国博世工厂进行了概念验证，展示了优化天线位置的良好网络覆盖范围，以及环境重建和摄像机重新定位的高精度。我们还实现了 AR 支持的实时网络监控，每帧端到端延迟约为 32 美元毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HARU系统，通过融合视觉、传感数据和增强现实技术，实现面向工业场景的自主化、可视化网络规划方案。
AI.motivation: 为满足工业4.0中人机交互与触觉反馈需求，6G网络需构建自主、可视化、交互式的新框架，传统网络规划方法难以满足复杂工业场景的实时性与精准性要求。
AI.method: 系统包含三大核心技术：1）视觉与传感器融合的3D环境重建；2）基于射线追踪的无线电波传播建模与网络规划；3）结合实时相机重定位的AR可视化与触觉反馈机制。
AI.result: 在德国博世工厂实测显示，优化后的天线布局网络覆盖良好，环境重建与相机重定位精度高，端到端AR监控延迟约32ms/帧。
AI.conclusion: HARU验证了融合触觉增强现实技术的工业网络规划可行性，为6G时代智能制造提供了可落地的端到端解决方案。

authors_text: Sharif Amit Kamran,Khondker Fariha Hossain,Alireza Tavakkoli,Stewart Lee Zuckerbrod,Salah A. Baker
title: Feature Representation Learning for Robust Retinal Disease Detection from Optical Coherence Tomography Images
title_zh: 从光学相干断层扫描图像中进行鲁棒视网膜疾病检测的特征表示学习
comment: Accepted to MICCAI2022 Ophthalmic Medical Image Analysis (OMIA) Workshop
comments: Accepted to MICCAI2022 Ophthalmic Medical Image Analysis (OMIA) Workshop
abstract: Ophthalmic images may contain identical-looking pathologies that can cause failure in automated techniques to distinguish different retinal degenerative diseases. Additionally, reliance on large annotated datasets and lack of knowledge distillation can restrict ML-based clinical support systems' deployment in real-world environments. To improve the robustness and transferability of knowledge, an enhanced feature-learning module is required to extract meaningful spatial representations from the retinal subspace. Such a module, if used effectively, can detect unique disease traits and differentiate the severity of such retinal degenerative pathologies. In this work, we propose a robust disease detection architecture with three learning heads, i) A supervised encoder for retinal disease classification, ii) An unsupervised decoder for the reconstruction of disease-specific spatial information, and iii) A novel representation learning module for learning the similarity between encoder-decoder feature and enhancing the accuracy of the model. Our experimental results on two publicly available OCT datasets illustrate that the proposed model outperforms existing state-of-the-art models in terms of accuracy, interpretability, and robustness for out-of-distribution retinal disease detection.
summary: Ophthalmic images may contain identical-looking pathologies that can cause failure in automated techniques to distinguish different retinal degenerative diseases. Additionally, reliance on large annotated datasets and lack of knowledge distillation can restrict ML-based clinical support systems' deployment in real-world environments. To improve the robustness and transferability of knowledge, an enhanced feature-learning module is required to extract meaningful spatial representations from the retinal subspace. Such a module, if used effectively, can detect unique disease traits and differentiate the severity of such retinal degenerative pathologies. In this work, we propose a robust disease detection architecture with three learning heads, i) A supervised encoder for retinal disease classification, ii) An unsupervised decoder for the reconstruction of disease-specific spatial information, and iii) A novel representation learning module for learning the similarity between encoder-decoder feature and enhancing the accuracy of the model. Our experimental results on two publicly available OCT datasets illustrate that the proposed model outperforms existing state-of-the-art models in terms of accuracy, interpretability, and robustness for out-of-distribution retinal disease detection.
abstract_zh: Ophthalmic images may contain identical-looking pathologies that can cause failure in automated techniques to distinguish different retinal degenerative diseases. Additionally, reliance on large annotated datasets and lack of knowledge distillation can restrict ML-based clinical support systems' deployment in real-world environments. To improve the robustness and transferability of knowledge, an enhanced feature-learning module is required to extract meaningful spatial representations from the retinal subspace.如果有效使用，这样的模块可以检测独特的疾病特征并区分此类视网膜退行性病变的严重程度。 In this work, we propose a robust disease detection architecture with three learning heads, i) A supervised encoder for retinal disease classification, ii) An unsupervised decoder for the reconstruction of disease-specific spatial information, and iii) A novel representation learning module for learning the similarity between encoder-decoder feature and enhancing the accuracy of the model.我们在两个公开可用的 OCT 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的模型在分布外视网膜疾病检测的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性方面优于现有的最先进模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于增强光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像中视网膜疾病检测鲁棒性的特征表示学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化技术难以区分相似视网膜退行性疾病的病理特征，且依赖大规模标注数据集和缺乏知识蒸馏限制了临床系统的实际部署。
AI.method: 设计包含三个学习模块的架构：监督编码器用于疾病分类、无监督解码器重构疾病特异性空间信息、新颖的表示学习模块增强编码器-解码器特征相似性。
AI.result: 在两个公开OCT数据集上的实验表明，该模型在准确率、可解释性和分布外检测鲁棒性方面优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多模块架构有效提升了视网膜疾病检测的特征表达能力与模型泛化性能。

Ophthalmic images may contain identical-looking pathologies that can cause failure in automated techniques to distinguish different retinal degenerative diseases. Additionally, reliance on large annotated datasets and lack of knowledge distillation can restrict ML-based clinical support systems' deployment in real-world environments. To improve the robustness and transferability of knowledge, an enhanced feature-learning module is required to extract meaningful spatial representations from the retinal subspace.如果有效使用，这样的模块可以检测独特的疾病特征并区分此类视网膜退行性病变的严重程度。 In this work, we propose a robust disease detection architecture with three learning heads, i) A supervised encoder for retinal disease classification, ii) An unsupervised decoder for the reconstruction of disease-specific spatial information, and iii) A novel representation learning module for learning the similarity between encoder-decoder feature and enhancing the accuracy of the model.我们在两个公开可用的 OCT 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的模型在分布外视网膜疾病检测的准确性、可解释性和鲁棒性方面优于现有的最先进模型。 本文提出一种用于增强光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像中视网膜疾病检测鲁棒性的特征表示学习方法。 Sharif Amit Kamran,Khondker Fariha Hossain,Alireza Tavakkoli,Stewart Lee Zuckerbrod,Salah A. Baker eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Hyunjae Cho,Wonbin Jung,Junhyeok Lee,Sang Hoon Woo
title: SANE-TTS: Stable And Natural End-to-End Multilingual Text-to-Speech
title_zh: SANE-TTS：稳定、自然的端到端多语言文本转语音
abstract: In this paper, we present SANE-TTS, a stable and natural end-to-end multilingual TTS model. By the difficulty of obtaining multilingual corpus for given speaker, training multilingual TTS model with monolingual corpora is unavoidable. We introduce speaker regularization loss that improves speech naturalness during cross-lingual synthesis as well as domain adversarial training, which is applied in other multilingual TTS models. Furthermore, by adding speaker regularization loss, replacing speaker embedding with zero vector in duration predictor stabilizes cross-lingual inference. With this replacement, our model generates speeches with moderate rhythm regardless of source speaker in cross-lingual synthesis. In MOS evaluation, SANE-TTS achieves naturalness score above 3.80 both in cross-lingual and intralingual synthesis, where the ground truth score is 3.99. Also, SANE-TTS maintains speaker similarity close to that of ground truth even in cross-lingual inference. Audio samples are available on our web page.
summary: In this paper, we present SANE-TTS, a stable and natural end-to-end multilingual TTS model. By the difficulty of obtaining multilingual corpus for given speaker, training multilingual TTS model with monolingual corpora is unavoidable. We introduce speaker regularization loss that improves speech naturalness during cross-lingual synthesis as well as domain adversarial training, which is applied in other multilingual TTS models. Furthermore, by adding speaker regularization loss, replacing speaker embedding with zero vector in duration predictor stabilizes cross-lingual inference. With this replacement, our model generates speeches with moderate rhythm regardless of source speaker in cross-lingual synthesis. In MOS evaluation, SANE-TTS achieves naturalness score above 3.80 both in cross-lingual and intralingual synthesis, where the ground truth score is 3.99. Also, SANE-TTS maintains speaker similarity close to that of ground truth even in cross-lingual inference. Audio samples are available on our web page.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 SANE-TTS，一种稳定且自然的端到端多语言 TTS 模型。由于获取给定说话人的多语言语料库的困难，用单语语料库训练多语言 TTS 模型是不可避免的。我们引入了说话人正则化损失，可以提高跨语言合成和领域对抗训练期间语音的自然度，该损失已应用于其他多语言 TTS 模型。此外，通过添加说话人正则化损失，在持续时间预测器中用零向量替换说话人嵌入可以稳定跨语言推理。通过这种替换，我们的模型可以在跨语言合成中生成节奏适中的语音，而不管源说话者是谁。在MOS评估中，SANE-TTS在跨语言和语内合成中的自然度得分均超过3.80，其中真实得分为3.99。此外，即使在跨语言推理中，SANE-TTS 也能保持说话人的相似度接近真实值。我们的网页上提供了音频样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SANE-TTS，一种稳定且自然的端到端多语言文本到语音合成模型。
AI.motivation: 多语言语音合成面临语料获取困难，需利用单语语料训练模型，同时保持跨语言合成的自然性和说话人相似性。
AI.method: 引入说话人正则化损失和领域对抗训练，替换持续时间预测器中的说话人嵌入为零向量以稳定跨语言推理。
AI.result: 跨语言和单语合成的自然度MOS评分均超过3.80，接近真实语音的3.99；跨语言推理中保持较高说话人相似性。
AI.conclusion: SANE-TTS通过创新方法有效解决了多语言语音合成中的稳定性与自然度问题，适用于跨语言场景。

title: Excavating RoI Attention for Underwater Object Detection
title_zh: 挖掘 RoI Attention 用于水下物体检测
abstract: Self-attention is one of the most successful designs in deep learning, which calculates the similarity of different tokens and reconstructs the feature based on the attention matrix. Originally designed for NLP, self-attention is also popular in computer vision, and can be categorized into pixel-level attention and patch-level attention. In object detection, RoI features can be seen as patches from base feature maps. This paper aims to apply the attention module to RoI features to improve performance. Instead of employing an original self-attention module, we choose the external attention module, a modified self-attention with reduced parameters. With the proposed double head structure and the Positional Encoding module, our method can achieve promising performance in object detection. The comprehensive experiments show that it achieves promising performance, especially in the underwater object detection dataset. The code will be avaiable in: https://github.com/zsyasd/Excavating-RoI-Attention-for-Underwater-Object-Detection
summary: Self-attention is one of the most successful designs in deep learning, which calculates the similarity of different tokens and reconstructs the feature based on the attention matrix. Originally designed for NLP, self-attention is also popular in computer vision, and can be categorized into pixel-level attention and patch-level attention. In object detection, RoI features can be seen as patches from base feature maps. This paper aims to apply the attention module to RoI features to improve performance. Instead of employing an original self-attention module, we choose the external attention module, a modified self-attention with reduced parameters. With the proposed double head structure and the Positional Encoding module, our method can achieve promising performance in object detection. The comprehensive experiments show that it achieves promising performance, especially in the underwater object detection dataset. The code will be avaiable in: https://github.com/zsyasd/Excavating-RoI-Attention-for-Underwater-Object-Detection
abstract_zh: 自注意力是深度学习中最成功的设计之一，它计算不同token的相似度并根据注意力矩阵重建特征。自注意力最初是为 NLP 设计的，在计算机视觉中也很流行，可以分为像素级注意力和块级注意力。在目标检测中，RoI 特征可以看作是基础特征图的补丁。本文旨在将注意力模块应用于RoI特征以提高性能。我们没有使用原始的自注意力模块，而是选择了外部注意力模块，这是一种参数减少的修改后的自注意力模块。通过所提出的双头结构和位置编码模块，我们的方法可以在目标检测中实现有希望的性能。综合实验表明，它取得了良好的性能，特别是在水下物体检测数据集中。该代码可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/zsyasd/Excavating-RoI-Attention-for-Underwater-Object-Detection

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进RoI特征的注意力机制，提升水下目标检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力模块参数过多，而外部注意力模块参数更少且适用于水下场景的特征提取需求。
AI.method: 采用外部注意力模块替代原始自注意力，并结合双头结构与位置编码模块优化RoI特征。
AI.result: 在水下目标检测数据集上取得显著性能提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过轻量化注意力机制有效增强了水下目标检测的准确率与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Ahmet M. Elbir,Wei Shi,Kumar Vijay Mishra,Anastasios K. Papazafeiropoulos,Symeon Chatzinotas
title: Implicit Channel Learning for Machine Learning Applications in 6G Wireless Networks
title_zh: 6G 无线网络中机器学习应用的隐式信道学习
abstract: With the deployment of the fifth generation (5G) wireless systems gathering momentum across the world, possible technologies for 6G are under active research discussions. In particular, the role of machine learning (ML) in 6G is expected to enhance and aid emerging applications such as virtual and augmented reality, vehicular autonomy, and computer vision. This will result in large segments of wireless data traffic comprising image, video and speech. The ML algorithms process these for classification/recognition/estimation through the learning models located on cloud servers. This requires wireless transmission of data from edge devices to the cloud server. Channel estimation, handled separately from recognition step, is critical for accurate learning performance. Toward combining the learning for both channel and the ML data, we introduce implicit channel learning to perform the ML tasks without estimating the wireless channel. Here, the ML models are trained with channel-corrupted datasets in place of nominal data. Without channel estimation, the proposed approach exhibits approximately 60% improvement in image and speech classification tasks for diverse scenarios such as millimeter wave and IEEE 802.11p vehicular channels.
summary: With the deployment of the fifth generation (5G) wireless systems gathering momentum across the world, possible technologies for 6G are under active research discussions. In particular, the role of machine learning (ML) in 6G is expected to enhance and aid emerging applications such as virtual and augmented reality, vehicular autonomy, and computer vision. This will result in large segments of wireless data traffic comprising image, video and speech. The ML algorithms process these for classification/recognition/estimation through the learning models located on cloud servers. This requires wireless transmission of data from edge devices to the cloud server. Channel estimation, handled separately from recognition step, is critical for accurate learning performance. Toward combining the learning for both channel and the ML data, we introduce implicit channel learning to perform the ML tasks without estimating the wireless channel. Here, the ML models are trained with channel-corrupted datasets in place of nominal data. Without channel estimation, the proposed approach exhibits approximately 60% improvement in image and speech classification tasks for diverse scenarios such as millimeter wave and IEEE 802.11p vehicular channels.
abstract_zh: 随着第五代 (5G) 无线系统的部署在全球范围内蓬勃发展，6G 的可能技术正在积极研究讨论中。特别是，机器学习 (ML) 在 6G 中的作用预计将增强和帮助虚拟和增强现实、车辆自主和计算机视觉等新兴应用。这将导致大量无线数据流量，包括图像、视频和语音。机器学习算法通过位于云服务器上的学习模型来处理这些数据，以进行分类/识别/估计。这需要将数据从边缘设备无线传输到云服务器。与识别步骤分开处理的通道估计对于准确的学习性能至关重要。为了将信道和 ML 数据的学习结合起来，我们引入了隐式信道学习来执行 ML 任务，而无需估计无线信道。在这里，机器学习模型使用通道损坏的数据集代替标称数据进行训练。在没有信道估计的情况下，所提出的方法在毫米波和 IEEE 802.11p 车载信道等不同场景的图像和语音分类任务中表现出大约 60% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种隐式信道学习方法，用于在6G无线网络中无需显式信道估计即可提升机器学习任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着6G无线网络的发展，传统机器学习方法需依赖显式信道估计，而这一过程复杂且可能影响学习性能，尤其在高数据流量场景下效率不足。
AI.method: 通过在训练机器学习模型时直接使用受信道干扰的原始数据集，而非单独进行信道估计，将信道特性与学习任务结合。
AI.result: 在毫米波和IEEE 802.11p车载信道等多样化场景中，图像和语音分类任务的准确率提升了约60%。
AI.conclusion: 隐式信道学习方法有效融合了信道特性与机器学习过程，无需显式信道估计即可显著提升6G网络中数据分类任务的性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种隐式信道学习方法，用于在6G无线网络中无需显式信道估计即可提升机器学习任务的性能。
motivation: 随着6G无线网络的发展，传统机器学习方法需依赖显式信道估计，而这一过程复杂且可能影响学习性能，尤其在高数据流量场景下效率不足。
method: 通过在训练机器学习模型时直接使用受信道干扰的原始数据集，而非单独进行信道估计，将信道特性与学习任务结合。
result: 在毫米波和IEEE 802.11p车载信道等多样化场景中，图像和语音分类任务的准确率提升了约60%。
conclusion: 隐式信道学习方法有效融合了信道特性与机器学习过程，无需显式信道估计即可显著提升6G网络中数据分类任务的性能。
search_text: Implicit Channel Learning for Machine Learning Applications in 6G Wireless Networks 6G 无线网络中机器学习应用的隐式信道学习 With the deployment of the fifth generation (5G) wireless systems gathering momentum across the world, possible technologies for 6G are under active research discussions. In particular, the role of machine learning (ML) in 6G is expected to enhance and aid emerging applications such as virtual and augmented reality, vehicular autonomy, and computer vision. This will result in large segments of wireless data traffic comprising image, video and speech. The ML algorithms process these for classification/recognition/estimation through the learning models located on cloud servers. This requires wireless transmission of data from edge devices to the cloud server. Channel estimation, handled separately from recognition step, is critical for accurate learning performance. Toward combining the learning for both channel and the ML data, we introduce implicit channel learning to perform the ML tasks without estimating the wireless channel. Here, the ML models are trained with channel-corrupted datasets in place of nominal data. Without channel estimation, the proposed approach exhibits approximately 60% improvement in image and speech classification tasks for diverse scenarios such as millimeter wave and IEEE 802.11p vehicular channels. 随着第五代 (5G) 无线系统的部署在全球范围内蓬勃发展，6G 的可能技术正在积极研究讨论中。特别是，机器学习 (ML) 在 6G 中的作用预计将增强和帮助虚拟和增强现实、车辆自主和计算机视觉等新兴应用。这将导致大量无线数据流量，包括图像、视频和语音。机器学习算法通过位于云服务器上的学习模型来处理这些数据，以进行分类/识别/估计。这需要将数据从边缘设备无线传输到云服务器。与识别步骤分开处理的通道估计对于准确的学习性能至关重要。为了将信道和 ML 数据的学习结合起来，我们引入了隐式信道学习来执行 ML 任务，而无需估计无线信道。在这里，机器学习模型使用通道损坏的数据集代替标称数据进行训练。在没有信道估计的情况下，所提出的方法在毫米波和 IEEE 802.11p 车载信道等不同场景的图像和语音分类任务中表现出大约 60% 的改进。 本文提出了一种隐式信道学习方法，用于在6G无线网络中无需显式信道估计即可提升机器学习任务的性能。 Ahmet M. Elbir,Wei Shi,Kumar Vijay Mishra,Anastasios K. Papazafeiropoulos,Symeon Chatzinotas eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.LG

authors_text: Cheng Tan,Zhangyang Gao,Lirong Wu,Yongjie Xu,Jun Xia,Siyuan Li,Stan Z. Li
title: Temporal Attention Unit: Towards Efficient Spatiotemporal Predictive Learning
title_zh: 时间注意力单元：迈向高效的时空预测学习
abstract: Spatiotemporal predictive learning aims to generate future frames by learning from historical frames. In this paper, we investigate existing methods and present a general framework of spatiotemporal predictive learning, in which the spatial encoder and decoder capture intra-frame features and the middle temporal module catches inter-frame correlations. While the mainstream methods employ recurrent units to capture long-term temporal dependencies, they suffer from low computational efficiency due to their unparallelizable architectures. To parallelize the temporal module, we propose the Temporal Attention Unit (TAU), which decomposes the temporal attention into intra-frame statical attention and inter-frame dynamical attention. Moreover, while the mean squared error loss focuses on intra-frame errors, we introduce a novel differential divergence regularization to take inter-frame variations into account. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method enables the derived model to achieve competitive performance on various spatiotemporal prediction benchmarks.
summary: Spatiotemporal predictive learning aims to generate future frames by learning from historical frames. In this paper, we investigate existing methods and present a general framework of spatiotemporal predictive learning, in which the spatial encoder and decoder capture intra-frame features and the middle temporal module catches inter-frame correlations. While the mainstream methods employ recurrent units to capture long-term temporal dependencies, they suffer from low computational efficiency due to their unparallelizable architectures. To parallelize the temporal module, we propose the Temporal Attention Unit (TAU), which decomposes the temporal attention into intra-frame statical attention and inter-frame dynamical attention. Moreover, while the mean squared error loss focuses on intra-frame errors, we introduce a novel differential divergence regularization to take inter-frame variations into account. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method enables the derived model to achieve competitive performance on various spatiotemporal prediction benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 时空预测学习旨在通过学习历史框架来生成未来框架。在本文中，我们研究了现有方法并提出了时空预测学习的通用框架，其中空间编码器和解码器捕获帧内特征，中间时间模块捕获帧间相关性。虽然主流方法采用循环单元来捕获长期时间依赖性，但由于其不可并行的架构，它们的计算效率较低。为了并行化时间模块，我们提出了时间注意力单元（TAU），它将时间注意力分解为帧内静态注意力和帧间动态注意力。此外，虽然均方误差损失主要关注帧内误差，但我们引入了一种新颖的差分散度正则化来考虑帧间变化。大量实验表明，所提出的方法使派生模型能够在各种时空预测基准上实现有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的时空预测学习框架，通过引入时间注意力单元（TAU）来改进传统方法的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖循环单元捕捉长期时间依赖性，但其不可并行化的结构导致计算效率低下，亟需一种可并行化且高效的时空预测方案。
AI.method: 提出时间注意力单元（TAU），将时间注意力分解为帧内静态注意力和帧间动态注意力，并引入差分散度正则化以捕捉帧间变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个时空预测基准测试中表现出具有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: TAU通过并行化设计和新型正则化方法，有效提升了时空预测的效率与准确性。

title: Some theoretical results on discrete contour trees
title_zh: 离散等高线树的一些理论结果
abstract: Contour trees have been developed to visualize or encode scalar data in imaging technologies and scientific simulations. Contours are defined on a continuous scalar field. For discrete data, a continuous function is first interpolated, where contours are then defined. In this paper we define a discrete contour tree, called the iso-tree, on a scalar graph, and discuss its properties. We show that the iso-tree model works for data of all dimensions, and develop an axiomatic system formalizing the discrete contour structures. We also report an isomorphism between iso-trees and augmented contour trees, showing that contour tree algorithms can be used to compute discrete contour trees, and vice versa.
summary: Contour trees have been developed to visualize or encode scalar data in imaging technologies and scientific simulations. Contours are defined on a continuous scalar field. For discrete data, a continuous function is first interpolated, where contours are then defined. In this paper we define a discrete contour tree, called the iso-tree, on a scalar graph, and discuss its properties. We show that the iso-tree model works for data of all dimensions, and develop an axiomatic system formalizing the discrete contour structures. We also report an isomorphism between iso-trees and augmented contour trees, showing that contour tree algorithms can be used to compute discrete contour trees, and vice versa.
abstract_zh: 轮廓树已被开发用于可视化或编码成像技术和科学模拟中的标量数据。轮廓是在连续标量场上定义的。对于离散数据，首先对连续函数进行插值，然后定义轮廓。在本文中，我们在标量图上定义了一个离散轮廓树，称为 iso-tree，并讨论了它的属性。我们证明了 iso-tree 模型适用于所有维度的数据，并开发了一个形式化离散轮廓结构的公理系统。我们还报告了等值树和增强轮廓树之间的同构，表明轮廓树算法可用于计算离散轮廓树，反之亦然。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离散等值树模型（iso-tree），用于在标量图上表示离散数据的等值结构，并探讨其性质及与连续等值树的关联。
AI.motivation: 传统等值树基于连续标量场定义，而离散数据需通过插值处理，可能引入误差。需直接针对离散数据构建理论模型以提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 定义离散等值树（iso-tree）并建立其公理化系统；通过同构性证明将iso-tree与增强等值树关联，利用现有连续等值树算法处理离散数据。
AI.result: 证明iso-tree适用于任意维度数据，建立离散等值结构的公理化框架，并发现其与增强等值树的同构性，实现算法互用性。
AI.conclusion: 离散等值树模型为处理离散数据提供了理论基础，通过同构性连接连续与离散方法，推动了等值树算法在更广泛场景的应用。

title: How Does Automation Shape the Process of Narrative Visualization: A Survey of Tools
title_zh: 自动化如何塑造叙事可视化的过程：工具调查
abstract: In recent years, narrative visualization has gained much attention. Researchers have proposed different design spaces for various narrative visualization genres and scenarios to facilitate the creation process. As users' needs grow and automation technologies advance, increasingly more tools have been designed and developed. In this study, we summarized six genres of narrative visualization (annotated charts, infographics, timelines & storylines, data comics, scrollytelling & slideshow, and data videos) based on previous research and four types of tools (design spaces, authoring tools, ML/AI-supported tools and ML/AI-generator tools) based on the intelligence and automation level of the tools. We surveyed 105 papers and tools to study how automation can progressively engage in visualization design and narrative processes to help users easily create narrative visualizations. This research aims to provide an overview of current research and development in the automation involvement of narrative visualization tools. We discuss key research problems in each category and suggest new opportunities to encourage further research in the related domain.
summary: In recent years, narrative visualization has gained much attention. Researchers have proposed different design spaces for various narrative visualization genres and scenarios to facilitate the creation process. As users' needs grow and automation technologies advance, increasingly more tools have been designed and developed. In this study, we summarized six genres of narrative visualization (annotated charts, infographics, timelines & storylines, data comics, scrollytelling & slideshow, and data videos) based on previous research and four types of tools (design spaces, authoring tools, ML/AI-supported tools and ML/AI-generator tools) based on the intelligence and automation level of the tools. We surveyed 105 papers and tools to study how automation can progressively engage in visualization design and narrative processes to help users easily create narrative visualizations. This research aims to provide an overview of current research and development in the automation involvement of narrative visualization tools. We discuss key research problems in each category and suggest new opportunities to encourage further research in the related domain.
abstract_zh: 近年来，叙事可视化受到广泛关注。研究人员针对不同的叙事可视化流派和场景提出了不同的设计空间，以促进创作过程。随着用户需求的增长和自动化技术的进步，越来越多的工具被设计和开发。在本研究中，我们根据之前的研究总结了六种叙事可视化类型（带注释的图表、信息图表、时间线和故事情节、数据漫画、滚动讲述和幻灯片以及数据视频），并根据工具的智能和自动化水平总结了四种类型的工具（设计空间、创作工具、ML/AI 支持的工具和 ML/AI 生成器工具）。我们调查了 105 篇论文和工具，研究自动化如何逐步参与可视化设计和叙事流程，以帮助用户轻松创建叙事可视化。本研究旨在概述当前叙事可视化工具自动化参与的研究和开发。我们讨论每个类别的关键研究问题，并提出鼓励相关领域进一步研究的新机会。

AI.tldr: 本文通过调查工具，总结叙事可视化六大类和四类工具，分析自动化如何逐步参与可视化设计与叙事过程，帮助用户轻松创建叙事可视化。
AI.motivation: 随着用户需求增长和自动化技术进步，越来越多的叙事可视化工具被开发，但缺乏对自动化在该领域作用的系统性研究，因此需梳理现状并探讨研究方向。
AI.method: 基于前人研究，将叙事可视化分为六种类别，并按智能化水平将工具分为四类，通过调研105篇论文和工具，分析自动化在设计流程中的参与方式。
AI.result: 总结了当前研究与工具发展现状，讨论了各类别的关键研究问题，并提出了未来研究的新机会，如提升AI生成工具的交互性与创作自由度。
AI.conclusion: 自动化技术显著推动叙事可视化工具发展，但需进一步解决AI生成内容的可控性、跨领域适用性及用户协作机制等挑战。

search_text: How Does Automation Shape the Process of Narrative Visualization: A Survey of Tools 自动化如何塑造叙事可视化的过程：工具调查 In recent years, narrative visualization has gained much attention. Researchers have proposed different design spaces for various narrative visualization genres and scenarios to facilitate the creation process. As users' needs grow and automation technologies advance, increasingly more tools have been designed and developed. In this study, we summarized six genres of narrative visualization (annotated charts, infographics, timelines & storylines, data comics, scrollytelling & slideshow, and data videos) based on previous research and four types of tools (design spaces, authoring tools, ML/AI-supported tools and ML/AI-generator tools) based on the intelligence and automation level of the tools. We surveyed 105 papers and tools to study how automation can progressively engage in visualization design and narrative processes to help users easily create narrative visualizations. This research aims to provide an overview of current research and development in the automation involvement of narrative visualization tools. We discuss key research problems in each category and suggest new opportunities to encourage further research in the related domain. 近年来，叙事可视化受到广泛关注。研究人员针对不同的叙事可视化流派和场景提出了不同的设计空间，以促进创作过程。随着用户需求的增长和自动化技术的进步，越来越多的工具被设计和开发。在本研究中，我们根据之前的研究总结了六种叙事可视化类型（带注释的图表、信息图表、时间线和故事情节、数据漫画、滚动讲述和幻灯片以及数据视频），并根据工具的智能和自动化水平总结了四种类型的工具（设计空间、创作工具、ML/AI 支持的工具和 ML/AI 生成器工具）。我们调查了 105 篇论文和工具，研究自动化如何逐步参与可视化设计和叙事流程，以帮助用户轻松创建叙事可视化。本研究旨在概述当前叙事可视化工具自动化参与的研究和开发。我们讨论每个类别的关键研究问题，并提出鼓励相关领域进一步研究的新机会。 本文通过调查工具，总结叙事可视化六大类和四类工具，分析自动化如何逐步参与可视化设计与叙事过程，帮助用户轻松创建叙事可视化。 Qing Chen,Shixiong Cao,Jiazhe Wang,Nan Cao cs.HC

authors_text: Nassim Ait Ali Braham,Lichao Mou,Jocelyn Chanussot,Julien Mairal,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: Self Supervised Learning for Few Shot Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 少镜头高光谱图像分类的自监督学习
abstract: Deep learning has proven to be a very effective approach for Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification. However, deep neural networks require large annotated datasets to generalize well. This limits the applicability of deep learning for HSI classification, where manually labelling thousands of pixels for every scene is impractical. In this paper, we propose to leverage Self Supervised Learning (SSL) for HSI classification. We show that by pre-training an encoder on unlabeled pixels using Barlow-Twins, a state-of-the-art SSL algorithm, we can obtain accurate models with a handful of labels. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach significantly outperforms vanilla supervised learning.
summary: Deep learning has proven to be a very effective approach for Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification. However, deep neural networks require large annotated datasets to generalize well. This limits the applicability of deep learning for HSI classification, where manually labelling thousands of pixels for every scene is impractical. In this paper, we propose to leverage Self Supervised Learning (SSL) for HSI classification. We show that by pre-training an encoder on unlabeled pixels using Barlow-Twins, a state-of-the-art SSL algorithm, we can obtain accurate models with a handful of labels. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach significantly outperforms vanilla supervised learning.
abstract_zh: Deep learning has proven to be a very effective approach for Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification. However, deep neural networks require large annotated datasets to generalize well.这限制了深度学习在 HSI 分类中的适用性，其中为每个场景手动标记数千个像素是不切实际的。 In this paper, we propose to leverage Self Supervised Learning (SSL) for HSI classification.我们表明，通过使用 Barlow-Twins（一种最先进的 SSL 算法）对未标记像素进行预训练编码器，我们可以获得具有少量标签的准确模型。 Experimental results demonstrate that this approach significantly outperforms vanilla supervised learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的少样本高光谱图像分类方法，通过预训练编码器解决标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在高光谱图像分类中需要大量标注数据，而实际场景中手动标注海量像素点不现实，亟需减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 采用Barlow-Twins自监督算法对未标注像素预训练编码器，再结合少量标注样本进行微调实现分类。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在少量标签条件下显著优于传统监督学习方法，分类准确率提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效缓解高光谱图像分类中标注数据稀缺问题，为少样本场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Makoto Yamada,Yuki Takezawa,Ryoma Sato,Han Bao,Zornitsa Kozareva,Sujith Ravi
title: Approximating 1-Wasserstein Distance with Trees
title_zh: 近似树木的 1-Wasserstein 距离
abstract: Wasserstein distance, which measures the discrepancy between distributions, shows efficacy in various types of natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV) applications. One of the challenges in estimating Wasserstein distance is that it is computationally expensive and does not scale well for many distribution comparison tasks. In this paper, we aim to approximate the 1-Wasserstein distance by the tree-Wasserstein distance (TWD), where TWD is a 1-Wasserstein distance with tree-based embedding and can be computed in linear time with respect to the number of nodes on a tree. More specifically, we propose a simple yet efficient L1-regularized approach to learning the weights of the edges in a tree. To this end, we first show that the 1-Wasserstein approximation problem can be formulated as a distance approximation problem using the shortest path distance on a tree. We then show that the shortest path distance can be represented by a linear model and can be formulated as a Lasso-based regression problem. Owing to the convex formulation, we can obtain a globally optimal solution efficiently. Moreover, we propose a tree-sliced variant of these methods. Through experiments, we demonstrated that the weighted TWD can accurately approximate the original 1-Wasserstein distance.
summary: Wasserstein distance, which measures the discrepancy between distributions, shows efficacy in various types of natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV) applications. One of the challenges in estimating Wasserstein distance is that it is computationally expensive and does not scale well for many distribution comparison tasks. In this paper, we aim to approximate the 1-Wasserstein distance by the tree-Wasserstein distance (TWD), where TWD is a 1-Wasserstein distance with tree-based embedding and can be computed in linear time with respect to the number of nodes on a tree. More specifically, we propose a simple yet efficient L1-regularized approach to learning the weights of the edges in a tree. To this end, we first show that the 1-Wasserstein approximation problem can be formulated as a distance approximation problem using the shortest path distance on a tree. We then show that the shortest path distance can be represented by a linear model and can be formulated as a Lasso-based regression problem. Owing to the convex formulation, we can obtain a globally optimal solution efficiently. Moreover, we propose a tree-sliced variant of these methods. Through experiments, we demonstrated that the weighted TWD can accurately approximate the original 1-Wasserstein distance.
abstract_zh: Wasserstein 距离用于测量分布之间的差异，在各种类型的自然语言处理 (NLP) 和计算机视觉 (CV) 应用中显示出有效性。估计 Wasserstein 距离的挑战之一是它的计算成本很高，并且对于许多分布比较任务来说不能很好地扩展。在本文中，我们的目标是通过树-Wasserstein 距离（TWD）来近似 1-Wasserstein 距离，其中 TWD 是基于树的嵌入的 1-Wasserstein 距离，可以在相对于树上节点数量的线性时间内计算。更具体地说，我们提出了一种简单而有效的 L1 正则化方法来学习树中边的权重。为此，我们首先证明 1-Wasserstein 近似问题可以表示为使用树上最短路径距离的距离近似问题。然后我们证明最短路径距离可以用线性模型表示，并且可以表示为基于 Lasso 的回归问题。由于凸公式，我们可以有效地获得全局最优解。此外，我们提出了这些方法的树切片变体。通过实验，我们证明加权 TWD 可以准确地逼近原始 1-Wasserstein 距离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于树结构的1-Wasserstein距离近似方法，通过树嵌入和线性时间计算解决传统方法计算复杂度高的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统1-Wasserstein距离计算复杂度高，难以扩展到大规模分布比较任务，需寻找高效近似方法。
AI.method: 提出树-Wasserstein距离（TWD），将问题转化为树的最短路径距离近似，利用L1正则化学习树边权重，并通过Lasso回归求解，同时提出树切片变体方法。
AI.result: 实验表明加权TWD能准确近似原始1-Wasserstein距离，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过树结构嵌入和线性时间计算，实现了对1-Wasserstein距离的高效近似，适用于大规模分布比较任务。

Owing to the convex formulation, we can obtain a globally optimal solution efficiently. Moreover, we propose a tree-sliced variant of these methods. Through experiments, we demonstrated that the weighted TWD can accurately approximate the original 1-Wasserstein distance. Wasserstein 距离用于测量分布之间的差异，在各种类型的自然语言处理 (NLP) 和计算机视觉 (CV) 应用中显示出有效性。估计 Wasserstein 距离的挑战之一是它的计算成本很高，并且对于许多分布比较任务来说不能很好地扩展。在本文中，我们的目标是通过树-Wasserstein 距离（TWD）来近似 1-Wasserstein 距离，其中 TWD 是基于树的嵌入的 1-Wasserstein 距离，可以在相对于树上节点数量的线性时间内计算。更具体地说，我们提出了一种简单而有效的 L1 正则化方法来学习树中边的权重。为此，我们首先证明 1-Wasserstein 近似问题可以表示为使用树上最短路径距离的距离近似问题。然后我们证明最短路径距离可以用线性模型表示，并且可以表示为基于 Lasso 的回归问题。由于凸公式，我们可以有效地获得全局最优解。此外，我们提出了这些方法的树切片变体。通过实验，我们证明加权 TWD 可以准确地逼近原始 1-Wasserstein 距离。 本文提出一种基于树结构的1-Wasserstein距离近似方法，通过树嵌入和线性时间计算解决传统方法计算复杂度高的问题。 Makoto Yamada,Yuki Takezawa,Ryoma Sato,Han Bao,Zornitsa Kozareva,Sujith Ravi stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Dissecting U-net for Seismic Application: An In-Depth Study on Deep Learning Multiple Removal
title_zh: 剖析 U-net 的地震应用：深度学习多重去除的深入研究
abstract: Seismic processing often requires suppressing multiples that appear when collecting data. To tackle these artifacts, practitioners usually rely on Radon transform-based algorithms as post-migration gather conditioning. However, such traditional approaches are both time-consuming and parameter-dependent, making them fairly complex. In this work, we present a deep learning-based alternative that provides competitive results, while reducing its usage's complexity, and hence democratizing its applicability. We observe an excellent performance of our network when inferring complex field data, despite the fact of being solely trained on synthetics. Furthermore, extensive experiments show that our proposal can preserve the inherent characteristics of the data, avoiding undesired over-smoothed results, while removing the multiples. Finally, we conduct an in-depth analysis of the model, where we pinpoint the effects of the main hyperparameters with physical events. To the best of our knowledge, this study pioneers the unboxing of neural networks for the demultiple process, helping the user to gain insights into the inside running of the network.
summary: Seismic processing often requires suppressing multiples that appear when collecting data. To tackle these artifacts, practitioners usually rely on Radon transform-based algorithms as post-migration gather conditioning. However, such traditional approaches are both time-consuming and parameter-dependent, making them fairly complex. In this work, we present a deep learning-based alternative that provides competitive results, while reducing its usage's complexity, and hence democratizing its applicability. We observe an excellent performance of our network when inferring complex field data, despite the fact of being solely trained on synthetics. Furthermore, extensive experiments show that our proposal can preserve the inherent characteristics of the data, avoiding undesired over-smoothed results, while removing the multiples. Finally, we conduct an in-depth analysis of the model, where we pinpoint the effects of the main hyperparameters with physical events. To the best of our knowledge, this study pioneers the unboxing of neural networks for the demultiple process, helping the user to gain insights into the inside running of the network.
abstract_zh: 地震处理通常需要抑制收集数据时出现的多次波。为了解决这些伪影，从业者通常依赖基于 Radon 变换的算法作为迁移后聚集调节。然而，这种传统方法既耗时又依赖于参数，使得它们相当复杂。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的替代方案，它可以提供有竞争力的结果，同时降低其使用的复杂性，从而使其适用性民主化。尽管我们只接受了合成数据的训练，但我们观察到我们的网络在推断复杂的现场数据时表现出色。此外，大量的实验表明，我们的建议可以保留数据的固有特征，避免不期望的过度平滑结果，同时消除倍数。最后，我们对模型进行深入分析，确定主要超参数对物理事件的影响。据我们所知，这项研究开创了神经网络拆箱的去多重过程，帮助用户深入了解网络的内部运行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的U-Net模型，用于地震数据处理中的多重波去除，替代传统Radon变换方法。
AI.motivation: 传统多重波去除方法计算复杂且依赖参数，难以普及应用，需开发更高效、易用的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 设计U-Net神经网络架构，仅使用合成数据训练，通过实验分析超参数对物理事件的影响，并测试其在实际地震数据中的性能。
AI.result: 模型在未接触实际数据的情况下仍能有效去除多重波，保留数据特征且避免过度平滑，超参数分析揭示了物理事件与网络行为的关系。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次系统解析神经网络在多重波去除中的内部机制，证明深度学习可简化地震数据处理流程并提升适用性。

title: Signal Knowledge Graph
title_zh: 信号知识图谱
abstract: This paper presents an knowledge graph to assist in reasoning over signals for intelligence purposes. We highlight limitations of existing knowledge graphs and reasoning systems for this purpose, using inference of an attack using combined data from microphones, cameras and social media as an example. Rather than acting directly on the received signal, our approach considers attacker behaviour, signal emission, receiver characteristics, and how signals are summarised to support inferring the underlying cause of the signal.
summary: This paper presents an knowledge graph to assist in reasoning over signals for intelligence purposes. We highlight limitations of existing knowledge graphs and reasoning systems for this purpose, using inference of an attack using combined data from microphones, cameras and social media as an example. Rather than acting directly on the received signal, our approach considers attacker behaviour, signal emission, receiver characteristics, and how signals are summarised to support inferring the underlying cause of the signal.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个知识图，以帮助出于情报目的对信号进行推理。我们强调了现有知识图和推理系统为此目的的局限性，以使用来自麦克风、摄像头和社交媒体的组合数据进行攻击推断为例。我们的方法不是直接作用于接收到的信号，而是考虑攻击者行为、信号发射、接收器特征以及如何总结信号以支持推断信号的根本原因。

AI.tldr: 提出一个信号知识图谱，用于辅助情报领域的信号推理，解决现有系统的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱和推理系统在处理多源信号数据（如麦克风、摄像头、社交媒体）时存在局限，难以准确推断攻击行为。
AI.method: 通过整合攻击者行为、信号发射、接收器特征及信号总结方式，构建知识图谱以支持多源信号数据的因果推理。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在结合多源信号数据推断攻击事件中的有效性，提升了情报分析的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效弥补了现有系统的不足，为多源信号数据的情报推理提供了新的框架和思路。
