title: Learning Augmented Binary Search Trees
title_zh: 学习增强二叉搜索树
abstract: A treap is a classic randomized binary search tree data structure that is easy to implement and supports O(\log n) expected time access. However, classic treaps do not take advantage of the input distribution or patterns in the input. Given recent advances in algorithms with predictions, we propose pairing treaps with machine advice to form a learning-augmented treap. We are the first to propose a learning-augmented data structure that supports binary search tree operations such as range-query and successor functionalities. With the assumption that we have access to advice from a frequency estimation oracle, we assign learned priorities to the nodes to better improve the treap's structure. We theoretically analyze the learning-augmented treap's performance under various input distributions and show that under those circumstances, our learning-augmented treap has stronger guarantees than classic treaps and other classic tree-based data structures. Further, we experimentally evaluate our learned treap on synthetic datasets and demonstrate a performance advantage over other search tree data structures. We also present experiments on real world datasets with known frequency estimation oracles and show improvements as well.
summary: A treap is a classic randomized binary search tree data structure that is easy to implement and supports O(\log n) expected time access. However, classic treaps do not take advantage of the input distribution or patterns in the input. Given recent advances in algorithms with predictions, we propose pairing treaps with machine advice to form a learning-augmented treap. We are the first to propose a learning-augmented data structure that supports binary search tree operations such as range-query and successor functionalities. With the assumption that we have access to advice from a frequency estimation oracle, we assign learned priorities to the nodes to better improve the treap's structure. We theoretically analyze the learning-augmented treap's performance under various input distributions and show that under those circumstances, our learning-augmented treap has stronger guarantees than classic treaps and other classic tree-based data structures. Further, we experimentally evaluate our learned treap on synthetic datasets and demonstrate a performance advantage over other search tree data structures. We also present experiments on real world datasets with known frequency estimation oracles and show improvements as well.
abstract_zh: treap 是一种经典的随机二叉搜索树数据结构，易于实现并支持 O(\log n) 预期时间访问。然而，经典的陷阱不利用输入分布或输入中的模式。鉴于预测算法的最新进展，我们建议将 Treap 与机器建议配对，形成学习增强 Treap。我们是第一个提出学习增强数据结构的人，该结构支持二叉搜索树操作，例如范围查询和后继功能。假设我们可以从频率估计预言机获得建议，我们将学习到的优先级分配给节点，以更好地改进trap的结构。我们从理论上分析了学习增强treap在各种输入分布下的性能，并表明在这些情况下，我们的学习增强treap比经典treap和其他经典的基于树的数据结构具有更强的保证。此外，我们在合成数据集上实验评估了我们学到的trap，并证明了相对于其他搜索树数据结构的性能优势。我们还使用已知的频率估计预言机对现实世界数据集进行了实验，并展示了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器学习建议的二叉搜索树结构——学习增强型树堆（Learning-Augmented Treap），通过频率估计预言机优化节点优先级，提升数据结构性能。
AI.motivation: 传统树堆未利用输入分布特性，而学习增强方法可通过频率预测优化树结构，从而在实际应用中获得更优性能。
AI.method: 将频率估计预言机的预测结果作为节点优先级，构建学习增强型树堆，并通过理论分析与合成/真实数据集实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 理论分析表明该结构在多种输入分布下优于传统树堆；实验显示其在合成数据集和真实数据集上均具有性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 学习增强型树堆通过引入机器学习预测有效优化了传统数据结构，为未来结合预测的算法设计提供了新思路。

motivation: 传统树堆未利用输入分布特性，而学习增强方法可通过频率预测优化树结构，从而在实际应用中获得更优性能。
method: 将频率估计预言机的预测结果作为节点优先级，构建学习增强型树堆，并通过理论分析与合成/真实数据集实验验证其效果。
result: 理论分析表明该结构在多种输入分布下优于传统树堆；实验显示其在合成数据集和真实数据集上均具有性能优势。
conclusion: 学习增强型树堆通过引入机器学习预测有效优化了传统数据结构，为未来结合预测的算法设计提供了新思路。
search_text: Learning Augmented Binary Search Trees 学习增强二叉搜索树 A treap is a classic randomized binary search tree data structure that is easy to implement and supports O(\log n) expected time access. However, classic treaps do not take advantage of the input distribution or patterns in the input. Given recent advances in algorithms with predictions, we propose pairing treaps with machine advice to form a learning-augmented treap. We are the first to propose a learning-augmented data structure that supports binary search tree operations such as range-query and successor functionalities. With the assumption that we have access to advice from a frequency estimation oracle, we assign learned priorities to the nodes to better improve the treap's structure. We theoretically analyze the learning-augmented treap's performance under various input distributions and show that under those circumstances, our learning-augmented treap has stronger guarantees than classic treaps and other classic tree-based data structures. Further, we experimentally evaluate our learned treap on synthetic datasets and demonstrate a performance advantage over other search tree data structures. We also present experiments on real world datasets with known frequency estimation oracles and show improvements as well. treap 是一种经典的随机二叉搜索树数据结构，易于实现并支持 O(\log n) 预期时间访问。然而，经典的陷阱不利用输入分布或输入中的模式。鉴于预测算法的最新进展，我们建议将 Treap 与机器建议配对，形成学习增强 Treap。我们是第一个提出学习增强数据结构的人，该结构支持二叉搜索树操作，例如范围查询和后继功能。假设我们可以从频率估计预言机获得建议，我们将学习到的优先级分配给节点，以更好地改进trap的结构。我们从理论上分析了学习增强treap在各种输入分布下的性能，并表明在这些情况下，我们的学习增强treap比经典treap和其他经典的基于树的数据结构具有更强的保证。此外，我们在合成数据集上实验评估了我们学到的trap，并证明了相对于其他搜索树数据结构的性能优势。我们还使用已知的频率估计预言机对现实世界数据集进行了实验，并展示了改进。 本文提出一种结合机器学习建议的二叉搜索树结构——学习增强型树堆（Learning-Augmented Treap），通过频率估计预言机优化节点优先级，提升数据结构性能。 Honghao Lin,Tian Luo,David P. Woodruff cs.DS

title: A novel approach for glaucoma classification by wavelet neural networks using graph-based, statisitcal features of qualitatively improved images
title_zh: 利用基于图形的定性改进图像的统计特征，通过小波神经网络进行青光眼分类的新方法
abstract: In this paper, we have proposed a new glaucoma classification approach that employs a wavelet neural network (WNN) on optimally enhanced retinal images features. To avoid tedious and error prone manual analysis of retinal images by ophthalmologists, computer aided diagnosis (CAD) substantially aids in robust diagnosis. Our objective is to introduce a CAD system with a fresh approach. Retinal image quality improvement is attempted in two phases. The retinal image preprocessing phase improves the brightness and contrast of the image through quantile based histogram modification. It is followed by the image enhancement phase, which involves multi scale morphological operations using image specific dynamic structuring elements for the retinal structure enrichment. Graph based retinal image features in terms of Local Graph Structures (LGS) and Graph Shortest Path (GSP) statistics are extracted from various directions along with the statistical features from the enhanced retinal dataset. WNN is employed to classify glaucoma retinal images with a suitable wavelet activation function. The performance of the WNN classifier is compared with multilayer perceptron neural networks with various datasets. The results show our approach is superior to the existing approaches.
summary: In this paper, we have proposed a new glaucoma classification approach that employs a wavelet neural network (WNN) on optimally enhanced retinal images features. To avoid tedious and error prone manual analysis of retinal images by ophthalmologists, computer aided diagnosis (CAD) substantially aids in robust diagnosis. Our objective is to introduce a CAD system with a fresh approach. Retinal image quality improvement is attempted in two phases. The retinal image preprocessing phase improves the brightness and contrast of the image through quantile based histogram modification. It is followed by the image enhancement phase, which involves multi scale morphological operations using image specific dynamic structuring elements for the retinal structure enrichment. Graph based retinal image features in terms of Local Graph Structures (LGS) and Graph Shortest Path (GSP) statistics are extracted from various directions along with the statistical features from the enhanced retinal dataset. WNN is employed to classify glaucoma retinal images with a suitable wavelet activation function. The performance of the WNN classifier is compared with multilayer perceptron neural networks with various datasets. The results show our approach is superior to the existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新的青光眼分类方法，该方法在优化增强的视网膜图像特征上采用小波神经网络（WNN）。为了避免眼科医生对视网膜图像进行繁琐且容易出错的手动分析，计算机辅助诊断 (CAD) 极大地有助于稳健的诊断。我们的目标是引入采用全新方法的 CAD 系统。视网膜图像质量的改善分两个阶段进行。视网膜图像预处理阶段通过基于分位数的直方图修改来提高图像的亮度和对比度。接下来是图像增强阶段，其中涉及使用图像特定动态结构元素进行多尺度形态学操作以丰富视网膜结构。从各个方向提取基于局部图结构（LGS）和图最短路径（GSP）统计的基于图的视网膜图像特征以及来自增强视网膜数据集的统计特征。 WNN 用于通过合适的小波激活函数对青光眼视网膜图像进行分类。将 WNN 分类器的性能与具有各种数据集的多层感知器神经网络进行了比较。结果表明我们的方法优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于小波神经网络（WNN）和改进图像特征的青光眼分类新方法。
AI.motivation: 为避免眼科医生对视网膜图像进行繁琐且易出错的 manual 分析，开发一种自动化计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统以提高青光眼诊断的准确性和效率。
AI.method: 通过分两阶段提升视网膜图像质量（直方图修正和多尺度形态学增强），提取基于图的局部图结构（LGS）和最短路径（GSP）统计特征，并结合统计特征，利用WNN进行分类。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多种数据集上的分类性能优于传统多层感知机（MLP）等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的结合图像质量改进与图特征分析的WNN分类方法，为青光眼诊断提供了更优的CAD解决方案。

authors_text: Junyu Lu,Ping Yang,Ruyi Gan,Jing Yang,Jiaxing Zhang
title: Unified BERT for Few-shot Natural Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于小样本自然语言理解的统一 BERT
abstract: Even as pre-trained language models share a semantic encoder, natural language understanding suffers from a diversity of output schemas. In this paper, we propose UBERT, a unified bidirectional language understanding model based on BERT framework, which can universally model the training objects of different NLU tasks through a biaffine network. Specifically, UBERT encodes prior knowledge from various aspects, uniformly constructing learning representations across multiple NLU tasks, which is conducive to enhancing the ability to capture common semantic understanding. By using the biaffine to model scores pair of the start and end position of the original text, various classification and extraction structures can be converted into a universal, span-decoding approach. Experiments show that UBERT wins the first price in the 2022 AIWIN - World Artificial Intelligence Innovation Competition, Chinese insurance few-shot multi-task track, and realizes the unification of extensive information extraction and linguistic reasoning tasks.
summary: Even as pre-trained language models share a semantic encoder, natural language understanding suffers from a diversity of output schemas. In this paper, we propose UBERT, a unified bidirectional language understanding model based on BERT framework, which can universally model the training objects of different NLU tasks through a biaffine network. Specifically, UBERT encodes prior knowledge from various aspects, uniformly constructing learning representations across multiple NLU tasks, which is conducive to enhancing the ability to capture common semantic understanding. By using the biaffine to model scores pair of the start and end position of the original text, various classification and extraction structures can be converted into a universal, span-decoding approach. Experiments show that UBERT wins the first price in the 2022 AIWIN - World Artificial Intelligence Innovation Competition, Chinese insurance few-shot multi-task track, and realizes the unification of extensive information extraction and linguistic reasoning tasks.
abstract_zh: 即使预训练的语言模型共享语义编码器，自然语言理解也会受到输出模式多样性的影响。在本文中，我们提出了UBERT，一种基于BERT框架的统一双向语言理解模型，它可以通过双仿射网络对不同NLU任务的训练对象进行通用建模。具体来说，UBERT从各个方面对先验知识进行编码，跨多个NLU任务统一构建学习表示，这有利于增强捕获共同语义理解的能力。通过使用双仿射对原始文本的开始和结束位置的分数对进行建模，可以将各种分类和提取结构转换为通用的跨度解码方法。实验表明，UBERT在2022年AIWIN-世界人工智能创新大赛中国保险few-shot多任务赛道中获得第一名，实现了广泛的信息抽取和语言推理任务的统一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UBERT模型，通过统一框架解决自然语言理解任务中输出模式多样化的问题，实现多任务的少样本学习。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型在处理不同NLU任务时面临输出结构多样性挑战，导致模型泛化能力受限，需统一框架提升跨任务语义理解能力。
AI.method: 基于BERT框架设计UBERT，利用双线性网络统一建模文本跨度得分，通过编码多维度先验知识构建跨任务共享表示，将分类与抽取任务转化为通用解码结构。
AI.result: UBERT在2022 AIWIN中文保险少样本多任务竞赛中夺冠，成功统一信息抽取与语言推理任务的处理框架。
AI.conclusion: UBERT通过统一表示学习和跨度解码方法，有效解决了NLU任务多样性问题，在少样本场景下展现优异的跨任务泛化能力。

title: Evolution of Activation Functions for Deep Learning-Based Image Classification
title_zh: 基于深度学习的图像分类激活函数的演化
comment: ef:Proceedings of 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference
comments: ef:Proceedings of 2022 Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference
abstract: Activation functions (AFs) play a pivotal role in the performance of neural networks. The Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) is currently the most commonly used AF. Several replacements to ReLU have been suggested but improvements have proven inconsistent. Some AFs exhibit better performance for specific tasks, but it is hard to know a priori how to select the appropriate one(s). Studying both standard fully connected neural networks (FCNs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we propose a novel, three-population, coevolutionary algorithm to evolve AFs, and compare it to four other methods, both evolutionary and non-evolutionary. Tested on four datasets -- MNIST, FashionMNIST, KMNIST, and USPS -- coevolution proves to be a performant algorithm for finding good AFs and AF architectures.
summary: Activation functions (AFs) play a pivotal role in the performance of neural networks. The Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) is currently the most commonly used AF. Several replacements to ReLU have been suggested but improvements have proven inconsistent. Some AFs exhibit better performance for specific tasks, but it is hard to know a priori how to select the appropriate one(s). Studying both standard fully connected neural networks (FCNs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we propose a novel, three-population, coevolutionary algorithm to evolve AFs, and compare it to four other methods, both evolutionary and non-evolutionary. Tested on four datasets -- MNIST, FashionMNIST, KMNIST, and USPS -- coevolution proves to be a performant algorithm for finding good AFs and AF architectures.
abstract_zh: 激活函数（AF）在神经网络的性能中发挥着关键作用。修正线性单元（ReLU）是目前最常用的 AF。有人提出了几种 ReLU 的替代方案，但事实证明改进并不一致。一些 AF 对特定任务表现出更好的性能，但很难先验地知道如何选择合适的 AF。通过研究标准的全连接神经网络 (FCN) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)，我们提出了一种新颖的三群体协同进化算法来进化 AF，并将其与其他四种方法（进化和非进化）进行比较。在 MNIST、FashionMNIST、KMNIST 和 USPS 四个数据集上进行测试，协同进化被证明是一种寻找良好 AF 和 AF 架构的高性能算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的三群体协同进化算法，用于演化深度学习图像分类中的激活函数，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有激活函数（如ReLU）的改进效果不稳定，且缺乏有效的方法来先验选择适合特定任务的激活函数，需探索更高效的演化方法。
AI.method: 提出一种三群体协同进化算法来演化激活函数，并在MNIST、FashionMNIST、KMNIST和USPS四个数据集上与四种其他方法（进化和非进化）进行比较。
AI.result: 协同进化算法在四个数据集上表现出色，证明其在发现高效激活函数及架构方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 协同进化算法能有效演化出适用于图像分类任务的激活函数，为激活函数设计提供新思路。

search_text: Evolution of Activation Functions for Deep Learning-Based Image Classification 基于深度学习的图像分类激活函数的演化 Activation functions (AFs) play a pivotal role in the performance of neural networks. The Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) is currently the most commonly used AF. Several replacements to ReLU have been suggested but improvements have proven inconsistent. Some AFs exhibit better performance for specific tasks, but it is hard to know a priori how to select the appropriate one(s). Studying both standard fully connected neural networks (FCNs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs), we propose a novel, three-population, coevolutionary algorithm to evolve AFs, and compare it to four other methods, both evolutionary and non-evolutionary. Tested on four datasets -- MNIST, FashionMNIST, KMNIST, and USPS -- coevolution proves to be a performant algorithm for finding good AFs and AF architectures. 激活函数（AF）在神经网络的性能中发挥着关键作用。修正线性单元（ReLU）是目前最常用的 AF。有人提出了几种 ReLU 的替代方案，但事实证明改进并不一致。一些 AF 对特定任务表现出更好的性能，但很难先验地知道如何选择合适的 AF。通过研究标准的全连接神经网络 (FCN) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN)，我们提出了一种新颖的三群体协同进化算法来进化 AF，并将其与其他四种方法（进化和非进化）进行比较。在 MNIST、FashionMNIST、KMNIST 和 USPS 四个数据集上进行测试，协同进化被证明是一种寻找良好 AF 和 AF 架构的高性能算法。 本文提出一种新的三群体协同进化算法，用于演化深度学习图像分类中的激活函数，并验证其有效性。 Raz Lapid,Moshe Sipper cs.NE

title: Symbolic-Regression Boosting
title_zh: 符号回归增强
abstract: Modifying standard gradient boosting by replacing the embedded weak learner in favor of a strong(er) one, we present SyRBo: Symbolic-Regression Boosting. Experiments over 98 regression datasets show that by adding a small number of boosting stages -- between 2--5 -- to a symbolic regressor, statistically significant improvements can often be attained. We note that coding SyRBo on top of any symbolic regressor is straightforward, and the added cost is simply a few more evolutionary rounds. SyRBo is essentially a simple add-on that can be readily added to an extant symbolic regressor, often with beneficial results.
summary: Modifying standard gradient boosting by replacing the embedded weak learner in favor of a strong(er) one, we present SyRBo: Symbolic-Regression Boosting. Experiments over 98 regression datasets show that by adding a small number of boosting stages -- between 2--5 -- to a symbolic regressor, statistically significant improvements can often be attained. We note that coding SyRBo on top of any symbolic regressor is straightforward, and the added cost is simply a few more evolutionary rounds. SyRBo is essentially a simple add-on that can be readily added to an extant symbolic regressor, often with beneficial results.
abstract_zh: 通过将嵌入式弱学习器替换为强学习器来修改标准梯度提升，我们提出了 SyRBo：符号回归提升。超过 98 个回归数据集的实验表明，通过向符号回归器添加少量的提升阶段（2--5 个之间），通常可以获得统计上显着的改进。我们注意到，在任何符号回归器之上编码 SyRBo 都很简单，增加的成本只是多了几轮进化。 SyRBo 本质上是一个简单的附加组件，可以轻松添加到现有的符号回归器中，通常会产生有益的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SyRBo的符号回归增强方法，通过替换梯度提升中的弱学习器为强学习器，以提升回归任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有符号回归器在处理复杂问题时表现有限，需通过简单且低成本的方法提升其性能。
AI.method: 修改标准梯度提升框架，将弱学习器替换为强学习器，并在符号回归器基础上添加少量（2-5个）增强阶段，通过进化算法实现。
AI.result: 在98个回归数据集上验证，添加少量增强阶段后性能显著提升，且实现成本仅为额外几个进化轮次。
AI.conclusion: SyRBo作为一种简单附加模块，能有效提升符号回归器性能，具有广泛适用性和实际应用价值。

authors_text: Reza Arablouei,Ziwei Wang,Greg J. Bishop-Hurley,Jiajun Liu
title: Multimodal sensor data fusion for in-situ classification of animal behavior using accelerometry and GNSS data
title_zh: 多模态传感器数据融合，利用加速度测量和 GNSS 数据对动物行为进行原位分类
abstract: In this paper, we examine the use of data from multiple sensing modes, i.e., accelerometry and global navigation satellite system (GNSS), for classifying animal behavior. We extract three new features from the GNSS data, namely, distance from water point, median speed, and median estimated horizontal position error. We combine the information available from the accelerometry and GNSS data via two approaches. The first approach is based on concatenating the features extracted from both sensor data and feeding the concatenated feature vector into a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) classifier. The second approach is based on fusing the posterior probabilities predicted by two MLP classifiers. The input to each classifier is the features extracted from the data of one sensing mode. We evaluate the performance of the developed multimodal animal behavior classification algorithms using two real-world datasets collected via smart cattle collar tags and ear tags. The leave-one-animal-out cross-validation results show that both approaches improve the classification performance appreciably compared with using data of only one sensing mode. This is more notable for the infrequent but important behaviors of walking and drinking. The algorithms developed based on both approaches require little computational and memory resources hence are suitable for implementation on embedded systems of our collar tags and ear tags. However, the multimodal animal behavior classification algorithm based on posterior probability fusion is preferable to the one based on feature concatenation as it delivers better classification accuracy, has less computational and memory complexity, is more robust to sensor data failure, and enjoys better modularity.
summary: In this paper, we examine the use of data from multiple sensing modes, i.e., accelerometry and global navigation satellite system (GNSS), for classifying animal behavior. We extract three new features from the GNSS data, namely, distance from water point, median speed, and median estimated horizontal position error. We combine the information available from the accelerometry and GNSS data via two approaches. The first approach is based on concatenating the features extracted from both sensor data and feeding the concatenated feature vector into a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) classifier. The second approach is based on fusing the posterior probabilities predicted by two MLP classifiers. The input to each classifier is the features extracted from the data of one sensing mode. We evaluate the performance of the developed multimodal animal behavior classification algorithms using two real-world datasets collected via smart cattle collar tags and ear tags. The leave-one-animal-out cross-validation results show that both approaches improve the classification performance appreciably compared with using data of only one sensing mode. This is more notable for the infrequent but important behaviors of walking and drinking. The algorithms developed based on both approaches require little computational and memory resources hence are suitable for implementation on embedded systems of our collar tags and ear tags. However, the multimodal animal behavior classification algorithm based on posterior probability fusion is preferable to the one based on feature concatenation as it delivers better classification accuracy, has less computational and memory complexity, is more robust to sensor data failure, and enjoys better modularity.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了来自多种传感模式（即加速度测量和全球导航卫星系统（GNSS））的数据对动物行为进行分类的用途。我们从 GNSS 数据中提取了三个新特征，即距水点的距离、中值速度和中值估计水平位置误差。我们通过两种方法结合来​​自加速度测量和 GNSS 数据的信息。第一种方法基于将从两个传感器数据中提取的特征串联起来，并将串联的特征向量输入多层感知器 (MLP) 分类器。第二种方法基于融合两个 MLP 分类器预测的后验概率。每个分类器的输入是从一种传感模式的数据中提取的特征。我们使用通过智能牛项圈标签和耳标收集的两个真实世界数据集来评估所开发的多模式动物行为分类算法的性能。留一动物交叉验证结果表明，与仅使用一种传感模式的数据相比，两种方法都显着提高了分类性能。对于不常见但重要的散步和饮酒行为来说，这一点更为值得注意。基于这两种方法开发的算法需要很少的计算和内存资源，因此适合在我们的项圈标签和耳标的嵌入式系统上实现。然而，基于后验概率融合的多模态动物行为分类算法优于基于特征串联的多模态动物行为分类算法，因为它具有更好的分类精度，具有更少的计算和存储复杂性，对传感器数据故障更鲁棒，并且具有更好的模块化性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用加速度计和GNSS多模态传感器数据融合技术，对动物行为进行现场分类。
AI.motivation: 单一传感器数据难以准确捕捉动物行为特征，尤其对行走和饮水等低频但重要的行为识别效果有限。
AI.method: 提出两种融合方法：1）提取GNSS的三点新特征与加速度计特征拼接后输入MLP分类器；2）分别用单模态数据训练MLP后融合后验概率。
AI.result: 交叉验证显示两种方法均显著提升分类性能，后验概率融合法在准确率、资源消耗和鲁棒性方面优于特征拼接法。
AI.conclusion: 基于后验概率融合的多模态算法更适合嵌入式系统部署，兼具高精度与低资源占用优势。

However, the multimodal animal behavior classification algorithm based on posterior probability fusion is preferable to the one based on feature concatenation as it delivers better classification accuracy, has less computational and memory complexity, is more robust to sensor data failure, and enjoys better modularity. 在本文中，我们研究了来自多种传感模式（即加速度测量和全球导航卫星系统（GNSS））的数据对动物行为进行分类的用途。我们从 GNSS 数据中提取了三个新特征，即距水点的距离、中值速度和中值估计水平位置误差。我们通过两种方法结合来​​自加速度测量和 GNSS 数据的信息。第一种方法基于将从两个传感器数据中提取的特征串联起来，并将串联的特征向量输入多层感知器 (MLP) 分类器。第二种方法基于融合两个 MLP 分类器预测的后验概率。每个分类器的输入是从一种传感模式的数据中提取的特征。我们使用通过智能牛项圈标签和耳标收集的两个真实世界数据集来评估所开发的多模式动物行为分类算法的性能。留一动物交叉验证结果表明，与仅使用一种传感模式的数据相比，两种方法都显着提高了分类性能。对于不常见但重要的散步和饮酒行为来说，这一点更为值得注意。基于这两种方法开发的算法需要很少的计算和内存资源，因此适合在我们的项圈标签和耳标的嵌入式系统上实现。然而，基于后验概率融合的多模态动物行为分类算法优于基于特征串联的多模态动物行为分类算法，因为它具有更好的分类精度，具有更少的计算和存储复杂性，对传感器数据故障更鲁棒，并且具有更好的模块化性。 本文研究利用加速度计和GNSS多模态传感器数据融合技术，对动物行为进行现场分类。 Reza Arablouei,Ziwei Wang,Greg J. Bishop-Hurley,Jiajun Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SP

title: MaskRange: A Mask-classification Model for Range-view based LiDAR Segmentation
title_zh: MaskRange：基于范围视图的激光雷达分割的掩模分类模型
abstract: Range-view based LiDAR segmentation methods are attractive for practical applications due to their direct inheritance from efficient 2D CNN architectures. In literature, most range-view based methods follow the per-pixel classification paradigm. Recently, in the image segmentation domain, another paradigm formulates segmentation as a mask-classification problem and has achieved remarkable performance. This raises an interesting question: can the mask-classification paradigm benefit the range-view based LiDAR segmentation and achieve better performance than the counterpart per-pixel paradigm? To answer this question, we propose a unified mask-classification model, MaskRange, for the range-view based LiDAR semantic and panoptic segmentation. Along with the new paradigm, we also propose a novel data augmentation method to deal with overfitting, context-reliance, and class-imbalance problems. Extensive experiments are conducted on the SemanticKITTI benchmark. Among all published range-view based methods, our MaskRange achieves state-of-the-art performance with $66.10$ mIoU on semantic segmentation and promising results with $53.10$ PQ on panoptic segmentation with high efficiency. Our code will be released.
summary: Range-view based LiDAR segmentation methods are attractive for practical applications due to their direct inheritance from efficient 2D CNN architectures. In literature, most range-view based methods follow the per-pixel classification paradigm. Recently, in the image segmentation domain, another paradigm formulates segmentation as a mask-classification problem and has achieved remarkable performance. This raises an interesting question: can the mask-classification paradigm benefit the range-view based LiDAR segmentation and achieve better performance than the counterpart per-pixel paradigm? To answer this question, we propose a unified mask-classification model, MaskRange, for the range-view based LiDAR semantic and panoptic segmentation. Along with the new paradigm, we also propose a novel data augmentation method to deal with overfitting, context-reliance, and class-imbalance problems. Extensive experiments are conducted on the SemanticKITTI benchmark. Among all published range-view based methods, our MaskRange achieves state-of-the-art performance with $66.10$ mIoU on semantic segmentation and promising results with $53.10$ PQ on panoptic segmentation with high efficiency. Our code will be released.
abstract_zh: 基于范围视图的 LiDAR 分割方法由于直接继承自高效的 2D CNN 架构，因此对实际应用很有吸引力。在文献中，大多数基于范围视图的方法都遵循每像素分类范例。最近，在图像分割领域，另一种范式将分割表述为掩模分类问题，并取得了显着的性能。这就提出了一个有趣的问题：掩模分类范式是否可以使基于距离视图的激光雷达分割受益，并获得比对应的每像素范式更好的性能？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一个统一的掩模分类模型 MaskRange，用于基于范围视图的 LiDAR 语义和全景分割。除了新范式之外，我们还提出了一种新颖的数据增强方法来处理过度拟合、上下文依赖和类不平衡问题。在 SemanticKITTI 基准上进行了大量的实验。在所有已发布的基于范围视图的方法中，我们的 MaskRange 在语义分割上以 66.10$ mIoU 实现了最先进的性能，在全景分割上以 53.10$ PQ 实现了高效率的有希望的结果。我们的代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码分类的范围视图LiDAR分割模型MaskRange，用于语义和全景分割。
AI.motivation: 现有范围视图LiDAR分割方法多采用逐像素分类范式，而图像分割领域中的掩码分类范式表现出更优性能，因此探索其在LiDAR分割中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 设计统一的掩码分类模型MaskRange，并提出新的数据增强方法以解决过拟合、上下文依赖和类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI基准测试中，MaskRange达到66.10 mIoU（语义分割）和53.10 PQ（全景分割），均优于现有范围视图方法。
AI.conclusion: 掩码分类范式有效提升范围视图LiDAR分割性能，结合数据增强方法可实现高效率与高精度的分割结果。

title: Contrastive Learning of Features between Images and LiDAR
title_zh: 图像与激光雷达特征对比学习
abstract: Image and Point Clouds provide different information for robots. Finding the correspondences between data from different sensors is crucial for various tasks such as localization, mapping, and navigation. Learning-based descriptors have been developed for single sensors; there is little work on cross-modal features. This work treats learning cross-modal features as a dense contrastive learning problem. We propose a Tuple-Circle loss function for cross-modality feature learning. Furthermore, to learn good features and not lose generality, we developed a variant of widely used PointNet++ architecture for point cloud and U-Net CNN architecture for images. Moreover, we conduct experiments on a real-world dataset to show the effectiveness of our loss function and network structure. We show that our models indeed learn information from both images as well as LiDAR by visualizing the features.
summary: Image and Point Clouds provide different information for robots. Finding the correspondences between data from different sensors is crucial for various tasks such as localization, mapping, and navigation. Learning-based descriptors have been developed for single sensors; there is little work on cross-modal features. This work treats learning cross-modal features as a dense contrastive learning problem. We propose a Tuple-Circle loss function for cross-modality feature learning. Furthermore, to learn good features and not lose generality, we developed a variant of widely used PointNet++ architecture for point cloud and U-Net CNN architecture for images. Moreover, we conduct experiments on a real-world dataset to show the effectiveness of our loss function and network structure. We show that our models indeed learn information from both images as well as LiDAR by visualizing the features.
abstract_zh: 图像和点云为机器人提供不同的信息。找到来自不同传感器的数据之间的对应关系对于定位、绘图和导航等各种任务至关重要。已经为单个传感器开发了基于学习的描述符；关于跨模式功能的工作很少。这项工作将学习跨模态特征视为密集对比学习问题。我们提出了用于跨模态特征学习的元组圆损失函数。此外，为了学习好的特征并且不失通用性，我们开发了广泛使用的 PointNet++ 架构的变体（用于点云）和 U-Net CNN 架构（用于图像）。此外，我们在现实世界的数据集上进行了实验，以展示我们的损失函数和网络结构的有效性。我们表明，我们的模型确实通过可视化特征从图像和激光雷达中学习信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态特征学习方法，通过对比学习将图像与LiDAR点云数据的特征进行对齐，以提升机器人感知任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 图像与LiDAR数据提供互补信息，但现有方法多专注于单模态特征学习，缺乏对跨模态特征的有效建模，限制了多传感器融合在定位、建图等任务中的应用。
AI.method: 将跨模态特征学习建模为密集对比学习问题，设计Tuple-Circle损失函数，并改进PointNet++和U-Net网络结构分别处理点云和图像数据。
AI.result: 在真实数据集实验中验证了所提损失函数和网络结构的有效性，可视化结果表明模型能够同时学习图像与LiDAR的语义信息。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法成功实现了图像与LiDAR的跨模态特征对齐，为多模态传感器融合的机器人感知任务提供了有效解决方案。

title: Eco-driving for Electric Connected Vehicles at Signalized Intersections: A Parameterized Reinforcement Learning approach
title_zh: 信号交叉口电动联网车辆的生态驾驶：参数化强化学习方法
abstract: This paper proposes an eco-driving framework for electric connected vehicles (CVs) based on reinforcement learning (RL) to improve vehicle energy efficiency at signalized intersections. The vehicle agent is specified by integrating the model-based car-following policy, lane-changing policy, and the RL policy, to ensure safe operation of a CV. Subsequently, a Markov Decision Process (MDP) is formulated, which enables the vehicle to perform longitudinal control and lateral decisions, jointly optimizing the car-following and lane-changing behaviors of the CVs in the vicinity of intersections. Then, the hybrid action space is parameterized as a hierarchical structure and thereby trains the agents with two-dimensional motion patterns in a dynamic traffic environment. Finally, our proposed methods are evaluated in SUMO software from both a single-vehicle-based perspective and a flow-based perspective. The results show that our strategy can significantly reduce energy consumption by learning proper action schemes without any interruption of other human-driven vehicles (HDVs).
summary: This paper proposes an eco-driving framework for electric connected vehicles (CVs) based on reinforcement learning (RL) to improve vehicle energy efficiency at signalized intersections. The vehicle agent is specified by integrating the model-based car-following policy, lane-changing policy, and the RL policy, to ensure safe operation of a CV. Subsequently, a Markov Decision Process (MDP) is formulated, which enables the vehicle to perform longitudinal control and lateral decisions, jointly optimizing the car-following and lane-changing behaviors of the CVs in the vicinity of intersections. Then, the hybrid action space is parameterized as a hierarchical structure and thereby trains the agents with two-dimensional motion patterns in a dynamic traffic environment. Finally, our proposed methods are evaluated in SUMO software from both a single-vehicle-based perspective and a flow-based perspective. The results show that our strategy can significantly reduce energy consumption by learning proper action schemes without any interruption of other human-driven vehicles (HDVs).
abstract_zh: This paper proposes an eco-driving framework for electric connected vehicles (CVs) based on reinforcement learning (RL) to improve vehicle energy efficiency at signalized intersections. The vehicle agent is specified by integrating the model-based car-following policy, lane-changing policy, and the RL policy, to ensure safe operation of a CV. Subsequently, a Markov Decision Process (MDP) is formulated, which enables the vehicle to perform longitudinal control and lateral decisions, jointly optimizing the car-following and lane-changing behaviors of the CVs in the vicinity of intersections. Then, the hybrid action space is parameterized as a hierarchical structure and thereby trains the agents with two-dimensional motion patterns in a dynamic traffic environment.最后，我们提出的方法在 SUMO 软件中从基于单车的角度和基于流的角度进行了评估。 The results show that our strategy can significantly reduce energy consumption by learning proper action schemes without any interruption of other human-driven vehicles (HDVs).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的电动联网车辆在信号交叉口的生态驾驶框架，以提高能量效率。
AI.motivation: 为提升电动联网车辆在交叉口区域的能源效率并确保安全驾驶，需结合模型驱动策略与强化学习方法。
AI.method: 整合基于模型的跟车与变道策略，构建马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并采用参数化分层动作空间进行强化学习训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该策略在SUMO仿真中有效降低能耗，且未干扰人类驾驶车辆的正常行驶。
AI.conclusion: 参数化强化学习方法可优化电动联网车辆的生态驾驶行为，实现能耗降低与安全驾驶的协同目标。

search_text: Eco-driving for Electric Connected Vehicles at Signalized Intersections: A Parameterized Reinforcement Learning approach 信号交叉口电动联网车辆的生态驾驶：参数化强化学习方法 This paper proposes an eco-driving framework for electric connected vehicles (CVs) based on reinforcement learning (RL) to improve vehicle energy efficiency at signalized intersections. The vehicle agent is specified by integrating the model-based car-following policy, lane-changing policy, and the RL policy, to ensure safe operation of a CV. Subsequently, a Markov Decision Process (MDP) is formulated, which enables the vehicle to perform longitudinal control and lateral decisions, jointly optimizing the car-following and lane-changing behaviors of the CVs in the vicinity of intersections. Then, the hybrid action space is parameterized as a hierarchical structure and thereby trains the agents with two-dimensional motion patterns in a dynamic traffic environment. Finally, our proposed methods are evaluated in SUMO software from both a single-vehicle-based perspective and a flow-based perspective. The results show that our strategy can significantly reduce energy consumption by learning proper action schemes without any interruption of other human-driven vehicles (HDVs). This paper proposes an eco-driving framework for electric connected vehicles (CVs) based on reinforcement learning (RL) to improve vehicle energy efficiency at signalized intersections. The vehicle agent is specified by integrating the model-based car-following policy, lane-changing policy, and the RL policy, to ensure safe operation of a CV. Subsequently, a Markov Decision Process (MDP) is formulated, which enables the vehicle to perform longitudinal control and lateral decisions, jointly optimizing the car-following and lane-changing behaviors of the CVs in the vicinity of intersections. Then, the hybrid action space is parameterized as a hierarchical structure and thereby trains the agents with two-dimensional motion patterns in a dynamic traffic environment.最后，我们提出的方法在 SUMO 软件中从基于单车的角度和基于流的角度进行了评估。 The results show that our strategy can significantly reduce energy consumption by learning proper action schemes without any interruption of other human-driven vehicles (HDVs). 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的电动联网车辆在信号交叉口的生态驾驶框架，以提高能量效率。 Xia Jiang,Jian Zhang,Dan Li cs.RO,cs.AI
